authors_text: Asher Elmquist,Radu Serban,Dan Negrut
title: A performance contextualization approach to validating camera models for robot simulation
title_zh: 验证机器人仿真相机模型的性能情境化方法
abstract: The focus of this contribution is on camera simulation as it comes into play in simulating autonomous robots for their virtual prototyping. We propose a camera model validation methodology based on the performance of a perception algorithm and the context in which the performance is measured. This approach is different than traditional validation of synthetic images, which is often done at a pixel or feature level, and tends to require matching pairs of synthetic and real images. Due to the high cost and constraints of acquiring paired images, the proposed approach is based on datasets that are not necessarily paired. Within a real and a simulated dataset, A and B, respectively, we find subsets Ac and Bc of similar content and judge, statistically, the perception algorithm's response to these similar subsets. This validation approach obtains a statistical measure of performance similarity, as well as a measure of similarity between the content of A and B. The methodology is demonstrated using images generated with Chrono::Sensor and a scaled autonomous vehicle, using an object detector as the perception algorithm. The results demonstrate the ability to quantify (i) differences between simulated and real data; (ii) the propensity of training methods to mitigate the sim-to-real gap; and (iii) the context overlap between two datasets.
summary: The focus of this contribution is on camera simulation as it comes into play in simulating autonomous robots for their virtual prototyping. We propose a camera model validation methodology based on the performance of a perception algorithm and the context in which the performance is measured. This approach is different than traditional validation of synthetic images, which is often done at a pixel or feature level, and tends to require matching pairs of synthetic and real images. Due to the high cost and constraints of acquiring paired images, the proposed approach is based on datasets that are not necessarily paired. Within a real and a simulated dataset, A and B, respectively, we find subsets Ac and Bc of similar content and judge, statistically, the perception algorithm's response to these similar subsets. This validation approach obtains a statistical measure of performance similarity, as well as a measure of similarity between the content of A and B. The methodology is demonstrated using images generated with Chrono::Sensor and a scaled autonomous vehicle, using an object detector as the perception algorithm. The results demonstrate the ability to quantify (i) differences between simulated and real data; (ii) the propensity of training methods to mitigate the sim-to-real gap; and (iii) the context overlap between two datasets.
abstract_zh: 本贡献的重点是相机模拟，因为它在模拟自主机器人的虚拟原型中发挥着作用。我们提出了一种基于感知算法的性能和测量性能的上下文的相机模型验证方法。这种方法与传统的合成图像验证不同，传统的合成图像验证通常在像素或特征级别完成，并且往往需要匹配合成图像和真实图像对。由于获取配对图像的高成本和限制，所提出的方法基于不一定配对的数据集。在真实数据集 A 和模拟数据集 B 中，我们分别找到相似内容的子集 Ac 和 Bc，并从统计角度判断感知算法对这些相似子集的响应。该验证方法获得了性能相似性的统计测量，以及 A 和 B 内容之间相似性的测量。该方法通过使用 Chrono::Sensor 和缩放的自动驾驶车辆生成的图像进行演示，并使用对象检测器作为感知算法。结果证明了量化（i）模拟数据和真实数据之间差异的能力； (ii) 培训方法缩小模拟与真实差距的倾向； (iii) 两个数据集之间的上下文重叠。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于感知算法性能和上下文的相机模型验证方法，用于机器人模拟中的虚拟原型设计。
AI.motivation: 传统合成图像验证依赖像素级匹配和成对图像，成本高且受限。本文旨在提出无需成对数据集的验证方法，解决实际应用中的约束问题。
AI.method: 从真实和模拟数据集中提取相似内容子集，通过统计感知算法对这些子集的响应，量化性能相似性及数据集内容相似性。
AI.result: 验证了模拟与真实数据的差异、训练方法缓解仿真到现实差距的效果，以及数据集间的上下文重叠程度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统计性能相似性，为机器人仿真中的相机模型验证提供了无需成对图像的可行方案，有效评估仿真与现实的差距。

authors_text: Alper Ahmetoglu,Erhan Oztop,Emre Ugur
title: Learning Multi-Object Symbols for Manipulation with Attentive Deep Effect Predictors
title_zh: 学习多对象符号以通过细心的深度效应预测器进行操作
abstract: In this paper, we propose a concept learning architecture that enables a robot to build symbols through self-exploration by interacting with a varying number of objects. Our aim is to allow a robot to learn concepts without constraints, such as a fixed number of interacted objects or pre-defined symbolic structures. As such, the sought architecture should be able to build symbols for objects such as single objects that can be grasped, object stacks that cannot be grasped together, or other composite dynamic structures. Towards this end, we propose a novel architecture, a self-attentive predictive encoder-decoder network with binary activation layers. We show the validity of the proposed network through a robotic manipulation setup involving a varying number of rigid objects. The continuous sensorimotor experience of the robot is used by the proposed network to form effect predictors and symbolic structures that describe the interaction of the robot in a discrete way. We showed that the robot acquired reasoning capabilities to encode interaction dynamics of a varying number of objects in different configurations using the discovered symbols. For example, the robot could reason that (possible multiple numbers of) objects on top of another object would move together if the object below is moved by the robot. We also showed that the discovered symbols can be used for planning to reach goals by training a higher-level neural network that makes pure symbolic reasoning.
summary: In this paper, we propose a concept learning architecture that enables a robot to build symbols through self-exploration by interacting with a varying number of objects. Our aim is to allow a robot to learn concepts without constraints, such as a fixed number of interacted objects or pre-defined symbolic structures. As such, the sought architecture should be able to build symbols for objects such as single objects that can be grasped, object stacks that cannot be grasped together, or other composite dynamic structures. Towards this end, we propose a novel architecture, a self-attentive predictive encoder-decoder network with binary activation layers. We show the validity of the proposed network through a robotic manipulation setup involving a varying number of rigid objects. The continuous sensorimotor experience of the robot is used by the proposed network to form effect predictors and symbolic structures that describe the interaction of the robot in a discrete way. We showed that the robot acquired reasoning capabilities to encode interaction dynamics of a varying number of objects in different configurations using the discovered symbols. For example, the robot could reason that (possible multiple numbers of) objects on top of another object would move together if the object below is moved by the robot. We also showed that the discovered symbols can be used for planning to reach goals by training a higher-level neural network that makes pure symbolic reasoning.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种概念学习架构，使机器人能够通过与不同数量的物体交互进行自我探索来构建符号。我们的目标是让机器人不受限制地学习概念，例如固定数量的交互对象或预定义的符号结构。因此，所寻求的架构应该能够为对象构建符号，例如可以抓取的单个对象、不能一起抓取的对象堆栈或其他复合动态结构。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，即具有二进制激活层的自我关注预测编码器-解码器网络。我们通过涉及不同数量刚性物体的机器人操纵设置来展示所提出的网络的有效性。所提出的网络使用机器人的连续感觉运动经验来形成以离散方式描述机器人交互的效果预测器和符号结构。我们表明，机器人获得了推理能力，可以使用发现的符号对不同配置中不同数量的物体的交互动态进行编码。例如，机器人可以推断，如果机器人移动下面的物体，则另一个物体顶部的（可能多个）物体将一起移动。我们还表明，发现的符号可用于通过训练进行纯符号推理的高级神经网络来规划实现目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种机器人通过自我探索学习多对象符号的架构，以处理不同数量和配置的物体交互。
AI.motivation: 传统方法常依赖固定数量的物体或预定义符号结构，限制了机器人对动态复杂环境的适应能力。
AI.method: 设计自注意力预测编码器-解码器网络，结合二值激活层，利用连续传感器运动经验生成离散符号和效应预测器。
AI.result: 机器人成功学习到物体堆叠等复合结构的符号表示，并能通过符号推理规划实现目标。
AI.conclusion: 该架构有效解决了多物体动态交互的符号学习问题，为机器人自主规划提供了新方法。

authors_text: Jiahui Fu,Yilun Du,Kurran Singh,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,John J. Leonard
title: Robust Change Detection Based on Neural Descriptor Fields
title_zh: 基于神经描述符场的鲁棒变化检测
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, and 2 tables. Accepted to IROS 2022. Project webpage: https://yilundu.github.io/ndf_change
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, and 2 tables. Accepted to IROS 2022. Project webpage: https://yilundu.github.io/ndf_change
abstract: The ability to reason about changes in the environment is crucial for robots operating over extended periods of time. Agents are expected to capture changes during operation so that actions can be followed to ensure a smooth progression of the working session. However, varying viewing angles and accumulated localization errors make it easy for robots to falsely detect changes in the surrounding world due to low observation overlap and drifted object associations. In this paper, based on the recently proposed category-level Neural Descriptor Fields (NDFs), we develop an object-level online change detection approach that is robust to partially overlapping observations and noisy localization results. Utilizing the shape completion capability and SE(3)-equivariance of NDFs, we represent objects with compact shape codes encoding full object shapes from partial observations. The objects are then organized in a spatial tree structure based on object centers recovered from NDFs for fast queries of object neighborhoods. By associating objects via shape code similarity and comparing local object-neighbor spatial layout, our proposed approach demonstrates robustness to low observation overlap and localization noises. We conduct experiments on both synthetic and real-world sequences and achieve improved change detection results compared to multiple baseline methods. Project webpage: https://yilundu.github.io/ndf_change
summary: The ability to reason about changes in the environment is crucial for robots operating over extended periods of time. Agents are expected to capture changes during operation so that actions can be followed to ensure a smooth progression of the working session. However, varying viewing angles and accumulated localization errors make it easy for robots to falsely detect changes in the surrounding world due to low observation overlap and drifted object associations. In this paper, based on the recently proposed category-level Neural Descriptor Fields (NDFs), we develop an object-level online change detection approach that is robust to partially overlapping observations and noisy localization results. Utilizing the shape completion capability and SE(3)-equivariance of NDFs, we represent objects with compact shape codes encoding full object shapes from partial observations. The objects are then organized in a spatial tree structure based on object centers recovered from NDFs for fast queries of object neighborhoods. By associating objects via shape code similarity and comparing local object-neighbor spatial layout, our proposed approach demonstrates robustness to low observation overlap and localization noises. We conduct experiments on both synthetic and real-world sequences and achieve improved change detection results compared to multiple baseline methods. Project webpage: https://yilundu.github.io/ndf_change
abstract_zh: 推理环境变化的能力对于长时间运行的机器人至关重要。客服人员需要捕获操作期间的变化，以便采取行动以确保工作会话顺利进行。然而，由于观察重叠度低和漂移的物体关联，不同的视角和累积的定位误差使得机器人很容易错误地检测周围世界的变化。在本文中，基于最近提出的类别级神经描述符场（NDF），我们开发了一种对象级在线变化检测方法，该方法对部分重叠的观察和噪声定位结果具有鲁棒性。利用 NDF 的形状完成能力和 SE(3) 等变性，我们用紧凑的形状代码来表示对象，该代码从部分观察中编码完整的对象形状。然后，基于从 NDF 恢复的对象中心，将对象组织成空间树结构，以便快速查询对象邻域。通过形状代码相似性关联对象并比较局部对象-邻居空间布局，我们提出的方法展示了对低观察重叠和定位噪声的鲁棒性。我们对合成序列和真实序列进行了实验，与多种基线方法相比，获得了改进的变化检测结果。项目网页：https://yilundu.github.io/ndf_change

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经描述符场（NDF）的鲁棒变化检测方法，用于机器人在长期运行中准确识别环境变化。
AI.motivation: 机器人在长期运行中需检测环境变化，但视角变化和定位误差易导致误检。现有方法在部分重叠观测和噪声定位下表现不足。
AI.method: 利用NDF的形状补全能力和SE(3)等变性，通过紧凑形状编码表示物体，并构建基于物体中心的空间树结构，结合形状码相似性与局部空间布局对比实现鲁棒检测。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上优于多种基线方法，有效提升低观测重叠和定位噪声下的变化检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过形状编码与空间结构设计，显著增强了环境变化检测的鲁棒性，为长期机器人操作提供可靠支持。

search_text: Robust Change Detection Based on Neural Descriptor Fields 基于神经描述符场的鲁棒变化检测 The ability to reason about changes in the environment is crucial for robots operating over extended periods of time. Agents are expected to capture changes during operation so that actions can be followed to ensure a smooth progression of the working session. However, varying viewing angles and accumulated localization errors make it easy for robots to falsely detect changes in the surrounding world due to low observation overlap and drifted object associations. In this paper, based on the recently proposed category-level Neural Descriptor Fields (NDFs), we develop an object-level online change detection approach that is robust to partially overlapping observations and noisy localization results. Utilizing the shape completion capability and SE(3)-equivariance of NDFs, we represent objects with compact shape codes encoding full object shapes from partial observations. The objects are then organized in a spatial tree structure based on object centers recovered from NDFs for fast queries of object neighborhoods. By associating objects via shape code similarity and comparing local object-neighbor spatial layout, our proposed approach demonstrates robustness to low observation overlap and localization noises. We conduct experiments on both synthetic and real-world sequences and achieve improved change detection results compared to multiple baseline methods. Project webpage: https://yilundu.github.io/ndf_change 推理环境变化的能力对于长时间运行的机器人至关重要。客服人员需要捕获操作期间的变化，以便采取行动以确保工作会话顺利进行。然而，由于观察重叠度低和漂移的物体关联，不同的视角和累积的定位误差使得机器人很容易错误地检测周围世界的变化。在本文中，基于最近提出的类别级神经描述符场（NDF），我们开发了一种对象级在线变化检测方法，该方法对部分重叠的观察和噪声定位结果具有鲁棒性。利用 NDF 的形状完成能力和 SE(3) 等变性，我们用紧凑的形状代码来表示对象，该代码从部分观察中编码完整的对象形状。然后，基于从 NDF 恢复的对象中心，将对象组织成空间树结构，以便快速查询对象邻域。通过形状代码相似性关联对象并比较局部对象-邻居空间布局，我们提出的方法展示了对低观察重叠和定位噪声的鲁棒性。我们对合成序列和真实序列进行了实验，与多种基线方法相比，获得了改进的变化检测结果。项目网页：https://yilundu.github.io/ndf_change 本文提出一种基于神经描述符场（NDF）的鲁棒变化检测方法，用于机器人在长期运行中准确识别环境变化。 Jiahui Fu,Yilun Du,Kurran Singh,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,John J. Leonard cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jun Shern Chan,Michael Pieler,Jonathan Jao,Jérémy Scheurer,Ethan Perez
title: Few-shot Adaptation Works with UnpredicTable Data
title_zh: 少样本适应适用于不可预测的表数据
abstract: Prior work on language models (LMs) shows that training on a large number of diverse tasks improves few-shot learning (FSL) performance on new tasks. We take this to the extreme, automatically extracting 413,299 tasks from internet tables - orders of magnitude more than the next-largest public datasets. Finetuning on the resulting dataset leads to improved FSL performance on Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks, but not proportionally to dataset scale. In fact, we find that narrow subsets of our dataset sometimes outperform more diverse datasets. For example, finetuning on software documentation from support.google.com raises FSL performance by a mean of +7.5% on 52 downstream tasks, which beats training on 40 human-curated NLP datasets (+6.7%). Finetuning on various narrow datasets leads to similar broad improvements across test tasks, suggesting that the gains are not from domain adaptation but adapting to FSL in general. We do not observe clear patterns between the datasets that lead to FSL gains, leaving open questions about why certain data helps with FSL.
summary: Prior work on language models (LMs) shows that training on a large number of diverse tasks improves few-shot learning (FSL) performance on new tasks. We take this to the extreme, automatically extracting 413,299 tasks from internet tables - orders of magnitude more than the next-largest public datasets. Finetuning on the resulting dataset leads to improved FSL performance on Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks, but not proportionally to dataset scale. In fact, we find that narrow subsets of our dataset sometimes outperform more diverse datasets. For example, finetuning on software documentation from support.google.com raises FSL performance by a mean of +7.5% on 52 downstream tasks, which beats training on 40 human-curated NLP datasets (+6.7%). Finetuning on various narrow datasets leads to similar broad improvements across test tasks, suggesting that the gains are not from domain adaptation but adapting to FSL in general. We do not observe clear patterns between the datasets that lead to FSL gains, leaving open questions about why certain data helps with FSL.
abstract_zh: 先前对语言模型（LM）的研究表明，对大量不同任务的训练可以提高新任务的小样本学习（FSL）性能。我们将这一点发挥到了极致，从互联网表格中自动提取了 413,299 个任务——比第二大公共数据集多了几个数量级。对生成的数据集进行微调可以提高自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务上的 FSL 性能，但与数据集规模不成比例。事实上，我们发现数据集的狭窄子集有时优于更多样化的数据集。例如，对 support.google.com 上的软件文档进行微调后，52 个下游任务的 FSL 性能平均提高了 7.5%，超过了 40 个人工管理的 NLP 数据集上的训练 (+6.7%)。对各种狭窄数据集的微调会在测试任务中带来类似的广泛改进，这表明收益不是来自领域适应，而是来自一般的 FSL 适应。我们没有观察到导致 FSL 增益的数据集之间的明确模式，因此留下了关于为什么某些数据有助于 FSL 的悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大规模任务数据对小样本学习（FSL）的影响，通过从互联网表格中提取超大规模任务数据集进行微调，探索其在NLP任务中的效果。
AI.motivation: 先前研究表明多样化任务训练可提升FSL性能，但未探索极端规模数据集或数据多样性与效果的潜在关系，且领域适应与通用FSL适应的差异尚不明确。
AI.method: 自动从互联网表格中提取41万+任务构建数据集，通过微调模型测试其在下游NLP任务中的FSL表现，对比不同规模及领域子集的效果差异。
AI.result: 微调后FSL性能提升但未随数据量线性增长，特定窄领域数据（如Google文档）提升幅度（+7.5%）优于人工整理数据集，且提升具有跨任务泛化性，非领域特异性适应。
AI.conclusion: 窄领域数据可能通过增强通用FSL能力带来性能提升，但有效数据特征与选择机制仍需进一步研究。

authors_text: Mahdi Nazeri,Ali Mollahosseini,Iman Izadi
title: CBAG: An Efficient Genetic Algorithm for the Graph Burning Problem
title_zh: CBAG：一种解决图燃烧问题的高效遗传算法
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables. Source code used for this work is available online: see https://github.com/aloomya/CBAG
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables. Source code used for this work is available online: see https://github.com/aloomya/CBAG
abstract: Information spread is an intriguing topic to study in network science, which investigates how information, influence, or contagion propagate through networks. Graph burning is a simplified deterministic model for how information spreads within networks. The complicated NP-complete nature of the problem makes it computationally difficult to solve using exact algorithms. Accordingly, a number of heuristics and approximation algorithms have been proposed in the literature for the graph burning problem. In this paper, we propose an efficient genetic algorithm called Centrality BAsed Genetic-algorithm (CBAG) for solving the graph burning problem. Considering the unique characteristics of the graph burning problem, we introduce novel genetic operators, chromosome representation, and evaluation method. In the proposed algorithm, the well-known betweenness centrality is used as the backbone of our chromosome initialization procedure. The proposed algorithm is implemented and compared with previous heuristics and approximation algorithms on 15 benchmark graphs of different sizes. Based on the results, it can be seen that the proposed algorithm achieves better performance in comparison to the previous state-of-the-art heuristics. The complete source code is available online and can be used to find optimal or near-optimal solutions for the graph burning problem.
summary: Information spread is an intriguing topic to study in network science, which investigates how information, influence, or contagion propagate through networks. Graph burning is a simplified deterministic model for how information spreads within networks. The complicated NP-complete nature of the problem makes it computationally difficult to solve using exact algorithms. Accordingly, a number of heuristics and approximation algorithms have been proposed in the literature for the graph burning problem. In this paper, we propose an efficient genetic algorithm called Centrality BAsed Genetic-algorithm (CBAG) for solving the graph burning problem. Considering the unique characteristics of the graph burning problem, we introduce novel genetic operators, chromosome representation, and evaluation method. In the proposed algorithm, the well-known betweenness centrality is used as the backbone of our chromosome initialization procedure. The proposed algorithm is implemented and compared with previous heuristics and approximation algorithms on 15 benchmark graphs of different sizes. Based on the results, it can be seen that the proposed algorithm achieves better performance in comparison to the previous state-of-the-art heuristics. The complete source code is available online and can be used to find optimal or near-optimal solutions for the graph burning problem.
abstract_zh: 信息传播是网络科学中一个有趣的研究课题，它研究信息、影响或传染如何通过网络传播。图燃烧是信息如何在网络中传播的简化确定性模型。该问题的复杂 NP 完全性质使得使用精确算法在计算上难以求解。因此，文献中针对图燃烧问题提出了许多启发式和近似算法。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为基于中心性遗传算法（CBAG）的高效遗传算法来解决图燃烧问题。考虑到图燃烧问题的独特特征，我们引入了新颖的遗传算子、染色体表示和评估方法。在所提出的算法中，众所周知的介数中心性被用作我们染色体初始化过程的支柱。在 15 个不同大小的基准图上实现了所提出的算法，并与之前的启发式和近似算法进行了比较。根据结果​​可以看出，与之前最先进的启发式算法相比，所提出的算法取得了更好的性能。完整的源代码可在线获取，可用于寻找图形燃烧问题的最佳或接近最佳的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的遗传算法CBAG，用于解决图燃烧问题。
AI.motivation: 图燃烧问题属于NP完全问题，传统精确算法难以解决，现有启发式算法和近似算法效果有限，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于中介中心性的染色体初始化方法，引入新型遗传操作符和评估机制，通过15个基准图测试验证算法性能。
AI.result: CBAG在多个基准图上表现优于现有最先进的启发式算法，能获得更优或接近最优解。
AI.conclusion: CBAG算法有效解决了图燃烧问题，源代码公开可用以支持进一步研究和应用。

Graph burning is a simplified deterministic model for how information spreads within networks. The complicated NP-complete nature of the problem makes it computationally difficult to solve using exact algorithms. Accordingly, a number of heuristics and approximation algorithms have been proposed in the literature for the graph burning problem. In this paper, we propose an efficient genetic algorithm called Centrality BAsed Genetic-algorithm (CBAG) for solving the graph burning problem. Considering the unique characteristics of the graph burning problem, we introduce novel genetic operators, chromosome representation, and evaluation method. In the proposed algorithm, the well-known betweenness centrality is used as the backbone of our chromosome initialization procedure. The proposed algorithm is implemented and compared with previous heuristics and approximation algorithms on 15 benchmark graphs of different sizes. Based on the results, it can be seen that the proposed algorithm achieves better performance in comparison to the previous state-of-the-art heuristics. The complete source code is available online and can be used to find optimal or near-optimal solutions for the graph burning problem. 信息传播是网络科学中一个有趣的研究课题，它研究信息、影响或传染如何通过网络传播。图燃烧是信息如何在网络中传播的简化确定性模型。该问题的复杂 NP 完全性质使得使用精确算法在计算上难以求解。因此，文献中针对图燃烧问题提出了许多启发式和近似算法。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为基于中心性遗传算法（CBAG）的高效遗传算法来解决图燃烧问题。考虑到图燃烧问题的独特特征，我们引入了新颖的遗传算子、染色体表示和评估方法。在所提出的算法中，众所周知的介数中心性被用作我们染色体初始化过程的支柱。在 15 个不同大小的基准图上实现了所提出的算法，并与之前的启发式和近似算法进行了比较。根据结果​​可以看出，与之前最先进的启发式算法相比，所提出的算法取得了更好的性能。完整的源代码可在线获取，可用于寻找图形燃烧问题的最佳或接近最佳的解决方案。 本文提出了一种高效的遗传算法CBAG，用于解决图燃烧问题。 Mahdi Nazeri,Ali Mollahosseini,Iman Izadi cs.NE

authors_text: Z. Guo,C. Chen,E. S. Chng
title: DENT-DDSP: Data-efficient noisy speech generator using differentiable digital signal processors for explicit distortion modelling and noise-robust speech recognition
title_zh: DENT-DDSP：数据高效的噪声语音生成器，使用可微分数字信号处理器进行显式失真建模和抗噪声语音识别
abstract: The performances of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems degrade drastically under noisy conditions. Explicit distortion modelling (EDM), as a feature compensation step, is able to enhance ASR systems under such conditions by simulating the in-domain noisy speeches from the clean counterparts. Yet, existing distortion models are either non-trainable or unexplainable and often lack controllability and generalization ability. In this paper, we propose a fully explainable and controllable model: DENT-DDSP to achieve EDM. DENT-DDSP utilizes novel differentiable digital signal processing (DDSP) components and requires only 10 seconds of training data to achieve high fidelity. The experiment shows that the simulated noisy data from DENT-DDSP achieves the highest simulation fidelity compared to other baseline models in terms of multi-scale spectral loss (MSSL). Moreover, to validate whether the data simulated by DENT-DDSP are able to replace the scarce in-domain noisy data in the noise-robust ASR tasks, several downstream ASR models with the same architecture are trained using the simulated data and the real data. The experiment shows that the model trained with the simulated noisy data from DENT-DDSP achieves similar performances to the benchmark with a 2.7\% difference in terms of word error rate (WER). The code of the model is released online.
summary: The performances of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems degrade drastically under noisy conditions. Explicit distortion modelling (EDM), as a feature compensation step, is able to enhance ASR systems under such conditions by simulating the in-domain noisy speeches from the clean counterparts. Yet, existing distortion models are either non-trainable or unexplainable and often lack controllability and generalization ability. In this paper, we propose a fully explainable and controllable model: DENT-DDSP to achieve EDM. DENT-DDSP utilizes novel differentiable digital signal processing (DDSP) components and requires only 10 seconds of training data to achieve high fidelity. The experiment shows that the simulated noisy data from DENT-DDSP achieves the highest simulation fidelity compared to other baseline models in terms of multi-scale spectral loss (MSSL). Moreover, to validate whether the data simulated by DENT-DDSP are able to replace the scarce in-domain noisy data in the noise-robust ASR tasks, several downstream ASR models with the same architecture are trained using the simulated data and the real data. The experiment shows that the model trained with the simulated noisy data from DENT-DDSP achieves similar performances to the benchmark with a 2.7\% difference in terms of word error rate (WER). The code of the model is released online.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别（ASR）系统的性能在噪声条件下会急剧下降。显式失真建模 (EDM) 作为特征补偿步骤，能够通过模拟干净对应语音的域内噪声语音来增强此类条件下的 ASR 系统。然而，现有的失真模型要么不可训练，要么无法解释，并且往往缺乏可控性和泛化能力。在本文中，我们提出了一个完全可解释和可控的模型：DENT-DDSP来实现EDM。 DENT-DDSP 采用新颖的可微分数字信号处理 (DDSP) 组件，仅需要 10 秒的训练数据即可实现高保真度。实验表明，与其他基线模型相比，DENT-DDSP 的模拟噪声数据在多尺度光谱损失 (MSSL) 方面实现了最高的模拟保真度。此外，为了验证 DENT-DDSP 模拟的数据是否能够替代噪声鲁棒 ASR 任务中稀缺的域内噪声数据，使用模拟数据和真实数据训练几个具有相同架构的下游 ASR 模型。实验表明，使用 DENT-DDSP 的模拟噪声数据训练的模型实现了与基准相似的性能，但在字错误率 (WER) 方面存在 2.7% 的差异。该模型的代码已在线发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DENT-DDSP模型，通过可微分数字信号处理器实现显式失真建模，以提升噪声环境下的语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有失真建模方法存在不可训练、不可解释及泛化能力差的问题，难以有效提升噪声环境下的语音识别系统性能。
AI.method: 设计基于可微分数字信号处理（DDSP）的DENT-DDSP模型，仅需10秒训练数据即可生成高保真噪声语音，通过多尺度谱损失（MSSL）优化模型参数。
AI.result: DENT-DDSP在MSSL指标上优于基线模型，使用其生成的噪声数据训练的ASR模型与真实数据性能差异仅为2.7%（WER）。
AI.conclusion: DENT-DDSP实现了高效、可控的显式失真建模，可有效替代稀缺的真实噪声数据，提升噪声鲁棒语音识别性能。

authors_text: Lu Zhang,Lu Qi,Xu Yang,Hong Qiao,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Zhiyong Liu
title: Automatically Discovering Novel Visual Categories with Self-supervised Prototype Learning
title_zh: 通过自我监督原型学习自动发现新的视觉类别
abstract: This paper tackles the problem of novel category discovery (NCD), which aims to discriminate unknown categories in large-scale image collections. The NCD task is challenging due to the closeness to the real-world scenarios, where we have only encountered some partial classes and images. Unlike other works on the NCD, we leverage the prototypes to emphasize the importance of category discrimination and alleviate the issue of missing annotations of novel classes. Concretely, we propose a novel adaptive prototype learning method consisting of two main stages: prototypical representation learning and prototypical self-training. In the first stage, we obtain a robust feature extractor, which could serve for all images with base and novel categories. This ability of instance and category discrimination of the feature extractor is boosted by self-supervised learning and adaptive prototypes. In the second stage, we utilize the prototypes again to rectify offline pseudo labels and train a final parametric classifier for category clustering. We conduct extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets and demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method with state-of-the-art performance.
summary: This paper tackles the problem of novel category discovery (NCD), which aims to discriminate unknown categories in large-scale image collections. The NCD task is challenging due to the closeness to the real-world scenarios, where we have only encountered some partial classes and images. Unlike other works on the NCD, we leverage the prototypes to emphasize the importance of category discrimination and alleviate the issue of missing annotations of novel classes. Concretely, we propose a novel adaptive prototype learning method consisting of two main stages: prototypical representation learning and prototypical self-training. In the first stage, we obtain a robust feature extractor, which could serve for all images with base and novel categories. This ability of instance and category discrimination of the feature extractor is boosted by self-supervised learning and adaptive prototypes. In the second stage, we utilize the prototypes again to rectify offline pseudo labels and train a final parametric classifier for category clustering. We conduct extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets and demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method with state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了新类别发现（NCD）问题，旨在区分大规模图像集合中的未知类别。 NCD 任务具有挑战性，因为它与现实世界场景很接近，我们只遇到了一些部分类和图像。与其他非传染性疾病研究不同，我们利用原型来强调类别区分的重要性，并缓解新类别注释缺失的问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应原型学习方法，包括两个主要阶段：原型表示学习和原型自我训练。在第一阶段，我们获得了一个强大的特征提取器，它可以服务于所有具有基本类别和新类别的图像。自我监督学习和自适应原型增强了特征提取器的实例和类别区分能力。在第二阶段，我们再次利用原型来纠正离线伪标签并训练最终的参数分类器进行类别聚类。我们对四个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，并证明了所提出方法的有效性和鲁棒性以及最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督原型学习的方法，用于在大规模图像集合中自动发现新视觉类别。
AI.motivation: 传统新类别发现（NCD）任务面临部分类别缺失标注和类别区分困难的挑战，现有方法难以有效应对真实场景中的复杂情况。
AI.method: 方法包含两个阶段：第一阶段通过自监督学习和自适应原型学习获得鲁棒的特征提取器；第二阶段利用原型修正伪标签并训练最终分类器，实现类别聚类。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上实验验证了该方法的有效性和鲁棒性，取得了最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 自监督原型学习框架有效解决了NCD任务中类别区分和标注缺失问题，为视觉类别发现提供了新思路。

authors_text: Raghav Mehta,Changjian Shui,Brennan Nichyporuk,Tal Arbel
title: Information Gain Sampling for Active Learning in Medical Image Classification
title_zh: 医学图像分类中主动学习的信息增益采样
comment: Paper accepted at UNSURE 2022 workshop at MICCAI 2022
comments: Paper accepted at UNSURE 2022 workshop at MICCAI 2022
abstract: Large, annotated datasets are not widely available in medical image analysis due to the prohibitive time, costs, and challenges associated with labelling large datasets. Unlabelled datasets are easier to obtain, and in many contexts, it would be feasible for an expert to provide labels for a small subset of images. This work presents an information-theoretic active learning framework that guides the optimal selection of images from the unlabelled pool to be labeled based on maximizing the expected information gain (EIG) on an evaluation dataset. Experiments are performed on two different medical image classification datasets: multi-class diabetic retinopathy disease scale classification and multi-class skin lesion classification. Results indicate that by adapting EIG to account for class-imbalances, our proposed Adapted Expected Information Gain (AEIG) outperforms several popular baselines including the diversity based CoreSet and uncertainty based maximum entropy sampling. Specifically, AEIG achieves ~95% of overall performance with only 19% of the training data, while other active learning approaches require around 25%. We show that, by careful design choices, our model can be integrated into existing deep learning classifiers.
summary: Large, annotated datasets are not widely available in medical image analysis due to the prohibitive time, costs, and challenges associated with labelling large datasets. Unlabelled datasets are easier to obtain, and in many contexts, it would be feasible for an expert to provide labels for a small subset of images. This work presents an information-theoretic active learning framework that guides the optimal selection of images from the unlabelled pool to be labeled based on maximizing the expected information gain (EIG) on an evaluation dataset. Experiments are performed on two different medical image classification datasets: multi-class diabetic retinopathy disease scale classification and multi-class skin lesion classification. Results indicate that by adapting EIG to account for class-imbalances, our proposed Adapted Expected Information Gain (AEIG) outperforms several popular baselines including the diversity based CoreSet and uncertainty based maximum entropy sampling. Specifically, AEIG achieves ~95% of overall performance with only 19% of the training data, while other active learning approaches require around 25%. We show that, by careful design choices, our model can be integrated into existing deep learning classifiers.
abstract_zh: 由于与标记大型数据集相关的时间、成本和挑战，大型带注释的数据集在医学图像分析中并未广泛使用。未标记的数据集更容易获得，并且在许多情况下，专家为一小部分图像提供标签是可行的。这项工作提出了一种信息论主动学习框架，该框架根据最大化评估数据集上的预期信息增益（EIG）来指导从未标记池中最佳选择要标记的图像。在两个不同的医学图像分类数据集上进行实验：多类糖尿病视网膜病变疾病量表分类和多类皮肤病变分类。结果表明，通过调整 EIG 来解决类别不平衡，我们提出的自适应预期信息增益 (AEIG) 优于几种流行的基线，包括基于多样性的 CoreSet 和基于不确定性的最大熵采样。具体来说，AEIG 仅用 19% 的训练数据就实现了约 95% 的整体性能，而其他主动学习方法则需要 25% 左右。我们表明，通过仔细的设计选择，我们的模型可以集成到现有的深度学习分类器中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息论的主动学习框架，通过最大化预期信息增益（EIG）选择医学图像分类任务中最具信息量的样本进行标注。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中缺乏大规模标注数据集，且标注成本高昂，需通过主动学习高效选择少量样本以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 设计自适应预期信息增益（AEIG）方法，结合类别不平衡调整，从未标注数据中选择能最大化评估数据集信息增益的样本。
AI.result: 在糖尿病视网膜病变和皮肤病变分类数据集上，AEIG仅用19%训练数据即达到95%整体性能，优于其他主动学习方法所需的25%数据。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化信息增益计算方式，AEIG在医学图像分类中实现了高效样本选择，可有效集成到现有深度学习分类器中。

search_text: Information Gain Sampling for Active Learning in Medical Image Classification 医学图像分类中主动学习的信息增益采样 Large, annotated datasets are not widely available in medical image analysis due to the prohibitive time, costs, and challenges associated with labelling large datasets. Unlabelled datasets are easier to obtain, and in many contexts, it would be feasible for an expert to provide labels for a small subset of images. This work presents an information-theoretic active learning framework that guides the optimal selection of images from the unlabelled pool to be labeled based on maximizing the expected information gain (EIG) on an evaluation dataset. Experiments are performed on two different medical image classification datasets: multi-class diabetic retinopathy disease scale classification and multi-class skin lesion classification. Results indicate that by adapting EIG to account for class-imbalances, our proposed Adapted Expected Information Gain (AEIG) outperforms several popular baselines including the diversity based CoreSet and uncertainty based maximum entropy sampling. Specifically, AEIG achieves ~95% of overall performance with only 19% of the training data, while other active learning approaches require around 25%. We show that, by careful design choices, our model can be integrated into existing deep learning classifiers. 由于与标记大型数据集相关的时间、成本和挑战，大型带注释的数据集在医学图像分析中并未广泛使用。未标记的数据集更容易获得，并且在许多情况下，专家为一小部分图像提供标签是可行的。这项工作提出了一种信息论主动学习框架，该框架根据最大化评估数据集上的预期信息增益（EIG）来指导从未标记池中最佳选择要标记的图像。在两个不同的医学图像分类数据集上进行实验：多类糖尿病视网膜病变疾病量表分类和多类皮肤病变分类。结果表明，通过调整 EIG 来解决类别不平衡，我们提出的自适应预期信息增益 (AEIG) 优于几种流行的基线，包括基于多样性的 CoreSet 和基于不确定性的最大熵采样。具体来说，AEIG 仅用 19% 的训练数据就实现了约 95% 的整体性能，而其他主动学习方法则需要 25% 左右。我们表明，通过仔细的设计选择，我们的模型可以集成到现有的深度学习分类器中。 本文提出一种基于信息论的主动学习框架，通过最大化预期信息增益（EIG）选择医学图像分类任务中最具信息量的样本进行标注。 Raghav Mehta,Changjian Shui,Brennan Nichyporuk,Tal Arbel cs.CV

authors_text: Xulin Li,Yan Lu,Bin Liu,Yating Liu,Guojun Yin,Qi Chu,Jinyang Huang,Feng Zhu,Rui Zhao,Nenghai Yu
title: Counterfactual Intervention Feature Transfer for Visible-Infrared Person Re-identification
title_zh: 可见光-红外人重识别的反事实干预特征转移
abstract: Graph-based models have achieved great success in person re-identification tasks recently, which compute the graph topology structure (affinities) among different people first and then pass the information across them to achieve stronger features. But we find existing graph-based methods in the visible-infrared person re-identification task (VI-ReID) suffer from bad generalization because of two issues: 1) train-test modality balance gap, which is a property of VI-ReID task. The number of two modalities data are balanced in the training stage, but extremely unbalanced in inference, causing the low generalization of graph-based VI-ReID methods. 2) sub-optimal topology structure caused by the end-to-end learning manner to the graph module. We analyze that the well-trained input features weaken the learning of graph topology, making it not generalized enough during the inference process. In this paper, we propose a Counterfactual Intervention Feature Transfer (CIFT) method to tackle these problems. Specifically, a Homogeneous and Heterogeneous Feature Transfer (H2FT) is designed to reduce the train-test modality balance gap by two independent types of well-designed graph modules and an unbalanced scenario simulation. Besides, a Counterfactual Relation Intervention (CRI) is proposed to utilize the counterfactual intervention and causal effect tools to highlight the role of topology structure in the whole training process, which makes the graph topology structure more reliable. Extensive experiments on standard VI-ReID benchmarks demonstrate that CIFT outperforms the state-of-the-art methods under various settings.
summary: Graph-based models have achieved great success in person re-identification tasks recently, which compute the graph topology structure (affinities) among different people first and then pass the information across them to achieve stronger features. But we find existing graph-based methods in the visible-infrared person re-identification task (VI-ReID) suffer from bad generalization because of two issues: 1) train-test modality balance gap, which is a property of VI-ReID task. The number of two modalities data are balanced in the training stage, but extremely unbalanced in inference, causing the low generalization of graph-based VI-ReID methods. 2) sub-optimal topology structure caused by the end-to-end learning manner to the graph module. We analyze that the well-trained input features weaken the learning of graph topology, making it not generalized enough during the inference process. In this paper, we propose a Counterfactual Intervention Feature Transfer (CIFT) method to tackle these problems. Specifically, a Homogeneous and Heterogeneous Feature Transfer (H2FT) is designed to reduce the train-test modality balance gap by two independent types of well-designed graph modules and an unbalanced scenario simulation. Besides, a Counterfactual Relation Intervention (CRI) is proposed to utilize the counterfactual intervention and causal effect tools to highlight the role of topology structure in the whole training process, which makes the graph topology structure more reliable. Extensive experiments on standard VI-ReID benchmarks demonstrate that CIFT outperforms the state-of-the-art methods under various settings.
abstract_zh: 基于图的模型最近在行人重识别任务中取得了巨大成功，它首先计算不同人之间的图拓扑结构（亲和力），然后在他们之间传递信息以获得更强的特征。但我们发现可见光-红外行人重新识别任务（VI-ReID）中现有的基于图的方法由于两个问题而泛化性较差：1）训练-测试模态平衡间隙，这是 VI-ReID 任务的一个属性。两种模态数据的数量在训练阶段是平衡的，但在推理时极不平衡，导致基于图的VI-ReID方法的泛化性较低。 2）图模块的端到端学习方式导致拓扑结构次优。我们分析说，训练有素的输入特征削弱了图拓扑的学习，使其在推理过程中泛化不够。在本文中，我们提出了一种反事实干预特征转移（CIFT）方法来解决这些问题。具体来说，同质和异构特征转移（H2FT）旨在通过两种独立类型的精心设计的图形模块和不平衡的场景模拟来减少训练-测试模态平衡差距。此外，还提出了反事实关系干预（CRI），利用反事实干预和因果效应工具来突出拓扑结构在整个训练过程中的作用，使图拓扑结构更加可靠。对标准 VI-ReID 基准的大量实验表明，CIFT 在各种设置下都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于可见光-红外图像跨模态行人重识别（VI-ReID）的反事实干预特征迁移方法（CIFT），以解决现有图模型在该任务中的泛化性不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图模型在VI-ReID任务中因训练与测试阶段模态平衡差异及图结构学习不充分导致泛化能力差，需通过特征迁移与图结构优化提升性能。
AI.method: 设计了同质/异质特征迁移模块（H2FT）缓解模态不平衡问题，并引入反事实关系干预（CRI）通过因果推理强化图结构学习，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在标准VI-ReID基准数据集上，CIFT方法在多种设置下均优于现有最先进算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CIFT通过特征迁移与因果干预相结合，有效解决了VI-ReID中的模态不平衡与图结构退化问题，为跨模态重识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jonathan Stieber,Moritz Fuchs,Anirban Mukhopadhyay
title: FrOoDo: Framework for Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: FrOoDo：分布外检测框架
abstract: FrOoDo is an easy-to-use and flexible framework for Out-of-Distribution detection tasks in digital pathology. It can be used with PyTorch classification and segmentation models, and its modular design allows for easy extension. The goal is to automate the task of OoD Evaluation such that research can focus on the main goal of either designing new models, new methods or evaluating a new dataset. The code can be found at https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/FrOoDo.
summary: FrOoDo is an easy-to-use and flexible framework for Out-of-Distribution detection tasks in digital pathology. It can be used with PyTorch classification and segmentation models, and its modular design allows for easy extension. The goal is to automate the task of OoD Evaluation such that research can focus on the main goal of either designing new models, new methods or evaluating a new dataset. The code can be found at https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/FrOoDo.
abstract_zh: FrOoDo 是一个易于使用且灵活的框架，用于数字病理学中的分布外检测任务。它可以与 PyTorch 分类和分割模型一起使用，其模块化设计可以轻松扩展。目标是自动化 OoD 评估任务，以便研究可以集中于设计新模型、新方法或评估新数据集的主要目标。代码可以在 https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/FrOoDo 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FrOoDo的框架，用于数字病理学中的分布外检测任务。
AI.motivation: 为了简化分布外检测的评估流程，使研究人员能够专注于模型设计、方法创新或新数据集的评估。
AI.method: FrOoDo框架基于PyTorch，支持分类和分割模型，并采用模块化设计便于扩展。
AI.result: 该框架实现了自动化分布外检测评估，提高了研究效率。
AI.conclusion: FrOoDo为数字病理学中的分布外检测提供了一个灵活、易用的解决方案，有助于推动相关研究的发展。

ai_content.result: 该框架实现了自动化分布外检测评估，提高了研究效率。

search_text: FrOoDo: Framework for Out-of-Distribution Detection FrOoDo：分布外检测框架 FrOoDo is an easy-to-use and flexible framework for Out-of-Distribution detection tasks in digital pathology. It can be used with PyTorch classification and segmentation models, and its modular design allows for easy extension. The goal is to automate the task of OoD Evaluation such that research can focus on the main goal of either designing new models, new methods or evaluating a new dataset. The code can be found at https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/FrOoDo. FrOoDo 是一个易于使用且灵活的框架，用于数字病理学中的分布外检测任务。它可以与 PyTorch 分类和分割模型一起使用，其模块化设计可以轻松扩展。目标是自动化 OoD 评估任务，以便研究可以集中于设计新模型、新方法或评估新数据集的主要目标。代码可以在 https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/FrOoDo 找到。 本文提出了一种名为FrOoDo的框架，用于数字病理学中的分布外检测任务。 Jonathan Stieber,Moritz Fuchs,Anirban Mukhopadhyay cs.CV

authors_text: Xiao Han,Kam Woh Ng,Sauradip Nag,Zhiyu Qu
title: Large-Scale Product Retrieval with Weakly Supervised Representation Learning
title_zh: 弱监督表示学习的大规模产品检索
abstract: Large-scale weakly supervised product retrieval is a practically useful yet computationally challenging problem. This paper introduces a novel solution for the eBay Visual Search Challenge (eProduct) held at the Ninth Workshop on Fine-Grained Visual Categorisation workshop (FGVC9) of CVPR 2022. This competition presents two challenges: (a) E-commerce is a drastically fine-grained domain including many products with subtle visual differences; (b) A lacking of target instance-level labels for model training, with only coarse category labels and product titles available. To overcome these obstacles, we formulate a strong solution by a set of dedicated designs: (a) Instead of using text training data directly, we mine thousands of pseudo-attributes from product titles and use them as the ground truths for multi-label classification. (b) We incorporate several strong backbones with advanced training recipes for more discriminative representation learning. (c) We further introduce a number of post-processing techniques including whitening, re-ranking and model ensemble for retrieval enhancement. By achieving 71.53% MAR, our solution "Involution King" achieves the second position on the leaderboard.
summary: Large-scale weakly supervised product retrieval is a practically useful yet computationally challenging problem. This paper introduces a novel solution for the eBay Visual Search Challenge (eProduct) held at the Ninth Workshop on Fine-Grained Visual Categorisation workshop (FGVC9) of CVPR 2022. This competition presents two challenges: (a) E-commerce is a drastically fine-grained domain including many products with subtle visual differences; (b) A lacking of target instance-level labels for model training, with only coarse category labels and product titles available. To overcome these obstacles, we formulate a strong solution by a set of dedicated designs: (a) Instead of using text training data directly, we mine thousands of pseudo-attributes from product titles and use them as the ground truths for multi-label classification. (b) We incorporate several strong backbones with advanced training recipes for more discriminative representation learning. (c) We further introduce a number of post-processing techniques including whitening, re-ranking and model ensemble for retrieval enhancement. By achieving 71.53% MAR, our solution "Involution King" achieves the second position on the leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 大规模弱监督产品检索是一个实用但计算上具有挑战性的问题。本文介绍了在 CVPR 2022 第九届细粒度视觉分类研讨会（FGVC9）上举办的 eBay 视觉搜索挑战赛（eProduct）的新颖解决方案。该竞赛提出了两个挑战：（a）电子商务是一个极其细粒度的领域，包括许多具有细微视觉差异的产品； (b) 模型训练缺乏目标实例级标签，只有粗略的类别标签和产品标题。为了克服这些障碍，我们通过一组专门的设计制定了一个强大的解决方案：（a）我们不直接使用文本训练数据，而是从产品标题中挖掘数千个伪属性，并将它们用作多标签分类的基本事实。 (b) 我们将几个强大的骨干网与先进的训练方法结合起来，以实现更具辨别力的表征学习。 (c)我们进一步引入了一些后处​​理技术，包括白化、重新排序和用于增强检索的模型集成。通过实现 71.53% MAR，我们的解决方案“Involution King”在排行榜上排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大规模弱监督产品检索的解决方案，用于解决eBay视觉搜索挑战赛中的细粒度产品检索问题。
AI.motivation: 电子商务领域存在产品视觉差异细微且缺乏实例级标签的挑战，传统方法难以有效建模，需探索弱监督学习方案以提升检索性能。
AI.method: 通过从产品标题挖掘伪属性构建多标签分类目标，结合先进主干网络与训练策略，辅以白化、重排序和模型集成等后处理技术优化检索结果。
AI.result: 在FGVC9竞赛中以71.53%的MAR指标获得第二名，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督表征学习结合多阶段优化技术可有效应对细粒度产品检索的挑战，为实际电商场景提供可行方案。

authors_text: Thomas Eboli,Jean-Michel Morel,Gabriele Facciolo
title: Fast Two-step Blind Optical Aberration Correction
title_zh: 快速两步盲光学像差校正
comment: 28 pages, 20 figures, accepted at ECCV'22 as a poster
comments: 28 pages, 20 figures, accepted at ECCV'22 as a poster
abstract: The optics of any camera degrades the sharpness of photographs, which is a key visual quality criterion. This degradation is characterized by the point-spread function (PSF), which depends on the wavelengths of light and is variable across the imaging field. In this paper, we propose a two-step scheme to correct optical aberrations in a single raw or JPEG image, i.e., without any prior information on the camera or lens. First, we estimate local Gaussian blur kernels for overlapping patches and sharpen them with a non-blind deblurring technique. Based on the measurements of the PSFs of dozens of lenses, these blur kernels are modeled as RGB Gaussians defined by seven parameters. Second, we remove the remaining lateral chromatic aberrations (not contemplated in the first step) with a convolutional neural network, trained to minimize the red/green and blue/green residual images. Experiments on both synthetic and real images show that the combination of these two stages yields a fast state-of-the-art blind optical aberration compensation technique that competes with commercial non-blind algorithms.
summary: The optics of any camera degrades the sharpness of photographs, which is a key visual quality criterion. This degradation is characterized by the point-spread function (PSF), which depends on the wavelengths of light and is variable across the imaging field. In this paper, we propose a two-step scheme to correct optical aberrations in a single raw or JPEG image, i.e., without any prior information on the camera or lens. First, we estimate local Gaussian blur kernels for overlapping patches and sharpen them with a non-blind deblurring technique. Based on the measurements of the PSFs of dozens of lenses, these blur kernels are modeled as RGB Gaussians defined by seven parameters. Second, we remove the remaining lateral chromatic aberrations (not contemplated in the first step) with a convolutional neural network, trained to minimize the red/green and blue/green residual images. Experiments on both synthetic and real images show that the combination of these two stages yields a fast state-of-the-art blind optical aberration compensation technique that competes with commercial non-blind algorithms.
abstract_zh: 任何相机的光学器件都会降低照片的清晰度，而清晰度是关键的视觉质量标准。这种退化的特征是点扩散函数 (PSF)，它取决于光的波长，并且在整个成像场中是可变的。在本文中，我们提出了一种两步方案来校正单个原始或 JPEG 图像中的光学像差，即无需有关相机或镜头的任何先验信息。首先，我们估计重叠补丁的局部高斯模糊核，并使用非盲去模糊技术对其进行锐化。根据对数十个镜头的 PSF 的测量，这些模糊内核被建模为由七个参数定义的 RGB 高斯分布。其次，我们使用卷积神经网络消除剩余的横向色差（第一步中未考虑），经过训练以最小化红/绿和蓝/绿残留图像。对合成图像和真实图像的实验表明，这两个阶段的结合产生了一种快速、最先进的盲光学像差补偿技术，可与商业非盲算法竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需先验信息的两步盲光学像差校正方法，可快速处理单张图像的光学模糊和色差问题。
AI.motivation: 相机光学系统会导致图像清晰度下降，传统校正方法依赖相机或镜头的先验信息，而实际场景中往往缺乏此类数据。
AI.method: 第一阶段通过局部高斯模糊核估计与非盲去模糊技术锐化图像；第二阶段利用卷积神经网络消除残留横向色差，网络训练目标为最小化红/绿、蓝/绿残差图像。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图像实验中，该方法达到当前最先进的盲校正速度，性能可与商业非盲算法相媲美。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段结合的方案有效实现了无需先验信息的快速光学像差校正，为单图像处理提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Stephan J. Garbin,Marek Kowalski,Virginia Estellers,Stanislaw Szymanowicz,Shideh Rezaeifar,Jingjing Shen,Matthew Johnson,Julien Valentin
title: VolTeMorph: Realtime, Controllable and Generalisable Animation of Volumetric Representations
title_zh: VolTeMorph：体积表示的实时、可控和通用动画
abstract: The recent increase in popularity of volumetric representations for scene reconstruction and novel view synthesis has put renewed focus on animating volumetric content at high visual quality and in real-time. While implicit deformation methods based on learned functions can produce impressive results, they are `black boxes' to artists and content creators, they require large amounts of training data to generalise meaningfully, and they do not produce realistic extrapolations outside the training data. In this work we solve these issues by introducing a volume deformation method which is real-time, easy to edit with off-the-shelf software and can extrapolate convincingly. To demonstrate the versatility of our method, we apply it in two scenarios: physics-based object deformation and telepresence where avatars are controlled using blendshapes. We also perform thorough experiments showing that our method compares favourably to both volumetric approaches combined with implicit deformation and methods based on mesh deformation.
summary: The recent increase in popularity of volumetric representations for scene reconstruction and novel view synthesis has put renewed focus on animating volumetric content at high visual quality and in real-time. While implicit deformation methods based on learned functions can produce impressive results, they are `black boxes' to artists and content creators, they require large amounts of training data to generalise meaningfully, and they do not produce realistic extrapolations outside the training data. In this work we solve these issues by introducing a volume deformation method which is real-time, easy to edit with off-the-shelf software and can extrapolate convincingly. To demonstrate the versatility of our method, we apply it in two scenarios: physics-based object deformation and telepresence where avatars are controlled using blendshapes. We also perform thorough experiments showing that our method compares favourably to both volumetric approaches combined with implicit deformation and methods based on mesh deformation.
abstract_zh: 最近，用于场景重建和新颖视图合成的体积表示越来越受欢迎，这使得人们重新关注以高视觉质量和实时制作体积内容动画。虽然基于学习函数的隐式变形方法可以产生令人印象深刻的结果，但它们对于艺术家和内容创建者来说是“黑匣子”，它们需要大量的训练数据才能有意义地概括，并且它们不会在训练数据之外产生现实的外推。在这项工作中，我们通过引入一种体积变形方法来解决这些问题，该方法是实时的，易于使用现成的软件进行编辑，并且可以令人信服地进行推断。为了证明我们方法的多功能性，我们将其应用于两种场景：基于物理的对象变形和使用混合形状控制化身的远程呈现。我们还进行了彻底的实验，表明我们的方法优于结合隐式变形的体积方法和基于网格变形的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VolTeMorph的实时、可控且通用的体素表示动画方法，解决了现有方法在可视化质量、实时性和可扩展性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习函数的隐式变形方法存在黑箱特性、依赖大量训练数据且无法合理外推的问题，难以满足实时高质量体素动画需求。
AI.method: 通过设计可实时编辑的体积变形算法，结合现成软件进行控制，并在物理变形和远程呈现两种场景中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在视觉质量、实时性和外推能力上优于现有体素变形与网格变形方法。
AI.conclusion: VolTeMorph为体素表示的动画提供了高效且通用的解决方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Xing Zhao,Haoran Liang,Peipei Li,Guodao Sun,Dongdong Zhao,Ronghua Liang,Xiaofei He
title: Motion-aware Memory Network for Fast Video Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于快速视频显着目标检测的运动感知内存网络
abstract: Previous methods based on 3DCNN, convLSTM, or optical flow have achieved great success in video salient object detection (VSOD). However, they still suffer from high computational costs or poor quality of the generated saliency maps. To solve these problems, we design a space-time memory (STM)-based network, which extracts useful temporal information of the current frame from adjacent frames as the temporal branch of VSOD. Furthermore, previous methods only considered single-frame prediction without temporal association. As a result, the model may not focus on the temporal information sufficiently. Thus, we initially introduce object motion prediction between inter-frame into VSOD. Our model follows standard encoder--decoder architecture. In the encoding stage, we generate high-level temporal features by using high-level features from the current and its adjacent frames. This approach is more efficient than the optical flow-based methods. In the decoding stage, we propose an effective fusion strategy for spatial and temporal branches. The semantic information of the high-level features is used to fuse the object details in the low-level features, and then the spatiotemporal features are obtained step by step to reconstruct the saliency maps. Moreover, inspired by the boundary supervision commonly used in image salient object detection (ISOD), we design a motion-aware loss for predicting object boundary motion and simultaneously perform multitask learning for VSOD and object motion prediction, which can further facilitate the model to extract spatiotemporal features accurately and maintain the object integrity. Extensive experiments on several datasets demonstrated the effectiveness of our method and can achieve state-of-the-art metrics on some datasets. The proposed model does not require optical flow or other preprocessing, and can reach a speed of nearly 100 FPS during inference.
summary: Previous methods based on 3DCNN, convLSTM, or optical flow have achieved great success in video salient object detection (VSOD). However, they still suffer from high computational costs or poor quality of the generated saliency maps. To solve these problems, we design a space-time memory (STM)-based network, which extracts useful temporal information of the current frame from adjacent frames as the temporal branch of VSOD. Furthermore, previous methods only considered single-frame prediction without temporal association. As a result, the model may not focus on the temporal information sufficiently. Thus, we initially introduce object motion prediction between inter-frame into VSOD. Our model follows standard encoder--decoder architecture. In the encoding stage, we generate high-level temporal features by using high-level features from the current and its adjacent frames. This approach is more efficient than the optical flow-based methods. In the decoding stage, we propose an effective fusion strategy for spatial and temporal branches. The semantic information of the high-level features is used to fuse the object details in the low-level features, and then the spatiotemporal features are obtained step by step to reconstruct the saliency maps. Moreover, inspired by the boundary supervision commonly used in image salient object detection (ISOD), we design a motion-aware loss for predicting object boundary motion and simultaneously perform multitask learning for VSOD and object motion prediction, which can further facilitate the model to extract spatiotemporal features accurately and maintain the object integrity. Extensive experiments on several datasets demonstrated the effectiveness of our method and can achieve state-of-the-art metrics on some datasets. The proposed model does not require optical flow or other preprocessing, and can reach a speed of nearly 100 FPS during inference.
abstract_zh: 之前基于 3DCNN、convLSTM 或光流的方法在视频显着目标检测（VSOD）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，它们仍然面临计算成本高或生成的显着图质量差的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们设计了一种基于时空记忆（STM）的网络，它从相邻帧中提取当前帧的有用时间信息作为VSOD的时间分支。此外，以前的方法只考虑单帧预测，没有时间关联。因此，模型可能无法充分关注时间信息。因此，我们首先将帧间的对象运动预测引入到VSOD中。我们的模型遵循标准编码器-解码器架构。在编码阶段，我们通过使用当前帧及其相邻帧的高级特征来生成高级时间特征。这种方法比基于光流的方法更有效。在解码阶段，我们提出了一种有效的空间和时间分支融合策略。利用高层特征的语义信息融合低层特征中的对象细节，然后逐步获得时空特征来重建显着图。此外，受图像显着对象检测（ISOD）中常用的边界监督的启发，我们设计了一种运动感知损失来预测对象边界运动，同时对VSOD和对象运动预测进行多任务学习，这可以进一步促进模型准确提取时空特征并保持对象完整性。对多个数据集的广泛实验证明了我们方法的有效性，并且可以在某些数据集上实现最先进的指标。所提出的模型不需要光流或其他预处理，并且在推理过程中可以达到近100 FPS的速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空记忆网络的视频显著性目标检测方法，旨在提升检测效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DCNN、convLSTM或光流的方法在视频显著性目标检测中存在计算成本高或显著性图质量差的问题，且未充分考虑时间关联性。
AI.method: 设计时空记忆网络（STM），通过相邻帧提取时间信息，并引入帧间运动预测。采用编码-解码结构，编码阶段融合当前帧及相邻帧的高层特征，解码阶段通过空间与时间分支的融合策略生成显著性图，同时设计运动感知损失函数进行多任务学习。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法在保持高精度的同时达到近100 FPS的推理速度，无需光流或预处理。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过时空信息融合和运动感知损失，有效提升了视频显著性目标检测的效率与准确性，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Zijin Wu,Xingyi Li,Juewen Peng,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Weicai Zhong
title: DoF-NeRF: Depth-of-Field Meets Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: DoF-NeRF：景深与神经辐射场的结合
abstract: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) and its variants have exhibited great success on representing 3D scenes and synthesizing photo-realistic novel views. However, they are generally based on the pinhole camera model and assume all-in-focus inputs. This limits their applicability as images captured from the real world often have finite depth-of-field (DoF). To mitigate this issue, we introduce DoF-NeRF, a novel neural rendering approach that can deal with shallow DoF inputs and can simulate DoF effect. In particular, it extends NeRF to simulate the aperture of lens following the principles of geometric optics. Such a physical guarantee allows DoF-NeRF to operate views with different focus configurations. Benefiting from explicit aperture modeling, DoF-NeRF also enables direct manipulation of DoF effect by adjusting virtual aperture and focus parameters. It is plug-and-play and can be inserted into NeRF-based frameworks. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that, DoF-NeRF not only performs comparably with NeRF in the all-in-focus setting, but also can synthesize all-in-focus novel views conditioned on shallow DoF inputs. An interesting application of DoF-NeRF to DoF rendering is also demonstrated. The source code will be made available at https://github.com/zijinwuzijin/DoF-NeRF.
summary: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) and its variants have exhibited great success on representing 3D scenes and synthesizing photo-realistic novel views. However, they are generally based on the pinhole camera model and assume all-in-focus inputs. This limits their applicability as images captured from the real world often have finite depth-of-field (DoF). To mitigate this issue, we introduce DoF-NeRF, a novel neural rendering approach that can deal with shallow DoF inputs and can simulate DoF effect. In particular, it extends NeRF to simulate the aperture of lens following the principles of geometric optics. Such a physical guarantee allows DoF-NeRF to operate views with different focus configurations. Benefiting from explicit aperture modeling, DoF-NeRF also enables direct manipulation of DoF effect by adjusting virtual aperture and focus parameters. It is plug-and-play and can be inserted into NeRF-based frameworks. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that, DoF-NeRF not only performs comparably with NeRF in the all-in-focus setting, but also can synthesize all-in-focus novel views conditioned on shallow DoF inputs. An interesting application of DoF-NeRF to DoF rendering is also demonstrated. The source code will be made available at https://github.com/zijinwuzijin/DoF-NeRF.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 及其变体在表示 3D 场景和合成逼真的新颖视图方面取得了巨大成功。然而，它们通常基于针孔相机模型并假设全焦点输入。这限制了它们的适用性，因为从现实世界捕获的图像通常具有有限的景深 (DoF)。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了 DoF-NeRF，这是一种新颖的神经渲染方法，可以处理浅 DoF 输入并可以模拟 DoF 效果。特别是，它扩展了 NeRF，以遵循几何光学原理来模拟镜头孔径。这种物理保证允许 DoF-NeRF 操作具有不同焦点配置的视图。受益于显式孔径建模，DoF-NeRF 还可以通过调整虚拟孔径和焦点参数来直接操纵 DoF 效果。它是即插即用的，可以插入到基于 NeRF 的框架中。在合成数据集和真实世界数据集上的实验表明，DoF-NeRF 不仅在全焦点设置中的表现与 NeRF 相当，而且还可以合成基于浅 DoF 输入的全焦点新颖视图。还演示了 DoF-NeRF 在 DoF 渲染中的一个有趣应用。源代码将在 https://github.com/zijinwuzijin/DoF-NeRF 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DoF-NeRF，一种结合景深效果的神经辐射场方法，解决传统NeRF无法处理有限景深输入的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF基于针孔相机模型且假设输入图像为全焦，难以处理现实世界中存在有限景深的图像，限制了其应用范围。
AI.method: 通过建模镜头光圈和焦点参数，基于几何光学原理扩展NeRF，实现不同焦距配置的视图渲染，并支持虚拟光圈调整以直接控制景深效果。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上，DoF-NeRF在全焦场景下性能与NeRF相当，且能基于浅景深输入生成全焦新视角，展示了景深渲染的应用案例。
AI.conclusion: DoF-NeRF通过物理建模有效解决了NeRF的景深限制，提升了神经渲染在真实场景中的适用性，并为视角合成与景深控制提供了新方法。

search_text: DoF-NeRF: Depth-of-Field Meets Neural Radiance Fields DoF-NeRF：景深与神经辐射场的结合 Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) and its variants have exhibited great success on representing 3D scenes and synthesizing photo-realistic novel views. However, they are generally based on the pinhole camera model and assume all-in-focus inputs. This limits their applicability as images captured from the real world often have finite depth-of-field (DoF). To mitigate this issue, we introduce DoF-NeRF, a novel neural rendering approach that can deal with shallow DoF inputs and can simulate DoF effect. In particular, it extends NeRF to simulate the aperture of lens following the principles of geometric optics. Such a physical guarantee allows DoF-NeRF to operate views with different focus configurations. Benefiting from explicit aperture modeling, DoF-NeRF also enables direct manipulation of DoF effect by adjusting virtual aperture and focus parameters. It is plug-and-play and can be inserted into NeRF-based frameworks. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that, DoF-NeRF not only performs comparably with NeRF in the all-in-focus setting, but also can synthesize all-in-focus novel views conditioned on shallow DoF inputs. An interesting application of DoF-NeRF to DoF rendering is also demonstrated. The source code will be made available at https://github.com/zijinwuzijin/DoF-NeRF. 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 及其变体在表示 3D 场景和合成逼真的新颖视图方面取得了巨大成功。然而，它们通常基于针孔相机模型并假设全焦点输入。这限制了它们的适用性，因为从现实世界捕获的图像通常具有有限的景深 (DoF)。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了 DoF-NeRF，这是一种新颖的神经渲染方法，可以处理浅 DoF 输入并可以模拟 DoF 效果。特别是，它扩展了 NeRF，以遵循几何光学原理来模拟镜头孔径。这种物理保证允许 DoF-NeRF 操作具有不同焦点配置的视图。受益于显式孔径建模，DoF-NeRF 还可以通过调整虚拟孔径和焦点参数来直接操纵 DoF 效果。它是即插即用的，可以插入到基于 NeRF 的框架中。在合成数据集和真实世界数据集上的实验表明，DoF-NeRF 不仅在全焦点设置中的表现与 NeRF 相当，而且还可以合成基于浅 DoF 输入的全焦点新颖视图。还演示了 DoF-NeRF 在 DoF 渲染中的一个有趣应用。源代码将在 https://github.com/zijinwuzijin/DoF-NeRF 提供。 本文提出DoF-NeRF，一种结合景深效果的神经辐射场方法，解决传统NeRF无法处理有限景深输入的问题。 Zijin Wu,Xingyi Li,Juewen Peng,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Weicai Zhong cs.CV

authors_text: AJ Piergiovanni,Kairo Morton,Weicheng Kuo,Michael S. Ryoo,Anelia Angelova
title: Video Question Answering with Iterative Video-Text Co-Tokenization
title_zh: 通过迭代视频-文本联合标记化进行视频问答
abstract: Video question answering is a challenging task that requires understanding jointly the language input, the visual information in individual video frames, as well as the temporal information about the events occurring in the video. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-stream video encoder for video question answering that uses multiple video inputs and a new video-text iterative co-tokenization approach to answer a variety of questions related to videos. We experimentally evaluate the model on several datasets, such as MSRVTT-QA, MSVD-QA, IVQA, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art by large margins. Simultaneously, our model reduces the required GFLOPs from 150-360 to only 67, producing a highly efficient video question answering model.
summary: Video question answering is a challenging task that requires understanding jointly the language input, the visual information in individual video frames, as well as the temporal information about the events occurring in the video. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-stream video encoder for video question answering that uses multiple video inputs and a new video-text iterative co-tokenization approach to answer a variety of questions related to videos. We experimentally evaluate the model on several datasets, such as MSRVTT-QA, MSVD-QA, IVQA, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art by large margins. Simultaneously, our model reduces the required GFLOPs from 150-360 to only 67, producing a highly efficient video question answering model.
abstract_zh: 视频问答是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要共同理解语言输入、各个视频帧中的视觉信息以及视频中发生的事件的时间信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于视频问答的新型多流视频编码器，它使用多个视频输入和新的视频文本迭代联合标记方法来回答与视频相关的各种问题。我们在多个数据集（例如 MSRVTT-QA、MSVD-QA、IVQA）上对模型进行了实验评估，大大优于之前的最新技术。同时，我们的模型将所需的 GFLOPs 从 150-360 减少到仅 67，从而产生了高效的视频问答模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于视频问答的多流视频编码器，结合新型视频-文本迭代共分词方法，以高效处理视频内容和语言问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答模型在处理语言输入、视觉信息及时间信息联合理解时存在效率与性能瓶颈，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多流视频编码器处理多视频输入，并引入视频-文本迭代共分词方法，通过多轮对齐优化视频帧与文本语义表示。
AI.result: 在MSRVTT-QA、MSVD-QA等数据集上显著超越现有最优模型，计算量（GFLOPs）从150-360降至67。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高问答准确率的同时大幅提升计算效率，为视频问答任务提供了轻量化且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Maryam Khalid,Edward W. Knightly
title: Networked Drones for Industrial Emergency Events
title_zh: 用于工业紧急事件的联网无人机
abstract: Uncontrolled emissions of gases from industrial accidents and disasters result in huge loss of life and property. Such extreme events require a quick and reliable survey of the site for effective rescue strategy planning. To achieve these goals, a network of unmanned aerial vehicles can be deployed that survey the affected region and identify safe and danger zones. Although single UAV-based systems for gas sensing applications are well-studied in literature, research on the deployment of a UAV network for such applications, which is more robust and fault tolerant, is still in infancy. The objective of this project is to design a system that can be deployed in emergency situations to provide a quick survey and identification of safe and dangerous zones in a given region that contains a toxic plume without making any assumptions about plume location. We focus on an end-to-end solution and formulate a two-phase strategy that can not only guarantee detection/acquisition of plume but also its characterization with high spatial resolution. To guarantee coverage of the region with a certain spatial resolution, we set up a vehicle routing problem. To overcome the limitations imposed by limited range of sensors and drone resources, we estimate the concentration map by using Gaussian kernel extrapolation. Finally, we evaluate the suggested framework in simulations. Our results suggest that this two-phase strategy not only gives better error performance but is also more efficient in terms of mission time. Moreover, the comparison between 2-phase random search and 2-phase uniform coverage suggest that the latter is better for single drone systems whereas for multiple drones the former gives reasonable performance at low computational cost.
summary: Uncontrolled emissions of gases from industrial accidents and disasters result in huge loss of life and property. Such extreme events require a quick and reliable survey of the site for effective rescue strategy planning. To achieve these goals, a network of unmanned aerial vehicles can be deployed that survey the affected region and identify safe and danger zones. Although single UAV-based systems for gas sensing applications are well-studied in literature, research on the deployment of a UAV network for such applications, which is more robust and fault tolerant, is still in infancy. The objective of this project is to design a system that can be deployed in emergency situations to provide a quick survey and identification of safe and dangerous zones in a given region that contains a toxic plume without making any assumptions about plume location. We focus on an end-to-end solution and formulate a two-phase strategy that can not only guarantee detection/acquisition of plume but also its characterization with high spatial resolution. To guarantee coverage of the region with a certain spatial resolution, we set up a vehicle routing problem. To overcome the limitations imposed by limited range of sensors and drone resources, we estimate the concentration map by using Gaussian kernel extrapolation. Finally, we evaluate the suggested framework in simulations. Our results suggest that this two-phase strategy not only gives better error performance but is also more efficient in terms of mission time. Moreover, the comparison between 2-phase random search and 2-phase uniform coverage suggest that the latter is better for single drone systems whereas for multiple drones the former gives reasonable performance at low computational cost.
abstract_zh: 工业事故和灾害造成的气体不受控制的排放导致巨大的生命和财产损失。此类极端事件需要对现场进行快速可靠的调查，以制定有效的救援策略。为了实现这些目标，可以部署无人机网络来调查受影响的区域并识别安全和危险区域。尽管文献中对用于气体传感应用的单一无人机系统进行了充分研究，但针对此类应用部署更稳健和容错的无人机网络的研究仍处于起步阶段。该项目的目标是设计一个可以在紧急情况下部署的系统，以快速调查和识别包含有毒羽流的给定区域中的安全和危险区域，而无需对羽流位置做出任何假设。我们专注于端到端解决方案，并制定了两阶段策略，不仅可以保证羽流的检测/采集，而且可以保证其高空间分辨率的表征。为了保证以一定的空间分辨率覆盖区域，我们设置了车辆路径问题。为了克服传感器和无人机资源范围有限所带来的限制，我们使用高斯核外推法来估计浓度图。最后，我们在模拟中评估建议的框架。我们的结果表明，这种两阶段策略不仅可以提供更好的错误性能，而且在任务时间方面也更加高效。此外，两阶段随机搜索和两阶段均匀覆盖之间的比较表明，后者对于单无人机系统更好，而对于多无人机系统，前者以较低的计算成本提供了合理的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种网络化无人机系统，用于工业紧急事件中快速识别有毒气体泄漏区域，无需假设气团位置。
AI.motivation: 工业事故中的气体泄漏常导致重大损失，现有单无人机系统存在鲁棒性和容错性不足的问题，需更高效的多无人机协同方案。
AI.method: 设计两阶段策略：第一阶段通过随机搜索定位气团，第二阶段采用均匀覆盖高分辨率测绘；结合车辆路径规划与高斯核外推法估算浓度图。
AI.result: 仿真显示该框架在误差性能和任务效率上优于传统方法，多无人机场景下随机搜索策略计算成本更低且效果合理。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段策略有效平衡了单无人机的均匀覆盖优势与多无人机的效率需求，适用于工业应急场景的快速响应。

search_text: Networked Drones for Industrial Emergency Events 用于工业紧急事件的联网无人机 Uncontrolled emissions of gases from industrial accidents and disasters result in huge loss of life and property. Such extreme events require a quick and reliable survey of the site for effective rescue strategy planning. To achieve these goals, a network of unmanned aerial vehicles can be deployed that survey the affected region and identify safe and danger zones. Although single UAV-based systems for gas sensing applications are well-studied in literature, research on the deployment of a UAV network for such applications, which is more robust and fault tolerant, is still in infancy. The objective of this project is to design a system that can be deployed in emergency situations to provide a quick survey and identification of safe and dangerous zones in a given region that contains a toxic plume without making any assumptions about plume location. We focus on an end-to-end solution and formulate a two-phase strategy that can not only guarantee detection/acquisition of plume but also its characterization with high spatial resolution. To guarantee coverage of the region with a certain spatial resolution, we set up a vehicle routing problem. To overcome the limitations imposed by limited range of sensors and drone resources, we estimate the concentration map by using Gaussian kernel extrapolation. Finally, we evaluate the suggested framework in simulations. Our results suggest that this two-phase strategy not only gives better error performance but is also more efficient in terms of mission time. Moreover, the comparison between 2-phase random search and 2-phase uniform coverage suggest that the latter is better for single drone systems whereas for multiple drones the former gives reasonable performance at low computational cost. 工业事故和灾害造成的气体不受控制的排放导致巨大的生命和财产损失。此类极端事件需要对现场进行快速可靠的调查，以制定有效的救援策略。为了实现这些目标，可以部署无人机网络来调查受影响的区域并识别安全和危险区域。尽管文献中对用于气体传感应用的单一无人机系统进行了充分研究，但针对此类应用部署更稳健和容错的无人机网络的研究仍处于起步阶段。该项目的目标是设计一个可以在紧急情况下部署的系统，以快速调查和识别包含有毒羽流的给定区域中的安全和危险区域，而无需对羽流位置做出任何假设。我们专注于端到端解决方案，并制定了两阶段策略，不仅可以保证羽流的检测/采集，而且可以保证其高空间分辨率的表征。为了保证以一定的空间分辨率覆盖区域，我们设置了车辆路径问题。为了克服传感器和无人机资源范围有限所带来的限制，我们使用高斯核外推法来估计浓度图。最后，我们在模拟中评估建议的框架。我们的结果表明，这种两阶段策略不仅可以提供更好的错误性能，而且在任务时间方面也更加高效。此外，两阶段随机搜索和两阶段均匀覆盖之间的比较表明，后者对于单无人机系统更好，而对于多无人机系统，前者以较低的计算成本提供了合理的性能。 本文提出一种网络化无人机系统，用于工业紧急事件中快速识别有毒气体泄漏区域，无需假设气团位置。 Maryam Khalid,Edward W. Knightly eess.SY,cs.NI,cs.RO

authors_text: Weijia Li,Yawen Lai,Linning Xu,Yuanbo Xiangli,Jinhua Yu,Conghui He,Gui-Song Xia,Dahua Lin
title: OmniCity: Omnipotent City Understanding with Multi-level and Multi-view Images
title_zh: OmniCity：多层次、多视角的全能城市理解
abstract: This paper presents OmniCity, a new dataset for omnipotent city understanding from multi-level and multi-view images. More precisely, the OmniCity contains multi-view satellite images as well as street-level panorama and mono-view images, constituting over 100K pixel-wise annotated images that are well-aligned and collected from 25K geo-locations in New York City. To alleviate the substantial pixel-wise annotation efforts, we propose an efficient street-view image annotation pipeline that leverages the existing label maps of satellite view and the transformation relations between different views (satellite, panorama, and mono-view). With the new OmniCity dataset, we provide benchmarks for a variety of tasks including building footprint extraction, height estimation, and building plane/instance/fine-grained segmentation. Compared with the existing multi-level and multi-view benchmarks, OmniCity contains a larger number of images with richer annotation types and more views, provides more benchmark results of state-of-the-art models, and introduces a novel task for fine-grained building instance segmentation on street-level panorama images. Moreover, OmniCity provides new problem settings for existing tasks, such as cross-view image matching, synthesis, segmentation, detection, etc., and facilitates the developing of new methods for large-scale city understanding, reconstruction, and simulation. The OmniCity dataset as well as the benchmarks will be available at https://city-super.github.io/omnicity.
summary: This paper presents OmniCity, a new dataset for omnipotent city understanding from multi-level and multi-view images. More precisely, the OmniCity contains multi-view satellite images as well as street-level panorama and mono-view images, constituting over 100K pixel-wise annotated images that are well-aligned and collected from 25K geo-locations in New York City. To alleviate the substantial pixel-wise annotation efforts, we propose an efficient street-view image annotation pipeline that leverages the existing label maps of satellite view and the transformation relations between different views (satellite, panorama, and mono-view). With the new OmniCity dataset, we provide benchmarks for a variety of tasks including building footprint extraction, height estimation, and building plane/instance/fine-grained segmentation. Compared with the existing multi-level and multi-view benchmarks, OmniCity contains a larger number of images with richer annotation types and more views, provides more benchmark results of state-of-the-art models, and introduces a novel task for fine-grained building instance segmentation on street-level panorama images. Moreover, OmniCity provides new problem settings for existing tasks, such as cross-view image matching, synthesis, segmentation, detection, etc., and facilitates the developing of new methods for large-scale city understanding, reconstruction, and simulation. The OmniCity dataset as well as the benchmarks will be available at https://city-super.github.io/omnicity.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 OmniCity，这是一个新的数据集，用于从多层次和多视图图像中理解无所不能的城市。更准确地说，OmniCity 包含多视图卫星图像以及街道级全景和单视图图像，构成超过 100K 像素注释图像，这些图像经过良好对齐并从纽约市 25K 个地理位置收集。为了减轻大量的像素级注释工作，我们提出了一种有效的街景图像注释管道，该管道利用现有的卫星视图标签图以及不同视图（卫星、全景和单视图）之间的转换关系。借助新的 OmniCity 数据集，我们为各种任务提供基准，包括建筑占地面积提取、高度估计和建筑平面/实例/细粒度分割。与现有的多层次、多视图基准测试相比，OmniCity 包含更多数量的图像、更丰富的注释类型和更多视图，提供了更多最先进模型的基准测试结果，并引入了在街道级全景图像上进行细粒度建筑实例分割的新颖任务。此外，OmniCity为现有任务提供了新的问题设置，例如跨视图图像匹配、合成、分割、检测等，并有助于开发大规模城市理解、重建和模拟的新方法。 OmniCity 数据集以及基准将在 https://city-super.github.io/omnicity 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniCity数据集，用于通过多层级和多视角图像实现全方位城市理解。
AI.motivation: 现有城市理解数据集在图像数量、标注类型和视角多样性方面存在不足，难以支持复杂任务和跨视角分析。
AI.method: 构建包含卫星图、街景全景图和单视角图像的多源数据集，并设计基于卫星标注和视角转换关系的高效街景图像标注流水线。
AI.result: 提供建筑轮廓提取、高度估计、细粒度分割等任务基准，包含10万张像素级标注图像，支持跨视角匹配与合成等新问题设置。
AI.conclusion: OmniCity通过更大规模、更丰富的标注和多视角覆盖，推动城市理解、重建与模拟方法的创新研究。

authors_text: Antoine Dufour,Yohan Poirier-Ginter,Alexandre Lessard,Ryan Smith,Michael Lockyer,Jean-Francois Lalonde
title: AdaWCT: Adaptive Whitening and Coloring Style Injection
title_zh: AdaWCT：自适应美白着色式注射
abstract: Adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) has become the standard method for style injection: by re-normalizing features through scale-and-shift operations, it has found widespread use in style transfer, image generation, and image-to-image translation. In this work, we present a generalization of AdaIN which relies on the whitening and coloring transformation (WCT) which we dub AdaWCT, that we apply for style injection in large GANs. We show, through experiments on the StarGANv2 architecture, that this generalization, albeit conceptually simple, results in significant improvements in the quality of the generated images.
summary: Adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) has become the standard method for style injection: by re-normalizing features through scale-and-shift operations, it has found widespread use in style transfer, image generation, and image-to-image translation. In this work, we present a generalization of AdaIN which relies on the whitening and coloring transformation (WCT) which we dub AdaWCT, that we apply for style injection in large GANs. We show, through experiments on the StarGANv2 architecture, that this generalization, albeit conceptually simple, results in significant improvements in the quality of the generated images.
abstract_zh: 自适应实例归一化 (AdaIN) 已成为样式注入的标准方法：通过缩放和移位操作重新归一化特征，它已广泛应用于样式迁移、图像生成和图像到图像转换。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AdaIN 的泛化，它依赖于白化和着色变换（WCT），我们称之为 AdaWCT，我们将其应用于大型 GAN 中的样式注入。通过 StarGANv2 架构的实验，我们表明，这种泛化虽然概念上很简单，但可以显着提高生成图像的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AdaWCT的自适应白化与着色风格注入方法，用于改进大型生成对抗网络（GAN）中的风格迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）已被广泛应用于风格注入，但作者认为通过白化与着色变换（WCT）的推广可以进一步提升生成图像的质量。
AI.method: 提出AdaWCT方法，通过白化（去除特征相关性）和着色（注入目标风格统计信息）的变换过程，替代传统AdaIN的缩放与偏移操作。
AI.result: 在StarGANv2架构上的实验表明，AdaWCT显著提升了生成图像的质量，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AdaWCT作为一种概念简单的改进方法，在大型GAN的风格注入任务中表现出优于AdaIN的性能。
