authors_text: Felix Ott,Nisha Lakshmana Raichur,David Rügamer,Tobias Feigl,Heiko Neumann,Bernd Bischl,Christopher Mutschler
title: Benchmarking Visual-Inertial Deep Multimodal Fusion for Relative Pose Regression and Odometry-aided Absolute Pose Regression
title_zh: 相对姿态回归和里程计辅助绝对姿态回归的视觉惯性深度多模态融合基准测试
abstract: Visual-inertial localization is a key problem in computer vision and robotics applications such as virtual reality, self-driving cars, and aerial vehicles. The goal is to estimate an accurate pose of an object when either the environment or the dynamics are known. Absolute pose regression (APR) techniques directly regress the absolute pose from an image input in a known scene using convolutional and spatio-temporal networks. Odometry methods perform relative pose regression (RPR) that predicts the relative pose from a known object dynamic (visual or inertial inputs). The localization task can be improved by retrieving information from both data sources for a cross-modal setup, which is a challenging problem due to contradictory tasks. In this work, we conduct a benchmark to evaluate deep multimodal fusion based on pose graph optimization and attention networks. Auxiliary and Bayesian learning are utilized for the APR task. We show accuracy improvements for the APR-RPR task and for the RPR-RPR task for aerial vehicles and hand-held devices. We conduct experiments on the EuRoC MAV and PennCOSYVIO datasets and record and evaluate a novel industry dataset.
summary: Visual-inertial localization is a key problem in computer vision and robotics applications such as virtual reality, self-driving cars, and aerial vehicles. The goal is to estimate an accurate pose of an object when either the environment or the dynamics are known. Absolute pose regression (APR) techniques directly regress the absolute pose from an image input in a known scene using convolutional and spatio-temporal networks. Odometry methods perform relative pose regression (RPR) that predicts the relative pose from a known object dynamic (visual or inertial inputs). The localization task can be improved by retrieving information from both data sources for a cross-modal setup, which is a challenging problem due to contradictory tasks. In this work, we conduct a benchmark to evaluate deep multimodal fusion based on pose graph optimization and attention networks. Auxiliary and Bayesian learning are utilized for the APR task. We show accuracy improvements for the APR-RPR task and for the RPR-RPR task for aerial vehicles and hand-held devices. We conduct experiments on the EuRoC MAV and PennCOSYVIO datasets and record and evaluate a novel industry dataset.
abstract_zh: 视觉惯性定位是计算机视觉和机器人应用（例如虚拟现实、自动驾驶汽车和飞行器）中的关键问题。目标是在环境或动态已知的情况下估计物体的准确姿态。绝对姿态回归（APR）技术使用卷积和时空网络直接从已知场景中的图像输入中回归绝对姿态。里程计方法执行相对姿态回归 (RPR)，根据已知物体动态（视觉或惯性输入）预测相对姿态。可以通过从跨模式设置的两个数据源检索信息来改进定位任务，由于任务相互矛盾，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们进行了一个基准来评估基于位姿图优化和注意力网络的深度多模态融合。 APR 任务利用辅助学习和贝叶斯学习。我们展示了飞行器和手持设备的 APR-RPR 任务和 RPR-RPR 任务的准确性改进。我们在 EuRoC MAV 和 PennCOSYVIO 数据集上进行实验，并记录和评估一个新颖的行业数据集。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过深度多模态融合技术，评估视觉惯性系统在相对位姿回归和辅助绝对位姿回归中的性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉惯性定位在虚拟现实、自动驾驶等领域至关重要，但单一数据源存在局限性，需通过多模态融合提升精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于位姿图优化和注意力网络构建多模态融合框架，结合辅助学习与贝叶斯方法优化绝对位姿回归任务。
AI.result: 在EuRoC MAV和PennCOSYVIO数据集上，方法在空中车辆和手持设备的APR-RPR及RPR-RPR任务中均取得精度提升。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合策略有效提升了视觉惯性定位的准确性，为复杂环境下的位姿估计提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Gerry Chen,Seth Hutchinson,Frank Dellaert
title: Locally Optimal Estimation and Control of Cable Driven Parallel Robots using Time Varying Linear Quadratic Gaussian Control
title_zh: 使用时变线性二次高斯控制的电缆驱动并联机器人的局部最优估计和控制
comment: 8 pages, 11 figures, accepted to IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robotics and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: 8 pages, 11 figures, accepted to IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robotics and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: We present a locally optimal tracking controller for Cable Driven Parallel Robot (CDPR) control based on a time-varying Linear Quadratic Gaussian (TV-LQG) controller. In contrast to many methods which use fixed feedback gains, our time-varying controller computes the optimal gains depending on the location in the workspace and the future trajectory. Meanwhile, we rely heavily on offline computation to reduce the burden of online implementation and feasibility checking. Following the growing popularity of probabilistic graphical models for optimal control, we use factor graphs as a tool to formulate our controller for their efficiency, intuitiveness, and modularity. The topology of a factor graph encodes the relevant structural properties of equations in a way that facilitates insight and efficient computation using sparse linear algebra solvers. We first use factor graph optimization to compute a nominal trajectory, then linearize the graph and apply variable elimination to compute the locally optimal, time varying linear feedback gains. Next, we leverage the factor graph formulation to compute the locally optimal, time-varying Kalman Filter gains, and finally combine the locally optimal linear control and estimation laws to form a TV-LQG controller. We compare the tracking accuracy of our TV-LQG controller to a state-of-the-art dual-space feed-forward controller on a 2.9m x 2.3m, 4-cable planar robot and demonstrate improved tracking accuracies of 0.8° and 11.6mm root mean square error in rotation and translation respectively.
summary: We present a locally optimal tracking controller for Cable Driven Parallel Robot (CDPR) control based on a time-varying Linear Quadratic Gaussian (TV-LQG) controller. In contrast to many methods which use fixed feedback gains, our time-varying controller computes the optimal gains depending on the location in the workspace and the future trajectory. Meanwhile, we rely heavily on offline computation to reduce the burden of online implementation and feasibility checking. Following the growing popularity of probabilistic graphical models for optimal control, we use factor graphs as a tool to formulate our controller for their efficiency, intuitiveness, and modularity. The topology of a factor graph encodes the relevant structural properties of equations in a way that facilitates insight and efficient computation using sparse linear algebra solvers. We first use factor graph optimization to compute a nominal trajectory, then linearize the graph and apply variable elimination to compute the locally optimal, time varying linear feedback gains. Next, we leverage the factor graph formulation to compute the locally optimal, time-varying Kalman Filter gains, and finally combine the locally optimal linear control and estimation laws to form a TV-LQG controller. We compare the tracking accuracy of our TV-LQG controller to a state-of-the-art dual-space feed-forward controller on a 2.9m x 2.3m, 4-cable planar robot and demonstrate improved tracking accuracies of 0.8° and 11.6mm root mean square error in rotation and translation respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于时变线性二次高斯 (TV-LQG) 控制器的电缆驱动并联机器人 (CDPR) 控制的局部最优跟踪控制器。与许多使用固定反馈增益的方法相比，我们的时变控制器根据工作空间中的位置和未来轨迹计算最佳增益。同时，我们严重依赖离线计算来减轻在线实施和可行性检查的负担。随着用于最优控制的概率图形模型日益流行，我们使用因子图作为工具来制定控制器，以提高其效率、直观性和模块化性。因子图的拓扑以一种有助于使用稀疏线性代数求解器进行洞察和高效计算的方式对方程的相关结构属性进行编码。我们首先使用因子图优化来计算标称轨迹，然后对图进行线性化并应用变量消除来计算局部最优、随时间变化的线性反馈增益。接下来，我们利用因子图公式来计算局部最优、时变卡尔曼滤波器增益，最后结合局部最优线性控制和估计律形成 TV-LQG 控制器。我们将 TV-LQG 控制器的跟踪精度与 2.9m x 2.3m、4 电缆平面机器人上最先进的双空间前馈控制器进行了比较，并证明旋转和平移方面的跟踪精度分别提高了 0.8° 和 11.6mm 均方根误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时变线性二次高斯控制（TV-LQG）的缆驱并联机器人局部最优轨迹跟踪控制器，通过因子图优化实现动态反馈增益计算。
AI.motivation: 传统固定反馈增益方法难以适应缆驱机器人工作空间位置和轨迹变化，需设计时变控制器提升跟踪精度。
AI.method: 利用因子图进行轨迹优化与线性化，结合变量消元法计算时变反馈增益和卡尔曼滤波增益，形成TV-LQG控制器。
AI.result: 在2.9m×2.3m四缆平面机器人上，旋转和位移的均方根误差分别降低0.8°和11.6mm，优于双空间前馈控制器。
AI.conclusion: 因子图框架有效提升了缆驱机器人控制的局部最优性与跟踪精度，验证了TV-LQG方法的优越性。

authors_text: Pabbathi Sri Charan,Saksham Gupta,Satvik Agrawal,Gadupudi Sahithi Sindhu
title: Effective Gesture Based Framework for Capturing User Input
title_zh: 用于捕获用户输入的有效的基于手势的框架
abstract: Computers today aren't just confined to laptops and desktops. Mobile gadgets like mobile phones and laptops also make use of it. However, one input device that hasn't changed in the last 50 years is the QWERTY keyboard. Users of virtual keyboards can type on any surface as if it were a keyboard thanks to sensor technology and artificial intelligence. In this research, we use the idea of image processing to create an application for seeing a computer keyboard using a novel framework which can detect hand gestures with precise accuracy while also being sustainable and financially viable. A camera is used to capture keyboard images and finger movements which subsequently acts as a virtual keyboard. In addition, a visible virtual mouse that accepts finger coordinates as input is also described in this study. This system has a direct benefit of reducing peripheral cost, reducing electronics waste generated due to external devices and providing accessibility to people who cannot use the traditional keyboard and mouse.
summary: Computers today aren't just confined to laptops and desktops. Mobile gadgets like mobile phones and laptops also make use of it. However, one input device that hasn't changed in the last 50 years is the QWERTY keyboard. Users of virtual keyboards can type on any surface as if it were a keyboard thanks to sensor technology and artificial intelligence. In this research, we use the idea of image processing to create an application for seeing a computer keyboard using a novel framework which can detect hand gestures with precise accuracy while also being sustainable and financially viable. A camera is used to capture keyboard images and finger movements which subsequently acts as a virtual keyboard. In addition, a visible virtual mouse that accepts finger coordinates as input is also described in this study. This system has a direct benefit of reducing peripheral cost, reducing electronics waste generated due to external devices and providing accessibility to people who cannot use the traditional keyboard and mouse.
abstract_zh: 今天的计算机不仅仅局限于笔记本电脑和台式机。手机和笔记本电脑等移动设备也使用它。然而，QWERTY 键盘是过去 50 年来没有改变的一种输入设备。借助传感器技术和人工智能，虚拟键盘的用户可以在任何表面上打字，就像键盘一样。在这项研究中，我们利用图像处理的思想创建了一个应用程序，使用一种新颖的框架来查看计算机键盘，该框架可以精确地检测手势，同时也是可持续的和经济上可行的。相机用于捕获键盘图像和手指运动，随后充当虚拟键盘。此外，本研究还描述了一种接受手指坐标作为输入的可见虚拟鼠标。该系统的直接好处是降低外围成本，减少因外部设备产生的电子废物，并为无法使用传统键盘和鼠标的人们提供可访问性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像处理的新型手势识别框架，通过摄像头捕捉用户手部动作，实现虚拟键盘和鼠标的输入功能。
AI.motivation: 传统QWERTY键盘50年未变，存在成本高、电子垃圾多及无法满足特殊人群需求等问题，需开发可持续且经济的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用摄像头采集键盘区域图像与手指运动数据，结合图像处理技术和人工智能算法实现手势精准识别，并构建可视化虚拟鼠标坐标映射系统。
AI.result: 系统有效降低外设成本与电子废弃物，为残障人士提供新型输入方式，同时保持较高识别准确率和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了基于视觉的手势输入技术可行性，为未来人机交互提供了低成本、环保且具包容性的解决方案。

authors_text: Zheng Wang,Wenjie Ruan
title: Understanding Adversarial Robustness of Vision Transformers via Cauchy Problem
title_zh: 通过柯西问题了解视觉变换器的对抗鲁棒性
abstract: Recent research on the robustness of deep learning has shown that Vision Transformers (ViTs) surpass the Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) under some perturbations, e.g., natural corruption, adversarial attacks, etc. Some papers argue that the superior robustness of ViT comes from the segmentation of its input images; others say that the Multi-head Self-Attention (MSA) is the key to preserving the robustness. In this paper, we aim to introduce a principled and unified theoretical framework to investigate such an argument on ViT's robustness. We first theoretically prove that, unlike Transformers in Natural Language Processing, ViTs are Lipschitz continuous. Then we theoretically analyze the adversarial robustness of ViTs from the perspective of the Cauchy Problem, via which we can quantify how the robustness propagates through layers. We demonstrate that the first and last layers are the critical factors to affect the robustness of ViTs. Furthermore, based on our theory, we empirically show that unlike the claims from existing research, MSA only contributes to the adversarial robustness of ViTs under weak adversarial attacks, e.g., FGSM, and surprisingly, MSA actually comprises the model's adversarial robustness under stronger attacks, e.g., PGD attacks.
summary: Recent research on the robustness of deep learning has shown that Vision Transformers (ViTs) surpass the Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) under some perturbations, e.g., natural corruption, adversarial attacks, etc. Some papers argue that the superior robustness of ViT comes from the segmentation of its input images; others say that the Multi-head Self-Attention (MSA) is the key to preserving the robustness. In this paper, we aim to introduce a principled and unified theoretical framework to investigate such an argument on ViT's robustness. We first theoretically prove that, unlike Transformers in Natural Language Processing, ViTs are Lipschitz continuous. Then we theoretically analyze the adversarial robustness of ViTs from the perspective of the Cauchy Problem, via which we can quantify how the robustness propagates through layers. We demonstrate that the first and last layers are the critical factors to affect the robustness of ViTs. Furthermore, based on our theory, we empirically show that unlike the claims from existing research, MSA only contributes to the adversarial robustness of ViTs under weak adversarial attacks, e.g., FGSM, and surprisingly, MSA actually comprises the model's adversarial robustness under stronger attacks, e.g., PGD attacks.
abstract_zh: 最近关于深度学习鲁棒性的研究表明，视觉变换器（ViT）在一些扰动下（例如自然损坏、对抗性攻击等）超越了卷积神经网络（CNN）。一些论文认为 ViT 的卓越鲁棒性来自于其输入图像的分割；其他人说多头自注意力（MSA）是保持鲁棒性的关键。在本文中，我们旨在引入一个原则性的、统一的理论框架来研究关于 ViT 鲁棒性的争论。我们首先从理论上证明，与自然语言处理中的 Transformer 不同，ViT 是 Lipschitz 连续的。然后，我们从柯西问题的角度理论上分析了 ViT 的对抗鲁棒性，通过它我们可以量化鲁棒性如何通过层传播。我们证明第一层和最后一层是影响 ViT 鲁棒性的关键因素。此外，根据我们的理论，我们凭经验表明，与现有研究的主张不同，MSA 仅有助于 ViT 在弱对抗性攻击（例如 FGSM）下的对抗鲁棒性，令人惊讶的是，MSA 实际上包含了模型在较强攻击（例如 PGD 攻击）下的对抗鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过柯西问题框架，系统研究视觉Transformer（ViT）在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对ViT鲁棒性优于CNN的原因存在争议，需建立统一理论框架明确其鲁棒性本质。
AI.method: 理论证明ViT的Lipschitz连续性，基于柯西问题分析对抗鲁棒性传播机制，并通过实验验证MSA在不同攻击下的作用差异。
AI.result: 发现首末层是ViT鲁棒性的关键因素，MSA在弱攻击（如FGSM）中增强鲁棒性，但在强攻击（如PGD）中反而降低鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的理论框架揭示了ViT鲁棒性的分层传播特性，推翻了MSA普遍增强鲁棒性的传统观点，为模型设计提供新方向。

authors_text: Michael Sidorov,Dan Vilenchik
title: Revisiting Information Cascades in Online Social Networks
title_zh: 重新审视在线社交网络中的信息级联
abstract: It's by now folklore that to understand the activity pattern of a user in an online social network (OSN) platform, one needs to look at his friends or the ones he follows. The common perception is that these friends exert influence on the user, effecting his decision whether to re-share content or not. Hinging upon this intuition, a variety of models were developed to predict how information propagates in OSN, similar to the way infection spreads in the population. In this paper, we revisit this world view and arrive at new conclusions. Given a set of users $V$, we study the task of predicting whether a user $u \in V$ will re-share content by some $v \in V$ at the following time window given the activity of all the users in $V$ in the previous time window. We design several algorithms for this task, ranging from a simple greedy algorithm that only learns $u$'s conditional probability distribution, ignoring the rest of $V$, to a convolutional neural network-based algorithm that receives the activity of all of $V$, but does not receive explicitly the social link structure. We tested our algorithms on four datasets that we collected from Twitter, each revolving around a different popular topic in 2020. The best performance, average F1-score of 0.86 over the four datasets, was achieved by the convolutional neural network. The simple, social-link ignorant, algorithm achieved an average F1-score of 0.78.
summary: It's by now folklore that to understand the activity pattern of a user in an online social network (OSN) platform, one needs to look at his friends or the ones he follows. The common perception is that these friends exert influence on the user, effecting his decision whether to re-share content or not. Hinging upon this intuition, a variety of models were developed to predict how information propagates in OSN, similar to the way infection spreads in the population. In this paper, we revisit this world view and arrive at new conclusions. Given a set of users $V$, we study the task of predicting whether a user $u \in V$ will re-share content by some $v \in V$ at the following time window given the activity of all the users in $V$ in the previous time window. We design several algorithms for this task, ranging from a simple greedy algorithm that only learns $u$'s conditional probability distribution, ignoring the rest of $V$, to a convolutional neural network-based algorithm that receives the activity of all of $V$, but does not receive explicitly the social link structure. We tested our algorithms on four datasets that we collected from Twitter, each revolving around a different popular topic in 2020. The best performance, average F1-score of 0.86 over the four datasets, was achieved by the convolutional neural network. The simple, social-link ignorant, algorithm achieved an average F1-score of 0.78.
abstract_zh: 现在的民间传说是，要了解用户在在线社交网络 (OSN) 平台上的活动模式，需要查看他的朋友或他关注的人。人们普遍认为这些朋友对用户施加影响，影响他是否重新分享内容的决定。根据这种直觉，人们开发了多种模型来预测信息如何在 OSN 中传播，类似于感染在人群中传播的方式。在本文中，我们重新审视这一世界观并得出新的结论。给定一组用户 $V$，我们研究的任务是在给定 $V$ 中所有用户在前一个时间窗口中的活动的情况下，预测用户 $u \in V$ 是否会在接下来的时间窗口中通过某些 $v \in V$ 重新共享内容。我们为此任务设计了几种算法，从仅学习 $u$ 的条件概率分布而忽略 $V$ 其余部分的简单贪婪算法，到接收所有 $V$ 的活动但不明确接收社交链接结构的基于卷积神经网络的算法。我们在从 Twitter 收集的四个数据集上测试了我们的算法，每个数据集都围绕 2020 年不同的热门主题。卷积神经网络实现了四个数据集的最佳性能，平均 F1 分数为 0.86。这个简单的、不考虑社交链接的算法获得了 0.78 的平均 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在预测用户在在线社交网络中是否会重新分享内容，基于其在前一时间窗口的活动数据。
AI.motivation: 传统模型假设朋友影响用户行为，但作者认为需重新评估这一假设并探索更有效的方法。
AI.method: 设计了多种算法，包括仅学习用户条件概率分布的贪心算法和不显式使用社交链接结构的卷积神经网络算法。
AI.result: 在四个Twitter数据集上测试，CNN算法平均F1得分0.86，简单算法为0.78。
AI.conclusion: 社交链接结构的影响可能被高估，CNN能有效捕捉用户行为模式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在预测用户在在线社交网络中是否会重新分享内容，基于其在前一时间窗口的活动数据。
ai_content.motivation: 传统模型假设朋友影响用户行为，但作者认为需重新评估这一假设并探索更有效的方法。

search_text: Revisiting Information Cascades in Online Social Networks 重新审视在线社交网络中的信息级联 It's by now folklore that to understand the activity pattern of a user in an online social network (OSN) platform, one needs to look at his friends or the ones he follows. The common perception is that these friends exert influence on the user, effecting his decision whether to re-share content or not. Hinging upon this intuition, a variety of models were developed to predict how information propagates in OSN, similar to the way infection spreads in the population. In this paper, we revisit this world view and arrive at new conclusions. Given a set of users $V$, we study the task of predicting whether a user $u \in V$ will re-share content by some $v \in V$ at the following time window given the activity of all the users in $V$ in the previous time window. We design several algorithms for this task, ranging from a simple greedy algorithm that only learns $u$'s conditional probability distribution, ignoring the rest of $V$, to a convolutional neural network-based algorithm that receives the activity of all of $V$, but does not receive explicitly the social link structure. We tested our algorithms on four datasets that we collected from Twitter, each revolving around a different popular topic in 2020. The best performance, average F1-score of 0.86 over the four datasets, was achieved by the convolutional neural network. The simple, social-link ignorant, algorithm achieved an average F1-score of 0.78. 现在的民间传说是，要了解用户在在线社交网络 (OSN) 平台上的活动模式，需要查看他的朋友或他关注的人。人们普遍认为这些朋友对用户施加影响，影响他是否重新分享内容的决定。根据这种直觉，人们开发了多种模型来预测信息如何在 OSN 中传播，类似于感染在人群中传播的方式。在本文中，我们重新审视这一世界观并得出新的结论。给定一组用户 $V$，我们研究的任务是在给定 $V$ 中所有用户在前一个时间窗口中的活动的情况下，预测用户 $u \in V$ 是否会在接下来的时间窗口中通过某些 $v \in V$ 重新共享内容。我们为此任务设计了几种算法，从仅学习 $u$ 的条件概率分布而忽略 $V$ 其余部分的简单贪婪算法，到接收所有 $V$ 的活动但不明确接收社交链接结构的基于卷积神经网络的算法。我们在从 Twitter 收集的四个数据集上测试了我们的算法，每个数据集都围绕 2020 年不同的热门主题。卷积神经网络实现了四个数据集的最佳性能，平均 F1 分数为 0.86。这个简单的、不考虑社交链接的算法获得了 0.78 的平均 F1 分数。 本文旨在预测用户在在线社交网络中是否会重新分享内容，基于其在前一时间窗口的活动数据。 Michael Sidorov,Dan Vilenchik cs.SI,cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Yitong Zhang,Sophia Bano,Ann-Sophie Page,Jan Deprest,Danail Stoyanov,Francisco Vasconcelos
title: Retrieval of surgical phase transitions using reinforcement learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习检索手术相变
abstract: In minimally invasive surgery, surgical workflow segmentation from video analysis is a well studied topic. The conventional approach defines it as a multi-class classification problem, where individual video frames are attributed a surgical phase label. We introduce a novel reinforcement learning formulation for offline phase transition retrieval. Instead of attempting to classify every video frame, we identify the timestamp of each phase transition. By construction, our model does not produce spurious and noisy phase transitions, but contiguous phase blocks. We investigate two different configurations of this model. The first does not require processing all frames in a video (only <60% and <20% of frames in 2 different applications), while producing results slightly under the state-of-the-art accuracy. The second configuration processes all video frames, and outperforms the state-of-the art at a comparable computational cost. We compare our method against the recent top-performing frame-based approaches TeCNO and Trans-SVNet on the public dataset Cholec80 and also on an in-house dataset of laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy. We perform both a frame-based (accuracy, precision, recall and F1-score) and an event-based (event ratio) evaluation of our algorithms.
summary: In minimally invasive surgery, surgical workflow segmentation from video analysis is a well studied topic. The conventional approach defines it as a multi-class classification problem, where individual video frames are attributed a surgical phase label. We introduce a novel reinforcement learning formulation for offline phase transition retrieval. Instead of attempting to classify every video frame, we identify the timestamp of each phase transition. By construction, our model does not produce spurious and noisy phase transitions, but contiguous phase blocks. We investigate two different configurations of this model. The first does not require processing all frames in a video (only <60% and <20% of frames in 2 different applications), while producing results slightly under the state-of-the-art accuracy. The second configuration processes all video frames, and outperforms the state-of-the art at a comparable computational cost. We compare our method against the recent top-performing frame-based approaches TeCNO and Trans-SVNet on the public dataset Cholec80 and also on an in-house dataset of laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy. We perform both a frame-based (accuracy, precision, recall and F1-score) and an event-based (event ratio) evaluation of our algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在微创手术中，通过视频分析进行手术工作流程分割是一个深入研究的主题。传统方法将其定义为多类分类问题，其中各个视频帧被归因于手术阶段标签。我们引入了一种用于离线相变检索的新型强化学习公式。我们没有尝试对每个视频帧进行分类，而是识别每个相变的时间戳。通过构造，我们的模型不会产生杂散和噪声相变，而是产生连续的相块。我们研究了该模型的两种不同配置。第一个不需要处理视频中的所有帧（在 2 个不同的应用程序中仅处理 <60% 和 <20% 的帧），同时产生的结果略低于最先进的精度。第二种配置处理所有视频帧，并以可比较的计算成本超越现有技术。我们在公共数据集 Cholec80 以及腹腔镜骶骨固定术的内部数据集上将我们的方法与最近表现最佳的基于框架的方法 TeCNO 和 Trans-SVNet 进行比较。我们对算法进行基于帧（准确率、精确度、召回率和 F1 分数）和基于事件（事件比率）的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的离线方法，用于从微创手术视频中检索手术阶段转换时间戳，而非传统逐帧分类。
AI.motivation: 传统手术流程分割方法依赖逐帧分类，存在计算量大、噪声多的问题。本文旨在通过识别阶段转换时间戳，提高分割效率与准确性。
AI.method: 构建强化学习模型，通过两种配置实现阶段转换检索：第一种仅处理视频中少量帧（<60%或<20%），第二种处理全部帧，后者在相近计算成本下优于现有方法。
AI.result: 在Cholec80数据集和腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术数据集上，第二种配置在事件比（event ratio）及帧级指标（准确率、F1值）上均超越TeCNO和Trans-SVNet等先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习框架能有效检索手术阶段转换，减少冗余计算并避免噪声，为手术流程分析提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Thuan Nguyen,Boyang Lyu,Prakash Ishwar,Matthias Scheutz,Shuchin Aeron
title: Joint covariate-alignment and concept-alignment: a framework for domain generalization
title_zh: 联合协变量对齐和概念对齐：领域泛化框架
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, and 1 table. This paper is accepted at 32nd IEEE International Workshop on Machine Learning for Signal Processing (MLSP 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 2 figures, and 1 table. This paper is accepted at 32nd IEEE International Workshop on Machine Learning for Signal Processing (MLSP 2022)
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel domain generalization (DG) framework based on a new upper bound to the risk on the unseen domain. Particularly, our framework proposes to jointly minimize both the covariate-shift as well as the concept-shift between the seen domains for a better performance on the unseen domain. While the proposed approach can be implemented via an arbitrary combination of covariate-alignment and concept-alignment modules, in this work we use well-established approaches for distributional alignment namely, Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) and covariance Alignment (CORAL), and use an Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM)-based approach for concept alignment. Our numerical results show that the proposed methods perform as well as or better than the state-of-the-art for domain generalization on several data sets.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel domain generalization (DG) framework based on a new upper bound to the risk on the unseen domain. Particularly, our framework proposes to jointly minimize both the covariate-shift as well as the concept-shift between the seen domains for a better performance on the unseen domain. While the proposed approach can be implemented via an arbitrary combination of covariate-alignment and concept-alignment modules, in this work we use well-established approaches for distributional alignment namely, Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) and covariance Alignment (CORAL), and use an Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM)-based approach for concept alignment. Our numerical results show that the proposed methods perform as well as or better than the state-of-the-art for domain generalization on several data sets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的领域泛化（DG）框架，该框架基于未知领域风险的新上限。特别是，我们的框架建议共同最小化可见域之间的协变量转移和概念转移，以便在未见域上获得更好的性能。虽然所提出的方法可以通过协变量对齐和概念对齐模块的任意组合来实现，但在这项工作中，我们使用成熟的分布对齐方法，即最大均值差异（MMD）和协方差对齐（CORAL），并使用基于不变风险最小化（IRM）的方法进行概念对齐。我们的数值结果表明，所提出的方法在多个数据集上的域泛化性能与最先进的方法一样好，甚至更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合协变量对齐与概念对齐的领域泛化框架，通过最小化已见领域的协变量偏移和概念偏移来提升未见领域的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法多仅关注协变量对齐，忽视概念偏移问题，导致在未见领域表现不足。
AI.method: 结合最大均值差异（MMD）、协方差对齐（CORAL）实现分布对齐，并采用不变风险最小化（IRM）进行概念对齐。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，该方法性能达到或超越当前最优领域泛化方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化协变量与概念对齐能有效提升领域泛化能力，为解决分布外泛化问题提供新思路。

Particularly, our framework proposes to jointly minimize both the covariate-shift as well as the concept-shift between the seen domains for a better performance on the unseen domain. While the proposed approach can be implemented via an arbitrary combination of covariate-alignment and concept-alignment modules, in this work we use well-established approaches for distributional alignment namely, Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) and covariance Alignment (CORAL), and use an Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM)-based approach for concept alignment. Our numerical results show that the proposed methods perform as well as or better than the state-of-the-art for domain generalization on several data sets. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的领域泛化（DG）框架，该框架基于未知领域风险的新上限。特别是，我们的框架建议共同最小化可见域之间的协变量转移和概念转移，以便在未见域上获得更好的性能。虽然所提出的方法可以通过协变量对齐和概念对齐模块的任意组合来实现，但在这项工作中，我们使用成熟的分布对齐方法，即最大均值差异（MMD）和协方差对齐（CORAL），并使用基于不变风险最小化（IRM）的方法进行概念对齐。我们的数值结果表明，所提出的方法在多个数据集上的域泛化性能与最先进的方法一样好，甚至更好。 本文提出一种联合协变量对齐与概念对齐的领域泛化框架，通过最小化已见领域的协变量偏移和概念偏移来提升未见领域的性能。 Thuan Nguyen,Boyang Lyu,Prakash Ishwar,Matthias Scheutz,Shuchin Aeron cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Fabio Massimo Zennaro,Paolo Turrini,Theodoros Damoulas
title: Towards Computing an Optimal Abstraction for Structural Causal Models
title_zh: 计算结构因果模型的最佳抽象
comment: 6 pages, 5 pages appendix, 2 figures Submitted to Causal Representation Learning workshop at the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI CRL 2022)
comments: 6 pages, 5 pages appendix, 2 figures Submitted to Causal Representation Learning workshop at the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI CRL 2022)
abstract: Working with causal models at different levels of abstraction is an important feature of science. Existing work has already considered the problem of expressing formally the relation of abstraction between causal models. In this paper, we focus on the problem of learning abstractions. We start by defining the learning problem formally in terms of the optimization of a standard measure of consistency. We then point out the limitation of this approach, and we suggest extending the objective function with a term accounting for information loss. We suggest a concrete measure of information loss, and we illustrate its contribution to learning new abstractions.
summary: Working with causal models at different levels of abstraction is an important feature of science. Existing work has already considered the problem of expressing formally the relation of abstraction between causal models. In this paper, we focus on the problem of learning abstractions. We start by defining the learning problem formally in terms of the optimization of a standard measure of consistency. We then point out the limitation of this approach, and we suggest extending the objective function with a term accounting for information loss. We suggest a concrete measure of information loss, and we illustrate its contribution to learning new abstractions.
abstract_zh: 在不同抽象层次上使用因果模型是科学的一个重要特征。现有的工作已经考虑了形式化表达因果模型之间的抽象关系的问题。在本文中，我们关注学习抽象的问题。我们首先根据一致性标准度量的优化来正式定义学习问题。然后我们指出这种方法的局限性，并建议用考虑信息丢失的术语来扩展目标函数。我们提出了信息丢失的具体衡量标准，并说明了它对学习新抽象的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在学习结构因果模型的最优抽象表示。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在形式化表达因果模型抽象关系时未充分考虑信息损失问题，导致抽象质量受限。
AI.method: 通过优化一致性度量定义学习问题，并扩展目标函数加入信息损失项，提出具体的信息损失衡量方法。
AI.result: 展示了信息损失度量对学习新抽象的有效性，改进了抽象学习效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过平衡一致性与信息损失，为结构因果模型的抽象学习提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Saleh Baghersalimi,Alireza Amirshahi,Farnaz Forooghifar,Tomas Teijeiro,Amir Aminifar,David Atienza
title: Many-to-One Knowledge Distillation of Real-Time Epileptic Seizure Detection for Low-Power Wearable Internet of Things Systems
title_zh: 低功耗可穿戴物联网系统实时癫痫发作检测的多对一知识蒸馏
abstract: Integrating low-power wearable Internet of Things (IoT) systems into routine health monitoring is an ongoing challenge. Recent advances in the computation capabilities of wearables make it possible to target complex scenarios by exploiting multiple biosignals and using high-performance algorithms, such as Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). There is, however, a trade-off between performance of the algorithms and the low-power requirements of IoT platforms with limited resources. Besides, physically larger and multi-biosignal-based wearables bring significant discomfort to the patients. Consequently, reducing power consumption and discomfort is necessary for patients to use IoT devices continuously during everyday life. To overcome these challenges, in the context of epileptic seizure detection, we propose a many-to-one signals knowledge distillation approach targeting single-biosignal processing in IoT wearable systems. The starting point is to get a highly-accurate multi-biosignal DNN, then apply our approach to develop a single-biosignal DNN solution for IoT systems that achieves an accuracy comparable to the original multi-biosignal DNN. To assess the practicality of our approach to real-life scenarios, we perform a comprehensive simulation experiment analysis on several state-of-the-art edge computing platforms, such as Kendryte K210 and Raspberry Pi Zero.
summary: Integrating low-power wearable Internet of Things (IoT) systems into routine health monitoring is an ongoing challenge. Recent advances in the computation capabilities of wearables make it possible to target complex scenarios by exploiting multiple biosignals and using high-performance algorithms, such as Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). There is, however, a trade-off between performance of the algorithms and the low-power requirements of IoT platforms with limited resources. Besides, physically larger and multi-biosignal-based wearables bring significant discomfort to the patients. Consequently, reducing power consumption and discomfort is necessary for patients to use IoT devices continuously during everyday life. To overcome these challenges, in the context of epileptic seizure detection, we propose a many-to-one signals knowledge distillation approach targeting single-biosignal processing in IoT wearable systems. The starting point is to get a highly-accurate multi-biosignal DNN, then apply our approach to develop a single-biosignal DNN solution for IoT systems that achieves an accuracy comparable to the original multi-biosignal DNN. To assess the practicality of our approach to real-life scenarios, we perform a comprehensive simulation experiment analysis on several state-of-the-art edge computing platforms, such as Kendryte K210 and Raspberry Pi Zero.
abstract_zh: 将低功耗可穿戴物联网 (IoT) 系统集成到日常健康监测中是一项持续的挑战。可穿戴设备计算能力的最新进展使得通过利用多种生物信号和使用高性能算法（例如深度神经网络（DNN））来定位复杂场景成为可能。然而，算法的性能与资源有限的物联网平台的低功耗要求之间存在权衡。此外，体积较大且基于多生物信号的可穿戴设备给患者带来了明显的不适。因此，对于患者在日常生活中持续使用物联网设备来说，减少功耗和不适感是必要的。为了克服这些挑战，在癫痫发作检测的背景下，我们提出了一种针对物联网可穿戴系统中的单一生物信号处理的多对一信号知识蒸馏方法。出发点是获得高精度的多生物信号 DNN，然后应用我们的方法为物联网系统开发单生物信号 DNN 解决方案，其精度可与原始多生物信号 DNN 相当。为了评估我们的方法在现实场景中的实用性，我们在几个最先进的边缘计算平台（例如 Kendryte K210 和 Raspberry Pi Zero）上进行了全面的模拟实验分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向低功耗可穿戴物联网系统的多对一信号知识蒸馏方法，通过将多生物信号DNN压缩为单生物信号DNN，实现癫痫发作检测的实时性与低功耗需求平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有可穿戴设备因多生物信号处理导致功耗高、体积大，影响患者舒适度，需在保持检测精度的前提下降低资源消耗。
AI.method: 基于高精度多生物信号DNN，采用知识蒸馏技术训练单生物信号DNN模型，通过边缘计算平台（如Kendryte K210、Raspberry Pi Zero）验证模型实用性。
AI.result: 实验表明单生物信号模型在边缘设备上达到与多信号模型相当的检测精度，显著降低计算资源占用与硬件复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了低功耗可穿戴设备在癫痫检测中的性能与功耗矛盾，为实际部署提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Tomas Kulvicius,Dajie Zhang,Karin Nielsen-Saines,Sven Bölte,Marc Kraft,Christa Einspieler,Luise Poustka,Florentin Wörgötter,Peter B Marschik
title: Infant movement classification through pressure distribution analysis
title_zh: 通过压力分布分析对婴儿运动进行分类
abstract: Aiming at objective early detection of neuromotor disorders such as cerebral palsy, we proposed an innovative non-intrusive approach using a pressure sensing device to classify infant general movements (GMs). Here, we tested the feasibility of using pressure data to differentiate typical GM patterns of the ''fidgety period'' (i.e., fidgety movements) vs. the ''pre-fidgety period'' (i.e., writhing movements). Participants (N = 45) were sampled from a typically-developing infant cohort. Multi-modal sensor data, including pressure data from a 32x32-grid pressure sensing mat with 1024 sensors, were prospectively recorded for each infant in seven succeeding laboratory sessions in biweekly intervals from 4-16 weeks of post-term age. For proof-of-concept, 1776 pressure data snippets, each 5s long, from the two targeted age periods were taken for movement classification. Each snippet was pre-annotated based on corresponding synchronised video data by human assessors as either fidgety present (FM+) or absent (FM-). Multiple neural network architectures were tested to distinguish the FM+ vs. FM- classes, including support vector machines (SVM), feed-forward networks (FFNs), convolutional neural networks (CNNs), and long short-term memory (LSTM) networks. The CNN achieved the highest average classification accuracy (81.4%) for classes FM+ vs. FM-. Comparing the pros and cons of other methods aiming at automated GMA to the pressure sensing approach, we concluded that the pressure sensing approach has great potential for efficient large-scale motion data acquisition and sharing. This will in return enable improvement of the approach that may prove scalable for daily clinical application for evaluating infant neuromotor functions.
summary: Aiming at objective early detection of neuromotor disorders such as cerebral palsy, we proposed an innovative non-intrusive approach using a pressure sensing device to classify infant general movements (GMs). Here, we tested the feasibility of using pressure data to differentiate typical GM patterns of the ''fidgety period'' (i.e., fidgety movements) vs. the ''pre-fidgety period'' (i.e., writhing movements). Participants (N = 45) were sampled from a typically-developing infant cohort. Multi-modal sensor data, including pressure data from a 32x32-grid pressure sensing mat with 1024 sensors, were prospectively recorded for each infant in seven succeeding laboratory sessions in biweekly intervals from 4-16 weeks of post-term age. For proof-of-concept, 1776 pressure data snippets, each 5s long, from the two targeted age periods were taken for movement classification. Each snippet was pre-annotated based on corresponding synchronised video data by human assessors as either fidgety present (FM+) or absent (FM-). Multiple neural network architectures were tested to distinguish the FM+ vs. FM- classes, including support vector machines (SVM), feed-forward networks (FFNs), convolutional neural networks (CNNs), and long short-term memory (LSTM) networks. The CNN achieved the highest average classification accuracy (81.4%) for classes FM+ vs. FM-. Comparing the pros and cons of other methods aiming at automated GMA to the pressure sensing approach, we concluded that the pressure sensing approach has great potential for efficient large-scale motion data acquisition and sharing. This will in return enable improvement of the approach that may prove scalable for daily clinical application for evaluating infant neuromotor functions.
abstract_zh: 为了客观地早期检测脑瘫等神经运动障碍，我们提出了一种创新的非侵入性方法，使用压力传感装置对婴儿一般运动（GM）进行分类。在这里，我们测试了使用压力数据来区分“烦躁期”（即烦躁运动）与“烦躁前时期”（即扭动运动）的典型 GM 模式的可行性。参与者 (N = 45) 是从典型发育的婴儿队列中抽取的。多模式传感器数据，包括来自带有 1024 个传感器的 32x32 网格压力传感垫的压力数据，在足月后 4-16 周期间每两周一次的连续 7 次实验室会议中前瞻性地记录了每个婴儿的压力数据。为了进行概念验证，我们从两个目标年龄阶段获取了 1776 个压力数据片段，每个片段长 5 秒，用于运动分类。每个片段都由人类评估员根据相应的同步视频数据预先注释为烦躁存在 (FM+) 或不存在 (FM-)。测试了多种神经网络架构来区分 FM+ 与 FM- 类别，包括支持向量机 (SVM)、前馈网络 (FFN)、卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络。 CNN 对 FM+ 类与 FM- 类的平均分类准确率最高 (81.4%)。比较其他针对自动化 GMA 的方法与压力传感方法的优缺点，我们得出结论，压力传感方法在高效的大规模运动数据采集和共享方面具有巨大的潜力。作为回报，这将能够改进该方法，该方法可能被证明可扩展用于评估婴儿神经运动功能的日常临床应用。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于压力分布分析的非侵入式方法，用于分类婴儿的一般运动模式，以实现神经运动障碍的早期客观检测。
AI.motivation: 传统婴儿运动评估依赖主观观察，存在局限性。通过压力传感设备实现自动化、客观化的运动分类，有助于早期发现神经运动障碍如脑瘫。
AI.method: 使用32x32网格压力感应垫采集婴儿运动数据，结合视频标注生成5秒片段数据集，采用SVM、FFN、CNN和LSTM等神经网络进行分类对比。
AI.result: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在区分fidgety运动（FM+）与writhing运动（FM-）时达到最高平均分类准确率81.4%。
AI.conclusion: 压力传感方法具有大规模运动数据采集与共享的潜力，可为临床婴儿神经运动功能评估提供可扩展的自动化解决方案。

search_text: Infant movement classification through pressure distribution analysis 通过压力分布分析对婴儿运动进行分类 Aiming at objective early detection of neuromotor disorders such as cerebral palsy, we proposed an innovative non-intrusive approach using a pressure sensing device to classify infant general movements (GMs). Here, we tested the feasibility of using pressure data to differentiate typical GM patterns of the ''fidgety period'' (i.e., fidgety movements) vs. the ''pre-fidgety period'' (i.e., writhing movements). Participants (N = 45) were sampled from a typically-developing infant cohort. Multi-modal sensor data, including pressure data from a 32x32-grid pressure sensing mat with 1024 sensors, were prospectively recorded for each infant in seven succeeding laboratory sessions in biweekly intervals from 4-16 weeks of post-term age. For proof-of-concept, 1776 pressure data snippets, each 5s long, from the two targeted age periods were taken for movement classification. Each snippet was pre-annotated based on corresponding synchronised video data by human assessors as either fidgety present (FM+) or absent (FM-). Multiple neural network architectures were tested to distinguish the FM+ vs. FM- classes, including support vector machines (SVM), feed-forward networks (FFNs), convolutional neural networks (CNNs), and long short-term memory (LSTM) networks. The CNN achieved the highest average classification accuracy (81.4%) for classes FM+ vs. FM-. Comparing the pros and cons of other methods aiming at automated GMA to the pressure sensing approach, we concluded that the pressure sensing approach has great potential for efficient large-scale motion data acquisition and sharing. This will in return enable improvement of the approach that may prove scalable for daily clinical application for evaluating infant neuromotor functions. 为了客观地早期检测脑瘫等神经运动障碍，我们提出了一种创新的非侵入性方法，使用压力传感装置对婴儿一般运动（GM）进行分类。在这里，我们测试了使用压力数据来区分“烦躁期”（即烦躁运动）与“烦躁前时期”（即扭动运动）的典型 GM 模式的可行性。参与者 (N = 45) 是从典型发育的婴儿队列中抽取的。多模式传感器数据，包括来自带有 1024 个传感器的 32x32 网格压力传感垫的压力数据，在足月后 4-16 周期间每两周一次的连续 7 次实验室会议中前瞻性地记录了每个婴儿的压力数据。为了进行概念验证，我们从两个目标年龄阶段获取了 1776 个压力数据片段，每个片段长 5 秒，用于运动分类。每个片段都由人类评估员根据相应的同步视频数据预先注释为烦躁存在 (FM+) 或不存在 (FM-)。测试了多种神经网络架构来区分 FM+ 与 FM- 类别，包括支持向量机 (SVM)、前馈网络 (FFN)、卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络。 CNN 对 FM+ 类与 FM- 类的平均分类准确率最高 (81.4%)。比较其他针对自动化 GMA 的方法与压力传感方法的优缺点，我们得出结论，压力传感方法在高效的大规模运动数据采集和共享方面具有巨大的潜力。作为回报，这将能够改进该方法，该方法可能被证明可扩展用于评估婴儿神经运动功能的日常临床应用。 本研究提出一种基于压力分布分析的非侵入式方法，用于分类婴儿的一般运动模式，以实现神经运动障碍的早期客观检测。 Tomas Kulvicius,Dajie Zhang,Karin Nielsen-Saines,Sven Bölte,Marc Kraft,Christa Einspieler,Luise Poustka,Florentin Wörgötter,Peter B Marschik eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ye Qiao,Mohammed Alnemari,Nader Bagherzadeh
title: A Two-Stage Efficient 3-D CNN Framework for EEG Based Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于 EEG 的情绪识别的两阶段高效 3-D CNN 框架
abstract: This paper proposes a novel two-stage framework for emotion recognition using EEG data that outperforms state-of-the-art models while keeping the model size small and computationally efficient. The framework consists of two stages; the first stage involves constructing efficient models named EEGNet, which is inspired by the state-of-the-art efficient architecture and employs inverted-residual blocks that contain depthwise separable convolutional layers. The EEGNet models on both valence and arousal labels achieve the average classification accuracy of 90%, 96.6%, and 99.5% with only 6.4k, 14k, and 25k parameters, respectively. In terms of accuracy and storage cost, these models outperform the previous state-of-the-art result by up to 9%. In the second stage, we binarize these models to further compress them and deploy them easily on edge devices. Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) typically degrade model accuracy. We improve the EEGNet binarized models in this paper by introducing three novel methods and achieving a 20\% improvement over the baseline binary models. The proposed binarized EEGNet models achieve accuracies of 81%, 95%, and 99% with storage costs of 0.11Mbits, 0.28Mbits, and 0.46Mbits, respectively. Those models help deploy a precise human emotion recognition system on the edge environment.
summary: This paper proposes a novel two-stage framework for emotion recognition using EEG data that outperforms state-of-the-art models while keeping the model size small and computationally efficient. The framework consists of two stages; the first stage involves constructing efficient models named EEGNet, which is inspired by the state-of-the-art efficient architecture and employs inverted-residual blocks that contain depthwise separable convolutional layers. The EEGNet models on both valence and arousal labels achieve the average classification accuracy of 90%, 96.6%, and 99.5% with only 6.4k, 14k, and 25k parameters, respectively. In terms of accuracy and storage cost, these models outperform the previous state-of-the-art result by up to 9%. In the second stage, we binarize these models to further compress them and deploy them easily on edge devices. Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) typically degrade model accuracy. We improve the EEGNet binarized models in this paper by introducing three novel methods and achieving a 20\% improvement over the baseline binary models. The proposed binarized EEGNet models achieve accuracies of 81%, 95%, and 99% with storage costs of 0.11Mbits, 0.28Mbits, and 0.46Mbits, respectively. Those models help deploy a precise human emotion recognition system on the edge environment.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用脑电图数据进行情感识别的新型两阶段框架，该框架优于最先进的模型，同时保持模型尺寸小且计算效率高。该框架由两个阶段组成；第一阶段涉及构建名为 EEGNet 的高效模型，该模型受到最先进的高效架构的启发，并采用包含深度可分离卷积层的反转残差块。效价和唤醒标签上的 EEGNet 模型分别仅用 6.4k、14k 和 25k 参数实现了 90%、96.6% 和 99.5% 的平均分类精度。在准确性和存储成本方面，这些模型比之前最先进的结果高出 9%。在第二阶段，我们对这些模型进行二值化，以进一步压缩它们并轻松地将它们部署在边缘设备上。二元神经网络 (BNN) 通常会降低模型的准确性。我们通过引入三种新颖的方法改进了本文中的 EEGNet 二值化模型，并在基线二值模型的基础上实现了 20% 的改进。所提出的二值化 EEGNet 模型的准确度分别为 81%、95% 和 99%，存储成本分别为 0.11Mbits、0.28Mbits 和 0.46Mbits。这些模型有助于在边缘环境上部署精确的人类情感识别系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的两阶段3D卷积神经网络框架EEGNet，用于基于脑电图（EEG）的情绪识别，兼顾模型精度与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有情绪识别模型在精度与计算效率之间难以平衡，难以部署于边缘设备。需设计轻量化且高精度的模型以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 分两阶段构建模型：第一阶段设计EEGNet，采用倒置残差块与深度可分离卷积降低参数量；第二阶段通过二值化压缩模型，并引入三种优化方法缓解精度下降问题。
AI.result: EEGNet在参数量6.4k/14k/25k时分别达到90%/96.6%/99.5%分类精度，二值化后存储成本降至0.11Mbit-0.46Mbit，精度仍保持81%-99%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保证高精度的同时显著降低计算与存储开销，为边缘设备部署精准情绪识别系统提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Małgorzata B. Starzyńska,Robin Roussel,Sam Jacoby,Ali Asadipour
title: Computer vision-based analysis of buildings and built environments: A systematic review of current approaches
title_zh: 基于计算机视觉的建筑物和建筑环境分析：对当前方法的系统回顾
abstract: Analysing 88 sources published from 2011 to 2021, this paper presents a first systematic review of the computer vision-based analysis of buildings and the built environments to assess its value to architectural and urban design studies. Following a multi-stage selection process, the types of algorithms and data sources used are discussed in respect to architectural applications such as a building classification, detail classification, qualitative environmental analysis, building condition survey, and building value estimation. This reveals current research gaps and trends, and highlights two main categories of research aims. First, to use or optimise computer vision methods for architectural image data, which can then help automate time-consuming, labour-intensive, or complex tasks of visual analysis. Second, to explore the methodological benefits of machine learning approaches to investigate new questions about the built environment by finding patterns and relationships between visual, statistical, and qualitative data, which can overcome limitations of conventional manual analysis. The growing body of research offers new methods to architectural and design studies, with the paper identifying future challenges and directions of research.
summary: Analysing 88 sources published from 2011 to 2021, this paper presents a first systematic review of the computer vision-based analysis of buildings and the built environments to assess its value to architectural and urban design studies. Following a multi-stage selection process, the types of algorithms and data sources used are discussed in respect to architectural applications such as a building classification, detail classification, qualitative environmental analysis, building condition survey, and building value estimation. This reveals current research gaps and trends, and highlights two main categories of research aims. First, to use or optimise computer vision methods for architectural image data, which can then help automate time-consuming, labour-intensive, or complex tasks of visual analysis. Second, to explore the methodological benefits of machine learning approaches to investigate new questions about the built environment by finding patterns and relationships between visual, statistical, and qualitative data, which can overcome limitations of conventional manual analysis. The growing body of research offers new methods to architectural and design studies, with the paper identifying future challenges and directions of research.
abstract_zh: 本文分析了 2011 年至 2021 年发表的 88 个资料来源，对基于计算机视觉的建筑物和建筑环境分析进行了首次系统回顾，以评估其对建筑和城市设计研究的价值。经过多阶段选择过程，讨论了建筑应用中使用的算法类型和数据源，例如建筑分类、细节分类、定性环境分析、建筑状况调查和建筑价值估算。这揭示了当前的研究差距和趋势，并强调了两大类研究目标。首先，使用或优化建筑图像数据的计算机视觉方法，这可以帮助自动化耗时、劳动密集型或复杂的视觉分析任务。其次，探索机器学习方法的方法学优势，通过寻找视觉、统计和定性数据之间的模式和关系来调查有关建筑环境的新问题，这可以克服传统手动分析的局限性。越来越多的研究为建筑和设计研究提供了新的方法，论文确定了未来的挑战和研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了2011至2021年间计算机视觉在建筑及建成环境分析中的应用，评估其对建筑与城市设计研究的价值。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对计算机视觉方法在建筑分析领域应用的系统梳理，而该技术可能为传统视觉分析任务提供自动化解决方案并拓展研究边界。
AI.method: 通过多阶段筛选流程分析88篇文献，分类讨论算法类型与数据源，归纳两类研究目标并揭示研究趋势与空白。
AI.result: 识别出两类核心研究方向：优化视觉分析自动化流程，以及利用机器学习探索建成环境新问题；同时指出方法论局限与未来研究挑战。
AI.conclusion: 计算机视觉为建筑研究提供新方法论，但需解决数据多样性、跨学科协作及算法可解释性等关键问题以推动领域发展。

search_text: Computer vision-based analysis of buildings and built environments: A systematic review of current approaches 基于计算机视觉的建筑物和建筑环境分析：对当前方法的系统回顾 Analysing 88 sources published from 2011 to 2021, this paper presents a first systematic review of the computer vision-based analysis of buildings and the built environments to assess its value to architectural and urban design studies. Following a multi-stage selection process, the types of algorithms and data sources used are discussed in respect to architectural applications such as a building classification, detail classification, qualitative environmental analysis, building condition survey, and building value estimation. This reveals current research gaps and trends, and highlights two main categories of research aims. First, to use or optimise computer vision methods for architectural image data, which can then help automate time-consuming, labour-intensive, or complex tasks of visual analysis. Second, to explore the methodological benefits of machine learning approaches to investigate new questions about the built environment by finding patterns and relationships between visual, statistical, and qualitative data, which can overcome limitations of conventional manual analysis. The growing body of research offers new methods to architectural and design studies, with the paper identifying future challenges and directions of research. 本文分析了 2011 年至 2021 年发表的 88 个资料来源，对基于计算机视觉的建筑物和建筑环境分析进行了首次系统回顾，以评估其对建筑和城市设计研究的价值。经过多阶段选择过程，讨论了建筑应用中使用的算法类型和数据源，例如建筑分类、细节分类、定性环境分析、建筑状况调查和建筑价值估算。这揭示了当前的研究差距和趋势，并强调了两大类研究目标。首先，使用或优化建筑图像数据的计算机视觉方法，这可以帮助自动化耗时、劳动密集型或复杂的视觉分析任务。其次，探索机器学习方法的方法学优势，通过寻找视觉、统计和定性数据之间的模式和关系来调查有关建筑环境的新问题，这可以克服传统手动分析的局限性。越来越多的研究为建筑和设计研究提供了新的方法，论文确定了未来的挑战和研究方向。 本文系统综述了2011至2021年间计算机视觉在建筑及建成环境分析中的应用，评估其对建筑与城市设计研究的价值。 Małgorzata B. Starzyńska,Robin Roussel,Sam Jacoby,Ali Asadipour cs.CV

authors_text: Haoning Kan,Jiale Yu,Jiajin Huang,Zihe Liu,Haiyan Zhou
title: Self-supervised Group Meiosis Contrastive Learning for EEG-Based Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 基于脑电图的情绪识别的自监督群体减数分裂对比学习
abstract: The progress of EEG-based emotion recognition has received widespread attention from the fields of human-machine interactions and cognitive science in recent years. However, how to recognize emotions with limited labels has become a new research and application bottleneck. To address the issue, this paper proposes a Self-supervised Group Meiosis Contrastive learning framework (SGMC) based on the stimuli consistent EEG signals in human being. In the SGMC, a novel genetics-inspired data augmentation method, named Meiosis, is developed. It takes advantage of the alignment of stimuli among the EEG samples in a group for generating augmented groups by pairing, cross exchanging, and separating. And the model adopts a group projector to extract group-level feature representations from group EEG samples triggered by the same emotion video stimuli. Then contrastive learning is employed to maximize the similarity of group-level representations of augmented groups with the same stimuli. The SGMC achieves the state-of-the-art emotion recognition results on the publicly available DEAP dataset with an accuracy of 94.72% and 95.68% in valence and arousal dimensions, and also reaches competitive performance on the public SEED dataset with an accuracy of 94.04%. It is worthy of noting that the SGMC shows significant performance even when using limited labels. Moreover, the results of feature visualization suggest that the model might have learned video-level emotion-related feature representations to improve emotion recognition. And the effects of group size are further evaluated in the hyper parametric analysis. Finally, a control experiment and ablation study are carried out to examine the rationality of architecture. The code is provided publicly online.
summary: The progress of EEG-based emotion recognition has received widespread attention from the fields of human-machine interactions and cognitive science in recent years. However, how to recognize emotions with limited labels has become a new research and application bottleneck. To address the issue, this paper proposes a Self-supervised Group Meiosis Contrastive learning framework (SGMC) based on the stimuli consistent EEG signals in human being. In the SGMC, a novel genetics-inspired data augmentation method, named Meiosis, is developed. It takes advantage of the alignment of stimuli among the EEG samples in a group for generating augmented groups by pairing, cross exchanging, and separating. And the model adopts a group projector to extract group-level feature representations from group EEG samples triggered by the same emotion video stimuli. Then contrastive learning is employed to maximize the similarity of group-level representations of augmented groups with the same stimuli. The SGMC achieves the state-of-the-art emotion recognition results on the publicly available DEAP dataset with an accuracy of 94.72% and 95.68% in valence and arousal dimensions, and also reaches competitive performance on the public SEED dataset with an accuracy of 94.04%. It is worthy of noting that the SGMC shows significant performance even when using limited labels. Moreover, the results of feature visualization suggest that the model might have learned video-level emotion-related feature representations to improve emotion recognition. And the effects of group size are further evaluated in the hyper parametric analysis. Finally, a control experiment and ablation study are carried out to examine the rationality of architecture. The code is provided publicly online.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于脑电图的情感识别的进展受到人机交互和认知科学领域的广泛关注。然而，如何在有限的标签下识别情感已成为新的研究和应用瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于人类脑电信号刺激一致的自监督群体减数分裂对比学习框架（SGMC）。 SGMC 开发了一种新的受遗传学启发的数据增强方法，称为减数分裂。它利用组中脑电图样本之间的刺激对齐，通过配对、交叉交换和分离来生成增强组。该模型采用群体投影仪从相同情感视频刺激触发的群体脑电图样本中提取群体级特征表示。然后采用对比学习来最大化具有相同刺激的增强组的组级表示的相似性。 SGMC 在公开的 DEAP 数据集上实现了最先进的情感识别结果，在效价和唤醒维度上的准确率分别为 94.72% 和 95.68%，并且在公开 SEED 数据集上也达到了有竞争力的表现，准确率达到了 94.04%。值得注意的是，即使使用有限的标签，SGMC 也表现出显着的性能。此外，特征可视化的结果表明，该模型可能已经学习了视频级情感相关的特征表示，以提高情感识别。并在超参数分析中进一步评估群体规模的影响。最后通过控制实验和消融研究来检验建筑的合理性。该代码在网上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督群体减数分裂对比学习（SGMC）的框架，用于解决有限标签下的脑电信号（EEG）情绪识别问题。
AI.motivation: 传统EEG情绪识别方法依赖大量标注数据，而实际应用中标签获取困难，如何在有限标签下提升识别性能成为关键挑战。
AI.method: 开发了受遗传学启发的数据增强方法Meiosis，通过组内样本配对、交叉交换和分离生成增强组；利用群体投影器提取群体级特征表示，并通过对比学习最大化相同刺激下增强组的相似性。
AI.result: 在DEAP数据集上，SGMC在效价和唤醒维度分别达到94.72%和95.68%的准确率，在SEED数据集上达到94.04%；即使使用有限标签仍表现优异，且特征可视化显示模型可能学习到视频级情绪相关特征。
AI.conclusion: SGMC框架有效解决了有限标签下的EEG情绪识别问题，其群体级特征学习和对比机制具有潜力，未来可进一步优化群体规模参数并拓展至其他模态数据。

authors_text: Tze Ho Elden Tse,Zhongqun Zhang,Kwang In Kim,Ales Leonardis,Feng Zheng,Hyung Jin Chang
title: S$^2$Contact: Graph-based Network for 3D Hand-Object Contact Estimation with Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: S$^2$Contact：基于图的网络，通过半监督学习进行 3D 手-物体接触估计
abstract: Despite the recent efforts in accurate 3D annotations in hand and object datasets, there still exist gaps in 3D hand and object reconstructions. Existing works leverage contact maps to refine inaccurate hand-object pose estimations and generate grasps given object models. However, they require explicit 3D supervision which is seldom available and therefore, are limited to constrained settings, e.g., where thermal cameras observe residual heat left on manipulated objects. In this paper, we propose a novel semi-supervised framework that allows us to learn contact from monocular images. Specifically, we leverage visual and geometric consistency constraints in large-scale datasets for generating pseudo-labels in semi-supervised learning and propose an efficient graph-based network to infer contact. Our semi-supervised learning framework achieves a favourable improvement over the existing supervised learning methods trained on data with `limited' annotations. Notably, our proposed model is able to achieve superior results with less than half the network parameters and memory access cost when compared with the commonly-used PointNet-based approach. We show benefits from using a contact map that rules hand-object interactions to produce more accurate reconstructions. We further demonstrate that training with pseudo-labels can extend contact map estimations to out-of-domain objects and generalise better across multiple datasets.
summary: Despite the recent efforts in accurate 3D annotations in hand and object datasets, there still exist gaps in 3D hand and object reconstructions. Existing works leverage contact maps to refine inaccurate hand-object pose estimations and generate grasps given object models. However, they require explicit 3D supervision which is seldom available and therefore, are limited to constrained settings, e.g., where thermal cameras observe residual heat left on manipulated objects. In this paper, we propose a novel semi-supervised framework that allows us to learn contact from monocular images. Specifically, we leverage visual and geometric consistency constraints in large-scale datasets for generating pseudo-labels in semi-supervised learning and propose an efficient graph-based network to infer contact. Our semi-supervised learning framework achieves a favourable improvement over the existing supervised learning methods trained on data with `limited' annotations. Notably, our proposed model is able to achieve superior results with less than half the network parameters and memory access cost when compared with the commonly-used PointNet-based approach. We show benefits from using a contact map that rules hand-object interactions to produce more accurate reconstructions. We further demonstrate that training with pseudo-labels can extend contact map estimations to out-of-domain objects and generalise better across multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在手部和物体数据集的准确 3D 注释方面做出了努力，但 3D 手部和物体重建方面仍然存在差距。现有的工作利用接触图来细化不准确的手部物体姿势估计并生成给定物体模型的抓握。然而，它们需要明确的 3D 监控，而这种监控很少可用，因此仅限于有限的设置，例如热像仪观察被操纵物体上留下的余热。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的半监督框架，使我们能够从单目图像中学习接触。具体来说，我们利用大规模数据集中的视觉和几何一致性约束来在半监督学习中生成伪标签，并提出一种高效的基于图的网络来推断接触。我们的半监督学习框架比现有的基于“有限”注释的数据训练的监督学习方法取得了有利的改进。值得注意的是，与常用的基于 PointNet 的方法相比，我们提出的模型能够以不到一半的网络参数和内存访问成本实现优异的结果。我们展示了使用规则手部对象交互的接触图来产生更准确的重建的好处。我们进一步证明，使用伪标签进行训练可以将接触图估计扩展到域外对象，并在多个数据集上更好地泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图网络的半监督学习框架，用于从单目图像中估计3D手-物体接触，无需显式3D标注。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖稀缺的3D标注数据，限制了应用场景。本文旨在通过半监督学习解决标注不足的问题，提升接触估计的准确性和泛化性。
AI.method: 利用大规模数据集的视觉和几何一致性约束生成伪标签，设计高效图网络推断接触关系，减少参数量和内存消耗。
AI.result: 在有限标注数据下优于监督方法，参数量和内存成本仅为PointNet-based方法的一半，且能推广至跨数据集的未见过物体。
AI.conclusion: 半监督框架结合接触图约束可显著提升重建精度，伪标签训练有效扩展了模型在不同场景下的适用性。

search_text: S$^2$Contact: Graph-based Network for 3D Hand-Object Contact Estimation with Semi-Supervised Learning S$^2$Contact：基于图的网络，通过半监督学习进行 3D 手-物体接触估计 Despite the recent efforts in accurate 3D annotations in hand and object datasets, there still exist gaps in 3D hand and object reconstructions. Existing works leverage contact maps to refine inaccurate hand-object pose estimations and generate grasps given object models. However, they require explicit 3D supervision which is seldom available and therefore, are limited to constrained settings, e.g., where thermal cameras observe residual heat left on manipulated objects. In this paper, we propose a novel semi-supervised framework that allows us to learn contact from monocular images. Specifically, we leverage visual and geometric consistency constraints in large-scale datasets for generating pseudo-labels in semi-supervised learning and propose an efficient graph-based network to infer contact. Our semi-supervised learning framework achieves a favourable improvement over the existing supervised learning methods trained on data with `limited' annotations. Notably, our proposed model is able to achieve superior results with less than half the network parameters and memory access cost when compared with the commonly-used PointNet-based approach. We show benefits from using a contact map that rules hand-object interactions to produce more accurate reconstructions. We further demonstrate that training with pseudo-labels can extend contact map estimations to out-of-domain objects and generalise better across multiple datasets. 尽管最近在手部和物体数据集的准确 3D 注释方面做出了努力，但 3D 手部和物体重建方面仍然存在差距。现有的工作利用接触图来细化不准确的手部物体姿势估计并生成给定物体模型的抓握。然而，它们需要明确的 3D 监控，而这种监控很少可用，因此仅限于有限的设置，例如热像仪观察被操纵物体上留下的余热。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的半监督框架，使我们能够从单目图像中学习接触。具体来说，我们利用大规模数据集中的视觉和几何一致性约束来在半监督学习中生成伪标签，并提出一种高效的基于图的网络来推断接触。我们的半监督学习框架比现有的基于“有限”注释的数据训练的监督学习方法取得了有利的改进。值得注意的是，与常用的基于 PointNet 的方法相比，我们提出的模型能够以不到一半的网络参数和内存访问成本实现优异的结果。我们展示了使用规则手部对象交互的接触图来产生更准确的重建的好处。我们进一步证明，使用伪标签进行训练可以将接触图估计扩展到域外对象，并在多个数据集上更好地泛化。 本文提出了一种基于图网络的半监督学习框架，用于从单目图像中估计3D手-物体接触，无需显式3D标注。 Tze Ho Elden Tse,Zhongqun Zhang,Kwang In Kim,Ales Leonardis,Feng Zheng,Hyung Jin Chang cs.CV

authors_text: Florian Lehmann,Niklas Markert,Hai Dang,Daniel Buschek
title: Suggestion Lists vs. Continuous Generation: Interaction Design for Writing with Generative Models on Mobile Devices Affect Text Length, Wording and Perceived Authorship
title_zh: 建议列表与连续生成：在移动设备上使用生成模型进行写作的交互设计会影响文本长度、措辞和感知作者身份
comment: Pre-Print, to appear in MuC '22: Mensch und Computer 2022
comments: Pre-Print, to appear in MuC '22: Mensch und Computer 2022
abstract: Neural language models have the potential to support human writing. However, questions remain on their integration and influence on writing and output. To address this, we designed and compared two user interfaces for writing with AI on mobile devices, which manipulate levels of initiative and control: 1) Writing with continuously generated text, the AI adds text word-by-word and user steers. 2) Writing with suggestions, the AI suggests phrases and user selects from a list. In a supervised online study (N=18), participants used these prototypes and a baseline without AI. We collected touch interactions, ratings on inspiration and authorship, and interview data. With AI suggestions, people wrote less actively, yet felt they were the author. Continuously generated text reduced this perceived authorship, yet increased editing behavior. In both designs, AI increased text length and was perceived to influence wording. Our findings add new empirical evidence on the impact of UI design decisions on user experience and output with co-creative systems.
summary: Neural language models have the potential to support human writing. However, questions remain on their integration and influence on writing and output. To address this, we designed and compared two user interfaces for writing with AI on mobile devices, which manipulate levels of initiative and control: 1) Writing with continuously generated text, the AI adds text word-by-word and user steers. 2) Writing with suggestions, the AI suggests phrases and user selects from a list. In a supervised online study (N=18), participants used these prototypes and a baseline without AI. We collected touch interactions, ratings on inspiration and authorship, and interview data. With AI suggestions, people wrote less actively, yet felt they were the author. Continuously generated text reduced this perceived authorship, yet increased editing behavior. In both designs, AI increased text length and was perceived to influence wording. Our findings add new empirical evidence on the impact of UI design decisions on user experience and output with co-creative systems.
abstract_zh: 神经语言模型有潜力支持人类写作。然而，它们的整合以及对写作和输出的影响仍然存在问题。为了解决这个问题，我们设计并比较了在移动设备上使用人工智能进行书写的两个用户界面，这两种界面可以控制主动性和控制的水平：1）使用连续生成的文本进行书写，人工智能逐字添加文本并由用户引导。 2) 在编写建议时，人工智能会建议短语，用户从列表中进行选择。在一项有监督的在线研究（N=18）中，参与者使用了这些原型和没有人工智能的基线。我们收集了触摸互动、灵感和作者评级以及访谈数据。有了人工智能建议，人们写作的积极性降低了，但仍感觉自己是作者。持续生成的文本减少了这种感知作者身份，但增加了编辑行为。在这两种设计中，人工智能都增加了文本长度，并被认为会影响措辞。我们的研究结果为 UI 设计决策对用户体验和共同创意系统输出的影响提供了新的经验证据。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种移动设备上AI写作辅助界面设计对用户写作行为和感知的影响。
AI.motivation: 神经语言模型在写作辅助中的应用潜力尚未明确，需探索不同交互设计对用户创作过程和结果的影响。
AI.method: 设计两种AI写作界面（连续生成文本与建议列表），通过18人参与的在线实验收集交互数据、创作量及用户反馈。
AI.result: 建议列表减少用户主动写作但增强作者归属感，连续生成增加编辑行为但削弱作者感，AI均提升文本长度并影响用词。
AI.conclusion: 界面设计显著影响协同创作系统的用户体验与输出质量，为AI写作工具设计提供实证依据。

authors_text: Kenneth U. Oyibo,Jean D. Louis,Juan E. Gilbert
title: iOCR: Informed Optical Character Recognition for Election Ballot Tallies
title_zh: iOCR：选举选票计数的知情光学字符识别
abstract: The purpose of this study is to explore the performance of Informed OCR or iOCR. iOCR was developed with a spell correction algorithm to fix errors introduced by conventional OCR for vote tabulation. The results found that the iOCR system outperforms conventional OCR techniques.
summary: The purpose of this study is to explore the performance of Informed OCR or iOCR. iOCR was developed with a spell correction algorithm to fix errors introduced by conventional OCR for vote tabulation. The results found that the iOCR system outperforms conventional OCR techniques.
abstract_zh: 本研究的目的是探讨 Informed OCR 或 iOCR 的性能。 iOCR 是通过拼写校正算法开发的，用于修复传统 OCR 在投票列表中引入的错误。结果发现 iOCR 系统优于传统 OCR 技术。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种结合拼写校正算法的知情光学字符识别（iOCR）系统，旨在提高选举选票统计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统OCR技术在选票识别中存在误差，可能影响选举结果的准确性，因此需要改进方法以提高可靠性。
AI.method: 通过在常规OCR基础上集成拼写校正算法，开发iOCR系统以修正字符识别错误。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，iOCR系统在选票统计任务中的表现优于传统OCR技术。
AI.conclusion: iOCR通过拼写校正显著提升了选票识别的准确性，为选举计票提供了更可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Panagiotis Eustratiadis,Henry Gouk,Da Li,Timothy Hospedales
title: Attacking Adversarial Defences by Smoothing the Loss Landscape
title_zh: 通过平滑损失情况来攻击对抗性防御
abstract: This paper investigates a family of methods for defending against adversarial attacks that owe part of their success to creating a noisy, discontinuous, or otherwise rugged loss landscape that adversaries find difficult to navigate. A common, but not universal, way to achieve this effect is via the use of stochastic neural networks. We show that this is a form of gradient obfuscation, and propose a general extension to gradient-based adversaries based on the Weierstrass transform, which smooths the surface of the loss function and provides more reliable gradient estimates. We further show that the same principle can strengthen gradient-free adversaries. We demonstrate the efficacy of our loss-smoothing method against both stochastic and non-stochastic adversarial defences that exhibit robustness due to this type of obfuscation. Furthermore, we provide analysis of how it interacts with Expectation over Transformation; a popular gradient-sampling method currently used to attack stochastic defences.
summary: This paper investigates a family of methods for defending against adversarial attacks that owe part of their success to creating a noisy, discontinuous, or otherwise rugged loss landscape that adversaries find difficult to navigate. A common, but not universal, way to achieve this effect is via the use of stochastic neural networks. We show that this is a form of gradient obfuscation, and propose a general extension to gradient-based adversaries based on the Weierstrass transform, which smooths the surface of the loss function and provides more reliable gradient estimates. We further show that the same principle can strengthen gradient-free adversaries. We demonstrate the efficacy of our loss-smoothing method against both stochastic and non-stochastic adversarial defences that exhibit robustness due to this type of obfuscation. Furthermore, we provide analysis of how it interacts with Expectation over Transformation; a popular gradient-sampling method currently used to attack stochastic defences.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一系列防御对抗性攻击的方法，这些方法的成功部分归功于创造了一个嘈杂的、不连续的或其他崎岖的损失环境，让对手难以驾驭。实现这种效果的一种常见但不通用的方法是使用随机神经网络。我们证明这是梯度混淆的一种形式，并提出了基于 Weierstrass 变换的基于梯度的对手的一般扩展，它平滑了损失函数的表面并提供了更可靠的梯度估计。我们进一步表明，同样的原理可以增强无梯度对手。我们证明了我们的损失平滑方法对随机和非随机对抗性防御的有效性，这些防御由于这种类型的混淆而表现出鲁棒性。此外，我们还分析了它如何与期望高于转型相互作用；目前用于攻击随机防御的流行梯度采样方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过平滑损失景观来攻击对抗性防御方法，以克服随机神经网络等防御手段造成的梯度混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的对抗性防御方法通过制造噪声或不连续的损失景观阻碍攻击者，但此类防御存在梯度混淆问题，攻击者难以有效导航。
AI.method: 基于Weierstrass变换对损失函数进行平滑处理，提供更可靠的梯度估计，并扩展至无梯度攻击方法。
AI.result: 该方法有效攻击了依赖景观粗糙化的随机和非随机防御，并分析了其与Expectation over Transformation方法的交互机制。
AI.conclusion: 损失景观平滑技术能有效突破基于梯度混淆的防御，为对抗性攻击提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Florian Weigand,Andreas Höhl,Julian Zeiss,Ulrich Konigorski,Martin Grimmer
title: Continuous locomotion mode recognition and gait phase estimation based on a shank-mounted IMU with artificial neural networks
title_zh: 基于带有人工神经网络的小腿安装 IMU 的连续运动模式识别和步态相位估计
comment: Copyright 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. comments: Copyright 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: To improve the control of wearable robotics for gait assistance, we present an approach for continuous locomotion mode recognition as well as gait phase and stair slope estimation based on artificial neural networks that include time history information. The input features consist exclusively of processed variables that can be measured with a single shank-mounted inertial measurement unit. We introduce a wearable device to acquire real-world environment test data to demonstrate the performance and the robustness of the approach. Mean absolute error (gait phase, stair slope) and accuracy (locomotion mode) were determined for steady level walking and steady stair ambulation. Robustness was assessed using test data from different sensor hardware, sensor fixations, ambulation environments and subjects. The mean absolute error from the steady gait test data for the gait phase was 2.0-3.5 % for gait phase estimation and 3.3-3.8° for stair slope estimation. The accuracy of classifying the correct locomotion mode on the test data with the utilization of time history information was in between 98.51 % and 99.67 %. Results show high performance and robustness for continuously predicting gait phase, stair slope and locomotion mode during steady gait. As hypothesized, time history information improves the locomotion mode recognition. However, while the gait phase estimation performed well for untrained transitions between locomotion modes, our qualitative analysis revealed that it may be beneficial to include transition data into the training of the neural network to improve the prediction of the slope and the locomotion mode. Our results suggest that artificial neural networks could be used for high level control of wearable lower limb robotics.

abstract_zh: 为了改善可穿戴机器人的步态辅助控制，我们提出了一种基于包含时间历史信息的人工神经网络的连续运动模式识别以及步态阶段和楼梯坡度估计的方法。输入特征仅包含可使用单个安装在柄上的惯性测量单元进行测量的处理变量。我们引入了一种可穿戴设备来获取真实环境测试数据，以证明该方法的性能和鲁棒性。确定稳定水平行走和稳定楼梯行走的平均绝对误差（步态阶段、楼梯坡度）和准确性（运动模式）。使用来自不同传感器硬件、传感器固定、移动环境和受试者的测试数据来评估鲁棒性。步态相位估计的稳定步态测试数据的平均绝对误差为 2.0-3.5%，楼梯坡度估计的平均绝对误差为 3.3-3.8°。利用时程信息对测试数据分类正确运动模式的准确度在98.51%~99.67%之间。结果表明，在稳定步态期间连续预测步态阶段、楼梯坡度和运动模式具有高性能和鲁棒性。正如假设的那样，时间历史信息改善了运动模式识别。然而，虽然步态相位估计对于运动模式之间未经训练的转换表现良好，但我们的定性分析表明，将转换数据纳入神经网络的训练中可能有利于改善坡度和运动模式的预测。我们的结果表明人工神经网络可用于可穿戴下肢机器人的高级控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于单个胫骨佩戴的惯性测量单元（IMU）和人工神经网络的连续步态模式识别及步态阶段估计方法，以提升外骨骼机器人步态辅助控制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有外骨骼机器人步态控制需更精确的步态模式识别与步态阶段估计，传统方法依赖多传感器或复杂算法，而单IMU方案可提高便携性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用包含时间历史信息的人工神经网络，输入特征仅来自单个胫骨IMU的处理数据；通过可穿戴设备采集真实环境测试数据，评估不同硬件、固定方式、环境及受试者的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 步态阶段估计的平均绝对误差为2.0-3.5%，楼梯坡度估计误差为3.3-3.8°，步态模式分类准确率达98.51%-99.67%；未训练模式切换数据时估计性能下降，需补充过渡数据优化模型。
AI.conclusion: 人工神经网络可有效实现连续步态参数预测，但需纳入步态模式切换数据以提升楼梯坡度与模式识别精度，为外骨骼机器人高层控制提供可行方案。

Our results suggest that artificial neural networks could be used for high level control of wearable lower limb robotics. 为了改善可穿戴机器人的步态辅助控制，我们提出了一种基于包含时间历史信息的人工神经网络的连续运动模式识别以及步态阶段和楼梯坡度估计的方法。输入特征仅包含可使用单个安装在柄上的惯性测量单元进行测量的处理变量。我们引入了一种可穿戴设备来获取真实环境测试数据，以证明该方法的性能和鲁棒性。确定稳定水平行走和稳定楼梯行走的平均绝对误差（步态阶段、楼梯坡度）和准确性（运动模式）。使用来自不同传感器硬件、传感器固定、移动环境和受试者的测试数据来评估鲁棒性。步态相位估计的稳定步态测试数据的平均绝对误差为 2.0-3.5%，楼梯坡度估计的平均绝对误差为 3.3-3.8°。利用时程信息对测试数据分类正确运动模式的准确度在98.51%~99.67%之间。结果表明，在稳定步态期间连续预测步态阶段、楼梯坡度和运动模式具有高性能和鲁棒性。正如假设的那样，时间历史信息改善了运动模式识别。然而，虽然步态相位估计对于运动模式之间未经训练的转换表现良好，但我们的定性分析表明，将转换数据纳入神经网络的训练中可能有利于改善坡度和运动模式的预测。我们的结果表明人工神经网络可用于可穿戴下肢机器人的高级控制。 本文提出基于单个胫骨佩戴的惯性测量单元（IMU）和人工神经网络的连续步态模式识别及步态阶段估计方法，以提升外骨骼机器人步态辅助控制性能。 Florian Weigand,Andreas Höhl,Julian Zeiss,Ulrich Konigorski,Martin Grimmer cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Jinfeng Liu,Lingtong Kong,Jie Yang
title: ATCA: an Arc Trajectory Based Model with Curvature Attention for Video Frame Interpolation
title_zh: ATCA：一种基于圆弧轨迹的视频帧插值曲率注意力模型
abstract: Video frame interpolation is a classic and challenging low-level computer vision task. Recently, deep learning based methods have achieved impressive results, and it has been proven that optical flow based methods can synthesize frames with higher quality. However, most flow-based methods assume a line trajectory with a constant velocity between two input frames. Only a little work enforces predictions with curvilinear trajectory, but this requires more than two frames as input to estimate the acceleration, which takes more time and memory to execute. To address this problem, we propose an arc trajectory based model (ATCA), which learns motion prior from only two consecutive frames and also is lightweight. Experiments show that our approach performs better than many SOTA methods with fewer parameters and faster inference speed.
summary: Video frame interpolation is a classic and challenging low-level computer vision task. Recently, deep learning based methods have achieved impressive results, and it has been proven that optical flow based methods can synthesize frames with higher quality. However, most flow-based methods assume a line trajectory with a constant velocity between two input frames. Only a little work enforces predictions with curvilinear trajectory, but this requires more than two frames as input to estimate the acceleration, which takes more time and memory to execute. To address this problem, we propose an arc trajectory based model (ATCA), which learns motion prior from only two consecutive frames and also is lightweight. Experiments show that our approach performs better than many SOTA methods with fewer parameters and faster inference speed.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值是一项经典且具有挑战性的低级计算机视觉任务。最近，基于深度学习的方法取得了令人印象深刻的成果，并且已经证明基于光流的方法可以合成更高质量的帧。然而，大多数基于流的方法假设两个输入帧之间的线轨迹具有恒定速度。只有很少的工作可以强制使用曲线轨迹进行预测，但这需要两个以上的帧作为输入来估计加速度，这需要更多的时间和内存来执行。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于弧形轨迹的模型（ATCA），它仅从两个连续帧中学习先验运动，而且是轻量级的。实验表明，我们的方法比许多 SOTA 方法表现更好，参数更少，推理速度更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATCA模型，通过弧轨迹与曲率注意力机制解决视频帧插值中传统光流法轨迹假设不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有光流法假设帧间运动为直线恒速轨迹，难以处理曲线运动；虽有曲率轨迹研究，但需多帧输入导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计基于弧轨迹的ATCA模型，仅利用两帧学习运动先验，结合曲率注意力机制捕捉非线性运动特征。
AI.result: 实验表明ATCA在参数量更少的情况下，较多种SOTA方法取得更优插值质量与更快推理速度。
AI.conclusion: ATCA通过轻量化设计有效解决了曲线运动建模难题，在保持高效性的同时提升了视频帧插值性能。

authors_text: Xiaohan Xu,Peng Zhang,Yongquan He,Chengpeng Chao,Chaoyang Yan
title: Subgraph Neighboring Relations Infomax for Inductive Link Prediction on Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 用于知识图上归纳链接预测的子图邻近关系 Infomax
abstract: Inductive link prediction for knowledge graph aims at predicting missing links between unseen entities, those not shown in training stage. Most previous works learn entity-specific embeddings of entities, which cannot handle unseen entities. Recent several methods utilize enclosing subgraph to obtain inductive ability. However, all these works only consider the enclosing part of subgraph without complete neighboring relations, which leads to the issue that partial neighboring relations are neglected, and sparse subgraphs are hard to be handled. To address that, we propose Subgraph Neighboring Relations Infomax, SNRI, which sufficiently exploits complete neighboring relations from two aspects: neighboring relational feature for node feature and neighboring relational path for sparse subgraph. To further model neighboring relations in a global way, we innovatively apply mutual information (MI) maximization for knowledge graph. Experiments show that SNRI outperforms existing state-of-art methods by a large margin on inductive link prediction task, and verify the effectiveness of exploring complete neighboring relations in a global way to characterize node features and reason on sparse subgraphs.
summary: Inductive link prediction for knowledge graph aims at predicting missing links between unseen entities, those not shown in training stage. Most previous works learn entity-specific embeddings of entities, which cannot handle unseen entities. Recent several methods utilize enclosing subgraph to obtain inductive ability. However, all these works only consider the enclosing part of subgraph without complete neighboring relations, which leads to the issue that partial neighboring relations are neglected, and sparse subgraphs are hard to be handled. To address that, we propose Subgraph Neighboring Relations Infomax, SNRI, which sufficiently exploits complete neighboring relations from two aspects: neighboring relational feature for node feature and neighboring relational path for sparse subgraph. To further model neighboring relations in a global way, we innovatively apply mutual information (MI) maximization for knowledge graph. Experiments show that SNRI outperforms existing state-of-art methods by a large margin on inductive link prediction task, and verify the effectiveness of exploring complete neighboring relations in a global way to characterize node features and reason on sparse subgraphs.
abstract_zh: 知识图的归纳链接预测旨在预测未见过的实体（在训练阶段未显示的实体）之间丢失的链接。以前的大多数作品都学习实体的特定于实体的嵌入，这无法处理看不见的实体。最近的几种方法利用封闭子图来获得归纳能力。然而，所有这些工作都只考虑了子图的包围部分，没有完整的相邻关系，这导致了部分相邻关系被忽略，稀疏子图难以处理的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了子图邻接关系Infomax，SNRI，它从两个方面充分利用完整的邻接关系：节点特征的邻接关系特征和稀疏子图的邻接关系路径。为了进一步以全局方式建模邻近关系，我们创新地将互信息（MI）最大化应用于知识图谱。实验表明，SNRI 在归纳链接预测任务上大大优于现有的最先进方法，并验证了以全局方式探索完整相邻关系来表征稀疏子图上的节点特征和推理的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SNRI的方法，旨在通过充分利用知识图谱中完整的邻接关系，解决归纳链接预测中未见实体的缺失链接预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理知识图谱中未见实体时，依赖实体嵌入或局部子图信息，但忽视了完整的邻接关系，导致稀疏子图处理效果差且归纳能力不足。
AI.method: SNRI从两个方面利用完整邻接关系：通过邻接关系特征增强节点表示，通过邻接关系路径处理稀疏子图，并引入互信息最大化框架全局建模邻接关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，SNRI在多个归纳链接预测任务中显著优于现有先进方法，验证了全局建模完整邻接关系的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过全局挖掘完整邻接关系的特征与路径信息，SNRI有效提升了知识图谱中稀疏子图的归纳链接预测性能。
