authors_text: Yuanyuan Liu,Wei Dai,Chuanxu Feng,Wenbin Wang,Guanghao Yin,Jiabei Zeng,Shiguang Shan
title: MAFW: A Large-scale, Multi-modal, Compound Affective Database for Dynamic Facial Expression Recognition in the Wild
title_zh: MAFW：用于野外动态面部表情识别的大规模、多模态、复合情感数据库
comment: This paper has been accepted by ACM MM'22
comments: This paper has been accepted by ACM MM'22
abstract: Dynamic facial expression recognition (FER) databases provide important data support for affective computing and applications. However, most FER databases are annotated with several basic mutually exclusive emotional categories and contain only one modality, e.g., videos. The monotonous labels and modality cannot accurately imitate human emotions and fulfill applications in the real world. In this paper, we propose MAFW, a large-scale multi-modal compound affective database with 10,045 video-audio clips in the wild. Each clip is annotated with a compound emotional category and a couple of sentences that describe the subjects' affective behaviors in the clip. For the compound emotion annotation, each clip is categorized into one or more of the 11 widely-used emotions, i.e., anger, disgust, fear, happiness, neutral, sadness, surprise, contempt, anxiety, helplessness, and disappointment. To ensure high quality of the labels, we filter out the unreliable annotations by an Expectation Maximization (EM) algorithm, and then obtain 11 single-label emotion categories and 32 multi-label emotion categories. To the best of our knowledge, MAFW is the first in-the-wild multi-modal database annotated with compound emotion annotations and emotion-related captions. Additionally, we also propose a novel Transformer-based expression snippet feature learning method to recognize the compound emotions leveraging the expression-change relations among different emotions and modalities. Extensive experiments on MAFW database show the advantages of the proposed method over other state-of-the-art methods for both uni- and multi-modal FER. Our MAFW database is publicly available from https://mafw-database.github.io/MAFW.
summary: Dynamic facial expression recognition (FER) databases provide important data support for affective computing and applications. However, most FER databases are annotated with several basic mutually exclusive emotional categories and contain only one modality, e.g., videos. The monotonous labels and modality cannot accurately imitate human emotions and fulfill applications in the real world. In this paper, we propose MAFW, a large-scale multi-modal compound affective database with 10,045 video-audio clips in the wild. Each clip is annotated with a compound emotional category and a couple of sentences that describe the subjects' affective behaviors in the clip. For the compound emotion annotation, each clip is categorized into one or more of the 11 widely-used emotions, i.e., anger, disgust, fear, happiness, neutral, sadness, surprise, contempt, anxiety, helplessness, and disappointment. To ensure high quality of the labels, we filter out the unreliable annotations by an Expectation Maximization (EM) algorithm, and then obtain 11 single-label emotion categories and 32 multi-label emotion categories. To the best of our knowledge, MAFW is the first in-the-wild multi-modal database annotated with compound emotion annotations and emotion-related captions. Additionally, we also propose a novel Transformer-based expression snippet feature learning method to recognize the compound emotions leveraging the expression-change relations among different emotions and modalities. Extensive experiments on MAFW database show the advantages of the proposed method over other state-of-the-art methods for both uni- and multi-modal FER. Our MAFW database is publicly available from https://mafw-database.github.io/MAFW.
abstract_zh: 动态面部表情识别（FER）数据库为情感计算和应用提供重要的数据支持。然而，大多数 FER 数据库都用几种基本的相互排斥的情感类别进行注释，并且只包含一种模式，例如视频。单调的标签和模态无法准确模仿人类情感并实现在现实世界中的应用。在本文中，我们提出了 MAFW，一个包含 10,045 个野外视频音频片段的大型多模态复合情感数据库。每个剪辑都注释有复合情感类别和几个描述剪辑中主体情感行为的句子。对于复合情感注释，每个片段被分类为11种广泛使用的情感中的一种或多种，​​即愤怒、厌恶、恐惧、快乐、中立、悲伤、惊讶、蔑视、焦虑、无助和失望。为了保证标签的高质量，我们通过期望最大化（EM）算法过滤掉不可靠的注释，然后获得11个单标签情感类别和32个多标签情感类别。据我们所知，MAFW 是第一个使用复合情感注释和情感相关标题进行注释的野外多模态数据库。此外，我们还提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的表达片段特征学习方法，利用不同情绪和模态之间的表达变化关系来识别复合情绪。 MAFW 数据库上的大量实验表明，对于单模态 FER 和多模态 FER，所提出的方法相对于其他最先进的方法具有优势。我们的 MAFW 数据库可从 https://mafw-database.github.io/MAFW 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAFW数据库，用于动态面部表情识别，包含多模态数据和复合情感标注。
AI.motivation: 现有动态面部表情识别数据库标签单一且仅含单一模态，无法准确模拟人类复杂情绪及实际应用需求。
AI.method: 构建包含10,045个视频-音频片段的多模态数据库，采用期望最大化算法过滤标注并生成复合情感类别，提出基于Transformer的表情片段特征学习方法。
AI.result: 在MAFW数据库上实验表明，所提方法在单模态和多模态表情识别任务中均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MAFW是首个野外多模态复合情感标注数据库，其方法有效提升了动态表情识别性能。

search_text: MAFW: A Large-scale, Multi-modal, Compound Affective Database for Dynamic Facial Expression Recognition in the Wild MAFW：用于野外动态面部表情识别的大规模、多模态、复合情感数据库 Dynamic facial expression recognition (FER) databases provide important data support for affective computing and applications. However, most FER databases are annotated with several basic mutually exclusive emotional categories and contain only one modality, e.g., videos. The monotonous labels and modality cannot accurately imitate human emotions and fulfill applications in the real world. In this paper, we propose MAFW, a large-scale multi-modal compound affective database with 10,045 video-audio clips in the wild. Each clip is annotated with a compound emotional category and a couple of sentences that describe the subjects' affective behaviors in the clip. For the compound emotion annotation, each clip is categorized into one or more of the 11 widely-used emotions, i.e., anger, disgust, fear, happiness, neutral, sadness, surprise, contempt, anxiety, helplessness, and disappointment. To ensure high quality of the labels, we filter out the unreliable annotations by an Expectation Maximization (EM) algorithm, and then obtain 11 single-label emotion categories and 32 multi-label emotion categories. To the best of our knowledge, MAFW is the first in-the-wild multi-modal database annotated with compound emotion annotations and emotion-related captions. Additionally, we also propose a novel Transformer-based expression snippet feature learning method to recognize the compound emotions leveraging the expression-change relations among different emotions and modalities. Extensive experiments on MAFW database show the advantages of the proposed method over other state-of-the-art methods for both uni- and multi-modal FER. Our MAFW database is publicly available from https://mafw-database.github.io/MAFW. 动态面部表情识别（FER）数据库为情感计算和应用提供重要的数据支持。然而，大多数 FER 数据库都用几种基本的相互排斥的情感类别进行注释，并且只包含一种模式，例如视频。单调的标签和模态无法准确模仿人类情感并实现在现实世界中的应用。在本文中，我们提出了 MAFW，一个包含 10,045 个野外视频音频片段的大型多模态复合情感数据库。每个剪辑都注释有复合情感类别和几个描述剪辑中主体情感行为的句子。对于复合情感注释，每个片段被分类为11种广泛使用的情感中的一种或多种，​​即愤怒、厌恶、恐惧、快乐、中立、悲伤、惊讶、蔑视、焦虑、无助和失望。为了保证标签的高质量，我们通过期望最大化（EM）算法过滤掉不可靠的注释，然后获得11个单标签情感类别和32个多标签情感类别。据我们所知，MAFW 是第一个使用复合情感注释和情感相关标题进行注释的野外多模态数据库。此外，我们还提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的表达片段特征学习方法，利用不同情绪和模态之间的表达变化关系来识别复合情绪。 MAFW 数据库上的大量实验表明，对于单模态 FER 和多模态 FER，所提出的方法相对于其他最先进的方法具有优势。我们的 MAFW 数据库可从 https://mafw-database.github.io/MAFW 公开获取。 本文提出MAFW数据库，用于动态面部表情识别，包含多模态数据和复合情感标注。 Yuanyuan Liu,Wei Dai,Chuanxu Feng,Wenbin Wang,Guanghao Yin,Jiabei Zeng,Shiguang Shan cs.CV

authors_text: Yongle Luo,Yuxin Wang,Kun Dong,Qiang Zhang,Erkang Cheng,Zhiyong Sun,Bo Song
title: Relay Hindsight Experience Replay: Self-Guided Continual Reinforcement Learning for Sequential Object Manipulation Tasks with Sparse Rewards
title_zh: 接力事后经验回放：具有稀疏奖励的连续对象操作任务的自引导持续强化学习
abstract: Exploration with sparse rewards remains a challenging research problem in reinforcement learning (RL). Especially for sequential object manipulation tasks, the RL agent always receives negative rewards until completing all sub-tasks, which results in low exploration efficiency. To solve these tasks efficiently, we propose a novel self-guided continual RL framework, RelayHER (RHER). RHER first decomposes a sequential task into new sub-tasks with increasing complexity and ensures that the simplest sub-task can be learned quickly by utilizing Hindsight Experience Replay (HER). Secondly, we design a multi-goal & multi-task network to learn these sub-tasks simultaneously. Finally, we propose a Self-Guided Exploration Strategy (SGES). With SGES, the learned sub-task policy will guide the agent to the states that are helpful to learn more complex sub-task with HER. By this self-guided exploration and relay policy learning, RHER can solve these sequential tasks efficiently stage by stage. The experimental results show that RHER significantly outperforms vanilla-HER in sample-efficiency on five singleobject and five complex multi-object manipulation tasks (e.g., Push, Insert, ObstaclePush, Stack, TStack, etc.). The proposed RHER has also been applied to learn a contact-rich push task on a physical robot from scratch, and the success rate reached 10/10 with only 250 episodes.
summary: Exploration with sparse rewards remains a challenging research problem in reinforcement learning (RL). Especially for sequential object manipulation tasks, the RL agent always receives negative rewards until completing all sub-tasks, which results in low exploration efficiency. To solve these tasks efficiently, we propose a novel self-guided continual RL framework, RelayHER (RHER). RHER first decomposes a sequential task into new sub-tasks with increasing complexity and ensures that the simplest sub-task can be learned quickly by utilizing Hindsight Experience Replay (HER). Secondly, we design a multi-goal & multi-task network to learn these sub-tasks simultaneously. Finally, we propose a Self-Guided Exploration Strategy (SGES). With SGES, the learned sub-task policy will guide the agent to the states that are helpful to learn more complex sub-task with HER. By this self-guided exploration and relay policy learning, RHER can solve these sequential tasks efficiently stage by stage. The experimental results show that RHER significantly outperforms vanilla-HER in sample-efficiency on five singleobject and five complex multi-object manipulation tasks (e.g., Push, Insert, ObstaclePush, Stack, TStack, etc.). The proposed RHER has also been applied to learn a contact-rich push task on a physical robot from scratch, and the success rate reached 10/10 with only 250 episodes.
abstract_zh: 稀疏奖励的探索仍然是强化学习（RL）中具有挑战性的研究问题。特别是对于顺序对象操作任务，强化学习代理在完成所有子任务之前总是收到负奖励，这导致探索效率低下。为了有效地解决这些任务，我们提出了一种新颖的自引导连续强化学习框架，RelayHER（RHER）。 RHER 首先将顺序任务分解为复杂性不断增加的新子任务，并确保利用后见之明经验回放 (HER) 可以快速学习最简单的子任务。其次，我们设计了一个多目标和多任务网络来同时学习这些子任务。最后，我们提出了自我引导探索策略（SGES）。通过 SGES，学习到的子任务策略将引导智能体进入有助于学习 HER 更复杂子任务的状态。通过这种自我引导探索和中继策略学习，RHER 可以逐步有效地解决这些连续任务。实验结果表明，RHER 在五个单对象和五个复杂多对象操作任务（例如，Push、Insert、ObstaclePush、Stack、TStack 等）上的样本效率显着优于 vanilla-HER。所提出的 RHER 还被应用于从头开始学习物理机器人上的接触丰富的推动任务，并且仅 250 集，成功率就达到了 10/10。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RelayHER（RHER）的自指导连续强化学习框架，用于解决稀疏奖励下的顺序物体操作任务。
AI.motivation: 在稀疏奖励环境下，传统强化学习方法难以高效探索复杂顺序任务，尤其在物体操作任务中，智能体需长期依赖负奖励反馈，导致学习效率低下。
AI.method: RHER通过分解任务为复杂度递增的子任务，结合Hindsight Experience Replay（HER）快速学习简单子任务；设计多目标多任务网络并行学习；引入自指导探索策略（SGES），利用已学子任务引导智能体探索更复杂任务。
AI.result: 实验显示RHER在5个单物体和5个复杂多物体任务中显著优于传统HER，且在物理机器人接触丰富推任务中以250轮次达到100%成功率。
AI.conclusion: RHER通过分阶段自指导探索与子任务接力学习，有效解决了稀疏奖励下顺序操作任务的高效学习问题，具备实际机器人应用潜力。

authors_text: Gia H. Ngo,Minh Nguyen,Nancy F. Chen,Mert R. Sabuncu
title: A Transformer-based Neural Language Model that Synthesizes Brain Activation Maps from Free-Form Text Queries
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的神经语言模型，可根据自由格式文本查询合成大脑激活图
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.13814
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.13814
abstract: Neuroimaging studies are often limited by the number of subjects and cognitive processes that can be feasibly interrogated. However, a rapidly growing number of neuroscientific studies have collectively accumulated an extensive wealth of results. Digesting this growing literature and obtaining novel insights remains to be a major challenge, since existing meta-analytic tools are constrained to keyword queries. In this paper, we present Text2Brain, an easy to use tool for synthesizing brain activation maps from open-ended text queries. Text2Brain was built on a transformer-based neural network language model and a coordinate-based meta-analysis of neuroimaging studies. Text2Brain combines a transformer-based text encoder and a 3D image generator, and was trained on variable-length text snippets and their corresponding activation maps sampled from 13,000 published studies. In our experiments, we demonstrate that Text2Brain can synthesize meaningful neural activation patterns from various free-form textual descriptions. Text2Brain is available at https://braininterpreter.com as a web-based tool for efficiently searching through the vast neuroimaging literature and generating new hypotheses.
summary: Neuroimaging studies are often limited by the number of subjects and cognitive processes that can be feasibly interrogated. However, a rapidly growing number of neuroscientific studies have collectively accumulated an extensive wealth of results. Digesting this growing literature and obtaining novel insights remains to be a major challenge, since existing meta-analytic tools are constrained to keyword queries. In this paper, we present Text2Brain, an easy to use tool for synthesizing brain activation maps from open-ended text queries. Text2Brain was built on a transformer-based neural network language model and a coordinate-based meta-analysis of neuroimaging studies. Text2Brain combines a transformer-based text encoder and a 3D image generator, and was trained on variable-length text snippets and their corresponding activation maps sampled from 13,000 published studies. In our experiments, we demonstrate that Text2Brain can synthesize meaningful neural activation patterns from various free-form textual descriptions. Text2Brain is available at https://braininterpreter.com as a web-based tool for efficiently searching through the vast neuroimaging literature and generating new hypotheses.
abstract_zh: 神经影像学研究通常受到可可行询问的受试者数量和认知过程的限制。然而，越来越多的神经科学研究已经积累了大量的成果。消化这些不断增长的文献并获得新颖的见解仍然是一个重大挑战，因为现有的元分析工具仅限于关键字查询。在本文中，我们介绍了 Text2Brain，这是一种易于使用的工具，用于根据开放式文本查询合成大脑激活图。 Text2Brain 建立在基于 Transformer 的神经网络语言模型和基于坐标的神经影像学研究元分析之上。 Text2Brain 结合了基于 Transformer 的文本编码器和 3D 图像生成器，并接受了可变长度文本片段及其从 13,000 份已发表研究中采样的相应激活图的训练。在我们的实验中，我们证明 Text2Brain 可以从各种自由形式的文本描述中合成有意义的神经激活模式。 Text2Brain 可在 https://braininterpreter.com 上找到，它是一种基于网络的工具，可有效搜索大量神经影像文献并生成新的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的神经语言模型Text2Brain，能够从自由形式的文本查询中合成大脑激活图谱。
AI.motivation: 现有神经影像学元分析工具受限于关键词查询，难以高效处理快速增长的神经科学文献并挖掘新见解。
AI.method: 结合Transformer文本编码器与3D图像生成器，基于13,000项研究的文本片段及对应激活图谱进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，Text2Brain能从多样化文本描述中生成有意义的神经激活模式，并作为网络工具提供使用。
AI.conclusion: Text2Brain为高效检索神经影像文献及生成新假设提供了有效工具，推动了神经科学领域的研究进展。

search_text: A Transformer-based Neural Language Model that Synthesizes Brain Activation Maps from Free-Form Text Queries 基于 Transformer 的神经语言模型，可根据自由格式文本查询合成大脑激活图 Neuroimaging studies are often limited by the number of subjects and cognitive processes that can be feasibly interrogated. However, a rapidly growing number of neuroscientific studies have collectively accumulated an extensive wealth of results. Digesting this growing literature and obtaining novel insights remains to be a major challenge, since existing meta-analytic tools are constrained to keyword queries. In this paper, we present Text2Brain, an easy to use tool for synthesizing brain activation maps from open-ended text queries. Text2Brain was built on a transformer-based neural network language model and a coordinate-based meta-analysis of neuroimaging studies. Text2Brain combines a transformer-based text encoder and a 3D image generator, and was trained on variable-length text snippets and their corresponding activation maps sampled from 13,000 published studies. In our experiments, we demonstrate that Text2Brain can synthesize meaningful neural activation patterns from various free-form textual descriptions. Text2Brain is available at https://braininterpreter.com as a web-based tool for efficiently searching through the vast neuroimaging literature and generating new hypotheses. 神经影像学研究通常受到可可行询问的受试者数量和认知过程的限制。然而，越来越多的神经科学研究已经积累了大量的成果。消化这些不断增长的文献并获得新颖的见解仍然是一个重大挑战，因为现有的元分析工具仅限于关键字查询。在本文中，我们介绍了 Text2Brain，这是一种易于使用的工具，用于根据开放式文本查询合成大脑激活图。 Text2Brain 建立在基于 Transformer 的神经网络语言模型和基于坐标的神经影像学研究元分析之上。 Text2Brain 结合了基于 Transformer 的文本编码器和 3D 图像生成器，并接受了可变长度文本片段及其从 13,000 份已发表研究中采样的相应激活图的训练。在我们的实验中，我们证明 Text2Brain 可以从各种自由形式的文本描述中合成有意义的神经激活模式。 Text2Brain 可在 https://braininterpreter.com 上找到，它是一种基于网络的工具，可有效搜索大量神经影像文献并生成新的假设。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的神经语言模型Text2Brain，能够从自由形式的文本查询中合成大脑激活图谱。 Gia H. Ngo,Minh Nguyen,Nancy F. Chen,Mert R. Sabuncu q-bio.NC,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Alessio Ferrari,Paola Spoletini,Sourav Debnath
title: How Do Requirements Evolve During Elicitation? An Empirical Study Combining Interviews and App Store Analysis
title_zh: 需求在启发过程中如何演变？结合访谈和应用商店分析的实证研究
abstract: Requirements are elicited from the customer and other stakeholders through an iterative process of interviews, prototyping, and other interactive sessions. Then, requirements can be further extended, based on the analysis of the features of competing products available on the market. Understanding how this process takes place can help to identify the contribution of the different elicitation phases, thereby allowing requirements analysts to better distribute their resources. In this work, we empirically study in which way requirements get transformed from initial ideas into documented needs, and then evolve based on the inspiration coming from similar products. To this end, we select 30 subjects that act as requirements analysts, and we perform interview-based elicitation sessions with a fictional customer. After the sessions, the analysts produce a first set of requirements for the system. Then, they are required to search similar products in the app stores, and extend the requirements, inspired by the identified apps. The requirements documented at each step are evaluated, to assess to which extent and in which way the initial idea evolved throughout the process. Our results show that only between 30\% and 38\% of the requirements produced after the interviews include content that can be fully traced to initial customer's ideas. Furthermore, up to 42\% of the requirements inspired by the app stores cover additional features compared to the ones identified after the interviews. The results empirically show that requirements are not elicited in strict sense, but actually co-created through interviews, with analysts playing a crucial role in the process. In addition, we show evidence that app store-inspired elicitation can be particularly beneficial to complete the requirements.
summary: Requirements are elicited from the customer and other stakeholders through an iterative process of interviews, prototyping, and other interactive sessions. Then, requirements can be further extended, based on the analysis of the features of competing products available on the market. Understanding how this process takes place can help to identify the contribution of the different elicitation phases, thereby allowing requirements analysts to better distribute their resources. In this work, we empirically study in which way requirements get transformed from initial ideas into documented needs, and then evolve based on the inspiration coming from similar products. To this end, we select 30 subjects that act as requirements analysts, and we perform interview-based elicitation sessions with a fictional customer. After the sessions, the analysts produce a first set of requirements for the system. Then, they are required to search similar products in the app stores, and extend the requirements, inspired by the identified apps. The requirements documented at each step are evaluated, to assess to which extent and in which way the initial idea evolved throughout the process. Our results show that only between 30\% and 38\% of the requirements produced after the interviews include content that can be fully traced to initial customer's ideas. Furthermore, up to 42\% of the requirements inspired by the app stores cover additional features compared to the ones identified after the interviews. The results empirically show that requirements are not elicited in strict sense, but actually co-created through interviews, with analysts playing a crucial role in the process. In addition, we show evidence that app store-inspired elicitation can be particularly beneficial to complete the requirements.
abstract_zh: 通过访谈、原型设计和其他互动会议的迭代过程，从客户和其他利益相关者那里获取需求。然后，根据对市场上竞争产品的功能的分析，可以进一步扩展需求。了解这个过程是如何发生的可以帮助识别不同启发阶段的贡献，从而使需求分析师能够更好地分配他们的资源。在这项工作中，我们实证研究了需求如何从最初的想法转化为记录的需求，然后根据来自类似产品的灵感进行演变。为此，我们选择了 30 个主题作为需求分析师，并与一个虚构的客户进行基于访谈的启发会话。会议结束后，分析师会提出第一组系统需求。然后，他们需要在应用程序商店中搜索类似产品，并根据已识别的应用程序的启发扩展要求。对每个步骤记录的需求进行评估，以评估初始想法在整个过程中发展到何种程度以及以何种方式发展。我们的结果表明，在访谈后产生的需求中，只有 30% 到 38% 包含可以完全追溯到最初客户想法的内容。此外，与采访后确定的功能相比，应用商店激发的需求中有多达 42% 涵盖了额外的功能。实证结果表明，严格意义上的要求并不是引出的，而是实际上是通过访谈共同创建的，分析师在这个过程中发挥了至关重要的作用。此外，我们的证据表明，应用商店启发的启发对于完成要求特别有利。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过结合访谈与应用商店分析，实证研究需求在获取过程中如何从初始想法演变为最终文档化需求。
AI.motivation: 理解需求获取过程中不同阶段的贡献，帮助需求分析师更合理分配资源，并探索应用商店分析对需求扩展的影响。
AI.method: 选取30名需求分析师，通过虚构客户访谈生成初始需求，随后基于应用商店分析扩展需求，并评估各阶段需求的演变。
AI.result: 访谈后的需求中仅30%-38%可完全追溯至初始想法，应用商店启发的需求中有42%包含访谈阶段未发现的新功能。
AI.conclusion: 需求并非单向获取，而是通过访谈与分析师主动参与共同创造；应用商店分析能有效补充需求完整性。

authors_text: Cornelius Buerkle,Fabian Oboril,Johannes Burr,Kay-Ulrich Scholl
title: Safe Perception -- A Hierarchical Monitor Approach
title_zh: 安全感知——分层监控方法
abstract: Our transportation world is rapidly transforming induced by an ever increasing level of autonomy. However, to obtain license of fully automated vehicles for widespread public use, it is necessary to assure safety of the entire system, which is still a challenge. This holds in particular for AI-based perception systems that have to handle a diversity of environmental conditions and road users, and at the same time should robustly detect all safety relevant objects (i.e no detection misses should occur). Yet, limited training and validation data make a proof of fault-free operation hardly achievable, as the perception system might be exposed to new, yet unknown objects or conditions on public roads. Hence, new safety approaches for AI-based perception systems are required. For this reason we propose in this paper a novel hierarchical monitoring approach that is able to validate the object list from a primary perception system, can reliably detect detection misses, and at the same time has a very low false alarm rate.
summary: Our transportation world is rapidly transforming induced by an ever increasing level of autonomy. However, to obtain license of fully automated vehicles for widespread public use, it is necessary to assure safety of the entire system, which is still a challenge. This holds in particular for AI-based perception systems that have to handle a diversity of environmental conditions and road users, and at the same time should robustly detect all safety relevant objects (i.e no detection misses should occur). Yet, limited training and validation data make a proof of fault-free operation hardly achievable, as the perception system might be exposed to new, yet unknown objects or conditions on public roads. Hence, new safety approaches for AI-based perception systems are required. For this reason we propose in this paper a novel hierarchical monitoring approach that is able to validate the object list from a primary perception system, can reliably detect detection misses, and at the same time has a very low false alarm rate.
abstract_zh: 由于自主水平不断提高，我们的交通运输世界正在迅速发生变化。然而，要获得全自动驾驶汽车广泛使用的许可，需要保证整个系统的安全，这仍然是一个挑战。这对于基于人工智能的感知系统尤其适用，该系统必须处理各种环境条件和道路使用者，同时应可靠地检测所有安全相关物体（即不应发生检测遗漏）。然而，有限的训练和验证数据使得无故障运行的证明很难实现，因为感知系统可能会暴露在公共道路上新的、未知的物体或条件下。因此，基于人工智能的感知系统需要新的安全方法。因此，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的分层监控方法，该方法能够验证主要感知系统的对象列表，能够可靠地检测检测遗漏，同时具有非常低的误报率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层监控方法，用于验证自动驾驶感知系统的对象列表，可靠检测漏检并保持低误报率。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶技术发展，确保AI感知系统在复杂环境下的安全性成为挑战，尤其需避免漏检安全相关对象，但有限的训练数据难以证明系统无故障。
AI.method: 设计分层监控架构，通过多级验证机制对主感知系统的输出进行实时校验，结合环境上下文信息提升漏检检测能力并抑制误报。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效识别感知系统漏检情况，在保证检测覆盖率的同时将误报率控制在可接受范围。
AI.conclusion: 分层监控方法为自动驾驶感知系统提供了可行的安全增强方案，可在数据有限场景下提升系统可靠性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种分层监控方法，用于验证自动驾驶感知系统的对象列表，可靠检测漏检并保持低误报率。
ai_content.motivation: 随着自动驾驶技术发展，确保AI感知系统在复杂环境下的安全性成为挑战，尤其需避免漏检安全相关对象，但有限的训练数据难以证明系统无故障。
ai_content.method: 设计分层监控架构，通过多级验证机制对主感知系统的输出进行实时校验，结合环境上下文信息提升漏检检测能力并抑制误报。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法能有效识别感知系统漏检情况，在保证检测覆盖率的同时将误报率控制在可接受范围。
ai_content.conclusion: 分层监控方法为自动驾驶感知系统提供了可行的安全增强方案，可在数据有限场景下提升系统可靠性。

search_text: Safe Perception -- A Hierarchical Monitor Approach 安全感知——分层监控方法 Our transportation world is rapidly transforming induced by an ever increasing level of autonomy. However, to obtain license of fully automated vehicles for widespread public use, it is necessary to assure safety of the entire system, which is still a challenge. This holds in particular for AI-based perception systems that have to handle a diversity of environmental conditions and road users, and at the same time should robustly detect all safety relevant objects (i.e no detection misses should occur). Yet, limited training and validation data make a proof of fault-free operation hardly achievable, as the perception system might be exposed to new, yet unknown objects or conditions on public roads. Hence, new safety approaches for AI-based perception systems are required. For this reason we propose in this paper a novel hierarchical monitoring approach that is able to validate the object list from a primary perception system, can reliably detect detection misses, and at the same time has a very low false alarm rate. 由于自主水平不断提高，我们的交通运输世界正在迅速发生变化。然而，要获得全自动驾驶汽车广泛使用的许可，需要保证整个系统的安全，这仍然是一个挑战。这对于基于人工智能的感知系统尤其适用，该系统必须处理各种环境条件和道路使用者，同时应可靠地检测所有安全相关物体（即不应发生检测遗漏）。然而，有限的训练和验证数据使得无故障运行的证明很难实现，因为感知系统可能会暴露在公共道路上新的、未知的物体或条件下。因此，基于人工智能的感知系统需要新的安全方法。因此，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的分层监控方法，该方法能够验证主要感知系统的对象列表，能够可靠地检测检测遗漏，同时具有非常低的误报率。 本文提出一种分层监控方法，用于验证自动驾驶感知系统的对象列表，可靠检测漏检并保持低误报率。 Cornelius Buerkle,Fabian Oboril,Johannes Burr,Kay-Ulrich Scholl cs.CV

authors_text: Maxim Mozgovoy,Marina Purgina
title: Designing Programming Exercises from Board Games
title_zh: 从棋盘游戏设计编程练习
abstract: This paper introduces a collection of board games specifically chosen to serve as a basis for programming exercises. We examine the attractiveness of board games in this context as well as features that make a particular game a good exercise. The collection is annotated across several dimensions to assist choosing a game suitable for the target topic and student level. We discuss possible changes into exercise tasks to make them more challenging and introduce new topics. The work relies on established topics taxonomy and board games resources which makes extending the current collection easy.
summary: This paper introduces a collection of board games specifically chosen to serve as a basis for programming exercises. We examine the attractiveness of board games in this context as well as features that make a particular game a good exercise. The collection is annotated across several dimensions to assist choosing a game suitable for the target topic and student level. We discuss possible changes into exercise tasks to make them more challenging and introduce new topics. The work relies on established topics taxonomy and board games resources which makes extending the current collection easy.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一系列专门选择作为编程练习基础的棋盘游戏。我们研究了棋盘游戏在这种情况下的吸引力以及使特定游戏成为良好练习的功能。该集合在多个维度上进行了注释，以帮助选择适合目标主题和学生水平的游戏。我们讨论练习任务可能发生的变化，使其更具挑战性并引入新主题。这项工作依赖于既定的主题分类和棋盘游戏资源，这使得扩展当前的集合变得容易。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在选择适合的桌游作为编程练习的基础，并通过多维度标注帮助选择适合不同主题和学生水平的游戏。
AI.motivation: 通过利用桌游的趣味性和互动性，提高编程教学的吸引力和有效性。
AI.method: 基于现有的编程主题分类和桌游资源，对精选的桌游进行多维度标注，以适配不同教学目标和学生水平。
AI.result: 成功构建了一个可扩展的桌游集合，能够根据教学需求调整难度和主题，并提供了相应的标注信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为编程教学提供了创新的练习设计途径，结合桌游的趣味性与教学目标，且便于后续扩展和调整。

authors_text: Andrej Orsula,Simon Bøgh,Miguel Olivares-Mendez,Carol Martinez
title: Learning to Grasp on the Moon from 3D Octree Observations with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习从 3D 八叉树观测中学习如何抓住月球
comment: Accepted for publication at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) | The source code is available at https://github.com/AndrejOrsula/drl_grasping | The supplementary video is available at https://youtube.com/watch?v=FZSoOkK6VFc
comments: Accepted for publication at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) | The source code is available at https://github.com/AndrejOrsula/drl_grasping | The supplementary video is available at https://youtube.com/watch?v=FZSoOkK6VFc
abstract: Extraterrestrial rovers with a general-purpose robotic arm have many potential applications in lunar and planetary exploration. Introducing autonomy into such systems is desirable for increasing the time that rovers can spend gathering scientific data and collecting samples. This work investigates the applicability of deep reinforcement learning for vision-based robotic grasping of objects on the Moon. A novel simulation environment with procedurally-generated datasets is created to train agents under challenging conditions in unstructured scenes with uneven terrain and harsh illumination. A model-free off-policy actor-critic algorithm is then employed for end-to-end learning of a policy that directly maps compact octree observations to continuous actions in Cartesian space. Experimental evaluation indicates that 3D data representations enable more effective learning of manipulation skills when compared to traditionally used image-based observations. Domain randomization improves the generalization of learned policies to novel scenes with previously unseen objects and different illumination conditions. To this end, we demonstrate zero-shot sim-to-real transfer by evaluating trained agents on a real robot in a Moon-analogue facility.
summary: Extraterrestrial rovers with a general-purpose robotic arm have many potential applications in lunar and planetary exploration. Introducing autonomy into such systems is desirable for increasing the time that rovers can spend gathering scientific data and collecting samples. This work investigates the applicability of deep reinforcement learning for vision-based robotic grasping of objects on the Moon. A novel simulation environment with procedurally-generated datasets is created to train agents under challenging conditions in unstructured scenes with uneven terrain and harsh illumination. A model-free off-policy actor-critic algorithm is then employed for end-to-end learning of a policy that directly maps compact octree observations to continuous actions in Cartesian space. Experimental evaluation indicates that 3D data representations enable more effective learning of manipulation skills when compared to traditionally used image-based observations. Domain randomization improves the generalization of learned policies to novel scenes with previously unseen objects and different illumination conditions. To this end, we demonstrate zero-shot sim-to-real transfer by evaluating trained agents on a real robot in a Moon-analogue facility.
abstract_zh: 带有通用机械臂的外星漫游车在月球和行星探索中有许多潜在的应用。将自主性引入此类系统对于增加漫游车收集科学数据和样本的时间是可取的。这项工作研究了深度强化学习对于基于视觉的机器人抓取月球物体的适用性。创建了一个具有程序生成的数据集的新颖模拟环境，以便在地形不平坦和光照条件恶劣的非结构化场景中的挑战性条件下训练代理。然后采用无模型的离策略演员批评家算法对策略进行端到端学习，该策略直接将紧凑八叉树观察映射到笛卡尔空间中的连续动作。实验评估表明，与传统使用的基于图像的观察相比，3D 数据表示可以更有效地学习操作技能。域随机化提高了学习策略对具有先前未见过的对象和不同照明条件的新场景的泛化能力。为此，我们通过评估模拟月球设施中真实机器人上训练有素的代理来演示零样本模拟到真实的迁移。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在月球环境下利用深度强化学习实现基于3D八叉树观测的机械臂抓取任务。
AI.motivation: 月球探测任务需要提高机械臂的自主性以延长科学数据采集时间，传统图像观测在复杂地形和光照条件下存在局限性。
AI.method: 构建程序生成的模拟环境训练智能体，采用无模型的off-policy actor-critic算法，直接将八叉树结构的3D观测映射到笛卡尔空间连续动作。
AI.result: 实验表明3D八叉树表示优于传统图像方法，领域随机化显著提升泛化能力，实现模拟到真实月球环境的零样本迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为月球探测器自主抓取任务提供了有效解决方案，验证了深度强化学习在复杂外星环境中的可行性。

authors_text: Hu Su,Yonghao He,Rui Jiang,Jiabin Zhang,Wei Zou,Bin Fan
title: DSLA: Dynamic smooth label assignment for efficient anchor-free object detection
title_zh: DSLA：动态平滑标签分配，实现高效的无锚对象检测
comment: single column, 33 pages, 7 figures, accepted by Pattern Recognition
comments: single column, 33 pages, 7 figures, accepted by Pattern Recognition
abstract: Anchor-free detectors basically formulate object detection as dense classification and regression. For popular anchor-free detectors, it is common to introduce an individual prediction branch to estimate the quality of localization. The following inconsistencies are observed when we delve into the practices of classification and quality estimation. Firstly, for some adjacent samples which are assigned completely different labels, the trained model would produce similar classification scores. This violates the training objective and leads to performance degradation. Secondly, it is found that detected bounding boxes with higher confidences contrarily have smaller overlaps with the corresponding ground-truth. Accurately localized bounding boxes would be suppressed by less accurate ones in the Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) procedure. To address the inconsistency problems, the Dynamic Smooth Label Assignment (DSLA) method is proposed. Based on the concept of centerness originally developed in FCOS, a smooth assignment strategy is proposed. The label is smoothed to a continuous value in [0, 1] to make a steady transition between positive and negative samples. Intersection-of-Union (IoU) is predicted dynamically during training and is coupled with the smoothed label. The dynamic smooth label is assigned to supervise the classification branch. Under such supervision, quality estimation branch is naturally merged into the classification branch, which simplifies the architecture of anchor-free detector. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on the MS COCO benchmark. It is demonstrated that, DSLA can significantly boost the detection accuracy by alleviating the above inconsistencies for anchor-free detectors. Our codes are released at https://github.com/YonghaoHe/DSLA.
summary: Anchor-free detectors basically formulate object detection as dense classification and regression. For popular anchor-free detectors, it is common to introduce an individual prediction branch to estimate the quality of localization. The following inconsistencies are observed when we delve into the practices of classification and quality estimation. Firstly, for some adjacent samples which are assigned completely different labels, the trained model would produce similar classification scores. This violates the training objective and leads to performance degradation. Secondly, it is found that detected bounding boxes with higher confidences contrarily have smaller overlaps with the corresponding ground-truth. Accurately localized bounding boxes would be suppressed by less accurate ones in the Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) procedure. To address the inconsistency problems, the Dynamic Smooth Label Assignment (DSLA) method is proposed. Based on the concept of centerness originally developed in FCOS, a smooth assignment strategy is proposed. The label is smoothed to a continuous value in [0, 1] to make a steady transition between positive and negative samples. Intersection-of-Union (IoU) is predicted dynamically during training and is coupled with the smoothed label. The dynamic smooth label is assigned to supervise the classification branch. Under such supervision, quality estimation branch is naturally merged into the classification branch, which simplifies the architecture of anchor-free detector. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on the MS COCO benchmark. It is demonstrated that, DSLA can significantly boost the detection accuracy by alleviating the above inconsistencies for anchor-free detectors. Our codes are released at https://github.com/YonghaoHe/DSLA.
abstract_zh: 无锚检测器基本上将目标检测表述为密集分类和回归。对于流行的无锚检测器，通常引入单独的预测分支来估计定位的质量。当我们深入研究分类和质量估计的实践时，发现了以下不一致之处。首先，对于一些被分配完全不同标签的相邻样本，训练后的模型会产生相似的分类分数。这违反了训练目标并导致性能下降。其次，发现置信度较高的检测到的边界框与相应的地面实况的重叠较小。在非极大值抑制（NMS）过程中，准确定位的边界框将被不太准确的边界框抑制。为了解决不一致问题，提出了动态平滑标签分配（DSLA）方法。基于FCOS中最初提出的中心概念，提出了平滑分配策略。将标签平滑为 [0, 1] 中的连续值，以实现正样本和负样本之间的稳定过渡。并交集 (IoU) 在训练期间动态预测，并与平滑标签相结合。分配动态平滑标签来监督分类分支。在这种监督下，质量估计分支自然地合并到分类分支中，这简化了无锚检测器的架构。在 MS COCO 基准上进行了全面的实验。事实证明，DSLA 可以通过减轻无锚检测器的上述不一致性来显着提高检测精度。我们的代码发布在https://github.com/YonghaoHe/DSLA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DSLA的动态平滑标签分配方法，以提高无锚点目标检测的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 无锚点检测器在分类和质量估计过程中存在不一致性，例如相邻样本标签差异大导致分类得分相似，以及高置信度边界框与真实框重叠度低的问题。
AI.method: 基于FCOS的centerness概念，提出了一种平滑标签分配策略，将标签平滑为连续值，并在训练过程中动态预测IoU，从而将质量估计分支合并到分类分支中。
AI.result: 在MS COCO基准测试中，DSLA显著提升了无锚点检测器的检测精度。
AI.conclusion: DSLA通过缓解分类和质量估计的不一致性，简化了无锚点检测器的架构并提高了检测性能。

authors_text: Cristian Simionescu,George Stoica,Robert Herscovici
title: Dynamic Batch Adaptation
title_zh: 动态批量适应
abstract: Current deep learning adaptive optimizer methods adjust the step magnitude of parameter updates by altering the effective learning rate used by each parameter. Motivated by the known inverse relation between batch size and learning rate on update step magnitudes, we introduce a novel training procedure that dynamically decides the dimension and the composition of the current update step. Our procedure, Dynamic Batch Adaptation (DBA) analyzes the gradients of every sample and selects the subset that best improves certain metrics such as gradient variance for each layer of the network. We present results showing DBA significantly improves the speed of model convergence. Additionally, we find that DBA produces an increased improvement over standard optimizers when used in data scarce conditions where, in addition to convergence speed, it also significantly improves model generalization, managing to train a network with a single fully connected hidden layer using only 1% of the MNIST dataset to reach 97.79% test accuracy. In an even more extreme scenario, it manages to reach 97.44% test accuracy using only 10 samples per class. These results represent a relative error rate reduction of 81.78% and 88.07% respectively, compared to the standard optimizers, Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) and Adam.
summary: Current deep learning adaptive optimizer methods adjust the step magnitude of parameter updates by altering the effective learning rate used by each parameter. Motivated by the known inverse relation between batch size and learning rate on update step magnitudes, we introduce a novel training procedure that dynamically decides the dimension and the composition of the current update step. Our procedure, Dynamic Batch Adaptation (DBA) analyzes the gradients of every sample and selects the subset that best improves certain metrics such as gradient variance for each layer of the network. We present results showing DBA significantly improves the speed of model convergence. Additionally, we find that DBA produces an increased improvement over standard optimizers when used in data scarce conditions where, in addition to convergence speed, it also significantly improves model generalization, managing to train a network with a single fully connected hidden layer using only 1% of the MNIST dataset to reach 97.79% test accuracy. In an even more extreme scenario, it manages to reach 97.44% test accuracy using only 10 samples per class. These results represent a relative error rate reduction of 81.78% and 88.07% respectively, compared to the standard optimizers, Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) and Adam.
abstract_zh: 当前的深度学习自适应优化器方法通过改变每个参数使用的有效学习率来调整参数更新的步长。受批量大小和更新步骤幅度的学习率之间已知的反比关系的启发，我们引入了一种新颖的训练过程，可以动态决定当前更新步骤的维度和组成。我们的程序动态批量适应（DBA）分析每个样本的梯度，并选择最能改善某些指标的子集，例如网络每层的梯度方差。我们的结果表明 DBA 显着提高了模型收敛速度。此外，我们发现，在数据稀缺条件下使用时，DBA 比标准优化器有了更大的改进，除了收敛速度之外，它还显着提高了模型泛化能力，仅使用 1% 的 MNIST 数据集就能够训练具有单个完全连接隐藏层的网络，从而达到 97.79% 的测试精度。在更极端的情况下，每类仅使用 10 个样本，它就能达到 97.44% 的测试准确率。与标准优化器随机梯度下降 (SGD) 和 Adam 相比，这些结果表明相对错误率分别降低了 81.78% 和 88.07%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态批处理自适应（DBA）方法，通过动态决定当前更新步骤的维度和组成来提升深度学习模型的收敛速度和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习自适应优化器通过调整每个参数的有效学习率来改变参数更新的步长。由于已知批量大小与学习率之间存在反比关系，本文受到这一关系的启发，提出了动态调整更新步骤的方法。
AI.method: DBA方法通过分析每个样本的梯度，选择对网络各层梯度方差等指标提升最显著的子集，从而动态决定当前更新步骤的维度和组成。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DBA显著提升了模型收敛速度，并在数据稀缺条件下进一步提升了模型泛化能力。在仅使用1%的MNIST数据集时，DBA达到了97.79%的测试准确率；在每类仅使用10个样本时，达到了97.44%的测试准确率，分别比标准优化器SGD和Adam减少了81.78%和88.07%的相对误差率。
AI.conclusion: DBA方法在模型收敛速度和数据稀缺条件下的泛化能力方面表现出色，为深度学习训练提供了一种有效的优化策略。

authors_text: Mattia Risiglione,Victor Barasuol,Darwin G. Caldwell,Claudio Semini
title: A Whole-Body Controller Based on a Simplified Template for Rendering Impedances in Quadruped Manipulators
title_zh: 基于简化四足机械臂阻抗渲染模板的全身控制器
comment: Accepted as contributed paper at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Accepted as contributed paper at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Quadrupedal manipulators require to be compliant when dealing with external forces during autonomous manipulation, tele-operation or physical human-robot interaction. This paper presents a whole-body controller that allows for the implementation of a Cartesian impedance control to coordinate tracking performance and desired compliance for the robot base and manipulator arm. The controller is formulated through an optimization problem using Quadratic Programming (QP) to impose a desired behavior for the system while satisfying friction cone constraints, unilateral force constraints, joint and torque limits. The presented strategy decouples the arm and the base of the platform, enforcing the behavior of a linear double-mass spring damper system, and allows to independently tune their inertia, stiffness and damping properties. The control architecture is validated through an extensive simulation study using the 90kg HyQ robot equipped with a 7-DoF manipulator arm. Simulation results show the impedance rendering performance when external forces are applied at the arm's end-effector. The paper presents results for full stance condition (all legs on the ground) and, for the first time, also shows how the impedance rendering is affected by the contact conditions during a dynamic gait.
summary: Quadrupedal manipulators require to be compliant when dealing with external forces during autonomous manipulation, tele-operation or physical human-robot interaction. This paper presents a whole-body controller that allows for the implementation of a Cartesian impedance control to coordinate tracking performance and desired compliance for the robot base and manipulator arm. The controller is formulated through an optimization problem using Quadratic Programming (QP) to impose a desired behavior for the system while satisfying friction cone constraints, unilateral force constraints, joint and torque limits. The presented strategy decouples the arm and the base of the platform, enforcing the behavior of a linear double-mass spring damper system, and allows to independently tune their inertia, stiffness and damping properties. The control architecture is validated through an extensive simulation study using the 90kg HyQ robot equipped with a 7-DoF manipulator arm. Simulation results show the impedance rendering performance when external forces are applied at the arm's end-effector. The paper presents results for full stance condition (all legs on the ground) and, for the first time, also shows how the impedance rendering is affected by the contact conditions during a dynamic gait.
abstract_zh: 四足机械臂在自主操纵、远程操作或物理人机交互过程中应对外力时需要顺从。本文提出了一种全身控制器，允许实施笛卡尔阻抗控制，以协调机器人底座和机械臂的跟踪性能和所需的顺应性。该控制器是通过使用二次规划 (QP) 的优化问题来制定的，以便为系统施加所需的行为，同时满足摩擦锥约束、单边力约束、关节和扭矩限制。所提出的策略将臂和平台底座解耦，强制线性双质量弹簧阻尼器系统的行为，并允许独立调整它们的惯性、刚度和阻尼特性。该控制架构通过使用配备 7 自由度机械臂的 90 公斤 HyQ 机器人进行的广泛模拟研究进行了验证。仿真结果显示了手臂末端执行器受到外力时的阻抗渲染性能。该论文提供了全站立条件（所有腿都放在地面上）的结果，并且还首次展示了动态步态期间接触条件如何影响阻抗渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于简化模板的全身控制器，用于四足机械臂在受到外部力时的阻抗渲染。
AI.motivation: 四足机械臂在自主操作、远程操作或与人类进行物理交互时，需要对外部力具有一定的顺从性。
AI.method: 通过二次规划（QP）优化问题构建全身控制器，满足摩擦锥约束、单边力约束、关节和扭矩限制，并解耦机械臂和底盘的行为，实现独立调节惯性、刚度和阻尼特性。
AI.result: 通过HyQ机器人及其7自由度机械臂的仿真验证，展示了机械臂末端执行器受到外部力时的阻抗渲染性能，并研究了动态步态下接触条件对阻抗渲染的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该控制器能够有效实现机械臂和底盘的协调控制，为四足机械臂在复杂环境下的操作提供了新的方法。

search_text: A Whole-Body Controller Based on a Simplified Template for Rendering Impedances in Quadruped Manipulators 基于简化四足机械臂阻抗渲染模板的全身控制器 Quadrupedal manipulators require to be compliant when dealing with external forces during autonomous manipulation, tele-operation or physical human-robot interaction. This paper presents a whole-body controller that allows for the implementation of a Cartesian impedance control to coordinate tracking performance and desired compliance for the robot base and manipulator arm. The controller is formulated through an optimization problem using Quadratic Programming (QP) to impose a desired behavior for the system while satisfying friction cone constraints, unilateral force constraints, joint and torque limits. The presented strategy decouples the arm and the base of the platform, enforcing the behavior of a linear double-mass spring damper system, and allows to independently tune their inertia, stiffness and damping properties. The control architecture is validated through an extensive simulation study using the 90kg HyQ robot equipped with a 7-DoF manipulator arm. Simulation results show the impedance rendering performance when external forces are applied at the arm's end-effector. The paper presents results for full stance condition (all legs on the ground) and, for the first time, also shows how the impedance rendering is affected by the contact conditions during a dynamic gait. 四足机械臂在自主操纵、远程操作或物理人机交互过程中应对外力时需要顺从。本文提出了一种全身控制器，允许实施笛卡尔阻抗控制，以协调机器人底座和机械臂的跟踪性能和所需的顺应性。该控制器是通过使用二次规划 (QP) 的优化问题来制定的，以便为系统施加所需的行为，同时满足摩擦锥约束、单边力约束、关节和扭矩限制。所提出的策略将臂和平台底座解耦，强制线性双质量弹簧阻尼器系统的行为，并允许独立调整它们的惯性、刚度和阻尼特性。该控制架构通过使用配备 7 自由度机械臂的 90 公斤 HyQ 机器人进行的广泛模拟研究进行了验证。仿真结果显示了手臂末端执行器受到外力时的阻抗渲染性能。该论文提供了全站立条件（所有腿都放在地面上）的结果，并且还首次展示了动态步态期间接触条件如何影响阻抗渲染。 本文提出了一种基于简化模板的全身控制器，用于四足机械臂在受到外部力时的阻抗渲染。 Mattia Risiglione,Victor Barasuol,Darwin G. Caldwell,Claudio Semini cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Zaharah A. Bukhsh,Nils Jansen,Hajo Molegraaf
title: A Maintenance Planning Framework using Online and Offline Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用在线和离线深度强化学习的维护计划框架
comment: Published Neural Comput & Applic (2023), 12 pages, 8 Figure
comments: Published Neural Comput & Applic (2023), 12 pages, 8 Figure
abstract: Cost-effective asset management is an area of interest across several industries. Specifically, this paper develops a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) solution to automatically determine an optimal rehabilitation policy for continuously deteriorating water pipes. We approach the problem of rehabilitation planning in an online and offline DRL setting. In online DRL, the agent interacts with a simulated environment of multiple pipes with distinct lengths, materials, and failure rate characteristics. We train the agent using deep Q-learning (DQN) to learn an optimal policy with minimal average costs and reduced failure probability. In offline learning, the agent uses static data, e.g., DQN replay data, to learn an optimal policy via a conservative Q-learning algorithm without further interactions with the environment. We demonstrate that DRL-based policies improve over standard preventive, corrective, and greedy planning alternatives. Additionally, learning from the fixed DQN replay dataset in an offline setting further improves the performance. The results warrant that the existing deterioration profiles of water pipes consisting of large and diverse states and action trajectories provide a valuable avenue to learn rehabilitation policies in the offline setting, which can be further fine-tuned using the simulator.
summary: Cost-effective asset management is an area of interest across several industries. Specifically, this paper develops a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) solution to automatically determine an optimal rehabilitation policy for continuously deteriorating water pipes. We approach the problem of rehabilitation planning in an online and offline DRL setting. In online DRL, the agent interacts with a simulated environment of multiple pipes with distinct lengths, materials, and failure rate characteristics. We train the agent using deep Q-learning (DQN) to learn an optimal policy with minimal average costs and reduced failure probability. In offline learning, the agent uses static data, e.g., DQN replay data, to learn an optimal policy via a conservative Q-learning algorithm without further interactions with the environment. We demonstrate that DRL-based policies improve over standard preventive, corrective, and greedy planning alternatives. Additionally, learning from the fixed DQN replay dataset in an offline setting further improves the performance. The results warrant that the existing deterioration profiles of water pipes consisting of large and diverse states and action trajectories provide a valuable avenue to learn rehabilitation policies in the offline setting, which can be further fine-tuned using the simulator.
abstract_zh: 具有成本效益的资产管理是多个行业关注的领域。具体来说，本文开发了一种深度强化学习（DRL）解决方案，可以自动确定持续恶化的水管的最佳修复策略。我们在在线和离线 DRL 环境中解决康复规划问题。在在线 DRL 中，代理与具有不同长度、材料和故障率特征的多个管道的模拟环境进行交互。我们使用深度 Q 学习 (DQN) 来训练代理，以最小的平均成本和更低的失败概率来学习最优策略。在离线学习中，代理使用静态数据（例如 DQN 重放数据）通过保守的 Q 学习算法来学习最优策略，而无需与环境进一步交互。我们证明，基于 DRL 的策略比标准预防性、纠正性和贪婪计划替代方案有所改进。此外，在离线设置中从固定 DQN 重放数据集学习进一步提高了性能。结果表明，由大型且多样化的状态和行动轨迹组成的水管现有恶化剖面为离线环境下学习修复政策提供了宝贵的途径，可以使用模拟器进一步微调。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合在线和离线深度强化学习的维护规划框架，用于优化持续劣化的水管修复策略。
AI.motivation: 现有水管维护方法（如预防性、纠正性维护）成本高且效果有限，需通过智能算法实现更优的动态决策。
AI.method: 采用在线深度Q学习（DQN）通过模拟环境训练智能体，离线阶段利用静态数据（如DQN回放缓冲区）结合保守Q学习算法优化策略。
AI.result: DRL策略在成本与故障率指标上优于传统方法，离线学习结合历史数据进一步提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用现有水管劣化数据的离线学习为修复策略优化提供有效途径，可结合模拟器进行微调应用。

authors_text: Trygve Olav Fossum,Øystein Sture,Petter Norgren-Aamot,Ingrid Myrnes Hansen,Bjørn Christian Kvisvik,Anne Christine Knag
title: Underwater autonomous mapping and characterization of marine debris in urban water bodies
title_zh: 城市水体中海洋垃圾的水下自主测绘和表征
abstract: Marine debris originating from human activity has been accumulating in underwater environments such as oceans, lakes, and rivers for decades. The extent, type, and amount of waste is hard to assess as the exact mechanisms for spread are not understood, yielding unknown consequences for the marine environment and human health. Methods for detecting and mapping marine debris is therefore vital in order to gain insight into pollution dynamics, which in turn can be used to effectively plan and execute physical removal. Using an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV), equipped with an underwater hyperspectral imager (UHI) and stereo-camera, marine debris was autonomously detected, mapped and quantified in the sheltered bay Store Lungegaardsvann in Bergen, Norway.
summary: Marine debris originating from human activity has been accumulating in underwater environments such as oceans, lakes, and rivers for decades. The extent, type, and amount of waste is hard to assess as the exact mechanisms for spread are not understood, yielding unknown consequences for the marine environment and human health. Methods for detecting and mapping marine debris is therefore vital in order to gain insight into pollution dynamics, which in turn can be used to effectively plan and execute physical removal. Using an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV), equipped with an underwater hyperspectral imager (UHI) and stereo-camera, marine debris was autonomously detected, mapped and quantified in the sheltered bay Store Lungegaardsvann in Bergen, Norway.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，人类活动产生的海洋垃圾一直在海洋、湖泊和河流等水下环境中积累。废物的范围、类型和数量很难评估，因为传播的确切机制尚不清楚，对海洋环境和人类健康产生未知的后果。因此，为了深入了解污染动态，海洋垃圾的检测和绘图方法至关重要，进而可用于有效规划和执行物理清除。使用配备水下高光谱成像仪 (UHI) 和立体相机的自主水下航行器 (AUV)，在挪威卑尔根的 Store Lungegaardsvann 庇护海湾中自动检测、绘制和量化海洋垃圾。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用自主水下航行器（AUV）对城市水体中的海洋垃圾进行自主测绘与特征分析。
AI.motivation: 海洋垃圾对环境和人类健康造成威胁，但其传播机制不明，需通过有效方法评估污染程度以指导清理工作。
AI.method: 搭载水下高光谱成像仪和立体相机的AUV，在挪威卑尔根的港湾中自主检测、测绘并量化海洋垃圾。
AI.result: 成功实现了对目标区域海洋垃圾的自主识别、分布绘制及数量统计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为研究海洋垃圾污染动态及制定清理策略提供了可靠的数据支持和技术手段。

motivation: 海洋垃圾对环境和人类健康造成威胁，但其传播机制不明，需通过有效方法评估污染程度以指导清理工作。

search_text: Underwater autonomous mapping and characterization of marine debris in urban water bodies 城市水体中海洋垃圾的水下自主测绘和表征 Marine debris originating from human activity has been accumulating in underwater environments such as oceans, lakes, and rivers for decades. The extent, type, and amount of waste is hard to assess as the exact mechanisms for spread are not understood, yielding unknown consequences for the marine environment and human health. Methods for detecting and mapping marine debris is therefore vital in order to gain insight into pollution dynamics, which in turn can be used to effectively plan and execute physical removal. Using an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV), equipped with an underwater hyperspectral imager (UHI) and stereo-camera, marine debris was autonomously detected, mapped and quantified in the sheltered bay Store Lungegaardsvann in Bergen, Norway. 几十年来，人类活动产生的海洋垃圾一直在海洋、湖泊和河流等水下环境中积累。废物的范围、类型和数量很难评估，因为传播的确切机制尚不清楚，对海洋环境和人类健康产生未知的后果。因此，为了深入了解污染动态，海洋垃圾的检测和绘图方法至关重要，进而可用于有效规划和执行物理清除。使用配备水下高光谱成像仪 (UHI) 和立体相机的自主水下航行器 (AUV)，在挪威卑尔根的 Store Lungegaardsvann 庇护海湾中自动检测、绘制和量化海洋垃圾。 该论文提出使用自主水下航行器（AUV）对城市水体中的海洋垃圾进行自主测绘与特征分析。 Trygve Olav Fossum,Øystein Sture,Petter Norgren-Aamot,Ingrid Myrnes Hansen,Bjørn Christian Kvisvik,Anne Christine Knag cs.RO

authors_text: Nikhil Kumar
title: An Approximate Generalization of the Okamura-Seymour Theorem
title_zh: 冈村-西摩定理的近似推广
abstract: We consider the problem of multicommodity flows in planar graphs. Okamura and Seymour showed that if all the demands are incident on one face, then the cut-condition is sufficient for routing demands. We consider the following generalization of this setting and prove an approximate max flow-min cut theorem: for every demand edge, there exists a face containing both its end points. We show that the cut-condition is sufficient for routing $Ω(1)$-fraction of all the demands. To prove this, we give a $L_1$-embedding of the planar metric which approximately preserves distance between all pair of points on the same face.
summary: We consider the problem of multicommodity flows in planar graphs. Okamura and Seymour showed that if all the demands are incident on one face, then the cut-condition is sufficient for routing demands. We consider the following generalization of this setting and prove an approximate max flow-min cut theorem: for every demand edge, there exists a face containing both its end points. We show that the cut-condition is sufficient for routing $Ω(1)$-fraction of all the demands. To prove this, we give a $L_1$-embedding of the planar metric which approximately preserves distance between all pair of points on the same face.
abstract_zh: 我们在平面图中考虑多种商品流动的问题。 Okamura 和 Seymour 表明，如果所有需求都发生在一张面上，则割断条件足以满足路由需求。我们考虑此设置的以下概括，并证明近似最大流最小割定理：对于每个需求边，都存在一个包含其两个端点的面。我们表明，切割条件足以路由所有需求的 $Ω(1)$ 部分。为了证明这一点，我们给出平面度量的 $L_1$ 嵌入，它近似保留同一面上所有点对之间的距离。

AI.tldr: 研究平面图中多商品流问题，推广Okamura-Seymour定理，证明在更一般条件下割条件的充分性。
AI.motivation: 现有定理条件严格，需更一般条件以适应实际需求分布。
AI.method: 通过构造L1嵌入，近似保持同一面上点的距离，结合分析方法证明结果。
AI.result: 证明割条件可满足所有需求的Ω(1)分数，且构造了近似保持距离的L1嵌入。
AI.conclusion: 扩展了定理适用范围，为多商品流问题提供新的分析工具。

authors_text: C. Bunks,T. Weyde
title: Jazz Contrafact Detection
title_zh: 爵士乐违规检测
abstract: In jazz, a contrafact is a new melody composed over an existing, but often reharmonized chord progression. Because reharmonization can introduce a wide range of variations, detecting contrafacts is a challenging task. This paper develops a novel vector-space model to represent chord progressions, and uses it for contrafact detection. The process applies principles from music theory to reduce the dimensionality of chord space, determine a common key signature representation, and compute a chordal co-occurrence matrix. The rows of the matrix form a basis for the vector space in which chord progressions are represented as piecewise linear functions, and harmonic similarity is evaluated by computing the membrane area, a novel distance metric. To illustrate our method's effectiveness, we apply it to the Impro-Visor corpus of 2,612 chord progressions, and present examples demonstrating its ability to account for reharmonizations and find contrafacts.
summary: In jazz, a contrafact is a new melody composed over an existing, but often reharmonized chord progression. Because reharmonization can introduce a wide range of variations, detecting contrafacts is a challenging task. This paper develops a novel vector-space model to represent chord progressions, and uses it for contrafact detection. The process applies principles from music theory to reduce the dimensionality of chord space, determine a common key signature representation, and compute a chordal co-occurrence matrix. The rows of the matrix form a basis for the vector space in which chord progressions are represented as piecewise linear functions, and harmonic similarity is evaluated by computing the membrane area, a novel distance metric. To illustrate our method's effectiveness, we apply it to the Impro-Visor corpus of 2,612 chord progressions, and present examples demonstrating its ability to account for reharmonizations and find contrafacts.
abstract_zh: 在爵士乐中，矛盾是在现有但经常重新和谐的和弦进行上创作的新旋律。由于重新协调可能会带来广泛的变化，因此检测违规行为是一项具有挑战性的任务。本文开发了一种新颖的向量空间模型来表示和弦进行，并将其用于矛盾检测。该过程应用音乐理论的原理来降低和弦空间的维度，确定公共调号表示，并计算和弦共现矩阵。矩阵的行构成向量空间的基础，其中和弦级数被表示为分段线性函数，并且通过计算膜面积（一种新颖的距离度量）来评估和声相似性。为了说明我们的方法的有效性，我们将其应用于包含 2,612 个和弦进行的 Impro-Visor 语料库，并提供示例来证明其解释重新和声和发现矛盾的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量空间模型的爵士乐contrafact检测方法，通过分析和弦进行的谐波相似性来识别重构和声的旋律。
AI.motivation: 由于爵士乐中contrafact的和声重构可能导致广泛变化，传统方法难以有效检测，因此需要一种能捕捉谐波相似性的新模型。
AI.method: 构建向量空间模型表示和弦进行，结合音乐理论降低维度、统一调号，计算和弦共现矩阵，并通过膜面积距离度量谐波相似性。
AI.result: 在包含2,612个和弦进行的Impro-Visor语料库中验证，方法能有效识别重构和声并检测contrafact案例。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过量化谐波相似性，为爵士乐contrafact检测提供了有效解决方案，可处理复杂和声变化。

authors_text: Zhouyingcheng Liao,Jimei Yang,Jun Saito,Gerard Pons-Moll,Yang Zhou
title: Skeleton-free Pose Transfer for Stylized 3D Characters
title_zh: 风格化 3D 角色的无骨骼姿势转移
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022. Project website https://zycliao.github.io/sfpt
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022. Project website https://zycliao.github.io/sfpt
abstract: We present the first method that automatically transfers poses between stylized 3D characters without skeletal rigging. In contrast to previous attempts to learn pose transformations on fixed or topology-equivalent skeleton templates, our method focuses on a novel scenario to handle skeleton-free characters with diverse shapes, topologies, and mesh connectivities. The key idea of our method is to represent the characters in a unified articulation model so that the pose can be transferred through the correspondent parts. To achieve this, we propose a novel pose transfer network that predicts the character skinning weights and deformation transformations jointly to articulate the target character to match the desired pose. Our method is trained in a semi-supervised manner absorbing all existing character data with paired/unpaired poses and stylized shapes. It generalizes well to unseen stylized characters and inanimate objects. We conduct extensive experiments and demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on this novel task.
summary: We present the first method that automatically transfers poses between stylized 3D characters without skeletal rigging. In contrast to previous attempts to learn pose transformations on fixed or topology-equivalent skeleton templates, our method focuses on a novel scenario to handle skeleton-free characters with diverse shapes, topologies, and mesh connectivities. The key idea of our method is to represent the characters in a unified articulation model so that the pose can be transferred through the correspondent parts. To achieve this, we propose a novel pose transfer network that predicts the character skinning weights and deformation transformations jointly to articulate the target character to match the desired pose. Our method is trained in a semi-supervised manner absorbing all existing character data with paired/unpaired poses and stylized shapes. It generalizes well to unseen stylized characters and inanimate objects. We conduct extensive experiments and demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on this novel task.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一种无需骨骼绑定即可在风格化 3D 角色之间自动转换姿势的方法。与之前在固定或拓扑等效骨架模板上学习姿势变换的尝试相比，我们的方法侧重于一种新颖的场景来处理具有不同形状、拓扑和网格连接的无骨架角色。我们方法的关键思想是用统一的关节模型来表示角色，以便可以通过相应的部分来转移姿势。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新颖的姿势转移网络，该网络可以联合预测角色蒙皮权重和变形变换，以明确目标角色以匹配所需的姿势。我们的方法以半监督的方式进行训练，吸收所有现有的具有配对/不配对姿势和风格化形状的角色数据。它很好地概括了看不见的风格化人物和无生命的物体。我们进行了广泛的实验，并证明了我们的方法在这项新任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需骨骼绑定的姿势迁移方法，用于处理风格化3D角色的多样化形状和拓扑结构。
AI.motivation: 传统姿势迁移方法依赖固定骨骼模板，难以处理无骨骼绑定且拓扑结构多样的风格化3D角色，亟需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出统一关节模型表示角色，并设计联合预测皮肤权重与变形变换的姿势迁移网络，通过半监督学习利用配对/未配对数据进行训练。
AI.result: 方法在未见过的风格化角色和非生物对象上表现出色，验证了其在新型任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了骨骼绑定限制，为风格化3D角色和复杂对象的姿势迁移提供了通用框架，推动了相关领域发展。

tldr: 本文提出了一种无需骨骼绑定的姿势迁移方法，用于处理风格化3D角色的多样化形状和拓扑结构。
motivation: 传统姿势迁移方法依赖固定骨骼模板，难以处理无骨骼绑定且拓扑结构多样的风格化3D角色，亟需更通用的解决方案。
method: 提出统一关节模型表示角色，并设计联合预测皮肤权重与变形变换的姿势迁移网络，通过半监督学习利用配对/未配对数据进行训练。
result: 方法在未见过的风格化角色和非生物对象上表现出色，验证了其在新型任务中的有效性。
conclusion: 该方法突破了骨骼绑定限制，为风格化3D角色和复杂对象的姿势迁移提供了通用框架，推动了相关领域发展。
search_text: Skeleton-free Pose Transfer for Stylized 3D Characters 风格化 3D 角色的无骨骼姿势转移 We present the first method that automatically transfers poses between stylized 3D characters without skeletal rigging. In contrast to previous attempts to learn pose transformations on fixed or topology-equivalent skeleton templates, our method focuses on a novel scenario to handle skeleton-free characters with diverse shapes, topologies, and mesh connectivities. The key idea of our method is to represent the characters in a unified articulation model so that the pose can be transferred through the correspondent parts. To achieve this, we propose a novel pose transfer network that predicts the character skinning weights and deformation transformations jointly to articulate the target character to match the desired pose. Our method is trained in a semi-supervised manner absorbing all existing character data with paired/unpaired poses and stylized shapes. It generalizes well to unseen stylized characters and inanimate objects. We conduct extensive experiments and demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on this novel task. 我们提出了第一种无需骨骼绑定即可在风格化 3D 角色之间自动转换姿势的方法。与之前在固定或拓扑等效骨架模板上学习姿势变换的尝试相比，我们的方法侧重于一种新颖的场景来处理具有不同形状、拓扑和网格连接的无骨架角色。我们方法的关键思想是用统一的关节模型来表示角色，以便可以通过相应的部分来转移姿势。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新颖的姿势转移网络，该网络可以联合预测角色蒙皮权重和变形变换，以明确目标角色以匹配所需的姿势。我们的方法以半监督的方式进行训练，吸收所有现有的具有配对/不配对姿势和风格化形状的角色数据。它很好地概括了看不见的风格化人物和无生命的物体。我们进行了广泛的实验，并证明了我们的方法在这项新任务上的有效性。 本文提出了一种无需骨骼绑定的姿势迁移方法，用于处理风格化3D角色的多样化形状和拓扑结构。 Zhouyingcheng Liao,Jimei Yang,Jun Saito,Gerard Pons-Moll,Yang Zhou cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Léon Zheng,Gilles Puy,Elisa Riccietti,Patrick Pérez,Rémi Gribonval
title: Self-supervised learning with rotation-invariant kernels
title_zh: 使用旋转不变核的自监督学习
comment: ef:The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations, May 2023, Kigali, Rwanda
comments: ef:The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations, May 2023, Kigali, Rwanda
abstract: We introduce a regularization loss based on kernel mean embeddings with rotation-invariant kernels on the hypersphere (also known as dot-product kernels) for self-supervised learning of image representations. Besides being fully competitive with the state of the art, our method significantly reduces time and memory complexity for self-supervised training, making it implementable for very large embedding dimensions on existing devices and more easily adjustable than previous methods to settings with limited resources. Our work follows the major paradigm where the model learns to be invariant to some predefined image transformations (cropping, blurring, color jittering, etc.), while avoiding a degenerate solution by regularizing the embedding distribution. Our particular contribution is to propose a loss family promoting the embedding distribution to be close to the uniform distribution on the hypersphere, with respect to the maximum mean discrepancy pseudometric. We demonstrate that this family encompasses several regularizers of former methods, including uniformity-based and information-maximization methods, which are variants of our flexible regularization loss with different kernels. Beyond its practical consequences for state-of-the-art self-supervised learning with limited resources, the proposed generic regularization approach opens perspectives to leverage more widely the literature on kernel methods in order to improve self-supervised learning methods.
summary: We introduce a regularization loss based on kernel mean embeddings with rotation-invariant kernels on the hypersphere (also known as dot-product kernels) for self-supervised learning of image representations. Besides being fully competitive with the state of the art, our method significantly reduces time and memory complexity for self-supervised training, making it implementable for very large embedding dimensions on existing devices and more easily adjustable than previous methods to settings with limited resources. Our work follows the major paradigm where the model learns to be invariant to some predefined image transformations (cropping, blurring, color jittering, etc.), while avoiding a degenerate solution by regularizing the embedding distribution. Our particular contribution is to propose a loss family promoting the embedding distribution to be close to the uniform distribution on the hypersphere, with respect to the maximum mean discrepancy pseudometric. We demonstrate that this family encompasses several regularizers of former methods, including uniformity-based and information-maximization methods, which are variants of our flexible regularization loss with different kernels. Beyond its practical consequences for state-of-the-art self-supervised learning with limited resources, the proposed generic regularization approach opens perspectives to leverage more widely the literature on kernel methods in order to improve self-supervised learning methods.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了基于超球面上具有旋转不变内核（也称为点积内核）的内核均值嵌入的正则化损失，用于图像表示的自监督学习。除了与现有技术完全竞争之外，我们的方法还显着降低了自监督训练的时间和内存复杂性，使其可以在现有设备上实现非常大的嵌入尺寸，并且比以前的方法更容易调整资源有限的设置。我们的工作遵循主要范式，其中模型学习对某些预定义的图像变换（裁剪、模糊、颜色抖动等）保持不变，同时通过规范嵌入分布来避免退化解决方案。我们的特别贡献是提出了一个损失族，就最大平均差异伪度而言，促进嵌入分布接近超球面上的均匀分布。我们证明该家族包含以前方法的几种正则化器，包括基于均匀性和信息最大化的方法，它们是我们具有不同内核的灵活正则化损失的变体。除了对资源有限的最先进的自监督学习的实际影响之外，所提出的通用正则化方法还为更广泛地利用核方法文献以改进自监督学习方法开辟了视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于旋转不变核的正则化损失函数，用于降低自监督学习的计算和内存开销，同时提升嵌入表示的均匀性。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在资源受限场景下效率不足，且难以平衡嵌入分布的均匀性与信息量，需更高效且灵活的正则化策略。
AI.method: 利用超球面点积核构建核均值嵌入正则化损失，通过最大平均差异度量使嵌入分布逼近均匀分布，涵盖统一性与信息最大化等经典方法。
AI.result: 方法在保持SOTA性能的同时，显著降低训练复杂度，支持超大规模嵌入维度，并优于传统方法在资源受限场景的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用正则化框架为核方法在自监督学习中的应用提供了新思路，兼顾效率与表示能力，拓展了资源受限场景的研究边界。

authors_text: Pallabi Saikia,Dhwani Dholaria,Priyanka Yadav,Vaidehi Patel,Mohendra Roy
title: A Hybrid CNN-LSTM model for Video Deepfake Detection by Leveraging Optical Flow Features
title_zh: 利用光流特征进行视频 Deepfake 检测的混合 CNN-LSTM 模型
comment: ef:Copyright is with IEEE, Paper No: 832, IJCNN, 2022 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence
comments: ef:Copyright is with IEEE, Paper No: 832, IJCNN, 2022 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence
abstract: Deepfakes are the synthesized digital media in order to create ultra-realistic fake videos to trick the spectator. Deep generative algorithms, such as, Generative Adversarial Networks(GAN) are widely used to accomplish such tasks. This approach synthesizes pseudo-realistic contents that are very difficult to distinguish by traditional detection methods. In most cases, Convolutional Neural Network(CNN) based discriminators are being used for detecting such synthesized media. However, it emphasise primarily on the spatial attributes of individual video frames, thereby fail to learn the temporal information from their inter-frame relations. In this paper, we leveraged an optical flow based feature extraction approach to extract the temporal features, which are then fed to a hybrid model for classification. This hybrid model is based on the combination of CNN and recurrent neural network (RNN) architectures. The hybrid model provides effective performance on open source data-sets such as, DFDC, FF++ and Celeb-DF. This proposed method shows an accuracy of 66.26%, 91.21% and 79.49% in DFDC, FF++, and Celeb-DF respectively with a very reduced No of sample size of approx 100 samples(frames). This promises early detection of fake contents compared to existing modalities.
summary: Deepfakes are the synthesized digital media in order to create ultra-realistic fake videos to trick the spectator. Deep generative algorithms, such as, Generative Adversarial Networks(GAN) are widely used to accomplish such tasks. This approach synthesizes pseudo-realistic contents that are very difficult to distinguish by traditional detection methods. In most cases, Convolutional Neural Network(CNN) based discriminators are being used for detecting such synthesized media. However, it emphasise primarily on the spatial attributes of individual video frames, thereby fail to learn the temporal information from their inter-frame relations. In this paper, we leveraged an optical flow based feature extraction approach to extract the temporal features, which are then fed to a hybrid model for classification. This hybrid model is based on the combination of CNN and recurrent neural network (RNN) architectures. The hybrid model provides effective performance on open source data-sets such as, DFDC, FF++ and Celeb-DF. This proposed method shows an accuracy of 66.26%, 91.21% and 79.49% in DFDC, FF++, and Celeb-DF respectively with a very reduced No of sample size of approx 100 samples(frames). This promises early detection of fake contents compared to existing modalities.
abstract_zh: Deepfakes 是合成的数字媒体，旨在创建超现实的假视频来欺骗观众。深度生成算法，例如生成对抗网络（GAN），被广泛用于完成此类任务。这种方法合成了传统检测方法很难区分的伪现实内容。在大多数情况下，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的鉴别器用于检测此类合成媒体。然而，它主要强调单个视频帧的空间属性，因此无法从帧间关系中学习时间信息。在本文中，我们利用基于光流的特征提取方法来提取时间特征，然后将其输入混合模型进行分类。该混合模型基于 CNN 和循环神经网络 (RNN) 架构的组合。该混合模型在 DFDC、FF++ 和 Celeb-DF 等开源数据集上提供了有效的性能。该方法在 DFDC、FF++ 和 Celeb-DF 中的准确率分别为 66.26%、91.21% 和 79.49%，样本数量大大减少，约为 100 个样本（帧）。与现有方式相比，这有望尽早发现虚假内容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CNN和LSTM的混合模型，利用光流特征进行视频深度伪造检测。
AI.motivation: 传统基于CNN的检测方法仅关注视频帧的空间特征，无法有效学习帧间时间信息，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 通过光流提取视频的时序特征，结合CNN提取空间特征与LSTM处理时序信息，构建混合分类模型。
AI.result: 在DFDC、FF++和Celeb-DF数据集上分别达到66.26%、91.21%和79.49%的准确率，且样本量仅约100帧。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在小样本下表现优异，为深度伪造内容的早期检测提供了有效方案。

authors_text: David Torpey,Richard Klein
title: On the robustness of self-supervised representations for multi-view object classification
title_zh: 关于多视图对象分类的自监督表示的鲁棒性
abstract: It is known that representations from self-supervised pre-training can perform on par, and often better, on various downstream tasks than representations from fully-supervised pre-training. This has been shown in a host of settings such as generic object classification and detection, semantic segmentation, and image retrieval. However, some issues have recently come to the fore that demonstrate some of the failure modes of self-supervised representations, such as performance on non-ImageNet-like data, or complex scenes. In this paper, we show that self-supervised representations based on the instance discrimination objective lead to better representations of objects that are more robust to changes in the viewpoint and perspective of the object. We perform experiments of modern self-supervised methods against multiple supervised baselines to demonstrate this, including approximating object viewpoint variation through homographies, and real-world tests based on several multi-view datasets. We find that self-supervised representations are more robust to object viewpoint and appear to encode more pertinent information about objects that facilitate the recognition of objects from novel views.
summary: It is known that representations from self-supervised pre-training can perform on par, and often better, on various downstream tasks than representations from fully-supervised pre-training. This has been shown in a host of settings such as generic object classification and detection, semantic segmentation, and image retrieval. However, some issues have recently come to the fore that demonstrate some of the failure modes of self-supervised representations, such as performance on non-ImageNet-like data, or complex scenes. In this paper, we show that self-supervised representations based on the instance discrimination objective lead to better representations of objects that are more robust to changes in the viewpoint and perspective of the object. We perform experiments of modern self-supervised methods against multiple supervised baselines to demonstrate this, including approximating object viewpoint variation through homographies, and real-world tests based on several multi-view datasets. We find that self-supervised representations are more robust to object viewpoint and appear to encode more pertinent information about objects that facilitate the recognition of objects from novel views.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，自监督预训练的表示在各种下游任务上的表现与完全监督预训练的表示相当，而且往往更好。这已经在许多设置中得到了体现，例如通用对象分类和检测、语义分割和图像检索。然而，最近出现的一些问题证明了自监督表示的一些失败模式，例如非 ImageNet 类数据或复杂场景的性能。在本文中，我们表明基于实例辨别目标的自监督表示可以更好地表示对象，并且对对象的视点和视角的变化更加鲁棒。我们针对多个监督基线进行现代自监督方法的实验来证明这一点，包括通过单应性近似对象视点变化，以及基于多个多视图数据集的真实世界测试。我们发现自监督表示对于对象观点更加鲁棒，并且似乎编码了有关对象的更多相关信息，从而有助于从新颖的视图中识别对象。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自监督表示在多视角物体分类任务中的鲁棒性，并验证其在视角变化下的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督预训练在多数任务中表现优异，但其在非ImageNet-like数据或复杂场景中的表现存在不足，需验证其视角变化下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于实例区分目标的自监督方法，通过单应性模拟视角变化，并在多视角数据集上与有监督基线进行对比实验。
AI.result: 自监督表示在视角变化下表现更鲁棒，且能编码更多有助于新视角物体识别的语义信息。
AI.conclusion: 自监督表示在多视角物体分类中更具优势，可能因其学习到更通用且视角不变的物体特征。

authors_text: Theofanis P. Raptis,Claudio Cicconetti,Manolis Falelakis,Tassos Kanellos,Tomás Pariente Lobo
title: Design Guidelines for Apache Kafka Driven Data Management and Distribution in Smart Cities
title_zh: 智慧城市中 Apache Kafka 驱动的数据管理和分发设计指南
comment: This work was funded by the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme MARVEL under grant agreement No 957337. This publication reflects the authors views only. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work was funded by the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme MARVEL under grant agreement No 957337. This publication reflects the authors views only. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Smart city management is going through a remarkable transition, in terms of quality and diversity of services provided to the end-users. The stakeholders that deliver pervasive applications are now able to address fundamental challenges in the big data value chain, from data acquisition, data analysis and processing, data storage and curation, and data visualisation in real scenarios. Industry 4.0 is pushing this trend forward, demanding for servitization of products and data, also for the smart cities sector where humans, sensors and devices are operating in strict collaboration. The data produced by the ubiquitous devices must be processed quickly to allow the implementation of reactive services such as situational awareness, video surveillance and geo-localization, while always ensuring the safety and privacy of involved citizens. This paper proposes a modular architecture to (i) leverage innovative technologies for data acquisition, management and distribution (such as Apache Kafka and Apache NiFi), (ii) develop a multi-layer engineering solution for revealing valuable and hidden societal knowledge in smart cities environment, and (iii) tackle the main issues in tasks involving complex data flows and provide general guidelines to solve them. We derived some guidelines from an experimental setting performed together with leading industrial technical departments to accomplish an efficient system for monitoring and servitization of smart city assets, with a scalable platform that confirms its usefulness in numerous smart city use cases with different needs.
summary: Smart city management is going through a remarkable transition, in terms of quality and diversity of services provided to the end-users. The stakeholders that deliver pervasive applications are now able to address fundamental challenges in the big data value chain, from data acquisition, data analysis and processing, data storage and curation, and data visualisation in real scenarios. The data produced by the ubiquitous devices must be processed quickly to allow the implementation of reactive services such as situational awareness, video surveillance and geo-localization, while always ensuring the safety and privacy of involved citizens. This paper proposes a modular architecture to (i) leverage innovative technologies for data acquisition, management and distribution (such as Apache Kafka and Apache NiFi), (ii) develop a multi-layer engineering solution for revealing valuable and hidden societal knowledge in smart cities environment, and (iii) tackle the main issues in tasks involving complex data flows and provide general guidelines to solve them. We derived some guidelines from an experimental setting performed together with leading industrial technical departments to accomplish an efficient system for monitoring and servitization of smart city assets, with a scalable platform that confirms its usefulness in numerous smart city use cases with different needs.
abstract_zh: 就向最终用户提供的服务的质量和多样性而言，智慧城市管理正在经历显着的转变。提供普及应用程序的利益相关者现在能够解决大数据价值链中的基本挑战，包括数据采集、数据分析和处理、数据存储和管理以及实际场景中的数据可视化。工业 4.0 正在推动这一趋势向前发展，要求产品和数据的服务化，也要求人类、传感器和设备严格协作的智慧城市领域。无处不在的设备产生的数据必须得到快速处理，以实现态势感知、视频监控和地理定位等反应性服务，同时始终确保相关公民的安全和隐私。本文提出了一种模块化架构，以（i）利用创新技术进行数据采集、管理和分发（例如 Apache Kafka 和 Apache NiFi），（ii）开发多层工程解决方案，以揭示智慧城市环境中有价值和隐藏的社会知识，以及（iii）解决涉及复杂数据流的任务中的主要问题，并提供解决这些问题的通用指南。我们从与领先的工业技术部门一起进行的实验设置中得出了一些指导方针，以完成智慧城市资产监控和服务化的有效系统，并通过可扩展的平台确认其在具有不同需求的众多智慧城市用例中的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Apache Kafka的数据管理架构，以应对智慧城市中复杂的数据流挑战，并提供通用解决方案指南。
AI.motivation: 智慧城市需处理海量实时数据以支持服务化应用，但面临数据采集、处理、存储及隐私保护等复杂问题，需高效技术架构支持。
AI.method: 设计模块化架构，整合Apache Kafka和Apache NiFi等技术，构建多层工程解决方案，并通过工业部门实验验证指南有效性。
AI.result: 开发出可扩展平台，成功应用于多种智慧城市场景，验证了其在数据监控和服务化中的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的架构与指南有效解决了智慧城市数据管理难题，为复杂数据流处理提供了可复用的解决方案。
