authors_text: Francesco Zola,Jose Alvaro Fernandez-Carrasco,Jan Lukas Bruse,Mikel Galar,Zeno Geradts
title: Verification system based on long-range iris and Graph Siamese Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于远距离虹膜和图连体神经网络的验证系统
comment: Accepted to 2022 3rd Symposium on Pattern Recognition and Applications
comments: Accepted to 2022 3rd Symposium on Pattern Recognition and Applications
abstract: Biometric systems represent valid solutions in tasks like user authentication and verification, since they are able to analyze physical and behavioural features with high precision. However, especially when physical biometrics are used, as is the case of iris recognition, they require specific hardware such as retina scanners, sensors, or HD cameras to achieve relevant results. At the same time, they require the users to be very close to the camera to extract high-resolution information. For this reason, in this work, we propose a novel approach that uses long-range (LR) distance images for implementing an iris verification system. More specifically, we present a novel methodology for converting LR iris images into graphs and then use Graph Siamese Neural Networks (GSNN) to predict whether two graphs belong to the same person. In this study, we not only describe this methodology but also evaluate how the spectral components of these images can be used for improving the graph extraction and the final classification task. Results demonstrate the suitability of this approach, encouraging the community to explore graph application in biometric systems.
summary: Biometric systems represent valid solutions in tasks like user authentication and verification, since they are able to analyze physical and behavioural features with high precision. However, especially when physical biometrics are used, as is the case of iris recognition, they require specific hardware such as retina scanners, sensors, or HD cameras to achieve relevant results. At the same time, they require the users to be very close to the camera to extract high-resolution information. For this reason, in this work, we propose a novel approach that uses long-range (LR) distance images for implementing an iris verification system. More specifically, we present a novel methodology for converting LR iris images into graphs and then use Graph Siamese Neural Networks (GSNN) to predict whether two graphs belong to the same person. In this study, we not only describe this methodology but also evaluate how the spectral components of these images can be used for improving the graph extraction and the final classification task. Results demonstrate the suitability of this approach, encouraging the community to explore graph application in biometric systems.
abstract_zh: 生物识别系统代表了用户身份验证和验证等任务的有效解决方案，因为它们能够高精度分析身体和行为特征。然而，特别是当使用物理生物识别技术时，例如虹膜识别，它们需要特定的硬件，例如视网膜扫描仪、传感器或高清摄像头才能获得相关结果。同时，它们要求用户非常靠近相机才能提取高分辨率信息。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用长距离（LR）距离图像来实现虹膜验证系统的新颖方法。更具体地说，我们提出了一种将 LR 虹膜图像转换为图形的新颖方法，然后使用图形连体神经网络（GSNN）来预测两个图形是否属于同一个人。在本研究中，我们不仅描述了这种方法，还评估了如何使用这些图像的光谱分量来改进图提取和最终分类任务。结果证明了这种方法的适用性，鼓励社区探索生物识别系统中的图形应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于远距离虹膜图像和图孪生神经网络（GSNN）的验证系统，解决传统虹膜识别对近距离和专用硬件的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 传统虹膜识别需要高精度硬件和用户近距离配合，限制了实际应用。本文旨在通过远距离图像和图神经网络降低硬件要求并提升实用性。
AI.method: 将远距离虹膜图像转换为图结构，利用图孪生神经网络判断两图是否属于同一人，并通过分析图像频谱成分优化图提取与分类过程。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在远距离虹膜验证中的有效性，证明其在准确性和硬件适应性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为远距离生物特征识别提供了新思路，展示了图神经网络在生物特征系统中的潜力，值得进一步探索。

search_text: Verification system based on long-range iris and Graph Siamese Neural Networks 基于远距离虹膜和图连体神经网络的验证系统 Biometric systems represent valid solutions in tasks like user authentication and verification, since they are able to analyze physical and behavioural features with high precision. However, especially when physical biometrics are used, as is the case of iris recognition, they require specific hardware such as retina scanners, sensors, or HD cameras to achieve relevant results. At the same time, they require the users to be very close to the camera to extract high-resolution information. For this reason, in this work, we propose a novel approach that uses long-range (LR) distance images for implementing an iris verification system. More specifically, we present a novel methodology for converting LR iris images into graphs and then use Graph Siamese Neural Networks (GSNN) to predict whether two graphs belong to the same person. In this study, we not only describe this methodology but also evaluate how the spectral components of these images can be used for improving the graph extraction and the final classification task. Results demonstrate the suitability of this approach, encouraging the community to explore graph application in biometric systems. 生物识别系统代表了用户身份验证和验证等任务的有效解决方案，因为它们能够高精度分析身体和行为特征。然而，特别是当使用物理生物识别技术时，例如虹膜识别，它们需要特定的硬件，例如视网膜扫描仪、传感器或高清摄像头才能获得相关结果。同时，它们要求用户非常靠近相机才能提取高分辨率信息。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用长距离（LR）距离图像来实现虹膜验证系统的新颖方法。更具体地说，我们提出了一种将 LR 虹膜图像转换为图形的新颖方法，然后使用图形连体神经网络（GSNN）来预测两个图形是否属于同一个人。在本研究中，我们不仅描述了这种方法，还评估了如何使用这些图像的光谱分量来改进图提取和最终分类任务。结果证明了这种方法的适用性，鼓励社区探索生物识别系统中的图形应用。 本文提出一种基于远距离虹膜图像和图孪生神经网络（GSNN）的验证系统，解决传统虹膜识别对近距离和专用硬件的依赖问题。 Francesco Zola,Jose Alvaro Fernandez-Carrasco,Jan Lukas Bruse,Mikel Galar,Zeno Geradts cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Selvarajah Thuseethan,Chathrie Wimalasooriya,Shanmuganathan Vasanthapriyan
title: Deep COVID-19 Recognition using Chest X-ray Images: A Comparative Analysis
title_zh: 使用胸部 X 射线图像进行深度 COVID-19 识别：比较分析
abstract: The novel coronavirus variant, which is also widely known as COVID-19, is currently a common threat to all humans across the world. Effective recognition of COVID-19 using advanced machine learning methods is a timely need. Although many sophisticated approaches have been proposed in the recent past, they still struggle to achieve expected performances in recognizing COVID-19 using chest X-ray images. In addition, the majority of them are involved with the complex pre-processing task, which is often challenging and time-consuming. Meanwhile, deep networks are end-to-end and have shown promising results in image-based recognition tasks during the last decade. Hence, in this work, some widely used state-of-the-art deep networks are evaluated for COVID-19 recognition with chest X-ray images. All the deep networks are evaluated on a publicly available chest X-ray image dataset. The evaluation results show that the deep networks can effectively recognize COVID-19 from chest X-ray images. Further, the comparison results reveal that the EfficientNetB7 network outperformed other existing state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: The novel coronavirus variant, which is also widely known as COVID-19, is currently a common threat to all humans across the world. Effective recognition of COVID-19 using advanced machine learning methods is a timely need. Although many sophisticated approaches have been proposed in the recent past, they still struggle to achieve expected performances in recognizing COVID-19 using chest X-ray images. In addition, the majority of them are involved with the complex pre-processing task, which is often challenging and time-consuming. Meanwhile, deep networks are end-to-end and have shown promising results in image-based recognition tasks during the last decade. Hence, in this work, some widely used state-of-the-art deep networks are evaluated for COVID-19 recognition with chest X-ray images. All the deep networks are evaluated on a publicly available chest X-ray image dataset. The evaluation results show that the deep networks can effectively recognize COVID-19 from chest X-ray images. Further, the comparison results reveal that the EfficientNetB7 network outperformed other existing state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 这种新型冠状病毒变种，也被广泛称为 COVID-19，目前是全世界人类面临的共同威胁。迫切需要使用先进的机器学习方法有效识别 COVID-19。尽管最近提出了许多复杂的方法，但它们在使用胸部 X 射线图像识别 COVID-19 方面仍然难以达到预期的性能。此外，他们中的大多数人都涉及复杂的预处理任务，这通常具有挑战性且耗时。与此同时，深度网络是端到端的，并且在过去十年中在基于图像的识别任务中显示出了有希望的结果。因此，在这项工作中，我们评估了一些广泛使用的最先进的深度网络，以通过胸部 X 射线图像识别 COVID-19。所有深度网络均在公开的胸部 X 射线图像数据集上进行评估。评估结果表明，深度网络可以有效地从胸部X光图像中识别COVID-19。此外，比较结果表明，EfficientNetB7 网络的性能优于其他现有的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较多种深度学习网络在胸部X光图像上的表现，评估其在COVID-19识别中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在COVID-19识别中存在性能不足且预处理复杂的问题，而深度网络具有端到端处理优势，适合图像识别任务。
AI.method: 在公开的胸部X光数据集上测试多种先进深度学习网络（包括EfficientNetB7），对比其识别效果。
AI.result: 深度网络能有效识别COVID-19，其中EfficientNetB7在所有测试模型中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法适用于COVID-19的胸部X光识别，EfficientNetB7是当前最优方案。

authors_text: Lijun Wei,Valerie Gouet-Brunet,Anthony Cohn
title: Location retrieval using visible landmarks based qualitative place signatures
title_zh: 使用基于可见地标的定性地点特征进行位置检索
abstract: Location retrieval based on visual information is to retrieve the location of an agent (e.g. human, robot) or the area they see by comparing the observations with a certain form of representation of the environment. Existing methods generally require precise measurement and storage of the observed environment features, which may not always be robust due to the change of season, viewpoint, occlusion, etc. They are also challenging to scale up and may not be applicable for humans due to the lack of measuring/imaging devices. Considering that humans often use less precise but easily produced qualitative spatial language and high-level semantic landmarks when describing an environment, a qualitative location retrieval method is proposed in this work by describing locations/places using qualitative place signatures (QPS), defined as the perceived spatial relations between ordered pairs of co-visible landmarks from viewers' perspective. After dividing the space into place cells each with individual signatures attached, a coarse-to-fine location retrieval method is proposed to efficiently identify the possible location(s) of viewers based on their qualitative observations. The usability and effectiveness of the proposed method were evaluated using openly available landmark datasets, together with simulated observations by considering the possible perception error.
summary: Location retrieval based on visual information is to retrieve the location of an agent (e.g. human, robot) or the area they see by comparing the observations with a certain form of representation of the environment. Existing methods generally require precise measurement and storage of the observed environment features, which may not always be robust due to the change of season, viewpoint, occlusion, etc. They are also challenging to scale up and may not be applicable for humans due to the lack of measuring/imaging devices. Considering that humans often use less precise but easily produced qualitative spatial language and high-level semantic landmarks when describing an environment, a qualitative location retrieval method is proposed in this work by describing locations/places using qualitative place signatures (QPS), defined as the perceived spatial relations between ordered pairs of co-visible landmarks from viewers' perspective. After dividing the space into place cells each with individual signatures attached, a coarse-to-fine location retrieval method is proposed to efficiently identify the possible location(s) of viewers based on their qualitative observations. The usability and effectiveness of the proposed method were evaluated using openly available landmark datasets, together with simulated observations by considering the possible perception error.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉信息的位置检索是通过将观察结果与环境的某种形式的表示进行比较来检索代理（例如人类、机器人）的位置或他们看到的区域。现有方法通常需要对观察到的环境特征进行精确测量和存储，由于季节、视角、遮挡等变化，这些特征可能并不总是鲁棒的。它们在规模化方面也具有挑战性，并且由于缺乏测量/成像设备，可能不适用于人类。考虑到人类在描述环境时经常使用不太精确但容易产生的定性空间语言和高级语义地标，本文提出了一种定性位置检索方法，通过使用定性地点签名（QPS）来描述位置/地点，QPS被定义为从观看者的角度来看有序的共可见地标对之间的感知空间关系。将空间划分为位置单元后，每个位置单元都附加有单独的签名，提出了一种从粗到细的位置检索方法，以根据观看者的定性观察有效地识别观看者的可能位置。使用公开可用的地标数据集以及考虑可能的感知误差的模拟观察来评估所提出方法的可用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可见地标定性场所签名的定位检索方法，通过描述观察者视角下地标间的空间关系实现高效定位。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位方法依赖精确特征测量，易受季节变化、视角差异和遮挡影响，且难以扩展至人类应用场景。
AI.method: 定义定性场所签名（QPS）描述地标间空间关系，将空间划分为带签名的场所单元，采用粗到细的检索策略匹配观察者描述。
AI.result: 在公开地标数据集和模拟感知误差下验证了方法的有效性，证明其在鲁棒性和可扩展性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入人类易用的定性空间描述，为视觉定位提供了更符合认知习惯且适应性强的解决方案。

The usability and effectiveness of the proposed method were evaluated using openly available landmark datasets, together with simulated observations by considering the possible perception error. 基于视觉信息的位置检索是通过将观察结果与环境的某种形式的表示进行比较来检索代理（例如人类、机器人）的位置或他们看到的区域。现有方法通常需要对观察到的环境特征进行精确测量和存储，由于季节、视角、遮挡等变化，这些特征可能并不总是鲁棒的。它们在规模化方面也具有挑战性，并且由于缺乏测量/成像设备，可能不适用于人类。考虑到人类在描述环境时经常使用不太精确但容易产生的定性空间语言和高级语义地标，本文提出了一种定性位置检索方法，通过使用定性地点签名（QPS）来描述位置/地点，QPS被定义为从观看者的角度来看有序的共可见地标对之间的感知空间关系。将空间划分为位置单元后，每个位置单元都附加有单独的签名，提出了一种从粗到细的位置检索方法，以根据观看者的定性观察有效地识别观看者的可能位置。使用公开可用的地标数据集以及考虑可能的感知误差的模拟观察来评估所提出方法的可用性和有效性。 本文提出一种基于可见地标定性场所签名的定位检索方法，通过描述观察者视角下地标间的空间关系实现高效定位。 Lijun Wei,Valerie Gouet-Brunet,Anthony Cohn cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ričards Marcinkevičs,Ece Ozkan,Julia E. Vogt
title: Debiasing Deep Chest X-Ray Classifiers using Intra- and Post-processing Methods
title_zh: 使用帧内和后处理方法消除深部胸部 X 射线分类器的偏差
abstract: Deep neural networks for image-based screening and computer-aided diagnosis have achieved expert-level performance on various medical imaging modalities, including chest radiographs. Recently, several works have indicated that these state-of-the-art classifiers can be biased with respect to sensitive patient attributes, such as race or gender, leading to growing concerns about demographic disparities and discrimination resulting from algorithmic and model-based decision-making in healthcare. Fair machine learning has focused on mitigating such biases against disadvantaged or marginalised groups, mainly concentrating on tabular data or natural images. This work presents two novel intra-processing techniques based on fine-tuning and pruning an already-trained neural network. These methods are simple yet effective and can be readily applied post hoc in a setting where the protected attribute is unknown during the model development and test time. In addition, we compare several intra- and post-processing approaches applied to debiasing deep chest X-ray classifiers. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the first efforts studying debiasing methods on chest radiographs. Our results suggest that the considered approaches successfully mitigate biases in fully connected and convolutional neural networks offering stable performance under various settings. The discussed methods can help achieve group fairness of deep medical image classifiers when deploying them in domains with different fairness considerations and constraints.
summary: Deep neural networks for image-based screening and computer-aided diagnosis have achieved expert-level performance on various medical imaging modalities, including chest radiographs. Recently, several works have indicated that these state-of-the-art classifiers can be biased with respect to sensitive patient attributes, such as race or gender, leading to growing concerns about demographic disparities and discrimination resulting from algorithmic and model-based decision-making in healthcare. Fair machine learning has focused on mitigating such biases against disadvantaged or marginalised groups, mainly concentrating on tabular data or natural images. This work presents two novel intra-processing techniques based on fine-tuning and pruning an already-trained neural network. These methods are simple yet effective and can be readily applied post hoc in a setting where the protected attribute is unknown during the model development and test time. In addition, we compare several intra- and post-processing approaches applied to debiasing deep chest X-ray classifiers. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the first efforts studying debiasing methods on chest radiographs. Our results suggest that the considered approaches successfully mitigate biases in fully connected and convolutional neural networks offering stable performance under various settings. The discussed methods can help achieve group fairness of deep medical image classifiers when deploying them in domains with different fairness considerations and constraints.
abstract_zh: 用于基于图像的筛查和计算机辅助诊断的深度神经网络已在包括胸片在内的各种医学成像模式上实现了专家级的性能。最近，一些研究表明，这些最先进的分类器可能会对敏感的患者属性（例如种族或性别）产生偏见，导致人们越来越担心医疗保健中基于算法和模型的决策所造成的人口差异和歧视。公平机器学习的重点是减轻针对弱势或边缘群体的偏见，主要集中在表格数据或自然图像上。这项工作提出了两种基于微调和修剪已经训练的神经网络的新颖的内部处理技术。这些方法简单而有效，并且可以在模型开发和测试期间受保护属性未知的情况下轻松应用。此外，我们还比较了几种应用于深部胸部 X 射线分类器去偏的帧内和后处理方法。据我们所知，这是研究胸部X光片去偏方法的首批努力之一。我们的结果表明，所考虑的方法成功地减轻了全连接和卷积神经网络中的偏差，在各种设置下提供稳定的性能。当将深度医学图像分类器部署在具有不同公平性考虑和约束的领域时，所讨论的方法可以帮助实现深度医学图像分类器的群体公平性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新的内部处理技术（微调和剪枝）以及比较多种内外部处理方法，用于减少深度胸片分类器中的偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在医疗影像分类中可能存在对敏感属性（如种族、性别）的偏见，导致医疗决策中的不公平现象，需在保证性能的同时实现算法公平性。
AI.method: 基于微调和剪枝的内部处理技术，以及多种内外部处理方法，适用于模型训练和测试阶段均未知敏感属性的场景。
AI.result: 实验表明这些方法能有效缓解全连接网络和卷积神经网络中的偏见，在不同设置下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可帮助医疗图像分类器在不同公平性约束场景下实现群体公平性，为医疗AI的公平部署提供可行方案。

authors_text: Giang Nguyen,Mohammad Reza Taesiri,Anh Nguyen
title: Visual correspondence-based explanations improve AI robustness and human-AI team accuracy
title_zh: 基于视觉对应的解释提高了人工智能的鲁棒性和人类人工智能团队的准确性
abstract: Explaining artificial intelligence (AI) predictions is increasingly important and even imperative in many high-stakes applications where humans are the ultimate decision-makers. In this work, we propose two novel architectures of self-interpretable image classifiers that first explain, and then predict (as opposed to post-hoc explanations) by harnessing the visual correspondences between a query image and exemplars. Our models consistently improve (by 1 to 4 points) on out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets while performing marginally worse (by 1 to 2 points) on in-distribution tests than ResNet-50 and a $k$-nearest neighbor classifier (kNN). Via a large-scale, human study on ImageNet and CUB, our correspondence-based explanations are found to be more useful to users than kNN explanations. Our explanations help users more accurately reject AI's wrong decisions than all other tested methods. Interestingly, for the first time, we show that it is possible to achieve complementary human-AI team accuracy (i.e., that is higher than either AI-alone or human-alone), in ImageNet and CUB image classification tasks.
summary: Explaining artificial intelligence (AI) predictions is increasingly important and even imperative in many high-stakes applications where humans are the ultimate decision-makers. In this work, we propose two novel architectures of self-interpretable image classifiers that first explain, and then predict (as opposed to post-hoc explanations) by harnessing the visual correspondences between a query image and exemplars. Our models consistently improve (by 1 to 4 points) on out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets while performing marginally worse (by 1 to 2 points) on in-distribution tests than ResNet-50 and a $k$-nearest neighbor classifier (kNN). Via a large-scale, human study on ImageNet and CUB, our correspondence-based explanations are found to be more useful to users than kNN explanations. Our explanations help users more accurately reject AI's wrong decisions than all other tested methods. Interestingly, for the first time, we show that it is possible to achieve complementary human-AI team accuracy (i.e., that is higher than either AI-alone or human-alone), in ImageNet and CUB image classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 在人类是最终决策者的许多高风险应用中，解释人工智能 (AI) 预测变得越来越重要，甚至势在必行。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种新颖的可自解释图像分类器架构，它们首先解释，然后通过利用查询图像和样本之间的视觉对应关系进行预测（而不是事后解释）。我们的模型在分布外 (OOD) 数据集上持续改进（提高了 1 到 4 个点），而在分布内测试中的表现比 ResNet-50 和 $k$ 最近邻分类器 (kNN) 稍差（1 到 2 个点）。通过对 ImageNet 和 CUB 进行的大规模人类研究，发现我们基于对应关系的解释比 kNN 解释对用户更有用。与所有其他经过测试的方法相比，我们的解释可以帮助用户更准确地拒绝人工智能的错误决策。有趣的是，我们首次证明，在 ImageNet 和 CUB 图像分类任务中，可以实现人类与人工智能团队的互补准确率（即高于单独人工智能或单独人类）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于视觉对应关系的自解释图像分类器架构，通过先解释再预测的方式提升AI鲁棒性和人机协作准确性。
AI.motivation: 在需要人类最终决策的高风险场景中，AI预测的可解释性至关重要。现有事后解释方法存在局限，需开发能直接生成有效解释的模型以增强人机协作可靠性。
AI.method: 设计两种新型自解释分类器，利用查询图像与示例间的视觉对应关系生成解释并进行预测，通过大规模人类实验验证解释效果。
AI.result: 在分布外数据集上性能提升1-4个百分点，分布内测试略逊于ResNet-50和kNN；人类实验表明其解释比kNN更有效，可帮助用户更准确拒绝AI错误决策，并首次实现人机协作准确率超越单独使用AI或人类。
AI.conclusion: 将视觉对应关系融入模型解释机制可显著提升AI鲁棒性及人机协作效能，为高风险场景的可解释AI应用提供新方向。

authors_text: Adel Nabli,Edouard Oyallon
title: DADAO: Decoupled Accelerated Decentralized Asynchronous Optimization
title_zh: DADAO：解耦加速去中心化异步优化
comment: International Conference on Machine Learning, Jul 2023, Honolulu, United States
comments: International Conference on Machine Learning, Jul 2023, Honolulu, United States
abstract: This work introduces DADAO: the first decentralized, accelerated, asynchronous, primal, first-order algorithm to minimize a sum of $L$-smooth and $μ$-strongly convex functions distributed over a given network of size $n$. Our key insight is based on modeling the local gradient updates and gossip communication procedures with separate independent Poisson Point Processes. This allows us to decouple the computation and communication steps, which can be run in parallel, while making the whole approach completely asynchronous. This leads to communication acceleration compared to synchronous approaches. Our new method employs primal gradients and does not use a multi-consensus inner loop nor other ad-hoc mechanisms such as Error Feedback, Gradient Tracking, or a Proximal operator. By relating the inverse of the smallest positive eigenvalue of the Laplacian matrix $χ_1$ and the maximal resistance $χ_2\leq χ_1$ of the graph to a sufficient minimal communication rate between the nodes of the network, we show that our algorithm requires $\mathcal{O}(n\sqrt{\frac{L}μ}\log(\frac{1}ε))$ local gradients and only $\mathcal{O}(n\sqrt{χ_1χ_2}\sqrt{\frac{L}μ}\log(\frac{1}ε))$ communications to reach a precision $ε$, up to logarithmic terms. Thus, we simultaneously obtain an accelerated rate for both computations and communications, leading to an improvement over state-of-the-art works, our simulations further validating the strength of our relatively unconstrained method.

This leads to communication acceleration compared to synchronous approaches. Our new method employs primal gradients and does not use a multi-consensus inner loop nor other ad-hoc mechanisms such as Error Feedback, Gradient Tracking, or a Proximal operator. By relating the inverse of the smallest positive eigenvalue of the Laplacian matrix $χ_1$ and the maximal resistance $χ_2\leq χ_1$ of the graph to a sufficient minimal communication rate between the nodes of the network, we show that our algorithm requires $\mathcal{O}(n\sqrt{\frac{L}μ}\log(\frac{1}ε))$ local gradients and only $\mathcal{O}(n\sqrt{χ_1χ_2}\sqrt{\frac{L}μ}\log(\frac{1}ε))$ communications to reach a precision $ε$, up to logarithmic terms. Thus, we simultaneously obtain an accelerated rate for both computations and communications, leading to an improvement over state-of-the-art works, our simulations further validating the strength of our relatively unconstrained method.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了 DADAO：第一个去中心化、加速、异步、原始、一阶算法，用于最小化分布在给定大小 $n$ 网络上的 $L$-平滑函数和 $μ$-强凸函数之和。我们的主要见解是基于使用单独的独立泊松点过程对局部梯度更新和八卦通信过程进行建模。这使我们能够解耦计算和通信步骤，这些步骤可以并行运行，同时使整个方法完全异步。与同步方法相比，这导致通信加速。我们的新方法采用原始梯度，不使用多重共识内循环，也不使用其他临时机制，例如误差反馈、梯度跟踪或近端算子。通过将拉普拉斯矩阵 $χ_1$ 的最小正特征值的倒数和图的最大电阻 $χ_2\leq χ_1$ 与网络节点之间足够的最小通信速率相关联，我们表明我们的算法需要 $\mathcal{O}(n\sqrt{\frac{L}μ}\log(\frac{1}ε))$ 局部梯度，并且仅$\mathcal{O}(n\sqrt{χ_1χ_2}\sqrt{\frac{L}μ}\log(\frac{1}ε))$通信以达到精度$ε$，最高可达对数项。因此，我们同时获得了计算和通信的加速率，从而改进了最先进的工作，我们的模拟进一步验证了我们相对不受约束的方法的强度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DADAO算法，一种新型去中心化异步优化方法，通过解耦计算与通信步骤实现分布式网络中的高效优化。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式优化算法存在同步通信瓶颈或依赖复杂机制（如多共识、误差反馈等），难以兼顾效率与简洁性。
AI.method: 基于泊松点过程建模本地梯度更新与通信过程，解耦计算与通信步骤并完全异步执行，无需多共识或近端算子，通过图谱特征值关联通信效率。
AI.result: 算法达到ε精度时需$\\mathcal{O}(n\\sqrt{L/μ}\\log(1/ε))$次本地梯度计算和$\\mathcal{O}(n\\sqrt{χ_1χ_2}\\sqrt{L/μ}\\log(1/ε))$次通信，实现计算与通信加速，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DADAO通过解耦异步设计在无需复杂机制的前提下，同时优化计算与通信效率，验证了其在分布式优化中的有效性。

authors_text: Abdelrahman Mohamed,Rushali Grandhe,K J Joseph,Salman Khan,Fahad Khan
title: D3Former: Debiased Dual Distilled Transformer for Incremental Learning
title_zh: D3Former：用于增量学习的去偏双蒸馏变压器
abstract: In class incremental learning (CIL) setting, groups of classes are introduced to a model in each learning phase. The goal is to learn a unified model performant on all the classes observed so far. Given the recent popularity of Vision Transformers (ViTs) in conventional classification settings, an interesting question is to study their continual learning behaviour. In this work, we develop a Debiased Dual Distilled Transformer for CIL dubbed $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$. The proposed model leverages a hybrid nested ViT design to ensure data efficiency and scalability to small as well as large datasets. In contrast to a recent ViT based CIL approach, our $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ does not dynamically expand its architecture when new tasks are learned and remains suitable for a large number of incremental tasks. The improved CIL behaviour of $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ owes to two fundamental changes to the ViT design. First, we treat the incremental learning as a long-tail classification problem where the majority samples from new classes vastly outnumber the limited exemplars available for old classes. To avoid the bias against the minority old classes, we propose to dynamically adjust logits to emphasize on retaining the representations relevant to old tasks. Second, we propose to preserve the configuration of spatial attention maps as the learning progresses across tasks. This helps in reducing catastrophic forgetting by constraining the model to retain the attention on the most discriminative regions. $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ obtains favorable results on incremental versions of CIFAR-100, MNIST, SVHN, and ImageNet datasets. Code is available at https://tinyurl.com/d3former

First, we treat the incremental learning as a long-tail classification problem where the majority samples from new classes vastly outnumber the limited exemplars available for old classes. To avoid the bias against the minority old classes, we propose to dynamically adjust logits to emphasize on retaining the representations relevant to old tasks. abstract_zh: 在班级增量学习（CIL）设置中，在每个学习阶段将班级组引入模型。目标是学习一个在迄今为止观察到的所有类别上表现良好的统一模型。鉴于视觉变换器（ViT）最近在传统分类环境中的流行，一个有趣的问题是研究它们的持续学习行为。在这项工作中，我们为 CIL 开发了一个去偏双蒸馏变压器，称为 $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$。所提出的模型利用混合嵌套 ViT 设计来确保小型和大型数据集的数据效率和可扩展性。与最近基于 ViT 的 CIL 方法相比，我们的 $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ 在学习新任务时不会动态扩展其架构，并且仍然适合大量增量任务。 $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ 改进的 CIL 行为归功于 ViT 设计的两个根本性变化。首先，我们将增量学习视为长尾分类问题，其中来自新类别的大多数样本远远超过旧类别可用的有限样本。为了避免对少数旧类的偏见，我们建议动态调整 logits 以强调保留与旧任务相关的表示。其次，我们建议随着任务学习的进展保留空间注意力图的配置。这有助于通过限制模型将注意力保留在最具辨别力的区域来减少灾难性遗忘。 $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ 在 CIFAR-100、MNIST、SVHN 和 ImageNet 数据集的增量版本上获得了良好的结果。代码可在 https://tinyurl.com/d3former 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为D³Former的去偏双蒸馏Transformer模型，用于解决类增量学习（CIL）中的灾难性遗忘和新旧类样本不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Vision Transformer（ViT）在常规分类任务中表现优异，但其在增量学习场景下存在架构动态扩展需求高、对旧类样本遗忘严重等问题，亟需设计更适用于增量学习的ViT结构。
AI.method: 提出两种核心改进：1) 将增量学习视为长尾分类问题，通过动态调整logits增强对旧类特征的保留；2) 固定空间注意力图配置以约束模型关注最具判别性的区域，减少参数更新对旧知识的破坏。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、MNIST、SVHN和ImageNet等数据集的增量学习版本上取得优于现有ViT基CIL方法的性能，且无需动态扩展模型架构。
AI.conclusion: D³Former通过解耦注意力机制与分类头的更新策略，有效缓解了ViT在增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，为大规模类增量场景提供了高效解决方案。

Second, we propose to preserve the configuration of spatial attention maps as the learning progresses across tasks. This helps in reducing catastrophic forgetting by constraining the model to retain the attention on the most discriminative regions. $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ obtains favorable results on incremental versions of CIFAR-100, MNIST, SVHN, and ImageNet datasets. Code is available at https://tinyurl.com/d3former 在班级增量学习（CIL）设置中，在每个学习阶段将班级组引入模型。目标是学习一个在迄今为止观察到的所有类别上表现良好的统一模型。鉴于视觉变换器（ViT）最近在传统分类环境中的流行，一个有趣的问题是研究它们的持续学习行为。在这项工作中，我们为 CIL 开发了一个去偏双蒸馏变压器，称为 $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$。所提出的模型利用混合嵌套 ViT 设计来确保小型和大型数据集的数据效率和可扩展性。与最近基于 ViT 的 CIL 方法相比，我们的 $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ 在学习新任务时不会动态扩展其架构，并且仍然适合大量增量任务。 $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ 改进的 CIL 行为归功于 ViT 设计的两个根本性变化。首先，我们将增量学习视为长尾分类问题，其中来自新类别的大多数样本远远超过旧类别可用的有限样本。为了避免对少数旧类的偏见，我们建议动态调整 logits 以强调保留与旧任务相关的表示。其次，我们建议随着任务学习的进展保留空间注意力图的配置。这有助于通过限制模型将注意力保留在最具辨别力的区域来减少灾难性遗忘。 $\textrm{D}^3\textrm{Former}$ 在 CIFAR-100、MNIST、SVHN 和 ImageNet 数据集的增量版本上获得了良好的结果。代码可在 https://tinyurl.com/d3former 获取 本文提出了一种名为D³Former的去偏双蒸馏Transformer模型，用于解决类增量学习（CIL）中的灾难性遗忘和新旧类样本不平衡问题。 Abdelrahman Mohamed,Rushali Grandhe,K J Joseph,Salman Khan,Fahad Khan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yiheng Li,Connelly Barnes,Kun Huang,Fang-Lue Zhang
title: Deep 360$^\circ$ Optical Flow Estimation Based on Multi-Projection Fusion
title_zh: 基于多投影融合的深度360$^\circ$光流估计
abstract: Optical flow computation is essential in the early stages of the video processing pipeline. This paper focuses on a less explored problem in this area, the 360$^\circ$ optical flow estimation using deep neural networks to support increasingly popular VR applications. To address the distortions of panoramic representations when applying convolutional neural networks, we propose a novel multi-projection fusion framework that fuses the optical flow predicted by the models trained using different projection methods. It learns to combine the complementary information in the optical flow results under different projections. We also build the first large-scale panoramic optical flow dataset to support the training of neural networks and the evaluation of panoramic optical flow estimation methods. The experimental results on our dataset demonstrate that our method outperforms the existing methods and other alternative deep networks that were developed for processing 360° content.
summary: Optical flow computation is essential in the early stages of the video processing pipeline. This paper focuses on a less explored problem in this area, the 360$^\circ$ optical flow estimation using deep neural networks to support increasingly popular VR applications. To address the distortions of panoramic representations when applying convolutional neural networks, we propose a novel multi-projection fusion framework that fuses the optical flow predicted by the models trained using different projection methods. It learns to combine the complementary information in the optical flow results under different projections. We also build the first large-scale panoramic optical flow dataset to support the training of neural networks and the evaluation of panoramic optical flow estimation methods. The experimental results on our dataset demonstrate that our method outperforms the existing methods and other alternative deep networks that were developed for processing 360° content.
abstract_zh: 光流计算在视频处理管道的早期阶段至关重要。本文重点讨论该领域一个较少探讨的问题，即使用深度神经网络进行 360$^\circ$ 光流估计，以支持日益流行的 VR 应用。为了解决应用卷积神经网络时全景表示的失真问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多投影融合框架，该框架融合了使用不同投影方法训练的模型预测的光流。它学习结合不同投影下光流结果中的互补信息。我们还构建了第一个大规模全景光流数据集，以支持神经网络的训练和全景光流估计方法的评估。我们数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于现有方法和其他为处理 360° 内容而开发的替代深度网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多投影融合的深度学习方法，用于解决360°全景视频光流估计问题，以支持虚拟现实应用。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在处理全景图像时存在投影失真问题，而现有方法缺乏针对360°光流估计的有效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多投影融合框架，结合不同投影方式训练的模型预测结果，并构建首个大规模全景光流数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有算法及其他针对360°内容的深度网络。
AI.conclusion: 多投影融合策略有效缓解了全景投影失真问题，为VR场景下的光流估计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zheng Tong,Tao Ma,Ju Huyan,Weiguang Zhang
title: Pavementscapes: a large-scale hierarchical image dataset for asphalt pavement damage segmentation
title_zh: Pavementscapes：用于沥青路面损伤分割的大规模分层图像数据集
abstract: Pavement damage segmentation has benefited enormously from deep learning. % and large-scale datasets. However, few current public datasets limit the potential exploration of deep learning in the application of pavement damage segmentation. To address this problem, this study has proposed Pavementscapes, a large-scale dataset to develop and evaluate methods for pavement damage segmentation. Pavementscapes is comprised of 4,000 images with a resolution of $1024 \times 2048$, which have been recorded in the real-world pavement inspection projects with 15 different pavements. A total of 8,680 damage instances are manually labeled with six damage classes at the pixel level. The statistical study gives a thorough investigation and analysis of the proposed dataset. The numeral experiments propose the top-performing deep neural networks capable of segmenting pavement damages, which provides the baselines of the open challenge for pavement inspection. The experiment results also indicate the existing problems for damage segmentation using deep learning, and this study provides potential solutions.
summary: Pavement damage segmentation has benefited enormously from deep learning. % and large-scale datasets. However, few current public datasets limit the potential exploration of deep learning in the application of pavement damage segmentation. To address this problem, this study has proposed Pavementscapes, a large-scale dataset to develop and evaluate methods for pavement damage segmentation. Pavementscapes is comprised of 4,000 images with a resolution of $1024 \times 2048$, which have been recorded in the real-world pavement inspection projects with 15 different pavements. A total of 8,680 damage instances are manually labeled with six damage classes at the pixel level. The statistical study gives a thorough investigation and analysis of the proposed dataset. The numeral experiments propose the top-performing deep neural networks capable of segmenting pavement damages, which provides the baselines of the open challenge for pavement inspection. The experiment results also indicate the existing problems for damage segmentation using deep learning, and this study provides potential solutions.
abstract_zh: 路面损坏分割极大地受益于深度学习。 % 和大规模数据集。然而，当前的公共数据集很少限制深度学习在路面损伤分割应用中的潜在探索。为了解决这个问题，本研究提出了 Pavementscapes，这是一个用于开发和评估路面损坏分割方法的大型数据集。 Pavementscapes 由 4,000 张分辨率为 $1024 × 2048$ 的图像组成，这些图像是在 15 个不同路面的真实路面检查项目中记录的。总共 8,680 个损坏实例在像素级别手动标记为 6 个损坏类别。统计研究对所提出的数据集进行了彻底的调查和分析。数字实验提出了能够分割路面损坏的性能最佳的深度神经网络，这为路面检查的公开挑战提供了基线。实验结果也表明了深度学习损伤分割存在的问题，本研究提供了潜在的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pavementscapes数据集，用于沥青路面损伤分割，包含4000张高分辨率图像和8680个像素级标注的损伤实例，旨在推动深度学习在该领域的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有公共数据集规模有限，难以充分支持深度学习在路面损伤分割中的探索与应用。
AI.method: 构建包含15种路面类型的4000张1024×2048分辨率图像，手动标注六类损伤实例；通过统计分析和实验对比，评估深度学习模型性能并建立基准。
AI.result: 提出性能最优的深度神经网络模型作为基准，揭示了当前深度学习在损伤分割中的局限性，并给出潜在改进方案。
AI.conclusion: Pavementscapes数据集为路面损伤检测提供了标准化基准，促进了算法优化与技术发展，同时指明了未来研究方向。

authors_text: Aman Goel,Qianhui Men,Edmond S. L. Ho
title: Interaction Mix and Match: Synthesizing Close Interaction using Conditional Hierarchical GAN with Multi-Hot Class Embedding
title_zh: 交互混合和匹配：使用条件分层 GAN 和多热门类嵌入来合成紧密交互
comment: Accepted to SCA 2022 (will be published in CGF)
comments: Accepted to SCA 2022 (will be published in CGF)
abstract: Synthesizing multi-character interactions is a challenging task due to the complex and varied interactions between the characters. In particular, precise spatiotemporal alignment between characters is required in generating close interactions such as dancing and fighting. Existing work in generating multi-character interactions focuses on generating a single type of reactive motion for a given sequence which results in a lack of variety of the resultant motions. In this paper, we propose a novel way to create realistic human reactive motions which are not presented in the given dataset by mixing and matching different types of close interactions. We propose a Conditional Hierarchical Generative Adversarial Network with Multi-Hot Class Embedding to generate the Mix and Match reactive motions of the follower from a given motion sequence of the leader. Experiments are conducted on both noisy (depth-based) and high-quality (MoCap-based) interaction datasets. The quantitative and qualitative results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the given datasets. We also provide an augmented dataset with realistic reactive motions to stimulate future research in this area. The code is available at https://github.com/Aman-Goel1/IMM
summary: Synthesizing multi-character interactions is a challenging task due to the complex and varied interactions between the characters. In particular, precise spatiotemporal alignment between characters is required in generating close interactions such as dancing and fighting. Existing work in generating multi-character interactions focuses on generating a single type of reactive motion for a given sequence which results in a lack of variety of the resultant motions. In this paper, we propose a novel way to create realistic human reactive motions which are not presented in the given dataset by mixing and matching different types of close interactions. We propose a Conditional Hierarchical Generative Adversarial Network with Multi-Hot Class Embedding to generate the Mix and Match reactive motions of the follower from a given motion sequence of the leader. Experiments are conducted on both noisy (depth-based) and high-quality (MoCap-based) interaction datasets. The quantitative and qualitative results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the given datasets. We also provide an augmented dataset with realistic reactive motions to stimulate future research in this area. The code is available at https://github.com/Aman-Goel1/IMM
abstract_zh: 由于角色之间的交互复杂多样，因此合成多角色交互是一项具有挑战性的任务。特别是，在产生舞蹈和打斗等密切互动时，角色之间需要精确的时空对齐。生成多角色交互的现有工作侧重于为给定序列生成单一类型的反应运动，这导致结果运动缺乏多样性。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过混合和匹配不同类型的密切交互来创建给定数据集中未呈现的真实人类反应运动的新颖方法。我们提出了一种具有多热门类嵌入的条件分层生成对抗网络，以根据领导者的给定运动序列生成跟随者的混合和匹配反应运动。实验在噪声（基于深度）和高质量（基于 MoCap）交互数据集上进行。定量和定性结果表明，我们的方法在给定数据集上优于最先进的方法。我们还提供了具有真实反应运动的增强数据集，以刺激该领域的未来研究。代码可在 https://github.com/Aman-Goel1/IMM 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件分层生成对抗网络（Conditional Hierarchical GAN）和多热类嵌入的方法，通过混合匹配不同类型的近距离互动（如舞蹈、战斗），合成更真实的人类反应动作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的多角色互动动作类型单一，缺乏多样性，且难以精确对齐时空信息。本文旨在通过混合不同互动类型，生成未在数据集中出现的新型反应动作。
AI.method: 设计条件分层生成对抗网络，结合多热类嵌入技术，从引导者的动作序列中生成跟随者的混合匹配反应动作，通过分层结构建模动作的时空关系。
AI.result: 在基于深度数据和高质量动作捕捉数据的实验中，定量和定性结果均优于现有方法，并提供了包含真实反应动作的增强数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了多角色近距离互动动作的多样性和真实性，为相关研究提供了新思路和数据支持。

search_text: Interaction Mix and Match: Synthesizing Close Interaction using Conditional Hierarchical GAN with Multi-Hot Class Embedding 交互混合和匹配：使用条件分层 GAN 和多热门类嵌入来合成紧密交互 Synthesizing multi-character interactions is a challenging task due to the complex and varied interactions between the characters. In particular, precise spatiotemporal alignment between characters is required in generating close interactions such as dancing and fighting. Existing work in generating multi-character interactions focuses on generating a single type of reactive motion for a given sequence which results in a lack of variety of the resultant motions. In this paper, we propose a novel way to create realistic human reactive motions which are not presented in the given dataset by mixing and matching different types of close interactions. We propose a Conditional Hierarchical Generative Adversarial Network with Multi-Hot Class Embedding to generate the Mix and Match reactive motions of the follower from a given motion sequence of the leader. Experiments are conducted on both noisy (depth-based) and high-quality (MoCap-based) interaction datasets. The quantitative and qualitative results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the given datasets. We also provide an augmented dataset with realistic reactive motions to stimulate future research in this area. The code is available at https://github.com/Aman-Goel1/IMM 由于角色之间的交互复杂多样，因此合成多角色交互是一项具有挑战性的任务。特别是，在产生舞蹈和打斗等密切互动时，角色之间需要精确的时空对齐。生成多角色交互的现有工作侧重于为给定序列生成单一类型的反应运动，这导致结果运动缺乏多样性。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过混合和匹配不同类型的密切交互来创建给定数据集中未呈现的真实人类反应运动的新颖方法。我们提出了一种具有多热门类嵌入的条件分层生成对抗网络，以根据领导者的给定运动序列生成跟随者的混合和匹配反应运动。实验在噪声（基于深度）和高质量（基于 MoCap）交互数据集上进行。定量和定性结果表明，我们的方法在给定数据集上优于最先进的方法。我们还提供了具有真实反应运动的增强数据集，以刺激该领域的未来研究。代码可在 https://github.com/Aman-Goel1/IMM 获取 本文提出一种基于条件分层生成对抗网络（Conditional Hierarchical GAN）和多热类嵌入的方法，通过混合匹配不同类型的近距离互动（如舞蹈、战斗），合成更真实的人类反应动作。 Aman Goel,Qianhui Men,Edmond S. L. Ho cs.GR,cs.CV

authors_text: Viswanatha V,Chandana R K,Ramachandra A. C.
title: Real Time Object Detection System with YOLO and CNN Models: A Review
title_zh: 使用 YOLO 和 CNN 模型的实时物体检测系统：回顾
abstract: The field of artificial intelligence is built on object detection techniques. YOU ONLY LOOK ONCE (YOLO) algorithm and it's more evolved versions are briefly described in this research survey. This survey is all about YOLO and convolution neural networks (CNN)in the direction of real time object detection.YOLO does generalized object representation more effectively without precision losses than other object detection models.CNN architecture models have the ability to eliminate highlights and identify objects in any given image. When implemented appropriately, CNN models can address issues like deformity diagnosis, creating educational or instructive application, etc. This article reached atnumber of observations and perspective findings through the analysis.Also it provides support for the focused visual information and feature extraction in the financial and other industries, highlights the method of target detection and feature selection, and briefly describe the development process of YOLO algorithm.
summary: The field of artificial intelligence is built on object detection techniques. YOU ONLY LOOK ONCE (YOLO) algorithm and it's more evolved versions are briefly described in this research survey. This survey is all about YOLO and convolution neural networks (CNN)in the direction of real time object detection.YOLO does generalized object representation more effectively without precision losses than other object detection models.CNN architecture models have the ability to eliminate highlights and identify objects in any given image. When implemented appropriately, CNN models can address issues like deformity diagnosis, creating educational or instructive application, etc. This article reached atnumber of observations and perspective findings through the analysis.Also it provides support for the focused visual information and feature extraction in the financial and other industries, highlights the method of target detection and feature selection, and briefly describe the development process of YOLO algorithm.
abstract_zh: 人工智能领域建立在对象检测技术的基础上。本研究调查简要描述了 YOU ONLY LOOK ONCE (YOLO) 算法及其更进化的版本。本次调查都是关于实时目标检测方向的 YOLO 和卷积神经网络（CNN）。YOLO 比其他目标检测模型更有效地进行广义目标表示，且没有精度损失。CNN 架构模型具有消除高光并识别任何给定图像中的目标的能力。如果实施得当，CNN模型可以解决畸形诊断、创建教育或指导性应用等问题。本文通过分析得出了一些观察结果和前瞻性发现，并为金融等行业的重点视觉信息和特征提取提供了支持，重点介绍了目标检测和特征选择的方法，并简要描述了YOLO算法的发展过程。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了YOLO算法及其改进版本与卷积神经网络（CNN）在实时目标检测中的应用与发展。
AI.motivation: 为了展示YOLO和CNN在实时目标检测中的优势，以及它们在金融等行业的视觉信息处理和特征提取中的潜力。
AI.method: 通过分析现有文献，比较YOLO算法与CNN模型的性能，总结其发展过程及在目标检测中的应用方法。
AI.result: 得出YOLO在精度与速度平衡上的优势，CNN在特征提取中的有效性，并为工业应用提供了方法支持。
AI.conclusion: YOLO与CNN结合可高效实现实时目标检测，未来需进一步优化算法以适应更多行业需求。

authors_text: Dmytro Filatov,Ghulam Nabi Ahmad Hassan Yar
title: Brain Tumor Diagnosis and Classification via Pre-Trained Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过预训练的卷积神经网络进行脑肿瘤诊断和分类
abstract: The brain tumor is the most aggressive kind of tumor and can cause low life expectancy if diagnosed at the later stages. Manual identification of brain tumors is tedious and prone to errors. Misdiagnosis can lead to false treatment and thus reduce the chances of survival for the patient. Medical resonance imaging (MRI) is the conventional method used to diagnose brain tumors and their types. This paper attempts to eliminate the manual process from the diagnosis process and use machine learning instead. We proposed the use of pretrained convolutional neural networks (CNN) for the diagnosis and classification of brain tumors. Three types of tumors were classified with one class of non-tumor MRI images. Networks that has been used are ResNet50, EfficientNetB1, EfficientNetB7, EfficientNetV2B1. EfficientNet has shown promising results due to its scalable nature. EfficientNetB1 showed the best results with training and validation accuracy of 87.67% and 89.55%, respectively.
summary: The brain tumor is the most aggressive kind of tumor and can cause low life expectancy if diagnosed at the later stages. Manual identification of brain tumors is tedious and prone to errors. Misdiagnosis can lead to false treatment and thus reduce the chances of survival for the patient. This paper attempts to eliminate the manual process from the diagnosis process and use machine learning instead. We proposed the use of pretrained convolutional neural networks (CNN) for the diagnosis and classification of brain tumors. EfficientNet has shown promising results due to its scalable nature. EfficientNetB1 showed the best results with training and validation accuracy of 87.67% and 89.55%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 脑肿瘤是最具侵袭性的肿瘤，如果在晚期诊断出来，可能会导致预期寿命缩短。手动识别脑肿瘤既繁琐又容易出错。误诊可能导致错误的治疗，从而降低患者的生存机会。医学磁共振成像（MRI）是用于诊断脑肿瘤及其类型的常规方法。本文试图从诊断过程中消除手动过程，转而使用机器学习。我们提出使用预训练的卷积神经网络（CNN）来诊断和分类脑肿瘤。使用一类非肿瘤 MRI 图像对三种类型的肿瘤进行分类。已使用的网络有ResNet50、EfficientNetB1、EfficientNetB7、EfficientNetV2B1。 EfficientNet 由于其可扩展性而显示出有希望的结果。 EfficientNetB1 显示了最好的结果，训练和验证准确率分别为 87.67% 和 89.55%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用预训练卷积神经网络（CNN）对脑肿瘤进行诊断和分类。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤诊断通常依赖于手动识别，过程繁琐且容易出错，可能导致误诊和治疗不当，从而影响患者的生存率。
AI.method: 本文采用预训练的卷积神经网络（如ResNet50、EfficientNetB1等）对脑肿瘤进行分类，使用MRI图像进行训练和验证。
AI.result: EfficientNetB1在训练和验证准确率上分别达到87.67%和89.55%，表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 预训练CNN在脑肿瘤诊断和分类任务中表现出良好的效果，特别是EfficientNetB1模型，为自动化诊断提供了有效方法。

authors_text: ZhenHao Tang,XiaoBing Zhang,Zi Long,XiangHua Fu
title: Multimodal Neural Machine Translation with Search Engine Based Image Retrieval
title_zh: 具有基于搜索引擎的图像检索的多模态神经机器翻译
abstract: Recently, numbers of works shows that the performance of neural machine translation (NMT) can be improved to a certain extent with using visual information. However, most of these conclusions are drawn from the analysis of experimental results based on a limited set of bilingual sentence-image pairs, such as Multi30K. In these kinds of datasets, the content of one bilingual parallel sentence pair must be well represented by a manually annotated image, which is different with the actual translation situation. Some previous works are proposed to addressed the problem by retrieving images from exiting sentence-image pairs with topic model. However, because of the limited collection of sentence-image pairs they used, their image retrieval method is difficult to deal with the out-of-vocabulary words, and can hardly prove that visual information enhance NMT rather than the co-occurrence of images and sentences. In this paper, we propose an open-vocabulary image retrieval methods to collect descriptive images for bilingual parallel corpus using image search engine. Next, we propose text-aware attentive visual encoder to filter incorrectly collected noise images. Experiment results on Multi30K and other two translation datasets show that our proposed method achieves significant improvements over strong baselines.
summary: Recently, numbers of works shows that the performance of neural machine translation (NMT) can be improved to a certain extent with using visual information. However, most of these conclusions are drawn from the analysis of experimental results based on a limited set of bilingual sentence-image pairs, such as Multi30K. In these kinds of datasets, the content of one bilingual parallel sentence pair must be well represented by a manually annotated image, which is different with the actual translation situation. Some previous works are proposed to addressed the problem by retrieving images from exiting sentence-image pairs with topic model. However, because of the limited collection of sentence-image pairs they used, their image retrieval method is difficult to deal with the out-of-vocabulary words, and can hardly prove that visual information enhance NMT rather than the co-occurrence of images and sentences. In this paper, we propose an open-vocabulary image retrieval methods to collect descriptive images for bilingual parallel corpus using image search engine. Next, we propose text-aware attentive visual encoder to filter incorrectly collected noise images. Experiment results on Multi30K and other two translation datasets show that our proposed method achieves significant improvements over strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 最近，大量工作表明，利用视觉信息可以在一定程度上提高神经机器翻译（NMT）的性能。然而，这些结论大多是根据有限的双语句子-图像对（例如 Multi30K）对实验结果的分析得出的。在这类数据集中，一对双语平行句子对的内容必须通过手动标注的图像来很好地表示，这与实际的翻译情况不同。之前的一些工作被提出通过使用主题模型从现有的句子-图像对中检索图像来解决该问题。然而，由于他们使用的句子-图像对的收集有限，他们的图像检索方法很难处理词汇外的单词，并且很难证明视觉信息增强了 NMT，而不是图像和句子的共现。在本文中，我们提出了一种开放词汇图像检索方法，使用图像搜索引擎收集双语平行语料库的描述性图像。接下来，我们提出文本感知的注意力视觉编码器来过滤错误收集的噪声图像。 Multi30K 和其他两个翻译数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比强基线取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于搜索引擎的开放词汇图像检索方法，结合文本感知的视觉编码器，提升多模态神经机器翻译性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖有限数据集，难以处理词汇外单词且无法验证视觉信息对NMT的实际提升效果
AI.method: 利用搜索引擎收集图像，再使用文本感知的注意力机制过滤噪声图像
AI.result: 在Multi30K等数据集上显著优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 开放词汇图像检索与文本感知视觉编码结合有效提升NMT性能，验证了视觉信息的积极作用

authors_text: Thijs Kooi
title: Tutorial on the development of AI models for medical image analysis
title_zh: 用于医学图像分析的人工智能模型开发教程
comment: Tutorial notes for a MICCAI tutorial on AI for medical image analysis in practice
comments: Tutorial notes for a MICCAI tutorial on AI for medical image analysis in practice
abstract: The idea of using computers to read medical scans was introduced as early as 1966. However, limits to machine learning technology meant progress was slow initially. The Alexnet breakthrough in 2012 sparked new interest in the topic, which resulted in the release of 100s of medical AI solutions on the market. In spite of success for some diseases and modalities, many challenges remain. Research typically focuses on the development of specific applications or techniques, clinical evaluation, or meta analysis of clinical studies or techniques through surveys or challenges. However, limited attention has been given to the development process of improving real world performance. In this tutorial, we address the latter and discuss some techniques to conduct the development process in order to make this as efficient as possible.
summary: The idea of using computers to read medical scans was introduced as early as 1966. However, limits to machine learning technology meant progress was slow initially. The Alexnet breakthrough in 2012 sparked new interest in the topic, which resulted in the release of 100s of medical AI solutions on the market. In spite of success for some diseases and modalities, many challenges remain. Research typically focuses on the development of specific applications or techniques, clinical evaluation, or meta analysis of clinical studies or techniques through surveys or challenges. However, limited attention has been given to the development process of improving real world performance. In this tutorial, we address the latter and discuss some techniques to conduct the development process in order to make this as efficient as possible.
abstract_zh: 使用计算机读取医学扫描的想法早在 1966 年就被提出。然而，机器学习技术的限制意味着最初进展缓慢。 2012 年 Alexnet 的突破引发了人们对该主题的新兴趣，导致市场上发布了数百种医疗人工智能解决方案。尽管在某些疾病和治疗方式上取得了成功，但仍然存在许多挑战。研究通常侧重于特定应用或技术的开发、临床评估或通过调查或挑战对临床研究或技术进行荟萃分析。然而，对提高现实世界性能的开发过程的关注有限。在本教程中，我们将解决后者并讨论一些进行开发过程的技术，以使其尽可能高效。

AI.tldr: 本文教程旨在探讨如何高效开发医疗图像分析的AI模型，重点解决实际应用中的性能提升问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管医疗AI领域发展迅速，但现有研究多聚焦于特定技术或临床评估，缺乏对提升实际应用性能的开发流程系统性指导。
AI.method: 通过总结数据预处理、模型优化、临床验证等关键技术，提出结构化开发框架以提升医疗AI模型的实用性和效率。
AI.result: 系统化方法可缩短开发周期，提高模型在真实医疗场景中的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为开发者提供可复用的技术路径。
AI.conclusion: 医疗AI开发需结合领域知识与工程实践，未来应加强跨学科协作以攻克数据稀缺、模型可解释性等核心挑战。

authors_text: Leonardo Kanashiro Felizardo,Elia Matsumoto,Emilio Del-Moral-Hernandez
title: Solving the optimal stopping problem with reinforcement learning: an application in financial option exercise
title_zh: 用强化学习解决最优停止问题：在金融期权行使中的应用
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, WCCI2022 IEEE WORLD CONGRESS ON COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENCE
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, WCCI2022 IEEE WORLD CONGRESS ON COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENCE
abstract: The optimal stopping problem is a category of decision problems with a specific constrained configuration. It is relevant to various real-world applications such as finance and management. To solve the optimal stopping problem, state-of-the-art algorithms in dynamic programming, such as the least-squares Monte Carlo (LSMC), are employed. This type of algorithm relies on path simulations using only the last price of the underlying asset as a state representation. Also, the LSMC was thinking for option valuation where risk-neutral probabilities can be employed to account for uncertainty. However, the general optimal stopping problem goals may not fit the requirements of the LSMC showing auto-correlated prices. We employ a data-driven method that uses Monte Carlo simulation to train and test artificial neural networks (ANN) to solve the optimal stopping problem. Using ANN to solve decision problems is not entirely new. We propose a different architecture that uses convolutional neural networks (CNN) to deal with the dimensionality problem that arises when we transform the whole history of prices into a Markovian state. We present experiments that indicate that our proposed architecture improves results over the previous implementations under specific simulated time series function sets. Lastly, we employ our proposed method to compare the optimal exercise of the financial options problem with the LSMC algorithm. Our experiments show that our method can capture more accurate exercise opportunities when compared to the LSMC. We have outstandingly higher (above 974\% improvement) expected payoff from these exercise policies under the many Monte Carlo simulations that used the real-world return database on the out-of-sample (test) data.
summary: The optimal stopping problem is a category of decision problems with a specific constrained configuration. It is relevant to various real-world applications such as finance and management. To solve the optimal stopping problem, state-of-the-art algorithms in dynamic programming, such as the least-squares Monte Carlo (LSMC), are employed. This type of algorithm relies on path simulations using only the last price of the underlying asset as a state representation. Also, the LSMC was thinking for option valuation where risk-neutral probabilities can be employed to account for uncertainty. However, the general optimal stopping problem goals may not fit the requirements of the LSMC showing auto-correlated prices. We employ a data-driven method that uses Monte Carlo simulation to train and test artificial neural networks (ANN) to solve the optimal stopping problem. Using ANN to solve decision problems is not entirely new. We propose a different architecture that uses convolutional neural networks (CNN) to deal with the dimensionality problem that arises when we transform the whole history of prices into a Markovian state. We present experiments that indicate that our proposed architecture improves results over the previous implementations under specific simulated time series function sets. Lastly, we employ our proposed method to compare the optimal exercise of the financial options problem with the LSMC algorithm. Our experiments show that our method can capture more accurate exercise opportunities when compared to the LSMC. We have outstandingly higher (above 974\% improvement) expected payoff from these exercise policies under the many Monte Carlo simulations that used the real-world return database on the out-of-sample (test) data.
abstract_zh: 最优停止问题是一类具有特定约束配置的决策问题。它与各种现实世界的应用程序相关，例如财务和管理。为了解决最佳停止问题，采用了动态规划中最先进的算法，例如最小二乘蒙特卡罗（LSMC）。此类算法依赖于仅使用标的资产的最后价格作为状态表示的路径模拟。此外，LSMC 正在考虑期权估值，其中可以采用风险中性概率来解释不确定性。然而，一般最优停止问题目标可能不符合 LSMC 显示自相关价格的要求。我们采用数据驱动的方法，使用蒙特卡罗模拟来训练和测试人工神经网络（ANN）来解决最佳停止问题。使用人工神经网络解决决策问题并不是什么新鲜事。我们提出了一种不同的架构，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来处理当我们将整个价格历史转换为马尔可夫状态时出现的维度问题。我们提出的实验表明，我们提出的架构在特定的模拟时间序列函数集下比以前的实现改进了结果。最后，我们采用我们提出的方法将金融期权问题的最优执行与 LSMC 算法进行比较。我们的实验表明，与 LSMC 相比，我们的方法可以捕获更准确的锻炼机会。在使用样本外（测试）数据的真实世界回报数据库进行的许多蒙特卡罗模拟下，我们从这些行使政策中获得了明显更高的预期回报（提高了 974% 以上）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用强化学习中的卷积神经网络（CNN）解决金融期权执行中的最优停止问题，改进传统方法如最小二乘蒙特卡洛（LSMC）的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统动态规划算法（如LSMC）在处理自相关价格序列和高维状态表示时存在局限性，难以准确捕捉期权执行机会，需探索更高效的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 基于蒙特卡洛模拟训练卷积神经网络（CNN），将价格历史转化为马尔可夫状态以解决维度问题，并通过实证对比验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在测试数据集上的预期收益较LSMC提升超974%，能更精准识别期权执行时机。
AI.conclusion: CNN驱动的强化学习框架在最优停止问题中表现优异，为金融期权定价提供了更精确的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出使用强化学习中的卷积神经网络（CNN）解决金融期权执行中的最优停止问题，改进传统方法如最小二乘蒙特卡洛（LSMC）的不足。

search_text: Solving the optimal stopping problem with reinforcement learning: an application in financial option exercise 用强化学习解决最优停止问题：在金融期权行使中的应用 The optimal stopping problem is a category of decision problems with a specific constrained configuration. It is relevant to various real-world applications such as finance and management. To solve the optimal stopping problem, state-of-the-art algorithms in dynamic programming, such as the least-squares Monte Carlo (LSMC), are employed. This type of algorithm relies on path simulations using only the last price of the underlying asset as a state representation. Also, the LSMC was thinking for option valuation where risk-neutral probabilities can be employed to account for uncertainty. However, the general optimal stopping problem goals may not fit the requirements of the LSMC showing auto-correlated prices. We employ a data-driven method that uses Monte Carlo simulation to train and test artificial neural networks (ANN) to solve the optimal stopping problem. Using ANN to solve decision problems is not entirely new. We propose a different architecture that uses convolutional neural networks (CNN) to deal with the dimensionality problem that arises when we transform the whole history of prices into a Markovian state. We present experiments that indicate that our proposed architecture improves results over the previous implementations under specific simulated time series function sets. Lastly, we employ our proposed method to compare the optimal exercise of the financial options problem with the LSMC algorithm. Our experiments show that our method can capture more accurate exercise opportunities when compared to the LSMC. We have outstandingly higher (above 974\% improvement) expected payoff from these exercise policies under the many Monte Carlo simulations that used the real-world return database on the out-of-sample (test) data. 最优停止问题是一类具有特定约束配置的决策问题。它与各种现实世界的应用程序相关，例如财务和管理。为了解决最佳停止问题，采用了动态规划中最先进的算法，例如最小二乘蒙特卡罗（LSMC）。此类算法依赖于仅使用标的资产的最后价格作为状态表示的路径模拟。此外，LSMC 正在考虑期权估值，其中可以采用风险中性概率来解释不确定性。然而，一般最优停止问题目标可能不符合 LSMC 显示自相关价格的要求。我们采用数据驱动的方法，使用蒙特卡罗模拟来训练和测试人工神经网络（ANN）来解决最佳停止问题。使用人工神经网络解决决策问题并不是什么新鲜事。我们提出了一种不同的架构，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来处理当我们将整个价格历史转换为马尔可夫状态时出现的维度问题。我们提出的实验表明，我们提出的架构在特定的模拟时间序列函数集下比以前的实现改进了结果。最后，我们采用我们提出的方法将金融期权问题的最优执行与 LSMC 算法进行比较。我们的实验表明，与 LSMC 相比，我们的方法可以捕获更准确的锻炼机会。在使用样本外（测试）数据的真实世界回报数据库进行的许多蒙特卡罗模拟下，我们从这些行使政策中获得了明显更高的预期回报（提高了 974% 以上）。 本文提出使用强化学习中的卷积神经网络（CNN）解决金融期权执行中的最优停止问题，改进传统方法如最小二乘蒙特卡洛（LSMC）的不足。 Leonardo Kanashiro Felizardo,Elia Matsumoto,Emilio Del-Moral-Hernandez q-fin.CP,cs.AI

authors_text: Yao Chen,Junhao Pan,Xinheng Liu,Jinjun Xiong,Deming Chen
title: HiKonv: Maximizing the Throughput of Quantized Convolution With Novel Bit-wise Management and Computation
title_zh: HiKonv：通过新颖的按位管理和计算最大化量化卷积的吞吐量
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.13972
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.13972
abstract: Quantization for CNN has shown significant progress with the intention of reducing the cost of computation and storage with low-bitwidth data representations. There are, however, no systematic studies on how an existing full-bitwidth processing unit, such as ALU in CPUs and DSP in FPGAs, can be better utilized to deliver significantly higher computation throughput for convolution under various quantized bitwidths. In this study, we propose HiKonv, a unified solution that maximizes the throughput of convolution on a given underlying processing unit with low-bitwidth quantized data inputs through novel bit-wise management and parallel computation. We establish theoretical framework and performance models using a full-bitwidth multiplier for highly parallelized low-bitwidth convolution, and demonstrate new breakthroughs for high-performance computing in this critical domain. For example, a single 32-bit processing unit in CPU can deliver 128 binarized convolution operations (multiplications and additions) and 13 4-bit convolution operations with a single multiplication instruction, and a single 27x18 multiplier in the FPGA DSP can deliver 60, 8 or 2 convolution operations with 1, 4 or 8-bit inputs in one clock cycle. We demonstrate the effectiveness of HiKonv on both CPU and FPGA. On CPU, HiKonv outperforms the baseline implementation with 1 to 8-bit inputs and provides up to 7.6x and 1.4x performance improvements for 1-D convolution, and performs 2.74x and 3.19x over the baseline implementation for 4-bit signed and unsigned data inputs for 2-D convolution. On FPGA, HiKonv solution enables a single DSP to process multiple convolutions with a shorter processing latency. For binarized input, each DSP with HiKonv is equivalent up to 76.6 LUTs. Compared to the DAC-SDC 2020 champion model, HiKonv achieves a 2.37x throughput improvement and 2.61x DSP efficiency improvement, respectively.

There are, however, no systematic studies on how an existing full-bitwidth processing unit, such as ALU in CPUs and DSP in FPGAs, can be better utilized to deliver significantly higher computation throughput for convolution under various quantized bitwidths. In this study, we propose HiKonv, a unified solution that maximizes the throughput of convolution on a given underlying processing unit with low-bitwidth quantized data inputs through novel bit-wise management and parallel computation. We establish theoretical framework and performance models using a full-bitwidth multiplier for highly parallelized low-bitwidth convolution, and demonstrate new breakthroughs for high-performance computing in this critical domain. For example, a single 32-bit processing unit in CPU can deliver 128 binarized convolution operations (multiplications and additions) and 13 4-bit convolution operations with a single multiplication instruction, and a single 27x18 multiplier in the FPGA DSP can deliver 60, 8 or 2 convolution operations with 1, 4 or 8-bit inputs in one clock cycle. We demonstrate the effectiveness of HiKonv on both CPU and FPGA. On CPU, HiKonv outperforms the baseline implementation with 1 to 8-bit inputs and provides up to 7.6x and 1.4x performance improvements for 1-D convolution, and performs 2.74x and 3.19x over the baseline implementation for 4-bit signed and unsigned data inputs for 2-D convolution. On FPGA, HiKonv solution enables a single DSP to process multiple convolutions with a shorter processing latency. For binarized input, each DSP with HiKonv is equivalent up to 76.6 LUTs. Compared to the DAC-SDC 2020 champion model, HiKonv achieves a 2.37x throughput improvement and 2.61x DSP efficiency improvement, respectively.
abstract_zh: CNN 的量化已经取得了重大进展，旨在降低低位宽数据表示的计算和存储成本。然而，目前还没有关于如何更好地利用现有的全位宽处理单元（例如CPU中的ALU和FPGA中的DSP）来为各种量化位宽下的卷积提供显着更高的计算吞吐量的系统研究。在这项研究中，我们提出了 HiKonv，一种统一的解决方案，通过新颖的逐位管理和并行计算，最大化具有低位宽量化数据输入的给定底层处理单元上的卷积吞吐量。我们使用全位宽乘法器建立了高度并行化低位宽卷积的理论框架和性能模型，并展示了该关键领域高性能计算的新突破。例如，CPU中的单个32位处理单元可以使用单个乘法指令提供128个二值化卷积运算（乘法和加法）和13个4位卷积运算，而FPGA DSP中的单个27x18乘法器可以在一个时钟周期内使用1、4或8位输入提供60、8或2个卷积运算。我们展示了 HiKonv 在 CPU 和 FPGA 上的有效性。在 CPU 上，HiKonv 的性能优于 1 至 8 位输入的基准实现，为 1-D 卷积提供高达 7.6 倍和 1.4 倍的性能改进，并且为 2-D 卷积的 4 位有符号和无符号数据输入执行比基准实现高 2.74 倍和 3.19 倍的性能。在 FPGA 上，HiKonv 解决方案使单个 DSP 能够以更短的处理延迟处理多个卷积。对于二值化输入，每个带有 HiKonv 的 DSP 相当于多达 76.6 个 LUT。与 DAC-SDC 2020 冠军模型相比，HiKonv 分别实现了 2.37 倍的吞吐量提升和 2.61 倍的 DSP 效率提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiKonv方法，通过位级管理和并行计算最大化量化卷积的吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有处理单元未充分利用低比特量化数据的并行性，缺乏系统性研究以提升卷积计算吞吐量。
AI.method: 构建理论框架和性能模型，利用全比特乘法器实现高度并行化低比特卷积，提出位级管理与并行计算技术。
AI.result: CPU上HiKonv在1-8比特输入下分别实现最高7.6倍和1.4倍性能提升；FPGA上单DSP处理多卷积，吞吐量较DAC-SDC 2020冠军模型提升2.37倍。
AI.conclusion: HiKonv通过位级优化显著提升量化卷积在CPU和FPGA上的吞吐量与能效，为低比特计算提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Jan Blumenkamp,Qingbiao Li,Binyu Wang,Zhe Liu,Amanda Prorok
title: See What the Robot Can't See: Learning Cooperative Perception for Visual Navigation
title_zh: 看到机器人看不到的东西：学习视觉导航的协作感知
comment: Accepted to be presented at IROS 2023
comments: Accepted to be presented at IROS 2023
abstract: We consider the problem of navigating a mobile robot towards a target in an unknown environment that is endowed with visual sensors, where neither the robot nor the sensors have access to global positioning information and only use first-person-view images. In order to overcome the need for positioning, we train the sensors to encode and communicate relevant viewpoint information to the mobile robot, whose objective it is to use this information to navigate to the target along the shortest path. We overcome the challenge of enabling all the sensors (even those that cannot directly see the target) to predict the direction along the shortest path to the target by implementing a neighborhood-based feature aggregation module using a Graph Neural Network (GNN) architecture. In our experiments, we first demonstrate generalizability to previously unseen environments with various sensor layouts. Our results show that by using communication between the sensors and the robot, we achieve up to 2.0x improvement in SPL (Success weighted by Path Length) when compared to a communication-free baseline. This is done without requiring a global map, positioning data, nor pre-calibration of the sensor network. Second, we perform a zero-shot transfer of our model from simulation to the real world. Laboratory experiments demonstrate the feasibility of our approach in various cluttered environments. Finally, we showcase examples of successful navigation to the target while both the sensor network layout as well as obstacles are dynamically reconfigured as the robot navigates. We provide a video demo, the dataset, trained models, and source code. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kcmr6RUgucw https://github.com/proroklab/sensor-guided-visual-nav

In order to overcome the need for positioning, we train the sensors to encode and communicate relevant viewpoint information to the mobile robot, whose objective it is to use this information to navigate to the target along the shortest path. We overcome the challenge of enabling all the sensors (even those that cannot directly see the target) to predict the direction along the shortest path to the target by implementing a neighborhood-based feature aggregation module using a Graph Neural Network (GNN) architecture. In our experiments, we first demonstrate generalizability to previously unseen environments with various sensor layouts. Our results show that by using communication between the sensors and the robot, we achieve up to 2.0x improvement in SPL (Success weighted by Path Length) when compared to a communication-free baseline. This is done without requiring a global map, positioning data, nor pre-calibration of the sensor network. Second, we perform a zero-shot transfer of our model from simulation to the real world. Laboratory experiments demonstrate the feasibility of our approach in various cluttered environments. Finally, we showcase examples of successful navigation to the target while both the sensor network layout as well as obstacles are dynamically reconfigured as the robot navigates. We provide a video demo, the dataset, trained models, and source code. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kcmr6RUgucw https://github.com/proroklab/sensor-guided-visual-nav
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在配备有视觉传感器的未知环境中将移动机器人导航到目标的问题，其中机器人和传感器都无法访问全球定位信息，并且仅使用第一人称视角图像。为了克服定位的需要，我们训练传感器对相关视点信息进行编码并将其传递给移动机器人，移动机器人的目标是使用这些信息沿着最短路径导航到目标。我们通过使用图神经网络（GNN）架构实现基于邻域的特征聚合模块，克服了使所有传感器（甚至那些无法直接看到目标的传感器）能够预测沿着到目标的最短路径的方向的挑战。在我们的实验中，我们首先展示了具有各种传感器布局的对以前未见过的环境的普遍性。我们的结果表明，通过使用传感器和机器人之间的通信，与无通信的基线相比，我们的 SPL（按路径长度加权的成功）提高了 2.0 倍。无需全球地图、定位数据或传感器网络的预校准即可完成此操作。其次，我们将模型从模拟到现实世界进行零样本迁移。实验室实验证明了我们的方法在各种杂乱环境中的可行性。最后，我们展示了成功导航到目标的示例，同时传感器网络布局和障碍物在机器人导航时动态重新配置。我们提供视频演示、数据集、训练模型和源代码。 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kcmr6RUgucw https://github.com/proroklab/sensor-guided-visual-nav

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无全局定位信息的情况下，通过传感器与机器人协作感知实现视觉导航的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统导航依赖全局定位信息，但在未知环境中难以获取。本文旨在通过传感器间协作与信息共享，使机器人无需全局地图即可完成导航。
AI.method: 采用图神经网络（GNN）构建邻域特征聚合模块，使传感器（包括无法直接看到目标的传感器）能编码并传递关键视角信息，机器人据此规划最短路径。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比无通信基线，该方法在SPL指标上提升2.0倍；成功实现仿真到现实的零样本迁移，并支持动态环境下的导航。

search_text: See What the Robot Can't See: Learning Cooperative Perception for Visual Navigation 看到机器人看不到的东西：学习视觉导航的协作感知 We consider the problem of navigating a mobile robot towards a target in an unknown environment that is endowed with visual sensors, where neither the robot nor the sensors have access to global positioning information and only use first-person-view images. In order to overcome the need for positioning, we train the sensors to encode and communicate relevant viewpoint information to the mobile robot, whose objective it is to use this information to navigate to the target along the shortest path. We overcome the challenge of enabling all the sensors (even those that cannot directly see the target) to predict the direction along the shortest path to the target by implementing a neighborhood-based feature aggregation module using a Graph Neural Network (GNN) architecture. In our experiments, we first demonstrate generalizability to previously unseen environments with various sensor layouts. Our results show that by using communication between the sensors and the robot, we achieve up to 2.0x improvement in SPL (Success weighted by Path Length) when compared to a communication-free baseline. This is done without requiring a global map, positioning data, nor pre-calibration of the sensor network. Second, we perform a zero-shot transfer of our model from simulation to the real world. Laboratory experiments demonstrate the feasibility of our approach in various cluttered environments. Finally, we showcase examples of successful navigation to the target while both the sensor network layout as well as obstacles are dynamically reconfigured as the robot navigates. We provide a video demo, the dataset, trained models, and source code. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kcmr6RUgucw https://github.com/proroklab/sensor-guided-visual-nav 我们考虑在配备有视觉传感器的未知环境中将移动机器人导航到目标的问题，其中机器人和传感器都无法访问全球定位信息，并且仅使用第一人称视角图像。为了克服定位的需要，我们训练传感器对相关视点信息进行编码并将其传递给移动机器人，移动机器人的目标是使用这些信息沿着最短路径导航到目标。我们通过使用图神经网络（GNN）架构实现基于邻域的特征聚合模块，克服了使所有传感器（甚至那些无法直接看到目标的传感器）能够预测沿着到目标的最短路径的方向的挑战。在我们的实验中，我们首先展示了具有各种传感器布局的对以前未见过的环境的普遍性。我们的结果表明，通过使用传感器和机器人之间的通信，与无通信的基线相比，我们的 SPL（按路径长度加权的成功）提高了 2.0 倍。无需全球地图、定位数据或传感器网络的预校准即可完成此操作。其次，我们将模型从模拟到现实世界进行零样本迁移。实验室实验证明了我们的方法在各种杂乱环境中的可行性。最后，我们展示了成功导航到目标的示例，同时传感器网络布局和障碍物在机器人导航时动态重新配置。我们提供视频演示、数据集、训练模型和源代码。 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kcmr6RUgucw https://github.com/proroklab/sensor-guided-visual-nav 本文研究了在无全局定位信息的情况下，通过传感器与机器人协作感知实现视觉导航的问题。 Jan Blumenkamp,Qingbiao Li,Binyu Wang,Zhe Liu,Amanda Prorok cs.RO,cs.LG,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Baturay Saglam,Dogan C. Cicek,Furkan B. Mutlu,Suleyman S. Kozat
title: Mitigating Off-Policy Bias in Actor-Critic Methods with One-Step Q-learning: A Novel Correction Approach
title_zh: 通过一步 Q 学习减轻 Actor-Critic 方法中的偏离策略偏差：一种新颖的校正方法
abstract: Compared to on-policy counterparts, off-policy model-free deep reinforcement learning can improve data efficiency by repeatedly using the previously gathered data. However, off-policy learning becomes challenging when the discrepancy between the underlying distributions of the agent's policy and collected data increases. Although the well-studied importance sampling and off-policy policy gradient techniques were proposed to compensate for this discrepancy, they usually require a collection of long trajectories and induce additional problems such as vanishing/exploding gradients or discarding many useful experiences, which eventually increases the computational complexity. Moreover, their generalization to either continuous action domains or policies approximated by deterministic deep neural networks is strictly limited. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel policy similarity measure to mitigate the effects of such discrepancy in continuous control. Our method offers an adequate single-step off-policy correction that is applicable to deterministic policy networks. Theoretical and empirical studies demonstrate that it can achieve a "safe" off-policy learning and substantially improve the state-of-the-art by attaining higher returns in fewer steps than the competing methods through an effective schedule of the learning rate in Q-learning and policy optimization.
summary: Compared to on-policy counterparts, off-policy model-free deep reinforcement learning can improve data efficiency by repeatedly using the previously gathered data. However, off-policy learning becomes challenging when the discrepancy between the underlying distributions of the agent's policy and collected data increases. Although the well-studied importance sampling and off-policy policy gradient techniques were proposed to compensate for this discrepancy, they usually require a collection of long trajectories and induce additional problems such as vanishing/exploding gradients or discarding many useful experiences, which eventually increases the computational complexity. Moreover, their generalization to either continuous action domains or policies approximated by deterministic deep neural networks is strictly limited. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel policy similarity measure to mitigate the effects of such discrepancy in continuous control. Our method offers an adequate single-step off-policy correction that is applicable to deterministic policy networks. Theoretical and empirical studies demonstrate that it can achieve a "safe" off-policy learning and substantially improve the state-of-the-art by attaining higher returns in fewer steps than the competing methods through an effective schedule of the learning rate in Q-learning and policy optimization.
abstract_zh: 与在策略同行相比，离策略无模型深度强化学习可以通过重复使用先前收集的数据来提高数据效率。然而，当代理策略的基本分布与收集的数据之间的差异增加时，离策略学习就变得具有挑战性。尽管经过充分研究的重要性采样和离策略策略梯度技术被提出来弥补这种差异，但它们通常需要长轨迹的集合并引发额外的问题，例如梯度消失/爆炸或丢弃许多有用的经验，这最终增加了计算复杂性。此外，它们对连续动作域或由确定性深度神经网络近似的策略的泛化受到严格限制。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的政策相似性度量来减轻连续控制中这种差异的影响。我们的方法提供了适用于确定性策略网络的足够的单步离策略校正。理论和实证研究表明，它可以实现“安全”的离策略学习，并通过 Q 学习和策略优化中学习率的有效调度，以比竞争方法更少的步骤获得更高的回报，从而显着提高最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单步Q学习的新方法，用于缓解深度强化学习中策略差异导致的离线策略偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线策略方法依赖长轨迹数据且存在梯度消失/爆炸、计算复杂度高、难以适配连续动作空间或确定性策略网络等问题。
AI.method: 引入新的策略相似性度量指标，结合单步Q学习与动态学习率调度机制，设计适用于确定性策略网络的离线策略校正框架。
AI.result: 理论与实验表明该方法在连续控制任务中实现更安全的离线学习，相比现有方法在更少训练步数内取得更高回报。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了策略分布差异带来的偏差问题，为连续动作空间的离线策略优化提供了新思路。

However, off-policy learning becomes challenging when the discrepancy between the underlying distributions of the agent's policy and collected data increases. authors_text: Omar Shaur Choudhry,Paul Omara Odida,Joshua Reiner,Keiron Appleyard,Danielle Kushnir,William Toon
title: Data Collection and Analysis of French Dialects
title_zh: 法语方言数据收集与分析
comment: 4 pages plus 1 page for references. 4 figures including 1 image
comments: 4 pages plus 1 page for references. 4 figures including 1 image
abstract: This paper discusses creating and analysing a new dataset for data mining and text analytics research, contributing to a joint Leeds University research project for the Corpus of National Dialects. This report investigates machine learning classifiers to classify samples of French dialect text across various French-speaking countries. Following the steps of the CRISP-DM methodology, this report explores the data collection process, data quality issues and data conversion for text analysis. Finally, after applying suitable data mining techniques, the evaluation methods, best overall features and classifiers and conclusions are discussed.
summary: This paper discusses creating and analysing a new dataset for data mining and text analytics research, contributing to a joint Leeds University research project for the Corpus of National Dialects. This report investigates machine learning classifiers to classify samples of French dialect text across various French-speaking countries. Following the steps of the CRISP-DM methodology, this report explores the data collection process, data quality issues and data conversion for text analysis. Finally, after applying suitable data mining techniques, the evaluation methods, best overall features and classifiers and conclusions are discussed.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了创建和分析用于数据挖掘和文本分析研究的新数据集，为利兹大学国家方言语料库联合研究项目做出贡献。本报告研究了机器学习分类器，以对各个法语国家的法语方言文本样本进行分类。本报告遵循 CRISP-DM 方法的步骤，探讨了文本分析的数据收集过程、数据质量问题和数据转换。最后，在应用合适的数据挖掘技术后，讨论了评估方法、最佳整体特征和分类器以及结论。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在创建并分析法语方言数据集，用于机器学习分类研究。
AI.motivation: 现有法语方言数据不足，需通过数据挖掘技术提升方言分类准确性以支持语言学研究。
AI.method: 遵循CRISP-DM方法论，进行数据收集、清洗、特征提取，并应用机器学习分类器进行方言分类评估。
AI.result: 确定了最佳分类特征与模型，验证了数据预处理对分类性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效支持法语方言分类，未来需扩展更多方言样本以提升泛化能力。

This report investigates machine learning classifiers to classify samples of French dialect text across various French-speaking countries. Following the steps of the CRISP-DM methodology, this report explores the data collection process, data quality issues and data conversion for text analysis. Finally, after applying suitable data mining techniques, the evaluation methods, best overall features and classifiers and conclusions are discussed. 本文讨论了创建和分析用于数据挖掘和文本分析研究的新数据集，为利兹大学国家方言语料库联合研究项目做出贡献。本报告研究了机器学习分类器，以对各个法语国家的法语方言文本样本进行分类。本报告遵循 CRISP-DM 方法的步骤，探讨了文本分析的数据收集过程、数据质量问题和数据转换。最后，在应用合适的数据挖掘技术后，讨论了评估方法、最佳整体特征和分类器以及结论。 本文旨在创建并分析法语方言数据集，用于机器学习分类研究。 Omar Shaur Choudhry,Paul Omara Odida,Joshua Reiner,Keiron Appleyard,Danielle Kushnir,William Toon cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhe Zhu,Liangliang Nan,Haoran Xie,Honghua Chen,Mingqiang Wei,Jun Wang,Jing Qin
title: CSDN: Cross-modal Shape-transfer Dual-refinement Network for Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: CSDN：用于点云补全的跨模态形状传递双细化网络
abstract: How will you repair a physical object with some missings? You may imagine its original shape from previously captured images, recover its overall (global) but coarse shape first, and then refine its local details. We are motivated to imitate the physical repair procedure to address point cloud completion. To this end, we propose a cross-modal shape-transfer dual-refinement network (termed CSDN), a coarse-to-fine paradigm with images of full-cycle participation, for quality point cloud completion. CSDN mainly consists of "shape fusion" and "dual-refinement" modules to tackle the cross-modal challenge. The first module transfers the intrinsic shape characteristics from single images to guide the geometry generation of the missing regions of point clouds, in which we propose IPAdaIN to embed the global features of both the image and the partial point cloud into completion. The second module refines the coarse output by adjusting the positions of the generated points, where the local refinement unit exploits the geometric relation between the novel and the input points by graph convolution, and the global constraint unit utilizes the input image to fine-tune the generated offset. Different from most existing approaches, CSDN not only explores the complementary information from images but also effectively exploits cross-modal data in the whole coarse-to-fine completion procedure. Experimental results indicate that CSDN performs favorably against ten competitors on the cross-modal benchmark.
