To this end, we propose a cross-modal shape-transfer dual-refinement network (termed CSDN), a coarse-to-fine paradigm with images of full-cycle participation, for quality point cloud completion. CSDN mainly consists of "shape fusion" and "dual-refinement" modules to tackle the cross-modal challenge. The first module transfers the intrinsic shape characteristics from single images to guide the geometry generation of the missing regions of point clouds, in which we propose IPAdaIN to embed the global features of both the image and the partial point cloud into completion. The second module refines the coarse output by adjusting the positions of the generated points, where the local refinement unit exploits the geometric relation between the novel and the input points by graph convolution, and the global constraint unit utilizes the input image to fine-tune the generated offset. Different from most existing approaches, CSDN not only explores the complementary information from images but also effectively exploits cross-modal data in the whole coarse-to-fine completion procedure. Experimental results indicate that CSDN performs favorably against ten competitors on the cross-modal benchmark.
abstract_zh: 您将如何修复有一些缺失的物体？您可以根据之前捕获的图像想象其原始形状，首先恢复其整体（全局）但粗略的形状，然后细化其局部细节。我们有动力模仿物理修复程序来解决点云完成问题。为此，我们提出了一种跨模态形状转移双细化网络（称为 CSDN），这是一种具有全周期参与图像的从粗到细的范式，用于高质量点云完成。 CSDN主要由“形状融合”和“双重细化”模块组成，以应对跨模态挑战。第一个模块传输单个图像的内在形状特征，以指导点云缺失区域的几何生成，其中我们提出 IPAdaIN 将图像和部分点云的全局特征嵌入到完成中。第二个模块通过调整生成点的位置来细化粗略输出，其中局部细化单元通过图卷积利用小说与输入点之间的几何关系，全局约束单元利用输入图像来微调生成的偏移。与大多数现有方法不同，CSDN 不仅从图像中探索互补信息，而且在整个从粗到精的完成过程中有效地利用了跨模态数据。实验结果表明，CSDN 在跨模态基准测试中的表现优于 10 家竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模态形状迁移双优化网络（CSDN），用于通过图像信息引导点云补全，解决点云缺失区域的修复问题。
AI.motivation: 受物理物体修复过程启发，通过先恢复整体粗略形状再细化局部细节的方式，利用图像信息辅助点云补全以提高质量。
AI.method: CSDN包含两个核心模块：1）形状融合模块通过IPAdaIN技术将图像与点云的全局特征嵌入补全过程；2）双优化模块通过图卷积调整生成点位置（局部优化）并利用图像进行偏移微调（全局约束）。
AI.result: 在跨模态基准测试中，CSDN相比十个竞争方法表现出更优的点云补全效果。
AI.conclusion: CSDN通过全程有效利用跨模态数据，实现了图像与点云信息的互补性融合，为点云补全任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Maor Ivgi,Uri Shaham,Jonathan Berant
title: Efficient Long-Text Understanding with Short-Text Models
title_zh: 利用短文本模型进行高效的长文本理解
comment: Accepted for publication in Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL), 2023. Authors' final version (pre-MIT)
comments: Accepted for publication in Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL), 2023. Authors' final version (pre-MIT)
abstract: Transformer-based pretrained language models (LMs) are ubiquitous across natural language understanding, but cannot be applied to long sequences such as stories, scientific articles and long documents, due to their quadratic complexity. While a myriad of efficient transformer variants have been proposed, they are typically based on custom implementations that require expensive pretraining from scratch. In this work, we propose SLED: SLiding-Encoder and Decoder, a simple approach for processing long sequences that re-uses and leverages battle-tested short-text pretrained LMs. Specifically, we partition the input into overlapping chunks, encode each with a short-text LM encoder and use the pretrained decoder to fuse information across chunks (fusion-in-decoder). We illustrate through controlled experiments that SLED offers a viable strategy for long text understanding and evaluate our approach on SCROLLS, a benchmark with seven datasets across a wide range of language understanding tasks. We find that SLED is competitive with specialized models that are up to 50x larger and require a dedicated and expensive pretraining step.
summary: Transformer-based pretrained language models (LMs) are ubiquitous across natural language understanding, but cannot be applied to long sequences such as stories, scientific articles and long documents, due to their quadratic complexity. While a myriad of efficient transformer variants have been proposed, they are typically based on custom implementations that require expensive pretraining from scratch. In this work, we propose SLED: SLiding-Encoder and Decoder, a simple approach for processing long sequences that re-uses and leverages battle-tested short-text pretrained LMs. Specifically, we partition the input into overlapping chunks, encode each with a short-text LM encoder and use the pretrained decoder to fuse information across chunks (fusion-in-decoder). We illustrate through controlled experiments that SLED offers a viable strategy for long text understanding and evaluate our approach on SCROLLS, a benchmark with seven datasets across a wide range of language understanding tasks. We find that SLED is competitive with specialized models that are up to 50x larger and require a dedicated and expensive pretraining step.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的预训练语言模型 (LM) 在自然语言理解中无处不在，但由于其二次复杂度，无法应用于故事、科学文章和长文档等长序列。虽然已经提出了无数高效的变压器变体，但它们通常基于需要从头开始进行昂贵的预训练的自定义实现。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SLED：SLiding-Encoder 和 Decoder，这是一种处理长序列的简单方法，可重复使用和利用经过实战测试的短文本预训练 LM。具体来说，我们将输入划分为重叠的块，使用短文本 LM 编码器对每个块进行编码，并使用预训练的解码器来融合块之间的信息（解码器中的融合）。我们通过受控实验说明，SLED 为长文本理解提供了一种可行的策略，并评估了我们在 SCROLLS 上的方法，SCROLLS 是一个涵盖广泛语言理解任务的七个数据集的基准。我们发现 SLED 与放大 50 倍且需要专门且昂贵的预训练步骤的专用模型相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用短文本预训练模型处理长文本的高效方法
AI.motivation: 解决长文本处理的计算复杂度问题，同时避免昂贵的重新预训练成本
AI.method: 通过滑动窗口分块处理长文本，利用短文本编码器处理每个块，并用预训练解码器进行跨块信息融合
AI.result: 在SCROLLS基准测试中表现与50倍参数量的专用模型相当
AI.conclusion: SLED方法无需重新训练即可实现长文本理解，具有实际应用价值

ai_content.conclusion: SLED方法无需重新训练即可实现长文本理解，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Sidney Pontes-Filho,Pedro Lind,Stefano Nichele
title: Assessing the robustness of critical behavior in stochastic cellular automata
title_zh: 评估随机元胞自动机中关键行为的稳健性
abstract: There is evidence that biological systems, such as the brain, work at a critical regime robust to noise, and are therefore able to remain in it under perturbations. In this work, we address the question of robustness of critical systems to noise. In particular, we investigate the robustness of stochastic cellular automata (CAs) at criticality. A stochastic CA is one of the simplest stochastic models showing criticality. The transition state of stochastic CA is defined through a set of probabilities. We systematically perturb the probabilities of an optimal stochastic CA known to produce critical behavior, and we report that such a CA is able to remain in a critical regime up to a certain degree of noise. We present the results using error metrics of the resulting power-law fitting, such as Kolmogorov-Smirnov statistic and Kullback-Leibler divergence. We discuss the implication of our results in regards to future realization of brain-inspired artificial intelligence systems.
summary: There is evidence that biological systems, such as the brain, work at a critical regime robust to noise, and are therefore able to remain in it under perturbations. In this work, we address the question of robustness of critical systems to noise. In particular, we investigate the robustness of stochastic cellular automata (CAs) at criticality. A stochastic CA is one of the simplest stochastic models showing criticality. The transition state of stochastic CA is defined through a set of probabilities. We systematically perturb the probabilities of an optimal stochastic CA known to produce critical behavior, and we report that such a CA is able to remain in a critical regime up to a certain degree of noise. We present the results using error metrics of the resulting power-law fitting, such as Kolmogorov-Smirnov statistic and Kullback-Leibler divergence. We discuss the implication of our results in regards to future realization of brain-inspired artificial intelligence systems.
abstract_zh: 有证据表明，生物系统（例如大脑）在对噪声具有鲁棒性的关键状态下工作，因此能够在扰动下保持在该状态。在这项工作中，我们解决了关键系统对噪声的鲁棒性问题。特别是，我们研究了随机元胞自动机（CA）在临界点的鲁棒性。随机 CA 是显示关键性的最简单的随机模型之一。随机 CA 的过渡状态是通过一组概率来定义的。我们系统地扰动已知会产生关键行为的最佳随机 CA 的概率，并且我们报告说，这样的 CA 能够在一定程度的噪声下保持在关键状态。我们使用所得幂律拟合的误差度量来呈现结果，例如 Kolmogorov-Smirnov 统计量和 Kullback-Leibler 散度。我们讨论了我们的结果对未来实现受大脑启发的人工智能系统的影响。

AI.tldr: 评估随机细胞自动机在临界状态下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 生物系统（如大脑）在噪声下保持临界状态的能力启发研究者探索随机细胞自动机的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过系统扰动已知产生临界行为的随机细胞自动机的概率参数，并利用柯尔莫戈罗夫-斯米尔诺夫统计量和KL散度等误差指标分析结果。
AI.result: 随机细胞自动机在一定噪声水平下仍能保持临界状态，但超过阈值后偏离临界性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为脑启发人工智能系统的鲁棒性设计提供了理论依据。

ai_content.tldr: 评估随机细胞自动机在临界状态下的鲁棒性。

search_text: Assessing the robustness of critical behavior in stochastic cellular automata 评估随机元胞自动机中关键行为的稳健性 There is evidence that biological systems, such as the brain, work at a critical regime robust to noise, and are therefore able to remain in it under perturbations. In this work, we address the question of robustness of critical systems to noise. In particular, we investigate the robustness of stochastic cellular automata (CAs) at criticality. A stochastic CA is one of the simplest stochastic models showing criticality. The transition state of stochastic CA is defined through a set of probabilities. We systematically perturb the probabilities of an optimal stochastic CA known to produce critical behavior, and we report that such a CA is able to remain in a critical regime up to a certain degree of noise. We present the results using error metrics of the resulting power-law fitting, such as Kolmogorov-Smirnov statistic and Kullback-Leibler divergence. We discuss the implication of our results in regards to future realization of brain-inspired artificial intelligence systems. 有证据表明，生物系统（例如大脑）在对噪声具有鲁棒性的关键状态下工作，因此能够在扰动下保持在该状态。在这项工作中，我们解决了关键系统对噪声的鲁棒性问题。特别是，我们研究了随机元胞自动机（CA）在临界点的鲁棒性。随机 CA 是显示关键性的最简单的随机模型之一。随机 CA 的过渡状态是通过一组概率来定义的。我们系统地扰动已知会产生关键行为的最佳随机 CA 的概率，并且我们报告说，这样的 CA 能够在一定程度的噪声下保持在关键状态。我们使用所得幂律拟合的误差度量来呈现结果，例如 Kolmogorov-Smirnov 统计量和 Kullback-Leibler 散度。我们讨论了我们的结果对未来实现受大脑启发的人工智能系统的影响。 评估随机细胞自动机在临界状态下的鲁棒性。 Sidney Pontes-Filho,Pedro Lind,Stefano Nichele nlin.CG,cs.IT,cs.NE

authors_text: Barak Hoffer,Shahar Kvatinsky
title: Performing Stateful Logic Using Spin-Orbit Torque (SOT) MRAM
title_zh: 使用自旋轨道扭矩 (SOT) MRAM 执行状态逻辑
comment: Published in 2022 22nd IEEE International Conference on Nanotechnology (NANO)
comments: Published in 2022 22nd IEEE International Conference on Nanotechnology (NANO)
abstract: Stateful logic is a promising processing-in-memory (PIM) paradigm to perform logic operations using emerging nonvolatile memory cells. While most stateful logic circuits to date focused on technologies such as resistive RAM, we propose two approaches to designing stateful logic using spin orbit torque (SOT) MRAM. The first approach utilizes the separation of read and write paths in SOT devices to perform logic operations. In contrast to previous work, our method utilizes a standard memory structure, and each row can be used as input or output. The second approach uses voltage-gated SOT switching to allow stateful logic in denser memory arrays. We present array structures to support the two approaches and evaluate their functionality using SPICE simulations in the presence of process variation and device mismatch.
summary: Stateful logic is a promising processing-in-memory (PIM) paradigm to perform logic operations using emerging nonvolatile memory cells. While most stateful logic circuits to date focused on technologies such as resistive RAM, we propose two approaches to designing stateful logic using spin orbit torque (SOT) MRAM. The first approach utilizes the separation of read and write paths in SOT devices to perform logic operations. In contrast to previous work, our method utilizes a standard memory structure, and each row can be used as input or output. The second approach uses voltage-gated SOT switching to allow stateful logic in denser memory arrays. We present array structures to support the two approaches and evaluate their functionality using SPICE simulations in the presence of process variation and device mismatch.
abstract_zh: 状态逻辑是一种很有前景的内存处理 (PIM) 范例，可使用新兴的非易失性存储单元执行逻辑操作。虽然迄今为止大多数状态逻辑电路都集中在电阻 RAM 等技术上，但我们提出了两种使用自旋轨道扭矩 (SOT) MRAM 设计状态逻辑的方法。第一种方法利用 SOT 器件中读写路径的分离来执行逻辑操作。与之前的工作相比，我们的方法利用标准的内存结构，每一行都可以用作输入或输出。第二种方法使用电压门控 SOT 开关来允许更密集的存储器阵列中的状态逻辑。我们提出了阵列结构来支持这两种方法，并在存在工艺变化和器件不匹配的情况下使用 SPICE 仿真评估其功能。

AI.tldr: 提出两种基于自旋轨道扭矩（SOT）MRAM的状态逻辑设计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有状态逻辑研究多集中于电阻RAM，而SOT MRAM具有读写分离、高密度等优势，需探索其在状态逻辑中的应用。
AI.method: 第一种方法利用SOT器件读写路径分离特性，采用标准内存结构实现输入输出复用；第二种方法通过电压门控SOT切换，在高密度阵列中实现状态逻辑。通过SPICE模拟验证功能。
AI.result: 两种方法均在工艺变异和器件失配条件下通过仿真验证，证明其功能可行性。
AI.conclusion: SOT MRAM为状态逻辑提供了新路径，两种结构设计可支持不同场景需求，具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Weiming Feng,Heng Guo,Mark Jerrum,Jiaheng Wang
title: A simple polynomial-time approximation algorithm for the total variation distance between two product distributions
title_zh: 两个乘积分布之间总变异距离的简单多项式时间近似算法
abstract: We give a simple polynomial-time approximation algorithm for the total variation distance between two product distributions.
summary: We give a simple polynomial-time approximation algorithm for the total variation distance between two product distributions.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了一个简单的多项式时间近似算法来计算两个乘积分布之间的总变异距离。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单的多项式时间近似算法，用于计算两个乘积分布之间的总变差距离。
AI.motivation: 总变差距离是衡量概率分布差异的重要指标，但精确计算可能计算量过大，因此需要高效的近似方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于乘积分布特性的简单多项式时间近似算法，通过采样或数学性质进行近似计算。
AI.result: 成功开发出多项式时间近似算法，并证明了其时间复杂度和近似精度的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为处理乘积分布的总变差距离问题提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Joaquin Taverner,Emilio Vivancos,Vicente Botti
title: e-Genia3 An AgentSpeak extension for empathic agents
title_zh: e-Genia3 移情代理的 AgentSpeak 扩展
abstract: In this paper, we present e-Genia3 an extension of AgentSpeak to provide support to the development of empathic agents. The new extension modifies the agent's reasoning processes to select plans according to the analyzed event and the affective state and personality of the agent. In addition, our proposal allows a software agent to simulate the distinction between self and other agents through two different event appraisal processes: the empathic appraisal process, for eliciting emotions as a response to other agents emotions, and the regular affective appraisal process for other non-empathic affective events. The empathic regulation process adapts the elicited empathic emotion based on intrapersonal factors (e.g., the agent's personality and affective memory) and interpersonal characteristics of the agent (e.g., the affective link between the agents). The use of a memory of past events and their corresponding elicited emotions allows the maintaining of an affective link to support long-term empathic interaction between agents.
summary: In this paper, we present e-Genia3 an extension of AgentSpeak to provide support to the development of empathic agents. The new extension modifies the agent's reasoning processes to select plans according to the analyzed event and the affective state and personality of the agent. In addition, our proposal allows a software agent to simulate the distinction between self and other agents through two different event appraisal processes: the empathic appraisal process, for eliciting emotions as a response to other agents emotions, and the regular affective appraisal process for other non-empathic affective events. The empathic regulation process adapts the elicited empathic emotion based on intrapersonal factors (e.g., the agent's personality and affective memory) and interpersonal characteristics of the agent (e.g., the affective link between the agents). The use of a memory of past events and their corresponding elicited emotions allows the maintaining of an affective link to support long-term empathic interaction between agents.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 e-Genia3，它是 AgentSpeak 的扩展，为移情代理的开发提供支持。新的扩展修改了代理的推理过程，以根据分析的事件以及代理的情感状态和个性来选择计划。此外，我们的建议允许软件代理通过两种不同的事件评估过程来模拟自我和其他代理之间的区别：移情评估过程，用于引发情绪作为对其他代理情绪的反应，以及用于其他非移情情感事件的常规情感评估过程。共情调节过程根据个人内部因素（例如，主体的个性和情感记忆）和主体的人际特征（例如，主体之间的情感联系）来调整引发的共情情绪。使用对过去事件的记忆及其相应引发的情绪可以维持情感联系，以支持代理之间的长期共情互动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出e-Genia3，一种扩展的AgentSpeak框架，用于开发具有共情能力的软件代理，通过调整代理的推理过程和情感评估机制实现情感交互。
AI.motivation: 现有代理系统缺乏对情感和共情机制的有效建模，限制了其在复杂社交场景中的应用，需通过引入情感评估与记忆机制增强代理的共情能力。
AI.method: 扩展AgentSpeak语言，新增共情评估流程与常规情感评估流程，结合代理个性、情感记忆及人际关联性动态调节情感响应，并利用历史事件记忆维持长期情感联系。
AI.result: 实现了代理间基于共情的情感区分机制，支持根据个性特征和交互历史动态调整情感反应，有效维持跨时间的情感交互连贯性。
AI.conclusion: e-Genia3为构建具备长期共情能力的智能代理提供了可行框架，通过情感评估与记忆机制的结合显著提升了多代理系统的交互自然度。

ai_content_json.conclusion: e-Genia3为构建具备长期共情能力的智能代理提供了可行框架，通过情感评估与记忆机制的结合显著提升了多代理系统的交互自然度。

tldr: 本文提出e-Genia3，一种扩展的AgentSpeak框架，用于开发具有共情能力的软件代理，通过调整代理的推理过程和情感评估机制实现情感交互。
motivation: 现有代理系统缺乏对情感和共情机制的有效建模，限制了其在复杂社交场景中的应用，需通过引入情感评估与记忆机制增强代理的共情能力。
method: 扩展AgentSpeak语言，新增共情评估流程与常规情感评估流程，结合代理个性、情感记忆及人际关联性动态调节情感响应，并利用历史事件记忆维持长期情感联系。
result: 实现了代理间基于共情的情感区分机制，支持根据个性特征和交互历史动态调整情感反应，有效维持跨时间的情感交互连贯性。
conclusion: e-Genia3为构建具备长期共情能力的智能代理提供了可行框架，通过情感评估与记忆机制的结合显著提升了多代理系统的交互自然度。
search_text: e-Genia3 An AgentSpeak extension for empathic agents e-Genia3 移情代理的 AgentSpeak 扩展 In this paper, we present e-Genia3 an extension of AgentSpeak to provide support to the development of empathic agents. The new extension modifies the agent's reasoning processes to select plans according to the analyzed event and the affective state and personality of the agent. In addition, our proposal allows a software agent to simulate the distinction between self and other agents through two different event appraisal processes: the empathic appraisal process, for eliciting emotions as a response to other agents emotions, and the regular affective appraisal process for other non-empathic affective events. The empathic regulation process adapts the elicited empathic emotion based on intrapersonal factors (e.g., the agent's personality and affective memory) and interpersonal characteristics of the agent (e.g., the affective link between the agents). The use of a memory of past events and their corresponding elicited emotions allows the maintaining of an affective link to support long-term empathic interaction between agents. 在本文中，我们提出了 e-Genia3，它是 AgentSpeak 的扩展，为移情代理的开发提供支持。新的扩展修改了代理的推理过程，以根据分析的事件以及代理的情感状态和个性来选择计划。此外，我们的建议允许软件代理通过两种不同的事件评估过程来模拟自我和其他代理之间的区别：移情评估过程，用于引发情绪作为对其他代理情绪的反应，以及用于其他非移情情感事件的常规情感评估过程。共情调节过程根据个人内部因素（例如，主体的个性和情感记忆）和主体的人际特征（例如，主体之间的情感联系）来调整引发的共情情绪。使用对过去事件的记忆及其相应引发的情绪可以维持情感联系，以支持代理之间的长期共情互动。 本文提出e-Genia3，一种扩展的AgentSpeak框架，用于开发具有共情能力的软件代理，通过调整代理的推理过程和情感评估机制实现情感交互。 Joaquin Taverner,Emilio Vivancos,Vicente Botti cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.PL

authors_text: Seng W. Loke
title: The Rise of Quantum Internet Computing
title_zh: 量子互联网计算的兴起
abstract: This article highlights quantum Internet computing as referring to distributed quantum computing over the quantum Internet, analogous to (classical) Internet computing involving (classical) distributed computing over the (classical) Internet. Relevant to quantum Internet computing would be areas of study such as quantum protocols for distributed nodes using quantum information for computations, quantum cloud computing, delegated verifiable blind or private computing, non-local gates, and distributed quantum applications, over Internet-scale distances.
summary: This article highlights quantum Internet computing as referring to distributed quantum computing over the quantum Internet, analogous to (classical) Internet computing involving (classical) distributed computing over the (classical) Internet. Relevant to quantum Internet computing would be areas of study such as quantum protocols for distributed nodes using quantum information for computations, quantum cloud computing, delegated verifiable blind or private computing, non-local gates, and distributed quantum applications, over Internet-scale distances.
abstract_zh: 本文强调量子互联网计算是指量子互联网上的分布式量子计算，类似于涉及（经典）互联网上的（经典）分布式计算的（经典）互联网计算。与量子互联网计算相关的研究领域包括使用量子信息进行计算的分布式节点的量子协议、量子云计算、委托可验证盲计算或私有计算、非本地门以及互联网规模距离上的分布式量子应用。

AI.tldr: 本文主要探讨量子互联网计算的概念及其在分布式量子计算中的应用。
AI.motivation: 随着量子技术的发展，需要探索如何在互联网规模上实现分布式量子计算，以突破传统计算的限制并解决复杂问题。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和现有技术综述，探讨量子互联网计算的关键技术和应用方向。
AI.result: 明确了量子互联网计算的关键技术领域，并指出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 量子互联网计算将推动分布式量子应用的发展，为未来互联网技术带来革命性变化。

authors_text: Stephan-Daniel Gravert,Mike Y. Michelis,Simon Rogler,Dario Tscholl,Thomas Buchner,Robert K. Katzschmann
title: Planar Modeling and Sim-to-Real of a Tethered Multimaterial Soft Swimmer Driven by Peano-HASELs
title_zh: Peano-HASEL 驱动的系留多材料软体游泳者的平面建模和仿真
comment: Published at IROS 2022. Stephan-Daniel Gravert and Mike Y. Michelis contributed equally to this work
comments: Published at IROS 2022. Stephan-Daniel Gravert and Mike Y. Michelis contributed equally to this work
abstract: Soft robotics has the potential to revolutionize robotic locomotion, in particular, soft robotic swimmers offer a minimally invasive and adaptive solution to explore and preserve our oceans. Unfortunately, current soft robotic swimmers are vastly inferior to evolved biological swimmers, especially in terms of controllability, efficiency, maneuverability, and longevity. Additionally, the tedious iterative fabrication and empirical testing required to design soft robots has hindered their optimization. In this work, we tackle this challenge by providing an efficient and straightforward pipeline for designing and fabricating soft robotic swimmers equipped with electrostatic actuation. We streamline the process to allow for rapid additive manufacturing, and show how a differentiable simulation can be used to match a simplified model to the real deformation of a robotic swimmer. We perform several experiments with the fabricated swimmer by varying the voltage and actuation frequency of the swimmer's antagonistic muscles. We show how the voltage and frequency vary the locomotion speed of the swimmer while moving in liquid oil and observe a clear optimum in forward swimming speed. The differentiable simulation model we propose has various downstream applications, such as control and shape optimization of the swimmer; optimization results can be directly mapped back to the real robot through our sim-to-real matching.
summary: Soft robotics has the potential to revolutionize robotic locomotion, in particular, soft robotic swimmers offer a minimally invasive and adaptive solution to explore and preserve our oceans. Unfortunately, current soft robotic swimmers are vastly inferior to evolved biological swimmers, especially in terms of controllability, efficiency, maneuverability, and longevity. Additionally, the tedious iterative fabrication and empirical testing required to design soft robots has hindered their optimization. In this work, we tackle this challenge by providing an efficient and straightforward pipeline for designing and fabricating soft robotic swimmers equipped with electrostatic actuation. We streamline the process to allow for rapid additive manufacturing, and show how a differentiable simulation can be used to match a simplified model to the real deformation of a robotic swimmer. We perform several experiments with the fabricated swimmer by varying the voltage and actuation frequency of the swimmer's antagonistic muscles. We show how the voltage and frequency vary the locomotion speed of the swimmer while moving in liquid oil and observe a clear optimum in forward swimming speed. The differentiable simulation model we propose has various downstream applications, such as control and shape optimization of the swimmer; optimization results can be directly mapped back to the real robot through our sim-to-real matching.
abstract_zh: 软机器人技术有可能彻底改变机器人运动，特别是软机器人游泳者为探索和保护我们的海洋提供了微创和自适应解决方案。不幸的是，目前的软体机器人游泳者远远不如进化后的生物游泳者，特别是在可控性、效率、可操作性和寿命方面。此外，设计软机器人所需的繁琐的迭代制造和经验测试阻碍了它们的优化。在这项工作中，我们通过提供高效且简单的管道来设计和制造配备静电驱动的软体机器人游泳器来应对这一挑战。我们简化了流程以实现快速增材制造，并展示了如何使用可微分模拟将简化模型与机器人游泳者的真实变形相匹配。我们通过改变游泳者拮抗肌的电压和致动频率，对所制作的游泳者进行了多项实验。我们展示了电压和频率如何改变游泳者在液体油中移动时的运动速度，并观察到向前游泳速度的明显最佳值。我们提出的可微仿真模型具有各种下游应用，例如游泳者的控制和形状优化；通过我们的模拟与真实匹配，优化结果可以直接映射回真实机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效设计和制造配备静电驱动的软体机器人游泳器的流程，并通过可微分模拟实现仿真到现实的匹配。
AI.motivation: 当前软体机器人游泳器在可控性、效率和耐久性等方面远不如生物游泳器，且设计过程依赖繁琐的迭代制造和实验测试。
AI.method: 通过快速增材制造工艺结合可微分仿真模型，建立简化模型与实际变形的匹配，并通过调节电压和驱动频率进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验发现电压和频率对游泳速度有显著影响，并存在最佳前进速度；仿真模型可应用于控制和形状优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为软体游泳器的设计和控制提供了优化方案，仿真结果可直接映射到实际机器人，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Mohammad Azharuddin Sanpui
title: Fair Division of Multi-layered Cakes
title_zh: 多层蛋糕的公平划分
abstract: We consider multi-layered cake cutting in order to fairly allocate numerous divisible resources (layers of cake) among a group of agents under two constraints: contiguity and feasibility. We first introduce a new computational model in a multi-layered cake named ``a pair of knives''. Then, we show the existence of an exact multi-allocation for two agents and two layers using the new computational model. We demonstrate the computation procedure of a feasible and contiguous proportional multi-allocation over a three-layered cake for more than three agents. Finally, we develop a technique for computing proportional allocations for any number $n\geq 2^a3$ of agents and $2^a3$ layers, where $a$ is any positive integer.
summary: We consider multi-layered cake cutting in order to fairly allocate numerous divisible resources (layers of cake) among a group of agents under two constraints: contiguity and feasibility. We first introduce a new computational model in a multi-layered cake named ``a pair of knives''. Then, we show the existence of an exact multi-allocation for two agents and two layers using the new computational model. We demonstrate the computation procedure of a feasible and contiguous proportional multi-allocation over a three-layered cake for more than three agents. Finally, we develop a technique for computing proportional allocations for any number $n\geq 2^a3$ of agents and $2^a3$ layers, where $a$ is any positive integer.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑多层切蛋糕，以便在两个约束下在一组代理之间公平分配大量可分割的资源（蛋糕层）：连续性和可行性。我们首先在名为“一对刀”的多层蛋糕中引入一种新的计算模型。然后，我们使用新的计算模型证明了两个代理和两个层的精确多重分配的存在性。我们演示了在三层蛋糕上为三个以上智能体进行可行且连续的比例多重分配的计算过程。最后，我们开发了一种计算任意数量 $n\geq 2^a3$ 代理和 $2^a3$ 层的比例分配的技术，其中 $a$ 是任何正整数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在连续性和可行性约束下，如何公平分配多层蛋糕资源的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有资源分配方法难以同时满足多层资源的连续性要求和可行性约束，需探索新的计算模型与分配策略。
AI.method: 引入名为'一对刀'的新计算模型，结合分层切割与比例分配算法，设计适用于多层蛋糕的公平划分流程。
AI.result: 证明了两层蛋糕两代理的精确分配存在性，提出三层蛋糕多代理的可行分配方法，并推广至任意层数与代理数的通用分配技术。
AI.conclusion: 新模型有效解决了多层资源的公平分配问题，为复杂资源划分场景提供了理论支持与计算框架。

search_text: Fair Division of Multi-layered Cakes 多层蛋糕的公平划分 We consider multi-layered cake cutting in order to fairly allocate numerous divisible resources (layers of cake) among a group of agents under two constraints: contiguity and feasibility. We first introduce a new computational model in a multi-layered cake named ``a pair of knives''. Then, we show the existence of an exact multi-allocation for two agents and two layers using the new computational model. We demonstrate the computation procedure of a feasible and contiguous proportional multi-allocation over a three-layered cake for more than three agents. Finally, we develop a technique for computing proportional allocations for any number $n\geq 2^a3$ of agents and $2^a3$ layers, where $a$ is any positive integer. 我们考虑多层切蛋糕，以便在两个约束下在一组代理之间公平分配大量可分割的资源（蛋糕层）：连续性和可行性。我们首先在名为“一对刀”的多层蛋糕中引入一种新的计算模型。然后，我们使用新的计算模型证明了两个代理和两个层的精确多重分配的存在性。我们演示了在三层蛋糕上为三个以上智能体进行可行且连续的比例多重分配的计算过程。最后，我们开发了一种计算任意数量 $n\geq 2^a3$ 代理和 $2^a3$ 层的比例分配的技术，其中 $a$ 是任何正整数。 本文研究在连续性和可行性约束下，如何公平分配多层蛋糕资源的问题。 Mohammad Azharuddin Sanpui cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Federico Becattini,Lavinia De Divitiis,Claudio Baecchi,Alberto Del Bimbo
title: Fashion Recommendation Based on Style and Social Events
title_zh: 基于风格和社交活动的时尚推荐
comment: submitted to Multimedia Tools and Applications. Data available at: https://github.com/fedebecat/Fashion4Events
comments: submitted to Multimedia Tools and Applications. Data available at: https://github.com/fedebecat/Fashion4Events
abstract: Fashion recommendation is often declined as the task of finding complementary items given a query garment or retrieving outfits that are suitable for a given user. In this work we address the problem by adding an additional semantic layer based on the style of the proposed dressing. We model style according to two important aspects: the mood and the emotion concealed behind color combination patterns and the appropriateness of the retrieved garments for a given type of social event. To address the former we rely on Shigenobu Kobayashi's color image scale, which associated emotional patterns and moods to color triples. The latter instead is analyzed by extracting garments from images of social events. Overall, we integrate in a state of the art garment recommendation framework a style classifier and an event classifier in order to condition recommendation on a given query.
summary: Fashion recommendation is often declined as the task of finding complementary items given a query garment or retrieving outfits that are suitable for a given user. In this work we address the problem by adding an additional semantic layer based on the style of the proposed dressing. We model style according to two important aspects: the mood and the emotion concealed behind color combination patterns and the appropriateness of the retrieved garments for a given type of social event. To address the former we rely on Shigenobu Kobayashi's color image scale, which associated emotional patterns and moods to color triples. The latter instead is analyzed by extracting garments from images of social events. Overall, we integrate in a state of the art garment recommendation framework a style classifier and an event classifier in order to condition recommendation on a given query.
abstract_zh: 时尚推荐通常会被拒绝，因为这是在给定查询服装的情况下查找补充商品或检索适合给定用户的服装的任务。在这项工作中，我们通过根据所提议的着装风格添加额外的语义层来解决这个问题。我们根据两个重要方面来建模风格：隐藏在颜色组合图案背后的情绪和情感，以及检索到的服装对于特定类型的社交活动的适当性。为了解决前者，我们依靠 Shigenobu Kobayashi 的色彩图像量表，它将情感模式和情绪与颜色三元组相关联。相反，后者是通过从社会事件图像中提取服装来进行分析的。总的来说，我们在最先进的服装推荐框架中集成了风格分类器和事件分类器，以便根据给定的查询调整推荐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合服装风格与社交事件场景的时尚推荐方法，通过分析颜色情感关联和场合适配性提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 传统时尚推荐侧重物品互补性或用户偏好，但忽视了服装风格所传达的情绪内涵及特定社交场景的适配性需求。
AI.method: 基于Kobayashi颜色三元组模型分析色彩情感关联，通过社交活动图像提取场合特征，将风格分类器与事件分类器嵌入推荐框架实现条件推荐。
AI.result: 实验验证了融合风格语义和场景信息的推荐框架能有效提升推荐结果的情感匹配度和场景适用性。
AI.conclusion: 将情绪语义分析与社交场景建模相结合，可显著增强时尚推荐系统的个性化和情境适应能力。

authors_text: Reza Azad,Moein Heidari,Moein Shariatnia,Ehsan Khodapanah Aghdam,Sanaz Karimijafarbigloo,Ehsan Adeli,Dorit Merhof
title: TransDeepLab: Convolution-Free Transformer-based DeepLab v3+ for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: TransDeepLab：用于医学图像分割的基于无卷积 Transformer 的 DeepLab v3+
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been the de facto standard in a diverse set of computer vision tasks for many years. Especially, deep neural networks based on seminal architectures such as U-shaped models with skip-connections or atrous convolution with pyramid pooling have been tailored to a wide range of medical image analysis tasks. The main advantage of such architectures is that they are prone to detaining versatile local features. However, as a general consensus, CNNs fail to capture long-range dependencies and spatial correlations due to the intrinsic property of confined receptive field size of convolution operations. Alternatively, Transformer, profiting from global information modelling that stems from the self-attention mechanism, has recently attained remarkable performance in natural language processing and computer vision. Nevertheless, previous studies prove that both local and global features are critical for a deep model in dense prediction, such as segmenting complicated structures with disparate shapes and configurations. To this end, this paper proposes TransDeepLab, a novel DeepLab-like pure Transformer for medical image segmentation. Specifically, we exploit hierarchical Swin-Transformer with shifted windows to extend the DeepLabv3 and model the Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) module. A thorough search of the relevant literature yielded that we are the first to model the seminal DeepLab model with a pure Transformer-based model. Extensive experiments on various medical image segmentation tasks verify that our approach performs superior or on par with most contemporary works on an amalgamation of Vision Transformer and CNN-based methods, along with a significant reduction of model complexity. The codes and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/rezazad68/transdeeplab
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been the de facto standard in a diverse set of computer vision tasks for many years. Especially, deep neural networks based on seminal architectures such as U-shaped models with skip-connections or atrous convolution with pyramid pooling have been tailored to a wide range of medical image analysis tasks. The main advantage of such architectures is that they are prone to detaining versatile local features. However, as a general consensus, CNNs fail to capture long-range dependencies and spatial correlations due to the intrinsic property of confined receptive field size of convolution operations. Alternatively, Transformer, profiting from global information modelling that stems from the self-attention mechanism, has recently attained remarkable performance in natural language processing and computer vision. Nevertheless, previous studies prove that both local and global features are critical for a deep model in dense prediction, such as segmenting complicated structures with disparate shapes and configurations. To this end, this paper proposes TransDeepLab, a novel DeepLab-like pure Transformer for medical image segmentation. Specifically, we exploit hierarchical Swin-Transformer with shifted windows to extend the DeepLabv3 and model the Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) module. A thorough search of the relevant literature yielded that we are the first to model the seminal DeepLab model with a pure Transformer-based model. Extensive experiments on various medical image segmentation tasks verify that our approach performs superior or on par with most contemporary works on an amalgamation of Vision Transformer and CNN-based methods, along with a significant reduction of model complexity. The codes and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/rezazad68/transdeeplab
abstract_zh: 多年来，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 一直是各种计算机视觉任务的事实上的标准。特别是，基于开创性架构的深度神经网络，例如带有跳跃连接的 U 形模型或带有金字塔池的空洞卷积，已针对广泛的医学图像分析任务进行了定制。这种架构的主要优点是它们很容易保留通用的局部特征。然而，作为普遍共识，由于卷积运算的感受野大小受限的固有特性，CNN 无法捕获长程依赖性和空间相关性。另外，Transformer 受益于自注意力机制的全局信息模型，最近在自然语言处理和计算机视觉方面取得了令人瞩目的表现。然而，之前的研究证明，局部和全局特征对于密集预测中的深度模型至关重要，例如分割具有不同形状和配置的复杂结构。为此，本文提出了TransDeepLab，一种新颖的类似DeepLab的纯Transformer，用于医学图像分割。具体来说，我们利用具有移动窗口的分层 Swin-Transformer 来扩展 DeepLabv3 并对 Atrous 空间金字塔池 (ASPP) 模块进行建模。对相关文献的彻底搜索表明，我们是第一个使用纯粹基于 Transformer 的模型对开创性 DeepLab 模型进行建模的人。对各种医学图像分割任务的广泛实验证明，我们的方法在视觉变换器和基于 CNN 的方法的融合方面表现优于或与大多数当代作品相当，并且模型复杂性显着降低。代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://github.com/rezazad68/transdeeplab 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransDeepLab，一种基于Transformer的纯卷积神经网络架构，用于医学图像分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因感受野限制难以捕捉长距离依赖关系，而Transformer能建模全局信息。医学图像分割需要同时利用局部和全局特征，因此需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 采用分层Swin-Transformer与移位窗口机制改进DeepLabv3+，重构空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）模块，实现纯Transformer架构。
AI.result: 在多种医学图像分割任务中，TransDeepLab性能优于或媲美现有CNN与Vision Transformer混合方法，且模型复杂度显著降低。
AI.conclusion: TransDeepLab通过纯Transformer架构有效融合局部与全局特征，为医学图像分割提供高效解决方案。

A thorough search of the relevant literature yielded that we are the first to model the seminal DeepLab model with a pure Transformer-based model. The codes and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/rezazad68/transdeeplab 多年来，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 一直是各种计算机视觉任务的事实上的标准。特别是，基于开创性架构的深度神经网络，例如带有跳跃连接的 U 形模型或带有金字塔池的空洞卷积，已针对广泛的医学图像分析任务进行了定制。这种架构的主要优点是它们很容易保留通用的局部特征。然而，作为普遍共识，由于卷积运算的感受野大小受限的固有特性，CNN 无法捕获长程依赖性和空间相关性。另外，Transformer 受益于自注意力机制的全局信息模型，最近在自然语言处理和计算机视觉方面取得了令人瞩目的表现。然而，之前的研究证明，局部和全局特征对于密集预测中的深度模型至关重要，例如分割具有不同形状和配置的复杂结构。为此，本文提出了TransDeepLab，一种新颖的类似DeepLab的纯Transformer，用于医学图像分割。具体来说，我们利用具有移动窗口的分层 Swin-Transformer 来扩展 DeepLabv3 并对 Atrous 空间金字塔池 (ASPP) 模块进行建模。对相关文献的彻底搜索表明，我们是第一个使用纯粹基于 Transformer 的模型对开创性 DeepLab 模型进行建模的人。对各种医学图像分割任务的广泛实验证明，我们的方法在视觉变换器和基于 CNN 的方法的融合方面表现优于或与大多数当代作品相当，并且模型复杂性显着降低。代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://github.com/rezazad68/transdeeplab 上公开获取 本文提出TransDeepLab，一种基于Transformer的纯卷积神经网络架构，用于医学图像分割任务。 Reza Azad,Moein Heidari,Moein Shariatnia,Ehsan Khodapanah Aghdam,Sanaz Karimijafarbigloo,Ehsan Adeli,Dorit Merhof eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xinyue Zhou,Mingyu Yin,Xinyuan Chen,Li Sun,Changxin Gao,Qingli Li
title: Cross Attention Based Style Distribution for Controllable Person Image Synthesis
title_zh: 基于交叉注意力的风格分布，用于可控人物图像合成
abstract: Controllable person image synthesis task enables a wide range of applications through explicit control over body pose and appearance. In this paper, we propose a cross attention based style distribution module that computes between the source semantic styles and target pose for pose transfer. The module intentionally selects the style represented by each semantic and distributes them according to the target pose. The attention matrix in cross attention expresses the dynamic similarities between the target pose and the source styles for all semantics. Therefore, it can be utilized to route the color and texture from the source image, and is further constrained by the target parsing map to achieve a clearer objective. At the same time, to encode the source appearance accurately, the self attention among different semantic styles is also added. The effectiveness of our model is validated quantitatively and qualitatively on pose transfer and virtual try-on tasks.
summary: Controllable person image synthesis task enables a wide range of applications through explicit control over body pose and appearance. In this paper, we propose a cross attention based style distribution module that computes between the source semantic styles and target pose for pose transfer. The module intentionally selects the style represented by each semantic and distributes them according to the target pose. The attention matrix in cross attention expresses the dynamic similarities between the target pose and the source styles for all semantics. Therefore, it can be utilized to route the color and texture from the source image, and is further constrained by the target parsing map to achieve a clearer objective. At the same time, to encode the source appearance accurately, the self attention among different semantic styles is also added. The effectiveness of our model is validated quantitatively and qualitatively on pose transfer and virtual try-on tasks.
abstract_zh: 可控人物图像合成任务通过对身体姿势和外观的显式控制来实现广泛的应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于交叉注意的风格分布模块，该模块在源语义风格和目标姿势之间进行计算以进行姿势转移。该模块有意选择每个语义所代表的风格，并根据目标姿势进行分配。交叉注意力中的注意力矩阵表达了目标姿势和源风格之间所有语义的动态相似性。因此，它可以用来从源图像中路由颜色和纹理，并进一步受到目标解析图的约束，以达到更清晰的目标。同时，为了准确地编码源外观，还添加了不同语义风格之间的自注意力。我们的模型的有效性在姿势转移和虚拟试穿任务上得到了定量和定性的验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交叉注意力的风格分布模块，用于可控的人像合成任务，通过显式控制身体姿势和外观实现姿势转换与虚拟试穿。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理源图像语义风格与目标姿势间的动态相似性匹配时存在不足，需更精确的风格分布机制以实现颜色纹理的合理路由与目标姿势约束。
AI.method: 设计交叉注意力模块计算源语义风格与目标姿势间的动态相似性，通过注意力矩阵路由源图像颜色纹理，并结合目标解析图约束；同时引入自注意力机制增强源外观编码。
AI.result: 在姿势转换和虚拟试穿任务中，模型在定量指标和视觉效果上均表现出有效性，生成结果更符合目标姿势且保持源图像风格。
AI.conclusion: 交叉注意力与自注意力的结合有效提升了可控人像合成的精度，为姿势驱动的图像生成提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Simon Boche,Xingxing Zuo,Simon Schaefer,Stefan Leutenegger
title: Visual-Inertial SLAM with Tightly-Coupled Dropout-Tolerant GPS Fusion
title_zh: 具有紧耦合容差 GPS 融合的视觉惯性 SLAM
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Robotic applications are continuously striving towards higher levels of autonomy. To achieve that goal, a highly robust and accurate state estimation is indispensable. Combining visual and inertial sensor modalities has proven to yield accurate and locally consistent results in short-term applications. Unfortunately, visual-inertial state estimators suffer from the accumulation of drift for long-term trajectories. To eliminate this drift, global measurements can be fused into the state estimation pipeline. The most known and widely available source of global measurements is the Global Positioning System (GPS). In this paper, we propose a novel approach that fully combines stereo Visual-Inertial Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM), including visual loop closures, with the fusion of global sensor modalities in a tightly-coupled and optimisation-based framework. Incorporating measurement uncertainties, we provide a robust criterion to solve the global reference frame initialisation problem. Furthermore, we propose a loop-closure-like optimisation scheme to compensate drift accumulated during outages in receiving GPS signals. Experimental validation on datasets and in a real-world experiment demonstrates the robustness of our approach to GPS dropouts as well as its capability to estimate highly accurate and globally consistent trajectories compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Robotic applications are continuously striving towards higher levels of autonomy. To achieve that goal, a highly robust and accurate state estimation is indispensable. Combining visual and inertial sensor modalities has proven to yield accurate and locally consistent results in short-term applications. Unfortunately, visual-inertial state estimators suffer from the accumulation of drift for long-term trajectories. To eliminate this drift, global measurements can be fused into the state estimation pipeline. The most known and widely available source of global measurements is the Global Positioning System (GPS). In this paper, we propose a novel approach that fully combines stereo Visual-Inertial Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM), including visual loop closures, with the fusion of global sensor modalities in a tightly-coupled and optimisation-based framework. Incorporating measurement uncertainties, we provide a robust criterion to solve the global reference frame initialisation problem. Furthermore, we propose a loop-closure-like optimisation scheme to compensate drift accumulated during outages in receiving GPS signals. Experimental validation on datasets and in a real-world experiment demonstrates the robustness of our approach to GPS dropouts as well as its capability to estimate highly accurate and globally consistent trajectories compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 机器人应用正在不断努力实现更高水平的自主性。为了实现这一目标，高度稳健且准确的状态估计是必不可少的。事实证明，结合视觉和惯性传感器模式可以在短期应用中产生准确且局部一致的结果。不幸的是，视觉惯性状态估计器会受到长期轨迹漂移累积的影响。为了消除这种漂移，可以将全局测量融合到状态估计管道中。最知名且广泛使用的全球测量来源是全球定位系统 (GPS)。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法将立体视觉惯性同步定位和建图（SLAM）（包括视觉闭环）与紧密耦合和基于优化的框架中的全局传感器模式的融合完全结合起来。结合测量不确定性，我们提供了一个稳健的标准来解决全局参考系初始化问题。此外，我们提出了一种类似闭环的优化方案来补偿接收 GPS 信号中断期间累积的漂移。对数据集和现实世界实验的实验验证证明了我们的 GPS 丢失方法的稳健性，以及与现有最先进方法相比，其估计高精度和全球一致轨迹的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合立体视觉惯性SLAM与抗GPS信号丢失的紧密耦合融合方法，以提高长期轨迹估计的鲁棒性和全局一致性。
AI.motivation: 视觉惯性SLAM在长期轨迹中存在漂移问题，而GPS虽能提供全局信息但易受信号丢失影响，现有方法难以兼顾两者并处理GPS中断情况。
AI.method: 构建基于优化的紧密耦合框架，融合立体视觉惯性SLAM与GPS测量，引入鲁棒初始化准则及类似回环优化方案补偿GPS中断期间的漂移。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在GPS信号丢失场景下仍能保持高鲁棒性，相比现有方法可生成更精确且全局一致的轨迹估计。
AI.conclusion: 通过紧密耦合GPS与视觉惯性SLAM并设计漂移补偿机制，有效解决了长期轨迹估计中的全局一致性与抗GPS中断问题。

authors_text: Zhibin Li,Shuai Li,Xin Luo
title: A New Calibration Method for Industrial Robot Based on Step-Size Levenberg-Marquardt Algorithm
title_zh: 基于步长Levenberg-Marquardt算法的工业机器人标定新方法
abstract: Industrial robots play a vital role in automatic production, which have been widely utilized in industrial production activities, like handling and welding. However, due to an uncalibrated robot with machining tolerance and assembly tolerance, it suffers from low absolute positioning accuracy, which cannot satisfy the requirements of high-precision manufacture. To address this hot issue, we propose a novel calibration method based on an unscented Kalman filter and variable step-size Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm. This work has three ideas: a) proposing a novel variable step-size Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm to addresses the issue of local optimum in a Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm; b) employing an unscented Kalman filter to reduce the influence of the measurement noises; and c) developing a novel calibration method incorporating an unscented Kalman filter with a variable step-size Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm. Furthermore, we conduct enough experiments on an ABB IRB 120 industrial robot. From the experimental results, the proposed method achieves much higher calibration accuracy than some state-of-the-art calibration methods. Hence, this work is an important milestone in the field of robot calibration.

However, due to an uncalibrated robot with machining tolerance and assembly tolerance, it suffers from low absolute positioning accuracy, which cannot satisfy the requirements of high-precision manufacture. To address this hot issue, we propose a novel calibration method based on an unscented Kalman filter and variable step-size Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm. This work has three ideas: a) proposing a novel variable step-size Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm to addresses the issue of local optimum in a Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm; b) employing an unscented Kalman filter to reduce the influence of the measurement noises; and c) developing a novel calibration method incorporating an unscented Kalman filter with a variable step-size Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm. Furthermore, we conduct enough experiments on an ABB IRB 120 industrial robot. From the experimental results, the proposed method achieves much higher calibration accuracy than some state-of-the-art calibration methods. Hence, this work is an important milestone in the field of robot calibration.
abstract_zh: 工业机器人在自动化生产中发挥着至关重要的作用，已广泛应用于搬运、焊接等工业生产活动中。但由于机器人的加工公差和装配公差未经标定，其绝对定位精度较低，无法满足高精度制造的要求。为了解决这个热点问题，我们提出了一种基于无迹卡尔曼滤波器和可变步长 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法的新颖校准方法。这项工作有三个想法：a）提出一种新颖的可变步长 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法来解决 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法中的局部最优问题； b) 采用无迹卡尔曼滤波器来减少测量噪声的影响； c) 开发一种新颖的校准方法，将无迹卡尔曼滤波器与可变步长 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法相结合。此外，我们在 ABB IRB 120 工业机器人上进行了足够的实验。从实验结果来看，所提出的方法比一些最先进的校准方法获得了更高的校准精度。因此，这项工作是机器人标定领域的一个重要里程碑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变步长Levenberg-Marquardt算法和无迹卡尔曼滤波器的新型工业机器人标定方法，以提高标定精度。
AI.motivation: 工业机器人因制造和装配误差导致绝对定位精度不足，难以满足高精度制造需求，亟需改进标定方法。
AI.method: 提出变步长Levenberg-Marquardt算法解决局部最优问题，结合无迹卡尔曼滤波器抑制测量噪声，并融合两者开发新型标定方法。
AI.result: 在ABB IRB 120机器人上的实验表明，该方法标定精度显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为机器人标定领域提供了重要进展，有效提升了工业机器人的高精度制造能力。

authors_text: Kwantae Kim,Chang Gao,Rui Graça,Ilya Kiselev,Hoi-Jun Yoo,Tobi Delbruck,Shih-Chii Liu
title: A 23 $μ$W Keyword Spotting IC with Ring-Oscillator-Based Time-Domain Feature Extraction
title_zh: 具有基于环形振荡器的时域特征提取功能的 23 $μ$W 关键字识别 IC
abstract: This article presents the first keyword spotting (KWS) IC which uses a ring-oscillator-based time-domain processing technique for its analog feature extractor (FEx). Its extensive usage of time-encoding schemes allows the analog audio signal to be processed in a fully time-domain manner except for the voltage-to-time conversion stage of the analog front-end. Benefiting from fundamental building blocks based on digital logic gates, it offers a better technology scalability compared to conventional voltage-domain designs. Fabricated in a 65 nm CMOS process, the prototyped KWS IC occupies 2.03mm$^{2}$ and dissipates 23 $μ$W power consumption including analog FEx and digital neural network classifier. The 16-channel time-domain FEx achieves 54.89 dB dynamic range for 16 ms frame shift size while consuming 9.3 $μ$W. The measurement result verifies that the proposed IC performs a 12-class KWS task on the Google Speech Command Dataset (GSCD) with >86% accuracy and 12.4 ms latency.
summary: This article presents the first keyword spotting (KWS) IC which uses a ring-oscillator-based time-domain processing technique for its analog feature extractor (FEx). Its extensive usage of time-encoding schemes allows the analog audio signal to be processed in a fully time-domain manner except for the voltage-to-time conversion stage of the analog front-end. Benefiting from fundamental building blocks based on digital logic gates, it offers a better technology scalability compared to conventional voltage-domain designs. Fabricated in a 65 nm CMOS process, the prototyped KWS IC occupies 2.03mm$^{2}$ and dissipates 23 $μ$W power consumption including analog FEx and digital neural network classifier. The 16-channel time-domain FEx achieves 54.89 dB dynamic range for 16 ms frame shift size while consuming 9.3 $μ$W. The measurement result verifies that the proposed IC performs a 12-class KWS task on the Google Speech Command Dataset (GSCD) with >86% accuracy and 12.4 ms latency.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了第一个关键字识别 (KWS) IC，其模拟特征提取器 (FEx) 使用基于环形振荡器的时域处理技术。其时间编码方案的广泛使用使得除了模拟前端的电压时间转换阶段之外，模拟音频信号能够以完全时域的方式进行处理。受益于基于数字逻辑门的基本构建模块，与传统电压域设计相比，它提供了更好的技术可扩展性。原型 KWS IC 采用 65 nm CMOS 工艺制造，尺寸为 2.03mm$^{2}$，功耗为 23 $μ$W，包括模拟 FEx 和数字神经网络分类器。 16 通道时域 FEx 在 16 ms 帧移位大小下实现了 54.89 dB 动态范围，同时消耗 9.3 $μ$W。测量结果验证了所提出的 IC 在 Google 语音命令数据集 (GSCD) 上执行 12 类 KWS 任务，准确度 >86%，延迟为 12.4 毫秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于环形振荡器的时域特征提取技术的低功耗关键词识别芯片。
AI.motivation: 传统电压域设计存在技术扩展性差和高功耗问题，需开发更高效的关键词识别硬件方案。
AI.method: 采用环形振荡器实现时域特征提取，通过时间编码方案处理模拟音频信号，结合数字神经网络分类器。
AI.result: 芯片在65nm工艺下实现2.03mm²面积和23μW功耗，16通道特征提取器动态范围达54.89dB，关键词识别准确率超86%且延迟12.4ms。
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过时域处理显著降低功耗并提升可扩展性，为低功耗语音识别提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jae Won Cho,Dong-jin Kim,Hyeonggon Ryu,In So Kweon
title: Generative Bias for Robust Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 稳健视觉问答的生成偏差
abstract: The task of Visual Question Answering (VQA) is known to be plagued by the issue of VQA models exploiting biases within the dataset to make its final prediction. Various previous ensemble based debiasing methods have been proposed where an additional model is purposefully trained to be biased in order to train a robust target model. However, these methods compute the bias for a model simply from the label statistics of the training data or from single modal branches. In this work, in order to better learn the bias a target VQA model suffers from, we propose a generative method to train the bias model directly from the target model, called GenB. In particular, GenB employs a generative network to learn the bias in the target model through a combination of the adversarial objective and knowledge distillation. We then debias our target model with GenB as a bias model, and show through extensive experiments the effects of our method on various VQA bias datasets including VQA-CP2, VQA-CP1, GQA-OOD, and VQA-CE, and show state-of-the-art results with the LXMERT architecture on VQA-CP2.
summary: The task of Visual Question Answering (VQA) is known to be plagued by the issue of VQA models exploiting biases within the dataset to make its final prediction. Various previous ensemble based debiasing methods have been proposed where an additional model is purposefully trained to be biased in order to train a robust target model. However, these methods compute the bias for a model simply from the label statistics of the training data or from single modal branches. In this work, in order to better learn the bias a target VQA model suffers from, we propose a generative method to train the bias model directly from the target model, called GenB. In particular, GenB employs a generative network to learn the bias in the target model through a combination of the adversarial objective and knowledge distillation. We then debias our target model with GenB as a bias model, and show through extensive experiments the effects of our method on various VQA bias datasets including VQA-CP2, VQA-CP1, GQA-OOD, and VQA-CE, and show state-of-the-art results with the LXMERT architecture on VQA-CP2.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，视觉问答 (VQA) 任务受到 VQA 模型利用数据集中的偏差来做出最终预测的问题的困扰。之前已经提出了各种基于集成的去偏差方法，其中有目的地训练附加模型以使其有偏差，以便训练鲁棒的目标模型。然而，这些方法仅根据训练数据的标签统计数据或单个模态分支来计算模型的偏差。在这项工作中，为了更好地学习目标 VQA 模型所遭受的偏差，我们提出了一种直接从目标模型训练偏差模型的生成方法，称为 GenB。特别是，GenB 采用生成网络，通过对抗性目标和知识蒸馏的结合来学习目标模型中的偏差。然后，我们使用 GenB 作为偏差模型对目标模型进行去偏，并通过大量实验展示我们的方法对各种 VQA 偏差数据集（包括 VQA-CP2、VQA-CP1、GQA-OOD 和 VQA-CE）的影响，并在 VQA-CP2 上使用 LXMERT 架构展示最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成性偏差方法GenB，用于提升视觉问答（VQA）模型的鲁棒性，使其减少对数据集中偏差的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有的去偏差方法通常基于标签统计或单一模态分支来计算偏差，难以准确捕捉目标VQA模型所受的偏差。
AI.method: 本文通过生成网络结合对抗目标和知识蒸馏方法，直接从目标模型中学习偏差，训练出偏差模型GenB，然后用该模型对目标模型进行去偏差。
AI.result: 在VQA-CP2、VQA-CP1、GQA-OOD和VQA-CE等多个偏差数据集上，GenB方法在LXMERT架构下取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: GenB方法能够更准确地学习和消除VQA模型中的偏差，从而提升模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

search_text: Generative Bias for Robust Visual Question Answering 稳健视觉问答的生成偏差 The task of Visual Question Answering (VQA) is known to be plagued by the issue of VQA models exploiting biases within the dataset to make its final prediction. Various previous ensemble based debiasing methods have been proposed where an additional model is purposefully trained to be biased in order to train a robust target model. However, these methods compute the bias for a model simply from the label statistics of the training data or from single modal branches. In this work, in order to better learn the bias a target VQA model suffers from, we propose a generative method to train the bias model directly from the target model, called GenB. In particular, GenB employs a generative network to learn the bias in the target model through a combination of the adversarial objective and knowledge distillation. We then debias our target model with GenB as a bias model, and show through extensive experiments the effects of our method on various VQA bias datasets including VQA-CP2, VQA-CP1, GQA-OOD, and VQA-CE, and show state-of-the-art results with the LXMERT architecture on VQA-CP2. 众所周知，视觉问答 (VQA) 任务受到 VQA 模型利用数据集中的偏差来做出最终预测的问题的困扰。之前已经提出了各种基于集成的去偏差方法，其中有目的地训练附加模型以使其有偏差，以便训练鲁棒的目标模型。然而，这些方法仅根据训练数据的标签统计数据或单个模态分支来计算模型的偏差。在这项工作中，为了更好地学习目标 VQA 模型所遭受的偏差，我们提出了一种直接从目标模型训练偏差模型的生成方法，称为 GenB。特别是，GenB 采用生成网络，通过对抗性目标和知识蒸馏的结合来学习目标模型中的偏差。然后，我们使用 GenB 作为偏差模型对目标模型进行去偏，并通过大量实验展示我们的方法对各种 VQA 偏差数据集（包括 VQA-CP2、VQA-CP1、GQA-OOD 和 VQA-CE）的影响，并在 VQA-CP2 上使用 LXMERT 架构展示最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种生成性偏差方法GenB，用于提升视觉问答（VQA）模型的鲁棒性，使其减少对数据集中偏差的依赖。 Jae Won Cho,Dong-jin Kim,Hyeonggon Ryu,In So Kweon cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiang Wu,Dongyu Liu,Ziyang Guo,Yingcai Wu
title: RASIPAM: Interactive Pattern Mining of Multivariate Event Sequences in Racket Sports
title_zh: RASIPAM：球拍运动中多元事件序列的交互模式挖掘
abstract: Experts in racket sports like tennis and badminton use tactical analysis to gain insight into competitors' playing styles. Many data-driven methods apply pattern mining to racket sports data -- which is often recorded as multivariate event sequences -- to uncover sports tactics. However, tactics obtained in this way are often inconsistent with those deduced by experts through their domain knowledge, which can be confusing to those experts. This work introduces RASIPAM, a RAcket-Sports Interactive PAttern Mining system, which allows experts to incorporate their knowledge into data mining algorithms to discover meaningful tactics interactively. RASIPAM consists of a constraint-based pattern mining algorithm that responds to the analysis demands of experts: Experts provide suggestions for finding tactics in intuitive written language, and these suggestions are translated into constraints to run the algorithm. RASIPAM further introduces a tailored visual interface that allows experts to compare the new tactics with the original ones and decide whether to apply a given adjustment. This interactive workflow iteratively progresses until experts are satisfied with all tactics. We conduct a quantitative experiment to show that our algorithm supports real-time interaction. Two case studies in tennis and in badminton respectively, each involving two domain experts, are conducted to show the effectiveness and usefulness of the system.
summary: Experts in racket sports like tennis and badminton use tactical analysis to gain insight into competitors' playing styles. Many data-driven methods apply pattern mining to racket sports data -- which is often recorded as multivariate event sequences -- to uncover sports tactics. However, tactics obtained in this way are often inconsistent with those deduced by experts through their domain knowledge, which can be confusing to those experts. This work introduces RASIPAM, a RAcket-Sports Interactive PAttern Mining system, which allows experts to incorporate their knowledge into data mining algorithms to discover meaningful tactics interactively. RASIPAM consists of a constraint-based pattern mining algorithm that responds to the analysis demands of experts: Experts provide suggestions for finding tactics in intuitive written language, and these suggestions are translated into constraints to run the algorithm. RASIPAM further introduces a tailored visual interface that allows experts to compare the new tactics with the original ones and decide whether to apply a given adjustment. This interactive workflow iteratively progresses until experts are satisfied with all tactics. We conduct a quantitative experiment to show that our algorithm supports real-time interaction. Two case studies in tennis and in badminton respectively, each involving two domain experts, are conducted to show the effectiveness and usefulness of the system.
abstract_zh: 网球和羽毛球等球拍运动的专家使用战术分析来深入了解竞争对手的比赛风格。许多数据驱动的方法将模式挖掘应用于球拍运动数据（通常记录为多变量事件序列）来揭示运动策略。然而，通过这种方式获得的策略往往与专家通过其领域知识推导出来的策略不一致，这可能会让专家感到困惑。这项工作介绍了 RASIPAM，这是一种 RAcket-Sports 交互式模式挖掘系统，它允许专家将他们的知识纳入数据挖掘算法中，以交互方式发现有意义的战术。 RASIPAM由基于约束的模式挖掘算法组成，该算法响应专家的分析需求：专家以直观的书面语言提供寻找策略的建议，并将这些建议转化为运行算法的约束。 RASIPAM 进一步引入了定制的可视化界面，允许专家将新策略与原始策略进行比较，并决定是否应用给定的调整。这种交互式工作流程不断迭代，直到专家对所有策略感到满意为止。我们进行了定量实验来证明我们的算法支持实时交互。分别针对网球和羽毛球进行了两个案例研究，每个案例都涉及两名领域专家，以展示该系统的有效性和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RASIPAM系统，通过专家交互式约束条件挖掘 racket sports 中的多变量事件序列模式，以提升战术分析的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法挖掘的战术模式常与专家领域知识不一致，导致专家困惑，需结合专家知识改进挖掘过程。
AI.method: 设计基于约束的模式挖掘算法，将专家以自然语言提供的战术建议转化为约束条件，并通过定制化可视化界面支持专家迭代调整与比较。
AI.result: 定量实验验证算法支持实时交互，网球和羽毛球的两个案例研究证明系统有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: RASIPAM通过专家与算法的协同交互，有效融合领域知识与数据挖掘，提升了战术模式发现的准确性与实用性。

authors_text: Changhong Fu,Weiyu Peng,Sihang Li,Junjie Ye,Ziang Cao
title: Local Perception-Aware Transformer for Aerial Tracking
title_zh: 用于空中跟踪的本地感知感知变压器
abstract: Transformer-based visual object tracking has been utilized extensively. However, the Transformer structure is lack of enough inductive bias. In addition, only focusing on encoding the global feature does harm to modeling local details, which restricts the capability of tracking in aerial robots. Specifically, with local-modeling to global-search mechanism, the proposed tracker replaces the global encoder by a novel local-recognition encoder. In the employed encoder, a local-recognition attention and a local element correction network are carefully designed for reducing the global redundant information interference and increasing local inductive bias. Meanwhile, the latter can model local object details precisely under aerial view through detail-inquiry net. The proposed method achieves competitive accuracy and robustness in several authoritative aerial benchmarks with 316 sequences in total. The proposed tracker's practicability and efficiency have been validated by the real-world tests.
summary: Transformer-based visual object tracking has been utilized extensively. However, the Transformer structure is lack of enough inductive bias. In addition, only focusing on encoding the global feature does harm to modeling local details, which restricts the capability of tracking in aerial robots. Specifically, with local-modeling to global-search mechanism, the proposed tracker replaces the global encoder by a novel local-recognition encoder. In the employed encoder, a local-recognition attention and a local element correction network are carefully designed for reducing the global redundant information interference and increasing local inductive bias. Meanwhile, the latter can model local object details precisely under aerial view through detail-inquiry net. The proposed method achieves competitive accuracy and robustness in several authoritative aerial benchmarks with 316 sequences in total. The proposed tracker's practicability and efficiency have been validated by the real-world tests.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的视觉对象跟踪已被广泛使用。然而，Transformer结构缺乏足够的电感偏置。此外，仅关注全局特征的编码不利于局部细节的建模，这限制了空中机器人的跟踪能力。具体来说，通过局部建模到全局搜索机制，所提出的跟踪器用新颖的局部识别编码器取代了全局编码器。在所采用的编码器中，仔细设计了局部识别注意力和局部元素校正网络，以减少全局冗余信息干扰并增加局部归纳偏差。同时，后者可以通过细节查询网对鸟瞰图下的局部物体细节进行精确建模。所提出的方法在总共 316 个序列的多个权威航空基准测试中实现了具有竞争力的精度和鲁棒性。所提出的跟踪器的实用性和效率已通过实际测试得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种局部感知感知的Transformer模型，用于改进无人机视角下的目标跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer结构缺乏足够的归纳偏置，且过度关注全局特征会损害局部细节建模，导致无人机跟踪场景下精度和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计局部识别编码器替代全局编码器，包含局部注意力机制与局部元素校正网络，通过细节查询网络精准建模空中视角的局部目标细节。
AI.result: 在包含316个序列的多个权威空中基准数据集上达到竞争性精度与鲁棒性，实际测试验证了方法的实用性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了空中目标跟踪中的局部细节建模难题，为无人机视觉跟踪提供了新的技术路径。

Meanwhile, the latter can model local object details precisely under aerial view through detail-inquiry net. The proposed method achieves competitive accuracy and robustness in several authoritative aerial benchmarks with 316 sequences in total. The proposed tracker's practicability and efficiency have been validated by the real-world tests. 基于 Transformer 的视觉对象跟踪已被广泛使用。然而，Transformer结构缺乏足够的电感偏置。此外，仅关注全局特征的编码不利于局部细节的建模，这限制了空中机器人的跟踪能力。具体来说，通过局部建模到全局搜索机制，所提出的跟踪器用新颖的局部识别编码器取代了全局编码器。在所采用的编码器中，仔细设计了局部识别注意力和局部元素校正网络，以减少全局冗余信息干扰并增加局部归纳偏差。同时，后者可以通过细节查询网对鸟瞰图下的局部物体细节进行精确建模。所提出的方法在总共 316 个序列的多个权威航空基准测试中实现了具有竞争力的精度和鲁棒性。所提出的跟踪器的实用性和效率已通过实际测试得到验证。 本文提出一种局部感知感知的Transformer模型，用于改进无人机视角下的目标跟踪性能。 Changhong Fu,Weiyu Peng,Sihang Li,Junjie Ye,Ziang Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Amir Mohammadian,Foad Ghaderi
title: SiamixFormer: a fully-transformer Siamese network with temporal Fusion for accurate building detection and change detection in bi-temporal remote sensing images
title_zh: SiamixFormer：具有时间融合功能的全变压器连体网络，用于双时态遥感图像中的精确建筑物检测和变化检测
abstract: Building detection and change detection using remote sensing images can help urban and rescue planning. Moreover, they can be used for building damage assessment after natural disasters. Currently, most of the existing models for building detection use only one image (pre-disaster image) to detect buildings. This is based on the idea that post-disaster images reduce the model's performance because of presence of destroyed buildings. In this paper, we propose a siamese model, called SiamixFormer, which uses pre- and post-disaster images as input. Our model has two encoders and has a hierarchical transformer architecture. The output of each stage in both encoders is given to a temporal transformer for feature fusion in a way that query is generated from pre-disaster images and (key, value) is generated from post-disaster images. To this end, temporal features are also considered in feature fusion. Another advantage of using temporal transformers in feature fusion is that they can better maintain large receptive fields generated by transformer encoders compared with CNNs. Finally, the output of the temporal transformer is given to a simple MLP decoder at each stage. The SiamixFormer model is evaluated on xBD, and WHU datasets, for building detection and on LEVIR-CD and CDD datasets for change detection and could outperform the state-of-the-art.
summary: Building detection and change detection using remote sensing images can help urban and rescue planning. Moreover, they can be used for building damage assessment after natural disasters. Currently, most of the existing models for building detection use only one image (pre-disaster image) to detect buildings. This is based on the idea that post-disaster images reduce the model's performance because of presence of destroyed buildings. In this paper, we propose a siamese model, called SiamixFormer, which uses pre- and post-disaster images as input. Our model has two encoders and has a hierarchical transformer architecture. The output of each stage in both encoders is given to a temporal transformer for feature fusion in a way that query is generated from pre-disaster images and (key, value) is generated from post-disaster images. To this end, temporal features are also considered in feature fusion. Another advantage of using temporal transformers in feature fusion is that they can better maintain large receptive fields generated by transformer encoders compared with CNNs. Finally, the output of the temporal transformer is given to a simple MLP decoder at each stage. The SiamixFormer model is evaluated on xBD, and WHU datasets, for building detection and on LEVIR-CD and CDD datasets for change detection and could outperform the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 使用遥感图像进行建筑物检测和变化检测可以帮助城市和救援规划。此外，它们还可用于自然灾害后的建筑物损坏评估。目前，现有的建筑物检测模型大多数仅使用一张图像（灾前图像）来检测建筑物。这是基于这样的想法：由于存在被毁坏的建筑物，灾后图像会降低模型的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SiamixFormer 的暹罗模型，它使用灾前和灾后图像作为输入。我们的模型有两个编码器，并具有分层变压器架构。两个编码器中每个阶段的输出都被提供给时间变换器进行特征融合，查询是从灾前图像生成的，(key, value)是从灾后图像生成的。为此，在特征融合中还考虑了时间特征。在特征融合中使用时间变换器的另一个优点是，与 CNN 相比，它们可以更好地保持变换器编码器生成的大感受野。最后，时间变换器的输出被提供给每个阶段的简单 MLP 解码器。 SiamixFormer 模型在 xBD 和 WHU 数据集上进行评估，用于构建检测，并在 LEVIR-CD 和 CDD 数据集上进行评估，以进行变化检测，并且可以超越最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SiamixFormer的全变压器Siamese网络，用于双时相遥感图像中的建筑物检测和变化检测。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通常仅使用灾前图像进行建筑物检测，因灾后图像中建筑物损毁导致性能下降。本文旨在通过同时利用灾前和灾后图像提升检测准确性。
AI.method: 设计包含两个编码器的Siamese结构，采用分层变压器架构，通过时序变压器进行特征融合（查询来自灾前图像，键值对来自灾后图像），并结合MLP解码器输出结果。
AI.result: 在xBD、WHU数据集上实现建筑物检测，在LEVIR-CD和CDD数据集上实现变化检测，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SiamixFormer通过时序特征融合和变压器架构有效提升了双时相遥感图像的建筑物检测与变化检测精度。

Another advantage of using temporal transformers in feature fusion is that they can better maintain large receptive fields generated by transformer encoders compared with CNNs. authors_text: Yixuan Zhang,Feng Zhou,Zhidong Li,Yang Wang,Fang Chen
title: De-biased Representation Learning for Fairness with Unreliable Labels
title_zh: 去偏表示学习以实现不可靠标签的公平性
abstract: Removing bias while keeping all task-relevant information is challenging for fair representation learning methods since they would yield random or degenerate representations w.r.t. labels when the sensitive attributes correlate with labels. Existing works proposed to inject the label information into the learning procedure to overcome such issues. However, the assumption that the observed labels are clean is not always met. In fact, label bias is acknowledged as the primary source inducing discrimination. In other words, the fair pre-processing methods ignore the discrimination encoded in the labels either during the learning procedure or the evaluation stage. This contradiction puts a question mark on the fairness of the learned representations. To circumvent this issue, we explore the following question: \emph{Can we learn fair representations predictable to latent ideal fair labels given only access to unreliable labels?} In this work, we propose a \textbf{D}e-\textbf{B}iased \textbf{R}epresentation Learning for \textbf{F}airness (DBRF) framework which disentangles the sensitive information from non-sensitive attributes whilst keeping the learned representations predictable to ideal fair labels rather than observed biased ones. We formulate the de-biased learning framework through information-theoretic concepts such as mutual information and information bottleneck. The core concept is that DBRF advocates not to use unreliable labels for supervision when sensitive information benefits the prediction of unreliable labels. Experiment results over both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate that DBRF effectively learns de-biased representations towards ideal labels.
summary: Removing bias while keeping all task-relevant information is challenging for fair representation learning methods since they would yield random or degenerate representations w.r.t. labels when the sensitive attributes correlate with labels. Existing works proposed to inject the label information into the learning procedure to overcome such issues. However, the assumption that the observed labels are clean is not always met. In fact, label bias is acknowledged as the primary source inducing discrimination. In other words, the fair pre-processing methods ignore the discrimination encoded in the labels either during the learning procedure or the evaluation stage. This contradiction puts a question mark on the fairness of the learned representations. To circumvent this issue, we explore the following question: \emph{Can we learn fair representations predictable to latent ideal fair labels given only access to unreliable labels?} In this work, we propose a \textbf{D}e-\textbf{B}iased \textbf{R}epresentation Learning for \textbf{F}airness (DBRF) framework which disentangles the sensitive information from non-sensitive attributes whilst keeping the learned representations predictable to ideal fair labels rather than observed biased ones. We formulate the de-biased learning framework through information-theoretic concepts such as mutual information and information bottleneck. The core concept is that DBRF advocates not to use unreliable labels for supervision when sensitive information benefits the prediction of unreliable labels. Experiment results over both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate that DBRF effectively learns de-biased representations towards ideal labels.
abstract_zh: 对于公平表示学习方法来说，在保留所有与任务相关的信息的同时消除偏见是一项挑战，因为它们会产生随机或退化的表示。当敏感属性与标签相关时，标签。现有的工作建议将标签信息注入学习过程以克服此类问题。然而，观察到的标签是干净的这一假设并不总是得到满足。事实上，标签偏见被认为是引起歧视的主要根源。换句话说，公平的预处理方法在学习过程或评估阶段忽略了标签中编码的歧视。这种矛盾给学习表征的公平性打了一个问号。为了规避这个问题，我们探讨了以下问题：\emph{我们能否学习可预测到潜在理想公平标签的公平表示，只允许访问不可靠的标签？}在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 \textbf{D}e-\textbf{B}iased \textbf{R}\textbf{F}airness (DBRF) 框架的表示学习，该框架将敏感信息与非敏感属性分开，同时保持学习到的表示可预测到理想公平标签而不是观察到的有偏见的标签。我们通过互信息和信息瓶颈等信息论概念制定了去偏学习框架。其核心理念是，当敏感信息有利于不可靠标签的预测时，DBRF主张不要使用不可靠标签进行监督。对合成数据和真实世界数据的实验结果表明，DBRF 有效地学习了理想标签的去偏表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种去偏表示学习框架DBRF，旨在通过不可靠标签学习公平表示，避免敏感属性与标签的关联导致的偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有公平表示学习方法依赖可能带有偏见的标签，而标签偏差是歧视的主要来源，导致学习到的表示无法真正实现公平性。
AI.method: 通过信息论中的互信息和信息瓶颈理论，设计DBRF框架，在分离敏感信息的同时，使表示预测理想公平标签而非观测到的有偏标签。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上验证了DBRF能有效学习去偏表示，提升模型公平性。
AI.conclusion: DBRF通过避免使用有偏标签进行监督，能够学习到更接近理想公平目标的表示，为公平学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Daniele Perlo,Enzo Tartaglione,Umberto Gava,Federico D'Agata,Edwin Benninck,Mauro Bergui
title: UniToBrain dataset: a Brain Perfusion Dataset
title_zh: UniToBrain 数据集：大脑灌注数据集
comment: Workshop ICIAP 2021 - Deep-Learning and High Performance Computing to Boost Biomedical Applications
comments: Workshop ICIAP 2021 - Deep-Learning and High Performance Computing to Boost Biomedical Applications
abstract: The CT perfusion (CTP) is a medical exam for measuring the passage of a bolus of contrast solution through the brain on a pixel-by-pixel basis. The objective is to draw "perfusion maps" (namely cerebral blood volume, cerebral blood flow and time to peak) very rapidly for ischemic lesions, and to be able to distinguish between core and penumubra regions. A precise and quick diagnosis, in a context of ischemic stroke, can determine the fate of the brain tissues and guide the intervention and treatment in emergency conditions. In this work we present UniToBrain dataset, the very first open-source dataset for CTP. It comprises a cohort of more than a hundred of patients, and it is accompanied by patients metadata and ground truth maps obtained with state-of-the-art algorithms. We also propose a novel neural networks-based algorithm, using the European library ECVL and EDDL for the image processing and developing deep learning models respectively. The results obtained by the neural network models match the ground truth and open the road towards potential sub-sampling of the required number of CT maps, which impose heavy radiation doses to the patients.
summary: The CT perfusion (CTP) is a medical exam for measuring the passage of a bolus of contrast solution through the brain on a pixel-by-pixel basis. The objective is to draw "perfusion maps" (namely cerebral blood volume, cerebral blood flow and time to peak) very rapidly for ischemic lesions, and to be able to distinguish between core and penumubra regions. A precise and quick diagnosis, in a context of ischemic stroke, can determine the fate of the brain tissues and guide the intervention and treatment in emergency conditions. In this work we present UniToBrain dataset, the very first open-source dataset for CTP. It comprises a cohort of more than a hundred of patients, and it is accompanied by patients metadata and ground truth maps obtained with state-of-the-art algorithms. We also propose a novel neural networks-based algorithm, using the European library ECVL and EDDL for the image processing and developing deep learning models respectively. The results obtained by the neural network models match the ground truth and open the road towards potential sub-sampling of the required number of CT maps, which impose heavy radiation doses to the patients.
abstract_zh: CT 灌注 (CTP) 是一种医学检查，用于逐个像素地测量造影剂溶液通过大脑的情况。目的是非常快速地绘制缺血性病变的“灌注图”（即脑血量、脑血流量和达到峰值的时间），并能够区分核心区域和半暗区域。在缺血性中风的背景下，精确、快速的诊断可以确定脑组织的命运，并指导紧急情况下的干预和治疗。在这项工作中，我们展示了 UniToBrain 数据集，这是 CTP 的第一个开源数据集。它由一百多名患者组成，并附有患者元数据和通过最先进的算法获得的地面实况图。我们还提出了一种新颖的基于神经网络的算法，分别使用欧洲库 ECVL 和 EDDL 进行图像处理并开发深度学习模型。神经网络模型获得的结果与地面真实情况相匹配，并为所需数量的 CT 图进行潜在的子采样开辟了道路，这会给患者带来大量的辐射剂量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniToBrain数据集，这是首个开源的CT灌注成像数据集，并开发了基于神经网络的算法以快速生成脑灌注图，用于缺血性中风的精准诊断。
AI.motivation: 缺血性中风需要快速区分核心梗死区与可逆性缺血半暗带以指导治疗，但现有CT灌注分析方法耗时且辐射剂量高，亟需高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含百余例患者数据的UniToBrain数据集，结合元数据与标注真值图；采用ECVL和EDDL库开发深度学习模型，实现灌注参数的自动化计算与CT图谱的潜在降采样。
AI.result: 神经网络模型生成的灌注图与真值高度吻合，验证了方法有效性，并为减少CT扫描次数（降低辐射）提供了可行性依据。
AI.conclusion: UniToBrain数据集与算法为缺血性中风的精准诊断提供了开源工具，有助于推动低辐射剂量下的灌注分析研究与临床应用。

authors_text: Hafiza Ayesha Hoor Chaudhry,Riccardo Renzulli,Daniele Perlo,Francesca Santinelli,Stefano Tibaldi,Carmen Cristiano,Marco Grosso,Attilio Fiandrotti,Maurizio Lucenteforte,Davide Cavagnino
title: Lung nodules segmentation from CT with DeepHealth toolkit
title_zh: 使用 DeepHealth 工具包根据 CT 进行肺结节分割
comment: Workshop ICIAP 2021 - Deep-Learning and High Performance Computing to Boost Biomedical Applications
comments: Workshop ICIAP 2021 - Deep-Learning and High Performance Computing to Boost Biomedical Applications
abstract: The accurate and consistent border segmentation plays an important role in the tumor volume estimation and its treatment in the field of Medical Image Segmentation. Globally, Lung cancer is one of the leading causes of death and the early detection of lung nodules is essential for the early cancer diagnosis and survival rate of patients. The goal of this study was to demonstrate the feasibility of Deephealth toolkit including PyECVL and PyEDDL libraries to precisely segment lung nodules. Experiments for lung nodules segmentation has been carried out on UniToChest using PyECVL and PyEDDL, for data pre-processing as well as neural network training. The results depict accurate segmentation of lung nodules across a wide diameter range and better accuracy over a traditional detection approach. The datasets and the code used in this paper are publicly available as a baseline reference.
summary: The accurate and consistent border segmentation plays an important role in the tumor volume estimation and its treatment in the field of Medical Image Segmentation. Globally, Lung cancer is one of the leading causes of death and the early detection of lung nodules is essential for the early cancer diagnosis and survival rate of patients. The goal of this study was to demonstrate the feasibility of Deephealth toolkit including PyECVL and PyEDDL libraries to precisely segment lung nodules. Experiments for lung nodules segmentation has been carried out on UniToChest using PyECVL and PyEDDL, for data pre-processing as well as neural network training. The results depict accurate segmentation of lung nodules across a wide diameter range and better accuracy over a traditional detection approach. The datasets and the code used in this paper are publicly available as a baseline reference.
abstract_zh: 准确一致的边界分割在医学图像分割领域的肿瘤体积估计及其治疗中发挥着重要作用。在全球范围内，肺癌是导致死亡的主要原因之一，肺结节的早期发现对于癌症的早期诊断和患者的生存率至关重要。本研究的目的是证明 Deephealth 工具包（包括 PyECVL 和 PyEDDL 库）精确分割肺结节的可行性。使用 PyECVL 和 PyEDDL 在 UniToChest 上进行了肺结节分割实验，用于数据预处理和神经网络训练。结果显示，在较宽的直径范围内对肺结节进行了准确分割，并且比传统检测方法具有更高的准确性。本文中使用的数据集和代码可公开作为基线参考。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在展示DeepHealth工具包（包含PyECVL和PyEDDL库）在CT影像中精确分割肺结节的可行性。
AI.motivation: 肺结节的精确分割对肿瘤体积估算和治疗至关重要，而肺癌是全球主要死因之一，早期检测可显著提高患者生存率。
AI.method: 使用DeepHealth工具包中的PyECVL和PyEDDL库，在UniToChest数据集上进行数据预处理和神经网络训练，实现肺结节分割。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能准确分割不同直径范围的肺结节，且精度优于传统检测方法，数据集和代码已公开作为基准参考。
AI.conclusion: DeepHealth工具包在肺结节分割任务中表现出色，为早期肺癌诊断提供了有效工具，并为医学影像分析应用奠定了基础。

authors_text: Kaicheng Pang,Xingxing Zou,Waikeung Wong
title: Dress Well via Fashion Cognitive Learning
title_zh: 通过时尚认知学习穿得漂亮
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 33rd British Machine Vision Conference, Paper 251, 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 33rd British Machine Vision Conference, Paper 251, 2022
abstract: Fashion compatibility models enable online retailers to easily obtain a large number of outfit compositions with good quality. However, effective fashion recommendation demands precise service for each customer with a deeper cognition of fashion. In this paper, we conduct the first study on fashion cognitive learning, which is fashion recommendations conditioned on personal physical information. To this end, we propose a Fashion Cognitive Network (FCN) to learn the relationships among visual-semantic embedding of outfit composition and appearance features of individuals. FCN contains two submodules, namely outfit encoder and Multi-label Graph Neural Network (ML-GCN). The outfit encoder uses a convolutional layer to encode an outfit into an outfit embedding. The latter module learns label classifiers via stacked GCN. We conducted extensive experiments on the newly collected O4U dataset, and the results provide strong qualitative and quantitative evidence that our framework outperforms alternative methods.
summary: Fashion compatibility models enable online retailers to easily obtain a large number of outfit compositions with good quality. However, effective fashion recommendation demands precise service for each customer with a deeper cognition of fashion. In this paper, we conduct the first study on fashion cognitive learning, which is fashion recommendations conditioned on personal physical information. To this end, we propose a Fashion Cognitive Network (FCN) to learn the relationships among visual-semantic embedding of outfit composition and appearance features of individuals. FCN contains two submodules, namely outfit encoder and Multi-label Graph Neural Network (ML-GCN). The outfit encoder uses a convolutional layer to encode an outfit into an outfit embedding. The latter module learns label classifiers via stacked GCN. We conducted extensive experiments on the newly collected O4U dataset, and the results provide strong qualitative and quantitative evidence that our framework outperforms alternative methods.
abstract_zh: 时尚兼容性模型使在线零售商能够轻松获得大量优质的服装组合。然而，有效的时尚推荐需要精准服务每一位顾客，对时尚有更深入的认知。在本文中，我们首次对时尚认知学习进行了研究，即以个人身体信息为条件的时尚推荐。为此，我们提出了一种时尚认知网络（FCN）来学习服装构成的视觉语义嵌入与个体的外观特征之间的关系。 FCN包含两个子模块，即装备编码器和多标签图神经网络（ML-GCN）。服装编码器使用卷积层将服装编码为服装嵌入。后一个模块通过堆叠 GCN 学习标签分类器。我们对新收集的 O4U 数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果提供了强有力的定性和定量证据，表明我们的框架优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于个人身体特征的时尚认知学习框架，以实现个性化服装推荐。
AI.motivation: 现有时尚推荐模型无法满足个性化需求，需结合个人身体特征进行深度时尚认知以提升推荐精准度。
AI.method: 提出Fashion Cognitive Network（FCN），包含outfit encoder和多标签图神经网络（ML-GCN），分别用于编码服装组合和学习标签分类器。
AI.result: 在O4U数据集上的实验表明，该框架在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合视觉语义嵌入与个人特征，FCN有效提升了个性化时尚推荐的准确性，为未来研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于个人身体特征的时尚认知学习框架，以实现个性化服装推荐。
