search_text: Dress Well via Fashion Cognitive Learning 通过时尚认知学习穿得漂亮 Fashion compatibility models enable online retailers to easily obtain a large number of outfit compositions with good quality. However, effective fashion recommendation demands precise service for each customer with a deeper cognition of fashion. In this paper, we conduct the first study on fashion cognitive learning, which is fashion recommendations conditioned on personal physical information. To this end, we propose a Fashion Cognitive Network (FCN) to learn the relationships among visual-semantic embedding of outfit composition and appearance features of individuals. FCN contains two submodules, namely outfit encoder and Multi-label Graph Neural Network (ML-GCN). The outfit encoder uses a convolutional layer to encode an outfit into an outfit embedding. The latter module learns label classifiers via stacked GCN. We conducted extensive experiments on the newly collected O4U dataset, and the results provide strong qualitative and quantitative evidence that our framework outperforms alternative methods. 时尚兼容性模型使在线零售商能够轻松获得大量优质的服装组合。然而，有效的时尚推荐需要精准服务每一位顾客，对时尚有更深入的认知。在本文中，我们首次对时尚认知学习进行了研究，即以个人身体信息为条件的时尚推荐。为此，我们提出了一种时尚认知网络（FCN）来学习服装构成的视觉语义嵌入与个体的外观特征之间的关系。 FCN包含两个子模块，即装备编码器和多标签图神经网络（ML-GCN）。服装编码器使用卷积层将服装编码为服装嵌入。后一个模块通过堆叠 GCN 学习标签分类器。我们对新收集的 O4U 数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果提供了强有力的定性和定量证据，表明我们的框架优于其他方法。 提出一种基于个人身体特征的时尚认知学习框架，以实现个性化服装推荐。 Kaicheng Pang,Xingxing Zou,Waikeung Wong cs.CV

authors_text: Guangyi Liu,Zeyu Feng,Yuan Gao,Zichao Yang,Xiaodan Liang,Junwei Bao,Xiaodong He,Shuguang Cui,Zhen Li,Zhiting Hu
title: Composable Text Controls in Latent Space with ODEs
title_zh: 使用 ODE 的潜在空间中的可组合文本控件
comment: EMNLP 2023 Camera Ready. Code available at: https://github.com/guangyliu/LatentOps
comments: EMNLP 2023 Camera Ready. Code available at: https://github.com/guangyliu/LatentOps
abstract: Real-world text applications often involve composing a wide range of text control operations, such as editing the text w.r.t. an attribute, manipulating keywords and structure, and generating new text of desired properties. Prior work typically learns/finetunes a language model (LM) to perform individual or specific subsets of operations. Recent research has studied combining operations in a plug-and-play manner, often with costly search or optimization in the complex sequence space. This paper proposes a new efficient approach for composable text operations in the compact latent space of text. The low-dimensionality and differentiability of the text latent vector allow us to develop an efficient sampler based on ordinary differential equations (ODEs) given arbitrary plug-in operators (e.g., attribute classifiers). By connecting pretrained LMs (e.g., GPT2) to the latent space through efficient adaption, we then decode the sampled vectors into desired text sequences. The flexible approach permits diverse control operators (sentiment, tense, formality, keywords, etc.) acquired using any relevant data from different domains. Experiments show that composing those operators within our approach manages to generate or edit high-quality text, substantially improving over previous methods in terms of generation quality and efficiency.
summary: Real-world text applications often involve composing a wide range of text control operations, such as editing the text w.r.t. an attribute, manipulating keywords and structure, and generating new text of desired properties. Prior work typically learns/finetunes a language model (LM) to perform individual or specific subsets of operations. Recent research has studied combining operations in a plug-and-play manner, often with costly search or optimization in the complex sequence space. This paper proposes a new efficient approach for composable text operations in the compact latent space of text. The low-dimensionality and differentiability of the text latent vector allow us to develop an efficient sampler based on ordinary differential equations (ODEs) given arbitrary plug-in operators (e.g., attribute classifiers). By connecting pretrained LMs (e.g., GPT2) to the latent space through efficient adaption, we then decode the sampled vectors into desired text sequences. The flexible approach permits diverse control operators (sentiment, tense, formality, keywords, etc.) acquired using any relevant data from different domains. Experiments show that composing those operators within our approach manages to generate or edit high-quality text, substantially improving over previous methods in terms of generation quality and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的文本应用程序通常涉及编写各种文本控制操作，例如编辑文本。属性，操作关键字和结构，并生成所需属性的新文本。先前的工作通常学习/微调语言模型（LM）以执行单个或特定的操作子集。最近的研究研究了以即插即用方式组合操作，通常在复杂序列空间中进行昂贵的搜索或优化。本文提出了一种在紧凑的文本潜在空间中进行可组合文本操作的新有效方法。文本潜在向量的低维性和可微性使我们能够在给定任意插件运算符（例如属性分类器）的情况下开发基于常微分方程（ODE）的高效采样器。通过有效的适应将预训练的 LM（例如 GPT2）连接到潜在空间，然后我们将采样向量解码为所需的文本序列。这种灵活的方法允许使用来自不同领域的任何相关数据获取不同的控制运算符（情感、时态、形式、关键词等）。实验表明，在我们的方法中组合这些运算符可以生成或编辑高质量的文本，在生成质量和效率方面比以前的方法有了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于常微分方程（ODE）的高效方法，在文本的紧凑潜在空间中实现可组合的文本控制操作，如编辑属性、调整关键词和生成符合特定属性的文本。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么针对特定文本操作微调语言模型，要么依赖复杂序列空间的高成本搜索，难以高效组合多种文本控制操作。
AI.method: 通过将预训练语言模型（如GPT2）适配到潜在空间，利用ODE构建高效采样器，并结合任意插件操作符（如属性分类器）对潜在向量进行操作，最终解码生成目标文本。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在生成/编辑文本的质量和效率上显著优于先前方法，能够灵活组合多种控制操作（如情感、时态、正式程度等）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为文本控制操作提供了灵活且高效的潜在空间框架，通过ODE采样和潜在空间适配实现了多种文本属性的组合控制。

authors_text: Advait Bhat,Saaket Agashe,Niharika Mohile,Parth Oberoi,Ravi Jangir,Anirudha Joshi
title: Interacting with next-phrase suggestions: How suggestion systems aid and influence the cognitive processes of writing
title_zh: 与下一个短语建议互动：建议系统如何帮助和影响写作的认知过程
abstract: Writing with next-phrase suggestions powered by large language models is becoming more pervasive by the day. However, research to understand writers' interaction and decision-making processes while engaging with such systems is still emerging. We conducted a qualitative study to shed light on writers' cognitive processes while writing with next-phrase suggestion systems. To do so, we recruited 14 amateur writers to write two reviews each, one without suggestions and one with suggestions. Additionally, we also positively and negatively biased the suggestion system to get a diverse range of instances where writers' opinions and the bias in the language model align or misalign to varying degrees. We found that writers interact with next-phrase suggestions in various complex ways: Writers abstracted and extracted multiple parts of the suggestions and incorporated them within their writing, even when they disagreed with the suggestion as a whole; along with evaluating the suggestions on various criteria. The suggestion system also had various effects on the writing process, such as altering the writer's usual writing plans, leading to higher levels of distraction etc. Based on our qualitative analysis using the cognitive process model of writing by Hayes as a lens, we propose a theoretical model of 'writer-suggestion interaction' for writing with GPT-2 (and causal language models in general) for a movie review writing task, followed by directions for future research and design.
summary: Writing with next-phrase suggestions powered by large language models is becoming more pervasive by the day. However, research to understand writers' interaction and decision-making processes while engaging with such systems is still emerging. We conducted a qualitative study to shed light on writers' cognitive processes while writing with next-phrase suggestion systems. To do so, we recruited 14 amateur writers to write two reviews each, one without suggestions and one with suggestions. Additionally, we also positively and negatively biased the suggestion system to get a diverse range of instances where writers' opinions and the bias in the language model align or misalign to varying degrees. We found that writers interact with next-phrase suggestions in various complex ways: Writers abstracted and extracted multiple parts of the suggestions and incorporated them within their writing, even when they disagreed with the suggestion as a whole; along with evaluating the suggestions on various criteria. The suggestion system also had various effects on the writing process, such as altering the writer's usual writing plans, leading to higher levels of distraction etc. Based on our qualitative analysis using the cognitive process model of writing by Hayes as a lens, we propose a theoretical model of 'writer-suggestion interaction' for writing with GPT-2 (and causal language models in general) for a movie review writing task, followed by directions for future research and design.
abstract_zh: 利用大型语言模型支持的下一个短语建议进行写作如今变得越来越普遍。然而，了解作家在使用此类系统时的互动和决策过程的研究仍在不断涌现。我们进行了一项定性研究，以揭示作家在使用下一个短语建议系统进行写作时的认知过程。为此，我们招募了 14 名业余作家，每人撰写两篇评论，一篇没有建议，一篇有建议。此外，我们还对建议系统进行了积极和消极的偏见，以获得各种不同的实例，其中作者的观点和语言模型中的偏见在不同程度上一致或不一致。我们发现作家以各种复杂的方式与下一个短语的建议互动：作家抽象和提取建议的多个部分并将其纳入他们的写作中，即使他们不同意整个建议；同时根据各种标准评估建议。建议系统还对写作过程产生各种影响，例如改变作者通常的写作计划，导致更高程度的分心等。基于我们以 Hayes 的写作认知过程模型为镜头的定性分析，我们提出了一个使用 GPT-2（以及一般的因果语言模型）进行电影评论写作任务的“作者-建议交互”理论模型，并提出了未来研究和设计的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用大型语言模型生成的下一句短语建议系统如何影响写作者的认知过程，并提出了‘作者-建议交互’理论模型。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于大语言模型的建议系统在写作中日益普及，但关于作者如何与这类系统互动及决策过程的研究仍处于初步阶段，亟需深入探索。
AI.method: 通过定性研究，招募14名业余作者分别在有无建议系统下撰写影评，并对建议系统进行正负偏置以观察作者与建议的对齐或冲突情况。
AI.result: 作者以多种复杂方式使用建议，即使不同意整体建议也会提取部分信息整合到写作中；建议系统影响写作计划并导致分心。基于Hayes的写作认知模型，提出了适用于GPT-2的‘作者-建议交互’理论模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解因果语言模型（如GPT-2）在写作中的交互机制提供了理论框架，并为未来研究和系统设计指明了方向。

conclusion: 该研究为理解因果语言模型（如GPT-2）在写作中的交互机制提供了理论框架，并为未来研究和系统设计指明了方向。
search_text: Interacting with next-phrase suggestions: How suggestion systems aid and influence the cognitive processes of writing 与下一个短语建议互动：建议系统如何帮助和影响写作的认知过程 Writing with next-phrase suggestions powered by large language models is becoming more pervasive by the day. However, research to understand writers' interaction and decision-making processes while engaging with such systems is still emerging. We conducted a qualitative study to shed light on writers' cognitive processes while writing with next-phrase suggestion systems. To do so, we recruited 14 amateur writers to write two reviews each, one without suggestions and one with suggestions. Additionally, we also positively and negatively biased the suggestion system to get a diverse range of instances where writers' opinions and the bias in the language model align or misalign to varying degrees. We found that writers interact with next-phrase suggestions in various complex ways: Writers abstracted and extracted multiple parts of the suggestions and incorporated them within their writing, even when they disagreed with the suggestion as a whole; along with evaluating the suggestions on various criteria. The suggestion system also had various effects on the writing process, such as altering the writer's usual writing plans, leading to higher levels of distraction etc. Based on our qualitative analysis using the cognitive process model of writing by Hayes as a lens, we propose a theoretical model of 'writer-suggestion interaction' for writing with GPT-2 (and causal language models in general) for a movie review writing task, followed by directions for future research and design. 利用大型语言模型支持的下一个短语建议进行写作如今变得越来越普遍。然而，了解作家在使用此类系统时的互动和决策过程的研究仍在不断涌现。我们进行了一项定性研究，以揭示作家在使用下一个短语建议系统进行写作时的认知过程。为此，我们招募了 14 名业余作家，每人撰写两篇评论，一篇没有建议，一篇有建议。此外，我们还对建议系统进行了积极和消极的偏见，以获得各种不同的实例，其中作者的观点和语言模型中的偏见在不同程度上一致或不一致。我们发现作家以各种复杂的方式与下一个短语的建议互动：作家抽象和提取建议的多个部分并将其纳入他们的写作中，即使他们不同意整个建议；同时根据各种标准评估建议。建议系统还对写作过程产生各种影响，例如改变作者通常的写作计划，导致更高程度的分心等。基于我们以 Hayes 的写作认知过程模型为镜头的定性分析，我们提出了一个使用 GPT-2（以及一般的因果语言模型）进行电影评论写作任务的“作者-建议交互”理论模型，并提出了未来研究和设计的方向。 本文研究了使用大型语言模型生成的下一句短语建议系统如何影响写作者的认知过程，并提出了‘作者-建议交互’理论模型。 Advait Bhat,Saaket Agashe,Niharika Mohile,Parth Oberoi,Ravi Jangir,Anirudha Joshi cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Aihua Zheng,Xianpeng Zhu,Zhiqi Ma,Chenglong Li,Jin Tang,Jixin Ma
title: Multi-spectral Vehicle Re-identification with Cross-directional Consistency Network and a High-quality Benchmark
title_zh: 具有交叉一致性网络和高质量基准的多光谱车辆重识别
abstract: To tackle the challenge of vehicle re-identification (Re-ID) in complex lighting environments and diverse scenes, multi-spectral sources like visible and infrared information are taken into consideration due to their excellent complementary advantages. However, multi-spectral vehicle Re-ID suffers cross-modality discrepancy caused by heterogeneous properties of different modalities as well as a big challenge of the diverse appearance with different views in each identity. Meanwhile, diverse environmental interference leads to heavy sample distributional discrepancy in each modality. In this work, we propose a novel cross-directional consistency network to simultaneously overcome the discrepancies from both modality and sample aspects. In particular, we design a new cross-directional center loss to pull the modality centers of each identity close to mitigate cross-modality discrepancy, while the sample centers of each identity close to alleviate the sample discrepancy. Such strategy can generate discriminative multi-spectral feature representations for vehicle Re-ID. In addition, we design an adaptive layer normalization unit to dynamically adjust individual feature distribution to handle distributional discrepancy of intra-modality features for robust learning. To provide a comprehensive evaluation platform, we create a high-quality RGB-NIR-TIR multi-spectral vehicle Re-ID benchmark (MSVR310), including 310 different vehicles from a broad range of viewpoints, time spans and environmental complexities. Comprehensive experiments on both created and public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach comparing to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: To tackle the challenge of vehicle re-identification (Re-ID) in complex lighting environments and diverse scenes, multi-spectral sources like visible and infrared information are taken into consideration due to their excellent complementary advantages. However, multi-spectral vehicle Re-ID suffers cross-modality discrepancy caused by heterogeneous properties of different modalities as well as a big challenge of the diverse appearance with different views in each identity. Meanwhile, diverse environmental interference leads to heavy sample distributional discrepancy in each modality. In this work, we propose a novel cross-directional consistency network to simultaneously overcome the discrepancies from both modality and sample aspects. In particular, we design a new cross-directional center loss to pull the modality centers of each identity close to mitigate cross-modality discrepancy, while the sample centers of each identity close to alleviate the sample discrepancy. Such strategy can generate discriminative multi-spectral feature representations for vehicle Re-ID. In addition, we design an adaptive layer normalization unit to dynamically adjust individual feature distribution to handle distributional discrepancy of intra-modality features for robust learning. To provide a comprehensive evaluation platform, we create a high-quality RGB-NIR-TIR multi-spectral vehicle Re-ID benchmark (MSVR310), including 310 different vehicles from a broad range of viewpoints, time spans and environmental complexities. Comprehensive experiments on both created and public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach comparing to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 为了应对复杂光照环境和多样化场景下的车辆重新识别（Re-ID）挑战，可见光和红外信息等多光谱源因其良好的互补优势而被考虑。然而，多光谱车辆 Re-ID 面临着由于不同模态的异构特性而导致的跨模态差异，以及每个身份中具有不同视图的多样化外观的巨大挑战。同时，不同的环境干扰导致每种模态的样本分布差异很大。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的横向一致性网络，以同时克服模态和样本方面的差异。特别是，我们设计了一种新的横向中心损失，将每个身份的模态中心拉近以减轻跨模态差异，同时将每个身份的样本中心拉近以减轻样本差异。这种策略可以为车辆重新识别生成有区别的多光谱特征表示。此外，我们设计了一个自适应层归一化单元来动态调整个体特征分布，以处理模态内特征的分布差异，从而实现鲁棒学习。为了提供全面的评估平​​台，我们创建了高质量的 RGB-NIR-TIR 多光谱车辆 Re-ID 基准 (MSVR310)，包括来自广泛视角、时间跨度和环境复杂性的 310 辆不同车辆。对创建的和公共数据集的综合实验证明了所提出的方法与最先进的方法相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨方向一致性网络和高质量基准，用于解决复杂光照和场景下的多光谱车辆重识别问题。
AI.motivation: 多光谱车辆重识别面临跨模态差异和样本分布差异的挑战，现有方法难以有效处理异构模态特性及视角多样性带来的问题。
AI.method: 设计跨方向一致性网络，包含跨方向中心损失以对齐模态和样本特征，结合自适应层归一化单元处理模态内分布差异，并构建包含310辆车的RGB-NIR-TIR多光谱基准数据集MSVR310。
AI.result: 在自建和公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多光谱车辆重识别任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨方向一致性网络有效缓解了多光谱特征差异问题，提出的MSVR310基准为后续研究提供了全面评估平台。

authors_text: Frej Berglind,Haron Temam,Supratik Mukhopadhyay,Kamalika Das,Md Saiful Islam Sajol,Sricharan Kumar,Kumar Kallurupalli
title: XOOD: Extreme Value Based Out-Of-Distribution Detection For Image Classification
title_zh: XOOD：用于图像分类的基于极值的分布外检测
abstract: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) data at inference time is crucial for many applications of machine learning. We present XOOD: a novel extreme value-based OOD detection framework for image classification that consists of two algorithms. The first, XOOD-M, is completely unsupervised, while the second XOOD-L is self-supervised. Both algorithms rely on the signals captured by the extreme values of the data in the activation layers of the neural network in order to distinguish between in-distribution and OOD instances. We show experimentally that both XOOD-M and XOOD-L outperform state-of-the-art OOD detection methods on many benchmark data sets in both efficiency and accuracy, reducing false-positive rate (FPR95) by 50%, while improving the inferencing time by an order of magnitude.
summary: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) data at inference time is crucial for many applications of machine learning. We present XOOD: a novel extreme value-based OOD detection framework for image classification that consists of two algorithms. The first, XOOD-M, is completely unsupervised, while the second XOOD-L is self-supervised. Both algorithms rely on the signals captured by the extreme values of the data in the activation layers of the neural network in order to distinguish between in-distribution and OOD instances. We show experimentally that both XOOD-M and XOOD-L outperform state-of-the-art OOD detection methods on many benchmark data sets in both efficiency and accuracy, reducing false-positive rate (FPR95) by 50%, while improving the inferencing time by an order of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 在推理时检测分布外 (OOD) 数据对于机器学习的许多应用至关重要。我们提出了 XOOD：一种新颖的基于极值的 OOD 图像分类检测框架，由两种算法组成。第一个 XOOD-M 是完全无人监督的，而第二个 XOOD-L 是自我监督的。这两种算法都依赖于神经网络激活层中数据极值捕获的信号，以便区分分布内实例和 OOD 实例。我们通过实验证明，XOOD-M 和 XOOD-L 在许多基准数据集上的效率和准确性均优于最先进的 OOD 检测方法，将误报率 (FPR95) 降低了 50%，同时将推理时间缩短了一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XOOD框架，利用神经网络激活层的极值信号进行图像分类的分布外检测，包含无监督和自监督两种算法。
AI.motivation: 分布外检测对保障机器学习模型可靠性至关重要，现有方法在准确率与效率间难以平衡，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 设计XOOD-M（无监督）与XOOD-L（自监督）两种算法，通过分析神经网络激活层的极值特征区分分布内与分布外样本。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，XOOD方法将FPR95降低50%，推理速度提升10倍，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于极值的XOOD框架在保持高检测精度的同时显著提升效率，为实际应用提供有效分布外检测方案。

Both algorithms rely on the signals captured by the extreme values of the data in the activation layers of the neural network in order to distinguish between in-distribution and OOD instances. We show experimentally that both XOOD-M and XOOD-L outperform state-of-the-art OOD detection methods on many benchmark data sets in both efficiency and accuracy, reducing false-positive rate (FPR95) by 50%, while improving the inferencing time by an order of magnitude. 在推理时检测分布外 (OOD) 数据对于机器学习的许多应用至关重要。我们提出了 XOOD：一种新颖的基于极值的 OOD 图像分类检测框架，由两种算法组成。第一个 XOOD-M 是完全无人监督的，而第二个 XOOD-L 是自我监督的。这两种算法都依赖于神经网络激活层中数据极值捕获的信号，以便区分分布内实例和 OOD 实例。我们通过实验证明，XOOD-M 和 XOOD-L 在许多基准数据集上的效率和准确性均优于最先进的 OOD 检测方法，将误报率 (FPR95) 降低了 50%，同时将推理时间缩短了一个数量级。 本文提出XOOD框架，利用神经网络激活层的极值信号进行图像分类的分布外检测，包含无监督和自监督两种算法。 Frej Berglind,Haron Temam,Supratik Mukhopadhyay,Kamalika Das,Md Saiful Islam Sajol,Sricharan Kumar,Kumar Kallurupalli cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Yilan Zhang,Fengying Xie,Xuedong Song,Hangning Zhou,Yiguang Yang,Haopeng Zhang,Jie Liu
title: A Rotation Meanout Network with Invariance for Dermoscopy Image Classification and Retrieval
title_zh: 用于皮肤镜图像分类和检索的具有不变性的旋转均值网络
abstract: The computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) system can provide a reference basis for the clinical diagnosis of skin diseases. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can not only extract visual elements such as colors and shapes but also semantic features. As such they have made great improvements in many tasks of dermoscopy images. The imaging of dermoscopy has no principal orientation, indicating that there are a large number of skin lesion rotations in the datasets. However, CNNs lack rotation invariance, which is bound to affect the robustness of CNNs against rotations. To tackle this issue, we propose a rotation meanout (RM) network to extract rotation-invariant features from dermoscopy images. In RM, each set of rotated feature maps corresponds to a set of outputs of the weight-sharing convolutions and they are fused using meanout strategy to obtain the final feature maps. Through theoretical derivation, the proposed RM network is rotation-equivariant and can extract rotation-invariant features when followed by the global average pooling (GAP) operation. The extracted rotation-invariant features can better represent the original data in classification and retrieval tasks for dermoscopy images. The RM is a general operation, which does not change the network structure or increase any parameter, and can be flexibly embedded in any part of CNNs. Extensive experiments are conducted on a dermoscopy image dataset. The results show our method outperforms other anti-rotation methods and achieves great improvements in dermoscopy image classification and retrieval tasks, indicating the potential of rotation invariance in the field of dermoscopy images.
summary: The computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) system can provide a reference basis for the clinical diagnosis of skin diseases. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can not only extract visual elements such as colors and shapes but also semantic features. As such they have made great improvements in many tasks of dermoscopy images. The imaging of dermoscopy has no principal orientation, indicating that there are a large number of skin lesion rotations in the datasets. However, CNNs lack rotation invariance, which is bound to affect the robustness of CNNs against rotations. To tackle this issue, we propose a rotation meanout (RM) network to extract rotation-invariant features from dermoscopy images. In RM, each set of rotated feature maps corresponds to a set of outputs of the weight-sharing convolutions and they are fused using meanout strategy to obtain the final feature maps. Through theoretical derivation, the proposed RM network is rotation-equivariant and can extract rotation-invariant features when followed by the global average pooling (GAP) operation. The extracted rotation-invariant features can better represent the original data in classification and retrieval tasks for dermoscopy images. The RM is a general operation, which does not change the network structure or increase any parameter, and can be flexibly embedded in any part of CNNs. Extensive experiments are conducted on a dermoscopy image dataset. The results show our method outperforms other anti-rotation methods and achieves great improvements in dermoscopy image classification and retrieval tasks, indicating the potential of rotation invariance in the field of dermoscopy images.
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统可为皮肤病的临床诊断提供参考依据。卷积神经网络（CNN）不仅可以提取颜色和形状等视觉元素，还可以提取语义特征。因此，他们在皮肤镜图像的许多任务上取得了巨大的进步。皮肤镜的成像没有主方向，表明数据集中存在大量的皮肤病变旋转。然而，CNN 缺乏旋转不变性，这势必会影响 CNN 对旋转的鲁棒性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个旋转均值（RM）网络来从皮肤镜图像中提取旋转不变特征。在RM中，每组旋转的特征图对应于一组权重共享卷积的输出，并且使用均值策略将它们融合以获得最终的特征图。通过理论推导，所提出的 RM 网络是旋转等变的，并且在进行全局平均池化（GAP）操作时可以提取旋转不变特征。提取的旋转不变特征可以更好地表示皮肤镜图像分类和检索任务中的原始数据。 RM是一种通用操作，不改变网络结构，不增加任何参数，可以灵活嵌入到CNN的任何部分。在皮肤镜图像数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，我们的方法优于其他抗旋转方法，并在皮肤镜图像分类和检索任务中取得了很大的改进，表明旋转不变性在皮肤镜图像领域的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种旋转均值网络（RM），用于解决皮肤镜图像分类和检索中的旋转不变性问题。
AI.motivation: 皮肤镜图像缺乏固定方向，导致数据集中存在大量旋转病变，而传统卷积神经网络（CNN）缺乏旋转不变性，影响模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计旋转均值网络（RM），通过旋转特征图的权重共享卷积输出并采用均值融合策略，结合全局平均池化（GAP）提取旋转不变特征，且无需改变网络结构或增加参数。
AI.result: 在皮肤镜数据集上实验表明，该方法在分类和检索任务中优于其他抗旋转方法，显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 旋转不变性在皮肤镜图像领域具有潜力，RM作为一种通用操作可灵活嵌入CNN任意位置，有效提升模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Longfei Chen,Yang Ouyang,Haipeng Zhang,Suting Hong,Quan Li
title: RISeer: Inspecting the Status and Dynamics of Regional Industrial Structure via Visual Analytics
title_zh: RISeer：通过可视化分析考察区域产业结构现状与动态
comment: IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (Proc. IEEE VIS 2022)
comments: IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (Proc. IEEE VIS 2022)
abstract: Restructuring the regional industrial structure (RIS) has the potential to halt economic recession and achieve revitalization. Understanding the current status and dynamics of RIS will greatly assist in studying and evaluating the current industrial structure. Previous studies have focused on qualitative and quantitative research to rationalize RIS from a macroscopic perspective. Although recent studies have traced information at the industrial enterprise level to complement existing research from a micro perspective, the ambiguity of the underlying variables contributing to the industrial sector and its composition, the dynamic nature, and the large number of multivariant features of RIS records have obscured a deep and fine-grained understanding of RIS. To this end, we propose an interactive visualization system, RISeer, which is based on interpretable machine learning models and enhanced visualizations designed to identify the evolutionary patterns of the RIS and facilitate inter-regional inspection and comparison. Two case studies confirm the effectiveness of our approach, and feedback from experts indicates that RISeer helps them to gain a fine-grained understanding of the dynamics and evolution of the RIS.
summary: Restructuring the regional industrial structure (RIS) has the potential to halt economic recession and achieve revitalization. Understanding the current status and dynamics of RIS will greatly assist in studying and evaluating the current industrial structure. Previous studies have focused on qualitative and quantitative research to rationalize RIS from a macroscopic perspective. Although recent studies have traced information at the industrial enterprise level to complement existing research from a micro perspective, the ambiguity of the underlying variables contributing to the industrial sector and its composition, the dynamic nature, and the large number of multivariant features of RIS records have obscured a deep and fine-grained understanding of RIS. To this end, we propose an interactive visualization system, RISeer, which is based on interpretable machine learning models and enhanced visualizations designed to identify the evolutionary patterns of the RIS and facilitate inter-regional inspection and comparison. Two case studies confirm the effectiveness of our approach, and feedback from experts indicates that RISeer helps them to gain a fine-grained understanding of the dynamics and evolution of the RIS.
abstract_zh: 调整区域产业结构（RIS）有可能阻止经济衰退并实现振兴。了解RIS的现状和动态将极大地有助于研究和评估当前的产业结构。以往的研究主要集中在定性和定量研究上，从宏观角度合理化RIS。尽管最近的研究从微观角度追溯了工业企业层面的信息，以补充现有的研究，但工业部门及其构成的基础变量的模糊性、动态性以及RIS记录的大量多元特征模糊了对RIS的深入和细粒度的理解。为此，我们提出了一种交互式可视化系统 RISeer，它基于可解释的机器学习模型和增强的可视化，旨在识别 RIS 的演化模式并促进区域间检查和比较。两个案例研究证实了我们方法的有效性，专家的反馈表明 RISeer 帮助他们对 RIS 的动态和演变有更细致的了解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RISeer系统，通过可视化分析技术研究区域产业结构的现状与动态演变。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以从微观视角深入理解区域产业结构（RIS）的动态特征及多变量复杂性，缺乏细粒度分析工具。
AI.method: 基于可解释机器学习模型与增强可视化技术，构建交互式系统RISeer，用于识别RIS演化模式并支持跨区域对比分析。
AI.result: 两个案例验证了方法有效性，专家反馈表明RISeer能帮助深入理解RIS动态与演变规律。
AI.conclusion: RISeer为区域产业结构分析提供了有效工具，有助于制定经济振兴策略。

authors_text: Hangwei Chen,Feng Shao,Xiongli Chai,Yuese Gu,Qiuping Jiang,Xiangchao Meng,Yo-Sung Ho
title: Quality Evaluation of Arbitrary Style Transfer: Subjective Study and Objective Metric
title_zh: 任意风格迁移的质量评估：主观研究和客观度量
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology 2022, Code and Dataset: https://github.com/Hangwei-Chen/AST-IQAD-SRQE
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology 2022, Code and Dataset: https://github.com/Hangwei-Chen/AST-IQAD-SRQE
abstract: Arbitrary neural style transfer is a vital topic with great research value and wide industrial application, which strives to render the structure of one image using the style of another. Recent researches have devoted great efforts on the task of arbitrary style transfer (AST) for improving the stylization quality. However, there are very few explorations about the quality evaluation of AST images, even it can potentially guide the design of different algorithms. In this paper, we first construct a new AST images quality assessment database (AST-IQAD), which consists 150 content-style image pairs and the corresponding 1200 stylized images produced by eight typical AST algorithms. Then, a subjective study is conducted on our AST-IQAD database, which obtains the subjective rating scores of all stylized images on the three subjective evaluations, i.e., content preservation (CP), style resemblance (SR), and overall vision (OV). To quantitatively measure the quality of AST image, we propose a new sparse representation-based method, which computes the quality according to the sparse feature similarity. Experimental results on our AST-IQAD have demonstrated the superiority of the proposed method. The dataset and source code will be released at https://github.com/Hangwei-Chen/AST-IQAD-SRQE
summary: Arbitrary neural style transfer is a vital topic with great research value and wide industrial application, which strives to render the structure of one image using the style of another. Recent researches have devoted great efforts on the task of arbitrary style transfer (AST) for improving the stylization quality. However, there are very few explorations about the quality evaluation of AST images, even it can potentially guide the design of different algorithms. In this paper, we first construct a new AST images quality assessment database (AST-IQAD), which consists 150 content-style image pairs and the corresponding 1200 stylized images produced by eight typical AST algorithms. Then, a subjective study is conducted on our AST-IQAD database, which obtains the subjective rating scores of all stylized images on the three subjective evaluations, i.e., content preservation (CP), style resemblance (SR), and overall vision (OV). To quantitatively measure the quality of AST image, we propose a new sparse representation-based method, which computes the quality according to the sparse feature similarity. Experimental results on our AST-IQAD have demonstrated the superiority of the proposed method. The dataset and source code will be released at https://github.com/Hangwei-Chen/AST-IQAD-SRQE
abstract_zh: 任意神经风格迁移是一个具有重大研究价值和广泛工业应用的重要课题，它致力于使用一幅图像的风格来渲染另一幅图像的结构。最近的研究在任意风格迁移（AST）任务上投入了大量精力，以提高风格化质量。然而，关于 AST 图像质量评估的探索很少，即使它可以潜在地指导不同算法的设计。在本文中，我们首先构建了一个新的 AST 图像质量评估数据库（AST-IQAD），其中包含 150 个内容风格图像对以及由八种典型 AST 算法生成的相应 1200 个风格化图像。然后，在我们的 AST-IQAD 数据库上进行主观研究，获得所有风​​格化图像在内容保留（CP）、风格相似度（SR）和整体视觉（OV）三个主观评价上的主观评分。为了定量测量 AST 图像的质量，我们提出了一种新的基于稀疏表示的方法，该方法根据稀疏特征相似度来计算质量。我们的 AST-IQAD 上的实验结果证明了该方法的优越性。数据集和源代码将在https://github.com/Hangwei-Chen/AST-IQAD-SRQE发布

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个新的任意风格迁移图像质量评估数据库（AST-IQAD），并提出了一种基于稀疏表示的质量评估方法，用于量化评估风格迁移图像的质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管任意风格迁移（AST）研究取得进展，但现有研究缺乏对生成图像质量的有效评估方法，而这种评估对算法设计具有重要指导意义。
AI.method: 通过构建包含150组内容-风格图像对及8种典型AST算法生成的1200张风格化图像的AST-IQAD数据库，开展主观评分实验获取内容保留、风格相似度和整体视觉三项指标数据，并提出基于稀疏特征相似性的质量评估方法。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了所提方法在AST-IQAD数据库上的优越性，数据集和代码已公开发布。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的稀疏表示方法能有效量化评估AST图像质量，构建的数据库为后续研究提供了重要资源。

authors_text: Anito Anto,Linda Rose Jimson,Tanya Rose,Mohammed Jafrin,Mahesh Raveendranatha Panicker
title: Software Package for Automated Analysis of Lung Ultrasound Videos
title_zh: 肺部超声视频自动分析软件包
abstract: In the recent past with the rapid surge of COVID-19 infections, lung ultrasound has emerged as a fast and powerful diagnostic tool particularly for continuous and periodic monitoring of the lung. There have been many attempts towards severity classification, segmentation and detection of key landmarks in the lung. Leveraging the progress, an automated lung ultrasound video analysis package is presented in this work, which can provide summary of key frames in the video, flagging of the key frames with lung infection and options to automatically detect and segment the lung landmarks. The integrated package is implemented as an open-source web application and available in the link https://github.com/anitoanto/alus-package.
summary: In the recent past with the rapid surge of COVID-19 infections, lung ultrasound has emerged as a fast and powerful diagnostic tool particularly for continuous and periodic monitoring of the lung. There have been many attempts towards severity classification, segmentation and detection of key landmarks in the lung. Leveraging the progress, an automated lung ultrasound video analysis package is presented in this work, which can provide summary of key frames in the video, flagging of the key frames with lung infection and options to automatically detect and segment the lung landmarks. The integrated package is implemented as an open-source web application and available in the link https://github.com/anitoanto/alus-package.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着 COVID-19 感染的迅速激增，肺部超声已成为一种快速而强大的诊断工具，特别是对于肺部的连续和定期监测。人们在肺部关键标志的严重程度分类、分割和检测方面进行了许多尝试。利用这一进展，本工作提出了一个自动肺部超声视频分析包，它可以提供视频中关键帧的摘要、肺部感染关键帧的标记以及自动检测和分割肺部标志的选项。该集成包作为开源 Web 应用程序实现，可在链接 https://github.com/anitoanto/alus-package 中获取。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个用于自动分析肺部超声视频的软件包，可提取关键帧、标记感染区域并检测肺部标志物。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情暴发后，肺部超声成为重要诊断工具，但缺乏自动化分析工具以提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 开发开源Web应用，集成关键帧提取、感染标记、肺部标志物检测与分割功能。
AI.result: 实现自动化分析工具并开源（GitHub链接），提供肺部超声视频的快速分析解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该软件包为肺部超声视频分析提供了有效工具，可辅助临床监测与诊断。

authors_text: Yangyang Shu,Baosheng Yu,Haiming Xu,Lingqiao Liu
title: Improving Fine-Grained Visual Recognition in Low Data Regimes via Self-Boosting Attention Mechanism
title_zh: 通过自我提升注意力机制提高低数据条件下的细粒度视觉识别
abstract: The challenge of fine-grained visual recognition often lies in discovering the key discriminative regions. While such regions can be automatically identified from a large-scale labeled dataset, a similar method might become less effective when only a few annotations are available. In low data regimes, a network often struggles to choose the correct regions for recognition and tends to overfit spurious correlated patterns from the training data. To tackle this issue, this paper proposes the self-boosting attention mechanism, a novel method for regularizing the network to focus on the key regions shared across samples and classes. Specifically, the proposed method first generates an attention map for each training image, highlighting the discriminative part for identifying the ground-truth object category. Then the generated attention maps are used as pseudo-annotations. The network is enforced to fit them as an auxiliary task. We call this approach the self-boosting attention mechanism (SAM). We also develop a variant by using SAM to create multiple attention maps to pool convolutional maps in a style of bilinear pooling, dubbed SAM-Bilinear. Through extensive experimental studies, we show that both methods can significantly improve fine-grained visual recognition performance on low data regimes and can be incorporated into existing network architectures. The source code is publicly available at: https://github.com/GANPerf/SAM
summary: The challenge of fine-grained visual recognition often lies in discovering the key discriminative regions. While such regions can be automatically identified from a large-scale labeled dataset, a similar method might become less effective when only a few annotations are available. In low data regimes, a network often struggles to choose the correct regions for recognition and tends to overfit spurious correlated patterns from the training data. To tackle this issue, this paper proposes the self-boosting attention mechanism, a novel method for regularizing the network to focus on the key regions shared across samples and classes. Specifically, the proposed method first generates an attention map for each training image, highlighting the discriminative part for identifying the ground-truth object category. Then the generated attention maps are used as pseudo-annotations. The network is enforced to fit them as an auxiliary task. We call this approach the self-boosting attention mechanism (SAM). We also develop a variant by using SAM to create multiple attention maps to pool convolutional maps in a style of bilinear pooling, dubbed SAM-Bilinear. Through extensive experimental studies, we show that both methods can significantly improve fine-grained visual recognition performance on low data regimes and can be incorporated into existing network architectures. The source code is publicly available at: https://github.com/GANPerf/SAM
abstract_zh: 细粒度视觉识别的挑战通常在于发现关键的判别区域。虽然可以从大规模标记数据集中自动识别此类区域，但当只有少量注释可用时，类似的方法可能会变得不太有效。在低数据情况下，网络通常很难选择正确的识别区域，并且往往会过度拟合训练数据中的虚假相关模式。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了自增强注意力机制，这是一种规范网络以关注跨样本和类别共享的关键区域的新方法。具体来说，所提出的方法首先为每个训练图像生成注意图，突出显示用于识别地面真实对象类别的判别部分。然后生成的注意力图被用作伪注释。网络被强制将它们作为辅助任务来适应。我们将这种方法称为自增强注意力机制（SAM）。我们还开发了一种变体，使用 SAM 创建多个注意力图，以双线性池化的方式池化卷积图，称为 SAM-Bilinear。通过广泛的实验研究，我们表明这两种方法都可以显着提高低数据条件下的细粒度视觉识别性能，并且可以合并到现有的网络架构中。源代码可公开获取：https://github.com/GANPerf/SAM

AI.tldr: 本文提出自增强注意力机制（SAM），以解决低数据环境下细粒度视觉识别中关键判别区域定位困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 在标注数据有限时，现有方法难以准确识别关键区域且易过拟合，需通过正则化引导网络关注跨样本/类别的共享关键区域。
AI.method: 生成每张图像的注意力图作为伪标注，强制网络拟合该辅助任务；进一步提出SAM-Bilinear通过多注意力图双线性池化增强特征。
AI.result: 实验表明SAM及SAM-Bilinear在多个低数据基准数据集上显著提升识别性能，且兼容现有网络架构。
AI.conclusion: 自增强注意力机制有效缓解低数据下的过拟合问题，为细粒度识别提供通用且高效的正则化方案。

method: 生成每张图像的注意力图作为伪标注，强制网络拟合该辅助任务；进一步提出SAM-Bilinear通过多注意力图双线性池化增强特征。
result: 实验表明SAM及SAM-Bilinear在多个低数据基准数据集上显著提升识别性能，且兼容现有网络架构。
conclusion: 自增强注意力机制有效缓解低数据下的过拟合问题，为细粒度识别提供通用且高效的正则化方案。
search_text: Improving Fine-Grained Visual Recognition in Low Data Regimes via Self-Boosting Attention Mechanism 通过自我提升注意力机制提高低数据条件下的细粒度视觉识别 The challenge of fine-grained visual recognition often lies in discovering the key discriminative regions. While such regions can be automatically identified from a large-scale labeled dataset, a similar method might become less effective when only a few annotations are available. In low data regimes, a network often struggles to choose the correct regions for recognition and tends to overfit spurious correlated patterns from the training data. To tackle this issue, this paper proposes the self-boosting attention mechanism, a novel method for regularizing the network to focus on the key regions shared across samples and classes. Specifically, the proposed method first generates an attention map for each training image, highlighting the discriminative part for identifying the ground-truth object category. Then the generated attention maps are used as pseudo-annotations. The network is enforced to fit them as an auxiliary task. We call this approach the self-boosting attention mechanism (SAM). We also develop a variant by using SAM to create multiple attention maps to pool convolutional maps in a style of bilinear pooling, dubbed SAM-Bilinear. Through extensive experimental studies, we show that both methods can significantly improve fine-grained visual recognition performance on low data regimes and can be incorporated into existing network architectures. The source code is publicly available at: https://github.com/GANPerf/SAM 细粒度视觉识别的挑战通常在于发现关键的判别区域。虽然可以从大规模标记数据集中自动识别此类区域，但当只有少量注释可用时，类似的方法可能会变得不太有效。在低数据情况下，网络通常很难选择正确的识别区域，并且往往会过度拟合训练数据中的虚假相关模式。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了自增强注意力机制，这是一种规范网络以关注跨样本和类别共享的关键区域的新方法。具体来说，所提出的方法首先为每个训练图像生成注意图，突出显示用于识别地面真实对象类别的判别部分。然后生成的注意力图被用作伪注释。网络被强制将它们作为辅助任务来适应。我们将这种方法称为自增强注意力机制（SAM）。我们还开发了一种变体，使用 SAM 创建多个注意力图，以双线性池化的方式池化卷积图，称为 SAM-Bilinear。通过广泛的实验研究，我们表明这两种方法都可以显着提高低数据条件下的细粒度视觉识别性能，并且可以合并到现有的网络架构中。源代码可公开获取：https://github.com/GANPerf/SAM 本文提出自增强注意力机制（SAM），以解决低数据环境下细粒度视觉识别中关键判别区域定位困难的问题。 Yangyang Shu,Baosheng Yu,Haiming Xu,Lingqiao Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Hiroki Ishizuka,Shoki Kitaguchi,Masashi Nakatani,Hidenori Yoshimura,Fusao Shimokawa
title: Computational Models for SA, RA, PC Afferent to Reproduce Neural Responses to Dynamic Stimulus Using FEM Analysis and a Leaky Integrate-and-Fire Model
title_zh: SA、RA、PC 传入的计算模型使用 FEM 分析和泄漏积分与激发模型再现对动态刺激的神经响应
abstract: Tactile afferents such as (RA), and Pacinian (PC) afferents that respond to external stimuli enable complicated actions such as grasping, stroking and identifying an object. To understand the tactile sensation induced by these actions deeply, the activities of the tactile afferents need to be revealed. For this purpose, we develop a computational model for each tactile afferent for vibration stimuli, combining finite element analysis finite element method (FEM) analysis and a leaky integrate-and-fire model that represents the neural characteristics. This computational model can easily estimate the neural activities of the tactile afferents without measuring biological data. Skin deformation calculated using FEM analysis is substituted into the integrate-and-fire model as current input to calculate the membrane potential of each tactile afferent. We optimized parameters in the integrate-and-fire models using reported biological data. Then, we calculated the responses of the numerical models to sinusoidal, diharmonic, and white-noise-like mechanical stimuli to validate the proposed numerical models. From the result, the computational models well reproduced the neural responses to vibration stimuli such as sinusoidal, diharmonic, and noise stimuli and compare favorably with the similar computational models that can simulate the responses to vibration stimuli.
summary: Tactile afferents such as (RA), and Pacinian (PC) afferents that respond to external stimuli enable complicated actions such as grasping, stroking and identifying an object. To understand the tactile sensation induced by these actions deeply, the activities of the tactile afferents need to be revealed. For this purpose, we develop a computational model for each tactile afferent for vibration stimuli, combining finite element analysis finite element method (FEM) analysis and a leaky integrate-and-fire model that represents the neural characteristics. This computational model can easily estimate the neural activities of the tactile afferents without measuring biological data. Skin deformation calculated using FEM analysis is substituted into the integrate-and-fire model as current input to calculate the membrane potential of each tactile afferent. We optimized parameters in the integrate-and-fire models using reported biological data. Then, we calculated the responses of the numerical models to sinusoidal, diharmonic, and white-noise-like mechanical stimuli to validate the proposed numerical models. From the result, the computational models well reproduced the neural responses to vibration stimuli such as sinusoidal, diharmonic, and noise stimuli and compare favorably with the similar computational models that can simulate the responses to vibration stimuli.
abstract_zh: 触觉传入神经 (RA) 和帕西尼安 (PC) 传入神经对外部刺激作出反应，可实现复杂的动作，例如抓取、抚摸和识别物体。为了深入理解这些动作引起的触觉，需要揭示触觉传入的活动。为此，我们结合有限元分析、有限元法 (FEM) 分析和代表神经特征的泄漏集成和激发模型，为每个振动刺激的触觉传入开发了一个计算模型。该计算模型可以轻松估计触觉传入的神经活动，而无需测量生物数据。使用 FEM 分析计算出的皮肤变形被代入积分激发模型作为电流输入，以计算每个触觉传入的膜电位。我们使用报告的生物数据优化了集成和发射模型中的参数。然后，我们计算了数值模型对正弦、二谐波和类白噪声机械刺激的响应，以验证所提出的数值模型。从结果来看，计算模型很好地再现了对正弦、双谐波和噪声刺激等振动刺激的神经反应，并且与可以模拟对振动刺激的反应的类似计算模型相媲美。

AI.tldr: 开发结合有限元分析与漏积分-火模型的计算模型，以模拟触觉传入神经对动态刺激的神经反应。
AI.motivation: 需深入理解触觉感觉机制，传统方法依赖生物数据测量存在局限，需建立无需生物数据的计算模型以模拟神经活动。
AI.method: 融合有限元分析（FEM）计算皮肤变形，并将其作为电流输入至漏积分-火模型，通过优化生物参数验证模型对正弦波、双谐波及白噪声刺激的响应。
AI.result: 模型成功复现了触觉神经对多种振动刺激的神经反应，且性能优于现有类似计算模型。
AI.conclusion: 该计算模型可有效模拟触觉传入神经动态响应，为研究触觉感知机制提供新工具。

authors_text: Bowen Xu,Jiakun Xu,Nan Xue,Gui-Song Xia
title: Accurate Polygonal Mapping of Buildings in Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 卫星图像中建筑物的精确多边形测绘
abstract: This paper studies the problem of polygonal mapping of buildings by tackling the issue of mask reversibility that leads to a notable performance gap between the predicted masks and polygons from the learning-based methods. We addressed such an issue by exploiting the hierarchical supervision (of bottom-level vertices, mid-level line segments and the high-level regional masks) and proposed a novel interaction mechanism of feature embedding sourced from different levels of supervision signals to obtain reversible building masks for polygonal mapping of buildings. As a result, we show that the learned reversible building masks take all the merits of the advances of deep convolutional neural networks for high-performing polygonal mapping of buildings. In the experiments, we evaluated our method on the two public benchmarks of AICrowd and Inria. On the AICrowd dataset, our proposed method obtains unanimous improvements on the metrics of AP, APboundary and PoLiS. For the Inria dataset, our proposed method also obtains very competitive results on the metrics of IoU and Accuracy. The models and source code are available at https://github.com/SarahwXU.
summary: This paper studies the problem of polygonal mapping of buildings by tackling the issue of mask reversibility that leads to a notable performance gap between the predicted masks and polygons from the learning-based methods. We addressed such an issue by exploiting the hierarchical supervision (of bottom-level vertices, mid-level line segments and the high-level regional masks) and proposed a novel interaction mechanism of feature embedding sourced from different levels of supervision signals to obtain reversible building masks for polygonal mapping of buildings. As a result, we show that the learned reversible building masks take all the merits of the advances of deep convolutional neural networks for high-performing polygonal mapping of buildings. In the experiments, we evaluated our method on the two public benchmarks of AICrowd and Inria. On the AICrowd dataset, our proposed method obtains unanimous improvements on the metrics of AP, APboundary and PoLiS. For the Inria dataset, our proposed method also obtains very competitive results on the metrics of IoU and Accuracy. The models and source code are available at https://github.com/SarahwXU.
abstract_zh: 本文通过解决掩模可逆性问题来研究建筑物的多边形映射问题，该问题导致基于学习的方法预测的掩模与多边形之间存在显着的性能差距。我们通过利用分层监督（底层顶点、中层线段和高层区域掩模）解决了这个问题，并提出了一种新颖的来自不同级别监督信号的特征嵌入交互机制，以获得用于建筑物多边形映射的可逆建筑掩模。结果，我们表明，学习的可逆建筑掩模吸收了深度卷积神经网络在建筑物的高性能多边形映射方面取得的进步的所有优点。在实验中，我们在 AICrowd 和 Inria 两个公共基准上评估了我们的方法。在AICrowd数据集上，我们提出的方法在AP、APboundary和PoLiS的指标上获得了一致的改进。对于 Inria 数据集，我们提出的方法在 IoU 和 Accuracy 指标上也获得了非常有竞争力的结果。模型和源代码可在 https://github.com/SarahwXU 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究卫星图像中建筑物的精确多边形映射问题，通过解决mask可逆性问题提升映射性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法在预测mask与生成多边形时存在性能差距，因mask不可逆导致信息丢失。
AI.method: 采用分层监督（顶点、线段、区域mask）与跨层级特征嵌入交互机制，生成可逆建筑mask。
AI.result: 在AICrowd数据集上AP、APboundary、PoLiS指标全面提升；Inria数据集IoU和Accuracy表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 分层监督与特征交互机制有效提升多边形映射精度，代码已开源验证方法有效性。

authors_text: Simon Stepputtis,Maryam Bandari,Stefan Schaal,Heni Ben Amor
title: A System for Imitation Learning of Contact-Rich Bimanual Manipulation Policies
title_zh: 一种模拟学习接触丰富的双手操作策略的系统
comment: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022), Kyoto, Japan
comments: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022), Kyoto, Japan
abstract: In this paper, we discuss a framework for teaching bimanual manipulation tasks by imitation. To this end, we present a system and algorithms for learning compliant and contact-rich robot behavior from human demonstrations. The presented system combines insights from admittance control and machine learning to extract control policies that can (a) recover from and adapt to a variety of disturbances in time and space, while also (b) effectively leveraging physical contact with the environment. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach using a real-world insertion task involving multiple simultaneous contacts between a manipulated object and insertion pegs. We also investigate efficient means of collecting training data for such bimanual settings. To this end, we conduct a human-subject study and analyze the effort and mental demand as reported by the users. Our experiments show that, while harder to provide, the additional force/torque information available in teleoperated demonstrations is crucial for phase estimation and task success. Ultimately, force/torque data substantially improves manipulation robustness, resulting in a 90% success rate in a multipoint insertion task. Code and videos can be found at https://bimanualmanipulation.com/
summary: In this paper, we discuss a framework for teaching bimanual manipulation tasks by imitation. To this end, we present a system and algorithms for learning compliant and contact-rich robot behavior from human demonstrations. The presented system combines insights from admittance control and machine learning to extract control policies that can (a) recover from and adapt to a variety of disturbances in time and space, while also (b) effectively leveraging physical contact with the environment. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach using a real-world insertion task involving multiple simultaneous contacts between a manipulated object and insertion pegs. We also investigate efficient means of collecting training data for such bimanual settings. To this end, we conduct a human-subject study and analyze the effort and mental demand as reported by the users. Our experiments show that, while harder to provide, the additional force/torque information available in teleoperated demonstrations is crucial for phase estimation and task success. Ultimately, force/torque data substantially improves manipulation robustness, resulting in a 90% success rate in a multipoint insertion task. Code and videos can be found at https://bimanualmanipulation.com/
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们讨论了通过模仿教授双手操作任务的框架。为此，我们提出了一种系统和算法，用于从人类演示中学习顺从且接触丰富的机器人行为。所提出的系统结合了准入控制和机器学习的见解，提取控制策略，这些策略可以（a）从时间和空间上的各种干扰中恢复并适应，同时（b）有效地利用与环境的物理接触。我们使用现实世界的插入任务来证明我们的方法的有效性，该任务涉及被操纵对象和插入钉之间的多个同时接触。我们还研究了为此类双手设置收集训练数据的有效方法。为此，我们进行了一项人体研究，并分析了用户报告的努力和心理需求。我们的实验表明，虽然难以提供，但远程操作演示中可用的额外力/扭矩信息对于相位估计和任务成功至关重要。最终，力/扭矩数据大大提高了操作的鲁棒性，使多点插入任务的成功率达到 90%。代码和视频可以在 https://bimanualmanipulation.com/ 找到

authors_text: Hayder A. Khikani,Naira Elazab,Ahmed Elgarayhi,Mohammed Elmogy,Mohammed Sallah
title: Breast Cancer Classification Based on Histopathological Images Using a Deep Learning Capsule Network
title_zh: 使用深度学习胶囊网络根据组织病理学图像进行乳腺癌分类
abstract: Breast cancer is one of the most serious types of cancer that can occur in women. The automatic diagnosis of breast cancer by analyzing histological images (HIs) is important for patients and their prognosis. The classification of HIs provides clinicians with an accurate understanding of diseases and allows them to treat patients more efficiently. Deep learning (DL) approaches have been successfully employed in a variety of fields, particularly medical imaging, due to their capacity to extract features automatically. This study aims to classify different types of breast cancer using HIs. In this research, we present an enhanced capsule network that extracts multi-scale features using the Res2Net block and four additional convolutional layers. Furthermore, the proposed method has fewer parameters due to using small convolutional kernels and the Res2Net block. As a result, the new method outperforms the old ones since it automatically learns the best possible features. The testing results show that the model outperformed the previous DL methods.
summary: Breast cancer is one of the most serious types of cancer that can occur in women. The automatic diagnosis of breast cancer by analyzing histological images (HIs) is important for patients and their prognosis. The classification of HIs provides clinicians with an accurate understanding of diseases and allows them to treat patients more efficiently. Deep learning (DL) approaches have been successfully employed in a variety of fields, particularly medical imaging, due to their capacity to extract features automatically. This study aims to classify different types of breast cancer using HIs. In this research, we present an enhanced capsule network that extracts multi-scale features using the Res2Net block and four additional convolutional layers. Furthermore, the proposed method has fewer parameters due to using small convolutional kernels and the Res2Net block. As a result, the new method outperforms the old ones since it automatically learns the best possible features. The testing results show that the model outperformed the previous DL methods.
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌是女性可能发生的最严重的癌症之一。通过分析组织学图像（HI）自动诊断乳腺癌对于患者及其预后非常重要。 HI 的分类为临床医生提供了对疾病的准确了解，使他们能够更有效地治疗患者。深度学习（DL）方法由于具有自动提取特征的能力，已成功应用于各个领域，特别是医学成像。本研究旨在使用 HI 对不同类型的乳腺癌进行分类。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种增强的胶囊网络，它使用 Res2Net 块和四个附加卷积层提取多尺度特征。此外，由于使用小卷积核和 Res2Net 块，所提出的方法具有较少的参数。因此，新方法优于旧方法，因为它会自动学习最佳的特征。测试结果表明该模型优于之前的深度学习方法。

AI.tldr: 基于深度学习胶囊网络对乳腺癌组织病理图像进行分类。
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌是女性高发癌症，传统诊断依赖病理图像分析，但存在效率低、主观性强等问题。深度学习能自动提取特征，提升分类准确性，因此需开发更高效的模型以辅助临床诊断。
AI.method: 提出改进的胶囊网络，结合Res2Net模块与四个额外卷积层实现多尺度特征提取，并通过小卷积核设计减少参数量。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在乳腺癌分类任务中优于现有深度学习方法，具有更高的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 改进的胶囊网络通过多尺度特征学习和参数优化，有效提升了乳腺癌病理图像分类性能，为医学影像分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dai Hai Nguyen,Tetsuya Sakurai
title: A Particle-Based Algorithm for Distributional Optimization on \textit{Constrained Domains} via Variational Transport and Mirror Descent
title_zh: 基于粒子的算法，通过变分传输和镜像下降在 \textit{Constrained Domains} 上进行分布优化
abstract: We consider the optimization problem of minimizing an objective functional, which admits a variational form and is defined over probability distributions on the constrained domain, which poses challenges to both theoretical analysis and algorithmic design. Inspired by the mirror descent algorithm for constrained optimization, we propose an iterative particle-based algorithm, named Mirrored Variational Transport (mirrorVT), extended from the Variational Transport framework [7] for dealing with the constrained domain. In particular, for each iteration, mirrorVT maps particles to an unconstrained dual domain induced by a mirror map and then approximately perform Wasserstein gradient descent on the manifold of distributions defined over the dual space by pushing particles. At the end of iteration, particles are mapped back to the original constrained domain. Through simulated experiments, we demonstrate the effectiveness of mirrorVT for minimizing the functionals over probability distributions on the simplex- and Euclidean ball-constrained domains. We also analyze its theoretical properties and characterize its convergence to the global minimum of the objective functional.
summary: We consider the optimization problem of minimizing an objective functional, which admits a variational form and is defined over probability distributions on the constrained domain, which poses challenges to both theoretical analysis and algorithmic design. Inspired by the mirror descent algorithm for constrained optimization, we propose an iterative particle-based algorithm, named Mirrored Variational Transport (mirrorVT), extended from the Variational Transport framework [7] for dealing with the constrained domain. In particular, for each iteration, mirrorVT maps particles to an unconstrained dual domain induced by a mirror map and then approximately perform Wasserstein gradient descent on the manifold of distributions defined over the dual space by pushing particles. At the end of iteration, particles are mapped back to the original constrained domain. Through simulated experiments, we demonstrate the effectiveness of mirrorVT for minimizing the functionals over probability distributions on the simplex- and Euclidean ball-constrained domains. We also analyze its theoretical properties and characterize its convergence to the global minimum of the objective functional.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑最小化目标函数的优化问题，它允许变分形式并在约束域上的概率分布上定义，这对理论分析和算法设计都提出了挑战。受约束优化的镜像下降算法的启发，我们提出了一种基于迭代粒子的算法，称为镜像变分传输（mirrorVT），该算法扩展自变分传输框架[7]，用于处理约束域。特别是，对于每次迭代，mirrorVT 将粒子映射到由镜像映射引起的无约束双域，然后通过推动粒子对双空间上定义的分布流形近似执行 Wasserstein 梯度下降。在迭代结束时，粒子被映射回原始约束域。通过模拟实验，我们证明了mirrorVT在最小化单纯形和欧几里得球约束域上的概率分布泛函方面的有效性。我们还分析了它的理论特性并描述了它收敛到目标函数的全局最小值的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于粒子的算法mirrorVT，用于在受限域上进行分布优化，结合变分传输框架与镜像下降方法。
AI.motivation: 在受限域上优化概率分布的目标函数面临理论分析与算法设计的双重挑战，传统方法难以有效处理约束条件。
AI.method: 通过镜像映射将粒子转换至无约束对偶域，在对偶空间进行Wasserstein梯度下降后，再映射回原受限域完成迭代优化。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法在单纯形与欧几里得球约束域上的有效性，并理论上证明其收敛于目标函数的全局最小值。
AI.conclusion: mirrorVT算法通过结合镜像下降与变分传输，成功解决了受限域分布优化问题，具有理论保证与实际应用价值。

search_text: A Particle-Based Algorithm for Distributional Optimization on \textit{Constrained Domains} via Variational Transport and Mirror Descent 基于粒子的算法，通过变分传输和镜像下降在 \textit{Constrained Domains} 上进行分布优化 We consider the optimization problem of minimizing an objective functional, which admits a variational form and is defined over probability distributions on the constrained domain, which poses challenges to both theoretical analysis and algorithmic design. Inspired by the mirror descent algorithm for constrained optimization, we propose an iterative particle-based algorithm, named Mirrored Variational Transport (mirrorVT), extended from the Variational Transport framework [7] for dealing with the constrained domain. In particular, for each iteration, mirrorVT maps particles to an unconstrained dual domain induced by a mirror map and then approximately perform Wasserstein gradient descent on the manifold of distributions defined over the dual space by pushing particles. At the end of iteration, particles are mapped back to the original constrained domain. Through simulated experiments, we demonstrate the effectiveness of mirrorVT for minimizing the functionals over probability distributions on the simplex- and Euclidean ball-constrained domains. We also analyze its theoretical properties and characterize its convergence to the global minimum of the objective functional. 我们考虑最小化目标函数的优化问题，它允许变分形式并在约束域上的概率分布上定义，这对理论分析和算法设计都提出了挑战。受约束优化的镜像下降算法的启发，我们提出了一种基于迭代粒子的算法，称为镜像变分传输（mirrorVT），该算法扩展自变分传输框架[7]，用于处理约束域。特别是，对于每次迭代，mirrorVT 将粒子映射到由镜像映射引起的无约束双域，然后通过推动粒子对双空间上定义的分布流形近似执行 Wasserstein 梯度下降。在迭代结束时，粒子被映射回原始约束域。通过模拟实验，我们证明了mirrorVT在最小化单纯形和欧几里得球约束域上的概率分布泛函方面的有效性。我们还分析了它的理论特性并描述了它收敛到目标函数的全局最小值的特征。 本文提出一种基于粒子的算法mirrorVT，用于在受限域上进行分布优化，结合变分传输框架与镜像下降方法。 Dai Hai Nguyen,Tetsuya Sakurai math.OC,cs.AI

authors_text: Hussein Hashem,Yasmin Alsakar,Ahmed Elgarayhi,Mohammed Elmogy,Mohammed Sallah
title: An Enhanced Deep Learning Technique for Prostate Cancer Identification Based on MRI Scans
title_zh: 基于 MRI 扫描的前列腺癌识别增强深度学习技术
abstract: Prostate cancer is the most dangerous cancer diagnosed in men worldwide. Prostate diagnosis has been affected by many factors, such as lesion complexity, observer visibility, and variability. Many techniques based on Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) have been used for prostate cancer identification and classification in the last few decades. Developing these techniques is crucial and has a great medical effect because they improve the treatment benefits and the chance of patients' survival. A new technique that depends on MRI has been proposed to improve the diagnosis. This technique consists of two stages. First, the MRI images have been preprocessed to make the medical image more suitable for the detection step. Second, prostate cancer identification has been performed based on a pre-trained deep learning model, InceptionResNetV2, that has many advantages and achieves effective results. In this paper, the InceptionResNetV2 deep learning model used for this purpose has average accuracy equals to 89.20%, and the area under the curve (AUC) equals to 93.6%. The experimental results of this proposed new deep learning technique represent promising and effective results compared to other previous techniques.

abstract_zh: 前列腺癌是全世界男性中诊断出的最危险的癌症。前列腺诊断受到许多因素的影响，例如病变复杂性、观察者可见度和变异性。在过去的几十年里，许多基于磁共振成像（MRI）的技术已被用于前列腺癌的识别和分类。开发这些技术至关重要，并且具有巨大的医疗效果，因为它们可以提高治疗效果和患者的生存机会。人们提出了一种依赖 MRI 的新技术来改善诊断。该技术由两个阶段组成。首先，对 MRI 图像进行预处理，使医学图像更适合检测步骤。其次，基于预训练的深度学习模型InceptionResNetV2进行前列腺癌识别，该模型具有很多优点并取得了有效的结果。在本文中，用于此目的的InceptionResNetV2深度学习模型的平均准确率为89.20%，曲线下面积（AUC）为93.6%。与之前的其他技术相比，这种新的深度学习技术的实验结果代表了有前途且有效的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于MRI的增强深度学习技术，用于提高前列腺癌识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 前列腺癌诊断受病变复杂性、观察者差异等因素影响，现有技术需进一步优化以提高治疗效果和患者生存率。
AI.method: 分两阶段处理：首先预处理MRI图像以提升检测质量，其次采用预训练的InceptionResNetV2深度学习模型进行癌症识别。
AI.result: 模型平均准确率达89.20%，AUC值为93.6%，优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: 该技术有效提升了前列腺癌识别性能，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Zhihao Li,Jianzhuang Liu,Zhensong Zhang,Songcen Xu,Youliang Yan
title: CLIFF: Carrying Location Information in Full Frames into Human Pose and Shape Estimation
title_zh: CLIFF：将全帧位置信息携带到人体姿势和形状估计中
comment: update the related work upon v1 with small modifications
comments: update the related work upon v1 with small modifications
abstract: Top-down methods dominate the field of 3D human pose and shape estimation, because they are decoupled from human detection and allow researchers to focus on the core problem. However, cropping, their first step, discards the location information from the very beginning, which makes themselves unable to accurately predict the global rotation in the original camera coordinate system. To address this problem, we propose to Carry Location Information in Full Frames (CLIFF) into this task. Specifically, we feed more holistic features to CLIFF by concatenating the cropped-image feature with its bounding box information. We calculate the 2D reprojection loss with a broader view of the full frame, taking a projection process similar to that of the person projected in the image. Fed and supervised by global-location-aware information, CLIFF directly predicts the global rotation along with more accurate articulated poses. Besides, we propose a pseudo-ground-truth annotator based on CLIFF, which provides high-quality 3D annotations for in-the-wild 2D datasets and offers crucial full supervision for regression-based methods. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks show that CLIFF outperforms prior arts by a significant margin, and reaches the first place on the AGORA leaderboard (the SMPL-Algorithms track). The code and data are available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/CLIFF.
summary: Top-down methods dominate the field of 3D human pose and shape estimation, because they are decoupled from human detection and allow researchers to focus on the core problem. However, cropping, their first step, discards the location information from the very beginning, which makes themselves unable to accurately predict the global rotation in the original camera coordinate system. To address this problem, we propose to Carry Location Information in Full Frames (CLIFF) into this task. Specifically, we feed more holistic features to CLIFF by concatenating the cropped-image feature with its bounding box information. We calculate the 2D reprojection loss with a broader view of the full frame, taking a projection process similar to that of the person projected in the image. Fed and supervised by global-location-aware information, CLIFF directly predicts the global rotation along with more accurate articulated poses. Besides, we propose a pseudo-ground-truth annotator based on CLIFF, which provides high-quality 3D annotations for in-the-wild 2D datasets and offers crucial full supervision for regression-based methods. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks show that CLIFF outperforms prior arts by a significant margin, and reaches the first place on the AGORA leaderboard (the SMPL-Algorithms track). The code and data are available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/CLIFF.
abstract_zh: 自上而下的方法在 3D 人体姿势和形状估计领域占据主导地位，因为它们与人体检测分离，使研究人员能够专注于核心问题。然而，他们的第一步裁剪从一开始就丢弃了位置信息，这使得他们无法准确预测原始相机坐标系中的全局旋转。为了解决这个问题，我们建议在此任务中携带全帧位置信息（CLIFF）。具体来说，我们通过将裁剪图像特征与其边界框信息连接起来，向 CLIFF 提供更全面的特征。我们通过更广泛的全帧视图来计算 2D 重投影损失，采用类似于图像中投影的人的投影过程。 CLIFF 在全球位置感知信息的馈送和监督下，直接预测全球旋转以及更准确的关节姿势。此外，我们提出了一种基于 CLIFF 的伪地面实况注释器，它为野外 2D 数据集提供高质量的 3D 注释，并为基于回归的方法提供至关重要的全面监督。对流行基准的大量实验表明，CLIFF 的性能明显优于现有技术，并在 AGORA 排行榜（SMPL 算法赛道）上排名第一。代码和数据可以在https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/CLIFF获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIFF方法，通过引入完整帧中的位置信息，解决3D人体姿态和形状估计中因裁剪导致的全局旋转预测不准确问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自上而下方法在裁剪步骤中丢失位置信息，导致无法准确预测原始相机坐标系中的全局旋转，影响估计精度。
AI.method: 将裁剪图像特征与边界框信息结合，利用全帧视角计算2D重投影损失，并提出伪真实标注生成器为野外数据集提供高质量3D标注。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著优于现有方法，在AGORA排行榜（SMPL-Algorithms赛道）中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: CLIFF通过全局位置感知信息提升预测准确性，同时为回归方法提供全监督标注，增强了模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

To address this problem, we propose to Carry Location Information in Full Frames (CLIFF) into this task. Specifically, we feed more holistic features to CLIFF by concatenating the cropped-image feature with its bounding box information. We calculate the 2D reprojection loss with a broader view of the full frame, taking a projection process similar to that of the person projected in the image. Besides, we propose a pseudo-ground-truth annotator based on CLIFF, which provides high-quality 3D annotations for in-the-wild 2D datasets and offers crucial full supervision for regression-based methods. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks show that CLIFF outperforms prior arts by a significant margin, and reaches the first place on the AGORA leaderboard (the SMPL-Algorithms track). The code and data are available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/CLIFF. 自上而下的方法在 3D 人体姿势和形状估计领域占据主导地位，因为它们与人体检测分离，使研究人员能够专注于核心问题。然而，他们的第一步裁剪从一开始就丢弃了位置信息，这使得他们无法准确预测原始相机坐标系中的全局旋转。为了解决这个问题，我们建议在此任务中携带全帧位置信息（CLIFF）。具体来说，我们通过将裁剪图像特征与其边界框信息连接起来，向 CLIFF 提供更全面的特征。我们通过更广泛的全帧视图来计算 2D 重投影损失，采用类似于图像中投影的人的投影过程。 CLIFF 在全球位置感知信息的馈送和监督下，直接预测全球旋转以及更准确的关节姿势。此外，我们提出了一种基于 CLIFF 的伪地面实况注释器，它为野外 2D 数据集提供高质量的 3D 注释，并为基于回归的方法提供至关重要的全面监督。对流行基准的大量实验表明，CLIFF 的性能明显优于现有技术，并在 AGORA 排行榜（SMPL 算法赛道）上排名第一。代码和数据可以在https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/CLIFF获取。 本文提出CLIFF方法，通过引入完整帧中的位置信息，解决3D人体姿态和形状估计中因裁剪导致的全局旋转预测不准确问题。 Zhihao Li,Jianzhuang Liu,Zhensong Zhang,Songcen Xu,Youliang Yan cs.CV

authors_text: Maia Stiber,Russell Taylor,Chien-Ming Huang
title: Modeling Human Response to Robot Errors for Timely Error Detection
title_zh: 模拟人类对机器人错误的反应，以便及时检测错误
comment: Accepted to 2022 International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: Accepted to 2022 International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: In human-robot collaboration, robot errors are inevitable -- damaging user trust, willingness to work together, and task performance. Prior work has shown that people naturally respond to robot errors socially and that in social interactions it is possible to use human responses to detect errors. However, there is little exploration in the domain of non-social, physical human-robot collaboration such as assembly and tool retrieval. In this work, we investigate how people's organic, social responses to robot errors may be used to enable timely automatic detection of errors in physical human-robot interactions. We conducted a data collection study to obtain facial responses to train a real-time detection algorithm and a case study to explore the generalizability of our method with different task settings and errors. Our results show that natural social responses are effective signals for timely detection and localization of robot errors even in non-social contexts and that our method is robust across a variety of task contexts, robot errors, and user responses. This work contributes to robust error detection without detailed task specifications.
summary: In human-robot collaboration, robot errors are inevitable -- damaging user trust, willingness to work together, and task performance. Prior work has shown that people naturally respond to robot errors socially and that in social interactions it is possible to use human responses to detect errors. However, there is little exploration in the domain of non-social, physical human-robot collaboration such as assembly and tool retrieval. In this work, we investigate how people's organic, social responses to robot errors may be used to enable timely automatic detection of errors in physical human-robot interactions. We conducted a data collection study to obtain facial responses to train a real-time detection algorithm and a case study to explore the generalizability of our method with different task settings and errors. Our results show that natural social responses are effective signals for timely detection and localization of robot errors even in non-social contexts and that our method is robust across a variety of task contexts, robot errors, and user responses. This work contributes to robust error detection without detailed task specifications.
abstract_zh: 在人机协作中，机器人错误是不可避免的——损害用户信任、合作意愿和任务绩效。先前的研究表明，人们会自然地对机器人错误做出社交反应，并且在社交互动中可以利用人类的反应来检测错误。然而，在非社交、物理人机协作（例如装配和工具检索）领域却鲜有探索。在这项工作中，我们研究了如何利用人们对机器人错误的有机社会反应来及时自动检测物理人机交互中的错误。我们进行了一项数据收集研究，以获得面部反应来训练实时检测算法，并进行了案例研究，以探索我们的方法在不同任务设置和错误下的通用性。我们的结果表明，即使在非社交环境中，自然社交反应也是及时检测和定位机器人错误的有效信​​号，并且我们的方法在各种任务环境、机器人错误和用户响应中都是稳健的。这项工作有助于在没有详细任务规范的情况下进行稳健的错误检测。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究如何利用人类对机器人错误的自然社会反应，实现物理人机协作中错误的及时自动检测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在非社交物理人机协作（如装配）中缺乏对人类反应用于错误检测的探索，且现有方法依赖详细任务规范，需开发更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过收集人类面部反应数据训练实时检测算法，并通过不同任务设置和错误类型的案例研究验证方法的通用性。
AI.result: 结果表明，自然社会反应能有效用于非社交情境中的错误及时检测与定位，且方法在多种任务、错误类型和用户反应中表现鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种无需详细任务规范的鲁棒错误检测方法，提升了物理人机协作的可靠性，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Jianfeng Zhang,Zihang Jiang,Dingdong Yang,Hongyi Xu,Yichun Shi,Guoxian Song,Zhongcong Xu,Xinchao Wang,Jiashi Feng
title: AvatarGen: a 3D Generative Model for Animatable Human Avatars
title_zh: AvatarGen：可动画化的人体头像的 3D 生成模型
comment: First two authors contributed equally. Code will be available at https://github.com/jfzhang95/AvatarGen
comments: First two authors contributed equally. Code will be available at https://github.com/jfzhang95/AvatarGen
abstract: Unsupervised generation of clothed virtual humans with various appearance and animatable poses is important for creating 3D human avatars and other AR/VR applications. Existing methods are either limited to rigid object modeling, or not generative and thus unable to synthesize high-quality virtual humans and animate them. In this work, we propose AvatarGen, the first method that enables not only non-rigid human generation with diverse appearance but also full control over poses and viewpoints, while only requiring 2D images for training. Specifically, it extends the recent 3D GANs to clothed human generation by utilizing a coarse human body model as a proxy to warp the observation space into a standard avatar under a canonical space. To model non-rigid dynamics, it introduces a deformation network to learn pose-dependent deformations in the canonical space. To improve geometry quality of the generated human avatars, it leverages signed distance field as geometric representation, which allows more direct regularization from the body model on the geometry learning. Benefiting from these designs, our method can generate animatable human avatars with high-quality appearance and geometry modeling, significantly outperforming previous 3D GANs. Furthermore, it is competent for many applications, e.g., single-view reconstruction, reanimation, and text-guided synthesis. Code and pre-trained model will be available.
summary: Unsupervised generation of clothed virtual humans with various appearance and animatable poses is important for creating 3D human avatars and other AR/VR applications. Existing methods are either limited to rigid object modeling, or not generative and thus unable to synthesize high-quality virtual humans and animate them. In this work, we propose AvatarGen, the first method that enables not only non-rigid human generation with diverse appearance but also full control over poses and viewpoints, while only requiring 2D images for training. Specifically, it extends the recent 3D GANs to clothed human generation by utilizing a coarse human body model as a proxy to warp the observation space into a standard avatar under a canonical space. To model non-rigid dynamics, it introduces a deformation network to learn pose-dependent deformations in the canonical space. To improve geometry quality of the generated human avatars, it leverages signed distance field as geometric representation, which allows more direct regularization from the body model on the geometry learning. Benefiting from these designs, our method can generate animatable human avatars with high-quality appearance and geometry modeling, significantly outperforming previous 3D GANs. Furthermore, it is competent for many applications, e.g., single-view reconstruction, reanimation, and text-guided synthesis. Code and pre-trained model will be available.
abstract_zh: 无监督地生成具有各种外观和可动画姿势的着装虚拟人体对于创建 3D 人体化身和其他 AR/VR 应用非常重要。现有的方法要么仅限于刚性对象建模，要么不具有生成性，因此无法合成高质量的虚拟人并为其制作动画。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AvatarGen，这是第一种不仅能够生成具有多种外观的非刚性人体，而且能够完全控制姿势和视点，同时只需要 2D 图像进行训练的方法。具体来说，它将最近的 3D GAN 扩展到穿着人类的一代，利用粗略的人体模型作为代理，将观察空间扭曲为规范空间下的标准化身。为了对非刚性动力学进行建模，它引入了变形网络来学习规范空间中与姿态相关的变形。为了提高生成的人体头像的几何质量，它利用有符号距离场作为几何表示，这允许在几何学习上从身体模型进行更直接的正则化。受益于这些设计，我们的方法可以生成具有高质量外观和几何建模的可动画人体化身，其性能显着优于以前的 3D GAN。此外，它还能够胜任许多应用，例如单视图重建、复活和文本引导合成。代码和预训练模型将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AvatarGen，一种基于2D图像训练的3D生成模型，可生成具有多样外观和可动画姿势的高质量虚拟人类化身。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或局限于刚性物体建模，或无法生成高质量可动画的虚拟人类，难以满足AR/VR等应用需求。
AI.method: 扩展3D GANs，利用粗粒度人体模型将观测空间映射到规范空间，并引入变形网络学习姿态依赖形变，采用符号距离场提升几何质量。
AI.result: 生成的化身在外观和几何建模上显著优于现有3D GANs，支持单视角重建、重动画和文本引导合成等应用。
AI.conclusion: AvatarGen实现了高质量可动画虚拟人类生成，为AR/VR等场景提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: A. M. Mora,A. I. Esparcia-Alcázar
title: Evo* 2022 -- Late-Breaking Abstracts Volume
title_zh: Evo* 2022——最新摘要卷
comment: LBAs accepted in Evo* 2022. Part of the Conference Proceedings
comments: LBAs accepted in Evo* 2022. Part of the Conference Proceedings
abstract: Volume with the Late-Breaking Abstracts submitted to the Evo* 2022 Conference, held in Madrid (Spain), from 20 to 22 of April. These papers present ongoing research and preliminary results investigating on the application of different approaches of Bioinspired Methods (mainly Evolutionary Computation) to different problems, most of them real world ones.
summary: Volume with the Late-Breaking Abstracts submitted to the Evo* 2022 Conference, held in Madrid (Spain), from 20 to 22 of April. These papers present ongoing research and preliminary results investigating on the application of different approaches of Bioinspired Methods (mainly Evolutionary Computation) to different problems, most of them real world ones.
abstract_zh: 向 4 月 20 日至 22 日在马德里（西班牙）举行的 Evo* 2022 会议提交的包含最新摘要的卷。这些论文介绍了生物启发方法（主要是进化计算）的不同方法应用于不同问题（其中大多数是现实世界的问题）的正在进行的研究和初步结果。

AI.tldr: 本文汇编了Evo* 2022会议接收的晚期摘要，展示生物启发方法（尤其是进化计算）在现实问题中的应用研究进展。
AI.motivation: 为学术界提供最新生物启发方法研究动态，促进该领域在实际问题中的应用探索。
AI.method: 收集并整理提交至Evo* 2022会议的未完成研究摘要，涵盖多种生物启发算法的初步实验结果。
AI.result: 呈现了多个生物启发方法在现实场景中的应用案例及阶段性研究成果。
AI.conclusion: 证明了进化计算等生物启发方法在复杂现实问题中的潜力，为后续研究提供了方向参考。

authors_text: Ronghao Dang,Liuyi Wang,Zongtao He,Shuai Su,Chengju Liu,Qijun Chen
title: Search for or Navigate to? Dual Adaptive Thinking for Object Navigation
title_zh: 搜索或导航至？对象导航的双重自适应思维
abstract: "Search for" or "Navigate to"? When finding an object, the two choices always come up in our subconscious mind. Before seeing the target, we search for the target based on experience. After seeing the target, we remember the target location and navigate to. However, recently methods in object navigation field almost only consider using object association to enhance "search for" phase while neglect the importance of "navigate to" phase. Therefore, this paper proposes the dual adaptive thinking (DAT) method to flexibly adjust the different thinking strategies at different navigation stages. Dual thinking includes search thinking with the object association ability and navigation thinking with the target location ability. To make the navigation thinking more effective, we design the target-oriented memory graph (TOMG) to store historical target information and the target-aware multi-scale aggregator (TAMSA) to encode the relative target position. We assess our methods on the AI2-Thor dataset. Compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) method, our method reports 10.8%, 21.5% and 15.7% increase in success rate (SR), success weighted by path length (SPL) and success weighted by navigation efficiency (SNE), respectively.
summary: "Search for" or "Navigate to"? When finding an object, the two choices always come up in our subconscious mind. Before seeing the target, we search for the target based on experience. After seeing the target, we remember the target location and navigate to. However, recently methods in object navigation field almost only consider using object association to enhance "search for" phase while neglect the importance of "navigate to" phase. Therefore, this paper proposes the dual adaptive thinking (DAT) method to flexibly adjust the different thinking strategies at different navigation stages. Dual thinking includes search thinking with the object association ability and navigation thinking with the target location ability. To make the navigation thinking more effective, we design the target-oriented memory graph (TOMG) to store historical target information and the target-aware multi-scale aggregator (TAMSA) to encode the relative target position. We assess our methods on the AI2-Thor dataset. Compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) method, our method reports 10.8%, 21.5% and 15.7% increase in success rate (SR), success weighted by path length (SPL) and success weighted by navigation efficiency (SNE), respectively.
abstract_zh: “搜索”还是“导航至”？当寻找一个物体时，这两个选择总是会出现在我们的潜意识中。在看到目标之前，我们会根据经验来寻找目标。看到目标后，我们会记住目标位置并导航到。然而，目前对象导航领域的方法几乎只考虑使用对象关联来增强“搜索”阶段，而忽略了“导航到”阶段的重要性。因此，本文提出双自适应思维（DAT）方法，灵活调整不同导航阶段的不同思维策略。双元思维包括具有物体关联能力的搜索思维和具有目标定位能力的导航思维。为了使导航思维更加有效，我们设计了面向目标的记忆图（TOMG）来存储历史目标信息，并设计了目标感知多尺度聚合器（TAMSA）来编码相对目标位置。我们在 AI2-Thor 数据集上评估我们的方法。与最先进的 (SOTA) 方法相比，我们的方法报告成功率 (SR)、按路径长度加权的成功 (SPL) 和按导航效率加权的成功 (SNE) 分别提高了 10.8%、21.5% 和 15.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出双适应思维（DAT）方法，在物体导航任务中结合搜索与导航两种策略，提升导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度关注物体关联增强的搜索阶段，忽视目标位置记忆的导航阶段，导致导航效率不足。
AI.method: 设计DAT框架，包含搜索思维（物体关联）与导航思维（目标位置记忆），并引入目标导向记忆图（TOMG）和目标感知多尺度聚合器（TAMSA）模块。
AI.result: 在AI2-Thor数据集上，成功率达提升10.8%，路径长度加权成功率提升21.5%，导航效率加权成功率提升15.7%。
AI.conclusion: 双适应思维通过动态平衡搜索与导航策略，显著提升物体导航效果，验证了分阶段策略优化的有效性。
