authors_text: Andreas Kirsch,Yarin Gal
title: Unifying Approaches in Active Learning and Active Sampling via Fisher Information and Information-Theoretic Quantities
title_zh: 通过费希尔信息和信息理论量统一主动学习和主动采样的方法
abstract: Recently proposed methods in data subset selection, that is active learning and active sampling, use Fisher information, Hessians, similarity matrices based on gradients, and gradient lengths to estimate how informative data is for a model's training. Are these different approaches connected, and if so, how? We revisit the fundamentals of Bayesian optimal experiment design and show that these recently proposed methods can be understood as approximations to information-theoretic quantities: among them, the mutual information between predictions and model parameters, known as expected information gain or BALD in machine learning, and the mutual information between predictions of acquisition candidates and test samples, known as expected predictive information gain. We develop a comprehensive set of approximations using Fisher information and observed information and derive a unified framework that connects seemingly disparate literature. Although Bayesian methods are often seen as separate from non-Bayesian ones, the sometimes fuzzy notion of "informativeness" expressed in various non-Bayesian objectives leads to the same couple of information quantities, which were, in principle, already known by Lindley (1956) and MacKay (1992).
summary: Recently proposed methods in data subset selection, that is active learning and active sampling, use Fisher information, Hessians, similarity matrices based on gradients, and gradient lengths to estimate how informative data is for a model's training. Are these different approaches connected, and if so, how? We revisit the fundamentals of Bayesian optimal experiment design and show that these recently proposed methods can be understood as approximations to information-theoretic quantities: among them, the mutual information between predictions and model parameters, known as expected information gain or BALD in machine learning, and the mutual information between predictions of acquisition candidates and test samples, known as expected predictive information gain. We develop a comprehensive set of approximations using Fisher information and observed information and derive a unified framework that connects seemingly disparate literature. Although Bayesian methods are often seen as separate from non-Bayesian ones, the sometimes fuzzy notion of "informativeness" expressed in various non-Bayesian objectives leads to the same couple of information quantities, which were, in principle, already known by Lindley (1956) and MacKay (1992).
abstract_zh: 最近提出的数据子集选择方法，即主动学习和主动采样，使用 Fisher 信息、Hessians、基于梯度的相似矩阵和梯度长度来估计数据对于模型训练的信息量。这些不同的方法是否有联系？如果有，是如何联系的？我们重新审视贝叶斯最优实验设计的基础知识，并表明这些最近提出的方法可以理解为信息论量的近似：其中，预测和模型参数之间的互信息，称为机器学习中的预期信息增益或 BALD，以及采集候选和测试样本的预测之间的互信息，称为预期预测信息增益。我们使用费舍尔信息和观察到的信息开发了一套全面的近似值，并得出了一个连接看似不同文献的统一框架。尽管贝叶斯方法通常被视为与非贝叶斯方法分开，但在各种非贝叶斯目标中表达的有时模糊的“信息量”概念导致了相同的信息量，原则上，Lindley（1956）和MacKay（1992）已经知道了这些信息量。

AI.tldr: 本文通过Fisher信息和信息论量统一主动学习与主动采样中的不同方法。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习与主动采样方法虽有效，但缺乏统一理论框架，难以解释其内在联系。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯最优实验设计理论，利用Fisher信息和观察信息近似信息论中的互信息量，建立统一框架。
AI.result: 发现非贝叶斯方法中的'信息量'概念本质与贝叶斯信息论量（如BALD）一致，并推导出统一数学框架。
AI.conclusion: 不同方法均基于相同信息论原理，统一框架可促进算法理解和优化，未来研究应关注理论与实践的结合。

ai_content.result: 发现非贝叶斯方法中的'信息量'概念本质与贝叶斯信息论量（如BALD）一致，并推导出统一数学框架。
ai_content.conclusion: 不同方法均基于相同信息论原理，统一框架可促进算法理解和优化，未来研究应关注理论与实践的结合。

Although Bayesian methods are often seen as separate from non-Bayesian ones, the sometimes fuzzy notion of "informativeness" expressed in various non-Bayesian objectives leads to the same couple of information quantities, which were, in principle, already known by Lindley (1956) and MacKay (1992). 最近提出的数据子集选择方法，即主动学习和主动采样，使用 Fisher 信息、Hessians、基于梯度的相似矩阵和梯度长度来估计数据对于模型训练的信息量。这些不同的方法是否有联系？如果有，是如何联系的？我们重新审视贝叶斯最优实验设计的基础知识，并表明这些最近提出的方法可以理解为信息论量的近似：其中，预测和模型参数之间的互信息，称为机器学习中的预期信息增益或 BALD，以及采集候选和测试样本的预测之间的互信息，称为预期预测信息增益。我们使用费舍尔信息和观察到的信息开发了一套全面的近似值，并得出了一个连接看似不同文献的统一框架。尽管贝叶斯方法通常被视为与非贝叶斯方法分开，但在各种非贝叶斯目标中表达的有时模糊的“信息量”概念导致了相同的信息量，原则上，Lindley（1956）和MacKay（1992）已经知道了这些信息量。 本文通过Fisher信息和信息论量统一主动学习与主动采样中的不同方法。 Andreas Kirsch,Yarin Gal cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.IT

authors_text: Shuvendu Roy,Ali Etemad
title: Analysis of Semi-Supervised Methods for Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 面部表情识别的半监督方法分析
comment: Accepted at IEEE 10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), 2022
comments: Accepted at IEEE 10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), 2022
abstract: Training deep neural networks for image recognition often requires large-scale human annotated data. To reduce the reliance of deep neural solutions on labeled data, state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods have been proposed in the literature. Nonetheless, the use of such semi-supervised methods has been quite rare in the field of facial expression recognition (FER). In this paper, we present a comprehensive study on recently proposed state-of-the-art semi-supervised learning methods in the context of FER. We conduct comparative study on eight semi-supervised learning methods, namely Pi-Model, Pseudo-label, Mean-Teacher, VAT, MixMatch, ReMixMatch, UDA, and FixMatch, on three FER datasets (FER13, RAF-DB, and AffectNet), when various amounts of labeled samples are used. We also compare the performance of these methods against fully-supervised training. Our study shows that when training existing semi-supervised methods on as little as 250 labeled samples per class can yield comparable performances to that of fully-supervised methods trained on the full labeled datasets. To facilitate further research in this area, we make our code publicly available at: https://github.com/ShuvenduRoy/SSL_FER

We also compare the performance of these methods against fully-supervised training. To facilitate further research in this area, we make our code publicly available at: https://github.com/ShuvenduRoy/SSL_FER
abstract_zh: 训练用于图像识别的深度神经网络通常需要大规模的人类注释数据。为了减少深度神经解决方案对标记数据的依赖，文献中提出了最先进的半监督方法。尽管如此，这种半监督方法的使用在面部表情识别（FER）领域相当罕见。在本文中，我们对最近提出的 FER 背景下最先进的半监督学习方法进行了全面的研究。我们在三个 FER 数据集（FER13、RAF-DB 和 AffectNet）上，使用不同数量的标记样本，对 Pi-Model、Pseudo-label、Mean-Teacher、VAT、MixMatch、ReMixMatch、UDA 和 FixMatch 八种半监督学习方法进行了比较研究。我们还将这些方法与完全监督训练的性能进行了比较。我们的研究表明，当在每类仅 250 个标记样本上训练现有的半监督方法时，可以产生与在完整标记数据集上训练的完全监督方法相当的性能。为了促进该领域的进一步研究，我们将代码公开在：https://github.com/ShuvenduRoy/SSL_FER

AI.tldr: 本文研究了半监督学习方法在面部表情识别（FER）中的应用，比较了八种方法在不同标注数据量下的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习依赖大量标注数据，而FER领域标注数据获取成本高，需探索减少对标注数据依赖的半监督方法。
AI.method: 在三个FER数据集（FER13, RAF-DB, AffectNet）上，对比八种半监督方法（如FixMatch、MixMatch等）与全监督方法的性能，使用不同数量的标注样本进行训练。
AI.result: 当每类仅使用250个标注样本时，半监督方法的性能可与全监督方法在完整标注数据集上的性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习在FER中具有潜力，少量标注数据即可达到较高性能，为后续研究提供了可行方向和公开代码支持。

authors_text: Huayu Li,Gregory Ditzler,Janet Roveda,Ao Li
title: DeScoD-ECG: Deep Score-Based Diffusion Model for ECG Baseline Wander and Noise Removal
title_zh: DeScoD-ECG：用于心电图基线漂移和噪声消除的基于深度评分的扩散模型
abstract: Objective: Electrocardiogram (ECG) signals commonly suffer noise interference, such as baseline wander. High-quality and high-fidelity reconstruction of the ECG signals is of great significance to diagnosing cardiovascular diseases. Therefore, this paper proposes a novel ECG baseline wander and noise removal technology. Methods: We extended the diffusion model in a conditional manner that was specific to the ECG signals, namely the Deep Score-Based Diffusion model for Electrocardiogram baseline wander and noise removal (DeScoD-ECG). Moreover, we deployed a multi-shots averaging strategy that improved signal reconstructions. We conducted the experiments on the QT Database and the MIT-BIH Noise Stress Test Database to verify the feasibility of the proposed method. Baseline methods are adopted for comparison, including traditional digital filter-based and deep learning-based methods. Results: The quantities evaluation results show that the proposed method obtained outstanding performance on four distance-based similarity metrics with at least 20\% overall improvement compared with the best baseline method. Conclusion: This paper demonstrates the state-of-the-art performance of the DeScoD-ECG for ECG baseline wander and noise removal, which has better approximations of the true data distribution and higher stability under extreme noise corruptions. Significance: This study is one of the first to extend the conditional diffusion-based generative model for ECG noise removal, and the DeScoD-ECG has the potential to be widely used in biomedical applications.

High-quality and high-fidelity reconstruction of the ECG signals is of great significance to diagnosing cardiovascular diseases. Therefore, this paper proposes a novel ECG baseline wander and noise removal technology. Methods: We extended the diffusion model in a conditional manner that was specific to the ECG signals, namely the Deep Score-Based Diffusion model for Electrocardiogram baseline wander and noise removal (DeScoD-ECG). We conducted the experiments on the QT Database and the MIT-BIH Noise Stress Test Database to verify the feasibility of the proposed method. Significance: This study is one of the first to extend the conditional diffusion-based generative model for ECG noise removal, and the DeScoD-ECG has the potential to be widely used in biomedical applications.
abstract_zh: 目的：心电图 (ECG) 信号通常会受到噪声干扰，例如基线漂移。心电信号的高质量、高保真重建对于心血管疾病的诊断具有重要意义。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的心电图基线漂移和噪声消除技术。方法：我们以特定于 ECG 信号的条件方式扩展扩散模型，即用于心电图基线漂移和噪声消除的基于深度评分的扩散模型 (DeScoD-ECG)。此外，我们部署了多镜头平均策略来改进信号重建。我们在QT数据库和MIT-BIH噪声压力测试数据库上进行了实验，验证了该方法的可行性。采用基线方法进行比较，包括传统的基于数字滤波器的方法和基于深度学习的方法。结果：数量评估结果表明，所提出的方法在四个基于距离的相似性度量上获得了出色的性能，与最佳基线方法相比，整体提高了至少 20%。结论：本文展示了 DeScoD-ECG 在心电图基线漂移和噪声消除方面的最先进性能，它能够更好地近似真实数据分布，并且在极端噪声损坏下具有更高的稳定性。意义：这项研究是第一个扩展基于条件扩散的 ECG 噪声消除生成模型的研究之一，DeScoD-ECG 具有广泛应用于生物医学应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度分数扩散模型的ECG基线漂移和噪声去除方法DeScoD-ECG。
AI.motivation: ECG信号易受噪声干扰，高质量重建对心血管疾病诊断至关重要，传统方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 扩展条件扩散模型为ECG专用的DeScoD-ECG，并采用多次平均策略提升信号重建效果。
AI.result: 在四个距离相似性指标上较最佳基线方法提升至少20%，极端噪声下稳定性更优。
AI.conclusion: DeScoD-ECG在ECG噪声去除中达到最先进水平，可广泛应用于生物医学领域。

authors_text: Ali Borji
title: Is current research on adversarial robustness addressing the right problem?
title_zh: 当前关于对抗稳健性的研究是否解决了正确的问题？
abstract: Short answer: Yes, Long answer: No! Indeed, research on adversarial robustness has led to invaluable insights helping us understand and explore different aspects of the problem. Many attacks and defenses have been proposed over the last couple of years. The problem, however, remains largely unsolved and poorly understood. Here, I argue that the current formulation of the problem serves short term goals, and needs to be revised for us to achieve bigger gains. Specifically, the bound on perturbation has created a somewhat contrived setting and needs to be relaxed. This has misled us to focus on model classes that are not expressive enough to begin with. Instead, inspired by human vision and the fact that we rely more on robust features such as shape, vertices, and foreground objects than non-robust features such as texture, efforts should be steered towards looking for significantly different classes of models. Maybe instead of narrowing down on imperceptible adversarial perturbations, we should attack a more general problem which is finding architectures that are simultaneously robust to perceptible perturbations, geometric transformations (e.g. rotation, scaling), image distortions (lighting, blur), and more (e.g. occlusion, shadow). Only then we may be able to solve the problem of adversarial vulnerability.
summary: Short answer: Yes, Long answer: No! Indeed, research on adversarial robustness has led to invaluable insights helping us understand and explore different aspects of the problem. Many attacks and defenses have been proposed over the last couple of years. The problem, however, remains largely unsolved and poorly understood. Here, I argue that the current formulation of the problem serves short term goals, and needs to be revised for us to achieve bigger gains. Specifically, the bound on perturbation has created a somewhat contrived setting and needs to be relaxed. This has misled us to focus on model classes that are not expressive enough to begin with. Instead, inspired by human vision and the fact that we rely more on robust features such as shape, vertices, and foreground objects than non-robust features such as texture, efforts should be steered towards looking for significantly different classes of models. Maybe instead of narrowing down on imperceptible adversarial perturbations, we should attack a more general problem which is finding architectures that are simultaneously robust to perceptible perturbations, geometric transformations (e.g. rotation, scaling), image distortions (lighting, blur), and more (e.g. occlusion, shadow). Only then we may be able to solve the problem of adversarial vulnerability.
abstract_zh: 简短回答：是，详细回答：不！事实上，对抗稳健性的研究带来了宝贵的见解，帮助我们理解和探索问题的不同方面。在过去的几年里，人们提出了许多攻击和防御措施。然而，这个问题在很大程度上仍未得到解决，而且人们对此知之甚少。在此，我认为，目前的问题表述是为了短期目标，需要进行修改，以取得更大的收获。具体来说，扰动的界限创造了一个有点做作的环境，需要放松。这误导了我们去关注那些一开始表达力不够的模型类。相反，受人类视觉的启发，以及我们更多地依赖形状、顶点和前景对象等鲁棒特征，而不是纹理等非鲁棒特征，我们应该努力寻找明显不同类别的模型。也许我们不应该缩小难以察觉的对抗性扰动的范围，而应该解决一个更普遍的问题，即寻找同时对可察觉的扰动、几何变换（例如旋转、缩放）、图像扭曲（照明、模糊）等（例如遮挡、阴影）具有鲁棒性的架构。只有这样我们才可能解决对抗性脆弱性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文质疑当前对抗鲁棒性研究是否针对正确的问题，并提出需要重新定义问题以实现更大进展。
AI.motivation: 当前对抗鲁棒性研究过于关注小扰动的对抗样本，导致模型表达能力不足，未能解决实际场景中的鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 通过分析现有研究的局限性，提出应放宽扰动范围，转向研究能同时应对可感知扰动、几何变换和图像失真的模型架构。
AI.result: 论证现有问题设定存在缺陷，需转向更广泛的鲁棒性研究方向，而非局限于不可感知的微小扰动。
AI.conclusion: 解决对抗脆弱性需重新定义问题，关注人类视觉依赖的鲁棒特征，并设计能处理多类现实扰动的模型架构。

search_text: Is current research on adversarial robustness addressing the right problem? 当前关于对抗稳健性的研究是否解决了正确的问题？ Short answer: Yes, Long answer: No! Indeed, research on adversarial robustness has led to invaluable insights helping us understand and explore different aspects of the problem. Many attacks and defenses have been proposed over the last couple of years. The problem, however, remains largely unsolved and poorly understood. Here, I argue that the current formulation of the problem serves short term goals, and needs to be revised for us to achieve bigger gains. Specifically, the bound on perturbation has created a somewhat contrived setting and needs to be relaxed. This has misled us to focus on model classes that are not expressive enough to begin with. Instead, inspired by human vision and the fact that we rely more on robust features such as shape, vertices, and foreground objects than non-robust features such as texture, efforts should be steered towards looking for significantly different classes of models. Maybe instead of narrowing down on imperceptible adversarial perturbations, we should attack a more general problem which is finding architectures that are simultaneously robust to perceptible perturbations, geometric transformations (e.g. rotation, scaling), image distortions (lighting, blur), and more (e.g. occlusion, shadow). Only then we may be able to solve the problem of adversarial vulnerability. 简短回答：是，详细回答：不！事实上，对抗稳健性的研究带来了宝贵的见解，帮助我们理解和探索问题的不同方面。在过去的几年里，人们提出了许多攻击和防御措施。然而，这个问题在很大程度上仍未得到解决，而且人们对此知之甚少。在此，我认为，目前的问题表述是为了短期目标，需要进行修改，以取得更大的收获。具体来说，扰动的界限创造了一个有点做作的环境，需要放松。这误导了我们去关注那些一开始表达力不够的模型类。相反，受人类视觉的启发，以及我们更多地依赖形状、顶点和前景对象等鲁棒特征，而不是纹理等非鲁棒特征，我们应该努力寻找明显不同类别的模型。也许我们不应该缩小难以察觉的对抗性扰动的范围，而应该解决一个更普遍的问题，即寻找同时对可察觉的扰动、几何变换（例如旋转、缩放）、图像扭曲（照明、模糊）等（例如遮挡、阴影）具有鲁棒性的架构。只有这样我们才可能解决对抗性脆弱性问题。 本文质疑当前对抗鲁棒性研究是否针对正确的问题，并提出需要重新定义问题以实现更大进展。 Ali Borji cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Diogo Vaz,David R. Matos,Miguel L. Pardal,Miguel Correia
title: Learning to generate Reliable Broadcast Algorithms
title_zh: 学习生成可靠的广播算法
abstract: Modern distributed systems are supported by fault-tolerant algorithms, like Reliable Broadcast and Consensus, that assure the correct operation of the system even when some of the nodes of the system fail. However, the development of distributed algorithms is a manual and complex process, resulting in scientific papers that usually present a single algorithm or variations of existing ones. To automate the process of developing such algorithms, this work presents an intelligent agent that uses Reinforcement Learning to generate correct and efficient fault-tolerant distributed algorithms. We show that our approach is able to generate correct fault-tolerant Reliable Broadcast algorithms with the same performance of others available in the literature, in only 12,000 learning episodes.
summary: Modern distributed systems are supported by fault-tolerant algorithms, like Reliable Broadcast and Consensus, that assure the correct operation of the system even when some of the nodes of the system fail. However, the development of distributed algorithms is a manual and complex process, resulting in scientific papers that usually present a single algorithm or variations of existing ones. To automate the process of developing such algorithms, this work presents an intelligent agent that uses Reinforcement Learning to generate correct and efficient fault-tolerant distributed algorithms. We show that our approach is able to generate correct fault-tolerant Reliable Broadcast algorithms with the same performance of others available in the literature, in only 12,000 learning episodes.
abstract_zh: 现代分布式系统由可靠广播和共识等容错算法支持，即使系统的某些节点发生故障，也能确保系统的正确运行。然而，分布式算法的开发是一个手动且复杂的过程，导致科学论文通常呈现单一算法或现有算法的变体。为了自动化开发此类算法的过程，这项工作提出了一种智能代理，它使用强化学习来生成正确且高效的容错分布式算法。我们证明，我们的方法能够生成正确的容错可靠广播算法，其性能与文献中其他算法相同，只需 12,000 个学习片段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的智能代理，用于自动生成正确且高效的可靠广播算法。
AI.motivation: 传统分布式算法开发依赖人工，过程复杂且效率低，难以快速生成多样化算法变体。
AI.method: 设计强化学习框架训练智能代理，通过模拟环境学习生成满足容错要求的广播算法。
AI.result: 在12000次训练后，生成的算法达到与现有方案同等性能，且保证正确性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习可有效辅助设计分布式容错算法，为自动化算法开发提供新方向。

authors_text: Mahdi Saleh,Yige Wang,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam,Federico Tombari
title: CloudAttention: Efficient Multi-Scale Attention Scheme For 3D Point Cloud Learning
title_zh: CloudAttention：用于 3D 点云学习的高效多尺度注意力方案
abstract: Processing 3D data efficiently has always been a challenge. Spatial operations on large-scale point clouds, stored as sparse data, require extra cost. Attracted by the success of transformers, researchers are using multi-head attention for vision tasks. However, attention calculations in transformers come with quadratic complexity in the number of inputs and miss spatial intuition on sets like point clouds. We redesign set transformers in this work and incorporate them into a hierarchical framework for shape classification and part and scene segmentation. We propose our local attention unit, which captures features in a spatial neighborhood. We also compute efficient and dynamic global cross attentions by leveraging sampling and grouping at each iteration. Finally, to mitigate the non-heterogeneity of point clouds, we propose an efficient Multi-Scale Tokenization (MST), which extracts scale-invariant tokens for attention operations. The proposed hierarchical model achieves state-of-the-art shape classification in mean accuracy and yields results on par with the previous segmentation methods while requiring significantly fewer computations. Our proposed architecture predicts segmentation labels with around half the latency and parameter count of the previous most efficient method with comparable performance. The code is available at https://github.com/YigeWang-WHU/CloudAttention.
summary: Processing 3D data efficiently has always been a challenge. Spatial operations on large-scale point clouds, stored as sparse data, require extra cost. Attracted by the success of transformers, researchers are using multi-head attention for vision tasks. However, attention calculations in transformers come with quadratic complexity in the number of inputs and miss spatial intuition on sets like point clouds. We redesign set transformers in this work and incorporate them into a hierarchical framework for shape classification and part and scene segmentation. We propose our local attention unit, which captures features in a spatial neighborhood. We also compute efficient and dynamic global cross attentions by leveraging sampling and grouping at each iteration. Finally, to mitigate the non-heterogeneity of point clouds, we propose an efficient Multi-Scale Tokenization (MST), which extracts scale-invariant tokens for attention operations. The proposed hierarchical model achieves state-of-the-art shape classification in mean accuracy and yields results on par with the previous segmentation methods while requiring significantly fewer computations. Our proposed architecture predicts segmentation labels with around half the latency and parameter count of the previous most efficient method with comparable performance. The code is available at https://github.com/YigeWang-WHU/CloudAttention.
abstract_zh: 高效处理 3D 数据一直是一个挑战。大规模点云上的空间操作（存储为稀疏数据）需要额外的成本。受到 Transformer 成功的吸引，研究人员正在将多头注意力用于视觉任务。然而，Transformer 中的注意力计算在输入数量上具有二次复杂度，并且错过了点云等集合上的空间直觉。我们在这项工作中重新设计了集合转换器，并将它们合并到用于形状分类以及零件和场景分割的分层框架中。我们提出了本地注意力单元，它捕获空间邻域中的特征。我们还通过在每次迭代时利用采样和分组来计算高效且动态的全局交叉注意力。最后，为了减轻点云的非异构性，我们提出了一种有效的多尺度标记化（MST），它提取尺度不变标记用于注意操作。所提出的分层模型以平均精度实现了最先进的形状分类，并产生与之前的分割方法相当的结果，同时需要的计算量显着减少。我们提出的架构预测分割标签的延迟和参数数量大约是之前最有效方法的一半，且性能相当。代码可在 https://github.com/YigeWang-WHU/CloudAttention 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的多尺度注意力机制CloudAttention，用于3D点云学习，解决点云处理中的计算复杂度和空间感知问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在点云处理中存在二次复杂度计算和缺乏空间直觉的问题，需设计更高效的注意力机制以提升点云分类与分割性能。
AI.method: 设计局部注意力单元捕获空间邻域特征，通过采样分组计算高效动态全局注意力，并提出多尺度分词（MST）提取尺度不变token，构建分层框架。
AI.result: 在形状分类任务中达到最先进精度，分割效果与现有方法相当但计算量减少50%，参数量和延迟显著降低。
AI.conclusion: CloudAttention通过优化注意力机制和分层结构，在保持性能的同时显著提升点云学习的效率，为3D任务提供新思路。

The code is available at https://github.com/YigeWang-WHU/CloudAttention. 高效处理 3D 数据一直是一个挑战。大规模点云上的空间操作（存储为稀疏数据）需要额外的成本。受到 Transformer 成功的吸引，研究人员正在将多头注意力用于视觉任务。然而，Transformer 中的注意力计算在输入数量上具有二次复杂度，并且错过了点云等集合上的空间直觉。我们在这项工作中重新设计了集合转换器，并将它们合并到用于形状分类以及零件和场景分割的分层框架中。我们提出了本地注意力单元，它捕获空间邻域中的特征。我们还通过在每次迭代时利用采样和分组来计算高效且动态的全局交叉注意力。最后，为了减轻点云的非异构性，我们提出了一种有效的多尺度标记化（MST），它提取尺度不变标记用于注意操作。所提出的分层模型以平均精度实现了最先进的形状分类，并产生与之前的分割方法相当的结果，同时需要的计算量显着减少。我们提出的架构预测分割标签的延迟和参数数量大约是之前最有效方法的一半，且性能相当。代码可在 https://github.com/YigeWang-WHU/CloudAttention 获取。 本文提出一种高效的多尺度注意力机制CloudAttention，用于3D点云学习，解决点云处理中的计算复杂度和空间感知问题。 Mahdi Saleh,Yige Wang,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam,Federico Tombari cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Angan Mitra,Nguyen Kim Thang,Tuan-Anh Nguyen,Denis Trystram,Paul Youssef
title: Online Decentralized Frank-Wolfe: From theoretical bound to applications in smart-building
title_zh: 在线去中心化 Frank-Wolfe：从理论束缚到智能建筑中的应用
abstract: The design of decentralized learning algorithms is important in the fast-growing world in which data are distributed over participants with limited local computation resources and communication. In this direction, we propose an online algorithm minimizing non-convex loss functions aggregated from individual data/models distributed over a network. We provide the theoretical performance guarantee of our algorithm and demonstrate its utility on a real life smart building.
summary: The design of decentralized learning algorithms is important in the fast-growing world in which data are distributed over participants with limited local computation resources and communication. In this direction, we propose an online algorithm minimizing non-convex loss functions aggregated from individual data/models distributed over a network. We provide the theoretical performance guarantee of our algorithm and demonstrate its utility on a real life smart building.
abstract_zh: 去中心化学习算法的设计在快速发展的世界中非常重要，在这个世界中，数据分布在本地计算资源和通信有限的参与者之间。在这个方向上，我们提出了一种在线算法，最小化从分布在网络上的各个数据/模型聚合的非凸损失函数。我们提供了算法的理论性能保证，并在现实生活中的智能建筑中展示了其实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线去中心化Frank-Wolfe算法，用于解决分布式网络中非凸损失函数的优化问题，并在智能建筑场景中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着数据分布式存储和计算资源受限的场景增多，传统集中式学习算法存在通信开销大、隐私风险高等问题，亟需高效去中心化优化方法。
AI.method: 设计基于Frank-Wolfe的在线去中心化算法，通过局部模型更新与网络节点协同，在非凸损失函数优化中实现理论性能保证。
AI.result: 理论证明算法收敛性，并在智能建筑能耗管理实际案例中验证其优于传统方法的通信效率和优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法为分布式智能系统提供了兼顾理论保障与实际应用价值的优化框架，未来可拓展至更多边缘计算场景。

authors_text: Pappu Kumar Yadav,J. Alex Thomasson,Stephen W. Searcy,Robert G. Hardin,Ulisses Braga-Neto,Sorin C. Popescu,Daniel E. Martin,Roberto Rodriguez,Karem Meza,Juan Enciso,Jorge Solorzano Diaz,Tianyi Wang
title: Assessing The Performance of YOLOv5 Algorithm for Detecting Volunteer Cotton Plants in Corn Fields at Three Different Growth Stages
title_zh: 评估 YOLOv5 算法检测玉米田中三个不同生长阶段的自愿棉花植株的性能
abstract: The boll weevil (Anthonomus grandis L.) is a serious pest that primarily feeds on cotton plants. In places like Lower Rio Grande Valley of Texas, due to sub-tropical climatic conditions, cotton plants can grow year-round and therefore the left-over seeds from the previous season during harvest can continue to grow in the middle of rotation crops like corn (Zea mays L.) and sorghum (Sorghum bicolor L.). These feral or volunteer cotton (VC) plants when reach the pinhead squaring phase (5-6 leaf stage) can act as hosts for the boll weevil pest. The Texas Boll Weevil Eradication Program (TBWEP) employs people to locate and eliminate VC plants growing by the side of roads or fields with rotation crops but the ones growing in the middle of fields remain undetected. In this paper, we demonstrate the application of computer vision (CV) algorithm based on You Only Look Once version 5 (YOLOv5) for detecting VC plants growing in the middle of corn fields at three different growth stages (V3, V6, and VT) using unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) remote sensing imagery. All the four variants of YOLOv5 (s, m, l, and x) were used and their performances were compared based on classification accuracy, mean average precision (mAP), and F1-score. It was found that YOLOv5s could detect VC plants with a maximum classification accuracy of 98% and mAP of 96.3 % at the V6 stage of corn while YOLOv5s and YOLOv5m resulted in the lowest classification accuracy of 85% and YOLOv5m and YOLOv5l had the least mAP of 86.5% at the VT stage on images of size 416 x 416 pixels. The developed CV algorithm has the potential to effectively detect and locate VC plants growing in the middle of corn fields as well as expedite the management aspects of TBWEP.
summary: The boll weevil (Anthonomus grandis L.) is a serious pest that primarily feeds on cotton plants. In places like Lower Rio Grande Valley of Texas, due to sub-tropical climatic conditions, cotton plants can grow year-round and therefore the left-over seeds from the previous season during harvest can continue to grow in the middle of rotation crops like corn (Zea mays L.) and sorghum (Sorghum bicolor L.). These feral or volunteer cotton (VC) plants when reach the pinhead squaring phase (5-6 leaf stage) can act as hosts for the boll weevil pest. The Texas Boll Weevil Eradication Program (TBWEP) employs people to locate and eliminate VC plants growing by the side of roads or fields with rotation crops but the ones growing in the middle of fields remain undetected. In this paper, we demonstrate the application of computer vision (CV) algorithm based on You Only Look Once version 5 (YOLOv5) for detecting VC plants growing in the middle of corn fields at three different growth stages (V3, V6, and VT) using unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) remote sensing imagery. All the four variants of YOLOv5 (s, m, l, and x) were used and their performances were compared based on classification accuracy, mean average precision (mAP), and F1-score. It was found that YOLOv5s could detect VC plants with a maximum classification accuracy of 98% and mAP of 96.3 % at the V6 stage of corn while YOLOv5s and YOLOv5m resulted in the lowest classification accuracy of 85% and YOLOv5m and YOLOv5l had the least mAP of 86.5% at the VT stage on images of size 416 x 416 pixels. The developed CV algorithm has the potential to effectively detect and locate VC plants growing in the middle of corn fields as well as expedite the management aspects of TBWEP.
abstract_zh: 棉铃象甲 (Anthonomus grandis L.) 是一种主要以棉花植物为食的严重害虫。在德克萨斯州下里奥格兰德河谷等地，由于亚热带气候条件，棉花植株可以全年生长，因此上一季收获期间剩下的种子可以在玉米（Zea mays L.）和高粱（Sorghum bicolor L.）等轮作作物的中间继续生长。这些野生或自生棉花 (VC) 植物在达到针头现蕾阶段（5-6 片叶阶段）时可充当棉铃象鼻虫害虫的宿主。德克萨斯州棉铃象甲根除计划 (TBWEP) 雇用人员寻找并消灭生长在路边或轮作作物田地里的 VC 植物，但生长在田地中间的 VC 植物仍未被发现。在本文中，我们演示了基于 You Only Look Once 版本 5 (YOLOv5) 的计算机视觉 (CV) 算法的应用，使用无人机系统 (UAS) 遥感图像检测在三个不同生长阶段（V3、V6 和 VT）的玉米田中部生长的 VC 植物。使用了 YOLOv5 的所有四个变体（s、m、l 和 x），并根据分类精度、平均精度 (mAP) 和 F1 分数比较了它们的性能。结果发现，在玉米 V6 阶段，YOLOv5s 可以检测 VC 植物，最大分类精度为 98%，mAP 为 96.3%，而 YOLOv5s 和 YOLOv5m 的分类精度最低，为 85%，YOLOv5m 和 YOLOv5l 在 VT 阶段对尺寸为 416 x 416 像素的图像的最小 mAP 为 86.5%。开发的 CV 算法有可能有效检测和定位玉米田中部生长的 VC 植物，并加快 TBWEP 的管理速度。

AI.tldr: 评估YOLOv5算法在玉米田不同生长阶段检测志愿棉株的性能。
AI.motivation: 志愿棉株会成为棉铃虫宿主，现有方法难以检测玉米田中生长的志愿棉株，需开发高效检测技术以辅助灭绝计划。
AI.method: 使用YOLOv5的四种变体（s、m、l、x），基于无人机遥感影像，在玉米V3、V6、VT三个生长阶段进行检测，比较分类准确率、mAP和F1分数。
AI.result: YOLOv5s在V6阶段达到最高分类准确率98%和mAP 96.3%，但VT阶段分类准确率降至85%，mAP为86.5%。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv5算法可有效检测玉米田志愿棉株，尤其在V6阶段表现最佳，有助于提升棉铃虫灭绝计划的管理效率。

ai_content.motivation: 志愿棉株会成为棉铃虫宿主，现有方法难以检测玉米田中生长的志愿棉株，需开发高效检测技术以辅助灭绝计划。

authors_text: Salar Arbabi,Davide Tavernini,Saber Fallah,Richard Bowden
title: Learning an Interpretable Model for Driver Behavior Prediction with Inductive Biases
title_zh: 学习具有归纳偏差的驾驶员行为预测的可解释模型
abstract: To plan safe maneuvers and act with foresight, autonomous vehicles must be capable of accurately predicting the uncertain future. In the context of autonomous driving, deep neural networks have been successfully applied to learning predictive models of human driving behavior from data. However, the predictions suffer from cascading errors, resulting in large inaccuracies over long time horizons. Furthermore, the learned models are black boxes, and thus it is often unclear how they arrive at their predictions. In contrast, rule-based models, which are informed by human experts, maintain long-term coherence in their predictions and are human-interpretable. However, such models often lack the sufficient expressiveness needed to capture complex real-world dynamics. In this work, we begin to close this gap by embedding the Intelligent Driver Model, a popular hand-crafted driver model, into deep neural networks. Our model's transparency can offer considerable advantages, e.g., in debugging the model and more easily interpreting its predictions. We evaluate our approach on a simulated merging scenario, showing that it yields a robust model that is end-to-end trainable and provides greater transparency at no cost to the model's predictive accuracy.
summary: To plan safe maneuvers and act with foresight, autonomous vehicles must be capable of accurately predicting the uncertain future. In the context of autonomous driving, deep neural networks have been successfully applied to learning predictive models of human driving behavior from data. However, the predictions suffer from cascading errors, resulting in large inaccuracies over long time horizons. Furthermore, the learned models are black boxes, and thus it is often unclear how they arrive at their predictions. In contrast, rule-based models, which are informed by human experts, maintain long-term coherence in their predictions and are human-interpretable. However, such models often lack the sufficient expressiveness needed to capture complex real-world dynamics. In this work, we begin to close this gap by embedding the Intelligent Driver Model, a popular hand-crafted driver model, into deep neural networks. Our model's transparency can offer considerable advantages, e.g., in debugging the model and more easily interpreting its predictions. We evaluate our approach on a simulated merging scenario, showing that it yields a robust model that is end-to-end trainable and provides greater transparency at no cost to the model's predictive accuracy.
abstract_zh: 为了规划安全的操作并有远见地采取行动，自动驾驶汽车必须能够准确预测不确定的未来。在自动驾驶的背景下，深度神经网络已成功应用于从数据中学习人类驾驶行为的预测模型。然而，这些预测会出现级联错误，导致长期来看存在很大的不准确性。此外，学习的模型是黑匣子，因此通常不清楚它们如何得出预测。相比之下，由人类专家提供信息的基于规则的模型可以保持预测的长期一致性，并且可以由人类解释。然而，此类模型通常缺乏捕捉复杂的现实世界动态所需的足够表达能力。在这项工作中，我们开始通过将智能驾驶员模型（一种流行的手工制作的驾驶员模型）嵌入深度神经网络来缩小这一差距。我们的模型的透明度可以提供相当大的优势，例如，在调试模型和更轻松地解释其预测方面。我们在模拟合并场景中评估了我们的方法，结果表明它产生了一个强大的模型，该模型可以端到端训练，并且可以在不影响模型预测准确性的情况下提供更大的透明度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合可解释性与深度学习的驾驶员行为预测模型，通过嵌入智能驾驶员模型（IDM）解决深度神经网络预测不准确和不可解释的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在长期预测中存在累积误差且不可解释，而基于规则的模型虽可解释但难以捕捉复杂动态。需平衡准确性与透明性。
AI.method: 将智能驾驶员模型（IDM）作为归纳偏置嵌入深度神经网络，结合手工规则与数据驱动学习，实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在模拟合并场景中验证模型鲁棒性，证明其预测精度与传统模型相当，同时提供可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合手工模型与深度学习，有效提升预测透明度与可靠性，为自动驾驶安全决策提供新思路。

authors_text: Kinyua Gikunda
title: Deep Active Learning with Budget Annotation
title_zh: 带有预算注释的深度主动学习
abstract: Digital data collected over the decades and data currently being produced with use of information technology is vastly the unlabeled data or data without description. The unlabeled data is relatively easy to acquire but expensive to label even with use of domain experts. Most of the recent works focus on use of active learning with uncertainty metrics measure to address this problem. Although most uncertainty selection strategies are very effective, they fail to take informativeness of the unlabeled instances into account and are prone to querying outliers. In order to address these challenges we propose an hybrid approach of computing both the uncertainty and informativeness of an instance, then automaticaly label the computed instances using budget annotator. To reduce the annotation cost, we employ the state-of-the-art pre-trained models in order to avoid querying information already contained in those models. Our extensive experiments on different sets of datasets demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach.
summary: Digital data collected over the decades and data currently being produced with use of information technology is vastly the unlabeled data or data without description. The unlabeled data is relatively easy to acquire but expensive to label even with use of domain experts. Most of the recent works focus on use of active learning with uncertainty metrics measure to address this problem. Although most uncertainty selection strategies are very effective, they fail to take informativeness of the unlabeled instances into account and are prone to querying outliers. In order to address these challenges we propose an hybrid approach of computing both the uncertainty and informativeness of an instance, then automaticaly label the computed instances using budget annotator. To reduce the annotation cost, we employ the state-of-the-art pre-trained models in order to avoid querying information already contained in those models. Our extensive experiments on different sets of datasets demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 几十年来收集的数字数据以及当前利用信息技术产生的数据很大程度上是无标签数据或没有描述的数据。未标记的数据相对容易获取，但即使使用领域专家，标记起来也很昂贵。最近的大多数工作都集中在使用主动学习和不确定性度量来解决这个问题。尽管大多数不确定性选择策略非常有效，但它们未能考虑未标记实例的信息量，并且容易查询异常值。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种计算实例的不确定性和信息性的混合方法，然后使用预算注释器自动标记计算的实例。为了降低注释成本，我们采用最先进的预训练模型，以避免查询这些模型中已包含的信息。我们对不同数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合不确定性与信息量的深度主动学习方法，通过预算注释机制降低数据标注成本。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法仅依赖不确定性度量，忽视样本信息量且易选中异常值，导致标注效率低下。
AI.method: 融合不确定性与信息量双指标筛选样本，利用预算注释器自动标注，并借助预训练模型过滤冗余查询。
AI.result: 在多数据集实验中验证了该方法在减少标注成本与提升模型性能方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提混合策略有效平衡了样本选择质量与标注成本，为高效主动学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Michael Xieyang Liu,Andrew Kuznetsov,Yongsung Kim,Joseph Chee Chang,Aniket Kittur,Brad A. Myers
title: Wigglite: Low-cost Information Collection and Triage
title_zh: Wigglite：低成本信息收集和分类
abstract: Consumers conducting comparison shopping, researchers making sense of competitive space, and developers looking for code snippets online all face the challenge of capturing the information they find for later use without interrupting their current flow. In addition, during many learning and exploration tasks, people need to externalize their mental context, such as estimating how urgent a topic is to follow up on, or rating a piece of evidence as a "pro" or "con," which helps scaffold subsequent deeper exploration. However, current approaches incur a high cost, often requiring users to select, copy, context switch, paste, and annotate information in a separate document without offering specific affordances that capture their mental context. In this work, we explore a new interaction technique called "wiggling," which can be used to fluidly collect, organize, and rate information during early sensemaking stages with a single gesture. Wiggling involves rapid back-and-forth movements of a pointer or up-and-down scrolling on a smartphone, which can indicate the information to be collected and its valence, using a single, light-weight gesture that does not interfere with other interactions that are already available. Through implementation and user evaluation, we found that wiggling helped participants accurately collect information and encode their mental context with a 58% reduction in operational cost while being 24% faster compared to a common baseline.
summary: Consumers conducting comparison shopping, researchers making sense of competitive space, and developers looking for code snippets online all face the challenge of capturing the information they find for later use without interrupting their current flow. In addition, during many learning and exploration tasks, people need to externalize their mental context, such as estimating how urgent a topic is to follow up on, or rating a piece of evidence as a "pro" or "con," which helps scaffold subsequent deeper exploration. However, current approaches incur a high cost, often requiring users to select, copy, context switch, paste, and annotate information in a separate document without offering specific affordances that capture their mental context. In this work, we explore a new interaction technique called "wiggling," which can be used to fluidly collect, organize, and rate information during early sensemaking stages with a single gesture. Wiggling involves rapid back-and-forth movements of a pointer or up-and-down scrolling on a smartphone, which can indicate the information to be collected and its valence, using a single, light-weight gesture that does not interfere with other interactions that are already available. Through implementation and user evaluation, we found that wiggling helped participants accurately collect information and encode their mental context with a 58% reduction in operational cost while being 24% faster compared to a common baseline.
abstract_zh: 进行比较购物的消费者、了解竞争空间的研究人员以及在线寻找代码片段的开发人员都面临着捕获他们找到的信息以供以后使用而不中断当前流程的挑战。此外，在许多学习和探索任务中，人们需要外化他们的心理背景，例如估计跟进某个主题的紧迫性，或者将一个证据评为“赞成”或“反对”，这有助于支撑后续更深入的探索。然而，当前的方法成本很高，通常要求用户在单独的文档中选择、复制、上下文切换、粘贴和注释信息，而不提供捕获他们的心理上下文的特定功能可供性。在这项工作中，我们探索了一种称为“摆动”的新交互技术，该技术可用于在早期意义构建阶段通过单个手势流畅地收集、组织和评价信息。摆动涉及指针的快速来回移动或智能手机上的上下滚动，这可以使用单一的轻量手势指示要收集的信息及其效价，而不会干扰现有的其他交互。通过实施和用户评估，我们发现摆动帮助参与者准确地收集信息并编码他们的心理背景，运营成本降低了 58%，同时与通用基线相比速度提高了 24%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Wigglite'的低成本信息收集与分类方法，通过单一手势实现信息的流畅收集与评级。
AI.motivation: 现有信息收集方法需要用户进行多次操作（如复制、切换窗口、标注），导致效率低下且无法有效捕捉用户心理状态。
AI.method: 设计'wiggling'交互技术，通过快速左右移动指针或上下滚动手机实现信息收集与评级，无需切换上下文。
AI.result: 用户测试显示，该方法使操作成本降低58%，速度比基准方法快24%，且能准确收集信息并编码心理状态。
AI.conclusion: Wigglite通过轻量级手势有效解决了信息收集的高成本问题，为早期信息探索阶段提供了高效交互方案。

motivation: 现有信息收集方法需要用户进行多次操作（如复制、切换窗口、标注），导致效率低下且无法有效捕捉用户心理状态。

search_text: Wigglite: Low-cost Information Collection and Triage Wigglite：低成本信息收集和分类 Consumers conducting comparison shopping, researchers making sense of competitive space, and developers looking for code snippets online all face the challenge of capturing the information they find for later use without interrupting their current flow. In addition, during many learning and exploration tasks, people need to externalize their mental context, such as estimating how urgent a topic is to follow up on, or rating a piece of evidence as a "pro" or "con," which helps scaffold subsequent deeper exploration. However, current approaches incur a high cost, often requiring users to select, copy, context switch, paste, and annotate information in a separate document without offering specific affordances that capture their mental context. In this work, we explore a new interaction technique called "wiggling," which can be used to fluidly collect, organize, and rate information during early sensemaking stages with a single gesture. Wiggling involves rapid back-and-forth movements of a pointer or up-and-down scrolling on a smartphone, which can indicate the information to be collected and its valence, using a single, light-weight gesture that does not interfere with other interactions that are already available. Through implementation and user evaluation, we found that wiggling helped participants accurately collect information and encode their mental context with a 58% reduction in operational cost while being 24% faster compared to a common baseline. 进行比较购物的消费者、了解竞争空间的研究人员以及在线寻找代码片段的开发人员都面临着捕获他们找到的信息以供以后使用而不中断当前流程的挑战。此外，在许多学习和探索任务中，人们需要外化他们的心理背景，例如估计跟进某个主题的紧迫性，或者将一个证据评为“赞成”或“反对”，这有助于支撑后续更深入的探索。然而，当前的方法成本很高，通常要求用户在单独的文档中选择、复制、上下文切换、粘贴和注释信息，而不提供捕获他们的心理上下文的特定功能可供性。在这项工作中，我们探索了一种称为“摆动”的新交互技术，该技术可用于在早期意义构建阶段通过单个手势流畅地收集、组织和评价信息。摆动涉及指针的快速来回移动或智能手机上的上下滚动，这可以使用单一的轻量手势指示要收集的信息及其效价，而不会干扰现有的其他交互。通过实施和用户评估，我们发现摆动帮助参与者准确地收集信息并编码他们的心理背景，运营成本降低了 58%，同时与通用基线相比速度提高了 24%。 本文提出了一种名为'Wigglite'的低成本信息收集与分类方法，通过单一手势实现信息的流畅收集与评级。 Michael Xieyang Liu,Andrew Kuznetsov,Yongsung Kim,Joseph Chee Chang,Aniket Kittur,Brad A. Myers cs.HC

authors_text: Xuan Lin,Gabriel Fernandez,Yeting Liu,Taoyuanmin Zhu,Yuki Shirai,Dennis Hong
title: Multi-Modal Multi-Agent Optimization for LIMMS, A Modular Robotics Approach to Delivery Automation
title_zh: LIMMS 的多模式多代理优化，一种实现自动化交付的模块化机器人方法
abstract: In this paper we present a motion planner for LIMMS, a modular multi-agent, multi-modal package delivery platform. A single LIMMS unit is a robot that can operate as an arm or leg depending on how and what it is attached to, e.g., a manipulator when it is anchored to walls within a delivery vehicle or a quadruped robot when 4 are attached to a box. Coordinating amongst multiple LIMMS, when each one can take on vastly different roles, can quickly become complex. For such a planning problem we first compose the necessary logic and constraints. The formulation is then solved for skill exploration and can be implemented on hardware after refinement. To solve this optimization problem we use alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). The proposed planner is experimented under various scenarios which shows the capability of LIMMS to enter into different modes or combinations of them to achieve their goal of moving shipping boxes.
summary: In this paper we present a motion planner for LIMMS, a modular multi-agent, multi-modal package delivery platform. A single LIMMS unit is a robot that can operate as an arm or leg depending on how and what it is attached to, e.g., a manipulator when it is anchored to walls within a delivery vehicle or a quadruped robot when 4 are attached to a box. Coordinating amongst multiple LIMMS, when each one can take on vastly different roles, can quickly become complex. For such a planning problem we first compose the necessary logic and constraints. The formulation is then solved for skill exploration and can be implemented on hardware after refinement. To solve this optimization problem we use alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). The proposed planner is experimented under various scenarios which shows the capability of LIMMS to enter into different modes or combinations of them to achieve their goal of moving shipping boxes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 LIMMS 的运动规划器，这是一个模块化多代理、多模式包裹递送平台。单个 LIMMS 单元是一个机器人，可以作为手臂或腿进行操作，具体取决于它所连接的方式和对象，例如，当它固定在运载工具内的墙壁上时，它是一个机械手；或者当 4 个机器人连接到一个盒子上时，它是一个四足机器人。当多个 LIMMS 可以扮演截然不同的角色时，协调多个 LIMMS 很快就会变得复杂。对于这样的规划问题，我们首先构建必要的逻辑和约束。然后对公式进行求解以进行技能探索，并可以在细化后在硬件上实现。为了解决这个优化问题，我们使用乘子交替方向法（ADMM）。所提出的规划器在各种场景下进行了实验，显示了 LIMMS 进入不同模式或模式组合以实现移动运输箱目标的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ADMM的运动规划方法，用于LIMMS模块化多智能体配送平台，解决其多模态协作的复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: LIMMS单元可切换为机械臂或腿部等不同形态，多单元协作时角色差异导致规划复杂度急剧上升，传统方法难以应对。
AI.method: 通过构建逻辑约束模型，采用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）求解优化问题，并在硬件上验证技能探索与规划方案。
AI.result: 实验表明LIMMS可在多种模式或组合下自主切换，成功完成运输箱移动任务，验证了系统的灵活性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: ADMM方法有效解决了多模态多智能体协作的复杂性问题，为模块化机器人配送系统提供了可行的规划框架。

authors_text: Debanjan Datta,Sathappan Muthiah,John Simeone,Amelia Meadows,Naren Ramakrishnan
title: Scrutinizing Shipment Records To Thwart Illegal Timber Trade
title_zh: 审查装运记录以阻止非法木材贸易
comment: Accepted in Proceedings of 6th Outlier Detection and Description Workshop, ACM SigKDD 2021 https://oddworkshop.github.io/assets/papers/7.pdf. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.01156
comments: Accepted in Proceedings of 6th Outlier Detection and Description Workshop, ACM SigKDD 2021 https://oddworkshop.github.io/assets/papers/7.pdf. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.01156
abstract: Timber and forest products made from wood, like furniture, are valuable commodities, and like the global trade of many highly-valued natural resources, face challenges of corruption, fraud, and illegal harvesting. These grey and black market activities in the wood and forest products sector are not limited to the countries where the wood was harvested, but extend throughout the global supply chain and have been tied to illicit financial flows, like trade-based money laundering, document fraud, species mislabeling, and other illegal activities. The task of finding such fraudulent activities using trade data, in the absence of ground truth, can be modelled as an unsupervised anomaly detection problem. However existing approaches suffer from certain shortcomings in their applicability towards large scale trade data. Trade data is heterogeneous, with both categorical and numerical attributes in a tabular format. The overall challenge lies in the complexity, volume and velocity of data, with large number of entities and lack of ground truth labels. To mitigate these, we propose a novel unsupervised anomaly detection -- Contrastive Learning based Heterogeneous Anomaly Detection (CHAD) that is generally applicable for large-scale heterogeneous tabular data. We demonstrate our model CHAD performs favorably against multiple comparable baselines for public benchmark datasets, and outperforms them in the case of trade data. More importantly we demonstrate our approach reduces assumptions and efforts required hyperparameter tuning, which is a key challenging aspect in an unsupervised training paradigm. Specifically, our overarching objective pertains to detecting suspicious timber shipments and patterns using Bill of Lading trade record data. Detecting anomalous transactions in shipment records can enable further investigation by government agencies and supply chain constituents.
summary: Timber and forest products made from wood, like furniture, are valuable commodities, and like the global trade of many highly-valued natural resources, face challenges of corruption, fraud, and illegal harvesting. These grey and black market activities in the wood and forest products sector are not limited to the countries where the wood was harvested, but extend throughout the global supply chain and have been tied to illicit financial flows, like trade-based money laundering, document fraud, species mislabeling, and other illegal activities. The task of finding such fraudulent activities using trade data, in the absence of ground truth, can be modelled as an unsupervised anomaly detection problem. However existing approaches suffer from certain shortcomings in their applicability towards large scale trade data. Trade data is heterogeneous, with both categorical and numerical attributes in a tabular format. The overall challenge lies in the complexity, volume and velocity of data, with large number of entities and lack of ground truth labels. To mitigate these, we propose a novel unsupervised anomaly detection -- Contrastive Learning based Heterogeneous Anomaly Detection (CHAD) that is generally applicable for large-scale heterogeneous tabular data. We demonstrate our model CHAD performs favorably against multiple comparable baselines for public benchmark datasets, and outperforms them in the case of trade data. More importantly we demonstrate our approach reduces assumptions and efforts required hyperparameter tuning, which is a key challenging aspect in an unsupervised training paradigm. Specifically, our overarching objective pertains to detecting suspicious timber shipments and patterns using Bill of Lading trade record data. Detecting anomalous transactions in shipment records can enable further investigation by government agencies and supply chain constituents.
abstract_zh: 木材和由木材制成的森林产品（如家具）是有价值的商品，与许多高价值自然资源的全球贸易一样，也面临着腐败、欺诈和非法采伐的挑战。木材和林产品领域的这些灰色和黑市活动不仅限于木材采伐国，而且延伸到整个全球供应链，并与非法资金流动有关，例如基于贸易的洗钱、文件欺诈、物种贴错标签和其他非法活动。在缺乏基本事实的情况下，使用贸易数据发现此类欺诈活动的任务可以建模为无监督的异常检测问题。然而，现有方法在大规模贸易数据的适用性方面存在某些缺陷。贸易数据是异构的，具有表格格式的分类属性和数字属性。总体挑战在于数据的复杂性、数量和速度，以及大量实体和缺乏真实标签。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督异常检测——基于对比学习的异构异常检测（CHAD），它通常适用于大规模异构表格数据。我们证明我们的模型 CHAD 相对于公共基准数据集的多个可比较基线表现良好，并且在贸易数据方面优于它们。更重要的是，我们证明了我们的方法减少了超参数调整所需的假设和工作，这是无监督训练范例中的一个关键挑战。具体来说，我们的首要目标是使用提单贸易记录数据检测可疑的木材运输和模式。检测货运记录中的异常交易可以帮助政府机构和供应链成员进行进一步调查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的异构异常检测方法（CHAD），用于通过提单贸易记录数据检测可疑木材运输和模式，以遏制非法木材贸易。
AI.motivation: 非法木材贸易涉及全球供应链中的腐败、欺诈和非法采伐，现有方法在处理大规模异构贸易数据时存在适用性不足、依赖人工调参等问题，需更高效的无监督检测方案。
AI.method: 开发对比学习驱动的异构异常检测模型（CHAD），适用于大规模异构表格数据，通过减少对超参数调优的依赖，提升无监督场景下的检测效率与准确性。
AI.result: CHAD在公开基准数据集和贸易数据上均优于多个基线方法，显著降低异常检测的假设条件与调参工作量，有效识别可疑木材运输交易。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为政府机构和供应链参与者提供了可扩展的非法木材贸易检测工具，通过分析提单数据中的异常模式，助力打击非法采伐与洗钱等违法行为。

search_text: Scrutinizing Shipment Records To Thwart Illegal Timber Trade 审查装运记录以阻止非法木材贸易 Timber and forest products made from wood, like furniture, are valuable commodities, and like the global trade of many highly-valued natural resources, face challenges of corruption, fraud, and illegal harvesting. These grey and black market activities in the wood and forest products sector are not limited to the countries where the wood was harvested, but extend throughout the global supply chain and have been tied to illicit financial flows, like trade-based money laundering, document fraud, species mislabeling, and other illegal activities. The task of finding such fraudulent activities using trade data, in the absence of ground truth, can be modelled as an unsupervised anomaly detection problem. However existing approaches suffer from certain shortcomings in their applicability towards large scale trade data. Trade data is heterogeneous, with both categorical and numerical attributes in a tabular format. The overall challenge lies in the complexity, volume and velocity of data, with large number of entities and lack of ground truth labels. To mitigate these, we propose a novel unsupervised anomaly detection -- Contrastive Learning based Heterogeneous Anomaly Detection (CHAD) that is generally applicable for large-scale heterogeneous tabular data. We demonstrate our model CHAD performs favorably against multiple comparable baselines for public benchmark datasets, and outperforms them in the case of trade data. More importantly we demonstrate our approach reduces assumptions and efforts required hyperparameter tuning, which is a key challenging aspect in an unsupervised training paradigm. Specifically, our overarching objective pertains to detecting suspicious timber shipments and patterns using Bill of Lading trade record data. Detecting anomalous transactions in shipment records can enable further investigation by government agencies and supply chain constituents. 木材和由木材制成的森林产品（如家具）是有价值的商品，与许多高价值自然资源的全球贸易一样，也面临着腐败、欺诈和非法采伐的挑战。木材和林产品领域的这些灰色和黑市活动不仅限于木材采伐国，而且延伸到整个全球供应链，并与非法资金流动有关，例如基于贸易的洗钱、文件欺诈、物种贴错标签和其他非法活动。在缺乏基本事实的情况下，使用贸易数据发现此类欺诈活动的任务可以建模为无监督的异常检测问题。然而，现有方法在大规模贸易数据的适用性方面存在某些缺陷。贸易数据是异构的，具有表格格式的分类属性和数字属性。总体挑战在于数据的复杂性、数量和速度，以及大量实体和缺乏真实标签。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督异常检测——基于对比学习的异构异常检测（CHAD），它通常适用于大规模异构表格数据。我们证明我们的模型 CHAD 相对于公共基准数据集的多个可比较基线表现良好，并且在贸易数据方面优于它们。更重要的是，我们证明了我们的方法减少了超参数调整所需的假设和工作，这是无监督训练范例中的一个关键挑战。具体来说，我们的首要目标是使用提单贸易记录数据检测可疑的木材运输和模式。检测货运记录中的异常交易可以帮助政府机构和供应链成员进行进一步调查。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的异构异常检测方法（CHAD），用于通过提单贸易记录数据检测可疑木材运输和模式，以遏制非法木材贸易。 Debanjan Datta,Sathappan Muthiah,John Simeone,Amelia Meadows,Naren Ramakrishnan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Aravind Battaje,Oliver Brock
title: One Object at a Time: Accurate and Robust Structure From Motion for Robots
title_zh: 一次处理一个物体：机器人运动的精确而坚固的结构
comment: v3: Add link to project page v2: Update DOI v1: Accepted at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: v3: Add link to project page v2: Update DOI v1: Accepted at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: A gaze-fixating robot perceives distance to the fixated object and relative positions of surrounding objects immediately, accurately, and robustly. We show how fixation, which is the act of looking at one object while moving, exploits regularities in the geometry of 3D space to obtain this information. These regularities introduce rotation-translation couplings that are not commonly used in structure from motion. To validate, we use a Franka Emika Robot with an RGB camera. We a) find that error in distance estimate is less than 5 mm at a distance of 15 cm, and b) show how relative position can be used to find obstacles under challenging scenarios. We combine accurate distance estimates and obstacle information into a reactive robot behavior that is able to pick up objects of unknown size, while impeded by unforeseen obstacles. Project page: https://oxidification.com/p/one-object-at-a-time/ .
summary: A gaze-fixating robot perceives distance to the fixated object and relative positions of surrounding objects immediately, accurately, and robustly. We show how fixation, which is the act of looking at one object while moving, exploits regularities in the geometry of 3D space to obtain this information. These regularities introduce rotation-translation couplings that are not commonly used in structure from motion. To validate, we use a Franka Emika Robot with an RGB camera. We a) find that error in distance estimate is less than 5 mm at a distance of 15 cm, and b) show how relative position can be used to find obstacles under challenging scenarios. We combine accurate distance estimates and obstacle information into a reactive robot behavior that is able to pick up objects of unknown size, while impeded by unforeseen obstacles. Project page: https://oxidification.com/p/one-object-at-a-time/ .
abstract_zh: 凝视机器人能够立即、准确且稳健地感知到固定物体的距离以及周围物体的相对位置。我们展示了注视（即在移动时注视一个物体的行为）如何利用 3D 空间的几何规律来获取此信息。这些规律性引入了旋转平移耦合，这种耦合在运动结构中并不常用。为了进行验证，我们使用带有 RGB 摄像头的 Franka Emika 机器人。我们 a) 发现距离 15 厘米处的距离估计误差小于 5 毫米，b) 展示了如何使用相对位置在具有挑战性的场景下寻找障碍物。我们将准确的距离估计和障碍物信息结合到反应性机器人行为中，该行为能够拾取未知大小的物体，同时受到不可预见的障碍物的阻碍。项目页面：https://氧化.com/p/one-object-at-a-time/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于机器人的准确且鲁棒的运动结构方法，通过注视机制实现对单个物体的距离估计及周围障碍物的相对位置感知。
AI.motivation: 传统结构从运动方法在动态或复杂环境中难以保证精度与鲁棒性，机器人需要实时准确的感知能力以应对未知障碍和目标。
AI.method: 利用机器人注视单个物体时的运动轨迹，结合3D几何中的旋转-平移耦合规律，通过RGB相机与Franka Emika机器人验证感知性能。
AI.result: 在15厘米距离下距离估计误差低于5毫米，成功检测复杂场景中的障碍物，并实现未知尺寸物体的避障抓取。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用几何规律与注视行为，显著提升了机器人感知的准确性与鲁棒性，适用于复杂环境下的实时操作任务。

authors_text: Ying Li,Patrick Lambrix
title: Repairing $\mathcal{EL}$ Ontologies Using Weakening and Completing
title_zh: 使用弱化和完成修复 $\mathcal{EL}$ 本体
abstract: The quality of ontologies in terms of their correctness and completeness is crucial for developing high-quality ontology-based applications. Traditional debugging techniques repair ontologies by removing unwanted axioms, but may thereby remove consequences that are correct in the domain of the ontology. In this paper we propose an interactive approach to mitigate this for $\mathcal{EL}$ ontologies by axiom weakening and completing. We present algorithms for weakening and completing and present the first approach for repairing that takes into account removing, weakening and completing. We show different combination strategies, discuss the influence on the final ontologies and show experimental results. We show that previous work has only considered special cases and that there is a trade-off between the amount of validation work for a domain expert and the quality of the ontology in terms of correctness and completeness.
summary: The quality of ontologies in terms of their correctness and completeness is crucial for developing high-quality ontology-based applications. Traditional debugging techniques repair ontologies by removing unwanted axioms, but may thereby remove consequences that are correct in the domain of the ontology. In this paper we propose an interactive approach to mitigate this for $\mathcal{EL}$ ontologies by axiom weakening and completing. We present algorithms for weakening and completing and present the first approach for repairing that takes into account removing, weakening and completing. We show different combination strategies, discuss the influence on the final ontologies and show experimental results. We show that previous work has only considered special cases and that there is a trade-off between the amount of validation work for a domain expert and the quality of the ontology in terms of correctness and completeness.
abstract_zh: 本体的正确性和完整性方面的质量对于开发高质量的基于本体的应用程序至关重要。传统的调试技术通过删除不需要的公理来修复本体，但可能会因此删除本体领域中正确的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种交互式方法，通过公理弱化和完成来缓解 $\mathcal{EL}$ 本体的这种情况。我们提出了弱化和完成的算法，并提出了第一种考虑删除、弱化和完成的修复方法。我们展示了不同的组合策略，讨论了对最终本体的影响并展示了实验结果。我们表明，以前的工作仅考虑了特殊情况，并且领域专家的验证工作量与本体的正确性和完整性质量之间存在权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式方法，通过公理削弱和补全来修复EL本体，以解决传统方法移除正确结论的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统修复方法通过移除公理可能删除正确结论，需在减少专家验证工作量与保持本体质量间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出削弱和补全算法，首次结合移除、削弱与补全策略，并分析不同组合对本体的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明先前方法仅处理特殊情况，存在验证工作量与本体质量间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 传统方法局限性显著，本文方法在修复EL本体时能更有效平衡专家工作量与本体正确性完整性。

authors_text: Thomas Lidbetter,Yifan Xie
title: The Search and Rescue Game on a Cycle
title_zh: 循环搜救游戏
abstract: We consider a search and rescue game introduced recently by the first author. An immobile target or targets (for example, injured hikers) are hidden on a graph. The terrain is assumed to dangerous, so that when any given vertex of the graph is searched, there is a certain probability that the search will come to an end, otherwise with the complementary {\em success probability} the search can continue. A Searcher searches the graph with the aim of finding all the targets with maximum probability. Here, we focus on the game in the case that the graph is a cycle. In the case that there is only one target, we solve the game for equal success probabilities, and for a class of games with unequal success probabilities. For multiple targets and equal success probabilities, we give a solution for an adaptive Searcher and a solution in a special case for a non-adaptive Searcher. We also consider a continuous version of the model, giving a full solution for an adaptive Searcher and approximately optimal solutions in the non-adaptive case.
summary: We consider a search and rescue game introduced recently by the first author. An immobile target or targets (for example, injured hikers) are hidden on a graph. The terrain is assumed to dangerous, so that when any given vertex of the graph is searched, there is a certain probability that the search will come to an end, otherwise with the complementary {\em success probability} the search can continue. A Searcher searches the graph with the aim of finding all the targets with maximum probability. Here, we focus on the game in the case that the graph is a cycle. In the case that there is only one target, we solve the game for equal success probabilities, and for a class of games with unequal success probabilities. For multiple targets and equal success probabilities, we give a solution for an adaptive Searcher and a solution in a special case for a non-adaptive Searcher. We also consider a continuous version of the model, giving a full solution for an adaptive Searcher and approximately optimal solutions in the non-adaptive case.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑第一作者最近推出的一款搜索和救援游戏。一个或多个不动的目标（例如受伤的徒步旅行者）隐藏在图表上。地形被假定为危险的，因此当搜索图的任何给定顶点时，搜索都有一定的概率会结束，否则搜索可以继续进行互补的{\em成功概率}。搜索者搜索图表的目的是以最大概率找到所有目标。这里，我们重点讨论图为循环情况下的博弈。在只有一个目标的情况下，我们解决了相同成功概率的博弈，以及一类具有不同成功概率的博弈。对于多个目标和相同的成功概率，我们给出了自适应搜索器的解决方案和非自适应搜索器的特殊情况下的解决方案。我们还考虑模型的连续版本，为自适应搜索器提供完整的解决方案，并在非自适应情况下提供近似最优的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在环状图结构上进行搜索与救援游戏的策略，旨在通过优化搜索路径最大化找到隐藏目标的概率。
AI.motivation: 在危险地形中搜索目标时，每次搜索都有失败风险，需设计高效策略以提高救援成功率并降低风险。
AI.method: 分析单目标与多目标场景，分别针对等概率与不等概率情况，结合自适应与非自适应搜索策略，并扩展至连续模型进行求解。
AI.result: 提出单目标等概率下的最优解、多目标自适应策略及非自适应特殊情况解，连续模型中给出自适应完整解与近似最优方案。
AI.conclusion: 不同搜索策略在环状结构中具有特定适用性，模型为危险环境下的搜索任务提供了理论支持与实践指导。

search_text: The Search and Rescue Game on a Cycle 循环搜救游戏 We consider a search and rescue game introduced recently by the first author. An immobile target or targets (for example, injured hikers) are hidden on a graph. The terrain is assumed to dangerous, so that when any given vertex of the graph is searched, there is a certain probability that the search will come to an end, otherwise with the complementary {\em success probability} the search can continue. A Searcher searches the graph with the aim of finding all the targets with maximum probability. Here, we focus on the game in the case that the graph is a cycle. In the case that there is only one target, we solve the game for equal success probabilities, and for a class of games with unequal success probabilities. For multiple targets and equal success probabilities, we give a solution for an adaptive Searcher and a solution in a special case for a non-adaptive Searcher. We also consider a continuous version of the model, giving a full solution for an adaptive Searcher and approximately optimal solutions in the non-adaptive case. 我们考虑第一作者最近推出的一款搜索和救援游戏。一个或多个不动的目标（例如受伤的徒步旅行者）隐藏在图表上。地形被假定为危险的，因此当搜索图的任何给定顶点时，搜索都有一定的概率会结束，否则搜索可以继续进行互补的{\em成功概率}。搜索者搜索图表的目的是以最大概率找到所有目标。这里，我们重点讨论图为循环情况下的博弈。在只有一个目标的情况下，我们解决了相同成功概率的博弈，以及一类具有不同成功概率的博弈。对于多个目标和相同的成功概率，我们给出了自适应搜索器的解决方案和非自适应搜索器的特殊情况下的解决方案。我们还考虑模型的连续版本，为自适应搜索器提供完整的解决方案，并在非自适应情况下提供近似最优的解决方案。 本文研究了在环状图结构上进行搜索与救援游戏的策略，旨在通过优化搜索路径最大化找到隐藏目标的概率。 Thomas Lidbetter,Yifan Xie cs.DS,math.OC

authors_text: Abdalkarim Mohtasib,Gerhard Neumann,Heriberto Cuayahuitl
title: Robot Policy Learning from Demonstration Using Advantage Weighting and Early Termination
title_zh: 使用优势权重和提前终止从演示中学习机器人策略
abstract: Learning robotic tasks in the real world is still highly challenging and effective practical solutions remain to be found. Traditional methods used in this area are imitation learning and reinforcement learning, but they both have limitations when applied to real robots. Combining reinforcement learning with pre-collected demonstrations is a promising approach that can help in learning control policies to solve robotic tasks. In this paper, we propose an algorithm that uses novel techniques to leverage offline expert data using offline and online training to obtain faster convergence and improved performance. The proposed algorithm (AWET) weights the critic losses with a novel agent advantage weight to improve over the expert data. In addition, AWET makes use of an automatic early termination technique to stop and discard policy rollouts that are not similar to expert trajectories -- to prevent drifting far from the expert data. In an ablation study, AWET showed improved and promising performance when compared to state-of-the-art baselines on four standard robotic tasks.
summary: Learning robotic tasks in the real world is still highly challenging and effective practical solutions remain to be found. Traditional methods used in this area are imitation learning and reinforcement learning, but they both have limitations when applied to real robots. Combining reinforcement learning with pre-collected demonstrations is a promising approach that can help in learning control policies to solve robotic tasks. In this paper, we propose an algorithm that uses novel techniques to leverage offline expert data using offline and online training to obtain faster convergence and improved performance. The proposed algorithm (AWET) weights the critic losses with a novel agent advantage weight to improve over the expert data. In addition, AWET makes use of an automatic early termination technique to stop and discard policy rollouts that are not similar to expert trajectories -- to prevent drifting far from the expert data. In an ablation study, AWET showed improved and promising performance when compared to state-of-the-art baselines on four standard robotic tasks.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界中学习机器人任务仍然极具挑战性，有效的实用解决方案仍有待找到。该领域使用的传统方法是模仿学习和强化学习，但它们在应用于真实机器人时都存在局限性。将强化学习与预先收集的演示相结合是一种很有前途的方法，可以帮助学习控制策略来解决机器人任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法，该算法使用新颖的技术通过离线和在线训练来利用离线专家数据，以获得更快的收敛和更高的性能。所提出的算法（AWET）使用新颖的代理优势权重对批评者损失进行加权，以改进专家数据。此外，AWET 利用自动提前终止技术来停止和放弃与专家轨迹不相似的策略推出，以防止偏离专家数据。在一项消融研究中，与四个标准机器人任务的最先进基线相比，AWET 显示出改进且有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合优势加权和提前终止技术的算法AWET，用于提升机器人从示范数据中学习策略的效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习和强化学习在实际机器人任务中存在局限性，而结合离线示范数据与在线训练的混合方法尚未充分探索。
AI.method: AWET算法通过引入优势权重调整批评者损失函数，并采用自动提前终止机制过滤偏离专家轨迹的策略 rollout。
AI.result: 在四个标准机器人任务中，AWET相较最先进基线方法展现出更快的收敛速度和更优的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: AWET通过有效利用专家数据和防止策略漂移，在机器人策略学习领域展现出显著优势与应用潜力。

authors_text: Xiaoyuan Guo,Jiali Duan,C. -C. Jay Kuo,Judy Wawira Gichoya,Imon Banerjee
title: Augmenting Vision Language Pretraining by Learning Codebook with Visual Semantics
title_zh: 通过学习视觉语义码本来增强视觉语言预训练
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, ICPR2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.00048
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures, ICPR2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.00048
abstract: Language modality within the vision language pretraining framework is innately discretized, endowing each word in the language vocabulary a semantic meaning. In contrast, visual modality is inherently continuous and high-dimensional, which potentially prohibits the alignment as well as fusion between vision and language modalities. We therefore propose to "discretize" the visual representation by joint learning a codebook that imbues each visual token a semantic. We then utilize these discretized visual semantics as self-supervised ground-truths for building our Masked Image Modeling objective, a counterpart of Masked Language Modeling which proves successful for language models. To optimize the codebook, we extend the formulation of VQ-VAE which gives a theoretic guarantee. Experiments validate the effectiveness of our approach across common vision-language benchmarks.
summary: Language modality within the vision language pretraining framework is innately discretized, endowing each word in the language vocabulary a semantic meaning. In contrast, visual modality is inherently continuous and high-dimensional, which potentially prohibits the alignment as well as fusion between vision and language modalities. We therefore propose to "discretize" the visual representation by joint learning a codebook that imbues each visual token a semantic. We then utilize these discretized visual semantics as self-supervised ground-truths for building our Masked Image Modeling objective, a counterpart of Masked Language Modeling which proves successful for language models. To optimize the codebook, we extend the formulation of VQ-VAE which gives a theoretic guarantee. Experiments validate the effectiveness of our approach across common vision-language benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练框架内的语言模态本质上是离散的，赋予语言词汇中的每个单词语义。相比之下，视觉模态本质上是连续的和高维的，这可能会阻碍视觉和语言模态之间的对齐和融合。因此，我们建议通过联合学习赋予每个视觉标记语义的密码本来“离散化”视觉表示。然后，我们利用这些离散的视觉语义作为自监督的基本事实来构建我们的蒙版图像建模目标，这是蒙版语言建模的对应物，事实证明它对于语言模型是成功的。为了优化码本，我们扩展了VQ-VAE的公式，给出了理论上的保证。实验验证了我们的方法在常见视觉语言基准上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 通过学习带有视觉语义的代码簿来增强视觉语言预训练，解决视觉与语言模态对齐难题。
AI.motivation: 视觉模态的连续高维特性与语言模态的离散性导致跨模态对齐困难，需通过离散化视觉表示促进融合。
AI.method: 联合学习视觉代码簿赋予视觉标记语义，构建掩码图像建模目标，并扩展VQ-VAE理论框架优化代码簿。
AI.result: 方法在多个视觉语言基准测试中验证有效，提升跨模态对齐与融合性能。
AI.conclusion: 离散化视觉表示结合自监督学习有效弥合视觉与语言模态差异，为跨模态预训练提供新思路。

We then utilize these discretized visual semantics as self-supervised ground-truths for building our Masked Image Modeling objective, a counterpart of Masked Language Modeling which proves successful for language models. Experiments validate the effectiveness of our approach across common vision-language benchmarks. 视觉语言预训练框架内的语言模态本质上是离散的，赋予语言词汇中的每个单词语义。相比之下，视觉模态本质上是连续的和高维的，这可能会阻碍视觉和语言模态之间的对齐和融合。因此，我们建议通过联合学习赋予每个视觉标记语义的密码本来“离散化”视觉表示。然后，我们利用这些离散的视觉语义作为自监督的基本事实来构建我们的蒙版图像建模目标，这是蒙版语言建模的对应物，事实证明它对于语言模型是成功的。为了优化码本，我们扩展了VQ-VAE的公式，给出了理论上的保证。实验验证了我们的方法在常见视觉语言基准上的有效性。 通过学习带有视觉语义的代码簿来增强视觉语言预训练，解决视觉与语言模态对齐难题。 Xiaoyuan Guo,Jiali Duan,C. -C. Jay Kuo,Judy Wawira Gichoya,Imon Banerjee cs.CV

authors_text: Ivan Zakazov,Vladimir Shaposhnikov,Iaroslav Bespalov,Dmitry V. Dylov
title: Feather-Light Fourier Domain Adaptation in Magnetic Resonance Imaging
title_zh: 磁共振成像中的轻如羽毛的傅里叶域适应
comment: Accepted for DART workshop of MICCAI-2022 conference
comments: Accepted for DART workshop of MICCAI-2022 conference
abstract: Generalizability of deep learning models may be severely affected by the difference in the distributions of the train (source domain) and the test (target domain) sets, e.g., when the sets are produced by different hardware. As a consequence of this domain shift, a certain model might perform well on data from one clinic, and then fail when deployed in another. We propose a very light and transparent approach to perform test-time domain adaptation. The idea is to substitute the target low-frequency Fourier space components that are deemed to reflect the style of an image. To maximize the performance, we implement the "optimal style donor" selection technique, and use a number of source data points for altering a single target scan appearance (Multi-Source Transferring). We study the effect of severity of domain shift on the performance of the method, and show that our training-free approach reaches the state-of-the-art level of complicated deep domain adaptation models. The code for our experiments is released.
summary: Generalizability of deep learning models may be severely affected by the difference in the distributions of the train (source domain) and the test (target domain) sets, e.g., when the sets are produced by different hardware. As a consequence of this domain shift, a certain model might perform well on data from one clinic, and then fail when deployed in another. We propose a very light and transparent approach to perform test-time domain adaptation. The idea is to substitute the target low-frequency Fourier space components that are deemed to reflect the style of an image. To maximize the performance, we implement the "optimal style donor" selection technique, and use a number of source data points for altering a single target scan appearance (Multi-Source Transferring). We study the effect of severity of domain shift on the performance of the method, and show that our training-free approach reaches the state-of-the-art level of complicated deep domain adaptation models. The code for our experiments is released.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型的通用性可能会受到训练集（源域）和测试集（目标域）分布差异的严重影响，例如，当这些集是由不同的硬件生成时。由于这种领域转移，某个模型可能在一个诊所的数据上表现良好，但在部署到另一个诊所时却会失败。我们提出了一种非常轻量且透明的方法来执行测试时域适应。这个想法是替换被认为反映图像风格的目标低频傅立叶空间分量。为了最大限度地提高性能，我们实施了“最佳样式供体”选择技术，并使用多个源数据点来改变单个目标扫描外观（多源传输）。我们研究了域转移的严重程度对该方法性能的影响，并表明我们的免训练方法达到了复杂的深度域适应模型的最先进水平。我们的实验代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的傅里叶域适应方法，用于解决磁共振成像（MRI）中因硬件差异导致的领域偏移问题，提升模型在不同临床环境下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在不同硬件生成的训练集和测试集间存在分布差异时，泛化性能会显著下降。传统领域适应方法复杂且需重新训练，难以满足实际部署需求。
AI.method: 通过替换目标图像低频傅里叶分量（反映图像风格）实现测试时领域适应，结合最优风格供体选择和多源迁移技术，无需重新训练即可调整单个目标扫描的外观。
AI.result: 该训练无关方法在不同领域偏移程度下均达到与复杂深度领域适应模型相当的最先进水平，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量傅里叶域适应方法为MRI领域适应提供了高效、透明的解决方案，可有效应对临床环境中的硬件差异挑战。

authors_text: Shohreh Deldari,Hao Xue,Aaqib Saeed,Daniel V. Smith,Flora D. Salim
title: COCOA: Cross Modality Contrastive Learning for Sensor Data
title_zh: COCOA：传感器数据的跨模态对比学习
comment: 27 pages, 10 figures, 6 tables, Accepted with minor revision at IMWUT Vol. 6 No. 3
comments: 27 pages, 10 figures, 6 tables, Accepted with minor revision at IMWUT Vol. 6 No. 3
abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) is a new paradigm for learning discriminative representations without labelled data and has reached comparable or even state-of-the-art results in comparison to supervised counterparts. Contrastive Learning (CL) is one of the most well-known approaches in SSL that attempts to learn general, informative representations of data. CL methods have been mostly developed for applications in computer vision and natural language processing where only a single sensor modality is used. A majority of pervasive computing applications, however, exploit data from a range of different sensor modalities. While existing CL methods are limited to learning from one or two data sources, we propose COCOA (Cross mOdality COntrastive leArning), a self-supervised model that employs a novel objective function to learn quality representations from multisensor data by computing the cross-correlation between different data modalities and minimizing the similarity between irrelevant instances. We evaluate the effectiveness of COCOA against eight recently introduced state-of-the-art self-supervised models, and two supervised baselines across five public datasets. We show that COCOA achieves superior classification performance to all other approaches. Also, COCOA is far more label-efficient than the other baselines including the fully supervised model using only one-tenth of available labelled data.
summary: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) is a new paradigm for learning discriminative representations without labelled data and has reached comparable or even state-of-the-art results in comparison to supervised counterparts. Contrastive Learning (CL) is one of the most well-known approaches in SSL that attempts to learn general, informative representations of data. CL methods have been mostly developed for applications in computer vision and natural language processing where only a single sensor modality is used. A majority of pervasive computing applications, however, exploit data from a range of different sensor modalities. While existing CL methods are limited to learning from one or two data sources, we propose COCOA (Cross mOdality COntrastive leArning), a self-supervised model that employs a novel objective function to learn quality representations from multisensor data by computing the cross-correlation between different data modalities and minimizing the similarity between irrelevant instances. We evaluate the effectiveness of COCOA against eight recently introduced state-of-the-art self-supervised models, and two supervised baselines across five public datasets. We show that COCOA achieves superior classification performance to all other approaches. Also, COCOA is far more label-efficient than the other baselines including the fully supervised model using only one-tenth of available labelled data.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）是一种在没有标记数据的情况下学习判别性表示的新范式，与监督学习相比，已经达到了可比的甚至是最先进的结果。对比学习 (CL) 是 SSL 中最著名的方法之一，它尝试学习通用的、信息丰富的数据表示。 CL 方法主要针对仅使用单一传感器模态的计算机视觉和自然语言处理应用而开发。然而，大多数普适计算应用都利用来自一系列不同传感器模式的数据。虽然现有的 CL 方法仅限于从一个或两个数据源进行学习，但我们提出了 COCOA（跨模态对比学习），这是一种自监督模型，它采用新颖的目标函数，通过计算不同数据模态之间的互相关性并最小化不相关实例之间的相似性，从多传感器数据中学习质量表示。我们根据最近引入的八个最先进的自我监督模型以及五个公共数据集的两个监督基线来评估 COCOA 的有效性。我们证明 COCOA 比所有其他方法实现了卓越的分类性能。此外，COCOA 比其他基线（包括仅使用十分之一的可用标记数据的完全监督模型）的标签效率要高得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COCOA方法，通过跨模态对比学习从多传感器数据中学习高质量表示，以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法局限于单模态或双模态数据，而普适计算应用通常涉及多传感器数据，需更有效的自监督学习框架。
AI.method: 设计COCOA模型，利用跨模态相关性计算并最小化无关实例相似度，通过新型目标函数处理多源传感器数据。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上，COCOA优于八种最新自监督模型及两种监督基线，且仅需十分之一标注数据即可达到更优分类效果。
AI.conclusion: COCOA有效解决了多模态传感器数据表征学习问题，显著提升模型性能并降低对标注数据的依赖。

authors_text: Mayank Katare,Mahesh Raveendranatha Panicker,A N Madhavanunni,Gayathri Malamal
title: Learning while Acquisition: Towards Active Learning Framework for Beamforming in Ultrasound Imaging
title_zh: 边采集边学习：超声成像波束形成的主动学习框架
abstract: In the recent past, there have been many efforts to accelerate adaptive beamforming for ultrasound (US) imaging using neural networks (NNs). However, most of these efforts are based on static models, i.e., they are trained to learn a single adaptive beamforming approach (e.g., minimum variance distortionless response (MVDR)) assuming that they result in the best image quality. Moreover, the training of such NNs is initiated only after acquiring a large set of data that consumes several gigabytes (GBs) of storage space. In this study, an active learning framework for beamforming is described for the first time in the context of NNs. The best quality image chosen by the user serves as the ground truth for the proposed technique, which trains the NN concurrently with data acqusition. On average, the active learning approach takes 0.5 seconds to complete a single iteration of training.
summary: In the recent past, there have been many efforts to accelerate adaptive beamforming for ultrasound (US) imaging using neural networks (NNs). However, most of these efforts are based on static models, i.e., they are trained to learn a single adaptive beamforming approach (e.g., minimum variance distortionless response (MVDR)) assuming that they result in the best image quality. Moreover, the training of such NNs is initiated only after acquiring a large set of data that consumes several gigabytes (GBs) of storage space. In this study, an active learning framework for beamforming is described for the first time in the context of NNs. The best quality image chosen by the user serves as the ground truth for the proposed technique, which trains the NN concurrently with data acqusition. On average, the active learning approach takes 0.5 seconds to complete a single iteration of training.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们在使用神经网络 (NN) 加速超声 (US) 成像的自适应波束形成方面做出了许多努力。然而，这些工作大部分都是基于静态模型，即，它们被训练来学习单一自适应波束形成方法（例如，最小方差无失真响应（MVDR）），假设它们会产生最佳图像质量。此外，此类神经网络的训练只有在获取大量消耗数千兆字节（GB）存储空间的数据后才开始。在这项研究中，首次在神经网络的背景下描述了波束形成的主动学习框架。用户选择的最佳质量图像作为所提出技术的基本事实，该技术在数据采集的同时训练神经网络。平均而言，主动学习方法需要 0.5 秒才能完成一次训练迭代。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于超声成像波束成形的主动学习框架，该框架在数据采集过程中同时训练神经网络。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖静态模型，需在大量数据采集后进行训练，导致存储消耗大且效率低，而主动学习可动态优化模型。
AI.method: 以用户选择的最佳图像作为真实标签，在数据采集的同时进行神经网络训练，实现学习与采集的同步。
AI.result: 主动学习方法平均每次训练迭代仅需0.5秒，显著提升了训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过减少对大规模预采集数据的依赖，实现了波束成形的高效实时学习，为超声成像提供了新思路。
