search_text: Learning while Acquisition: Towards Active Learning Framework for Beamforming in Ultrasound Imaging 边采集边学习：超声成像波束形成的主动学习框架 In the recent past, there have been many efforts to accelerate adaptive beamforming for ultrasound (US) imaging using neural networks (NNs). However, most of these efforts are based on static models, i.e., they are trained to learn a single adaptive beamforming approach (e.g., minimum variance distortionless response (MVDR)) assuming that they result in the best image quality. Moreover, the training of such NNs is initiated only after acquiring a large set of data that consumes several gigabytes (GBs) of storage space. In this study, an active learning framework for beamforming is described for the first time in the context of NNs. The best quality image chosen by the user serves as the ground truth for the proposed technique, which trains the NN concurrently with data acqusition. On average, the active learning approach takes 0.5 seconds to complete a single iteration of training. 最近，人们在使用神经网络 (NN) 加速超声 (US) 成像的自适应波束形成方面做出了许多努力。然而，这些工作大部分都是基于静态模型，即，它们被训练来学习单一自适应波束形成方法（例如，最小方差无失真响应（MVDR）），假设它们会产生最佳图像质量。此外，此类神经网络的训练只有在获取大量消耗数千兆字节（GB）存储空间的数据后才开始。在这项研究中，首次在神经网络的背景下描述了波束形成的主动学习框架。用户选择的最佳质量图像作为所提出技术的基本事实，该技术在数据采集的同时训练神经网络。平均而言，主动学习方法需要 0.5 秒才能完成一次训练迭代。 本文提出了一种用于超声成像波束成形的主动学习框架，该框架在数据采集过程中同时训练神经网络。 Mayank Katare,Mahesh Raveendranatha Panicker,A N Madhavanunni,Gayathri Malamal eess.SP,cs.DC,eess.IV

authors_text: Linde S. Hesse,Ana I. L. Namburete
title: INSightR-Net: Interpretable Neural Network for Regression using Similarity-based Comparisons to Prototypical Examples
title_zh: INSightR-Net：使用基于相似性的原型示例比较进行回归的可解释神经网络
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2022, code available at https://github.com/lindehesse/INSightR-Net
comments: Accepted at MICCAI 2022, code available at https://github.com/lindehesse/INSightR-Net
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown exceptional performance for a range of medical imaging tasks. However, conventional CNNs are not able to explain their reasoning process, therefore limiting their adoption in clinical practice. In this work, we propose an inherently interpretable CNN for regression using similarity-based comparisons (INSightR-Net) and demonstrate our methods on the task of diabetic retinopathy grading. A prototype layer incorporated into the architecture enables visualization of the areas in the image that are most similar to learned prototypes. The final prediction is then intuitively modeled as a mean of prototype labels, weighted by the similarities. We achieved competitive prediction performance with our INSightR-Net compared to a ResNet baseline, showing that it is not necessary to compromise performance for interpretability. Furthermore, we quantified the quality of our explanations using sparsity and diversity, two concepts considered important for a good explanation, and demonstrated the effect of several parameters on the latent space embeddings.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown exceptional performance for a range of medical imaging tasks. However, conventional CNNs are not able to explain their reasoning process, therefore limiting their adoption in clinical practice. In this work, we propose an inherently interpretable CNN for regression using similarity-based comparisons (INSightR-Net) and demonstrate our methods on the task of diabetic retinopathy grading. A prototype layer incorporated into the architecture enables visualization of the areas in the image that are most similar to learned prototypes. The final prediction is then intuitively modeled as a mean of prototype labels, weighted by the similarities. We achieved competitive prediction performance with our INSightR-Net compared to a ResNet baseline, showing that it is not necessary to compromise performance for interpretability. Furthermore, we quantified the quality of our explanations using sparsity and diversity, two concepts considered important for a good explanation, and demonstrated the effect of several parameters on the latent space embeddings.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在一系列医学成像任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，传统的 CNN 无法解释其推理过程，因此限制了其在临床实践中的采用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用基于相似性的比较（INSightR-Net）进行回归的本质上可解释的 CNN，并在糖尿病视网膜病变分级任务中展示了我们的方法。融入到架构中的原型层可以实现图像中与学习原型最相似的区域的可视化。然后，最终的预测被直观地建模为原型标签的平均值，并按相似性进行加权。与 ResNet 基线相比，我们使用 INSightR-Net 实现了有竞争力的预测性能，这表明没有必要为了可解释性而牺牲性能。此外，我们使用稀疏性和多样性这两个被认为对于良好解释很重要的概念来量化我们的解释质量，并证明了几个参数对潜在空间嵌入的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的卷积神经网络INSightR-Net，通过相似性比较原型示例实现回归任务，应用于糖尿病视网膜病变分级。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在医学影像任务中表现优异但缺乏可解释性，限制了临床应用。需在保持性能的同时提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 在网络中引入原型层，通过图像区域与学习原型的相似性生成可解释可视化，并将预测结果建模为原型标签的加权均值。
AI.result: INSightR-Net性能与ResNet基线相当，通过稀疏性和多样性量化验证了解释质量，并分析了潜在空间参数的影响。
AI.conclusion: 无需牺牲性能即可实现可解释性，该方法为医学影像分析提供了直观的解释机制，促进临床应用。

authors_text: Zihao Yin,Ping Gong,Chunyu Wang,Yizhou Yu,Yizhou Wang
title: One-Shot Medical Landmark Localization by Edge-Guided Transform and Noisy Landmark Refinement
title_zh: 通过边缘引导变换和噪声地标细化进行一次性医疗地标定位
abstract: As an important upstream task for many medical applications, supervised landmark localization still requires non-negligible annotation costs to achieve desirable performance. Besides, due to cumbersome collection procedures, the limited size of medical landmark datasets impacts the effectiveness of large-scale self-supervised pre-training methods. To address these challenges, we propose a two-stage framework for one-shot medical landmark localization, which first infers landmarks by unsupervised registration from the labeled exemplar to unlabeled targets, and then utilizes these noisy pseudo labels to train robust detectors. To handle the significant structure variations, we learn an end-to-end cascade of global alignment and local deformations, under the guidance of novel loss functions which incorporate edge information. In stage II, we explore self-consistency for selecting reliable pseudo labels and cross-consistency for semi-supervised learning. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on public datasets of different body parts, which demonstrates its general applicability.
summary: As an important upstream task for many medical applications, supervised landmark localization still requires non-negligible annotation costs to achieve desirable performance. Besides, due to cumbersome collection procedures, the limited size of medical landmark datasets impacts the effectiveness of large-scale self-supervised pre-training methods. To address these challenges, we propose a two-stage framework for one-shot medical landmark localization, which first infers landmarks by unsupervised registration from the labeled exemplar to unlabeled targets, and then utilizes these noisy pseudo labels to train robust detectors. To handle the significant structure variations, we learn an end-to-end cascade of global alignment and local deformations, under the guidance of novel loss functions which incorporate edge information. In stage II, we explore self-consistency for selecting reliable pseudo labels and cross-consistency for semi-supervised learning. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on public datasets of different body parts, which demonstrates its general applicability.
abstract_zh: 作为许多医疗应用的重要上游任务，有监督的地标定位仍然需要不可忽略的注释成本才能实现理想的性能。此外，由于繁琐的收集程序，医学标志数据集的有限大小影响了大规模自监督预训练方法的有效性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种一次性医学地标定位的两阶段框架，该框架首先通过从标记样本到未标记目标的无监督配准来推断地标，然后利用这些噪声伪标签来训练鲁棒检测器。为了处理显着的结构变化，我们在包含边缘信息的新颖损失函数的指导下学习全局对齐和局部变形的端到端级联。在第二阶段，我们探索选择可靠伪标签的自一致性和半监督学习的交叉一致性。我们的方法在不同身体部位的公共数据集上实现了最先进的性能，这证明了其普遍适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于医学图像中单次示例地标定位的两阶段框架，通过无监督配准和噪声地标优化降低标注成本。
AI.motivation: 医学地标定位依赖大量标注数据且数据集规模受限，传统监督方法成本高，自监督预训练效果受限。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：阶段一通过无监督配准生成伪标签，阶段二结合边缘引导变换与自一致性/交叉一致性机制优化检测器。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上达到最先进水平，验证了方法的通用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过减少标注依赖和优化伪标签质量，为医学图像地标定位提供了高效解决方案。

To handle the significant structure variations, we learn an end-to-end cascade of global alignment and local deformations, under the guidance of novel loss functions which incorporate edge information. In stage II, we explore self-consistency for selecting reliable pseudo labels and cross-consistency for semi-supervised learning. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on public datasets of different body parts, which demonstrates its general applicability. 作为许多医疗应用的重要上游任务，有监督的地标定位仍然需要不可忽略的注释成本才能实现理想的性能。此外，由于繁琐的收集程序，医学标志数据集的有限大小影响了大规模自监督预训练方法的有效性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种一次性医学地标定位的两阶段框架，该框架首先通过从标记样本到未标记目标的无监督配准来推断地标，然后利用这些噪声伪标签来训练鲁棒检测器。为了处理显着的结构变化，我们在包含边缘信息的新颖损失函数的指导下学习全局对齐和局部变形的端到端级联。在第二阶段，我们探索选择可靠伪标签的自一致性和半监督学习的交叉一致性。我们的方法在不同身体部位的公共数据集上实现了最先进的性能，这证明了其普遍适用性。 本文提出一种用于医学图像中单次示例地标定位的两阶段框架，通过无监督配准和噪声地标优化降低标注成本。 Zihao Yin,Ping Gong,Chunyu Wang,Yizhou Yu,Yizhou Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Yun-Fei Niu,Shuo Zhang,Chen Ding,Wan-Su Bao,He-Liang Huang
title: Parameter-Parallel Distributed Variational Quantum Algorithm
title_zh: 参数并行分布式变分量子算法
abstract: Variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) have emerged as a promising near-term technique to explore practical quantum advantage on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices. However, the inefficient parameter training process due to the incompatibility with backpropagation and the cost of a large number of measurements, posing a great challenge to the large-scale development of VQAs. Here, we propose a parameter-parallel distributed variational quantum algorithm (PPD-VQA), to accelerate the training process by parameter-parallel training with multiple quantum processors. To maintain the high performance of PPD-VQA in the realistic noise scenarios, a alternate training strategy is proposed to alleviate the acceleration attenuation caused by noise differences among multiple quantum processors, which is an unavoidable common problem of distributed VQA. Besides, the gradient compression is also employed to overcome the potential communication bottlenecks. The achieved results suggest that the PPD-VQA could provide a practical solution for coordinating multiple quantum processors to handle large-scale real-word applications.
summary: Variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) have emerged as a promising near-term technique to explore practical quantum advantage on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices. However, the inefficient parameter training process due to the incompatibility with backpropagation and the cost of a large number of measurements, posing a great challenge to the large-scale development of VQAs. Here, we propose a parameter-parallel distributed variational quantum algorithm (PPD-VQA), to accelerate the training process by parameter-parallel training with multiple quantum processors. To maintain the high performance of PPD-VQA in the realistic noise scenarios, a alternate training strategy is proposed to alleviate the acceleration attenuation caused by noise differences among multiple quantum processors, which is an unavoidable common problem of distributed VQA. Besides, the gradient compression is also employed to overcome the potential communication bottlenecks. The achieved results suggest that the PPD-VQA could provide a practical solution for coordinating multiple quantum processors to handle large-scale real-word applications.
abstract_zh: 变分量子算法 (VQA) 已成为一种有前途的近期技术，可探索噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 设备上的实际量子优势。然而，由于与反向传播的不兼容以及大量测量的成本导致参数训练过程效率低下，给VQA的大规模发展带来了巨大的挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种参数并行分布式变分量子算法（PPD-VQA），通过使用多个量子处理器进行参数并行训练来加速训练过程。为了在现实噪声场景中保持PPD-VQA的高性能，提出了一种替代训练策略来缓解多个量子处理器之间噪声差异引起的加速衰减，这是分布式VQA不可避免的常见问题。此外，还采用梯度压缩来克服潜在的通信瓶颈。所取得的结果表明，PPD-VQA 可以为协调多个量子处理器来处理大规模实际应用提供实用的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数并行分布式变分量子算法（PPD-VQA），通过多量子处理器协同加速训练过程，解决大规模变分量子算法（VQA）的效率瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA因不兼容反向传播、测量成本高，导致训练效率低下，难以扩展至大规模应用，需解决分布式训练中的噪声差异与通信瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 采用多量子处理器参数并行训练，结合交替训练策略缓解噪声差异影响，并通过梯度压缩技术降低通信开销。
AI.result: 实验表明PPD-VQA能有效协调多量子处理器，实现大规模实际应用的高效训练，验证了方法的可行性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: PPD-VQA为分布式VQA提供了可扩展的解决方案，通过并行计算与优化策略，显著提升了在NISQ设备上的训练效率与稳定性。

authors_text: Yabo Chen,Yuchen Liu,Dongsheng Jiang,Xiaopeng Zhang,Wenrui Dai,Hongkai Xiong,Qi Tian
title: SdAE: Self-distillated Masked Autoencoder
title_zh: SdAE：自蒸馏掩码自动编码器
abstract: With the development of generative-based self-supervised learning (SSL) approaches like BeiT and MAE, how to learn good representations by masking random patches of the input image and reconstructing the missing information has grown in concern. However, BeiT and PeCo need a "pre-pretraining" stage to produce discrete codebooks for masked patches representing. MAE does not require a pre-training codebook process, but setting pixels as reconstruction targets may introduce an optimization gap between pre-training and downstream tasks that good reconstruction quality may not always lead to the high descriptive capability for the model. Considering the above issues, in this paper, we propose a simple Self-distillated masked AutoEncoder network, namely SdAE. SdAE consists of a student branch using an encoder-decoder structure to reconstruct the missing information, and a teacher branch producing latent representation of masked tokens. We also analyze how to build good views for the teacher branch to produce latent representation from the perspective of information bottleneck. After that, we propose a multi-fold masking strategy to provide multiple masked views with balanced information for boosting the performance, which can also reduce the computational complexity. Our approach generalizes well: with only 300 epochs pre-training, a vanilla ViT-Base model achieves an 84.1% fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1k classification, 48.6 mIOU on ADE20K segmentation, and 48.9 mAP on COCO detection, which surpasses other methods by a considerable margin. Code is available at https://github.com/AbrahamYabo/SdAE.
summary: With the development of generative-based self-supervised learning (SSL) approaches like BeiT and MAE, how to learn good representations by masking random patches of the input image and reconstructing the missing information has grown in concern. However, BeiT and PeCo need a "pre-pretraining" stage to produce discrete codebooks for masked patches representing. MAE does not require a pre-training codebook process, but setting pixels as reconstruction targets may introduce an optimization gap between pre-training and downstream tasks that good reconstruction quality may not always lead to the high descriptive capability for the model. Considering the above issues, in this paper, we propose a simple Self-distillated masked AutoEncoder network, namely SdAE. SdAE consists of a student branch using an encoder-decoder structure to reconstruct the missing information, and a teacher branch producing latent representation of masked tokens. We also analyze how to build good views for the teacher branch to produce latent representation from the perspective of information bottleneck. After that, we propose a multi-fold masking strategy to provide multiple masked views with balanced information for boosting the performance, which can also reduce the computational complexity. Our approach generalizes well: with only 300 epochs pre-training, a vanilla ViT-Base model achieves an 84.1% fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1k classification, 48.6 mIOU on ADE20K segmentation, and 48.9 mAP on COCO detection, which surpasses other methods by a considerable margin. Code is available at https://github.com/AbrahamYabo/SdAE.
abstract_zh: 随着 BeiT 和 MAE 等基于生成式自监督学习 (SSL) 方法的发展，如何通过屏蔽输入图像的随机块并重建缺失信息来学习良好的表示已经引起人们的关注。然而，BeiT 和 PeCo 需要一个“预预训练”阶段来生成用于表示屏蔽补丁的离散码本。 MAE 不需要预训练码本过程，但将像素设置为重建目标可能会在预训练和下游任务之间引入优化差距，良好的重建质量可能并不总能带来模型的高描述能力。考虑到上述问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的自蒸馏掩码自动编码器网络，即SdAE。 SdAE 由使用编码器-解码器结构来重建丢失信息的学生分支和生成掩码标记的潜在表示的教师分支组成。我们还从信息瓶颈的角度分析了如何为教师分支建立良好的视图以产生潜在表示。之后，我们提出了一种多重掩蔽策略，为多个掩蔽视图提供平衡信息，以提高性能，这也可以降低计算复杂度。我们的方法概括性很好：仅经过 300 epoch 的预训练，普通 ViT-Base 模型就在 ImageNet-1k 分类上实现了 84.1% 的微调精度，在 ADE20K 分割上实现了 48.6 mIOU，在 COCO 检测上实现了 48.9 mAP，远远超过了其他方法。代码可在 https://github.com/AbrahamYabo/SdAE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SdAE的自蒸馏掩码自编码器，用于改进基于生成的自监督学习方法中的图像表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如BeiT和MAE存在预训练代码本需求或预训练与下游任务间的优化差距问题，需设计无需代码本且能提升表示能力的模型。
AI.method: SdAE包含学生分支（编码器-解码器结构重建缺失信息）和教师分支（生成掩码标记的潜在表示），结合信息瓶颈理论构建教师分支视图，并提出多折掩码策略平衡信息与计算复杂度。
AI.result: 仅用300轮预训练，ViT-Base在ImageNet-1k分类达84.1%准确率，在ADE20K分割和COCO检测中分别达到48.6 mIOU和48.9 mAP，显著优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: SdAE通过自蒸馏与多折掩码策略有效提升表示学习效率，以更少训练轮次实现优于现有方法的性能，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Yijun Yang,Ruiyuan Gao,Qiang Xu
title: Out-of-Distribution Detection with Semantic Mismatch under Masking
title_zh: 掩码下语义不匹配的分布外检测
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/cure-lab/MOODCat
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/cure-lab/MOODCat
abstract: This paper proposes a novel out-of-distribution (OOD) detection framework named MoodCat for image classifiers. MoodCat masks a random portion of the input image and uses a generative model to synthesize the masked image to a new image conditioned on the classification result. It then calculates the semantic difference between the original image and the synthesized one for OOD detection. Compared to existing solutions, MoodCat naturally learns the semantic information of the in-distribution data with the proposed mask and conditional synthesis strategy, which is critical to identifying OODs. Experimental results demonstrate that MoodCat outperforms state-of-the-art OOD detection solutions by a large margin.
summary: This paper proposes a novel out-of-distribution (OOD) detection framework named MoodCat for image classifiers. MoodCat masks a random portion of the input image and uses a generative model to synthesize the masked image to a new image conditioned on the classification result. It then calculates the semantic difference between the original image and the synthesized one for OOD detection. Compared to existing solutions, MoodCat naturally learns the semantic information of the in-distribution data with the proposed mask and conditional synthesis strategy, which is critical to identifying OODs. Experimental results demonstrate that MoodCat outperforms state-of-the-art OOD detection solutions by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于图像分类器的新颖的分布外（OOD）检测框架，名为 MoodCat。 MoodCat 屏蔽输入图像的随机部分，并使用生成模型根据分类结果将屏蔽图像合成为新图像。然后，它计算原始图像和合成图像之间的语义差异以进行 OOD 检测。与现有解决方案相比，MoodCat 通过所提出的掩码和条件合成策略自然地学习分布数据的语义信息，这对于识别 OOD 至关重要。实验结果表明，MoodCat 的性能大幅优于最先进的 OOD 检测解决方案。

AI.tldr: 提出MoodCat框架，通过遮罩和生成模型合成图像来检测分布外数据
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法未能充分学习语义信息，导致检测效果受限，需通过遮罩与条件合成策略提升语义表征能力
AI.method: 随机遮罩输入图像并用生成模型基于分类结果合成新图像，通过计算原图与合成图的语义差异实现OOD检测
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进的OOD检测方法
AI.conclusion: MoodCat通过遮罩引导的语义学习策略有效提升OOD检测性能，为分布外检测提供新思路

authors_text: Siladittya Manna,Rakesh Dey,Souvik Chakraborty
title: BYOLMed3D: Self-Supervised Representation Learning of Medical Videos using Gradient Accumulation Assisted 3D BYOL Framework
title_zh: BYOLMed3D：使用梯度累积辅助 3D BYOL 框架进行医学视频的自监督表示学习
comment: The work requires revision. After verification it came to light, that the data presented in the paper is erroneous. The correct data will be updated after extensive experiments
comments: The work requires revision. After verification it came to light, that the data presented in the paper is erroneous. The correct data will be updated after extensive experiments
abstract: Applications on Medical Image Analysis suffer from acute shortage of large volume of data properly annotated by medical experts. Supervised Learning algorithms require a large volumes of balanced data to learn robust representations. Often supervised learning algorithms require various techniques to deal with imbalanced data. Self-supervised learning algorithms on the other hand are robust to imbalance in the data and are capable of learning robust representations. In this work, we train a 3D BYOL self-supervised model using gradient accumulation technique to deal with the large number of samples in a batch generally required in a self-supervised algorithm. To the best of our knowledge, this work is one of the first of its kind in this domain. We compare the results obtained through our experiments in the downstream task of ACL Tear Injury detection with the contemporary self-supervised pre-training methods and also with ResNet3D-18 initialized with the Kinetics-400 pre-trained weights. From the downstream task experiments, it is evident that the proposed framework outperforms the existing baselines.
summary: Applications on Medical Image Analysis suffer from acute shortage of large volume of data properly annotated by medical experts. Supervised Learning algorithms require a large volumes of balanced data to learn robust representations. Often supervised learning algorithms require various techniques to deal with imbalanced data. Self-supervised learning algorithms on the other hand are robust to imbalance in the data and are capable of learning robust representations. In this work, we train a 3D BYOL self-supervised model using gradient accumulation technique to deal with the large number of samples in a batch generally required in a self-supervised algorithm. To the best of our knowledge, this work is one of the first of its kind in this domain. We compare the results obtained through our experiments in the downstream task of ACL Tear Injury detection with the contemporary self-supervised pre-training methods and also with ResNet3D-18 initialized with the Kinetics-400 pre-trained weights. From the downstream task experiments, it is evident that the proposed framework outperforms the existing baselines.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分析应用严重缺乏由医学专家正确注释的大量数据。监督学习算法需要大量平衡数据来学习稳健的表示。通常监督学习算法需要各种技术来处理不平衡数据。另一方面，自监督学习算法对于数据不平衡具有鲁棒性，并且能够学习鲁棒的表示。在这项工作中，我们使用梯度累积技术训练 3D BYOL 自监督模型，以处理自监督算法中通常需要的批量中的大量样本。据我们所知，这项工作是该领域的第一项此类工作。我们将在 ACL 撕裂伤检测下游任务中通过实验获得的结果与当代自监督预训练方法以及使用 Kinetics-400 预训练权重初始化的 ResNet3D-18 进行比较。从下游任务实验来看，很明显，所提出的框架优于现有基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度累积辅助的3D BYOL框架，用于医学视频的自监督表征学习，以解决医疗图像分析中数据标注不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分析面临专家标注数据不足且分布不均衡的挑战，传统监督学习依赖大量平衡数据，而自监督学习能有效应对数据不平衡问题。
AI.method: 采用3D BYOL自监督模型结合梯度累积技术，处理大规模批量样本，并在ACL撕裂损伤检测任务中与现有自监督方法及ResNet3D-18进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提框架在下游任务中的表现优于现有基线方法及Kinetics-400预训练的ResNet3D-18模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为医学视频的自监督学习提供了有效解决方案，尤其适用于标注数据有限的医疗场景。

authors_text: Christoph Treude
title: Taming Multi-Output Recommenders for Software Engineering
title_zh: 驯服软件工程的多输出推荐器
comment: Accepted for publication in the New Ideas and Emerging Results (NIER) track of the 37th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE 2022)
comments: Accepted for publication in the New Ideas and Emerging Results (NIER) track of the 37th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE 2022)
abstract: Recommender systems are a valuable tool for software engineers. For example, they can provide developers with a ranked list of files likely to contain a bug, or multiple auto-complete suggestions for a given method stub. However, the way these recommender systems interact with developers is often rudimentary -- a long list of recommendations only ranked by the model's confidence. In this vision paper, we lay out our research agenda for re-imagining how recommender systems for software engineering communicate their insights to developers. When issuing recommendations, our aim is to recommend diverse rather than redundant solutions and present them in ways that highlight their differences. We also want to allow for seamless and interactive navigation of suggestions while striving for holistic end-to-end evaluations. By doing so, we believe that recommender systems can play an even more important role in helping developers write better software.

In this vision paper, we lay out our research agenda for re-imagining how recommender systems for software engineering communicate their insights to developers. When issuing recommendations, our aim is to recommend diverse rather than redundant solutions and present them in ways that highlight their differences. We also want to allow for seamless and interactive navigation of suggestions while striving for holistic end-to-end evaluations. By doing so, we believe that recommender systems can play an even more important role in helping developers write better software.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统对于软件工程师来说是一个很有价值的工具。例如，它们可以为开发人员提供可能包含错误的文件的排名列表，或者针对给定方法存根的多个自动完成建议。然而，这些推荐系统与开发人员交互的方式通常很初级——一长串仅根据模型的置信度排名的推荐。在这篇愿景论文中，我们制定了研究议程，重新设想软件工程的推荐系统如何向开发人员传达他们的见解。在提出建议时，我们的目标是推荐多样化而非冗余的解决方案，并以突出差异的方式呈现它们。我们还希望允许无缝和交互式的建议导航，同时努力进行全面的端到端评估。通过这样做，我们相信推荐系统可以在帮助开发人员编写更好的软件方面发挥更重要的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在重新设计软件工程中的多输出推荐系统，使其能够以更有效的方式与开发者沟通，提供多样化且差异化的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统仅通过置信度排序提供冗余建议，缺乏交互性和多样性，难以满足开发者实际需求。
AI.method: 提出通过多样化推荐、差异性展示、交互式导航及端到端评估框架改进推荐系统的沟通方式。
AI.result: 明确了未来研究方向，即构建更符合开发者需求的推荐系统交互模式与评估标准。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的推荐系统可通过多样化与交互性设计，显著提升开发者编写软件的效率与质量。

When issuing recommendations, our aim is to recommend diverse rather than redundant solutions and present them in ways that highlight their differences. We also want to allow for seamless and interactive navigation of suggestions while striving for holistic end-to-end evaluations. By doing so, we believe that recommender systems can play an even more important role in helping developers write better software. 推荐系统对于软件工程师来说是一个很有价值的工具。例如，它们可以为开发人员提供可能包含错误的文件的排名列表，或者针对给定方法存根的多个自动完成建议。然而，这些推荐系统与开发人员交互的方式通常很初级——一长串仅根据模型的置信度排名的推荐。在这篇愿景论文中，我们制定了研究议程，重新设想软件工程的推荐系统如何向开发人员传达他们的见解。在提出建议时，我们的目标是推荐多样化而非冗余的解决方案，并以突出差异的方式呈现它们。我们还希望允许无缝和交互式的建议导航，同时努力进行全面的端到端评估。通过这样做，我们相信推荐系统可以在帮助开发人员编写更好的软件方面发挥更重要的作用。 本文旨在重新设计软件工程中的多输出推荐系统，使其能够以更有效的方式与开发者沟通，提供多样化且差异化的解决方案。 Christoph Treude cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Yinpeng Chen,Zhiyu Pan,Min Shi,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Weicai Zhong
title: Design What You Desire: Icon Generation from Orthogonal Application and Theme Labels
title_zh: 设计您想要的：从正交应用程序和主题标签生成图标
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have been trained to be professional artists able to create stunning artworks such as face generation and image style transfer. In this paper, we focus on a realistic business scenario: automated generation of customizable icons given desired mobile applications and theme styles. We first introduce a theme-application icon dataset, termed AppIcon, where each icon has two orthogonal theme and app labels. By investigating a strong baseline StyleGAN2, we observe mode collapse caused by the entanglement of the orthogonal labels. To solve this challenge, we propose IconGAN composed of a conditional generator and dual discriminators with orthogonal augmentations, and a contrastive feature disentanglement strategy is further designed to regularize the feature space of the two discriminators. Compared with other approaches, IconGAN indicates a superior advantage on the AppIcon benchmark. Further analysis also justifies the effectiveness of disentangling app and theme representations. Our project will be released at: https://github.com/architect-road/IconGAN.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have been trained to be professional artists able to create stunning artworks such as face generation and image style transfer. In this paper, we focus on a realistic business scenario: automated generation of customizable icons given desired mobile applications and theme styles. We first introduce a theme-application icon dataset, termed AppIcon, where each icon has two orthogonal theme and app labels. By investigating a strong baseline StyleGAN2, we observe mode collapse caused by the entanglement of the orthogonal labels. To solve this challenge, we propose IconGAN composed of a conditional generator and dual discriminators with orthogonal augmentations, and a contrastive feature disentanglement strategy is further designed to regularize the feature space of the two discriminators. Compared with other approaches, IconGAN indicates a superior advantage on the AppIcon benchmark. Further analysis also justifies the effectiveness of disentangling app and theme representations. Our project will be released at: https://github.com/architect-road/IconGAN.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）已被训练成为专业艺术家，能够创造出令人惊叹的艺术作品，例如面部生成和图像风格转换。在本文中，我们关注现实的业务场景：根据所需的移动应用程序和主题样式自动生成可定制的图标。我们首先介绍一个主题应用程序图标数据集，称为 AppIcon，其中每个图标都有两个正交的主题和应用程序标签。通过研究强基线 StyleGAN2，我们观察到由正交标签的纠缠引起的模式崩溃。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了由条件生成器和具有正交增强的双鉴别器组成的 IconGAN，并进一步设计了对比特征解缠结策略来正则化两个鉴别器的特征空间。与其他方法相比，IconGAN 在 AppIcon 基准测试中显示出卓越的优势。进一步的分析还证明了分离应用程序和主题表示的有效性。我们的项目将发布在：https://github.com/architect-road/IconGAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IconGAN模型，通过应用和主题标签生成可定制的移动应用图标。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN在处理正交标签（如应用类型和主题风格）时易出现模式崩溃，难以满足实际场景中图标生成的定制化需求。
AI.method: 构建包含应用-主题双标签的AppIcon数据集，设计包含条件生成器、双判别器及正交增强的IconGAN模型，并引入对比特征解耦策略优化特征空间。
AI.result: 在AppIcon基准测试中优于其他方法，实验验证了解耦应用与主题表征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: IconGAN通过解耦正交标签特征，有效解决了模式崩溃问题，实现了高质量定制图标生成。

authors_text: Xudong Xie,Ling Fu,Zhifei Zhang,Zhaowen Wang,Xiang Bai
title: Toward Understanding WordArt: Corner-Guided Transformer for Scene Text Recognition
title_zh: 理解艺术字：用于场景文本识别的角引导变压器
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022 as an oral paper. The dataset and codes are available at https://github.com/xdxie/WordArt
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022 as an oral paper. The dataset and codes are available at https://github.com/xdxie/WordArt
abstract: Artistic text recognition is an extremely challenging task with a wide range of applications. However, current scene text recognition methods mainly focus on irregular text while have not explored artistic text specifically. The challenges of artistic text recognition include the various appearance with special-designed fonts and effects, the complex connections and overlaps between characters, and the severe interference from background patterns. To alleviate these problems, we propose to recognize the artistic text at three levels. Firstly, corner points are applied to guide the extraction of local features inside characters, considering the robustness of corner structures to appearance and shape. In this way, the discreteness of the corner points cuts off the connection between characters, and the sparsity of them improves the robustness for background interference. Secondly, we design a character contrastive loss to model the character-level feature, improving the feature representation for character classification. Thirdly, we utilize Transformer to learn the global feature on image-level and model the global relationship of the corner points, with the assistance of a corner-query cross-attention mechanism. Besides, we provide an artistic text dataset to benchmark the performance. Experimental results verify the significant superiority of our proposed method on artistic text recognition and also achieve state-of-the-art performance on several blurred and perspective datasets.
summary: Artistic text recognition is an extremely challenging task with a wide range of applications. However, current scene text recognition methods mainly focus on irregular text while have not explored artistic text specifically. The challenges of artistic text recognition include the various appearance with special-designed fonts and effects, the complex connections and overlaps between characters, and the severe interference from background patterns. To alleviate these problems, we propose to recognize the artistic text at three levels. Firstly, corner points are applied to guide the extraction of local features inside characters, considering the robustness of corner structures to appearance and shape. In this way, the discreteness of the corner points cuts off the connection between characters, and the sparsity of them improves the robustness for background interference. Secondly, we design a character contrastive loss to model the character-level feature, improving the feature representation for character classification. Thirdly, we utilize Transformer to learn the global feature on image-level and model the global relationship of the corner points, with the assistance of a corner-query cross-attention mechanism. Besides, we provide an artistic text dataset to benchmark the performance. Experimental results verify the significant superiority of our proposed method on artistic text recognition and also achieve state-of-the-art performance on several blurred and perspective datasets.
abstract_zh: 艺术文本识别是一项极具挑战性的任务，具有广泛的应用范围。然而，目前的场景文本识别方法主要针对不规则文本，而没有专门探索艺术文本。艺术文本识别的挑战包括特殊设计的字体和效果的各种外观、字符之间复杂的连接和重叠以及背景图案的严重干扰。为了缓解这些问题，我们建议在三个层面上识别艺术文本。首先，考虑角点结构对外观和形状的鲁棒性，应用角点来指导字符内部局部特征的提取。这样，角点的离散性切断了字符之间的联系，角点的稀疏性提高了对背景干扰的鲁棒性。其次，我们设计了字符对比损失来对字符级特征进行建模，改进了字符分类的特征表示。第三，我们利用 Transformer 学习图像级别的全局特征，并在角点查询交叉注意机制的帮助下对角点的全局关系进行建模。此外，我们还提供了艺术文本数据集来衡量性能。实验结果验证了我们提出的方法在艺术文本识别方面的显着优越性，并且在几个模糊和透视数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于角点引导的Transformer模型，用于解决艺术字场景文本识别中的复杂挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有场景文本识别方法主要针对不规则文本，未专门研究艺术字识别，而艺术字存在字体设计复杂、字符重叠及背景干扰等难题。
AI.method: 通过角点提取局部特征、设计字符对比损失函数、结合Transformer全局建模与角点查询交叉注意力机制，分三级解决艺术字识别问题。
AI.result: 在艺术字数据集及模糊/透视数据集上均达到最先进性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 角点引导的多级特征融合方法有效解决了艺术字识别的挑战，为相关研究提供了新思路和基准数据集。

authors_text: Jiutao Yue,Haofeng Li,Pengxu Wei,Guanbin Li,Liang Lin
title: Robust Real-World Image Super-Resolution against Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 针对对抗性攻击的鲁棒现实世界图像超分辨率
abstract: Recently deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved significant success in real-world image super-resolution (SR). However, adversarial image samples with quasi-imperceptible noises could threaten deep learning SR models. In this paper, we propose a robust deep learning framework for real-world SR that randomly erases potential adversarial noises in the frequency domain of input images or features. The rationale is that on the SR task clean images or features have a different pattern from the attacked ones in the frequency domain. Observing that existing adversarial attacks usually add high-frequency noises to input images, we introduce a novel random frequency mask module that blocks out high-frequency components possibly containing the harmful perturbations in a stochastic manner. Since the frequency masking may not only destroys the adversarial perturbations but also affects the sharp details in a clean image, we further develop an adversarial sample classifier based on the frequency domain of images to determine if applying the proposed mask module. Based on the above ideas, we devise a novel real-world image SR framework that combines the proposed frequency mask modules and the proposed adversarial classifier with an existing super-resolution backbone network. Experiments show that our proposed method is more insensitive to adversarial attacks and presents more stable SR results than existing models and defenses.
summary: Recently deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved significant success in real-world image super-resolution (SR). However, adversarial image samples with quasi-imperceptible noises could threaten deep learning SR models. In this paper, we propose a robust deep learning framework for real-world SR that randomly erases potential adversarial noises in the frequency domain of input images or features. The rationale is that on the SR task clean images or features have a different pattern from the attacked ones in the frequency domain. Observing that existing adversarial attacks usually add high-frequency noises to input images, we introduce a novel random frequency mask module that blocks out high-frequency components possibly containing the harmful perturbations in a stochastic manner. Since the frequency masking may not only destroys the adversarial perturbations but also affects the sharp details in a clean image, we further develop an adversarial sample classifier based on the frequency domain of images to determine if applying the proposed mask module. Based on the above ideas, we devise a novel real-world image SR framework that combines the proposed frequency mask modules and the proposed adversarial classifier with an existing super-resolution backbone network. Experiments show that our proposed method is more insensitive to adversarial attacks and presents more stable SR results than existing models and defenses.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度神经网络（DNN）在现实世界图像超分辨率（SR）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，具有几乎不可察觉的噪声的对抗性图像样本可能会威胁深度学习 SR 模型。在本文中，我们为现实世界的 SR 提出了一个强大的深度学习框架，它可以随机消除输入图像或特征频域中潜在的对抗性噪声。其基本原理是，在 SR 任务中，干净的图像或特征在频域中与受攻击的图像或特征具有不同的模式。观察到现有的对抗性攻击通常会在输入图像中添加高频噪声，我们引入了一种新颖的随机频率掩模模块，该模块以随机方式阻挡可能包含有害扰动的高频分量。由于频率掩蔽可能不仅会破坏对抗性扰动，还会影响干净图像中的锐利细节，因此我们进一步开发了基于图像频域的对抗性样本分类器，以确定是否应用所提出的掩模模块。基于上述想法，我们设计了一种新颖的现实世界图像 SR 框架，它将所提出的频率掩模模块和所提出的对抗性分类器与现有的超分辨率主干网络相结合。实验表明，我们提出的方法对对抗性攻击更加不敏感，并且比现有模型和防御提供更稳定的 SR 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对真实世界图像超分辨率任务的鲁棒框架，通过频率域处理抵御对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习超分辨率模型易受添加微小噪声的对抗样本攻击，需设计有效防御机制以保障模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入随机频率掩码模块阻断高频对抗扰动，并结合频率域分类器判断是否应用掩码，与传统超分网络融合构建防御框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在对抗攻击下表现更稳定，超分结果优于现有模型及防御方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过频率域分析与动态掩码机制，实现了在保持图像细节的同时有效抵御对抗攻击的超分辨率处理方案。

search_text: Robust Real-World Image Super-Resolution against Adversarial Attacks 针对对抗性攻击的鲁棒现实世界图像超分辨率 Recently deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved significant success in real-world image super-resolution (SR). However, adversarial image samples with quasi-imperceptible noises could threaten deep learning SR models. In this paper, we propose a robust deep learning framework for real-world SR that randomly erases potential adversarial noises in the frequency domain of input images or features. The rationale is that on the SR task clean images or features have a different pattern from the attacked ones in the frequency domain. Observing that existing adversarial attacks usually add high-frequency noises to input images, we introduce a novel random frequency mask module that blocks out high-frequency components possibly containing the harmful perturbations in a stochastic manner. Since the frequency masking may not only destroys the adversarial perturbations but also affects the sharp details in a clean image, we further develop an adversarial sample classifier based on the frequency domain of images to determine if applying the proposed mask module. Based on the above ideas, we devise a novel real-world image SR framework that combines the proposed frequency mask modules and the proposed adversarial classifier with an existing super-resolution backbone network. Experiments show that our proposed method is more insensitive to adversarial attacks and presents more stable SR results than existing models and defenses. 最近，深度神经网络（DNN）在现实世界图像超分辨率（SR）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，具有几乎不可察觉的噪声的对抗性图像样本可能会威胁深度学习 SR 模型。在本文中，我们为现实世界的 SR 提出了一个强大的深度学习框架，它可以随机消除输入图像或特征频域中潜在的对抗性噪声。其基本原理是，在 SR 任务中，干净的图像或特征在频域中与受攻击的图像或特征具有不同的模式。观察到现有的对抗性攻击通常会在输入图像中添加高频噪声，我们引入了一种新颖的随机频率掩模模块，该模块以随机方式阻挡可能包含有害扰动的高频分量。由于频率掩蔽可能不仅会破坏对抗性扰动，还会影响干净图像中的锐利细节，因此我们进一步开发了基于图像频域的对抗性样本分类器，以确定是否应用所提出的掩模模块。基于上述想法，我们设计了一种新颖的现实世界图像 SR 框架，它将所提出的频率掩模模块和所提出的对抗性分类器与现有的超分辨率主干网络相结合。实验表明，我们提出的方法对对抗性攻击更加不敏感，并且比现有模型和防御提供更稳定的 SR 结果。 本文提出一种针对真实世界图像超分辨率任务的鲁棒框架，通过频率域处理抵御对抗攻击。 Jiutao Yue,Haofeng Li,Pengxu Wei,Guanbin Li,Liang Lin cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Guangyao Zhai,Yu Zheng,Ziwei Xu,Xin Kong,Yong Liu,Benjamin Busam,Yi Ren,Nassir Navab,Zhengyou Zhang
title: DA$^2$ Dataset: Toward Dexterity-Aware Dual-Arm Grasping
title_zh: DA$^2$ 数据集：迈向敏捷感知双臂抓取
abstract: In this paper, we introduce DA$^2$, the first large-scale dual-arm dexterity-aware dataset for the generation of optimal bimanual grasping pairs for arbitrary large objects. The dataset contains about 9M pairs of parallel-jaw grasps, generated from more than 6000 objects and each labeled with various grasp dexterity measures. In addition, we propose an end-to-end dual-arm grasp evaluation model trained on the rendered scenes from this dataset. We utilize the evaluation model as our baseline to show the value of this novel and nontrivial dataset by both online analysis and real robot experiments. All data and related code will be open-sourced at https://sites.google.com/view/da2dataset.
summary: In this paper, we introduce DA$^2$, the first large-scale dual-arm dexterity-aware dataset for the generation of optimal bimanual grasping pairs for arbitrary large objects. The dataset contains about 9M pairs of parallel-jaw grasps, generated from more than 6000 objects and each labeled with various grasp dexterity measures. In addition, we propose an end-to-end dual-arm grasp evaluation model trained on the rendered scenes from this dataset. We utilize the evaluation model as our baseline to show the value of this novel and nontrivial dataset by both online analysis and real robot experiments. All data and related code will be open-sourced at https://sites.google.com/view/da2dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 DA$^2$，这是第一个大规模双臂灵活性感知数据集，用于为任意大型物体生成最佳双手抓取对。该数据集包含约 900 万对平行下颌抓取，由 6000 多个物体生成，每个抓取都标有各种抓取灵巧度测量值。此外，我们提出了一种端到端双臂抓取评估模型，该模型是在该数据集中的渲染场景上进行训练的。我们利用评估模型作为基线，通过在线分析和真实的机器人实验来展示这个新颖且重要的数据集的价值。所有数据和相关代码都将在 https://sites.google.com/view/da2dataset 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DA$^2$数据集，旨在为任意大型物体生成最优双臂抓取对，并开发端到端评估模型验证数据集价值。
AI.motivation: 现有双臂抓取研究缺乏大规模标注灵巧度指标的数据集，限制了算法性能评估与优化。
AI.method: 构建包含900万抓取对的大规模数据集，标注多维度灵巧度指标；基于渲染场景训练端到端评估模型作为基线。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于该数据集的模型在在线分析和真实机器人测试中均优于现有方法，验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DA$^2$数据集为双臂灵巧抓取研究提供了关键基准，推动了相关算法的发展与实际应用。

authors_text: Semen Budennyy,Vladimir Lazarev,Nikita Zakharenko,Alexey Korovin,Olga Plosskaya,Denis Dimitrov,Vladimir Arkhipkin,Ivan Oseledets,Ivan Barsola,Ilya Egorov,Aleksandra Kosterina,Leonid Zhukov
title: Eco2AI: carbon emissions tracking of machine learning models as the first step towards sustainable AI
title_zh: Eco2AI：机器学习模型的碳排放跟踪是迈向可持续人工智能的第一步
comment: Source code for eco2AI package (energy consumption and carbon emission tracker of code in python) is available at: https://github.com/sb-ai-lab/Eco2AI , the package is also available at PyPi: https://pypi.org/project/eco2ai/
comments: Source code for eco2AI package (energy consumption and carbon emission tracker of code in python) is available at: https://github.com/sb-ai-lab/Eco2AI , the package is also available at PyPi: https://pypi.org/project/eco2ai/
abstract: The size and complexity of deep neural networks continue to grow exponentially, significantly increasing energy consumption for training and inference by these models. We introduce an open-source package eco2AI to help data scientists and researchers to track energy consumption and equivalent CO2 emissions of their models in a straightforward way. In eco2AI we put emphasis on accuracy of energy consumption tracking and correct regional CO2 emissions accounting. We encourage research community to search for new optimal Artificial Intelligence (AI) architectures with a lower computational cost. The motivation also comes from the concept of AI-based green house gases sequestrating cycle with both Sustainable AI and Green AI pathways.
summary: The size and complexity of deep neural networks continue to grow exponentially, significantly increasing energy consumption for training and inference by these models. We introduce an open-source package eco2AI to help data scientists and researchers to track energy consumption and equivalent CO2 emissions of their models in a straightforward way. In eco2AI we put emphasis on accuracy of energy consumption tracking and correct regional CO2 emissions accounting. We encourage research community to search for new optimal Artificial Intelligence (AI) architectures with a lower computational cost. The motivation also comes from the concept of AI-based green house gases sequestrating cycle with both Sustainable AI and Green AI pathways.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的规模和复杂性继续呈指数级增长，显着增加了这些模型训练和推理的能耗。我们推出了一个开源包 eco2AI，以帮助数据科学家和研究人员以简单的方式跟踪其模型的能源消耗和等效二氧化碳排放量。在eco2AI中，我们强调能源消耗跟踪的准确性和正确的区域二氧化碳排放核算。我们鼓励研究界寻找计算成本更低的新的最佳人工智能（AI）架构。其动机还来自基于人工智能的温室气体封存循环概念，具有可持续人工智能和绿色人工智能途径。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个开源工具包eco2AI，用于跟踪机器学习模型的能耗及等效CO2排放，推动可持续AI发展。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的规模和复杂度迅速增长导致能耗显著增加，需通过追踪碳排放促进低计算成本AI架构研究，并结合可持续AI与绿色AI路径减少环境影响。
AI.method: 构建开源工具包eco2AI，注重能耗跟踪准确性与区域CO2排放核算，提供模型碳足迹分析功能。
AI.result: 实现模型碳排放追踪工具，鼓励研究社区探索高效AI架构，为可持续AI提供量化评估基础。
AI.conclusion: eco2AI为AI碳排放评估提供实用工具，推动行业向节能高效方向发展，是实现可持续AI的关键第一步。

search_text: Eco2AI: carbon emissions tracking of machine learning models as the first step towards sustainable AI Eco2AI：机器学习模型的碳排放跟踪是迈向可持续人工智能的第一步 The size and complexity of deep neural networks continue to grow exponentially, significantly increasing energy consumption for training and inference by these models. We introduce an open-source package eco2AI to help data scientists and researchers to track energy consumption and equivalent CO2 emissions of their models in a straightforward way. In eco2AI we put emphasis on accuracy of energy consumption tracking and correct regional CO2 emissions accounting. We encourage research community to search for new optimal Artificial Intelligence (AI) architectures with a lower computational cost. The motivation also comes from the concept of AI-based green house gases sequestrating cycle with both Sustainable AI and Green AI pathways. 深度神经网络的规模和复杂性继续呈指数级增长，显着增加了这些模型训练和推理的能耗。我们推出了一个开源包 eco2AI，以帮助数据科学家和研究人员以简单的方式跟踪其模型的能源消耗和等效二氧化碳排放量。在eco2AI中，我们强调能源消耗跟踪的准确性和正确的区域二氧化碳排放核算。我们鼓励研究界寻找计算成本更低的新的最佳人工智能（AI）架构。其动机还来自基于人工智能的温室气体封存循环概念，具有可持续人工智能和绿色人工智能途径。 本文开发了一个开源工具包eco2AI，用于跟踪机器学习模型的能耗及等效CO2排放，推动可持续AI发展。 Semen Budennyy,Vladimir Lazarev,Nikita Zakharenko,Alexey Korovin,Olga Plosskaya,Denis Dimitrov,Vladimir Arkhipkin,Ivan Oseledets,Ivan Barsola,Ilya Egorov,Aleksandra Kosterina,Leonid Zhukov cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CE,cs.CY

authors_text: Rüdiger Göbl,Christoph Hennersperger,Nassir Navab
title: Speckle2Speckle: Unsupervised Learning of Ultrasound Speckle Filtering Without Clean Data
title_zh: Speckle2Speckle：无需干净数据的超声散斑过滤的无监督学习
abstract: In ultrasound imaging the appearance of homogeneous regions of tissue is subject to speckle, which for certain applications can make the detection of tissue irregularities difficult. To cope with this, it is common practice to apply speckle reduction filters to the images. Most conventional filtering techniques are fairly hand-crafted and often need to be finely tuned to the present hardware, imaging scheme and application. Learning based techniques on the other hand suffer from the need for a target image for training (in case of fully supervised techniques) or require narrow, complex physics-based models of the speckle appearance that might not apply in all cases. With this work we propose a deep-learning based method for speckle removal without these limitations. To enable this, we make use of realistic ultrasound simulation techniques that allow for instantiation of several independent speckle realizations that represent the exact same tissue, thus allowing for the application of image reconstruction techniques that work with pairs of differently corrupted data. Compared to two other state-of-the-art approaches (non-local means and the Optimized Bayesian non-local means filter) our method performs favorably in qualitative comparisons and quantitative evaluation, despite being trained on simulations alone, and is several orders of magnitude faster.
summary: In ultrasound imaging the appearance of homogeneous regions of tissue is subject to speckle, which for certain applications can make the detection of tissue irregularities difficult. To cope with this, it is common practice to apply speckle reduction filters to the images. Most conventional filtering techniques are fairly hand-crafted and often need to be finely tuned to the present hardware, imaging scheme and application. Learning based techniques on the other hand suffer from the need for a target image for training (in case of fully supervised techniques) or require narrow, complex physics-based models of the speckle appearance that might not apply in all cases. With this work we propose a deep-learning based method for speckle removal without these limitations. To enable this, we make use of realistic ultrasound simulation techniques that allow for instantiation of several independent speckle realizations that represent the exact same tissue, thus allowing for the application of image reconstruction techniques that work with pairs of differently corrupted data. Compared to two other state-of-the-art approaches (non-local means and the Optimized Bayesian non-local means filter) our method performs favorably in qualitative comparisons and quantitative evaluation, despite being trained on simulations alone, and is several orders of magnitude faster.
abstract_zh: 在超声成像中，组织均匀区域的外观容易受到散斑的影响，这对于某些应用来说会使组织不规则性的检测变得困难。为了解决这个问题，通常的做法是对图像应用散斑减少滤波器。大多数传统的滤波技术都是相当手工制作的，并且通常需要根据当前的硬件、成像方案和应用进行微调。另一方面，基于学习的技术需要训练目标图像（在完全监督技术的情况下），或者需要狭窄、复杂的基于物理的散斑外观模型，而这些模型可能并不适用于所有情况。通过这项工作，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的去斑方法，没有这些限制。为了实现这一点，我们利用真实的超声模拟技术，允许实例化代表完全相同组织的几个独立散斑实现，从而允许应用处理成对不同损坏数据的图像重建技术。与其他两种最先进的方法（非局部均值和优化贝叶斯非局部均值过滤器）相比，尽管仅进行了模拟训练，但我们的方法在定性比较和定量评估方面表现良好，并且速度快了几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需干净数据的深度学习超声图像斑点过滤方法。
AI.motivation: 传统斑点过滤方法依赖手工设计且需硬件调优，监督学习方法需要目标图像或复杂物理模型，而实际中清洁数据难以获取。
AI.method: 利用真实超声仿真技术生成同一组织的多组独立斑点实现，通过成对不同退化数据训练图像重建模型。
AI.result: 在定性对比和定量评估中优于非局部均值等两种先进方法，且训练仅依赖仿真数据，速度提升多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需清洁数据的情况下实现了有效斑点去除，为超声图像处理提供了更高效灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Pratima Upretee,Bishesh Khanal
title: FixMatchSeg: Fixing FixMatch for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: FixMatchSeg：修复半监督语义分割的 FixMatch
abstract: Supervised deep learning methods for semantic medical image segmentation are getting increasingly popular in the past few years.However, in resource constrained settings, getting large number of annotated images is very difficult as it mostly requires experts, is expensive and time-consuming.Semi-supervised segmentation can be an attractive solution where a very few labeled images are used along with a large number of unlabeled ones. While the gap between supervised and semi-supervised methods have been dramatically reduced for classification problems in the past couple of years, there still remains a larger gap in segmentation methods. In this work, we adapt a state-of-the-art semi-supervised classification method FixMatch to semantic segmentation task, introducing FixMatchSeg. FixMatchSeg is evaluated in four different publicly available datasets of different anatomy and different modality: cardiac ultrasound, chest X-ray, retinal fundus image, and skin images. When there are few labels, we show that FixMatchSeg performs on par with strong supervised baselines.
summary: Supervised deep learning methods for semantic medical image segmentation are getting increasingly popular in the past few years.However, in resource constrained settings, getting large number of annotated images is very difficult as it mostly requires experts, is expensive and time-consuming.Semi-supervised segmentation can be an attractive solution where a very few labeled images are used along with a large number of unlabeled ones. While the gap between supervised and semi-supervised methods have been dramatically reduced for classification problems in the past couple of years, there still remains a larger gap in segmentation methods. In this work, we adapt a state-of-the-art semi-supervised classification method FixMatch to semantic segmentation task, introducing FixMatchSeg. FixMatchSeg is evaluated in four different publicly available datasets of different anatomy and different modality: cardiac ultrasound, chest X-ray, retinal fundus image, and skin images. When there are few labels, we show that FixMatchSeg performs on par with strong supervised baselines.
abstract_zh: 用于语义医学图像分割的监督深度学习方法在过去几年中越来越流行。然而，在资源有限的环境中，获取大量带注释的图像非常困难，因为它主要需要专家，既昂贵又耗时。半监督分割可能是一种有吸引力的解决方案，其中使用很少的标记图像和大量未标记图像。尽管在过去几年中，监督方法和半监督方法之间的差距在分类问题上已经大大缩小，但分割方法仍然存在较大差距。在这项工作中，我们将最先进的半监督分类方法 FixMatch 应用于语义分割任务，引入了 FixMatchSeg。 FixMatchSeg 在不同解剖结构和不同模态的四个不同公开数据集中进行评估：心脏超声、胸部 X 光、视网膜眼底图像和皮肤图像。当标签很少时，我们表明 FixMatchSeg 的性能与强监督基线相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FixMatchSeg方法，将半监督分类算法FixMatch应用于医学图像语义分割任务，以解决标注数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割需要大量标注数据，但获取成本高且耗时。现有半监督分割方法与监督方法的性能差距较大，需改进半监督策略以提升效果。
AI.method: 基于FixMatch框架，设计适用于分割任务的FixMatchSeg方法，在心脏超声、胸部X光等四个公开数据集上进行验证，利用少量标注数据和大量未标注数据训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，当标注数据极少时，FixMatchSeg性能可与强监督基线方法媲美，在不同解剖结构和成像模态数据集上均表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: FixMatchSeg有效缩小了半监督分割与监督分割的性能差距，为医学图像分割提供了可行的低标注数据解决方案。

authors_text: Damai Dai,Wenbin Jiang,Qingxiu Dong,Yajuan Lyu,Qiaoqiao She,Zhifang Sui
title: Neural Knowledge Bank for Pretrained Transformers
title_zh: 预训练 Transformer 的神经知识库
abstract: The ability of pretrained Transformers to remember factual knowledge is essential but still limited for existing models. Inspired by existing work that regards Feed-Forward Networks (FFNs) in Transformers as key-value memories, we design a Neural Knowledge Bank (NKB) and a knowledge injection strategy to introduce extra factual knowledge for pretrained Transformers. The NKB is in the form of additional knowledgeable memory slots to the FFN and the memory-like architecture makes it highly interpretable and flexible. When injecting extra knowledge with the Salient Span Masking (SSM) pretraining objective, we fix the original pretrained model and train only the NKB. This training strategy makes sure the general language modeling ability of the original pretrained model is not influenced. By mounting the NKB onto the T5 model, we verify its strong ability to store extra factual knowledge based on three closed-book question answering datasets. Also, we prove that mounting the NKB will not degrade the general language modeling ability of T5 through two representative tasks, summarization and machine translation. Further, we thoroughly analyze the interpretability of the NKB and reveal the meaning of its keys and values in a human-readable way. Finally, we show the flexibility of the NKB by directly modifying its value vectors to update the factual knowledge stored in it.
summary: The ability of pretrained Transformers to remember factual knowledge is essential but still limited for existing models. Inspired by existing work that regards Feed-Forward Networks (FFNs) in Transformers as key-value memories, we design a Neural Knowledge Bank (NKB) and a knowledge injection strategy to introduce extra factual knowledge for pretrained Transformers. The NKB is in the form of additional knowledgeable memory slots to the FFN and the memory-like architecture makes it highly interpretable and flexible. When injecting extra knowledge with the Salient Span Masking (SSM) pretraining objective, we fix the original pretrained model and train only the NKB. This training strategy makes sure the general language modeling ability of the original pretrained model is not influenced. By mounting the NKB onto the T5 model, we verify its strong ability to store extra factual knowledge based on three closed-book question answering datasets. Also, we prove that mounting the NKB will not degrade the general language modeling ability of T5 through two representative tasks, summarization and machine translation. Further, we thoroughly analyze the interpretability of the NKB and reveal the meaning of its keys and values in a human-readable way. Finally, we show the flexibility of the NKB by directly modifying its value vectors to update the factual knowledge stored in it.
abstract_zh: 经过预训练的 Transformer 记住事实知识的能力至关重要，但对于现有模型来说仍然有限。受到将 Transformer 中的前馈网络（FFN）视为键值记忆的现有工作的启发，我们设计了神经知识库（NKB）和知识注入策略，为预训练的 Transformer 引入额外的事实知识。 NKB 是 FFN 的附加知识内存插槽的形式，类似内存的架构使其具有高度可解释性和灵活性。当通过显着跨度掩蔽（SSM）预训练目标注入额外的知识时，我们修复了原始的预训练模型并仅训练 NKB。这种训练策略保证了原始预训练模型的通用语言建模能力不受影响。通过将NKB安装到T5模型上，我们基于三个闭卷问答数据集验证了其存储额外事实知识的强大能力。此外，我们通过摘要和机器翻译这两个代表性任务证明安装 NKB 不会降低 T5 的通用语言建模能力。此外，我们彻底分析了 NKB 的可解释性，并以人类可读的方式揭示了其键和值的含义。最后，我们通过直接修改其值向量来更新存储在其中的事实知识来展示 NKB 的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种神经知识库（NKB）和知识注入策略，以增强预训练Transformer模型的事实知识存储能力，同时保持其通用语言建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练Transformer模型在记忆事实知识方面存在局限，需引入额外结构以提升知识存储能力而不影响原有语言建模性能。
AI.method: 通过将FFN视为记忆槽设计NKB，结合Salient Span Masking预训练目标进行知识注入，仅训练NKB模块以避免影响原模型。
AI.result: 在T5模型上验证了NKB在三个封闭问答数据集中的有效性，且未影响摘要与翻译任务表现，同时证明了NKB的可解释性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: NKB能有效增强模型事实知识存储能力，保持原有语言能力，并具备可解释性和动态更新特性。

search_text: Neural Knowledge Bank for Pretrained Transformers 预训练 Transformer 的神经知识库 The ability of pretrained Transformers to remember factual knowledge is essential but still limited for existing models. Inspired by existing work that regards Feed-Forward Networks (FFNs) in Transformers as key-value memories, we design a Neural Knowledge Bank (NKB) and a knowledge injection strategy to introduce extra factual knowledge for pretrained Transformers. The NKB is in the form of additional knowledgeable memory slots to the FFN and the memory-like architecture makes it highly interpretable and flexible. When injecting extra knowledge with the Salient Span Masking (SSM) pretraining objective, we fix the original pretrained model and train only the NKB. This training strategy makes sure the general language modeling ability of the original pretrained model is not influenced. By mounting the NKB onto the T5 model, we verify its strong ability to store extra factual knowledge based on three closed-book question answering datasets. Also, we prove that mounting the NKB will not degrade the general language modeling ability of T5 through two representative tasks, summarization and machine translation. Further, we thoroughly analyze the interpretability of the NKB and reveal the meaning of its keys and values in a human-readable way. Finally, we show the flexibility of the NKB by directly modifying its value vectors to update the factual knowledge stored in it. 经过预训练的 Transformer 记住事实知识的能力至关重要，但对于现有模型来说仍然有限。受到将 Transformer 中的前馈网络（FFN）视为键值记忆的现有工作的启发，我们设计了神经知识库（NKB）和知识注入策略，为预训练的 Transformer 引入额外的事实知识。 NKB 是 FFN 的附加知识内存插槽的形式，类似内存的架构使其具有高度可解释性和灵活性。当通过显着跨度掩蔽（SSM）预训练目标注入额外的知识时，我们修复了原始的预训练模型并仅训练 NKB。这种训练策略保证了原始预训练模型的通用语言建模能力不受影响。通过将NKB安装到T5模型上，我们基于三个闭卷问答数据集验证了其存储额外事实知识的强大能力。此外，我们通过摘要和机器翻译这两个代表性任务证明安装 NKB 不会降低 T5 的通用语言建模能力。此外，我们彻底分析了 NKB 的可解释性，并以人类可读的方式揭示了其键和值的含义。最后，我们通过直接修改其值向量来更新存储在其中的事实知识来展示 NKB 的灵活性。 本文设计了一种神经知识库（NKB）和知识注入策略，以增强预训练Transformer模型的事实知识存储能力，同时保持其通用语言建模能力。 Damai Dai,Wenbin Jiang,Qingxiu Dong,Yajuan Lyu,Qiaoqiao She,Zhifang Sui cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Changqing Xu,Yijian Pei,Zili Wu,Yi Liu,Yintang Yang
title: Ultra-low Latency Adaptive Local Binary Spiking Neural Network with Accuracy Loss Estimator
title_zh: 具有精度损失估计器的超低延迟自适应局部二元尖峰神经网络
abstract: Spiking neural network (SNN) is a brain-inspired model which has more spatio-temporal information processing capacity and computational energy efficiency. However, with the increasing depth of SNNs, the memory problem caused by the weights of SNNs has gradually attracted attention. Inspired by Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) quantization technology, binarized SNN (BSNN) is introduced to solve the memory problem. Due to the lack of suitable learning algorithms, BSNN is usually obtained by ANN-to-SNN conversion, whose accuracy will be limited by the trained ANNs. In this paper, we propose an ultra-low latency adaptive local binary spiking neural network (ALBSNN) with accuracy loss estimators, which dynamically selects the network layers to be binarized to ensure the accuracy of the network by evaluating the error caused by the binarized weights during the network learning process. Experimental results show that this method can reduce storage space by more than 20 % without losing network accuracy. At the same time, in order to accelerate the training speed of the network, the global average pooling(GAP) layer is introduced to replace the fully connected layers by the combination of convolution and pooling, so that SNNs can use a small number of time steps to obtain better recognition accuracy. In the extreme case of using only one time step, we still can achieve 92.92 %, 91.63 % ,and 63.54 % testing accuracy on three different datasets, FashionMNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, respectively.
summary: Spiking neural network (SNN) is a brain-inspired model which has more spatio-temporal information processing capacity and computational energy efficiency. However, with the increasing depth of SNNs, the memory problem caused by the weights of SNNs has gradually attracted attention. Inspired by Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) quantization technology, binarized SNN (BSNN) is introduced to solve the memory problem. Due to the lack of suitable learning algorithms, BSNN is usually obtained by ANN-to-SNN conversion, whose accuracy will be limited by the trained ANNs. In this paper, we propose an ultra-low latency adaptive local binary spiking neural network (ALBSNN) with accuracy loss estimators, which dynamically selects the network layers to be binarized to ensure the accuracy of the network by evaluating the error caused by the binarized weights during the network learning process. Experimental results show that this method can reduce storage space by more than 20 % without losing network accuracy. At the same time, in order to accelerate the training speed of the network, the global average pooling(GAP) layer is introduced to replace the fully connected layers by the combination of convolution and pooling, so that SNNs can use a small number of time steps to obtain better recognition accuracy. In the extreme case of using only one time step, we still can achieve 92.92 %, 91.63 % ,and 63.54 % testing accuracy on three different datasets, FashionMNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, respectively.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）是一种具有更强的时空信息处理能力和计算能源效率的类脑模型。然而，随着SNN深度的增加，SNN权值引起的记忆问题逐渐引起人们的关注。受人工神经网络（ANN）量化技术的启发，引入二值化SNN（BSNN）来解决内存问题。由于缺乏合适的学习算法，BSNN通常是通过ANN到SNN的转换获得的，其精度会受到训练后的ANN的限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有精度损失估计器的超低延迟自适应局部二值尖峰神经网络（ALBSNN），它通过评估网络学习过程中二值化权重引起的误差，动态选择要二值化的网络层，以确保网络的准确性。实验结果表明，该方法在不损失网络精度的情况下，可以减少20%以上的存储空间。同时，为了加快网络的训练速度，引入全局平均池化（GAP）层，以卷积和池化相结合的方式替代全连接层，使得SNNs可以使用少量的时间步长来获得更好的识别精度。在仅使用一个时间步长的极端情况下，我们仍然可以在三个不同的数据集（FashionMNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100）上分别实现 92.92%、91.63% 和 63.54% 的测试精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有精度损失估计器的超低延迟自适应局部二值脉冲神经网络（ALBSNN），以解决深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）的内存问题并保持精度。
AI.motivation: 随着SNN深度增加，权重导致的内存问题日益突出，而现有二值化SNN（BSNN）依赖ANN转换，精度受限。需在降低内存的同时保持网络性能。
AI.method: 通过动态选择网络层进行二值化，并引入全局平均池化（GAP）层替代全连接层，结合卷积与池化操作，减少时间步数并提升训练速度。
AI.result: 在FashionMNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上，单时间步测试准确率分别达92.92%、91.63%和63.54%，内存占用减少超20%。
AI.conclusion: ALBSNN通过自适应二值化与GAP优化，在降低内存消耗的同时保持高精度，为实时SNN应用提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Haochen Liu,Zhiyu Huang,Chen Lv
title: STrajNet: Multi-modal Hierarchical Transformer for Occupancy Flow Field Prediction in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: STrajNet：用于自动驾驶中占用流场预测的多模态分层变压器
abstract: Forecasting the future states of surrounding traffic participants is a crucial capability for autonomous vehicles. The recently proposed occupancy flow field prediction introduces a scalable and effective representation to jointly predict surrounding agents' future motions in a scene. However, the challenging part is to model the underlying social interactions among traffic agents and the relations between occupancy and flow. Therefore, this paper proposes a novel Multi-modal Hierarchical Transformer network that fuses the vectorized (agent motion) and visual (scene flow, map, and occupancy) modalities and jointly predicts the flow and occupancy of the scene. Specifically, visual and vector features from sensory data are encoded through a multi-stage Transformer module and then a late-fusion Transformer module with temporal pixel-wise attention. Importantly, a flow-guided multi-head self-attention (FG-MSA) module is designed to better aggregate the information on occupancy and flow and model the mathematical relations between them. The proposed method is comprehensively validated on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset and compared against several state-of-the-art models. The results reveal that our model with much more compact architecture and data inputs than other methods can achieve comparable performance. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of incorporating vectorized agent motion features and the proposed FG-MSA module. Compared to the ablated model without the FG-MSA module, which won 2nd place in the 2022 Waymo Occupancy and Flow Prediction Challenge, the current model shows better separability for flow and occupancy and further performance improvements.
summary: Forecasting the future states of surrounding traffic participants is a crucial capability for autonomous vehicles. The recently proposed occupancy flow field prediction introduces a scalable and effective representation to jointly predict surrounding agents' future motions in a scene. However, the challenging part is to model the underlying social interactions among traffic agents and the relations between occupancy and flow. Therefore, this paper proposes a novel Multi-modal Hierarchical Transformer network that fuses the vectorized (agent motion) and visual (scene flow, map, and occupancy) modalities and jointly predicts the flow and occupancy of the scene. Specifically, visual and vector features from sensory data are encoded through a multi-stage Transformer module and then a late-fusion Transformer module with temporal pixel-wise attention. Importantly, a flow-guided multi-head self-attention (FG-MSA) module is designed to better aggregate the information on occupancy and flow and model the mathematical relations between them. The proposed method is comprehensively validated on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset and compared against several state-of-the-art models. The results reveal that our model with much more compact architecture and data inputs than other methods can achieve comparable performance. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of incorporating vectorized agent motion features and the proposed FG-MSA module. Compared to the ablated model without the FG-MSA module, which won 2nd place in the 2022 Waymo Occupancy and Flow Prediction Challenge, the current model shows better separability for flow and occupancy and further performance improvements.
abstract_zh: 预测周围交通参与者的未来状态是自动驾驶汽车的一项关键能力。最近提出的占用流场预测引入了可扩展且有效的表示来共同预测场景中周围代理的未来运动。然而，具有挑战性的部分是对交通代理之间的潜在社交互动以及占用率和流量之间的关系进行建模。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的多模态分层变压器网络，该网络融合了矢量化（代理运动）和视觉（场景流、地图和占用）模态，并联合预测场景的流和占用。具体来说，来自感官数据的视觉和矢量特征通过多级 Transformer 模块进行编码，然后通过具有时间像素级关注的后期融合 Transformer 模块进行编码。重要的是，流量引导的多头自注意力（FG-MSA）模块旨在更好地聚合有关占用和流量的信息，并对它们之间的数学关系进行建模。所提出的方法在 Waymo 开放运动数据集上进行了全面验证，并与几种最先进的模型进行了比较。结果表明，我们的模型具有比其他方法更紧凑的架构和数据输入，可以实现可比的性能。我们还证明了结合矢量化代理运动特征和所提出的 FG-MSA 模块的有效性。与在 2022 年 Waymo 占用和流量预测挑战赛中获得第二名的没有 FG-MSA 模块的消融模型相比，当前模型显示出更好的流量和占用率可分离性以及进一步的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STrajNet模型，通过多模态分层Transformer网络预测自动驾驶场景中的占用流场，解决交通参与者社会交互建模难题。
AI.motivation: 现有占用流场预测方法难以有效建模交通参与者间的社会交互关系及占用与流场的数学关联，影响预测精度。
AI.method: 设计多模态分层Transformer架构，融合向量化的代理运动特征与视觉场景流/地图信息，创新提出流引导多头自注意力（FG-MSA）模块建模占用-流关系。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上验证显示，该紧凑模型性能优于同类方法，且相比去除FG-MSA的2022挑战赛亚军模型，流场与占用预测分离性更优。
AI.conclusion: STrajNet通过多模态特征融合与FG-MSA模块设计，有效提升了占用流场预测性能，验证了社会交互建模与模态协同的重要性。

search_text: STrajNet: Multi-modal Hierarchical Transformer for Occupancy Flow Field Prediction in Autonomous Driving STrajNet：用于自动驾驶中占用流场预测的多模态分层变压器 Forecasting the future states of surrounding traffic participants is a crucial capability for autonomous vehicles. The recently proposed occupancy flow field prediction introduces a scalable and effective representation to jointly predict surrounding agents' future motions in a scene. However, the challenging part is to model the underlying social interactions among traffic agents and the relations between occupancy and flow. Therefore, this paper proposes a novel Multi-modal Hierarchical Transformer network that fuses the vectorized (agent motion) and visual (scene flow, map, and occupancy) modalities and jointly predicts the flow and occupancy of the scene. Specifically, visual and vector features from sensory data are encoded through a multi-stage Transformer module and then a late-fusion Transformer module with temporal pixel-wise attention. Importantly, a flow-guided multi-head self-attention (FG-MSA) module is designed to better aggregate the information on occupancy and flow and model the mathematical relations between them. The proposed method is comprehensively validated on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset and compared against several state-of-the-art models. The results reveal that our model with much more compact architecture and data inputs than other methods can achieve comparable performance. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of incorporating vectorized agent motion features and the proposed FG-MSA module. Compared to the ablated model without the FG-MSA module, which won 2nd place in the 2022 Waymo Occupancy and Flow Prediction Challenge, the current model shows better separability for flow and occupancy and further performance improvements. 预测周围交通参与者的未来状态是自动驾驶汽车的一项关键能力。最近提出的占用流场预测引入了可扩展且有效的表示来共同预测场景中周围代理的未来运动。然而，具有挑战性的部分是对交通代理之间的潜在社交互动以及占用率和流量之间的关系进行建模。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的多模态分层变压器网络，该网络融合了矢量化（代理运动）和视觉（场景流、地图和占用）模态，并联合预测场景的流和占用。具体来说，来自感官数据的视觉和矢量特征通过多级 Transformer 模块进行编码，然后通过具有时间像素级关注的后期融合 Transformer 模块进行编码。重要的是，流量引导的多头自注意力（FG-MSA）模块旨在更好地聚合有关占用和流量的信息，并对它们之间的数学关系进行建模。所提出的方法在 Waymo 开放运动数据集上进行了全面验证，并与几种最先进的模型进行了比较。结果表明，我们的模型具有比其他方法更紧凑的架构和数据输入，可以实现可比的性能。我们还证明了结合矢量化代理运动特征和所提出的 FG-MSA 模块的有效性。与在 2022 年 Waymo 占用和流量预测挑战赛中获得第二名的没有 FG-MSA 模块的消融模型相比，当前模型显示出更好的流量和占用率可分离性以及进一步的性能改进。 本文提出STrajNet模型，通过多模态分层Transformer网络预测自动驾驶场景中的占用流场，解决交通参与者社会交互建模难题。 Haochen Liu,Zhiyu Huang,Chen Lv cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jonathan Fhima,Jan Van Eijgen,Ingeborg Stalmans,Yevgeniy Men,Moti Freiman,Joachim A. Behar
title: PVBM: A Python Vasculature Biomarker Toolbox Based On Retinal Blood Vessel Segmentation
title_zh: PVBM：基于视网膜血管分割的Python血管生物标记工具箱
abstract: Introduction: Blood vessels can be non-invasively visualized from a digital fundus image (DFI). Several studies have shown an association between cardiovascular risk and vascular features obtained from DFI. Recent advances in computer vision and image segmentation enable automatising DFI blood vessel segmentation. There is a need for a resource that can automatically compute digital vasculature biomarkers (VBM) from these segmented DFI. Methods: In this paper, we introduce a Python Vasculature BioMarker toolbox, denoted PVBM. A total of 11 VBMs were implemented. In particular, we introduce new algorithmic methods to estimate tortuosity and branching angles. Using PVBM, and as a proof of usability, we analyze geometric vascular differences between glaucomatous patients and healthy controls. Results: We built a fully automated vasculature biomarker toolbox based on DFI segmentations and provided a proof of usability to characterize the vascular changes in glaucoma. For arterioles and venules, all biomarkers were significant and lower in glaucoma patients compared to healthy controls except for tortuosity, venular singularity length and venular branching angles. Conclusion: We have automated the computation of 11 VBMs from retinal blood vessel segmentation. The PVBM toolbox is made open source under a GNU GPL 3 license and is available on physiozoo.com (following publication).

Several studies have shown an association between cardiovascular risk and vascular features obtained from DFI. Recent advances in computer vision and image segmentation enable automatising DFI blood vessel segmentation. There is a need for a resource that can automatically compute digital vasculature biomarkers (VBM) from these segmented DFI. Methods: In this paper, we introduce a Python Vasculature BioMarker toolbox, denoted PVBM. A total of 11 VBMs were implemented. In particular, we introduce new algorithmic methods to estimate tortuosity and branching angles. Using PVBM, and as a proof of usability, we analyze geometric vascular differences between glaucomatous patients and healthy controls. Results: We built a fully automated vasculature biomarker toolbox based on DFI segmentations and provided a proof of usability to characterize the vascular changes in glaucoma. For arterioles and venules, all biomarkers were significant and lower in glaucoma patients compared to healthy controls except for tortuosity, venular singularity length and venular branching angles. Conclusion: We have automated the computation of 11 VBMs from retinal blood vessel segmentation. The PVBM toolbox is made open source under a GNU GPL 3 license and is available on physiozoo.com (following publication).
abstract_zh: 简介：可以通过数字眼底图像 (DFI) 无创地显示血管。多项研究表明心血管风险与 DFI 获得的血管特征之间存在关联。计算机视觉和图像分割的最新进展使得 DFI 血管分割自动化成为可能。需要一种能够从这些分段 DFI 自动计算数字脉管系统生物标志物 (VBM) 的资源。方法：在本文中，我们介绍了一个 Python Vasculature BioMarker 工具箱，表示为 PVBM。总共实施了 11 个 VBM。特别是，我们引入了新的算法方法来估计弯曲度和分支角度。使用 PVBM，并作为可用性证明，我们分析了青光眼患者和健康对照之间的几何血管差异。结果：我们基于 DFI 分割构建了一个全自动脉管系统生物标志物工具箱，并提供了表征青光眼血管变化的可用性证明。对于小动脉和小静脉，与健康对照相比，青光眼患者的所有生物标志物均显着且较低，除了迂曲度、小静脉奇点长度和小静脉分支角度之外。结论：我们已经自动计算了视网膜血管分割的 11 个 VBM。 PVBM 工具箱在 GNU GPL 3 许可证下开源，可在 phyzoo.com 上获取（以下出版物）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于视网膜血管分割的Python血管生物标志物工具箱PVBM，用于自动计算数字血管生物标志物并验证其在青光眼分析中的可用性。
AI.motivation: 尽管计算机视觉技术已实现视网膜血管分割自动化，但缺乏自动计算血管生物标志物（VBM）的工具，而VBM对心血管疾病和青光眼等疾病的诊断具有重要意义。
AI.method: 开发PVBM工具箱，实现11种VBM计算方法，引入新算法估计血管扭结度和分支角度，并通过对比青光眼患者与健康对照组的血管几何差异验证工具可用性。
AI.result: 构建的PVBM工具箱可全自动计算VBM，结果显示青光眼患者动脉和静脉的大部分生物标志物显著低于健康组，但扭结度、静脉奇点长度和静脉分支角度无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现11种VBM的自动化计算，PVBM工具箱已开源并提供青光眼血管特征分析的实证，为相关疾病研究提供新工具。

authors_text: Yixian Zhu,Ketan Savla
title: An Experimental Study on Learning Correlated Equilibrium in Routing Games
title_zh: 路由博弈中学习相关均衡的实验研究
abstract: We study route choice in a repeated routing game where an uncertain state of nature determines link latency functions, and agents receive private route recommendation. The state is sampled in an i.i.d. manner in every round from a publicly known distribution, and the recommendations are generated by a randomization policy whose mapping from the state is known publicly. In a one-shot setting, the agents are said to obey recommendation if it gives the smallest travel time in a posteriori expectation. A plausible extension to repeated setting is that the likelihood of following recommendation in a round is related to regret from previous rounds. If the regret is of satisficing type with respect to a default choice and is averaged over past rounds and over all agents, then the asymptotic outcome under an obedient recommendation policy coincides with the one-shot outcome. We report findings from an experiment with one participant at a time engaged in repeated route choice decision on computer. In every round, the participant is shown travel time distribution for each route, a route recommendation generated by an obedient policy, and a rating suggestive of average experience of previous participants with the quality of recommendation. Upon entering route choice, the actual travel times are revealed. The participant evaluates the quality of recommendation by submitting a review. This is combined with historical reviews to update rating for the next round. Data analysis from 33 participants each with 100 rounds suggests moderate negative correlation between the display rating and the average regret, and a strong positive correlation between the rating and the likelihood of following recommendation. Overall, under obedient recommendation policy, the rating converges close to its maximum value by the end of the experiments in conjunction with very high frequency of following recommendations.
summary: We study route choice in a repeated routing game where an uncertain state of nature determines link latency functions, and agents receive private route recommendation. The state is sampled in an i.i.d. manner in every round from a publicly known distribution, and the recommendations are generated by a randomization policy whose mapping from the state is known publicly. In a one-shot setting, the agents are said to obey recommendation if it gives the smallest travel time in a posteriori expectation. A plausible extension to repeated setting is that the likelihood of following recommendation in a round is related to regret from previous rounds. If the regret is of satisficing type with respect to a default choice and is averaged over past rounds and over all agents, then the asymptotic outcome under an obedient recommendation policy coincides with the one-shot outcome. We report findings from an experiment with one participant at a time engaged in repeated route choice decision on computer. In every round, the participant is shown travel time distribution for each route, a route recommendation generated by an obedient policy, and a rating suggestive of average experience of previous participants with the quality of recommendation. Upon entering route choice, the actual travel times are revealed. The participant evaluates the quality of recommendation by submitting a review. This is combined with historical reviews to update rating for the next round. Data analysis from 33 participants each with 100 rounds suggests moderate negative correlation between the display rating and the average regret, and a strong positive correlation between the rating and the likelihood of following recommendation. Overall, under obedient recommendation policy, the rating converges close to its maximum value by the end of the experiments in conjunction with very high frequency of following recommendations.
abstract_zh: 我们研究重复路由游戏中的路由选择，其中不确定的自然状态决定链路延迟函数，并且代理接收私有路由推荐。状态以 i.i.d 进行采样。每轮都以公开已知的分布方式进行，并且建议是由随机化策略生成的，该策略与状态的映射是公开已知的。在一次性设置中，如果推荐给出了后验期望中的最小旅行时间，则表示代理会服从推荐。重复设置的一个合理的扩展是，在一轮中遵循推荐的可能性与前几轮的遗憾有关。如果遗憾对于默认选择而言是令人满意的类型，并且是过去几轮和所有代理的平均值，那么服从推荐策略下的渐近结果与一次性结果一致。我们报告了一项实验的结果，每次一名参与者在计算机上进行重复的路线选择决策。在每一轮中，都会向参与者显示每条路线的旅行时间分布、由服从策略生成的路线推荐以及暗示先前参与者的平均体验与推荐质量的评级。输入路线选择后，就会显示实际的旅行时间。参与者通过提交评论来评估推荐的质量。这与历史评论相结合，以更新下一轮的评级。对 33 名参与者（每人 100 轮）的数据分析表明，展示评分与平均后悔程度之间存在中度负相关，而评分与遵循推荐的可能性之间存在很强的正相关关系。总体而言，在服从推荐策略下，在实验结束时评级接近其最大值，并且后续推荐的频率非常高。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过实验研究在路由游戏中学习相关均衡的机制，探讨参与者如何根据推荐路线和历史反馈调整决策。
AI.motivation: 在不确定网络状态的重复路由游戏中，理解参与者如何通过历史经验与推荐策略的互动达成高效路径选择，是优化交通流量的关键。
AI.method: 设计计算机实验，让参与者重复选择路线，每轮展示路线时间分布、推荐策略及基于历史评价的评分，通过实际旅行时间反馈和评分更新机制观察决策行为。
AI.result: 数据显示评分与平均遗憾呈中度负相关，评分与遵循推荐概率呈强正相关，实验后期评分趋近最大值且推荐遵循率极高。
AI.conclusion: 在服从性推荐策略下，参与者通过学习历史反馈逐步收敛至相关均衡，验证了推荐机制与评分反馈对决策优化的有效性。
