search_text: An Experimental Study on Learning Correlated Equilibrium in Routing Games 路由博弈中学习相关均衡的实验研究 We study route choice in a repeated routing game where an uncertain state of nature determines link latency functions, and agents receive private route recommendation. The state is sampled in an i.i.d. manner in every round from a publicly known distribution, and the recommendations are generated by a randomization policy whose mapping from the state is known publicly. In a one-shot setting, the agents are said to obey recommendation if it gives the smallest travel time in a posteriori expectation. A plausible extension to repeated setting is that the likelihood of following recommendation in a round is related to regret from previous rounds. If the regret is of satisficing type with respect to a default choice and is averaged over past rounds and over all agents, then the asymptotic outcome under an obedient recommendation policy coincides with the one-shot outcome. We report findings from an experiment with one participant at a time engaged in repeated route choice decision on computer. In every round, the participant is shown travel time distribution for each route, a route recommendation generated by an obedient policy, and a rating suggestive of average experience of previous participants with the quality of recommendation. Upon entering route choice, the actual travel times are revealed. The participant evaluates the quality of recommendation by submitting a review. This is combined with historical reviews to update rating for the next round. Data analysis from 33 participants each with 100 rounds suggests moderate negative correlation between the display rating and the average regret, and a strong positive correlation between the rating and the likelihood of following recommendation. Overall, under obedient recommendation policy, the rating converges close to its maximum value by the end of the experiments in conjunction with very high frequency of following recommendations. 我们研究重复路由游戏中的路由选择，其中不确定的自然状态决定链路延迟函数，并且代理接收私有路由推荐。状态以 i.i.d 进行采样。每轮都以公开已知的分布方式进行，并且建议是由随机化策略生成的，该策略与状态的映射是公开已知的。在一次性设置中，如果推荐给出了后验期望中的最小旅行时间，则表示代理会服从推荐。重复设置的一个合理的扩展是，在一轮中遵循推荐的可能性与前几轮的遗憾有关。如果遗憾对于默认选择而言是令人满意的类型，并且是过去几轮和所有代理的平均值，那么服从推荐策略下的渐近结果与一次性结果一致。我们报告了一项实验的结果，每次一名参与者在计算机上进行重复的路线选择决策。在每一轮中，都会向参与者显示每条路线的旅行时间分布、由服从策略生成的路线推荐以及暗示先前参与者的平均体验与推荐质量的评级。输入路线选择后，就会显示实际的旅行时间。参与者通过提交评论来评估推荐的质量。这与历史评论相结合，以更新下一轮的评级。对 33 名参与者（每人 100 轮）的数据分析表明，展示评分与平均后悔程度之间存在中度负相关，而评分与遵循推荐的可能性之间存在很强的正相关关系。总体而言，在服从推荐策略下，在实验结束时评级接近其最大值，并且后续推荐的频率非常高。 该论文通过实验研究在路由游戏中学习相关均衡的机制，探讨参与者如何根据推荐路线和历史反馈调整决策。 Yixian Zhu,Ketan Savla cs.GT,cs.HC,cs.IR,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Jan Ondras,Di Ni,Xi Deng,Zeqi Gu,Henry Zheng,Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee
title: Robotic Dough Shaping
title_zh: 机器人面团成型
comment: To be published in International Conference on Control, Automation and Systems (ICCAS), 2022
comments: To be published in International Conference on Control, Automation and Systems (ICCAS), 2022
abstract: Robotic manipulation of deformable objects gains great attention due to its wide applications including medical surgery, home assistance, and automatic food preparation. The ability to deform soft objects remains a great challenge for robots due to difficulties in defining the problem mathematically. In this paper, we address the problem of shaping a piece of dough-like deformable material into a 2D target shape presented upfront. We use a 6 degree-of-freedom WidowX-250 Robot Arm equipped with a rolling pin and information collected from an RGB-D camera and a tactile sensor. We present and compare several control policies, including a dough shrinking action, in extensive experiments across three kinds of deformable materials and across three target dough shape sizes, achieving the intersection over union (IoU) of 0.90. Our results show that: i) rolling dough from the highest dough point is more efficient than from the 2D/3D dough centroid; ii) it might be better to stop the roll movement at the current dough boundary as opposed to the target shape outline; iii) the shrink action might be beneficial only if properly tuned with respect to the expand action; and iv) the Play-Doh material is easier to shape to a target shape as compared to Plasticine or Kinetic sand. Video demonstrations of our work are available at https://youtu.be/ZzLMxuITdt4
summary: Robotic manipulation of deformable objects gains great attention due to its wide applications including medical surgery, home assistance, and automatic food preparation. The ability to deform soft objects remains a great challenge for robots due to difficulties in defining the problem mathematically. In this paper, we address the problem of shaping a piece of dough-like deformable material into a 2D target shape presented upfront. We use a 6 degree-of-freedom WidowX-250 Robot Arm equipped with a rolling pin and information collected from an RGB-D camera and a tactile sensor. We present and compare several control policies, including a dough shrinking action, in extensive experiments across three kinds of deformable materials and across three target dough shape sizes, achieving the intersection over union (IoU) of 0.90. Our results show that: i) rolling dough from the highest dough point is more efficient than from the 2D/3D dough centroid; ii) it might be better to stop the roll movement at the current dough boundary as opposed to the target shape outline; iii) the shrink action might be beneficial only if properly tuned with respect to the expand action; and iv) the Play-Doh material is easier to shape to a target shape as compared to Plasticine or Kinetic sand. Video demonstrations of our work are available at https://youtu.be/ZzLMxuITdt4
abstract_zh: 可变形物体的机器人操纵因其广泛的应用而受到广泛关注，包括医疗手术、家庭援助和自动食品准备。由于难以从数学上定义问题，使软物体变形的能力对机器人来说仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们解决了将一块面团状可变形材料塑造成预先呈现的 2D 目标形状的问题。我们使用配备擀面杖的 6 自由度 WidowX-250 机器人手臂，以及从 RGB-D 相机和触觉传感器收集的信息。我们在三种可变形材料和三种目标面团形状尺寸的广泛实验中提出并比较了几种控制策略，包括面团收缩作用，实现了 0.90 的并交交集 (IoU)。我们的结果表明： i) 从最高面团点滚动面团比从 2D/3D 面团质心滚动面团更有效； ii) 最好在当前面团边界处停止滚动运动，而不是在目标形状轮廓处停止； iii) 仅当针对扩展动作进行适当调整时，收缩动作才可能是有益的； iv) 与橡皮泥或动力砂相比，培乐多材料更容易成型为目标形状。我们工作的视频演示请访问 https://youtu.be/ZzLMxuITdt4

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用机械臂和传感器系统对可变形材料（如面团）进行精确塑形的方法，通过对比多种控制策略实现高精度目标形状生成。
AI.motivation: 可变形物体的机械操作在医疗、家庭服务和食品自动化等领域具有广泛应用，但其数学建模复杂且存在形变控制难题，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用6自由度机械臂搭配擀面杖工具，结合RGB-D相机和触觉传感器获取实时数据，设计并对比了包括面团收缩动作在内的多种控制策略，通过实验验证不同材料和目标尺寸下的塑形效果。
AI.result: 在三种材料和三种目标尺寸实验中达到0.90的交并比（IoU），发现从最高点滚动比从质心更高效、停止滚动位置应靠近当前边界而非目标轮廓、收缩动作需与扩张动作协同调优，且Play-Doh比塑形泥和动感沙更易塑形。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了基于传感器反馈的多策略控制框架在可变形物体塑形中的有效性，为食品自动化等场景提供了可优化的机器人操作范式。

We present and compare several control policies, including a dough shrinking action, in extensive experiments across three kinds of deformable materials and across three target dough shape sizes, achieving the intersection over union (IoU) of 0.90. Our results show that: i) rolling dough from the highest dough point is more efficient than from the 2D/3D dough centroid; ii) it might be better to stop the roll movement at the current dough boundary as opposed to the target shape outline; iii) the shrink action might be beneficial only if properly tuned with respect to the expand action; and iv) the Play-Doh material is easier to shape to a target shape as compared to Plasticine or Kinetic sand. Video demonstrations of our work are available at https://youtu.be/ZzLMxuITdt4 可变形物体的机器人操纵因其广泛的应用而受到广泛关注，包括医疗手术、家庭援助和自动食品准备。由于难以从数学上定义问题，使软物体变形的能力对机器人来说仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们解决了将一块面团状可变形材料塑造成预先呈现的 2D 目标形状的问题。我们使用配备擀面杖的 6 自由度 WidowX-250 机器人手臂，以及从 RGB-D 相机和触觉传感器收集的信息。我们在三种可变形材料和三种目标面团形状尺寸的广泛实验中提出并比较了几种控制策略，包括面团收缩作用，实现了 0.90 的并交交集 (IoU)。我们的结果表明： i) 从最高面团点滚动面团比从 2D/3D 面团质心滚动面团更有效； ii) 最好在当前面团边界处停止滚动运动，而不是在目标形状轮廓处停止； iii) 仅当针对扩展动作进行适当调整时，收缩动作才可能是有益的； iv) 与橡皮泥或动力砂相比，培乐多材料更容易成型为目标形状。我们工作的视频演示请访问 https://youtu.be/ZzLMxuITdt4 本文提出了一种利用机械臂和传感器系统对可变形材料（如面团）进行精确塑形的方法，通过对比多种控制策略实现高精度目标形状生成。 Jan Ondras,Di Ni,Xi Deng,Zeqi Gu,Henry Zheng,Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Tarun Kumar,Himanshu Sharad Bhatt
title: Evaluating Table Structure Recognition: A New Perspective
title_zh: 评估表结构识别：新视角
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, 1 table, 15th IAPR International Workshop on Document Analysis System (DAS 2022)
comments: 4 pages, 2 figures, 1 table, 15th IAPR International Workshop on Document Analysis System (DAS 2022)
abstract: Existing metrics used to evaluate table structure recognition algorithms have shortcomings with regard to capturing text and empty cells alignment. In this paper, we build on prior work and propose a new metric - TEDS based IOU similarity (TEDS (IOU)) for table structure recognition which uses bounding boxes instead of text while simultaneously being robust against the above disadvantages. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our metric against previous metrics through various examples.
summary: Existing metrics used to evaluate table structure recognition algorithms have shortcomings with regard to capturing text and empty cells alignment. In this paper, we build on prior work and propose a new metric - TEDS based IOU similarity (TEDS (IOU)) for table structure recognition which uses bounding boxes instead of text while simultaneously being robust against the above disadvantages. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our metric against previous metrics through various examples.
abstract_zh: 用于评估表格结构识别算法的现有指标在捕获文本和空单元格对齐方面存在缺陷。在本文中，我们在先前工作的基础上提出了一种新的度量标准 - 基于 TEDS 的 IOU 相似度（TEDS (IOU)），用于表结构识别，它使用边界框而不是文本，同时对上述缺点具有鲁棒性。我们通过各种示例展示了我们的指标相对于之前指标的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的表格结构识别评估指标TEDS (IOU)，以解决现有指标在文本和空单元格对齐评估中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标无法有效捕捉表格中文本与空单元格的对齐关系，导致评估结果不准确。
AI.method: 设计TEDS (IOU)指标，采用边界框替代文本进行评估，增强对文本和空单元格对齐问题的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 通过多个实例验证，TEDS (IOU)指标在评估表格结构识别任务中表现优于传统指标。
AI.conclusion: TEDS (IOU)为表格结构识别提供了更准确、鲁棒的评估方法，可有效提升算法性能评估的可靠性。

authors_text: Chenwei Zhao,Miao Ye,Xingsi Xue,Jianhui Lv,Qiuxiang Jiang,Yong Wang
title: DRL-M4MR: An Intelligent Multicast Routing Approach Based on DQN Deep Reinforcement Learning in SDN
title_zh: DRL-M4MR：SDN中基于DQN深度强化学习的智能组播路由方法
abstract: Traditional multicast routing methods have some problems in constructing a multicast tree, such as limited access to network state information, poor adaptability to dynamic and complex changes in the network, and inflexible data forwarding. To address these defects, the optimal multicast routing problem in software-defined networking (SDN) is tailored as a multi-objective optimization problem, and an intelligent multicast routing algorithm DRL-M4MR based on the deep Q network (DQN) deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method is designed to construct a multicast tree in SDN. First, the multicast tree state matrix, link bandwidth matrix, link delay matrix, and link packet loss rate matrix are designed as the state space of the DRL agent by combining the global view and control of the SDN. Second, the action space of the agent is all the links in the network, and the action selection strategy is designed to add the links to the current multicast tree under four cases. Third, single-step and final reward function forms are designed to guide the intelligence to make decisions to construct the optimal multicast tree. The experimental results show that, compared with existing algorithms, the multicast tree construct by DRL-M4MR can obtain better bandwidth, delay, and packet loss rate performance after training, and it can make more intelligent multicast routing decisions in a dynamic network environment.
summary: Traditional multicast routing methods have some problems in constructing a multicast tree, such as limited access to network state information, poor adaptability to dynamic and complex changes in the network, and inflexible data forwarding. To address these defects, the optimal multicast routing problem in software-defined networking (SDN) is tailored as a multi-objective optimization problem, and an intelligent multicast routing algorithm DRL-M4MR based on the deep Q network (DQN) deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method is designed to construct a multicast tree in SDN. First, the multicast tree state matrix, link bandwidth matrix, link delay matrix, and link packet loss rate matrix are designed as the state space of the DRL agent by combining the global view and control of the SDN. Second, the action space of the agent is all the links in the network, and the action selection strategy is designed to add the links to the current multicast tree under four cases. Third, single-step and final reward function forms are designed to guide the intelligence to make decisions to construct the optimal multicast tree. The experimental results show that, compared with existing algorithms, the multicast tree construct by DRL-M4MR can obtain better bandwidth, delay, and packet loss rate performance after training, and it can make more intelligent multicast routing decisions in a dynamic network environment.
abstract_zh: 传统的组播路由方法在构建组播树时存在对网络状态信息的获取有限、对网络动态复杂变化的适应性差、数据转发不灵活等问题。针对这些缺陷，将软件定义网络（SDN）中的最优组播路由问题定制为多目标优化问题，设计一种基于深度Q网络（DQN）深度强化学习（DRL）方法的智能组播路由算法DRL-M4MR来构建SDN中的组播树。首先，结合SDN的全局视图和控制，设计组播树状态矩阵、链路带宽矩阵、链路时延矩阵和链路丢包率矩阵作为DRL代理的状态空间。其次，代理的动作空间是网络中的所有链路，动作选择策略设计为在四种情况下将链路添加到当前组播树中。第三，设计单步和最终奖励函数形式来指导智能做出决策以构建最优的组播树。实验结果表明，与现有算法相比，DRL-M4MR构建的组播树经过训练可以获得更好的带宽、时延和丢包率性能，能够在动态网络环境下做出更智能的组播路由决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度Q网络（DQN）的DRL-M4MR算法，解决软件定义网络（SDN）中多播路由优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多播路由方法存在网络状态信息获取受限、动态适应性差及数据转发不灵活等问题，需设计智能算法应对SDN的动态复杂环境。
AI.method: 构建包含链路带宽、延迟及丢包率矩阵的多维状态空间，以网络所有链路为动作空间，设计四类链路添加策略，并通过单步与最终奖励函数引导智能决策。
AI.result: 实验表明，DRL-M4MR在训练后构建的多播树在带宽利用率、延迟及丢包率指标上优于现有算法，且能更智能适应动态网络环境。
AI.conclusion: DRL-M4MR通过深度强化学习有效解决了SDN中多播路由的多目标优化问题，为动态网络环境提供了高效智能的路由方案。

authors_text: Yiran Wang,Zhiyu Pan,Xingyi Li,Zhiguo Cao,Ke Xian,Jianming Zhang
title: Less is More: Consistent Video Depth Estimation with Masked Frames Modeling
title_zh: 少即是多：使用掩模帧建模进行一致的视频深度估计
abstract: Temporal consistency is the key challenge of video depth estimation. Previous works are based on additional optical flow or camera poses, which is time-consuming. By contrast, we derive consistency with less information. Since videos inherently exist with heavy temporal redundancy, a missing frame could be recovered from neighboring ones. Inspired by this, we propose the frame masking network (FMNet), a spatial-temporal transformer network predicting the depth of masked frames based on their neighboring frames. By reconstructing masked temporal features, the FMNet can learn intrinsic inter-frame correlations, which leads to consistency. Compared with prior arts, experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves comparable spatial accuracy and higher temporal consistency without any additional information. Our work provides a new perspective on consistent video depth estimation. Our official project page is https://github.com/RaymondWang987/FMNet.
summary: Temporal consistency is the key challenge of video depth estimation. Previous works are based on additional optical flow or camera poses, which is time-consuming. By contrast, we derive consistency with less information. Since videos inherently exist with heavy temporal redundancy, a missing frame could be recovered from neighboring ones. Inspired by this, we propose the frame masking network (FMNet), a spatial-temporal transformer network predicting the depth of masked frames based on their neighboring frames. By reconstructing masked temporal features, the FMNet can learn intrinsic inter-frame correlations, which leads to consistency. Compared with prior arts, experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves comparable spatial accuracy and higher temporal consistency without any additional information. Our work provides a new perspective on consistent video depth estimation. Our official project page is https://github.com/RaymondWang987/FMNet.
abstract_zh: 时间一致性是视频深度估计的关键挑战。以前的工作是基于额外的光流或相机姿势，这非常耗时。相比之下，我们用较少的信息获得一致性。由于视频本质上存在大量时间冗余，因此可以从相邻帧中恢复丢失的帧。受此启发，我们提出了帧掩蔽网络（FMNet），这是一种时空变换网络，可根据相邻帧预测掩蔽帧的深度。通过重建屏蔽时间特征，FMNet 可以学习内在的帧间相关性，从而实现一致性。与现有技术相比，实验结果表明，我们的方法在没有任何额外信息的情况下实现了可比较的空间精度和更高的时间一致性。我们的工作为一致的视频深度估计提供了新的视角。我们的官方项目页面是 https://github.com/RaymondWang987/FMNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需额外信息的视频深度估计方法，通过遮罩帧建模实现时间一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频深度估计方法依赖光流或相机姿态等额外信息，导致计算耗时且复杂度高，而视频本身存在大量时间冗余，可通过相邻帧恢复缺失帧。
AI.method: 提出帧遮罩网络（FMNet），基于时空Transformer架构，通过预测遮罩帧的深度并重建时间特征，学习帧间内在关联以实现一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在无需额外信息的情况下，空间精度与现有方法相当，时间一致性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文为一致性的视频深度估计提供了新视角，证明了通过遮罩帧建模可有效提升时间一致性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需额外信息的视频深度估计方法，通过遮罩帧建模实现时间一致性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有视频深度估计方法依赖光流或相机姿态等额外信息，导致计算耗时且复杂度高，而视频本身存在大量时间冗余，可通过相邻帧恢复缺失帧。
ai_content.method: 提出帧遮罩网络（FMNet），基于时空Transformer架构，通过预测遮罩帧的深度并重建时间特征，学习帧间内在关联以实现一致性。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在无需额外信息的情况下，空间精度与现有方法相当，时间一致性显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文为一致性的视频深度估计提供了新视角，证明了通过遮罩帧建模可有效提升时间一致性。

search_text: Less is More: Consistent Video Depth Estimation with Masked Frames Modeling 少即是多：使用掩模帧建模进行一致的视频深度估计 Temporal consistency is the key challenge of video depth estimation. Previous works are based on additional optical flow or camera poses, which is time-consuming. By contrast, we derive consistency with less information. Since videos inherently exist with heavy temporal redundancy, a missing frame could be recovered from neighboring ones. Inspired by this, we propose the frame masking network (FMNet), a spatial-temporal transformer network predicting the depth of masked frames based on their neighboring frames. By reconstructing masked temporal features, the FMNet can learn intrinsic inter-frame correlations, which leads to consistency. Compared with prior arts, experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves comparable spatial accuracy and higher temporal consistency without any additional information. Our work provides a new perspective on consistent video depth estimation. Our official project page is https://github.com/RaymondWang987/FMNet. 时间一致性是视频深度估计的关键挑战。以前的工作是基于额外的光流或相机姿势，这非常耗时。相比之下，我们用较少的信息获得一致性。由于视频本质上存在大量时间冗余，因此可以从相邻帧中恢复丢失的帧。受此启发，我们提出了帧掩蔽网络（FMNet），这是一种时空变换网络，可根据相邻帧预测掩蔽帧的深度。通过重建屏蔽时间特征，FMNet 可以学习内在的帧间相关性，从而实现一致性。与现有技术相比，实验结果表明，我们的方法在没有任何额外信息的情况下实现了可比较的空间精度和更高的时间一致性。我们的工作为一致的视频深度估计提供了新的视角。我们的官方项目页面是 https://github.com/RaymondWang987/FMNet。 本文提出了一种无需额外信息的视频深度估计方法，通过遮罩帧建模实现时间一致性。 Yiran Wang,Zhiyu Pan,Xingyi Li,Zhiguo Cao,Ke Xian,Jianming Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Yu Li,Chun-Yen Chen,Dian Yu,Sam Davidson,Ryan Hou,Xun Yuan,Yinghua Tan,Derek Pham,Zhou Yu
title: Using Chatbots to Teach Languages
title_zh: 使用聊天机器人教授语言
abstract: This paper reports on progress towards building an online language learning tool to provide learners with conversational experience by using dialog systems as conversation practice partners. Our system can adapt to users' language proficiency on the fly. We also provide automatic grammar error feedback to help users learn from their mistakes. According to our first adopters, our system is entertaining and useful. Furthermore, we will provide the learning technology community a large-scale conversation dataset on language learning and grammar correction. Our next step is to make our system more adaptive to user profile information by using reinforcement learning algorithms.
summary: This paper reports on progress towards building an online language learning tool to provide learners with conversational experience by using dialog systems as conversation practice partners. Our system can adapt to users' language proficiency on the fly. We also provide automatic grammar error feedback to help users learn from their mistakes. According to our first adopters, our system is entertaining and useful. Furthermore, we will provide the learning technology community a large-scale conversation dataset on language learning and grammar correction. Our next step is to make our system more adaptive to user profile information by using reinforcement learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文报告了构建在线语言学习工具的进展，该工具通过使用对话系统作为对话练习伙伴为学习者提供对话体验。我们的系统可以动态适应用户的语言熟练程度。我们还提供自动语法错误反馈，帮助用户从错误中吸取教训。根据我们的第一批采用者的说法，我们的系统既有趣又有用。此外，我们将为学习技术社区提供有关语言学习和语法纠正的大规模对话数据集。我们的下一步是通过使用强化学习算法使我们的系统更适应用户个人资料信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聊天机器人的在线语言学习工具，通过对话系统提供实时适应性练习和语法纠错功能。
AI.motivation: 现有语言学习工具缺乏互动性和个性化适应能力，难以有效提升学习者的实际对话能力。
AI.method: 采用对话系统作为虚拟对话伙伴，结合实时语言水平检测、自动语法错误反馈机制，并计划引入强化学习优化用户适配性。
AI.result: 初步用户测试显示系统兼具趣味性与实用性，同时将公开大规模语言学习对话数据集。
AI.conclusion: 聊天机器人可有效辅助语言学习，未来通过强化学习提升个性化适配性，并为研究社区提供重要数据支持。

authors_text: Muhammad Hassan,Haifei Guan,Aikaterini Melliou,Yuqi Wang,Qianhui Sun,Sen Zeng,Wen Liang,Yiwei Zhang,Ziheng Zhang,Qiuyue Hu,Yang Liu,Shunkai Shi,Lin An,Shuyue Ma,Ijaz Gul,Muhammad Akmal Rahee,Zhou You,Canyang Zhang,Vijay Kumar Pandey,Yuxing Han,Yongbing Zhang,Ming Xu,Qiming Huang,Jiefu Tan,Qi Xing, et al. (2 additional authors not shown)
title: Neuro-Symbolic Learning: Principles and Applications in Ophthalmology
title_zh: 神经符号学习：眼科的原理和应用
abstract: Neural networks have been rapidly expanding in recent years, with novel strategies and applications. However, challenges such as interpretability, explainability, robustness, safety, trust, and sensibility remain unsolved in neural network technologies, despite the fact that they will unavoidably be addressed for critical applications. Attempts have been made to overcome the challenges in neural network computing by representing and embedding domain knowledge in terms of symbolic representations. Thus, the neuro-symbolic learning (NeSyL) notion emerged, which incorporates aspects of symbolic representation and bringing common sense into neural networks (NeSyL). In domains where interpretability, reasoning, and explainability are crucial, such as video and image captioning, question-answering and reasoning, health informatics, and genomics, NeSyL has shown promising outcomes. This review presents a comprehensive survey on the state-of-the-art NeSyL approaches, their principles, advances in machine and deep learning algorithms, applications such as opthalmology, and most importantly, future perspectives of this emerging field.
summary: Neural networks have been rapidly expanding in recent years, with novel strategies and applications. However, challenges such as interpretability, explainability, robustness, safety, trust, and sensibility remain unsolved in neural network technologies, despite the fact that they will unavoidably be addressed for critical applications. Attempts have been made to overcome the challenges in neural network computing by representing and embedding domain knowledge in terms of symbolic representations. Thus, the neuro-symbolic learning (NeSyL) notion emerged, which incorporates aspects of symbolic representation and bringing common sense into neural networks (NeSyL). In domains where interpretability, reasoning, and explainability are crucial, such as video and image captioning, question-answering and reasoning, health informatics, and genomics, NeSyL has shown promising outcomes. This review presents a comprehensive survey on the state-of-the-art NeSyL approaches, their principles, advances in machine and deep learning algorithms, applications such as opthalmology, and most importantly, future perspectives of this emerging field.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经网络迅速扩展，具有新颖的策略和应用。然而，神经网络技术中的可解释性、可解释性、鲁棒性、安全性、信任和敏感性等挑战仍然没有得到解决，尽管事实上这些挑战将不可避免地在关键应用中得到解决。人们尝试通过用符号表示来表示和嵌入领域知识来克服神经网络计算中的挑战。因此，神经符号学习（NeSyL）概念出现了，它结合了符号表示的各个方面，并将常识引入神经网络（NeSyL）。在可解释性、推理和可解释性至关重要的领域，例如视频和图像字幕、问答和推理、健康信息学和基因组学，NeSyL 已显示出有希望的成果。这篇综述对最先进的 NeSyL 方法、其原理、机器和深度学习算法的进展、眼科等应用以及最重要的是这个新兴领域的未来前景进行了全面调查。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了神经符号学习（NeSyL）的最新进展，重点探讨其在眼科领域的应用及未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在可解释性、鲁棒性等方面存在不足，而医疗等关键领域亟需结合领域知识的可信AI技术。
AI.method: 系统梳理NeSyL的核心原理，分析其融合符号表示与深度学习的算法框架，并总结在眼科等领域的应用案例。
AI.result: 揭示NeSyL在提升模型可解释性与推理能力方面的优势，指出其在眼科疾病诊断中的潜在价值及当前研究局限。
AI.conclusion: NeSyL为医疗AI提供了兼顾性能与可信度的解决方案，未来需加强跨学科协作以推动临床落地。

authors_text: Hongyang Du,Jiacheng Wang,Dusit Niyato,Jiawen Kang,Zehui Xiong,Xuemin,Shen,Dong In Kim
title: Exploring Attention-Aware Network Resource Allocation for Customized Metaverse Services
title_zh: 探索定制元界服务的注意力感知网络资源分配
abstract: Emerging with the support of computing and communications technologies, Metaverse is expected to bring users unprecedented service experiences. However, the increase in the number of Metaverse users places a heavy demand on network resources, especially for Metaverse services that are based on graphical extended reality and require rendering a plethora of virtual objects. To make efficient use of network resources and improve the Quality-of-Experience (QoE), we design an attention-aware network resource allocation scheme to achieve customized Metaverse services. The aim is to allocate more network resources to virtual objects in which users are more interested. We first discuss several key techniques related to Metaverse services, including QoE analysis, eye-tracking, and remote rendering. We then review existing datasets and propose the user-object-attention level (UOAL) dataset that contains the ground truth attention of 30 users to 96 objects in 1,000 images. A tutorial on how to use UOAL is presented. With the help of UOAL, we propose an attention-aware network resource allocation algorithm that has two steps, i.e., attention prediction and QoE maximization. Specially, we provide an overview of the designs of two types of attention prediction methods, i.e., interest-aware and time-aware prediction. By using the predicted user-object-attention values, network resources such as the rendering capacity of edge devices can be allocated optimally to maximize the QoE. Finally, we propose promising research directions related to Metaverse services.
summary: Emerging with the support of computing and communications technologies, Metaverse is expected to bring users unprecedented service experiences. However, the increase in the number of Metaverse users places a heavy demand on network resources, especially for Metaverse services that are based on graphical extended reality and require rendering a plethora of virtual objects. To make efficient use of network resources and improve the Quality-of-Experience (QoE), we design an attention-aware network resource allocation scheme to achieve customized Metaverse services. The aim is to allocate more network resources to virtual objects in which users are more interested. We first discuss several key techniques related to Metaverse services, including QoE analysis, eye-tracking, and remote rendering. We then review existing datasets and propose the user-object-attention level (UOAL) dataset that contains the ground truth attention of 30 users to 96 objects in 1,000 images. A tutorial on how to use UOAL is presented. With the help of UOAL, we propose an attention-aware network resource allocation algorithm that has two steps, i.e., attention prediction and QoE maximization. Specially, we provide an overview of the designs of two types of attention prediction methods, i.e., interest-aware and time-aware prediction. By using the predicted user-object-attention values, network resources such as the rendering capacity of edge devices can be allocated optimally to maximize the QoE. Finally, we propose promising research directions related to Metaverse services.
abstract_zh: 元界在计算和通信技术的支持下崛起，有望为用户带来前所未有的服务体验。然而，元界用户数量的增加对网络资源提出了巨大的需求，尤其是基于图形扩展现实、需要渲染大量虚拟物体的元界服务。为了有效利用网络资源并提高体验质量（QoE），我们设计了一种注意力感知的网络资源分配方案来实现定制的元界服务。目的是将更多的网络资源分配给用户更感兴趣的虚拟对象。我们首先讨论与Metaverse服务相关的几个关键技术，包括QoE分析、眼动追踪和远程渲染。然后，我们审查现有数据集并提出用户对象注意力级别 (UOAL) 数据集，其中包含 30 个用户对 1,000 张图像中 96 个对象的真实注意力。提供了有关如何使用 UOAL 的教程。在 UOAL 的帮助下，我们提出了一种注意力感知的网络资源分配算法，该算法有两个步骤，即注意力预测和 QoE 最大化。特别地，我们概述了两种类型的注意力预测方法的设计，即兴趣感知和时间感知预测。通过使用预测的用户对象注意力值，可以优化分配网络资源（例如边缘设备的渲染能力），以最大化 QoE。最后，我们提出了与元界服务相关的有前景的研究方向。

AI.conclusion: 本文为元宇宙服务的网络资源分配提供了新的思路，并提出了未来的研究方向。

search_text: Exploring Attention-Aware Network Resource Allocation for Customized Metaverse Services 探索定制元界服务的注意力感知网络资源分配 Emerging with the support of computing and communications technologies, Metaverse is expected to bring users unprecedented service experiences. However, the increase in the number of Metaverse users places a heavy demand on network resources, especially for Metaverse services that are based on graphical extended reality and require rendering a plethora of virtual objects. To make efficient use of network resources and improve the Quality-of-Experience (QoE), we design an attention-aware network resource allocation scheme to achieve customized Metaverse services. The aim is to allocate more network resources to virtual objects in which users are more interested. We first discuss several key techniques related to Metaverse services, including QoE analysis, eye-tracking, and remote rendering. We then review existing datasets and propose the user-object-attention level (UOAL) dataset that contains the ground truth attention of 30 users to 96 objects in 1,000 images. A tutorial on how to use UOAL is presented. With the help of UOAL, we propose an attention-aware network resource allocation algorithm that has two steps, i.e., attention prediction and QoE maximization. Specially, we provide an overview of the designs of two types of attention prediction methods, i.e., interest-aware and time-aware prediction. By using the predicted user-object-attention values, network resources such as the rendering capacity of edge devices can be allocated optimally to maximize the QoE. Finally, we propose promising research directions related to Metaverse services. 元界在计算和通信技术的支持下崛起，有望为用户带来前所未有的服务体验。然而，元界用户数量的增加对网络资源提出了巨大的需求，尤其是基于图形扩展现实、需要渲染大量虚拟物体的元界服务。为了有效利用网络资源并提高体验质量（QoE），我们设计了一种注意力感知的网络资源分配方案来实现定制的元界服务。目的是将更多的网络资源分配给用户更感兴趣的虚拟对象。我们首先讨论与Metaverse服务相关的几个关键技术，包括QoE分析、眼动追踪和远程渲染。然后，我们审查现有数据集并提出用户对象注意力级别 (UOAL) 数据集，其中包含 30 个用户对 1,000 张图像中 96 个对象的真实注意力。提供了有关如何使用 UOAL 的教程。在 UOAL 的帮助下，我们提出了一种注意力感知的网络资源分配算法，该算法有两个步骤，即注意力预测和 QoE 最大化。特别地，我们概述了两种类型的注意力预测方法的设计，即兴趣感知和时间感知预测。通过使用预测的用户对象注意力值，可以优化分配网络资源（例如边缘设备的渲染能力），以最大化 QoE。最后，我们提出了与元界服务相关的有前景的研究方向。 本文提出了一种基于注意力感知的网络资源分配方案，以实现定制化的元宇宙服务。 Hongyang Du,Jiacheng Wang,Dusit Niyato,Jiawen Kang,Zehui Xiong,Xuemin,Shen,Dong In Kim cs.NI,cs.AI

authors_text: Maosen Li,Siheng Chen,Zijing Zhang,Lingxi Xie,Qi Tian,Ya Zhang
title: Skeleton-Parted Graph Scattering Networks for 3D Human Motion Prediction
title_zh: 用于 3D 人体运动预测的骨架分割图散射网络
abstract: Graph convolutional network based methods that model the body-joints' relations, have recently shown great promise in 3D skeleton-based human motion prediction. However, these methods have two critical issues: first, deep graph convolutions filter features within only limited graph spectrums, losing sufficient information in the full band; second, using a single graph to model the whole body underestimates the diverse patterns on various body-parts. To address the first issue, we propose adaptive graph scattering, which leverages multiple trainable band-pass graph filters to decompose pose features into richer graph spectrum bands. To address the second issue, body-parts are modeled separately to learn diverse dynamics, which enables finer feature extraction along the spatial dimensions. Integrating the above two designs, we propose a novel skeleton-parted graph scattering network (SPGSN). The cores of the model are cascaded multi-part graph scattering blocks (MPGSBs), building adaptive graph scattering on diverse body-parts, as well as fusing the decomposed features based on the inferred spectrum importance and body-part interactions. Extensive experiments have shown that SPGSN outperforms state-of-the-art methods by remarkable margins of 13.8%, 9.3% and 2.7% in terms of 3D mean per joint position error (MPJPE) on Human3.6M, CMU Mocap and 3DPW datasets, respectively.
summary: Graph convolutional network based methods that model the body-joints' relations, have recently shown great promise in 3D skeleton-based human motion prediction. However, these methods have two critical issues: first, deep graph convolutions filter features within only limited graph spectrums, losing sufficient information in the full band; second, using a single graph to model the whole body underestimates the diverse patterns on various body-parts. To address the first issue, we propose adaptive graph scattering, which leverages multiple trainable band-pass graph filters to decompose pose features into richer graph spectrum bands. To address the second issue, body-parts are modeled separately to learn diverse dynamics, which enables finer feature extraction along the spatial dimensions. Integrating the above two designs, we propose a novel skeleton-parted graph scattering network (SPGSN). The cores of the model are cascaded multi-part graph scattering blocks (MPGSBs), building adaptive graph scattering on diverse body-parts, as well as fusing the decomposed features based on the inferred spectrum importance and body-part interactions. Extensive experiments have shown that SPGSN outperforms state-of-the-art methods by remarkable margins of 13.8%, 9.3% and 2.7% in terms of 3D mean per joint position error (MPJPE) on Human3.6M, CMU Mocap and 3DPW datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 基于图卷积网络的方法对身体关节关系进行建模，最近在基于 3D 骨架的人体运动预测中显示出了巨大的前景。然而，这些方法有两个关键问题：首先，深度图卷积仅过滤有限图谱内的特征，丢失了全频段的足够信息；其次，使用单个图表来模拟整个身体会低估身体各个部位的不同模式。为了解决第一个问题，我们提出了自适应图散射，它利用多个可训练的带通图滤波器将姿态特征分解为更丰富的图谱带。为了解决第二个问题，身体部位被单独建模以学习不同的动态，这使得能够沿空间维度进行更精细的特征提取。结合上述两种设计，我们提出了一种新颖的骨架分割图散射网络（SPGSN）。该模型的核心是级联多部分图散射块（MPGSB），在不同的身体部位上构建自适应图散射，并根据推断的频谱重要性和身体部位相互作用融合分解的特征。大量实验表明，SPGSN 在 Human3.6M、CMU Mocap 和 3DPW 数据集上的 3D 平均每关节位置误差 (MPJPE) 方面分别优于最先进的方法，分别为 13.8%、9.3% 和 2.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于骨架分割图散射网络（SPGSN）的3D人体运动预测方法，旨在解决现有图卷积网络在建模全身骨骼关系时的信息丢失和模式多样性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在深度图卷积中仅使用有限图谱范围导致信息丢失，且单一图结构难以捕捉不同身体部位的多样化运动模式。
AI.method: 设计自适应图散射机制，通过多带通图滤波器分解姿态特征；分别建模身体部位以学习多样化动态，并通过多部分图散射块（MPGSB）融合分解后的特征。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M、CMU Mocap和3DPW数据集上，SPGSN分别以13.8%、9.3%和2.7%的3D均方关节位置误差（MPJPE）显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SPGSN通过多谱带分解与身体部位独立建模，有效提升了3D人体运动预测的精度，验证了其在处理骨骼数据时的优越性。

authors_text: Zhipeng Zhang,Zhimin Wei,Zhongzhen Huang,Rui Niu,Peng Wang
title: One for All: One-stage Referring Expression Comprehension with Dynamic Reasoning
title_zh: 一举多得：动态推理的一步引用表达理解
abstract: Referring Expression Comprehension (REC) is one of the most important tasks in visual reasoning that requires a model to detect the target object referred by a natural language expression. Among the proposed pipelines, the one-stage Referring Expression Comprehension (OSREC) has become the dominant trend since it merges the region proposal and selection stages. Many state-of-the-art OSREC models adopt a multi-hop reasoning strategy because a sequence of objects is frequently mentioned in a single expression which needs multi-hop reasoning to analyze the semantic relation. However, one unsolved issue of these models is that the number of reasoning steps needs to be pre-defined and fixed before inference, ignoring the varying complexity of expressions. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Multi-step Reasoning Network, which allows the reasoning steps to be dynamically adjusted based on the reasoning state and expression complexity. Specifically, we adopt a Transformer module to memorize & process the reasoning state and a Reinforcement Learning strategy to dynamically infer the reasoning steps. The work achieves the state-of-the-art performance or significant improvements on several REC datasets, ranging from RefCOCO (+, g) with short expressions, to Ref-Reasoning, a dataset with long and complex compositional expressions.
summary: Referring Expression Comprehension (REC) is one of the most important tasks in visual reasoning that requires a model to detect the target object referred by a natural language expression. Among the proposed pipelines, the one-stage Referring Expression Comprehension (OSREC) has become the dominant trend since it merges the region proposal and selection stages. Many state-of-the-art OSREC models adopt a multi-hop reasoning strategy because a sequence of objects is frequently mentioned in a single expression which needs multi-hop reasoning to analyze the semantic relation. However, one unsolved issue of these models is that the number of reasoning steps needs to be pre-defined and fixed before inference, ignoring the varying complexity of expressions. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Multi-step Reasoning Network, which allows the reasoning steps to be dynamically adjusted based on the reasoning state and expression complexity. Specifically, we adopt a Transformer module to memorize & process the reasoning state and a Reinforcement Learning strategy to dynamically infer the reasoning steps. The work achieves the state-of-the-art performance or significant improvements on several REC datasets, ranging from RefCOCO (+, g) with short expressions, to Ref-Reasoning, a dataset with long and complex compositional expressions.
abstract_zh: 引用表达理解（REC）是视觉推理中最重要的任务之一，需要一个模型来检测自然语言表达所引用的目标对象。在所提出的管道中，单阶段引用表达理解（OSREC）由于合并了区域提议和选择阶段而成为主导趋势。许多最先进的 OSREC 模型采用多跳推理策略，因为在单个表达式中频繁提及对象序列，需要多跳推理来分析语义关系。然而，这些模型的一个未解决的问题是，在推理之前需要预先定义和固定推理步骤的数量，而忽略了表达式复杂性的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种动态多步推理网络，它允许根据推理状态和表达复杂性动态调整推理步骤。具体来说，我们采用 Transformer 模块来记忆和处理推理状态，并采用强化学习策略来动态推断推理步骤。这项工作在多个 REC 数据集上实现了最先进的性能或显着改进，从具有短表达式的 RefCOCO (+, g) 到具有长而复杂的组合表达式的数据集 Ref-Reasoning。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态多步推理网络，解决单阶段指代表达理解中推理步骤数需预定义的问题，通过动态调整推理步骤提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单阶段指代表达理解模型采用固定推理步骤，无法适应表达式复杂度变化，限制了模型对复杂表达的处理能力。
AI.method: 采用Transformer模块记忆并处理推理状态，结合强化学习策略动态推断推理步骤，实现推理步骤数的自适应调整。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO、Ref-Reasoning等多个数据集上取得最先进性能或显著提升，涵盖短表达和长复杂表达场景。
AI.conclusion: 动态推理机制有效解决了表达复杂度变化问题，为单阶段指代表达理解任务提供了更灵活高效的解决方案。

search_text: One for All: One-stage Referring Expression Comprehension with Dynamic Reasoning 一举多得：动态推理的一步引用表达理解 Referring Expression Comprehension (REC) is one of the most important tasks in visual reasoning that requires a model to detect the target object referred by a natural language expression. Among the proposed pipelines, the one-stage Referring Expression Comprehension (OSREC) has become the dominant trend since it merges the region proposal and selection stages. Many state-of-the-art OSREC models adopt a multi-hop reasoning strategy because a sequence of objects is frequently mentioned in a single expression which needs multi-hop reasoning to analyze the semantic relation. However, one unsolved issue of these models is that the number of reasoning steps needs to be pre-defined and fixed before inference, ignoring the varying complexity of expressions. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Multi-step Reasoning Network, which allows the reasoning steps to be dynamically adjusted based on the reasoning state and expression complexity. Specifically, we adopt a Transformer module to memorize & process the reasoning state and a Reinforcement Learning strategy to dynamically infer the reasoning steps. The work achieves the state-of-the-art performance or significant improvements on several REC datasets, ranging from RefCOCO (+, g) with short expressions, to Ref-Reasoning, a dataset with long and complex compositional expressions. 引用表达理解（REC）是视觉推理中最重要的任务之一，需要一个模型来检测自然语言表达所引用的目标对象。在所提出的管道中，单阶段引用表达理解（OSREC）由于合并了区域提议和选择阶段而成为主导趋势。许多最先进的 OSREC 模型采用多跳推理策略，因为在单个表达式中频繁提及对象序列，需要多跳推理来分析语义关系。然而，这些模型的一个未解决的问题是，在推理之前需要预先定义和固定推理步骤的数量，而忽略了表达式复杂性的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种动态多步推理网络，它允许根据推理状态和表达复杂性动态调整推理步骤。具体来说，我们采用 Transformer 模块来记忆和处理推理状态，并采用强化学习策略来动态推断推理步骤。这项工作在多个 REC 数据集上实现了最先进的性能或显着改进，从具有短表达式的 RefCOCO (+, g) 到具有长而复杂的组合表达式的数据集 Ref-Reasoning。 本文提出一种动态多步推理网络，解决单阶段指代表达理解中推理步骤数需预定义的问题，通过动态调整推理步骤提升模型性能。 Zhipeng Zhang,Zhimin Wei,Zhongzhen Huang,Rui Niu,Peng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Peng Xia,Yuechi Zhou,Ziyan Zhang,Zecheng Tang,Juntao Li
title: Chinese grammatical error correction based on knowledge distillation
title_zh: 基于知识蒸馏的汉语语法纠错
abstract: In view of the poor robustness of existing Chinese grammatical error correction models on attack test sets and large model parameters, this paper uses the method of knowledge distillation to compress model parameters and improve the anti-attack ability of the model. In terms of data, the attack test set is constructed by integrating the disturbance into the standard evaluation data set, and the model robustness is evaluated by the attack test set. The experimental results show that the distilled small model can ensure the performance and improve the training speed under the condition of reducing the number of model parameters, and achieve the optimal effect on the attack test set, and the robustness is significantly improved. Code is available at https://github.com/Richard88888/KD-CGEC.
summary: In view of the poor robustness of existing Chinese grammatical error correction models on attack test sets and large model parameters, this paper uses the method of knowledge distillation to compress model parameters and improve the anti-attack ability of the model. In terms of data, the attack test set is constructed by integrating the disturbance into the standard evaluation data set, and the model robustness is evaluated by the attack test set. The experimental results show that the distilled small model can ensure the performance and improve the training speed under the condition of reducing the number of model parameters, and achieve the optimal effect on the attack test set, and the robustness is significantly improved. Code is available at https://github.com/Richard88888/KD-CGEC.
abstract_zh: 针对现有中文语法纠错模型对攻击测试集和模型参数较大的鲁棒性较差的问题，本文采用知识蒸馏的方法来压缩模型参数，提高模型的抗攻击能力。数据方面，将扰动融入标准评估数据集构建攻击测试集，通过攻击测试集评估模型的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，蒸馏后的小模型能够在减少模型参数数量的情况下保证性能并提高训练速度，并且在攻击测试集上达到最优效果，鲁棒性显着提高。代码可在 https://github.com/Richard88888/KD-CGEC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文基于知识蒸馏方法，针对中文语法错误修正模型的鲁棒性不足及参数量大的问题，提出压缩模型参数并提升抗攻击能力的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有中文语法错误修正模型在攻击测试集上鲁棒性较差且参数量大，需通过模型压缩技术提升效率与安全性。
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏压缩模型参数，构建融合扰动的攻击测试集，并通过该测试集评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 蒸馏后的轻量模型在减少参数量的前提下保持性能，训练速度提升，且在攻击测试集上表现最优，鲁棒性显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏有效提升了中文语法纠错模型的鲁棒性与效率，为实际应用提供了可行方案，代码已开源。

authors_text: Leena Mathur,Ralph Adolphs,Maja J Matarić
title: Towards Intercultural Affect Recognition: Audio-Visual Affect Recognition in the Wild Across Six Cultures
title_zh: 迈向跨文化情感识别：跨六种文化的视听情感识别
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG 2023), publication and presentation at refereed IEEE workshop
comments: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG 2023), publication and presentation at refereed IEEE workshop
abstract: In our multicultural world, affect-aware AI systems that support humans need the ability to perceive affect across variations in emotion expression patterns across cultures. These systems must perform well in cultural contexts without annotated affect datasets available for training models. A standard assumption in affective computing is that affect recognition models trained and used within the same culture (intracultural) will perform better than models trained on one culture and used on different cultures (intercultural). We test this assumption and present the first systematic study of intercultural affect recognition models using videos of real-world dyadic interactions from six cultures. We develop an attention-based feature selection approach under temporal causal discovery to identify behavioral cues that can be leveraged in intercultural affect recognition models. Across all six cultures, our findings demonstrate that intercultural affect recognition models were as effective or more effective than intracultural models. We identify and contribute useful behavioral features for intercultural affect recognition; facial features from the visual modality were more useful than the audio modality in this study's context. Our paper presents a proof-of-concept and motivation for the future development of intercultural affect recognition systems, especially those deployed in low-resource situations without annotated data.
summary: In our multicultural world, affect-aware AI systems that support humans need the ability to perceive affect across variations in emotion expression patterns across cultures. These systems must perform well in cultural contexts without annotated affect datasets available for training models. A standard assumption in affective computing is that affect recognition models trained and used within the same culture (intracultural) will perform better than models trained on one culture and used on different cultures (intercultural). We test this assumption and present the first systematic study of intercultural affect recognition models using videos of real-world dyadic interactions from six cultures. We develop an attention-based feature selection approach under temporal causal discovery to identify behavioral cues that can be leveraged in intercultural affect recognition models. Across all six cultures, our findings demonstrate that intercultural affect recognition models were as effective or more effective than intracultural models. We identify and contribute useful behavioral features for intercultural affect recognition; facial features from the visual modality were more useful than the audio modality in this study's context. Our paper presents a proof-of-concept and motivation for the future development of intercultural affect recognition systems, especially those deployed in low-resource situations without annotated data.
abstract_zh: 在我们的多元文化世界中，支持人类的情感感知人工智能系统需要能够感知跨文化情绪表达模式差异的影响。这些系统必须在没有可用于训练模型的带注释影响数据集的文化背景下表现良好。情感计算的一个标准假设是，在同一文化（文化内）中训练和使用的影响识别模型将比在一种文化中训练并在不同文化（跨文化）中使用的模型表现得更好。我们测试了这一假设，并使用来自六种文化的现实世界二元互动的视频，首次系统地研究了跨文化情感识别模型。我们在时间因果发现下开发了一种基于注意力的特征选择方法，以识别可在跨文化情感识别模型中利用的行为线索。在所有六种文化中，我们的研究结果表明，跨文化情感识别模型与文化内模型一样有效或更有效。我们识别并贡献跨文化情感识别有用的行为特征；在本研究中，来自视觉方式的面部特征比来自音频方式的面部特征更有用。我们的论文提出了跨文化情感识别系统未来发展的概念验证和动机，特别是那些部署在没有注释数据的资源匮乏情况下的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨文化情感识别方法，利用音频和视觉信息在六个不同文化的真实场景中进行情感识别。
AI.motivation: 现有情感计算模型在跨文化场景中表现不佳，且缺乏多文化标注数据集，需开发适用于低资源环境的跨文化情感识别系统。
AI.method: 基于注意力机制的特征选择方法结合时间因果发现，筛选适用于跨文化情感识别的行为线索。
AI.result: 跨文化模型在六种文化中表现与同文化模型相当或更优，视觉模态的面部特征比音频模态更具识别价值。
AI.conclusion: 证明了跨文化情感识别的可行性，为低资源环境下部署通用情感识别系统提供了理论基础和方法支持。

conclusion: 证明了跨文化情感识别的可行性，为低资源环境下部署通用情感识别系统提供了理论基础和方法支持。
search_text: Towards Intercultural Affect Recognition: Audio-Visual Affect Recognition in the Wild Across Six Cultures 迈向跨文化情感识别：跨六种文化的视听情感识别 In our multicultural world, affect-aware AI systems that support humans need the ability to perceive affect across variations in emotion expression patterns across cultures. These systems must perform well in cultural contexts without annotated affect datasets available for training models. A standard assumption in affective computing is that affect recognition models trained and used within the same culture (intracultural) will perform better than models trained on one culture and used on different cultures (intercultural). We test this assumption and present the first systematic study of intercultural affect recognition models using videos of real-world dyadic interactions from six cultures. We develop an attention-based feature selection approach under temporal causal discovery to identify behavioral cues that can be leveraged in intercultural affect recognition models. Across all six cultures, our findings demonstrate that intercultural affect recognition models were as effective or more effective than intracultural models. We identify and contribute useful behavioral features for intercultural affect recognition; facial features from the visual modality were more useful than the audio modality in this study's context. Our paper presents a proof-of-concept and motivation for the future development of intercultural affect recognition systems, especially those deployed in low-resource situations without annotated data. 在我们的多元文化世界中，支持人类的情感感知人工智能系统需要能够感知跨文化情绪表达模式差异的影响。这些系统必须在没有可用于训练模型的带注释影响数据集的文化背景下表现良好。情感计算的一个标准假设是，在同一文化（文化内）中训练和使用的影响识别模型将比在一种文化中训练并在不同文化（跨文化）中使用的模型表现得更好。我们测试了这一假设，并使用来自六种文化的现实世界二元互动的视频，首次系统地研究了跨文化情感识别模型。我们在时间因果发现下开发了一种基于注意力的特征选择方法，以识别可在跨文化情感识别模型中利用的行为线索。在所有六种文化中，我们的研究结果表明，跨文化情感识别模型与文化内模型一样有效或更有效。我们识别并贡献跨文化情感识别有用的行为特征；在本研究中，来自视觉方式的面部特征比来自音频方式的面部特征更有用。我们的论文提出了跨文化情感识别系统未来发展的概念验证和动机，特别是那些部署在没有注释数据的资源匮乏情况下的系统。 本文提出一种跨文化情感识别方法，利用音频和视觉信息在六个不同文化的真实场景中进行情感识别。 Leena Mathur,Ralph Adolphs,Maja J Matarić cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Sein Park,Yeongsang Jang,Eunhyeok Park
title: Symmetry Regularization and Saturating Nonlinearity for Robust Quantization
title_zh: 鲁棒量化的对称正则化和饱和非线性
abstract: Robust quantization improves the tolerance of networks for various implementations, allowing reliable output in different bit-widths or fragmented low-precision arithmetic. In this work, we perform extensive analyses to identify the sources of quantization error and present three insights to robustify a network against quantization: reduction of error propagation, range clamping for error minimization, and inherited robustness against quantization. Based on these insights, we propose two novel methods called symmetry regularization (SymReg) and saturating nonlinearity (SatNL). Applying the proposed methods during training can enhance the robustness of arbitrary neural networks against quantization on existing post-training quantization (PTQ) and quantization-aware training (QAT) algorithms and enables us to obtain a single weight flexible enough to maintain the output quality under various conditions. We conduct extensive studies on CIFAR and ImageNet datasets and validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods.
summary: Robust quantization improves the tolerance of networks for various implementations, allowing reliable output in different bit-widths or fragmented low-precision arithmetic. In this work, we perform extensive analyses to identify the sources of quantization error and present three insights to robustify a network against quantization: reduction of error propagation, range clamping for error minimization, and inherited robustness against quantization. Based on these insights, we propose two novel methods called symmetry regularization (SymReg) and saturating nonlinearity (SatNL). Applying the proposed methods during training can enhance the robustness of arbitrary neural networks against quantization on existing post-training quantization (PTQ) and quantization-aware training (QAT) algorithms and enables us to obtain a single weight flexible enough to maintain the output quality under various conditions. We conduct extensive studies on CIFAR and ImageNet datasets and validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒的量化提高了网络对各种实现的容忍度，允许不同位宽或碎片低精度算术的可靠输出。在这项工作中，我们进行了广泛的分析，以确定量化误差的来源，并提出了三种增强网络抗量化的见解：减少误差传播、误差最小化的范围钳制以及针对量化的继承鲁棒性。基于这些见解，我们提出了两种新颖的方法，称为对称正则化（SymReg）和饱和非线性（SatNL）。在训练期间应用所提出的方法可以增强任意神经网络对现有训练后量化（PTQ）和量化感知训练（QAT）算法的量化的鲁棒性，并使我们能够获得足够灵活的单个权重以在各种条件下保持输出质量。我们对 CIFAR 和 ImageNet 数据集进行了广泛的研究，并验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出对称正则化（SymReg）和饱和非线性（SatNL）两种方法，以提升神经网络在量化后的鲁棒性，使其在不同位宽或低精度计算下保持输出质量。
AI.motivation: 量化会引入误差并影响网络性能，现有方法难以在不同硬件实现下保持稳定。本文旨在通过分析量化误差来源，提出通用方案增强网络对量化误差的容忍度。
AI.method: 基于误差传播减少、范围钳制和继承鲁棒性三个洞察，设计SymReg约束权重对称性分布，SatNL通过激活函数截断抑制误差扩散，两种方法可集成到现有PTQ/QAT流程中。
AI.result: 在CIFAR和ImageNet数据集上验证，所提方法显著提升量化后模型精度，证明其能适配多种量化方案并保持灵活的权重适应性。
AI.conclusion: SymReg与SatNL有效增强了网络量化鲁棒性，为跨硬件部署提供统一解决方案，未来可探索更高效的量化训练协同策略。

Applying the proposed methods during training can enhance the robustness of arbitrary neural networks against quantization on existing post-training quantization (PTQ) and quantization-aware training (QAT) algorithms and enables us to obtain a single weight flexible enough to maintain the output quality under various conditions. authors_text: Alessio Colucci,Andreas Steininger,Muhammad Shafique
title: enpheeph: A Fault Injection Framework for Spiking and Compressed Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: enpheeph：尖峰和压缩深度神经网络的故障注入框架
comment: Source code: https://github.com/Alexei95/enpheeph To appear at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), October, 2022
comments: Source code: https://github.com/Alexei95/enpheeph To appear at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), October, 2022
abstract: Research on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) has focused on improving performance and accuracy for real-world deployments, leading to new models, such as Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), and optimization techniques, e.g., quantization and pruning for compressed networks. However, the deployment of these innovative models and optimization techniques introduces possible reliability issues, which is a pillar for DNNs to be widely used in safety-critical applications, e.g., autonomous driving. Moreover, scaling technology nodes have the associated risk of multiple faults happening at the same time, a possibility not addressed in state-of-the-art resiliency analyses. Towards better reliability analysis for DNNs, we present enpheeph, a Fault Injection Framework for Spiking and Compressed DNNs. The enpheeph framework enables optimized execution on specialized hardware devices, e.g., GPUs, while providing complete customizability to investigate different fault models, emulating various reliability constraints and use-cases. Hence, the faults can be executed on SNNs as well as compressed networks with minimal-to-none modifications to the underlying code, a feat that is not achievable by other state-of-the-art tools. To evaluate our enpheeph framework, we analyze the resiliency of different DNN and SNN models, with different compression techniques. By injecting a random and increasing number of faults, we show that DNNs can show a reduction in accuracy with a fault rate as low as 7 x 10 ^ (-7) faults per parameter, with an accuracy drop higher than 40%. Run-time overhead when executing enpheeph is less than 20% of the baseline execution time when executing 100 000 faults concurrently, at least 10x lower than state-of-the-art frameworks, making enpheeph future-proof for complex fault injection scenarios. We release enpheeph at https://github.com/Alexei95/enpheeph.
summary: Research on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) has focused on improving performance and accuracy for real-world deployments, leading to new models, such as Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), and optimization techniques, e.g., quantization and pruning for compressed networks. However, the deployment of these innovative models and optimization techniques introduces possible reliability issues, which is a pillar for DNNs to be widely used in safety-critical applications, e.g., autonomous driving. Moreover, scaling technology nodes have the associated risk of multiple faults happening at the same time, a possibility not addressed in state-of-the-art resiliency analyses. Towards better reliability analysis for DNNs, we present enpheeph, a Fault Injection Framework for Spiking and Compressed DNNs. The enpheeph framework enables optimized execution on specialized hardware devices, e.g., GPUs, while providing complete customizability to investigate different fault models, emulating various reliability constraints and use-cases. Hence, the faults can be executed on SNNs as well as compressed networks with minimal-to-none modifications to the underlying code, a feat that is not achievable by other state-of-the-art tools. To evaluate our enpheeph framework, we analyze the resiliency of different DNN and SNN models, with different compression techniques. By injecting a random and increasing number of faults, we show that DNNs can show a reduction in accuracy with a fault rate as low as 7 x 10 ^ (-7) faults per parameter, with an accuracy drop higher than 40%. Run-time overhead when executing enpheeph is less than 20% of the baseline execution time when executing 100 000 faults concurrently, at least 10x lower than state-of-the-art frameworks, making enpheeph future-proof for complex fault injection scenarios. We release enpheeph at https://github.com/Alexei95/enpheeph.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的研究重点是提高实际部署的性能和准确性，从而催生了尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 等新模型以及压缩网络的量化和剪枝等优化技术。然而，这些创新模型和优化技术的部署可能会带来可靠性问题，而这正是 DNN 广泛应用于自动驾驶等安全关键应用的支柱。此外，扩展技术节点存在同时发生多个故障的相关风险，这是最先进的弹性分析中未解决的可能性。为了更好地分析 DNN 的可靠性，我们提出了 enpheeph，一种用于尖峰和压缩 DNN 的故障注入框架。 enpheeph 框架支持在专用硬件设备（例如 GPU）上优化执行，同时提供完整的可定制性来研究不同的故障模型，模拟各种可靠性约束和用例。因此，故障可以在 SNN 以及压缩网络上执行，只需对底层代码进行最少甚至无需修改，这是其他最先进的工具无法实现的壮举。为了评估我们的 enpheeph 框架，我们分析了采用不同压缩技术的不同 DNN 和 SNN 模型的弹性。通过注入随机且不断增加的故障数量，我们发现 DNN 的准确率会降低，每个参数的故障率低至 7 x 10 ^ (-7) 个故障，准确率下降超过 40%。执行 enpheeph 时的运行时开销不到同时执行 100 000 个故障时基准执行时间的 20%，比最先进的框架至少低 10 倍，使得 enpheeph 能够适应复杂的故障注入场景。我们在 https://github.com/Alexei95/enpheeph 发布了 enpheeph。

AI.tldr: 本文提出enpheeph框架，用于对脉冲神经网络（SNN）和压缩深度神经网络（DNN）进行故障注入分析，以评估其可靠性。
AI.motivation: 新型神经网络模型（如SNN）和压缩技术（如量化、剪枝）在实际部署中可能引入可靠性问题，而现有工具无法有效处理多故障场景，尤其在自动驾驶等安全关键领域亟需可靠性分析工具。
AI.method: 开发enpheeph框架，支持在GPU等专用硬件上高效执行，提供自定义故障模型注入功能，可兼容SNN和压缩网络，且无需对底层代码进行重大修改。
AI.result: 实验表明，DNN在故障率低至7×10⁻⁷时准确率下降超40%；框架运行时开销低于基线的20%，比现有工具低至少10倍，且支持复杂故障场景。
AI.conclusion: enpheeph为SNN和压缩DNN的可靠性分析提供了高效、灵活的解决方案，适用于未来复杂故障注入需求，并已开源。

search_text: enpheeph: A Fault Injection Framework for Spiking and Compressed Deep Neural Networks enpheeph：尖峰和压缩深度神经网络的故障注入框架 Research on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) has focused on improving performance and accuracy for real-world deployments, leading to new models, such as Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), and optimization techniques, e.g., quantization and pruning for compressed networks. However, the deployment of these innovative models and optimization techniques introduces possible reliability issues, which is a pillar for DNNs to be widely used in safety-critical applications, e.g., autonomous driving. Moreover, scaling technology nodes have the associated risk of multiple faults happening at the same time, a possibility not addressed in state-of-the-art resiliency analyses. Towards better reliability analysis for DNNs, we present enpheeph, a Fault Injection Framework for Spiking and Compressed DNNs. The enpheeph framework enables optimized execution on specialized hardware devices, e.g., GPUs, while providing complete customizability to investigate different fault models, emulating various reliability constraints and use-cases. Hence, the faults can be executed on SNNs as well as compressed networks with minimal-to-none modifications to the underlying code, a feat that is not achievable by other state-of-the-art tools. To evaluate our enpheeph framework, we analyze the resiliency of different DNN and SNN models, with different compression techniques. By injecting a random and increasing number of faults, we show that DNNs can show a reduction in accuracy with a fault rate as low as 7 x 10 ^ (-7) faults per parameter, with an accuracy drop higher than 40%. Run-time overhead when executing enpheeph is less than 20% of the baseline execution time when executing 100 000 faults concurrently, at least 10x lower than state-of-the-art frameworks, making enpheeph future-proof for complex fault injection scenarios. We release enpheeph at https://github.com/Alexei95/enpheeph. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的研究重点是提高实际部署的性能和准确性，从而催生了尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 等新模型以及压缩网络的量化和剪枝等优化技术。然而，这些创新模型和优化技术的部署可能会带来可靠性问题，而这正是 DNN 广泛应用于自动驾驶等安全关键应用的支柱。此外，扩展技术节点存在同时发生多个故障的相关风险，这是最先进的弹性分析中未解决的可能性。为了更好地分析 DNN 的可靠性，我们提出了 enpheeph，一种用于尖峰和压缩 DNN 的故障注入框架。 enpheeph 框架支持在专用硬件设备（例如 GPU）上优化执行，同时提供完整的可定制性来研究不同的故障模型，模拟各种可靠性约束和用例。因此，故障可以在 SNN 以及压缩网络上执行，只需对底层代码进行最少甚至无需修改，这是其他最先进的工具无法实现的壮举。为了评估我们的 enpheeph 框架，我们分析了采用不同压缩技术的不同 DNN 和 SNN 模型的弹性。通过注入随机且不断增加的故障数量，我们发现 DNN 的准确率会降低，每个参数的故障率低至 7 x 10 ^ (-7) 个故障，准确率下降超过 40%。执行 enpheeph 时的运行时开销不到同时执行 100 000 个故障时基准执行时间的 20%，比最先进的框架至少低 10 倍，使得 enpheeph 能够适应复杂的故障注入场景。我们在 https://github.com/Alexei95/enpheeph 发布了 enpheeph。 本文提出enpheeph框架，用于对脉冲神经网络（SNN）和压缩深度神经网络（DNN）进行故障注入分析，以评估其可靠性。 Alessio Colucci,Andreas Steininger,Muhammad Shafique cs.NE,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jae-Won Choi,Dae-Yong Hong,Chan Jung,Eugene Hwang,Sung-Hyuk Park,Seung-Young Roh
title: A Multi-View Learning Approach to Enhance Automatic 12-Lead ECG Diagnosis Performance
title_zh: 提高自动 12 导联心电图诊断性能的多视图学习方法
abstract: The performances of commonly used electrocardiogram (ECG) diagnosis models have recently improved with the introduction of deep learning (DL). However, the impact of various combinations of multiple DL components and/or the role of data augmentation techniques on the diagnosis have not been sufficiently investigated. This study proposes an ensemble-based multi-view learning approach with an ECG augmentation technique to achieve a higher performance than traditional automatic 12-lead ECG diagnosis methods. The data analysis results show that the proposed model reports an F1 score of 0.840, which outperforms existing state-ofthe-art methods in the literature.
summary: The performances of commonly used electrocardiogram (ECG) diagnosis models have recently improved with the introduction of deep learning (DL). However, the impact of various combinations of multiple DL components and/or the role of data augmentation techniques on the diagnosis have not been sufficiently investigated. This study proposes an ensemble-based multi-view learning approach with an ECG augmentation technique to achieve a higher performance than traditional automatic 12-lead ECG diagnosis methods. The data analysis results show that the proposed model reports an F1 score of 0.840, which outperforms existing state-ofthe-art methods in the literature.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习（DL）的引入，常用心电图（ECG）诊断模型的性能最近得到了改善。然而，多个深度学习组件的各种组合的影响和/或数据增强技术对诊断的作用尚未得到充分研究。本研究提出了一种基于集成的多视图学习方法和心电图增强技术，以实现比传统自动 12 导联心电图诊断方法更高的性能。数据分析结果表明，所提出的模型报告的 F1 分数为 0.840，优于文献中现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角学习的增强方法，以提高自动12导联心电图（ECG）诊断的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习（DL）已提升ECG诊断模型性能，但多种DL组件组合及数据增强技术对诊断的影响尚未充分研究。
AI.method: 采用集成多视角学习框架，结合ECG数据增强技术，优化模型诊断能力。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，所提模型在F1评分上达到0.840，优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 多视角学习与数据增强结合能有效提升ECG自动诊断性能，为相关研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Sharmita Dey,David Fan,Robin Schmid,Anushri Dixit,Kyohei Otsu,Thomas Touma,Arndt F. Schilling,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi
title: PrePARE: Predictive Proprioception for Agile Failure Event Detection in Robotic Exploration of Extreme Terrains
title_zh: PrePARE：极端地形机器人探索中敏捷故障事件检测的预测性本体感觉
comment: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Legged robots can traverse a wide variety of terrains, some of which may be challenging for wheeled robots, such as stairs or highly uneven surfaces. However, quadruped robots face stability challenges on slippery surfaces. This can be resolved by adjusting the robot's locomotion by switching to more conservative and stable locomotion modes, such as crawl mode (where three feet are in contact with the ground always) or amble mode (where one foot touches down at a time) to prevent potential falls. To tackle these challenges, we propose an approach to learn a model from past robot experience for predictive detection of potential failures. Accordingly, we trigger gait switching merely based on proprioceptive sensory information. To learn this predictive model, we propose a semi-supervised process for detecting and annotating ground truth slip events in two stages: We first detect abnormal occurrences in the time series sequences of the gait data using an unsupervised anomaly detector, and then, the anomalies are verified with expert human knowledge in a replay simulation to assert the event of a slip. These annotated slip events are then used as ground truth examples to train an ensemble decision learner for predicting slip probabilities across terrains for traversability. We analyze our model on data recorded by a legged robot on multiple sites with slippery terrain. We demonstrate that a potential slip event can be predicted up to 720 ms ahead of a potential fall with an average precision greater than 0.95 and an average F-score of 0.82. Finally, we validate our approach in real-time by deploying it on a legged robot and switching its gait mode based on slip event detection.
summary: Legged robots can traverse a wide variety of terrains, some of which may be challenging for wheeled robots, such as stairs or highly uneven surfaces. However, quadruped robots face stability challenges on slippery surfaces. This can be resolved by adjusting the robot's locomotion by switching to more conservative and stable locomotion modes, such as crawl mode (where three feet are in contact with the ground always) or amble mode (where one foot touches down at a time) to prevent potential falls. To tackle these challenges, we propose an approach to learn a model from past robot experience for predictive detection of potential failures. Accordingly, we trigger gait switching merely based on proprioceptive sensory information. To learn this predictive model, we propose a semi-supervised process for detecting and annotating ground truth slip events in two stages: We first detect abnormal occurrences in the time series sequences of the gait data using an unsupervised anomaly detector, and then, the anomalies are verified with expert human knowledge in a replay simulation to assert the event of a slip. These annotated slip events are then used as ground truth examples to train an ensemble decision learner for predicting slip probabilities across terrains for traversability. We analyze our model on data recorded by a legged robot on multiple sites with slippery terrain. We demonstrate that a potential slip event can be predicted up to 720 ms ahead of a potential fall with an average precision greater than 0.95 and an average F-score of 0.82. Finally, we validate our approach in real-time by deploying it on a legged robot and switching its gait mode based on slip event detection.
abstract_zh: 腿式机器人可以穿越各种地形，其中一些地形对于轮式机器人来说可能具有挑战性，例如楼梯或高度不平坦的表面。然而，四足机器人在光滑表面上面临稳定性挑战。这可以通过切换到更保守和稳定的运动模式来调整机器人的运动来解决，例如爬行模式（三只脚始终与地面接触）或缓步模式（一次一只脚着地）以防止潜在的跌倒。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种从过去的机器人经验中学习模型的方法，以预测检测潜在的故障。因此，我们仅根据本体感觉信息触发步态切换。为了学习这种预测模型，我们提出了一种半监督过程，分两个阶段检测和注释地面真实滑倒事件：我们首先使用无监督异常检测器检测步态数据的时间序列中的异常发生，然后在重放模拟中用人类专家知识验证异常，以断言滑倒事件。然后将这些带注释的滑动事件用作地面实况示例来训练集成决策学习器，以预测跨地形的滑动概率以实现可穿越性。我们根据有腿机器人在多个地形湿滑的地点记录的数据来分析我们的模型。我们证明，可以在潜在跌倒之前提前 720 毫秒预测潜在的滑倒事件，平均精度大于 0.95，平均 F 分数为 0.82。最后，我们通过将其部署在有腿机器人上并根据滑动事件检测切换其步态模式来实时验证我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrePARE系统，通过预测性本体感觉实现四足机器人在极端地形中滑倒事件的提前检测与步态切换，以提升稳定性。
AI.motivation: 四足机器人在滑腻地形中易失去平衡，传统方法难以及时调整步态，需开发基于预测模型的主动防护机制以避免跌倒。
AI.method: 采用半监督流程：首先用无监督异常检测识别步态数据异常，再通过专家验证标注滑倒事件，最终训练集成决策模型预测滑倒概率并触发步态切换。
AI.result: 在多场景滑腻地形数据中实现720ms提前预警，平均精度>0.95，F1分数0.82，实际部署验证了实时有效性。
AI.conclusion: PrePARE系统通过提前预测与主动步态调整，显著提升了四足机器人在极端地形中的运动安全性和适应性。

authors_text: Rachel Holladay,Tomás Lozano-Pérez,Alberto Rodriguez
title: Robust Planning for Multi-stage Forceful Manipulation
title_zh: 多阶段强力操纵的稳健规划
comment: Accepted to IJRR (International Journal of Robotics Research). Supplemental Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r1L-gxufFuY
comments: Accepted to IJRR (International Journal of Robotics Research). Supplemental Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r1L-gxufFuY
abstract: Multi-step forceful manipulation tasks, such as opening a push-and-twist childproof bottle, require a robot to make various planning choices that are substantially impacted by the requirement to exert force during the task. The robot must reason over discrete and continuous choices relating to the sequence of actions, such as whether to pick up an object, and the parameters of each of those actions, such how to grasp the object. To enable planning and executing forceful manipulation, we augment an existing task and motion planner with constraints that explicitly consider torque and frictional limits, captured through the proposed forceful kinematic chain constraint. In three domains, opening a childproof bottle, twisting a nut and cutting a vegetable, we demonstrate how the system selects from among a combinatorial set of strategies.We also show how cost-sensitive planning can be used to find strategies and parameters that are robust to uncertainty in the physical parameters.
summary: Multi-step forceful manipulation tasks, such as opening a push-and-twist childproof bottle, require a robot to make various planning choices that are substantially impacted by the requirement to exert force during the task. The robot must reason over discrete and continuous choices relating to the sequence of actions, such as whether to pick up an object, and the parameters of each of those actions, such how to grasp the object. To enable planning and executing forceful manipulation, we augment an existing task and motion planner with constraints that explicitly consider torque and frictional limits, captured through the proposed forceful kinematic chain constraint. In three domains, opening a childproof bottle, twisting a nut and cutting a vegetable, we demonstrate how the system selects from among a combinatorial set of strategies.We also show how cost-sensitive planning can be used to find strategies and parameters that are robust to uncertainty in the physical parameters.
abstract_zh: 多步骤的强力操作任务，例如打开推扭儿童安全瓶，需要机器人做出各种计划选择，这些选择在很大程度上受到任务期间施力要求的影响。机器人必须对与动作序列相关的离散和连续选择进行推理，例如是否拾取物体，以及每个动作的参数，例如如何抓住物体。为了能够规划和执行强力操纵，我们通过明确考虑通过提出的强力运动链约束捕获的扭矩和摩擦限制的约束来增强现有的任务和运动规划器。在打开儿童安全瓶、扭转坚果和切蔬菜这三个领域中，我们演示了系统如何从一组组合策略中进行选择。我们还展示了如何使用成本敏感的规划来寻找对物理参数不确定性具有鲁棒性的策略和参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多阶段强力操作任务的鲁棒规划方法，通过考虑扭矩和摩擦限制来增强机器人执行如开启儿童安全瓶等复杂任务的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有任务与运动规划器未能有效处理强力操作中所需的扭矩和摩擦约束，导致在需要施加力的多阶段任务中规划效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过向现有任务与运动规划器添加显式的扭矩和摩擦限制约束（即提出的强力运动链约束），并结合成本敏感规划方法，以应对物理参数的不确定性。
AI.result: 在开启儿童安全瓶、拧紧螺母和切割蔬菜三个领域验证了系统能够从组合策略中选择有效方案，并对物理参数不确定性具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合物理约束和成本敏感规划，为多阶段强力操作任务提供了更可靠和鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Guilherme Paulino-Passos,Francesca Toni
title: On Interactive Explanations as Non-Monotonic Reasoning
title_zh: 作为非单调推理的交互式解释
comment: Corrected version for the XAI-IJCAI 2022 workshop, expands on the XLoKR-KR 2022 workshop
comments: Corrected version for the XAI-IJCAI 2022 workshop, expands on the XLoKR-KR 2022 workshop
abstract: Recent work shows issues of consistency with explanations, with methods generating local explanations that seem reasonable instance-wise, but that are inconsistent across instances. This suggests not only that instance-wise explanations can be unreliable, but mainly that, when interacting with a system via multiple inputs, a user may actually lose confidence in the system. To better analyse this issue, in this work we treat explanations as objects that can be subject to reasoning and present a formal model of the interactive scenario between user and system, via sequences of inputs, outputs, and explanations. We argue that explanations can be thought of as committing to some model behaviour (even if only prima facie), suggesting a form of entailment, which, we argue, should be thought of as non-monotonic. This allows: 1) to solve some considered inconsistencies in explanation, such as via a specificity relation; 2) to consider properties from the non-monotonic reasoning literature and discuss their desirability, gaining more insight on the interactive explanation scenario.
summary: Recent work shows issues of consistency with explanations, with methods generating local explanations that seem reasonable instance-wise, but that are inconsistent across instances. This suggests not only that instance-wise explanations can be unreliable, but mainly that, when interacting with a system via multiple inputs, a user may actually lose confidence in the system. To better analyse this issue, in this work we treat explanations as objects that can be subject to reasoning and present a formal model of the interactive scenario between user and system, via sequences of inputs, outputs, and explanations. We argue that explanations can be thought of as committing to some model behaviour (even if only prima facie), suggesting a form of entailment, which, we argue, should be thought of as non-monotonic. This allows: 1) to solve some considered inconsistencies in explanation, such as via a specificity relation; 2) to consider properties from the non-monotonic reasoning literature and discuss their desirability, gaining more insight on the interactive explanation scenario.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作显示了解释的一致性问题，生成局部解释的方法在实例方面似乎是合理的，但在实例之间却不一致。这不仅表明实例解释可能不可靠，而且主要表明，当通过多个输入与系统交互时，用户实际上可能会对系统失去信心。为了更好地分析这个问题，在这项工作中，我们将解释视为可以进行推理的对象，并通过输入、输出和解释序列呈现用户和系统之间交互场景的正式模型。我们认为，解释可以被认为是对某种模型行为的承诺（即使只是表面上的），暗示了一种蕴涵形式，我们认为，这种形式应该被认为是非单调的。这允许：1）解决解释中一些经过考虑的不一致之处，例如通过特异性关系； 2）考虑非单调推理文献中的属性并讨论它们的可取性，从而获得对交互式解释场景的更多见解。

AI.tldr: 本文将交互式解释建模为非单调推理，以解决局部解释在跨实例一致性上的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的局部解释在单个实例上合理，但跨实例存在不一致性，导致用户对系统失去信心，需建立形式化模型分析此问题。
AI.method: 构建用户与系统交互的形式化模型，通过输入、输出和解释的序列，将解释视为对模型行为的非单调承诺。
AI.result: 通过特异性关系解决解释不一致性，并借鉴非单调推理领域的性质，深入分析交互式解释场景。
AI.conclusion: 非单调推理框架能有效处理解释不一致性，为交互式解释提供理论支持与改进方向。

authors_text: Kevin Y. Chen
title: An Improved A* Search Algorithm for Road Networks Using New Heuristic Estimation
title_zh: 使用新的启发式估计改进道路网络 A* 搜索算法
abstract: Finding the shortest path between two points in a graph is a fundamental problem that has been well-studied over the past several decades. Shortest path algorithms are commonly applied to modern navigation systems, so our study aims to improve the efficiency of an existing algorithm on large-scale Euclidean networks. The current literature lacks a deep understanding of certain algorithms' performance on these types of networks. Therefore, we incorporate a new heuristic function, called the $k$-step look-ahead, into the A* search algorithm and conduct a computational experiment to evaluate and compare the results on road networks of varying sizes. Our main findings are that this new heuristic yields a significant improvement in runtime, particularly for larger networks when compared to standard A*, as well as that a higher value of $k$ is needed to achieve optimal efficiency as network size increases. Future research can build upon this work by implementing a program that automatically chooses an optimal $k$ value given an input network. The results of this study can be applied to GPS routing technologies or other navigation devices to speed up the time needed to find the shortest path from an origin to a destination, an essential objective in daily life.
summary: Finding the shortest path between two points in a graph is a fundamental problem that has been well-studied over the past several decades. Shortest path algorithms are commonly applied to modern navigation systems, so our study aims to improve the efficiency of an existing algorithm on large-scale Euclidean networks. The current literature lacks a deep understanding of certain algorithms' performance on these types of networks. Therefore, we incorporate a new heuristic function, called the $k$-step look-ahead, into the A* search algorithm and conduct a computational experiment to evaluate and compare the results on road networks of varying sizes. Our main findings are that this new heuristic yields a significant improvement in runtime, particularly for larger networks when compared to standard A*, as well as that a higher value of $k$ is needed to achieve optimal efficiency as network size increases. Future research can build upon this work by implementing a program that automatically chooses an optimal $k$ value given an input network. The results of this study can be applied to GPS routing technologies or other navigation devices to speed up the time needed to find the shortest path from an origin to a destination, an essential objective in daily life.
abstract_zh: 寻找图中两点之间的最短路径是过去几十年来经过深入研究的一个基本问题。最短路径算法通常应用于现代导航系统，因此我们的研究旨在提高大规模欧几里德网络上现有算法的效率。目前的文献缺乏对某些算法在这些类型网络上的性能的深入理解。因此，我们将一种新的启发式函数（称为 $k$ 步前瞻）纳入 A* 搜索算法中，并进行计算实验来评估和比较不同规模道路网络上的结果。我们的主要发现是，与标准 A* 相比，这种新的启发式方法在运行时方面产生了显着的改进，特别是对于较大的网络，并且随着网络规模的增加，需要更高的 $k$ 值才能实现最佳效率。未来的研究可以基于这项工作，通过实施一个程序来自动选择给定输入网络的最佳 $k$ 值。这项研究的结果可以应用于 GPS 路由技术或其他导航设备，以加快找到从出发地到目的地的最短路径所需的时间，这是日常生活中的一个重要目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的A*搜索算法，通过引入新的启发式估计方法优化道路网络中的最短路径搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理大规模欧几里得网络时效率不足，需改进导航系统中路径搜索的计算性能。
AI.method: 在传统A*算法中引入基于$k$步前瞻的新型启发式函数，并通过计算实验对比不同规模道路网络的性能表现。
AI.result: 新启发式函数显著提升算法运行时长，尤其在大规模网络中表现更优，且网络规模越大需采用更高的$k$值以达到最佳效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可应用于GPS导航等技术加速路径搜索，未来研究需开发自动适配最优$k$值的智能选择机制。
