authors_text: Qifeng Gao,Rui Ding,Linyuan Wang,Bin Xue,Yuping Duan
title: LRIP-Net: Low-Resolution Image Prior based Network for Limited-Angle CT Reconstruction
title_zh: LRIP-Net：用于有限角度 CT 重建的基于低分辨率图像先验的网络
abstract: In the practical applications of computed tomography imaging, the projection data may be acquired within a limited-angle range and corrupted by noises due to the limitation of scanning conditions. The noisy incomplete projection data results in the ill-posedness of the inverse problems. In this work, we theoretically verify that the low-resolution reconstruction problem has better numerical stability than the high-resolution problem. In what follows, a novel low-resolution image prior based CT reconstruction model is proposed to make use of the low-resolution image to improve the reconstruction quality. More specifically, we build up a low-resolution reconstruction problem on the down-sampled projection data, and use the reconstructed low-resolution image as prior knowledge for the original limited-angle CT problem. We solve the constrained minimization problem by the alternating direction method with all subproblems approximated by the convolutional neural networks. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our double-resolution network outperforms both the variational method and popular learning-based reconstruction methods on noisy limited-angle reconstruction problems.
summary: In the practical applications of computed tomography imaging, the projection data may be acquired within a limited-angle range and corrupted by noises due to the limitation of scanning conditions. The noisy incomplete projection data results in the ill-posedness of the inverse problems. In this work, we theoretically verify that the low-resolution reconstruction problem has better numerical stability than the high-resolution problem. In what follows, a novel low-resolution image prior based CT reconstruction model is proposed to make use of the low-resolution image to improve the reconstruction quality. More specifically, we build up a low-resolution reconstruction problem on the down-sampled projection data, and use the reconstructed low-resolution image as prior knowledge for the original limited-angle CT problem. We solve the constrained minimization problem by the alternating direction method with all subproblems approximated by the convolutional neural networks. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our double-resolution network outperforms both the variational method and popular learning-based reconstruction methods on noisy limited-angle reconstruction problems.
abstract_zh: 在计算机断层成像的实际应用中，由于扫描条件的限制，投影数据可能会在有限的角度范围内采集，并可能受到噪声的影响。噪声不完全投影数据导致反问题的不适定性。在这项工作中，我们从理论上验证了低分辨率重建问题比高分辨率问题具有更好的数值稳定性。接下来，提出了一种新的基于低分辨率图像先验的CT重建模型，以利用低分辨率图像来提高重建质量。更具体地说，我们在下采样的投影数据上建立了低分辨率重建问题，并使用重建的低分辨率图像作为原始有限角度 CT 问题的先验知识。我们通过交替方向方法解决约束最小化问题，所有子问题都由卷积神经网络近似。数值实验表明，我们的双分辨率网络在噪声有限角度重建问题上优于变分方法和流行的基于学习的重建方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低分辨率图像先验的CT重建网络LRIP-Net，用于解决有限角度和噪声条件下的CT图像重建问题。
AI.motivation: 实际CT成像中，有限角度扫描和噪声会导致投影数据不完整，逆问题病态。低分辨率重建问题具有更好的数值稳定性，可作为高分辨率重建的先验知识。
AI.method: 构建低分辨率重建子问题，利用降采样投影数据重建低分辨率图像作为先验，通过交替方向法结合卷积神经网络求解约束最小化问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该双分辨率网络在噪声有限角度重建任务中优于变分方法和主流学习型重建方法。
AI.conclusion: 低分辨率图像先验能有效提升有限角度CT重建质量，为病态逆问题提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Lennart Schneider,Florian Pfisterer,Paul Kent,Juergen Branke,Bernd Bischl,Janek Thomas
title: Tackling Neural Architecture Search With Quality Diversity Optimization
title_zh: 通过质量多样性优化来解决神经架构搜索问题
comment: Accepted at the First Conference on Automated Machine Learning (Main Track). 30 pages, 8 tables, 13 figures
comments: Accepted at the First Conference on Automated Machine Learning (Main Track). 30 pages, 8 tables, 13 figures
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) has been studied extensively and has grown to become a research field with substantial impact. While classical single-objective NAS searches for the architecture with the best performance, multi-objective NAS considers multiple objectives that should be optimized simultaneously, e.g., minimizing resource usage along the validation error. Although considerable progress has been made in the field of multi-objective NAS, we argue that there is some discrepancy between the actual optimization problem of practical interest and the optimization problem that multi-objective NAS tries to solve. We resolve this discrepancy by formulating the multi-objective NAS problem as a quality diversity optimization (QDO) problem and introduce three quality diversity NAS optimizers (two of them belonging to the group of multifidelity optimizers), which search for high-performing yet diverse architectures that are optimal for application-specific niches, e.g., hardware constraints. By comparing these optimizers to their multi-objective counterparts, we demonstrate that quality diversity NAS in general outperforms multi-objective NAS with respect to quality of solutions and efficiency. We further show how applications and future NAS research can thrive on QDO.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) has been studied extensively and has grown to become a research field with substantial impact. While classical single-objective NAS searches for the architecture with the best performance, multi-objective NAS considers multiple objectives that should be optimized simultaneously, e.g., minimizing resource usage along the validation error. Although considerable progress has been made in the field of multi-objective NAS, we argue that there is some discrepancy between the actual optimization problem of practical interest and the optimization problem that multi-objective NAS tries to solve. We resolve this discrepancy by formulating the multi-objective NAS problem as a quality diversity optimization (QDO) problem and introduce three quality diversity NAS optimizers (two of them belonging to the group of multifidelity optimizers), which search for high-performing yet diverse architectures that are optimal for application-specific niches, e.g., hardware constraints. By comparing these optimizers to their multi-objective counterparts, we demonstrate that quality diversity NAS in general outperforms multi-objective NAS with respect to quality of solutions and efficiency. We further show how applications and future NAS research can thrive on QDO.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）已得到广泛研究，并已发展成为具有重大影响的研究领域。经典的单目标 NAS 搜索具有最佳性能的架构，而多目标 NAS 则考虑应同时优化的多个目标，例如，最小化验证误差的资源使用。尽管多目标NAS领域已经取得了相当大的进展，但我们认为实际感兴趣的实际优化问题与多目标NAS试图解决的优化问题之间存在一些差异。我们通过将多目标 NAS 问题表述为质量多样性优化 (QDO) 问题来解决这一差异，并引入三个质量多样性 NAS 优化器（其中两个属于多保真优化器组），它们搜索高性能但多样化的架构，这些架构对于特定于应用程序的利基（例如硬件约束）是最佳的。通过将这些优化器与多目标优化器进行比较，我们证明质量多样性 NAS 在解决方案质量和效率方面总体优于多目标 NAS。我们进一步展示了应用程序和未来的 NAS 研究如何在 QDO 上蓬勃发展。

AI.tldr: 本文将多目标神经架构搜索（NAS）转化为质量多样性优化（QDO）问题，提出三种QDO优化器以寻找高性能且适应特定应用场景的多样化架构。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标NAS优化的目标与实际应用需求存在差异，难以同时满足性能、资源约束等多样化要求。
AI.method: 通过将多目标NAS重新建模为QDO问题，设计三种优化器（含两种多保真度方法），在搜索过程中兼顾解的质量与多样性以适应不同硬件约束。
AI.result: QDO方法在解的质量和搜索效率上优于传统多目标NAS，且能生成针对特定应用场景（如硬件限制）的多样化优质架构。
AI.conclusion: 质量多样性优化为NAS提供了更贴近实际需求的解决方案，未来研究可进一步结合QDO探索更高效的架构搜索策略。

search_text: Tackling Neural Architecture Search With Quality Diversity Optimization 通过质量多样性优化来解决神经架构搜索问题 Neural architecture search (NAS) has been studied extensively and has grown to become a research field with substantial impact. While classical single-objective NAS searches for the architecture with the best performance, multi-objective NAS considers multiple objectives that should be optimized simultaneously, e.g., minimizing resource usage along the validation error. Although considerable progress has been made in the field of multi-objective NAS, we argue that there is some discrepancy between the actual optimization problem of practical interest and the optimization problem that multi-objective NAS tries to solve. We resolve this discrepancy by formulating the multi-objective NAS problem as a quality diversity optimization (QDO) problem and introduce three quality diversity NAS optimizers (two of them belonging to the group of multifidelity optimizers), which search for high-performing yet diverse architectures that are optimal for application-specific niches, e.g., hardware constraints. By comparing these optimizers to their multi-objective counterparts, we demonstrate that quality diversity NAS in general outperforms multi-objective NAS with respect to quality of solutions and efficiency. We further show how applications and future NAS research can thrive on QDO. 神经架构搜索（NAS）已得到广泛研究，并已发展成为具有重大影响的研究领域。经典的单目标 NAS 搜索具有最佳性能的架构，而多目标 NAS 则考虑应同时优化的多个目标，例如，最小化验证误差的资源使用。尽管多目标NAS领域已经取得了相当大的进展，但我们认为实际感兴趣的实际优化问题与多目标NAS试图解决的优化问题之间存在一些差异。我们通过将多目标 NAS 问题表述为质量多样性优化 (QDO) 问题来解决这一差异，并引入三个质量多样性 NAS 优化器（其中两个属于多保真优化器组），它们搜索高性能但多样化的架构，这些架构对于特定于应用程序的利基（例如硬件约束）是最佳的。通过将这些优化器与多目标优化器进行比较，我们证明质量多样性 NAS 在解决方案质量和效率方面总体优于多目标 NAS。我们进一步展示了应用程序和未来的 NAS 研究如何在 QDO 上蓬勃发展。 本文将多目标神经架构搜索（NAS）转化为质量多样性优化（QDO）问题，提出三种QDO优化器以寻找高性能且适应特定应用场景的多样化架构。 Lennart Schneider,Florian Pfisterer,Paul Kent,Juergen Branke,Bernd Bischl,Janek Thomas cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Simone Foa,Corrado Coppola,Giorgio Grani,Laura Palagi
title: Solving the vehicle routing problem with deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习解决车辆路径问题
comment: This version is really preliminary and the possibility of errors and typos is high
comments: This version is really preliminary and the possibility of errors and typos is high
abstract: Recently, the applications of the methodologies of Reinforcement Learning (RL) to NP-Hard Combinatorial optimization problems have become a popular topic. This is essentially due to the nature of the traditional combinatorial algorithms, often based on a trial-and-error process. RL aims at automating this process. At this regard, this paper focuses on the application of RL for the Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP), a famous combinatorial problem that belongs to the class of NP-Hard problems. In this work, first, the problem is modeled as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and then the PPO method (which belongs to the Actor-Critic class of Reinforcement learning methods) is applied. In a second phase, the neural architecture behind the Actor and Critic has been established, choosing to adopt a neural architecture based on the Convolutional neural networks, both for the Actor and the Critic. This choice resulted in effectively addressing problems of different sizes. Experiments performed on a wide range of instances show that the algorithm has good generalization capabilities and can reach good solutions in a short time. Comparisons between the algorithm proposed and the state-of-the-art solver OR-TOOLS show that the latter still outperforms the Reinforcement learning algorithm. However, there are future research perspectives, that aim to upgrade the current performance of the algorithm proposed.
summary: Recently, the applications of the methodologies of Reinforcement Learning (RL) to NP-Hard Combinatorial optimization problems have become a popular topic. This is essentially due to the nature of the traditional combinatorial algorithms, often based on a trial-and-error process. RL aims at automating this process. At this regard, this paper focuses on the application of RL for the Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP), a famous combinatorial problem that belongs to the class of NP-Hard problems. In this work, first, the problem is modeled as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and then the PPO method (which belongs to the Actor-Critic class of Reinforcement learning methods) is applied. In a second phase, the neural architecture behind the Actor and Critic has been established, choosing to adopt a neural architecture based on the Convolutional neural networks, both for the Actor and the Critic. This choice resulted in effectively addressing problems of different sizes. Experiments performed on a wide range of instances show that the algorithm has good generalization capabilities and can reach good solutions in a short time. Comparisons between the algorithm proposed and the state-of-the-art solver OR-TOOLS show that the latter still outperforms the Reinforcement learning algorithm. However, there are future research perspectives, that aim to upgrade the current performance of the algorithm proposed.
abstract_zh: 最近，强化学习（RL）方法在NP-Hard组合优化问题中的应用已成为一个热门话题。这本质上是由于传统组合算法的性质决定的，通常基于试错过程。强化学习的目标是使这个过程自动化。在这方面，本文重点关注强化学习在车辆路径问题（VRP）中的应用，这是一个著名的组合问题，属于 NP-Hard 问题。在这项工作中，首先将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），然后应用 PPO 方法（属于强化学习方法的 Actor-Critic 类）。在第二阶段，Actor 和 Critic 背后的神经架构已经建立，Actor 和 Critic 选择采用基于卷积神经网络的神经架构。这一选择有效地解决了不同规模的问题。在广泛的实例上进行的实验表明，该算法具有良好的泛化能力，可以在短时间内得出良好的解决方案。所提出的算法与最先进的求解器 OR-TOOLS 之间的比较表明，后者仍然优于强化学习算法。然而，未来的研究前景旨在提升所提出算法的当前性能。

AI.tldr: 本文将深度强化学习应用于车辆路径问题（VRP），通过将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并采用PPO算法结合卷积神经网络进行求解。
AI.motivation: 传统组合优化算法依赖试错过程，而强化学习（RL）能够自动化这一过程，因此本文旨在探索RL在解决NP难问题VRP中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 将VRP建模为MDP，采用PPO（Actor-Critic类算法）进行训练，并设计基于卷积神经网络的Actor和Critic架构以适应不同规模的问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法具有良好的泛化能力和快速求解性能，但在与OR-TOOLS等先进求解器的对比中仍存在性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 尽管当前方法在效率上有所突破，但仍需进一步研究以提升算法性能，使其在求解质量上超越现有工具。

This is essentially due to the nature of the traditional combinatorial algorithms, often based on a trial-and-error process. RL aims at automating this process. At this regard, this paper focuses on the application of RL for the Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP), a famous combinatorial problem that belongs to the class of NP-Hard problems. In this work, first, the problem is modeled as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and then the PPO method (which belongs to the Actor-Critic class of Reinforcement learning methods) is applied. In a second phase, the neural architecture behind the Actor and Critic has been established, choosing to adopt a neural architecture based on the Convolutional neural networks, both for the Actor and the Critic. This choice resulted in effectively addressing problems of different sizes. Experiments performed on a wide range of instances show that the algorithm has good generalization capabilities and can reach good solutions in a short time. Comparisons between the algorithm proposed and the state-of-the-art solver OR-TOOLS show that the latter still outperforms the Reinforcement learning algorithm. However, there are future research perspectives, that aim to upgrade the current performance of the algorithm proposed. 最近，强化学习（RL）方法在NP-Hard组合优化问题中的应用已成为一个热门话题。这本质上是由于传统组合算法的性质决定的，通常基于试错过程。强化学习的目标是使这个过程自动化。在这方面，本文重点关注强化学习在车辆路径问题（VRP）中的应用，这是一个著名的组合问题，属于 NP-Hard 问题。在这项工作中，首先将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），然后应用 PPO 方法（属于强化学习方法的 Actor-Critic 类）。在第二阶段，Actor 和 Critic 背后的神经架构已经建立，Actor 和 Critic 选择采用基于卷积神经网络的神经架构。这一选择有效地解决了不同规模的问题。在广泛的实例上进行的实验表明，该算法具有良好的泛化能力，可以在短时间内得出良好的解决方案。所提出的算法与最先进的求解器 OR-TOOLS 之间的比较表明，后者仍然优于强化学习算法。然而，未来的研究前景旨在提升所提出算法的当前性能。 本文将深度强化学习应用于车辆路径问题（VRP），通过将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并采用PPO算法结合卷积神经网络进行求解。 Simone Foa,Corrado Coppola,Giorgio Grani,Laura Palagi math.OC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yanhao Wang,Francesco Fabbri,Michael Mathioudakis
title: Streaming Algorithms for Diversity Maximization with Fairness Constraints
title_zh: 具有公平性约束的多样性最大化的流算法
abstract: Diversity maximization is a fundamental problem with wide applications in data summarization, web search, and recommender systems. Given a set $X$ of $n$ elements, it asks to select a subset $S$ of $k \ll n$ elements with maximum \emph{diversity}, as quantified by the dissimilarities among the elements in $S$. In this paper, we focus on the diversity maximization problem with fairness constraints in the streaming setting. Specifically, we consider the max-min diversity objective, which selects a subset $S$ that maximizes the minimum distance (dissimilarity) between any pair of distinct elements within it. Assuming that the set $X$ is partitioned into $m$ disjoint groups by some sensitive attribute, e.g., sex or race, ensuring \emph{fairness} requires that the selected subset $S$ contains $k_i$ elements from each group $i \in [1,m]$. A streaming algorithm should process $X$ sequentially in one pass and return a subset with maximum \emph{diversity} while guaranteeing the fairness constraint. Although diversity maximization has been extensively studied, the only known algorithms that can work with the max-min diversity objective and fairness constraints are very inefficient for data streams. Since diversity maximization is NP-hard in general, we propose two approximation algorithms for fair diversity maximization in data streams, the first of which is $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{4}$-approximate and specific for $m=2$, where $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$, and the second of which achieves a $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{3m+2}$-approximation for an arbitrary $m$. Experimental results on real-world and synthetic datasets show that both algorithms provide solutions of comparable quality to the state-of-the-art algorithms while running several orders of magnitude faster in the streaming setting.
summary: Diversity maximization is a fundamental problem with wide applications in data summarization, web search, and recommender systems. Given a set $X$ of $n$ elements, it asks to select a subset $S$ of $k \ll n$ elements with maximum \emph{diversity}, as quantified by the dissimilarities among the elements in $S$. In this paper, we focus on the diversity maximization problem with fairness constraints in the streaming setting. Specifically, we consider the max-min diversity objective, which selects a subset $S$ that maximizes the minimum distance (dissimilarity) between any pair of distinct elements within it. Assuming that the set $X$ is partitioned into $m$ disjoint groups by some sensitive attribute, e.g., sex or race, ensuring \emph{fairness} requires that the selected subset $S$ contains $k_i$ elements from each group $i \in [1,m]$. A streaming algorithm should process $X$ sequentially in one pass and return a subset with maximum \emph{diversity} while guaranteeing the fairness constraint. Although diversity maximization has been extensively studied, the only known algorithms that can work with the max-min diversity objective and fairness constraints are very inefficient for data streams. Since diversity maximization is NP-hard in general, we propose two approximation algorithms for fair diversity maximization in data streams, the first of which is $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{4}$-approximate and specific for $m=2$, where $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$, and the second of which achieves a $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{3m+2}$-approximation for an arbitrary $m$. Experimental results on real-world and synthetic datasets show that both algorithms provide solutions of comparable quality to the state-of-the-art algorithms while running several orders of magnitude faster in the streaming setting.
abstract_zh: 多样性最大化是数据摘要、网络搜索和推荐系统中广泛应用的一个基本问题。给定 $n$ 元素的集合 $X$，它要求选择具有最大 \emph{diversity} 的 $k \ll n$ 个元素的子集 $S$，通过 $S$ 中元素之间的差异来量化。在本文中，我们重点研究流媒体设置中具有公平约束的多样性最大化问题。具体来说，我们考虑最大-最小多样性目标，它选择一个子集 $S$，使其内任何一对不同元素之间的最小距离（相异性）最大化。假设集合 $X$ 通过某些敏感属性（例如性别或种族）划分为 $m$ 个不相交的组，确保 \emph{fairness} 要求所选子集 $S$ 包含来自每个组 $i \in [1,m]$ 的 $k_i$ 个元素。流算法应该在一次传递中顺序处理$X$，并返回具有最大\emph{diversity}的子集，同时保证公平性约束。尽管多样性最大化已被广泛研究，但唯一已知的可以与最大-最小多样性目标和公平性约束一起工作的算法对于数据流来说效率非常低。由于多样性最大化通常是 NP 困难的，因此我们提出了两种用于数据流中公平多样性最大化的近似算法，第一个算法是 $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{4}$ 近似，并且特定于 $m=2$，其中 $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$，第二个算法实现了任意值的 $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{3m+2}$ 近似$m$。对现实世界和合成数据集的实验结果表明，这两种算法都提供了与最先进算法相当的质量解决方案，同时在流设置中运行速度快了几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种流式算法，在满足公平性约束的前提下解决最大最小多样性最大化问题，确保从不同群体中选取元素并保持子集多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在流式数据环境下处理公平性约束下的多样性最大化问题时效率低下，且实际应用中需平衡多样性与公平性以避免偏见。
AI.method: 设计两种近似算法：针对两群体（m=2）的(1−ε)/4近似算法和适用于任意m的(1−ε)/(3m+2)近似算法，均在单次流式处理中实现。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种算法在真实和合成数据集上均能提供与现有最佳算法相当的质量，且运行速度提升多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 本文为流式环境下的公平多样性最大化问题提供了高效近似方案，有效平衡了多样性与公平性需求。

search_text: Streaming Algorithms for Diversity Maximization with Fairness Constraints 具有公平性约束的多样性最大化的流算法 Diversity maximization is a fundamental problem with wide applications in data summarization, web search, and recommender systems. Given a set $X$ of $n$ elements, it asks to select a subset $S$ of $k \ll n$ elements with maximum \emph{diversity}, as quantified by the dissimilarities among the elements in $S$. In this paper, we focus on the diversity maximization problem with fairness constraints in the streaming setting. Specifically, we consider the max-min diversity objective, which selects a subset $S$ that maximizes the minimum distance (dissimilarity) between any pair of distinct elements within it. Assuming that the set $X$ is partitioned into $m$ disjoint groups by some sensitive attribute, e.g., sex or race, ensuring \emph{fairness} requires that the selected subset $S$ contains $k_i$ elements from each group $i \in [1,m]$. A streaming algorithm should process $X$ sequentially in one pass and return a subset with maximum \emph{diversity} while guaranteeing the fairness constraint. Although diversity maximization has been extensively studied, the only known algorithms that can work with the max-min diversity objective and fairness constraints are very inefficient for data streams. Since diversity maximization is NP-hard in general, we propose two approximation algorithms for fair diversity maximization in data streams, the first of which is $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{4}$-approximate and specific for $m=2$, where $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$, and the second of which achieves a $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{3m+2}$-approximation for an arbitrary $m$. Experimental results on real-world and synthetic datasets show that both algorithms provide solutions of comparable quality to the state-of-the-art algorithms while running several orders of magnitude faster in the streaming setting. 多样性最大化是数据摘要、网络搜索和推荐系统中广泛应用的一个基本问题。给定 $n$ 元素的集合 $X$，它要求选择具有最大 \emph{diversity} 的 $k \ll n$ 个元素的子集 $S$，通过 $S$ 中元素之间的差异来量化。在本文中，我们重点研究流媒体设置中具有公平约束的多样性最大化问题。具体来说，我们考虑最大-最小多样性目标，它选择一个子集 $S$，使其内任何一对不同元素之间的最小距离（相异性）最大化。假设集合 $X$ 通过某些敏感属性（例如性别或种族）划分为 $m$ 个不相交的组，确保 \emph{fairness} 要求所选子集 $S$ 包含来自每个组 $i \in [1,m]$ 的 $k_i$ 个元素。流算法应该在一次传递中顺序处理$X$，并返回具有最大\emph{diversity}的子集，同时保证公平性约束。尽管多样性最大化已被广泛研究，但唯一已知的可以与最大-最小多样性目标和公平性约束一起工作的算法对于数据流来说效率非常低。由于多样性最大化通常是 NP 困难的，因此我们提出了两种用于数据流中公平多样性最大化的近似算法，第一个算法是 $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{4}$ 近似，并且特定于 $m=2$，其中 $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$，第二个算法实现了任意值的 $\frac{1-\varepsilon}{3m+2}$ 近似$m$。对现实世界和合成数据集的实验结果表明，这两种算法都提供了与最先进算法相当的质量解决方案，同时在流设置中运行速度快了几个数量级。 本文提出两种流式算法，在满足公平性约束的前提下解决最大最小多样性最大化问题，确保从不同群体中选取元素并保持子集多样性。 Yanhao Wang,Francesco Fabbri,Michael Mathioudakis cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Giorgio Grani,Corrado Coppola,Valerio Agasucci
title: PUSH: a primal heuristic based on Feasibility PUmp and SHifting
title_zh: PUSH：基于可行性 PUmp 和 SHifting 的原始启发式
abstract: This work describes PUSH, a primal heuristic combining Feasibility Pump and Shifting. The main idea is to replace the rounding phase of the Feasibility Pump with a suitable adaptation of the Shifting and other rounding heuristics. The algorithm presents different strategies, depending on the nature of the partial rounding obtained. In particular, we distinguish when the partial solution is feasible, infeasible with potential candidates, and infeasible without candidates. We used a threshold to indicate the percentage of variables to round with our algorithm and which other to round to the nearest integer. Most importantly, our algorithm tackles directly equality constraints without duplicating rows. We select the parameters of our algorithm on the 19 instances provided for the Mip Competition 2022. Finally, we compared our approach to other start heuristics, like Simple Rounding, Rounding, Shifting, and Feasibility Pump on the first 800 MIPLIB2017 instances ordered by the number of non-zeros.
summary: This work describes PUSH, a primal heuristic combining Feasibility Pump and Shifting. The main idea is to replace the rounding phase of the Feasibility Pump with a suitable adaptation of the Shifting and other rounding heuristics. The algorithm presents different strategies, depending on the nature of the partial rounding obtained. In particular, we distinguish when the partial solution is feasible, infeasible with potential candidates, and infeasible without candidates. We used a threshold to indicate the percentage of variables to round with our algorithm and which other to round to the nearest integer. Most importantly, our algorithm tackles directly equality constraints without duplicating rows. We select the parameters of our algorithm on the 19 instances provided for the Mip Competition 2022. Finally, we compared our approach to other start heuristics, like Simple Rounding, Rounding, Shifting, and Feasibility Pump on the first 800 MIPLIB2017 instances ordered by the number of non-zeros.
abstract_zh: 这项工作描述了 PUSH，一种结合了可行性泵和转移的原始启发式方法。主要思想是用适当的移位和其他舍入启发法来代替可行性泵的舍入阶段。该算法根据所获得的部分舍入的性质提出不同的策略。特别是，我们区分部分解决方案何时可行、对于潜在候选者不可行以及在没有候选者的情况下不可行。我们使用阈值来指示使用我们的算法舍入的变量的百分比以及舍入到最接近的整数的其他变量。最重要的是，我们的算法直接处理等式约束，而无需重复行。我们在为 2022 年 Mip 竞赛提供的 19 个实例上选择了算法的参数。最后，我们将我们的方法与其他启动启发式方法进行了比较，例如在按非零数排序的前 800 个 MIPLIB2017 实例上的简单舍入、舍入、移位和可行性泵。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PUSH算法，结合Feasibility Pump与Shifting方法，改进混合整数规划问题的求解过程。
AI.motivation: Feasibility Pump在处理等式约束时需复制行，导致效率降低；Shifting方法在部分场景下表现更优，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 用Shifting及其它四舍五入启发式替代Feasibility Pump的四舍五入阶段，根据解的可行性划分策略，并通过阈值控制变量四舍五入比例，直接处理等式约束。
AI.result: 在MIPLIB2017前800实例测试中，PUSH优于Simple Rounding、Rounding、Shifting及Feasibility Pump等传统启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: PUSH通过策略性结合两种方法，在保持可行性的同时提升求解效率，验证了算法设计的有效性。

authors_text: Hengwei Xu,Yong Liao,Haiyong Xie,Pengyuan Zhou
title: Celeritas: Fast Optimizer for Large Dataflow Graphs
title_zh: Celeritas：大型数据流图的快速优化器
abstract: The rapidly enlarging neural network models are becoming increasingly challenging to run on a single device. Hence model parallelism over multiple devices is critical to guarantee the efficiency of training large models. Recent proposals fall short either in long processing time or poor performance. Therefore, we propose Celeritas, a fast framework for optimizing device placement for large models. Celeritas employs a simple but efficient model parallelization strategy in the Standard Evaluation, and generates placement policies through a series of scheduling algorithms. We conduct experiments to deploy and evaluate Celeritas on numerous large models. The results show that Celeritas not only reduces the placement policy generation time by 26.4\% but also improves the model running time by 34.2\% compared to most advanced methods.
summary: The rapidly enlarging neural network models are becoming increasingly challenging to run on a single device. Hence model parallelism over multiple devices is critical to guarantee the efficiency of training large models. Recent proposals fall short either in long processing time or poor performance. Therefore, we propose Celeritas, a fast framework for optimizing device placement for large models. Celeritas employs a simple but efficient model parallelization strategy in the Standard Evaluation, and generates placement policies through a series of scheduling algorithms. We conduct experiments to deploy and evaluate Celeritas on numerous large models. The results show that Celeritas not only reduces the placement policy generation time by 26.4\% but also improves the model running time by 34.2\% compared to most advanced methods.
abstract_zh: 快速扩大的神经网络模型在单个设备上运行变得越来越具有挑战性。因此，多个设备上的模型并行对于保证大型模型的训练效率至关重要。最近的提案要么处理时间长，要么性能差。因此，我们提出了 Celeritas，一种用于优化大型模型的设备布局的快速框架。 Celeritas在标准评估中采用了简单但高效的模型并行化策略，并通过一系列调度算法生成放置策略。我们进行实验，在众多大型模型上部署和评估 Celeritas。结果表明，与大多数先进方法相比，Celeritas 不仅将布局策略生成时间缩短了 26.4%，而且将模型运行时间缩短了 34.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Celeritas框架，通过优化设备放置策略提升大规模模型训练效率。
AI.motivation: 随着神经网络模型规模扩大，单设备运行效率不足，现有并行方法存在处理时间长或性能差的问题。
AI.method: 采用简单高效的模型并行策略，结合调度算法生成设备放置策略。
AI.result: 相比先进方法，生成策略时间减少26.4%，模型运行时间提升34.2%。
AI.conclusion: Celeritas有效优化了大规模模型的设备放置，显著提升训练效率。

The results show that Celeritas not only reduces the placement policy generation time by 26.4\% but also improves the model running time by 34.2\% compared to most advanced methods. 快速扩大的神经网络模型在单个设备上运行变得越来越具有挑战性。因此，多个设备上的模型并行对于保证大型模型的训练效率至关重要。最近的提案要么处理时间长，要么性能差。因此，我们提出了 Celeritas，一种用于优化大型模型的设备布局的快速框架。 Celeritas在标准评估中采用了简单但高效的模型并行化策略，并通过一系列调度算法生成放置策略。我们进行实验，在众多大型模型上部署和评估 Celeritas。结果表明，与大多数先进方法相比，Celeritas 不仅将布局策略生成时间缩短了 26.4%，而且将模型运行时间缩短了 34.2%。 本文提出Celeritas框架，通过优化设备放置策略提升大规模模型训练效率。 Hengwei Xu,Yong Liao,Haiyong Xie,Pengyuan Zhou cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhen Xing,Yijiang Chen,Zhixin Ling,Xiangdong Zhou,Yu Xiang
title: Few-shot Single-view 3D Reconstruction with Memory Prior Contrastive Network
title_zh: 使用记忆先验对比网络的少镜头单视图 3D 重建
abstract: 3D reconstruction of novel categories based on few-shot learning is appealing in real-world applications and attracts increasing research interests. Previous approaches mainly focus on how to design shape prior models for different categories. Their performance on unseen categories is not very competitive. In this paper, we present a Memory Prior Contrastive Network (MPCN) that can store shape prior knowledge in a few-shot learning based 3D reconstruction framework. With the shape memory, a multi-head attention module is proposed to capture different parts of a candidate shape prior and fuse these parts together to guide 3D reconstruction of novel categories. Besides, we introduce a 3D-aware contrastive learning method, which can not only complement the retrieval accuracy of memory network, but also better organize image features for downstream tasks. Compared with previous few-shot 3D reconstruction methods, MPCN can handle the inter-class variability without category annotations. Experimental results on a benchmark synthetic dataset and the Pascal3D+ real-world dataset show that our model outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods significantly.
summary: 3D reconstruction of novel categories based on few-shot learning is appealing in real-world applications and attracts increasing research interests. Previous approaches mainly focus on how to design shape prior models for different categories. Their performance on unseen categories is not very competitive. In this paper, we present a Memory Prior Contrastive Network (MPCN) that can store shape prior knowledge in a few-shot learning based 3D reconstruction framework. With the shape memory, a multi-head attention module is proposed to capture different parts of a candidate shape prior and fuse these parts together to guide 3D reconstruction of novel categories. Besides, we introduce a 3D-aware contrastive learning method, which can not only complement the retrieval accuracy of memory network, but also better organize image features for downstream tasks. Compared with previous few-shot 3D reconstruction methods, MPCN can handle the inter-class variability without category annotations. Experimental results on a benchmark synthetic dataset and the Pascal3D+ real-world dataset show that our model outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods significantly.
abstract_zh: 基于少样本学习的新颖类别的 3D 重建在现实世界的应用中很有吸引力，并吸引了越来越多的研究兴趣。以前的方法主要关注如何为不同类别设计先验模型。他们在看不见的类别上的表现并不是很有竞争力。在本文中，我们提出了一种记忆先验对比网络（MPCN），它可以在基于少量学习的 3D 重建框架中存储形状先验知识。利用形状记忆，提出了一个多头注意模块来捕获候选形状先验的不同部分，并将这些部分融合在一起以指导新类别的 3D 重建。此外，我们引入了一种3D感知对比学习方法，它不仅可以补充记忆网络的检索精度，而且可以更好地为下游任务组织图像特征。与之前的少样本 3D 重建方法相比，MPCN 可以在没有类别注释的情况下处理类间变异性。基准合成数据集和 Pascal3D+ 真实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型显着优于当前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于记忆先验对比网络（MPCN）的少样本单视角3D重建方法，旨在解决传统方法在未见类别上表现不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本3D重建方法依赖特定类别的形状先验模型，难以处理未见类别且缺乏类别标注的跨类变体问题。
AI.method: 设计了包含形状记忆模块的MPCN，结合多头注意力机制融合候选形状先验部分，并引入3D感知对比学习方法优化特征检索与组织。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据集Pascal3D+上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了模型在未见类别上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MPCN通过记忆先验与对比学习的结合，有效提升了少样本3D重建对跨类变体的适应能力，无需类别标注即可处理新类别。

authors_text: Harry Asada
title: Global, Unified Representation of Heterogenous Robot Dynamics Using Composition Operators: A Koopman Direct Encoding Method
title_zh: 使用组合算子的异构机器人动力学的全局统一表示：库普曼直接编码方法
abstract: The dynamic complexity of robots and mechatronic systems often pertains to the hybrid nature of dynamics, where governing equations consist of heterogenous equations that are switched depending on the state of the system. Legged robots and manipulator robots experience contact-noncontact discrete transitions, causing switching of governing equations. Analysis of these systems have been a challenge due to the lack of a global, unified model that is amenable to analysis of the global behaviors. Composition operator theory has the potential to provide a global, unified representation by converting them to linear dynamical systems in a lifted space. The current work presents a method for encoding nonlinear heterogenous dynamics into a high dimensional space of observables in the form of Koopman operator. First, a new formula is established for representing the Koopman operator in a Hilbert space by using inner products of observable functions and their composition with the governing state transition function. This formula, called Direct Encoding, allows for converting a class of heterogenous systems directly to a global, unified linear model. Unlike prevalent data-driven methods, where results can vary depending on numerical data, the proposed method is globally valid, not requiring numerical simulation of the original dynamics. A simple example validates the theoretical results, and the method is applied to a multi-cable suspension system.
summary: The dynamic complexity of robots and mechatronic systems often pertains to the hybrid nature of dynamics, where governing equations consist of heterogenous equations that are switched depending on the state of the system. Legged robots and manipulator robots experience contact-noncontact discrete transitions, causing switching of governing equations. Analysis of these systems have been a challenge due to the lack of a global, unified model that is amenable to analysis of the global behaviors. Composition operator theory has the potential to provide a global, unified representation by converting them to linear dynamical systems in a lifted space. The current work presents a method for encoding nonlinear heterogenous dynamics into a high dimensional space of observables in the form of Koopman operator. First, a new formula is established for representing the Koopman operator in a Hilbert space by using inner products of observable functions and their composition with the governing state transition function. This formula, called Direct Encoding, allows for converting a class of heterogenous systems directly to a global, unified linear model. Unlike prevalent data-driven methods, where results can vary depending on numerical data, the proposed method is globally valid, not requiring numerical simulation of the original dynamics. A simple example validates the theoretical results, and the method is applied to a multi-cable suspension system.
abstract_zh: 机器人和机电系统的动态复杂性通常与动力学的混合性质有关，其中控制方程由异质方程组成，这些方程根据系统状态进行切换。腿式机器人和机械手机器人经历接触-非接触离散转变，导致控制方程的切换。由于缺乏适合分析全局行为的全局统一模型，对这些系统的分析一直是一个挑战。复合算子理论有潜力通过将它们转换为提升空间中的线性动力系统来提供全局的、统一的表示。当前的工作提出了一种以库普曼算子的形式将非线性异质动力学编码到可观测量的高维空间中的方法。首先，利用可观测函数的内积及其与控制状态转移函数的组合，建立了一个新的公式来表示希尔伯特空间中的库普曼算子。这个公式称为直接编码，允许将一类异构系统直接转换为全局统一的线性模型。与流行的数据驱动方法（结果可能根据数值数据而变化）不同，所提出的方法是全局有效的，不需要对原始动力学进行数值模拟。一个简单的算例验证了理论结果，并将该方法应用于多缆悬挂系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Koopman算子的直接编码方法，将异构机器人动力学转化为高维观测空间中的全局线性模型。
AI.motivation: 机器人和机电系统常因接触-非接触切换导致动力学方程异构性，现有方法缺乏全局统一模型以分析系统整体行为。
AI.method: 通过构建希尔伯特空间中可观测函数与状态转移函数组合的内积公式，建立Koopman算子的直接编码方法，无需数值仿真即可实现异构系统的全局线性化。
AI.result: 理论公式经简单案例验证有效，并成功应用于多缆悬吊系统的动力学建模。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为异构动力学系统提供了全局有效、数据无关的统一表示框架，为复杂系统分析提供新工具。

authors_text: Chaoning Zhang,Chenshuang Zhang,Junha Song,John Seon Keun Yi,Kang Zhang,In So Kweon
title: A Survey on Masked Autoencoder for Self-supervised Learning in Vision and Beyond
title_zh: 用于视觉及其他领域自监督学习的屏蔽自动编码器的调查
comment: First survey on masked autoencoder (under progress)
comments: First survey on masked autoencoder (under progress)
abstract: Masked autoencoders are scalable vision learners, as the title of MAE \cite{he2022masked}, which suggests that self-supervised learning (SSL) in vision might undertake a similar trajectory as in NLP. Specifically, generative pretext tasks with the masked prediction (e.g., BERT) have become a de facto standard SSL practice in NLP. By contrast, early attempts at generative methods in vision have been buried by their discriminative counterparts (like contrastive learning); however, the success of mask image modeling has revived the masking autoencoder (often termed denoising autoencoder in the past). As a milestone to bridge the gap with BERT in NLP, masked autoencoder has attracted unprecedented attention for SSL in vision and beyond. This work conducts a comprehensive survey of masked autoencoders to shed insight on a promising direction of SSL. As the first to review SSL with masked autoencoders, this work focuses on its application in vision by discussing its historical developments, recent progress, and implications for diverse applications.
summary: Masked autoencoders are scalable vision learners, as the title of MAE \cite{he2022masked}, which suggests that self-supervised learning (SSL) in vision might undertake a similar trajectory as in NLP. Specifically, generative pretext tasks with the masked prediction (e.g., BERT) have become a de facto standard SSL practice in NLP. By contrast, early attempts at generative methods in vision have been buried by their discriminative counterparts (like contrastive learning); however, the success of mask image modeling has revived the masking autoencoder (often termed denoising autoencoder in the past). As a milestone to bridge the gap with BERT in NLP, masked autoencoder has attracted unprecedented attention for SSL in vision and beyond. This work conducts a comprehensive survey of masked autoencoders to shed insight on a promising direction of SSL. As the first to review SSL with masked autoencoders, this work focuses on its application in vision by discussing its historical developments, recent progress, and implications for diverse applications.
abstract_zh: 屏蔽自动编码器是可扩展的视觉学习器，正如 MAE \cite{he2022masked} 的标题一样，这表明视觉中的自监督学习（SSL）可能会采取与 NLP 类似的轨迹。具体来说，带有屏蔽预测（例如 BERT）的生成借口任务已成为 NLP 中事实上的标准 SSL 实践。相比之下，视觉生成方法的早期尝试已被其判别性对应方法（如对比学习）所掩盖。然而，掩模图像建模的成功使掩模自动编码器（过去通常称为去噪自动编码器）复活了。作为弥合 NLP 领域与 BERT 差距的里程碑，掩码自动编码器在视觉及其他领域引起了 SSL 前所未有的关注。这项工作对屏蔽自动编码器进行了全面的调查，以深入了解 SSL 的一个有前途的方向。作为第一个回顾带有掩码自动编码器的 SSL 的文章，本文通过讨论其历史发展、最新进展以及对不同应用的影响，重点关注其在视觉中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了掩码自编码器在视觉及更广泛领域的自监督学习应用，探讨其发展历程、最新进展及多场景影响。
AI.motivation: 掩码自编码器（MAE）通过生成式预训练任务（如掩码预测）在视觉领域复兴，需系统梳理其发展脉络与应用潜力。
AI.method: 通过回顾MAE的历史演进、分析其在视觉任务中的技术突破，并探讨其在不同应用场景的扩展性与挑战。
AI.result: 明确了MAE作为视觉自监督学习核心方法的地位，揭示了其在图像重建、分类等任务中的有效性及跨领域适应性。
AI.conclusion: MAE为视觉自监督学习提供了新范式，未来需进一步优化掩码策略与计算效率以推动更广泛应用。

search_text: A Survey on Masked Autoencoder for Self-supervised Learning in Vision and Beyond 用于视觉及其他领域自监督学习的屏蔽自动编码器的调查 Masked autoencoders are scalable vision learners, as the title of MAE \cite{he2022masked}, which suggests that self-supervised learning (SSL) in vision might undertake a similar trajectory as in NLP. Specifically, generative pretext tasks with the masked prediction (e.g., BERT) have become a de facto standard SSL practice in NLP. By contrast, early attempts at generative methods in vision have been buried by their discriminative counterparts (like contrastive learning); however, the success of mask image modeling has revived the masking autoencoder (often termed denoising autoencoder in the past). As a milestone to bridge the gap with BERT in NLP, masked autoencoder has attracted unprecedented attention for SSL in vision and beyond. This work conducts a comprehensive survey of masked autoencoders to shed insight on a promising direction of SSL. As the first to review SSL with masked autoencoders, this work focuses on its application in vision by discussing its historical developments, recent progress, and implications for diverse applications. 屏蔽自动编码器是可扩展的视觉学习器，正如 MAE \cite{he2022masked} 的标题一样，这表明视觉中的自监督学习（SSL）可能会采取与 NLP 类似的轨迹。具体来说，带有屏蔽预测（例如 BERT）的生成借口任务已成为 NLP 中事实上的标准 SSL 实践。相比之下，视觉生成方法的早期尝试已被其判别性对应方法（如对比学习）所掩盖。然而，掩模图像建模的成功使掩模自动编码器（过去通常称为去噪自动编码器）复活了。作为弥合 NLP 领域与 BERT 差距的里程碑，掩码自动编码器在视觉及其他领域引起了 SSL 前所未有的关注。这项工作对屏蔽自动编码器进行了全面的调查，以深入了解 SSL 的一个有前途的方向。作为第一个回顾带有掩码自动编码器的 SSL 的文章，本文通过讨论其历史发展、最新进展以及对不同应用的影响，重点关注其在视觉中的应用。 本文综述了掩码自编码器在视觉及更广泛领域的自监督学习应用，探讨其发展历程、最新进展及多场景影响。 Chaoning Zhang,Chenshuang Zhang,Junha Song,John Seon Keun Yi,Kang Zhang,In So Kweon cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Przemysław Korzeniowski,Szymon Płotka,Robert Brawura-Biskupski-Samaha,Arkadiusz Sitek
title: Virtual Reality Simulator for Fetoscopic Spina Bifida Repair Surgery
title_zh: 用于胎儿镜脊柱裂修复手术的虚拟现实模拟器
comment: Accepted for IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022, Kyoto, Japan
comments: Accepted for IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022, Kyoto, Japan
abstract: Spina Bifida (SB) is a birth defect developed during the early stage of pregnancy in which there is incomplete closing of the spine around the spinal cord. The growing interest in fetoscopic Spina-Bifida repair, which is performed in fetuses who are still in the pregnant uterus, prompts the need for appropriate training. The learning curve for such procedures is steep and requires excellent procedural skills. Computer-based virtual reality (VR) simulation systems offer a safe, cost-effective, and configurable training environment free from ethical and patient safety issues. However, to the best of our knowledge, there are currently no commercial or experimental VR training simulation systems available for fetoscopic SB-repair procedures. In this paper, we propose a novel VR simulator for core manual skills training for SB-repair. An initial simulation realism validation study was carried out by obtaining subjective feedback (face and content validity) from 14 clinicians. The overall simulation realism was on average marked 4.07 on a 5-point Likert scale (1 - very unrealistic, 5 - very realistic). Its usefulness as a training tool for SB-repair as well as in learning fundamental laparoscopic skills was marked 4.63 and 4.80, respectively. These results indicate that VR simulation of fetoscopic procedures may contribute to surgical training without putting fetuses and their mothers at risk. It could also facilitate wider adaptation of fetoscopic procedures in place of much more invasive open fetal surgeries.

In this paper, we propose a novel VR simulator for core manual skills training for SB-repair. An initial simulation realism validation study was carried out by obtaining subjective feedback (face and content validity) from 14 clinicians. The overall simulation realism was on average marked 4.07 on a 5-point Likert scale (1 - very unrealistic, 5 - very realistic). These results indicate that VR simulation of fetoscopic procedures may contribute to surgical training without putting fetuses and their mothers at risk. It could also facilitate wider adaptation of fetoscopic procedures in place of much more invasive open fetal surgeries.
abstract_zh: 脊柱裂 (SB) 是一种在怀孕早期出现的出生缺陷，其中脊髓周围的脊柱不完全闭合。人们对胎儿镜脊柱裂修复术的兴趣日益浓厚，这种手术是在怀孕子宫内的胎儿身上进行的，这提示需要进行适当的培训。此类程序的学习曲线很陡峭，需要出色的程序技能。基于计算机的虚拟现实 (VR) 模拟系统提供安全、经济高效且可配置的培训环境，不存在道德和患者安全问题。然而，据我们所知，目前还没有商业或实验性 VR 训练模拟系统可用于胎儿镜 SB 修复手术。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 VR 模拟器，用于 SB 修复的核心手工技能培训。通过获得 14 名临床医生的主观反馈（表面有效性和内容有效性），进行了初步模拟真实性验证研究。按照 5 点李克特量表，整体模拟真实度平均为 4.07（1 - 非常不现实，5 - 非常现实）。其作为 SB 修复培训工具以及学习基本腹腔镜技能的有用性分别为 4.63 和 4.80。这些结果表明，胎儿镜手术的 VR 模拟可能有助于手术训练，而不会将胎儿及其母亲置于危险之中。它还可以促进胎儿镜手术的更广泛适应，以取代更具侵入性的开放胎儿手术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于脊柱裂修复手术核心手动技能训练的虚拟现实（VR）模拟器。
AI.motivation: 胎儿脊柱裂修复手术学习曲线陡峭且需高超技能，但目前缺乏相应的VR训练系统，需开发安全有效的培训工具。
AI.method: 设计并开发VR模拟器，通过14名临床医生的主观反馈（面部和内容效度）进行初始真实性验证，采用5分制Likert量表评估。
AI.result: 模拟器真实性平均得分4.07（1-5分），作为培训工具对脊柱裂修复和腹腔镜基础技能的有用性分别获4.63和4.80分。
AI.conclusion: VR模拟可助力外科培训，降低胎儿及母亲风险，并推动胎儿内镜手术替代侵入性开放手术的普及。

authors_text: Arash Rabbani,Hao Gao,Dirk Husmeier
title: Temporal extrapolation of heart wall segmentation in cardiac magnetic resonance images via pixel tracking
title_zh: 通过像素跟踪对心脏磁共振图像中的心壁分割进行时间外推
abstract: In this study, we have tailored a pixel tracking method for temporal extrapolation of the ventricular segmentation masks in cardiac magnetic resonance images. The pixel tracking process starts from the end-diastolic frame of the heart cycle using the available manually segmented images to predict the end-systolic segmentation mask. The superpixels approach is used to divide the raw images into smaller cells and in each time frame, new labels are assigned to the image cells which leads to tracking the movement of the heart wall elements through different frames. The tracked masks at the end of systole are compared with the already available manually segmented masks and dice scores are found to be between 0.81 to 0.84. Considering the fact that the proposed method does not necessarily require a training dataset, it could be an attractive alternative approach to deep learning segmentation methods in scenarios where training data are limited.
summary: In this study, we have tailored a pixel tracking method for temporal extrapolation of the ventricular segmentation masks in cardiac magnetic resonance images. The pixel tracking process starts from the end-diastolic frame of the heart cycle using the available manually segmented images to predict the end-systolic segmentation mask. The superpixels approach is used to divide the raw images into smaller cells and in each time frame, new labels are assigned to the image cells which leads to tracking the movement of the heart wall elements through different frames. The tracked masks at the end of systole are compared with the already available manually segmented masks and dice scores are found to be between 0.81 to 0.84. Considering the fact that the proposed method does not necessarily require a training dataset, it could be an attractive alternative approach to deep learning segmentation methods in scenarios where training data are limited.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们定制了一种像素跟踪方法，用于心脏磁共振图像中心室分割掩模的时间外推。像素跟踪过程从心动周期的舒张末期帧开始，使用可用的手动分割图像来预测收缩末期分割掩模。超像素方法用于将原始图像划分为更小的单元，并且在每个时间帧中，为图像单元分配新的标签，从而通过不同的帧跟踪心壁元素的运动。将收缩期末的跟踪掩模与现有的手动分段掩模进行比较，发现骰子分数在 0.81 至 0.84 之间。考虑到所提出的方法不一定需要训练数据集，因此在训练数据有限的情况下，它可能是深度学习分割方法的一种有吸引力的替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于像素追踪的方法，用于心脏磁共振图像中室壁分割掩码的时间外推。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习分割方法依赖大量标注数据，而医学影像数据获取成本高且有限，需探索无需训练数据的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用超像素分割将图像划分为小单元，从心周期舒张末期帧出发，通过追踪像素运动动态分配标签，预测收缩末期分割掩码。
AI.result: 与手动分割掩码对比的Dice系数达0.81-0.84，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需训练数据即可实现心脏分割，在数据受限场景下可作为深度学习的有效替代方案。

search_text: Temporal extrapolation of heart wall segmentation in cardiac magnetic resonance images via pixel tracking 通过像素跟踪对心脏磁共振图像中的心壁分割进行时间外推 In this study, we have tailored a pixel tracking method for temporal extrapolation of the ventricular segmentation masks in cardiac magnetic resonance images. The pixel tracking process starts from the end-diastolic frame of the heart cycle using the available manually segmented images to predict the end-systolic segmentation mask. The superpixels approach is used to divide the raw images into smaller cells and in each time frame, new labels are assigned to the image cells which leads to tracking the movement of the heart wall elements through different frames. The tracked masks at the end of systole are compared with the already available manually segmented masks and dice scores are found to be between 0.81 to 0.84. Considering the fact that the proposed method does not necessarily require a training dataset, it could be an attractive alternative approach to deep learning segmentation methods in scenarios where training data are limited. 在这项研究中，我们定制了一种像素跟踪方法，用于心脏磁共振图像中心室分割掩模的时间外推。像素跟踪过程从心动周期的舒张末期帧开始，使用可用的手动分割图像来预测收缩末期分割掩模。超像素方法用于将原始图像划分为更小的单元，并且在每个时间帧中，为图像单元分配新的标签，从而通过不同的帧跟踪心壁元素的运动。将收缩期末的跟踪掩模与现有的手动分段掩模进行比较，发现骰子分数在 0.81 至 0.84 之间。考虑到所提出的方法不一定需要训练数据集，因此在训练数据有限的情况下，它可能是深度学习分割方法的一种有吸引力的替代方法。 本研究提出一种基于像素追踪的方法，用于心脏磁共振图像中室壁分割掩码的时间外推。 Arash Rabbani,Hao Gao,Dirk Husmeier eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jinglei Shi,Christine Guillemot
title: Distilled Low Rank Neural Radiance Field with Quantization for Light Field Compression
title_zh: 用于光场压缩的量化低阶神经辐射场
abstract: We propose in this paper a Quantized Distilled Low-Rank Neural Radiance Field (QDLR-NeRF) representation for the task of light field compression. While existing compression methods encode the set of light field sub-aperture images, our proposed method learns an implicit scene representation in the form of a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF), which also enables view synthesis. To reduce its size, the model is first learned under a Low-Rank (LR) constraint using a Tensor Train (TT) decomposition within an Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) optimization framework. To further reduce the model's size, the components of the tensor train decomposition need to be quantized. However, simultaneously considering the optimization of the NeRF model with both the low-rank constraint and rate-constrained weight quantization is challenging. To address this difficulty, we introduce a network distillation operation that separates the low-rank approximation and the weight quantization during network training. The information from the initial LR-constrained NeRF (LR-NeRF) is distilled into a model of much smaller dimension (DLR-NeRF) based on the TT decomposition of the LR-NeRF. We then learn an optimized global codebook to quantize all TT components, producing the final QDLR-NeRF. Experimental results show that our proposed method yields better compression efficiency compared to state-of-the-art methods, and it additionally has the advantage of allowing the synthesis of any light field view with high quality.
summary: We propose in this paper a Quantized Distilled Low-Rank Neural Radiance Field (QDLR-NeRF) representation for the task of light field compression. While existing compression methods encode the set of light field sub-aperture images, our proposed method learns an implicit scene representation in the form of a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF), which also enables view synthesis. To reduce its size, the model is first learned under a Low-Rank (LR) constraint using a Tensor Train (TT) decomposition within an Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) optimization framework. To further reduce the model's size, the components of the tensor train decomposition need to be quantized. However, simultaneously considering the optimization of the NeRF model with both the low-rank constraint and rate-constrained weight quantization is challenging. To address this difficulty, we introduce a network distillation operation that separates the low-rank approximation and the weight quantization during network training. The information from the initial LR-constrained NeRF (LR-NeRF) is distilled into a model of much smaller dimension (DLR-NeRF) based on the TT decomposition of the LR-NeRF. We then learn an optimized global codebook to quantize all TT components, producing the final QDLR-NeRF. Experimental results show that our proposed method yields better compression efficiency compared to state-of-the-art methods, and it additionally has the advantage of allowing the synthesis of any light field view with high quality.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中提出了一种用于光场压缩任务的量化蒸馏低阶神经辐射场（QDLR-NeRF）表示。虽然现有的压缩方法对光场子孔径图像集进行编码，但我们提出的方法以神经辐射场（NeRF）的形式学习隐式场景表示，这也使得视图合成成为可能。为了减小其尺寸，首先使用交替方向乘子法 (ADMM) 优化框架内的张量训练 (TT) 分解在低秩 (LR) 约束下学习模型。为了进一步减小模型的大小，需要对张量序列分解的分量进行量化。然而，同时考虑具有低秩约束和速率约束权重量化的 NeRF 模型的优化是具有挑战性的。为了解决这个困难，我们引入了一种网络蒸馏操作，该操作在网络训练期间将低秩近似和权重量化分开。基于 LR-NeRF 的 TT 分解，来自初始 LR 约束 NeRF (LR-NeRF) 的信息被提炼为维度小得多的模型 (DLR-NeRF)。然后，我们学习一个优化的全局码本来量化所有 TT 组件，产生最终的 QDLR-NeRF。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的方法具有更好的压缩效率，并且它还具有允许高质量合成任何光场视图的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种量化蒸馏低秩神经辐射场（QDLR-NeRF）方法，用于光场压缩任务。
AI.motivation: 现有光场压缩方法通过编码子孔径图像实现压缩，但缺乏高效且支持视图合成的隐式场景表示。
AI.method: 首先在ADMM框架下通过张量训练（TT）分解构建低秩NeRF（LR-NeRF），再通过网络蒸馏分离低秩近似与权重量化过程，最终利用全局码本量化所有TT组件生成QDLR-NeRF。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在压缩效率上优于现有方法，且能生成高质量的任意视角光场视图。
AI.conclusion: QDLR-NeRF通过低秩约束与量化蒸馏结合，在光场压缩中实现了更高的效率与视图合成质量。

authors_text: Arash Rabbani,Masoud Babaei
title: Resolution enhancement of placenta histological images using deep learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习增强胎盘组织学图像的分辨率
abstract: In this study, a method has been developed to improve the resolution of histological human placenta images. For this purpose, a paired series of high- and low-resolution images have been collected to train a deep neural network model that can predict image residuals required to improve the resolution of the input images. A modified version of the U-net neural network model has been tailored to find the relationship between the low resolution and residual images. After training for 900 epochs on an augmented dataset of 1000 images, the relative mean squared error of 0.003 is achieved for the prediction of 320 test images. The proposed method has not only improved the contrast of the low-resolution images at the edges of cells but added critical details and textures that mimic high-resolution images of placenta villous space.
summary: In this study, a method has been developed to improve the resolution of histological human placenta images. For this purpose, a paired series of high- and low-resolution images have been collected to train a deep neural network model that can predict image residuals required to improve the resolution of the input images. A modified version of the U-net neural network model has been tailored to find the relationship between the low resolution and residual images. After training for 900 epochs on an augmented dataset of 1000 images, the relative mean squared error of 0.003 is achieved for the prediction of 320 test images. The proposed method has not only improved the contrast of the low-resolution images at the edges of cells but added critical details and textures that mimic high-resolution images of placenta villous space.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，开发了一种方法来提高组织学人类胎盘图像的分辨率。为此，收集了一系列成对的高分辨率和低分辨率图像来训练深度神经网络模型，该模型可以预测提高输入图像分辨率所需的图像残差。 U-net 神经网络模型的修改版本经过定制，可以找到低分辨率图像和残差图像之间的关系。在 1000 张图像的增强数据集上训练 900 个 epoch 后，320 张测试图像的预测相对均方误差达到 0.003。所提出的方法不仅提高了细胞边缘低分辨率图像的对比度，而且添加了模仿胎盘绒毛空间高分辨率图像的关键细节和纹理。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于深度学习的胎盘组织图像分辨率增强方法。
AI.motivation: 胎盘组织学图像的低分辨率限制了医学分析的精度，需通过算法提升图像细节以辅助诊断。
AI.method: 构建配对高低分辨率图像数据集，改进U-Net模型预测残差图像，通过900轮训练优化模型参数。
AI.result: 测试集相对均方误差达0.003，显著提升低分辨率图像边缘对比度和绒毛间隙纹理细节。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效增强胎盘图像分辨率，为医学影像分析提供更清晰的结构信息。

authors_text: Debajyoti Bera,Tharrmashastha Sapv
title: Few Quantum Algorithms on Amplitude Distribution
title_zh: 关于幅度分布的几种量子算法
abstract: Amplitude filtering is concerned with identifying basis-states in a superposition whose amplitudes are greater than a specified threshold; probability filtering is defined analogously for probabilities. Given the scarcity of qubits, the focus of this work is to design log-space algorithms for them. Both algorithms follow a similar pattern of estimating the amplitude (or, probability for the latter problem) of each state, in superposition, then comparing each estimate against the threshold for setting up a flag qubit upon success, finally followed by amplitude amplification of states in which the flag is set. We show how to implement each step using very few qubits by designing three subroutines. Our first algorithm performs amplitude amplification even when the "good state'' operator has a small probability of being incorrect -- here we improve upon the space complexity of the previously known algorithms. Our second algorithm performs "true amplitude estimation'' in roughly the same complexity as that of "amplitude estimation'', which actually estimates a probability instead of an amplitude. Our third algorithm is for performing amplitude estimation in parallel (superposition) which is difficult when each estimation branch involves different oracles. As an immediate reward, we observed that the above algorithms for the filtering problems directly improved the upper bounds on the space-bounded query complexity of problems such as non-linearity estimation of Boolean functions and $k$-distinctness.
summary: Amplitude filtering is concerned with identifying basis-states in a superposition whose amplitudes are greater than a specified threshold; probability filtering is defined analogously for probabilities. Given the scarcity of qubits, the focus of this work is to design log-space algorithms for them. Both algorithms follow a similar pattern of estimating the amplitude (or, probability for the latter problem) of each state, in superposition, then comparing each estimate against the threshold for setting up a flag qubit upon success, finally followed by amplitude amplification of states in which the flag is set. We show how to implement each step using very few qubits by designing three subroutines. Our first algorithm performs amplitude amplification even when the "good state'' operator has a small probability of being incorrect -- here we improve upon the space complexity of the previously known algorithms. Our second algorithm performs "true amplitude estimation'' in roughly the same complexity as that of "amplitude estimation'', which actually estimates a probability instead of an amplitude. Our third algorithm is for performing amplitude estimation in parallel (superposition) which is difficult when each estimation branch involves different oracles. As an immediate reward, we observed that the above algorithms for the filtering problems directly improved the upper bounds on the space-bounded query complexity of problems such as non-linearity estimation of Boolean functions and $k$-distinctness.
abstract_zh: 幅度滤波涉及识别叠加中幅度大于指定阈值的基态；概率过滤的定义与概率类似。鉴于量子位的稀缺性，这项工作的重点是为其设计对数空间算法。两种算法都遵循类似的模式，以叠加方式估计每个状态的幅度（或者后一个问题的概率），然后将每个估计值与成功设置标志量子位的阈值进行比较，最后对设置标志的状态进行幅度放大。我们展示了如何通过设计三个子例程使用很少的量子位来实现每个步骤。我们的第一个算法即使在“良好状态”算子出错的概率很小时也会执行幅度放大 - 这里我们改进了先前已知算法的空间复杂度。我们的第二个算法执行“真实幅度估计”的复杂度与“幅度估计”的复杂度大致相同，“幅度估计”实际上估计的是概率而不是幅度。我们的第三个算法是并行执行幅度估计（叠加），当每个估计分支涉及不同的预言机时，这很困难。作为直接奖励，我们观察到上述用于过滤问题的算法直接改进了布尔函数的非线性估计和 $k$-distinctness 等问题的空间有限查询复杂性的上限。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了基于幅度分布的量子算法，旨在使用少量量子位实现幅度和概率过滤任务。
AI.motivation: 由于量子位资源稀缺，传统算法空间复杂度较高，需开发低空间复杂度的量子过滤算法。
AI.method: 提出三种子程序：幅度/概率估计、阈值比较标记及幅度放大，并优化空间利用以适应少量量子位。
AI.result: 改进了幅度放大算法的空间复杂度，实现了与幅度估计同等复杂度的概率估计，并支持多Oracle并行估计，提升了非线性估计和k-区分度问题的上界。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效降低了空间复杂度，为量子计算中资源受限场景提供了更高效的解决方案。

search_text: Few Quantum Algorithms on Amplitude Distribution 关于幅度分布的几种量子算法 Amplitude filtering is concerned with identifying basis-states in a superposition whose amplitudes are greater than a specified threshold; probability filtering is defined analogously for probabilities. Given the scarcity of qubits, the focus of this work is to design log-space algorithms for them. Both algorithms follow a similar pattern of estimating the amplitude (or, probability for the latter problem) of each state, in superposition, then comparing each estimate against the threshold for setting up a flag qubit upon success, finally followed by amplitude amplification of states in which the flag is set. We show how to implement each step using very few qubits by designing three subroutines. Our first algorithm performs amplitude amplification even when the "good state'' operator has a small probability of being incorrect -- here we improve upon the space complexity of the previously known algorithms. Our second algorithm performs "true amplitude estimation'' in roughly the same complexity as that of "amplitude estimation'', which actually estimates a probability instead of an amplitude. Our third algorithm is for performing amplitude estimation in parallel (superposition) which is difficult when each estimation branch involves different oracles. As an immediate reward, we observed that the above algorithms for the filtering problems directly improved the upper bounds on the space-bounded query complexity of problems such as non-linearity estimation of Boolean functions and $k$-distinctness. 幅度滤波涉及识别叠加中幅度大于指定阈值的基态；概率过滤的定义与概率类似。鉴于量子位的稀缺性，这项工作的重点是为其设计对数空间算法。两种算法都遵循类似的模式，以叠加方式估计每个状态的幅度（或者后一个问题的概率），然后将每个估计值与成功设置标志量子位的阈值进行比较，最后对设置标志的状态进行幅度放大。我们展示了如何通过设计三个子例程使用很少的量子位来实现每个步骤。我们的第一个算法即使在“良好状态”算子出错的概率很小时也会执行幅度放大 - 这里我们改进了先前已知算法的空间复杂度。我们的第二个算法执行“真实幅度估计”的复杂度与“幅度估计”的复杂度大致相同，“幅度估计”实际上估计的是概率而不是幅度。我们的第三个算法是并行执行幅度估计（叠加），当每个估计分支涉及不同的预言机时，这很困难。作为直接奖励，我们观察到上述用于过滤问题的算法直接改进了布尔函数的非线性估计和 $k$-distinctness 等问题的空间有限查询复杂性的上限。 本文设计了基于幅度分布的量子算法，旨在使用少量量子位实现幅度和概率过滤任务。 Debajyoti Bera,Tharrmashastha Sapv quant-ph,cs.DS

authors_text: Shao-Yuan Lo,Wei Wang,Jim Thomas,Jingjing Zheng,Vishal M. Patel,Cheng-Hao Kuo
title: Learning Feature Decomposition for Domain Adaptive Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 域自适应单目深度估计的学习特征分解
comment: Accepted at IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: Accepted at IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) has attracted intense study due to its low cost and critical functions for robotic tasks such as localization, mapping and obstacle detection. Supervised approaches have led to great success with the advance of deep learning, but they rely on large quantities of ground-truth depth annotations that are expensive to acquire. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) transfers knowledge from labeled source data to unlabeled target data, so as to relax the constraint of supervised learning. However, existing UDA approaches may not completely align the domain gap across different datasets because of the domain shift problem. We believe better domain alignment can be achieved via well-designed feature decomposition. In this paper, we propose a novel UDA method for MDE, referred to as Learning Feature Decomposition for Adaptation (LFDA), which learns to decompose the feature space into content and style components. LFDA only attempts to align the content component since it has a smaller domain gap. Meanwhile, it excludes the style component which is specific to the source domain from training the primary task. Furthermore, LFDA uses separate feature distribution estimations to further bridge the domain gap. Extensive experiments on three domain adaptative MDE scenarios show that the proposed method achieves superior accuracy and lower computational cost compared to the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) has attracted intense study due to its low cost and critical functions for robotic tasks such as localization, mapping and obstacle detection. Supervised approaches have led to great success with the advance of deep learning, but they rely on large quantities of ground-truth depth annotations that are expensive to acquire. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) transfers knowledge from labeled source data to unlabeled target data, so as to relax the constraint of supervised learning. However, existing UDA approaches may not completely align the domain gap across different datasets because of the domain shift problem. We believe better domain alignment can be achieved via well-designed feature decomposition. In this paper, we propose a novel UDA method for MDE, referred to as Learning Feature Decomposition for Adaptation (LFDA), which learns to decompose the feature space into content and style components. LFDA only attempts to align the content component since it has a smaller domain gap. Meanwhile, it excludes the style component which is specific to the source domain from training the primary task. Furthermore, LFDA uses separate feature distribution estimations to further bridge the domain gap. Extensive experiments on three domain adaptative MDE scenarios show that the proposed method achieves superior accuracy and lower computational cost compared to the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计（MDE）因其低成本和对定位、测绘和障碍物检测等机器人任务的关键功能而引起了广泛的研究。随着深度学习的进步，监督方法取得了巨大成功，但它们依赖于大量获取成本高昂的真实深度注释。无监督域适应（UDA）将知识从标记的源数据转移到未标记的目标数据，从而放松监督学习的约束。然而，由于域转移问题，现有的 UDA 方法可能无法完全对齐不同数据集之间的域间隙。我们相信通过精心设计的特征分解可以实现更好的域对齐。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 MDE 的新颖 UDA 方法，称为适应学习特征分解（LFDA），该方法学习将特征空间分解为内容和风格组件。 LFDA 仅尝试对齐内容组件，因为它的域间隙较小。同时，它从训练主要任务中排除了特定于源域的样式组件。此外，LFDA 使用单独的特征分布估计来进一步弥合域差距。对三个域自适应 MDE 场景的大量实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法具有更高的准确性和更低的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LFDA的无监督领域自适应方法，用于单目深度估计，通过特征分解解决领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督领域自适应方法在跨数据集应用时存在领域偏移问题，难以完全对齐特征分布，需探索更有效的领域对齐策略。
AI.method: LFDA将特征空间分解为内容与风格组件，仅对齐内容部分并排除源域特有的风格特征，结合独立分布估计进一步缩小领域差异。
AI.result: 在三个领域自适应场景中，LFDA相较现有方法取得更高精度与更低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 特征分解策略有效缓解了领域偏移问题，为单目深度估计的跨域应用提供了新思路。

Supervised approaches have led to great success with the advance of deep learning, but they rely on large quantities of ground-truth depth annotations that are expensive to acquire. However, existing UDA approaches may not completely align the domain gap across different datasets because of the domain shift problem. We believe better domain alignment can be achieved via well-designed feature decomposition. In this paper, we propose a novel UDA method for MDE, referred to as Learning Feature Decomposition for Adaptation (LFDA), which learns to decompose the feature space into content and style components. LFDA only attempts to align the content component since it has a smaller domain gap. Meanwhile, it excludes the style component which is specific to the source domain from training the primary task. Furthermore, LFDA uses separate feature distribution estimations to further bridge the domain gap. authors_text: Xinpeng Ding,Jingweng Yang,Xiaowei Hu,Xiaomeng Li
title: Learning Shadow Correspondence for Video Shadow Detection
title_zh: 学习视频阴影检测的阴影对应关系
abstract: Video shadow detection aims to generate consistent shadow predictions among video frames. However, the current approaches suffer from inconsistent shadow predictions across frames, especially when the illumination and background textures change in a video. We make an observation that the inconsistent predictions are caused by the shadow feature inconsistency, i.e., the features of the same shadow regions show dissimilar proprieties among the nearby frames.In this paper, we present a novel Shadow-Consistent Correspondence method (SC-Cor) to enhance pixel-wise similarity of the specific shadow regions across frames for video shadow detection. Our proposed SC-Cor has three main advantages. Firstly, without requiring the dense pixel-to-pixel correspondence labels, SC-Cor can learn the pixel-wise correspondence across frames in a weakly-supervised manner. Secondly, SC-Cor considers intra-shadow separability, which is robust to the variant textures and illuminations in videos. Finally, SC-Cor is a plug-and-play module that can be easily integrated into existing shadow detectors with no extra computational cost. We further design a new evaluation metric to evaluate the temporal stability of the video shadow detection results. Experimental results show that SC-Cor outperforms the prior state-of-the-art method, by 6.51% on IoU and 3.35% on the newly introduced temporal stability metric.
summary: Video shadow detection aims to generate consistent shadow predictions among video frames. However, the current approaches suffer from inconsistent shadow predictions across frames, especially when the illumination and background textures change in a video. We make an observation that the inconsistent predictions are caused by the shadow feature inconsistency, i.e., the features of the same shadow regions show dissimilar proprieties among the nearby frames.In this paper, we present a novel Shadow-Consistent Correspondence method (SC-Cor) to enhance pixel-wise similarity of the specific shadow regions across frames for video shadow detection. Our proposed SC-Cor has three main advantages. Firstly, without requiring the dense pixel-to-pixel correspondence labels, SC-Cor can learn the pixel-wise correspondence across frames in a weakly-supervised manner. Secondly, SC-Cor considers intra-shadow separability, which is robust to the variant textures and illuminations in videos. Finally, SC-Cor is a plug-and-play module that can be easily integrated into existing shadow detectors with no extra computational cost. We further design a new evaluation metric to evaluate the temporal stability of the video shadow detection results. Experimental results show that SC-Cor outperforms the prior state-of-the-art method, by 6.51% on IoU and 3.35% on the newly introduced temporal stability metric.
abstract_zh: 视频阴影检测旨在在视频帧之间生成一致的阴影预测。然而，当前的方法存在跨帧的阴影预测不一致的问题，特别是当视频中的照明和背景纹理发生变化时。我们观察到不一致的预测是由阴影特征不一致引起的，即相同阴影区域的特征在附近帧之间表现出不同的特性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的阴影一致对应方法（SC-Cor）来增强跨帧特定阴影区域的像素相似性，以进行视频阴影检测。我们提出的 SC-Cor 具有三个主要优点。首先，不需要密集的像素到像素对应标签，SC-Cor 可以以弱监督的方式学习跨帧的像素级对应关系。其次，SC-Cor 考虑了阴影内可分离性，这对于视频中的不同纹理和照明具有鲁棒性。最后，SC-Cor 是一个即插即用模块，可以轻松集成到现有阴影探测器中，无需额外的计算成本。我们进一步设计了一种新的评估指标来评估视频阴影检测结果的时间稳定性。实验结果表明，SC-Cor 优于之前最先进的方法，IoU 提高了 6.51%，新引入的时间稳定性指标提高了 3.35%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SC-Cor的新方法，用于增强视频阴影检测中帧间阴影区域的像素级一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频阴影检测方法在光照和背景纹理变化时容易产生帧间预测不一致的问题，主要原因是阴影特征在相邻帧中表现不一致。
AI.method: SC-Cor通过弱监督学习无需密集像素对应标签，结合帧间阴影区域的内在分离性，并设计为可插拔模块，有效提升阴影特征一致性。
AI.result: 在IoU指标上优于现有最佳方法6.51%，在新引入的时间稳定性指标上提升3.35%。
AI.conclusion: SC-Cor通过增强帧间阴影特征一致性，显著提升了视频阴影检测的准确性和时间稳定性，且无需额外计算成本。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SC-Cor的新方法，用于增强视频阴影检测中帧间阴影区域的像素级一致性。

ai_content.method: SC-Cor通过弱监督学习无需密集像素对应标签，结合帧间阴影区域的内在分离性，并设计为可插拔模块，有效提升阴影特征一致性。

search_text: Learning Shadow Correspondence for Video Shadow Detection 学习视频阴影检测的阴影对应关系 Video shadow detection aims to generate consistent shadow predictions among video frames. However, the current approaches suffer from inconsistent shadow predictions across frames, especially when the illumination and background textures change in a video. We make an observation that the inconsistent predictions are caused by the shadow feature inconsistency, i.e., the features of the same shadow regions show dissimilar proprieties among the nearby frames.In this paper, we present a novel Shadow-Consistent Correspondence method (SC-Cor) to enhance pixel-wise similarity of the specific shadow regions across frames for video shadow detection. Our proposed SC-Cor has three main advantages. Firstly, without requiring the dense pixel-to-pixel correspondence labels, SC-Cor can learn the pixel-wise correspondence across frames in a weakly-supervised manner. Secondly, SC-Cor considers intra-shadow separability, which is robust to the variant textures and illuminations in videos. Finally, SC-Cor is a plug-and-play module that can be easily integrated into existing shadow detectors with no extra computational cost. We further design a new evaluation metric to evaluate the temporal stability of the video shadow detection results. Experimental results show that SC-Cor outperforms the prior state-of-the-art method, by 6.51% on IoU and 3.35% on the newly introduced temporal stability metric. 视频阴影检测旨在在视频帧之间生成一致的阴影预测。然而，当前的方法存在跨帧的阴影预测不一致的问题，特别是当视频中的照明和背景纹理发生变化时。我们观察到不一致的预测是由阴影特征不一致引起的，即相同阴影区域的特征在附近帧之间表现出不同的特性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的阴影一致对应方法（SC-Cor）来增强跨帧特定阴影区域的像素相似性，以进行视频阴影检测。我们提出的 SC-Cor 具有三个主要优点。首先，不需要密集的像素到像素对应标签，SC-Cor 可以以弱监督的方式学习跨帧的像素级对应关系。其次，SC-Cor 考虑了阴影内可分离性，这对于视频中的不同纹理和照明具有鲁棒性。最后，SC-Cor 是一个即插即用模块，可以轻松集成到现有阴影探测器中，无需额外的计算成本。我们进一步设计了一种新的评估指标来评估视频阴影检测结果的时间稳定性。实验结果表明，SC-Cor 优于之前最先进的方法，IoU 提高了 6.51%，新引入的时间稳定性指标提高了 3.35%。 本文提出了一种名为SC-Cor的新方法，用于增强视频阴影检测中帧间阴影区域的像素级一致性。 Xinpeng Ding,Jingweng Yang,Xiaowei Hu,Xiaomeng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Can Peng,Kun Zhao,Tianren Wang,Meng Li,Brian C. Lovell
title: Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning from an Open-Set Perspective
title_zh: 开放集视角下的少样本类增量学习
abstract: The continual appearance of new objects in the visual world poses considerable challenges for current deep learning methods in real-world deployments. The challenge of new task learning is often exacerbated by the scarcity of data for the new categories due to rarity or cost. Here we explore the important task of Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (FSCIL) and its extreme data scarcity condition of one-shot. An ideal FSCIL model needs to perform well on all classes, regardless of their presentation order or paucity of data. It also needs to be robust to open-set real-world conditions and be easily adapted to the new tasks that always arise in the field. In this paper, we first reevaluate the current task setting and propose a more comprehensive and practical setting for the FSCIL task. Then, inspired by the similarity of the goals for FSCIL and modern face recognition systems, we propose our method -- Augmented Angular Loss Incremental Classification or ALICE. In ALICE, instead of the commonly used cross-entropy loss, we propose to use the angular penalty loss to obtain well-clustered features. As the obtained features not only need to be compactly clustered but also diverse enough to maintain generalization for future incremental classes, we further discuss how class augmentation, data augmentation, and data balancing affect classification performance. Experiments on benchmark datasets, including CIFAR100, miniImageNet, and CUB200, demonstrate the improved performance of ALICE over the state-of-the-art FSCIL methods.
summary: The continual appearance of new objects in the visual world poses considerable challenges for current deep learning methods in real-world deployments. The challenge of new task learning is often exacerbated by the scarcity of data for the new categories due to rarity or cost. Here we explore the important task of Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (FSCIL) and its extreme data scarcity condition of one-shot. An ideal FSCIL model needs to perform well on all classes, regardless of their presentation order or paucity of data. It also needs to be robust to open-set real-world conditions and be easily adapted to the new tasks that always arise in the field. In this paper, we first reevaluate the current task setting and propose a more comprehensive and practical setting for the FSCIL task. Then, inspired by the similarity of the goals for FSCIL and modern face recognition systems, we propose our method -- Augmented Angular Loss Incremental Classification or ALICE. In ALICE, instead of the commonly used cross-entropy loss, we propose to use the angular penalty loss to obtain well-clustered features. As the obtained features not only need to be compactly clustered but also diverse enough to maintain generalization for future incremental classes, we further discuss how class augmentation, data augmentation, and data balancing affect classification performance. Experiments on benchmark datasets, including CIFAR100, miniImageNet, and CUB200, demonstrate the improved performance of ALICE over the state-of-the-art FSCIL methods.
abstract_zh: 视觉世界中新对象的不断出现对现实世界部署中当前的深度学习方法提出了相当大的挑战。由于稀有性或成本，新类别的数据稀缺往往会加剧新任务学习的挑战。在这里，我们探讨少样本类增量学习（FSCIL）的重要任务及其一次性的极端数据稀缺条件。理想的 FSCIL 模型需要在所有类别上都表现良好，无论其呈现顺序或数据是否缺乏。它还需要对开放的现实条件具有鲁棒性，并且能够轻松适应现场不断出现的新任务。在本文中，我们首先重新评估当前的任务设置，并为 FSCIL 任务提出更全面、更实用的设置。然后，受到 FSCIL 和现代人脸识别系统目标相似性的启发，我们提出了我们的方法——增强角损失增量分类或 ALICE。在ALICE中，我们建议使用角度惩罚损失来代替常用的交叉熵损失来获得良好聚类的特征。由于获得的特征不仅需要紧凑地聚类，而且还需要足够多样化以维持未来增量类的泛化，因此我们进一步讨论类增强、数据增强和数据平衡如何影响分类性能。在基准数据集（包括 CIFAR100、miniImageNet 和 CUB200）上进行的实验表明，ALICE 的性能优于最先进的 FSCIL 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在开放集视角下的一少样本类增量学习（FSCIL）任务，旨在解决现实世界中新类别数据稀缺且需持续学习的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中新对象不断出现，现有深度学习方法因数据稀缺性和开放集条件难以有效适应，需设计更鲁棒的增量学习框架。
AI.method: 提出ALICE方法，采用角度惩罚损失替代交叉熵损失以聚类特征，并结合类别增强、数据增强和平衡策略提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100、miniImageNet和CUB200基准数据集上，ALICE在少样本增量学习任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ALICE通过角度损失和数据增强策略有效解决了FSCIL任务的数据稀缺性和开放集挑战，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Wei Li,Zhiwen Li,Yiqi Liu,Yongping Pan
title: Learning robot inverse dynamics using sparse online Gaussian process with forgetting mechanism
title_zh: 使用具有遗忘机制的稀疏在线高斯过程学习机器人逆动力学
comment: Submitted to 2022 IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics
comments: Submitted to 2022 IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics
abstract: Online Gaussian processes (GPs), typically used for learning models from time-series data, are more flexible and robust than offline GPs. Both local and sparse approximations of GPs can efficiently learn complex models online. Yet, these approaches assume that all signals are relatively accurate and that all data are available for learning without misleading data. Besides, the online learning capacity of GPs is limited for high-dimension problems and long-term tasks in practice. This paper proposes a sparse online GP (SOGP) with a forgetting mechanism to forget distant model information at a specific rate. The proposed approach combines two general data deletion schemes for the basis vector set of SOGP: The position information-based scheme and the oldest points-based scheme. We apply our approach to learn the inverse dynamics of a collaborative robot with 7 degrees of freedom under a two-segment trajectory tracking problem with task switching. Both simulations and experiments have shown that the proposed approach achieves better tracking accuracy and predictive smoothness compared with the two general data deletion schemes.
summary: Online Gaussian processes (GPs), typically used for learning models from time-series data, are more flexible and robust than offline GPs. Both local and sparse approximations of GPs can efficiently learn complex models online. Yet, these approaches assume that all signals are relatively accurate and that all data are available for learning without misleading data. Besides, the online learning capacity of GPs is limited for high-dimension problems and long-term tasks in practice. This paper proposes a sparse online GP (SOGP) with a forgetting mechanism to forget distant model information at a specific rate. The proposed approach combines two general data deletion schemes for the basis vector set of SOGP: The position information-based scheme and the oldest points-based scheme. We apply our approach to learn the inverse dynamics of a collaborative robot with 7 degrees of freedom under a two-segment trajectory tracking problem with task switching. Both simulations and experiments have shown that the proposed approach achieves better tracking accuracy and predictive smoothness compared with the two general data deletion schemes.
abstract_zh: 在线高斯过程 (GP) 通常用于从时间序列数据中学习模型，比离线 GP 更灵活、更稳健。 GP 的局部逼近和稀疏逼近都可以有效地在线学习复杂模型。然而，这些方法假设所有信号都相对准确，并且所有数据都可用于学习而不会产生误导性数据。此外，对于实践中的高维问题和长期任务，全科医生的在线学习能力有限。本文提出了一种具有遗忘机制的稀疏在线GP（SOGP），可以以特定的速率忘记遥远的模型信息。所提出的方法结合了SOGP基本向量集的两种通用数据删除方案：基于位置信息的方案和基于最旧点的方案。我们应用我们的方法来学习具有 7 个自由度的协作机器人在任务切换的两段轨迹跟踪问题下的逆动力学。仿真和实验都表明，与两种通用的数据删除方案相比，所提出的方法实现了更好的跟踪精度和预测平滑度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种带有遗忘机制的稀疏在线高斯过程（SOGP），用于学习协作机器人的逆动力学模型，以提高轨迹跟踪的准确性和平滑性。
AI.motivation: 现有在线高斯过程（GP）在处理高维问题和长期任务时存在局限性，且假设所有数据均准确有效。为解决模型信息过时和冗余数据干扰问题，需引入遗忘机制以动态更新模型。
AI.method: 设计带有遗忘机制的SOGP，结合基于位置信息和基于最旧数据点的两种数据删除策略，通过按特定速率遗忘远程模型信息，实现高效在线学习。
AI.result: 仿真和实验表明，该方法在7自由度协作机器人两段轨迹跟踪任务中，相比传统数据删除方案，跟踪精度和预测平滑性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过动态遗忘机制有效解决了高维长期任务中的模型过时问题，为机器人逆动力学学习提供了更鲁棒的在线学习框架。
