motivation: 现有在线高斯过程（GP）在处理高维问题和长期任务时存在局限性，且假设所有数据均准确有效。为解决模型信息过时和冗余数据干扰问题，需引入遗忘机制以动态更新模型。
method: 设计带有遗忘机制的SOGP，结合基于位置信息和基于最旧数据点的两种数据删除策略，通过按特定速率遗忘远程模型信息，实现高效在线学习。
result: 仿真和实验表明，该方法在7自由度协作机器人两段轨迹跟踪任务中，相比传统数据删除方案，跟踪精度和预测平滑性显著提升。
conclusion: 所提方法通过动态遗忘机制有效解决了高维长期任务中的模型过时问题，为机器人逆动力学学习提供了更鲁棒的在线学习框架。
search_text: Learning robot inverse dynamics using sparse online Gaussian process with forgetting mechanism 使用具有遗忘机制的稀疏在线高斯过程学习机器人逆动力学 Online Gaussian processes (GPs), typically used for learning models from time-series data, are more flexible and robust than offline GPs. Both local and sparse approximations of GPs can efficiently learn complex models online. Yet, these approaches assume that all signals are relatively accurate and that all data are available for learning without misleading data. Besides, the online learning capacity of GPs is limited for high-dimension problems and long-term tasks in practice. This paper proposes a sparse online GP (SOGP) with a forgetting mechanism to forget distant model information at a specific rate. The proposed approach combines two general data deletion schemes for the basis vector set of SOGP: The position information-based scheme and the oldest points-based scheme. We apply our approach to learn the inverse dynamics of a collaborative robot with 7 degrees of freedom under a two-segment trajectory tracking problem with task switching. Both simulations and experiments have shown that the proposed approach achieves better tracking accuracy and predictive smoothness compared with the two general data deletion schemes. 在线高斯过程 (GP) 通常用于从时间序列数据中学习模型，比离线 GP 更灵活、更稳健。 GP 的局部逼近和稀疏逼近都可以有效地在线学习复杂模型。然而，这些方法假设所有信号都相对准确，并且所有数据都可用于学习而不会产生误导性数据。此外，对于实践中的高维问题和长期任务，全科医生的在线学习能力有限。本文提出了一种具有遗忘机制的稀疏在线GP（SOGP），可以以特定的速率忘记遥远的模型信息。所提出的方法结合了SOGP基本向量集的两种通用数据删除方案：基于位置信息的方案和基于最旧点的方案。我们应用我们的方法来学习具有 7 个自由度的协作机器人在任务切换的两段轨迹跟踪问题下的逆动力学。仿真和实验都表明，与两种通用的数据删除方案相比，所提出的方法实现了更好的跟踪精度和预测平滑度。 本文提出了一种带有遗忘机制的稀疏在线高斯过程（SOGP），用于学习协作机器人的逆动力学模型，以提高轨迹跟踪的准确性和平滑性。 Wei Li,Zhiwen Li,Yiqi Liu,Yongping Pan cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Mitali Bafna,Jun-Ting Hsieh,Pravesh K. Kothari,Jeff Xu
title: Polynomial-Time Power-Sum Decomposition of Polynomials
title_zh: 多项式的多项式时间幂和分解
abstract: We give efficient algorithms for finding power-sum decomposition of an input polynomial $P(x)= \sum_{i\leq m} p_i(x)^d$ with component $p_i$s. The case of linear $p_i$s is equivalent to the well-studied tensor decomposition problem while the quadratic case occurs naturally in studying identifiability of non-spherical Gaussian mixtures from low-order moments. Unlike tensor decomposition, both the unique identifiability and algorithms for this problem are not well-understood. For the simplest setting of quadratic $p_i$s and $d=3$, prior work of Ge, Huang and Kakade yields an algorithm only when $m \leq \tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$. On the other hand, the more general recent result of Garg, Kayal and Saha builds an algebraic approach to handle any $m=n^{O(1)}$ components but only when $d$ is large enough (while yielding no bounds for $d=3$ or even $d=100$) and only handles an inverse exponential noise. Our results obtain a substantial quantitative improvement on both the prior works above even in the base case of $d=3$ and quadratic $p_i$s. Specifically, our algorithm succeeds in decomposing a sum of $m \sim \tilde{O}(n)$ generic quadratic $p_i$s for $d=3$ and more generally the $d$th power-sum of $m \sim n^{2d/15}$ generic degree-$K$ polynomials for any $K \geq 2$. Our algorithm relies only on basic numerical linear algebraic primitives, is exact (i.e., obtain arbitrarily tiny error up to numerical precision), and handles an inverse polynomial noise when the $p_i$s have random Gaussian coefficients. Our main tool is a new method for extracting the linear span of $p_i$s by studying the linear subspace of low-order partial derivatives of the input $P$. For establishing polynomial stability of our algorithm in average-case, we prove inverse polynomial bounds on the smallest singular value of certain correlated random matrices with low-degree polynomial entries that arise in our analyses.

For the simplest setting of quadratic $p_i$s and $d=3$, prior work of Ge, Huang and Kakade yields an algorithm only when $m \leq \tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$. On the other hand, the more general recent result of Garg, Kayal and Saha builds an algebraic approach to handle any $m=n^{O(1)}$ components but only when $d$ is large enough (while yielding no bounds for $d=3$ or even $d=100$) and only handles an inverse exponential noise. Our results obtain a substantial quantitative improvement on both the prior works above even in the base case of $d=3$ and quadratic $p_i$s. Specifically, our algorithm succeeds in decomposing a sum of $m \sim \tilde{O}(n)$ generic quadratic $p_i$s for $d=3$ and more generally the $d$th power-sum of $m \sim n^{2d/15}$ generic degree-$K$ polynomials for any $K \geq 2$. Our algorithm relies only on basic numerical linear algebraic primitives, is exact (i.e., obtain arbitrarily tiny error up to numerical precision), and handles an inverse polynomial noise when the $p_i$s have random Gaussian coefficients. Our main tool is a new method for extracting the linear span of $p_i$s by studying the linear subspace of low-order partial derivatives of the input $P$. For establishing polynomial stability of our algorithm in average-case, we prove inverse polynomial bounds on the smallest singular value of certain correlated random matrices with low-degree polynomial entries that arise in our analyses.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了有效的算法来查找输入多项式 $P(x)= \sum_{i\leq m} p_i(x)^d$ 与分量 $p_i$s 的幂和分解。线性 $p_i$s 的情况相当于经过充分研究的张量分解问题，而二次情况在研究低阶矩的非球面高斯混合物的可辨识性时自然出现。与张量分解不同，这个问题的唯一可识别性和算法都没有得到很好的理解。对于二次 $p_i$s 和 $d=3$ 的最简单设置，Ge、Huang 和 Kakade 的先前工作仅在 $m \leq \tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$ 时产生算法。另一方面，Garg、Kayal 和 Saha 的更一般的最新结果构建了一种代数方法来处理任何 $m=n^{O(1)}$ 分量，但只有当 $d$ 足够大时（同时对 $d=3$ 甚至 $d=100$ 没有界限）并且仅处理逆指数噪声。即使在 $d=3$ 和二次 $p_i$s 的基本情况下，我们的结果也比上述先前的工作取得了实质性的定量改进。具体来说，我们的算法成功分解了 $d=3$ 的 $m \sim \tilde{O}(n)$ 通用二次 $p_i$s 之和，更一般地，分解了任何 $K \geq 2$ 的 $m \sim n^{2d/15}$ 通用次数 $K$ 多项式的 $d$ 次幂和。我们的算法仅依赖于基本的数值线性代数基元，是精确的（即，获得达到数值精度的任意微小误差），并且当 $p_i$s 具有随机高斯系数时处理逆多项式噪声。我们的主要工具是一种通过研究输入 $P$ 的低阶偏导数的线性子空间来提取 $p_i$s 线性跨度的新方法。为了在平均情况下建立我们的算法的多项式稳定性，我们用分析中出现的低次多项式条目证明了某些相关随机矩阵的最小奇异值的逆多项式界限。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于将输入多项式分解为幂和形式，特别针对二次项和三次幂的情况。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理二次项分解时受限于组件数量或需要较大的幂次，且对噪声容忍度低，需改进算法以提升效率和适用性。
AI.method: 通过研究输入多项式的低阶偏导数线性子空间，结合数值线性代数方法提取组件线性跨度，并分析相关随机矩阵的最小奇异值以确保稳定性。
AI.result: 算法可成功分解m ~ O(n)个二次组件（d=3）及更高幂次的情况，支持多项式噪声且误差可控，优于先前的O(√n)和高幂次限制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论和实践上均优于现有技术，为高斯混合模型可识别性及张量分解提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Lizhao Liu,Shangxin Huang,Zhuangwei Zhuang,Ran Yang,Mingkui Tan,Yaowei Wang
title: DAS: Densely-Anchored Sampling for Deep Metric Learning
title_zh: DAS：用于深度度量学习的密集锚定采样
abstract: Deep Metric Learning (DML) serves to learn an embedding function to project semantically similar data into nearby embedding space and plays a vital role in many applications, such as image retrieval and face recognition. However, the performance of DML methods often highly depends on sampling methods to choose effective data from the embedding space in the training. In practice, the embeddings in the embedding space are obtained by some deep models, where the embedding space is often with barren area due to the absence of training points, resulting in so called "missing embedding" issue. This issue may impair the sample quality, which leads to degenerated DML performance. In this work, we investigate how to alleviate the "missing embedding" issue to improve the sampling quality and achieve effective DML. To this end, we propose a Densely-Anchored Sampling (DAS) scheme that considers the embedding with corresponding data point as "anchor" and exploits the anchor's nearby embedding space to densely produce embeddings without data points. Specifically, we propose to exploit the embedding space around single anchor with Discriminative Feature Scaling (DFS) and multiple anchors with Memorized Transformation Shifting (MTS). In this way, by combing the embeddings with and without data points, we are able to provide more embeddings to facilitate the sampling process thus boosting the performance of DML. Our method is effortlessly integrated into existing DML frameworks and improves them without bells and whistles. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method.
summary: Deep Metric Learning (DML) serves to learn an embedding function to project semantically similar data into nearby embedding space and plays a vital role in many applications, such as image retrieval and face recognition. However, the performance of DML methods often highly depends on sampling methods to choose effective data from the embedding space in the training. In practice, the embeddings in the embedding space are obtained by some deep models, where the embedding space is often with barren area due to the absence of training points, resulting in so called "missing embedding" issue. This issue may impair the sample quality, which leads to degenerated DML performance. In this work, we investigate how to alleviate the "missing embedding" issue to improve the sampling quality and achieve effective DML. To this end, we propose a Densely-Anchored Sampling (DAS) scheme that considers the embedding with corresponding data point as "anchor" and exploits the anchor's nearby embedding space to densely produce embeddings without data points. Specifically, we propose to exploit the embedding space around single anchor with Discriminative Feature Scaling (DFS) and multiple anchors with Memorized Transformation Shifting (MTS). In this way, by combing the embeddings with and without data points, we are able to provide more embeddings to facilitate the sampling process thus boosting the performance of DML. Our method is effortlessly integrated into existing DML frameworks and improves them without bells and whistles. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习（DML）用于学习嵌入函数，将语义相似的数据投影到附近的嵌入空间中，并在图像检索和人脸识别等许多应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，DML 方法的性能通常高度依赖于在训练中从嵌入空间中选择有效数据的采样方法。在实践中，嵌入空间中的嵌入是通过一些深度模型获得的，其中嵌入空间往往由于缺乏训练点而出现贫瘠区域，从而导致所谓的“缺失嵌入”问题。此问题可能会损害样本质量，从而导致 DML 性能下降。在这项工作中，我们研究如何缓解“缺失嵌入”问题，以提高采样质量并实现有效的 DML。为此，我们提出了一种密集锚定采样（DAS）方案，该方案将具有相应数据点的嵌入视为“锚点”，并利用锚点附近的嵌入空间来密集地产生没有数据点的嵌入。具体来说，我们建议利用判别特征缩放（DFS）的单个锚点周围的嵌入空间和具有记忆变换移位（MTS）的多个锚点周围的嵌入空间。这样，通过组合有数据点和没有数据点的嵌入，我们能够提供更多的嵌入来促进采样过程，从而提高 DML 的性能。我们的方法可以毫不费力地集成到现有的 DML 框架中，并在没有花哨的情况下对其进行改进。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出Densely-Anchored Sampling（DAS）方法，解决深度度量学习中的‘缺失嵌入’问题，提升采样质量与模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有DML方法因嵌入空间存在‘缺失嵌入’问题，导致采样质量下降，影响模型性能，需改进采样策略。
AI.method: 提出DAS方法，通过单锚点的判别性特征缩放（DFS）和多锚点的记忆变换位移（MTS）生成密集嵌入，结合有无数据点的嵌入以提升采样质量。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验验证，DAS方法显著提升DML性能，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DAS有效缓解缺失嵌入问题，提升采样质量与DML性能，且易于集成到现有框架中。

search_text: DAS: Densely-Anchored Sampling for Deep Metric Learning DAS：用于深度度量学习的密集锚定采样 Deep Metric Learning (DML) serves to learn an embedding function to project semantically similar data into nearby embedding space and plays a vital role in many applications, such as image retrieval and face recognition. However, the performance of DML methods often highly depends on sampling methods to choose effective data from the embedding space in the training. In practice, the embeddings in the embedding space are obtained by some deep models, where the embedding space is often with barren area due to the absence of training points, resulting in so called "missing embedding" issue. This issue may impair the sample quality, which leads to degenerated DML performance. In this work, we investigate how to alleviate the "missing embedding" issue to improve the sampling quality and achieve effective DML. To this end, we propose a Densely-Anchored Sampling (DAS) scheme that considers the embedding with corresponding data point as "anchor" and exploits the anchor's nearby embedding space to densely produce embeddings without data points. Specifically, we propose to exploit the embedding space around single anchor with Discriminative Feature Scaling (DFS) and multiple anchors with Memorized Transformation Shifting (MTS). In this way, by combing the embeddings with and without data points, we are able to provide more embeddings to facilitate the sampling process thus boosting the performance of DML. Our method is effortlessly integrated into existing DML frameworks and improves them without bells and whistles. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method. 深度度量学习（DML）用于学习嵌入函数，将语义相似的数据投影到附近的嵌入空间中，并在图像检索和人脸识别等许多应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，DML 方法的性能通常高度依赖于在训练中从嵌入空间中选择有效数据的采样方法。在实践中，嵌入空间中的嵌入是通过一些深度模型获得的，其中嵌入空间往往由于缺乏训练点而出现贫瘠区域，从而导致所谓的“缺失嵌入”问题。此问题可能会损害样本质量，从而导致 DML 性能下降。在这项工作中，我们研究如何缓解“缺失嵌入”问题，以提高采样质量并实现有效的 DML。为此，我们提出了一种密集锚定采样（DAS）方案，该方案将具有相应数据点的嵌入视为“锚点”，并利用锚点附近的嵌入空间来密集地产生没有数据点的嵌入。具体来说，我们建议利用判别特征缩放（DFS）的单个锚点周围的嵌入空间和具有记忆变换移位（MTS）的多个锚点周围的嵌入空间。这样，通过组合有数据点和没有数据点的嵌入，我们能够提供更多的嵌入来促进采样过程，从而提高 DML 的性能。我们的方法可以毫不费力地集成到现有的 DML 框架中，并在没有花哨的情况下对其进行改进。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们方法的优越性。 提出Densely-Anchored Sampling（DAS）方法，解决深度度量学习中的‘缺失嵌入’问题，提升采样质量与模型性能。 Lizhao Liu,Shangxin Huang,Zhuangwei Zhuang,Ran Yang,Mingkui Tan,Yaowei Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Yitian Wang,Jun Lin,Liu Zhang,Tianhao Wang,Hao Xu,Guanyu Zhang,Yang Liu
title: Research on Stable Obstacle Avoidance Control Strategy for Tracked Intelligent Transportation Vehicles in Non-structural Environment Based on Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于深度学习的非结构环境下履带式智能交通车辆稳定避障控制策略研究
abstract: Existing intelligent driving technology often has a problem in balancing smooth driving and fast obstacle avoidance, especially when the vehicle is in a non-structural environment, and is prone to instability in emergency situations. Therefore, this study proposed an autonomous obstacle avoidance control strategy that can effectively guarantee vehicle stability based on Attention-long short-term memory (Attention-LSTM) deep learning model with the idea of humanoid driving. First, we designed the autonomous obstacle avoidance control rules to guarantee the safety of unmanned vehicles. Second, we improved the autonomous obstacle avoidance control strategy combined with the stability analysis of special vehicles. Third, we constructed a deep learning obstacle avoidance control through experiments, and the average relative error of this system was 15%. Finally, the stability and accuracy of this control strategy were verified numerically and experimentally. The method proposed in this study can ensure that the unmanned vehicle can successfully avoid the obstacles while driving smoothly.
summary: Existing intelligent driving technology often has a problem in balancing smooth driving and fast obstacle avoidance, especially when the vehicle is in a non-structural environment, and is prone to instability in emergency situations. Therefore, this study proposed an autonomous obstacle avoidance control strategy that can effectively guarantee vehicle stability based on Attention-long short-term memory (Attention-LSTM) deep learning model with the idea of humanoid driving. First, we designed the autonomous obstacle avoidance control rules to guarantee the safety of unmanned vehicles. Second, we improved the autonomous obstacle avoidance control strategy combined with the stability analysis of special vehicles. Third, we constructed a deep learning obstacle avoidance control through experiments, and the average relative error of this system was 15%. Finally, the stability and accuracy of this control strategy were verified numerically and experimentally. The method proposed in this study can ensure that the unmanned vehicle can successfully avoid the obstacles while driving smoothly.
abstract_zh: 现有的智能驾驶技术往往在平衡平稳驾驶和快速避障方面存在问题，尤其是当车辆处于非结构环境时，在紧急情况下容易出现不稳定现象。因此，本研究结合类人驾驶的思想，基于注意力-长短期记忆（Attention-LSTM）深度学习模型，提出了一种能够有效保证车辆稳定性的自主避障控制策略。首先，我们设计了自主避障控制规则，保证无人车的安全。其次，结合特种车辆稳定性分析改进了自主避障控制策略。第三，我们通过实验构建了深度学习避障控制，该系统的平均相对误差为15%。最后通过数值和实验验证了该控制策略的稳定性和准确性。本研究提出的方法可以保证无人车在平稳行驶的同时成功避障。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度学习的稳定避障控制策略，用于履带式智能车辆在非结构化环境中的自主避障。
AI.motivation: 现有智能驾驶技术难以平衡平稳驾驶与快速避障，尤其在非结构化环境中易出现紧急不稳定情况，需提升无人车安全性和稳定性。
AI.method: 设计自主避障控制规则，结合特殊车辆稳定性分析改进策略，构建基于Attention-LSTM的深度学习模型并通过实验验证。
AI.result: 系统平均相对误差为15%，数值模拟与实验验证了控制策略的稳定性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可确保无人车在避障时保持行驶平稳，提升非结构化环境下的安全性和可靠性。

authors_text: Donghao Qiao,Farhana Zulkernine
title: Adaptive Feature Fusion for Cooperative Perception using LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: 使用 LiDAR 点云进行协作感知的自适应特征融合
abstract: Cooperative perception allows a Connected Autonomous Vehicle (CAV) to interact with the other CAVs in the vicinity to enhance perception of surrounding objects to increase safety and reliability. It can compensate for the limitations of the conventional vehicular perception such as blind spots, low resolution, and weather effects. An effective feature fusion model for the intermediate fusion methods of cooperative perception can improve feature selection and information aggregation to further enhance the perception accuracy. We propose adaptive feature fusion models with trainable feature selection modules. One of our proposed models Spatial-wise Adaptive feature Fusion (S-AdaFusion) outperforms all other State-of-the-Arts (SOTAs) on two subsets of the OPV2V dataset: Default CARLA Towns for vehicle detection and the Culver City for domain adaptation. In addition, previous studies have only tested cooperative perception for vehicle detection. A pedestrian, however, is much more likely to be seriously injured in a traffic accident. We evaluate the performance of cooperative perception for both vehicle and pedestrian detection using the CODD dataset. Our architecture achieves higher Average Precision (AP) than other existing models for both vehicle and pedestrian detection on the CODD dataset. The experiments demonstrate that cooperative perception also improves the pedestrian detection accuracy compared to the conventional single vehicle perception process.
summary: Cooperative perception allows a Connected Autonomous Vehicle (CAV) to interact with the other CAVs in the vicinity to enhance perception of surrounding objects to increase safety and reliability. It can compensate for the limitations of the conventional vehicular perception such as blind spots, low resolution, and weather effects. An effective feature fusion model for the intermediate fusion methods of cooperative perception can improve feature selection and information aggregation to further enhance the perception accuracy. We propose adaptive feature fusion models with trainable feature selection modules. One of our proposed models Spatial-wise Adaptive feature Fusion (S-AdaFusion) outperforms all other State-of-the-Arts (SOTAs) on two subsets of the OPV2V dataset: Default CARLA Towns for vehicle detection and the Culver City for domain adaptation. In addition, previous studies have only tested cooperative perception for vehicle detection. A pedestrian, however, is much more likely to be seriously injured in a traffic accident. We evaluate the performance of cooperative perception for both vehicle and pedestrian detection using the CODD dataset. Our architecture achieves higher Average Precision (AP) than other existing models for both vehicle and pedestrian detection on the CODD dataset. The experiments demonstrate that cooperative perception also improves the pedestrian detection accuracy compared to the conventional single vehicle perception process.
abstract_zh: 协作感知允许联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 与附近的其他 CAV 交互，以增强对周围物体的感知，从而提高安全性和可靠性。它可以弥补传统车辆感知的局限性，例如盲点、低分辨率和天气影响。协同感知中间融合方法的有效特征融合模型可以改进特征选择和信息聚合，进一步提高感知精度。我们提出了具有可训练特征选择模块的自适应特征融合模型。我们提出的模型之一空间自适应特征融合（S-AdaFusion）在 OPV2V 数据集的两个子集上优于所有其他最先进的模型（SOTA）：用于车辆检测的默认 CARLA 城镇和用于域适应的卡尔弗城。此外，之前的研究仅测试了车辆检测的协作感知。然而，行人在交通事故中受重伤的可能性要大得多。我们使用 CODD 数据集评估车辆和行人检测的协作感知性能。我们的架构在 CODD 数据集上的车辆和行人检测方面比其他现有模型实现了更高的平均精度 (AP)。实验表明，与传统的单车辆感知过程相比，协作感知还提高了行人检测精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应特征融合模型（S-AdaFusion），用于改进车联网自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的协同感知性能，通过LiDAR点云数据提升周围物体检测的准确性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统车辆感知存在盲区、分辨率低和天气影响等问题，而协同感知可通过多车信息交互弥补不足。现有研究仅关注车辆检测，但行人事故伤害风险更高，需同时优化行人检测。
AI.method: 设计可训练的特征选择模块，提出空间自适应特征融合模型（S-AdaFusion），在OPV2V和CODD数据集上验证中间层特征融合效果，支持领域自适应和多目标检测。
AI.result: 在OPV2V数据集的CARLA Towns和Culver City子集上，S-AdaFusion优于现有方法；在CODD数据集上，车辆和行人检测的平均精度（AP）均高于其他模型，协同感知显著提升行人检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 自适应特征融合有效增强了协同感知性能，证明了多车信息聚合对提升车辆及行人检测的必要性，为复杂场景下的自动驾驶安全提供了新方法。

conclusion: 自适应特征融合有效增强了协同感知性能，证明了多车信息聚合对提升车辆及行人检测的必要性，为复杂场景下的自动驾驶安全提供了新方法。
search_text: Adaptive Feature Fusion for Cooperative Perception using LiDAR Point Clouds 使用 LiDAR 点云进行协作感知的自适应特征融合 Cooperative perception allows a Connected Autonomous Vehicle (CAV) to interact with the other CAVs in the vicinity to enhance perception of surrounding objects to increase safety and reliability. It can compensate for the limitations of the conventional vehicular perception such as blind spots, low resolution, and weather effects. An effective feature fusion model for the intermediate fusion methods of cooperative perception can improve feature selection and information aggregation to further enhance the perception accuracy. We propose adaptive feature fusion models with trainable feature selection modules. One of our proposed models Spatial-wise Adaptive feature Fusion (S-AdaFusion) outperforms all other State-of-the-Arts (SOTAs) on two subsets of the OPV2V dataset: Default CARLA Towns for vehicle detection and the Culver City for domain adaptation. In addition, previous studies have only tested cooperative perception for vehicle detection. A pedestrian, however, is much more likely to be seriously injured in a traffic accident. We evaluate the performance of cooperative perception for both vehicle and pedestrian detection using the CODD dataset. Our architecture achieves higher Average Precision (AP) than other existing models for both vehicle and pedestrian detection on the CODD dataset. The experiments demonstrate that cooperative perception also improves the pedestrian detection accuracy compared to the conventional single vehicle perception process. 协作感知允许联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 与附近的其他 CAV 交互，以增强对周围物体的感知，从而提高安全性和可靠性。它可以弥补传统车辆感知的局限性，例如盲点、低分辨率和天气影响。协同感知中间融合方法的有效特征融合模型可以改进特征选择和信息聚合，进一步提高感知精度。我们提出了具有可训练特征选择模块的自适应特征融合模型。我们提出的模型之一空间自适应特征融合（S-AdaFusion）在 OPV2V 数据集的两个子集上优于所有其他最先进的模型（SOTA）：用于车辆检测的默认 CARLA 城镇和用于域适应的卡尔弗城。此外，之前的研究仅测试了车辆检测的协作感知。然而，行人在交通事故中受重伤的可能性要大得多。我们使用 CODD 数据集评估车辆和行人检测的协作感知性能。我们的架构在 CODD 数据集上的车辆和行人检测方面比其他现有模型实现了更高的平均精度 (AP)。实验表明，与传统的单车辆感知过程相比，协作感知还提高了行人检测精度。 本文提出了一种自适应特征融合模型（S-AdaFusion），用于改进车联网自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的协同感知性能，通过LiDAR点云数据提升周围物体检测的准确性和可靠性。 Donghao Qiao,Farhana Zulkernine cs.CV

authors_text: Lin Huang,Tomas Hodan,Lingni Ma,Linguang Zhang,Luan Tran,Christopher Twigg,Po-Chen Wu,Junsong Yuan,Cem Keskin,Robert Wang
title: Neural Correspondence Field for Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于物体姿态估计的神经对应场
abstract: We propose a method for estimating the 6DoF pose of a rigid object with an available 3D model from a single RGB image. Unlike classical correspondence-based methods which predict 3D object coordinates at pixels of the input image, the proposed method predicts 3D object coordinates at 3D query points sampled in the camera frustum. The move from pixels to 3D points, which is inspired by recent PIFu-style methods for 3D reconstruction, enables reasoning about the whole object, including its (self-)occluded parts. For a 3D query point associated with a pixel-aligned image feature, we train a fully-connected neural network to predict: (i) the corresponding 3D object coordinates, and (ii) the signed distance to the object surface, with the first defined only for query points in the surface vicinity. We call the mapping realized by this network as Neural Correspondence Field. The object pose is then robustly estimated from the predicted 3D-3D correspondences by the Kabsch-RANSAC algorithm. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on three BOP datasets and is shown superior especially in challenging cases with occlusion. The project website is at: linhuang17.github.io/NCF.
summary: We propose a method for estimating the 6DoF pose of a rigid object with an available 3D model from a single RGB image. Unlike classical correspondence-based methods which predict 3D object coordinates at pixels of the input image, the proposed method predicts 3D object coordinates at 3D query points sampled in the camera frustum. The move from pixels to 3D points, which is inspired by recent PIFu-style methods for 3D reconstruction, enables reasoning about the whole object, including its (self-)occluded parts. For a 3D query point associated with a pixel-aligned image feature, we train a fully-connected neural network to predict: (i) the corresponding 3D object coordinates, and (ii) the signed distance to the object surface, with the first defined only for query points in the surface vicinity. We call the mapping realized by this network as Neural Correspondence Field. The object pose is then robustly estimated from the predicted 3D-3D correspondences by the Kabsch-RANSAC algorithm. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on three BOP datasets and is shown superior especially in challenging cases with occlusion. The project website is at: linhuang17.github.io/NCF.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种利用单个 RGB 图像的可用 3D 模型来估计刚性物体 6DoF 位姿的方法。与预测输入图像像素处的 3D 对象坐标的经典基于对应关系的方法不同，所提出的方法预测在相机平截头体中采样的 3D 查询点处的 3D 对象坐标。从像素到 3D 点的转变受到最近用于 3D 重建的 PIFu 风格方法的启发，可以对整个对象（包括其（自）遮挡部分）进行推理。对于与像素对齐图像特征相关的 3D 查询点，我们训练一个全连接神经网络来预测：(i) 相应的 3D 对象坐标，以及 (ii) 到对象表面的有符号距离，第一个仅针对表面附近的查询点定义。我们将这个网络实现的映射称为神经对应场。然后通过 Kabsch-RANSAC 算法根据预测的 3D-3D 对应关系稳健地估计物体姿态。所提出的方法在三个 BOP 数据集上实现了最先进的结果，并且特别是在具有遮挡的挑战性情况下表现出优越性。项目网址为：linhuang17.github.io/NCF。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经对应场的方法，用于从单张RGB图像中估计刚性物体的6自由度姿态。
AI.motivation: 传统基于对应关系的方法在处理物体遮挡部分时效果有限，本文通过将预测目标从图像像素转向相机视锥体内的3D查询点，结合PIFu风格的3D重建思路，实现对物体整体（包括遮挡区域）的更准确建模。
AI.method: 训练全连接神经网络预测3D查询点的物体坐标及到表面的有符号距离，通过Kabsch-RANSAC算法从预测的3D-3D对应关系中鲁棒估计物体姿态。
AI.result: 在三个BOP数据集上达到最先进水平，尤其在遮挡等挑战性场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 神经对应场方法通过3D空间建模有效提升了遮挡场景下的物体姿态估计精度，验证了其在复杂情况下的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Santo Fortunato,M. E. J. Newman
title: 20 years of network community detection
title_zh: 网络社区检测20年
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure. Published in Nature Physics
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure. Published in Nature Physics
abstract: A fundamental technical challenge in the analysis of network data is the automated discovery of communities - groups of nodes that are strongly connected or that share similar features or roles. In this commentary we review progress in the field over the last 20 years.
summary: A fundamental technical challenge in the analysis of network data is the automated discovery of communities - groups of nodes that are strongly connected or that share similar features or roles. In this commentary we review progress in the field over the last 20 years.
abstract_zh: 网络数据分析的一个基本技术挑战是自动发现社区 - 紧密连接或共享相似功能或角色的节点组。在这篇评论中，我们回顾了过去 20 年该领域的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了过去20年网络社区检测领域的技术进展，重点分析了自动发现网络中紧密连接或功能相似节点群体的方法演变。
AI.motivation: 网络数据的复杂性要求自动化社区发现技术以揭示隐藏的结构模式，这对社交网络分析、生物信息学等领域具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统梳理了20年间主要算法框架（如模块度优化、谱聚类等）及技术迭代路径。
AI.result: 总结了经典方法的理论基础、计算效率与适用场景，并指出当前研究在处理动态网络和大规模数据时的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 尽管社区检测技术取得显著进展，但面对现实网络的复杂性和动态性，仍需开发更鲁棒且可解释的算法框架。

authors_text: Sayef Azad Sakin,Alex Bigelow,R. Tohid,Connor Scully-Allison,Carlos Scheidegger,Steven R. Brandt,Christopher Taylor,Kevin A. Huck,Hartmut Kaiser,Katherine E. Isaacs
title: Traveler: Navigating Task Parallel Traces for Performance Analysis
title_zh: Traveler：导航任务并行跟踪以进行性能分析
abstract: Understanding the behavior of software in execution is a key step in identifying and fixing performance issues. This is especially important in high performance computing contexts where even minor performance tweaks can translate into large savings in terms of computational resource use. To aid performance analysis, developers may collect an execution trace - a chronological log of program activity during execution. As traces represent the full history, developers can discover a wide array of possibly previously unknown performance issues, making them an important artifact for exploratory performance analysis. However, interactive trace visualization is difficult due to issues of data size and complexity of meaning. Traces represent nanosecond-level events across many parallel processes, meaning the collected data is often large and difficult to explore. The rise of asynchronous task parallel programming paradigms complicates the relation between events and their probable cause. To address these challenges, we conduct a continuing design study in collaboration with high performance computing researchers. We develop diverse and hierarchical ways to navigate and represent execution trace data in support of their trace analysis tasks. Through an iterative design process, we developed Traveler, an integrated visualization platform for task parallel traces. Traveler provides multiple linked interfaces to help navigate trace data from multiple contexts. We evaluate the utility of Traveler through feedback from users and a case study, finding that integrating multiple modes of navigation in our design supported performance analysis tasks and led to the discovery of previously unknown behavior in a distributed array library.
summary: Understanding the behavior of software in execution is a key step in identifying and fixing performance issues. This is especially important in high performance computing contexts where even minor performance tweaks can translate into large savings in terms of computational resource use. To aid performance analysis, developers may collect an execution trace - a chronological log of program activity during execution. As traces represent the full history, developers can discover a wide array of possibly previously unknown performance issues, making them an important artifact for exploratory performance analysis. However, interactive trace visualization is difficult due to issues of data size and complexity of meaning. Traces represent nanosecond-level events across many parallel processes, meaning the collected data is often large and difficult to explore. The rise of asynchronous task parallel programming paradigms complicates the relation between events and their probable cause. To address these challenges, we conduct a continuing design study in collaboration with high performance computing researchers. We develop diverse and hierarchical ways to navigate and represent execution trace data in support of their trace analysis tasks. Through an iterative design process, we developed Traveler, an integrated visualization platform for task parallel traces. Traveler provides multiple linked interfaces to help navigate trace data from multiple contexts. We evaluate the utility of Traveler through feedback from users and a case study, finding that integrating multiple modes of navigation in our design supported performance analysis tasks and led to the discovery of previously unknown behavior in a distributed array library.
abstract_zh: 了解软件在执行中的行为是识别和修复性能问题的关键步骤。这在高性能计算环境中尤其重要，即使是很小的性能调整也可以转化为计算资源使用方面的大量节省。为了帮助性能分析，开发人员可以收集执行跟踪 - 执行期间程序活动的时间顺序日志。由于跟踪代表了完整的历史记录，因此开发人员可以发现各种可能以前未知的性能问题，使其成为探索性性能分析的重要工件。然而，由于数据大小和含义复杂性的问题，交互式轨迹可视化很困难。痕迹表示许多并行进程中的纳秒级事件，这意味着收集的数据通常很大且难以探索。异步任务并行编程范例的兴起使事件及其可能原因之间的关系变得复杂。为了应对这些挑战，我们与高性能计算研究人员合作进行持续的设计研究。我们开发了多种分层方式来导航和表示执行跟踪数据，以支持他们的跟踪分析任务。通过迭代设计过程，我们开发了 Traveler，一个用于任务并行跟踪的集成可视化平台。 Traveler 提供多个链接接口来帮助导航来自多个上下文的跟踪数据。我们通过用户反馈和案例研究评估了 Traveler 的实用性，发现在我们的设计中集成多种导航模式支持性能分析任务，并导致在分布式数组库中发现以前未知的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Traveler，一种用于任务并行执行轨迹的可视化分析平台，旨在解决高性能计算中轨迹数据复杂性和规模带来的性能分析难题。
AI.motivation: 高性能计算中，执行轨迹数据量庞大且复杂，现有可视化工具难以有效支持探索性性能分析，尤其在异步任务并行编程范式下事件关联性更难解析。
AI.method: 通过与高性能计算研究人员合作的迭代设计研究，开发了多层级、多视角的轨迹导航与表示方法，构建了集成可视化平台Traveler，提供多上下文联动的交互界面。
AI.result: 用户反馈和案例研究表明，Traveler的多模式导航设计有效支持了性能分析任务，并发现分布式数组库中的未知行为问题。
AI.conclusion: 集成多模式导航的可视化工具能显著提升任务并行轨迹分析效率，为高性能计算中的性能优化提供新方法。

search_text: Traveler: Navigating Task Parallel Traces for Performance Analysis Traveler：导航任务并行跟踪以进行性能分析 Understanding the behavior of software in execution is a key step in identifying and fixing performance issues. This is especially important in high performance computing contexts where even minor performance tweaks can translate into large savings in terms of computational resource use. To aid performance analysis, developers may collect an execution trace - a chronological log of program activity during execution. As traces represent the full history, developers can discover a wide array of possibly previously unknown performance issues, making them an important artifact for exploratory performance analysis. However, interactive trace visualization is difficult due to issues of data size and complexity of meaning. Traces represent nanosecond-level events across many parallel processes, meaning the collected data is often large and difficult to explore. The rise of asynchronous task parallel programming paradigms complicates the relation between events and their probable cause. To address these challenges, we conduct a continuing design study in collaboration with high performance computing researchers. We develop diverse and hierarchical ways to navigate and represent execution trace data in support of their trace analysis tasks. Through an iterative design process, we developed Traveler, an integrated visualization platform for task parallel traces. Traveler provides multiple linked interfaces to help navigate trace data from multiple contexts. We evaluate the utility of Traveler through feedback from users and a case study, finding that integrating multiple modes of navigation in our design supported performance analysis tasks and led to the discovery of previously unknown behavior in a distributed array library. 了解软件在执行中的行为是识别和修复性能问题的关键步骤。这在高性能计算环境中尤其重要，即使是很小的性能调整也可以转化为计算资源使用方面的大量节省。为了帮助性能分析，开发人员可以收集执行跟踪 - 执行期间程序活动的时间顺序日志。由于跟踪代表了完整的历史记录，因此开发人员可以发现各种可能以前未知的性能问题，使其成为探索性性能分析的重要工件。然而，由于数据大小和含义复杂性的问题，交互式轨迹可视化很困难。痕迹表示许多并行进程中的纳秒级事件，这意味着收集的数据通常很大且难以探索。异步任务并行编程范例的兴起使事件及其可能原因之间的关系变得复杂。为了应对这些挑战，我们与高性能计算研究人员合作进行持续的设计研究。我们开发了多种分层方式来导航和表示执行跟踪数据，以支持他们的跟踪分析任务。通过迭代设计过程，我们开发了 Traveler，一个用于任务并行跟踪的集成可视化平台。 Traveler 提供多个链接接口来帮助导航来自多个上下文的跟踪数据。我们通过用户反馈和案例研究评估了 Traveler 的实用性，发现在我们的设计中集成多种导航模式支持性能分析任务，并导致在分布式数组库中发现以前未知的行为。 本文提出Traveler，一种用于任务并行执行轨迹的可视化分析平台，旨在解决高性能计算中轨迹数据复杂性和规模带来的性能分析难题。 Sayef Azad Sakin,Alex Bigelow,R. authors_text: Fanyou Wu,Yang Liu,Rado Gazo,Benes Bedrich,Xiaobo Qu
title: Some Practice for Improving the Search Results of E-commerce
title_zh: 提高电子商务搜索结果的一些实践
comment: Submitted to Amazon KDD Cup 2022 workshop
comments: Submitted to Amazon KDD Cup 2022 workshop
abstract: In the Amazon KDD Cup 2022, we aim to apply natural language processing methods to improve the quality of search results that can significantly enhance user experience and engagement with search engines for e-commerce. We discuss our practical solution for this competition, ranking 6th in task one, 2nd in task two, and 2nd in task 3. The code is available at https://github.com/wufanyou/KDD-Cup-2022-Amazon.
summary: In the Amazon KDD Cup 2022, we aim to apply natural language processing methods to improve the quality of search results that can significantly enhance user experience and engagement with search engines for e-commerce. We discuss our practical solution for this competition, ranking 6th in task one, 2nd in task two, and 2nd in task 3. The code is available at https://github.com/wufanyou/KDD-Cup-2022-Amazon.
abstract_zh: 在 Amazon KDD Cup 2022 中，我们的目标是应用自然语言处理方法来提高搜索结果的质量，从而显着增强用户体验以及与电子商务搜索引擎的互动。我们讨论了本次比赛的实用解决方案，在任务一中排名第六，在任务二中排名第二，在任务三中排名第二。代码可在 https://github.com/wufanyou/KDD-Cup-2022-Amazon 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过自然语言处理方法提升电商搜索结果质量，以增强用户体验和搜索参与度。
AI.motivation: 优化电商搜索结果能显著提升用户满意度和平台互动效率，是电商领域的重要研究方向。
AI.method: 采用自然语言处理技术，结合搜索结果排序算法，针对商品标题、描述等文本信息进行语义分析和相关性优化。
AI.result: 在Amazon KDD Cup 2022竞赛中，团队在任务一排名第六，任务二和任务三均位列第二。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言处理方法有效提升了搜索质量，公开的代码为后续研究提供了实践参考。

authors_text: Ayush Kumar,Ashish Kumar,Aakanksha Prasad,Michael Burch,Shenghui Cheng,Klaus Mueller
title: An Open Source Interactive Visual Analytics Tool for Comparative Programming Comprehension
title_zh: 用于比较编程理解的开源交互式视觉分析工具
abstract: This paper proposes an open source visual analytics tool consisting of several views and perspectives on eye movement data collected during code reading tasks when writing computer programs. Hence the focus of this work is on code and program comprehension. The source code is shown as a visual stimulus. It can be inspected in combination with overlaid scanpaths in which the saccades can be visually encoded in several forms, including straight, curved, and orthogonal lines, modifiable by interaction techniques. The tool supports interaction techniques like filter functions, aggregations, data sampling, and many more. We illustrate the usefulness of our tool by applying it to the eye movements of 216 programmers of multiple expertise levels that were collected during two code comprehension tasks. Our tool helped to analyze the difference between the strategic program comprehension of programmers based on their demographic background, time taken to complete the task, choice of programming task, and expertise.
summary: This paper proposes an open source visual analytics tool consisting of several views and perspectives on eye movement data collected during code reading tasks when writing computer programs. Hence the focus of this work is on code and program comprehension. The source code is shown as a visual stimulus. It can be inspected in combination with overlaid scanpaths in which the saccades can be visually encoded in several forms, including straight, curved, and orthogonal lines, modifiable by interaction techniques. The tool supports interaction techniques like filter functions, aggregations, data sampling, and many more. We illustrate the usefulness of our tool by applying it to the eye movements of 216 programmers of multiple expertise levels that were collected during two code comprehension tasks. Our tool helped to analyze the difference between the strategic program comprehension of programmers based on their demographic background, time taken to complete the task, choice of programming task, and expertise.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种开源视觉分析工具，其中包含在编写计算机程序时的代码阅读任务期间收集的眼动数据的多种视图和观点。因此，这项工作的重点是代码和程序的理解。源代码显示为视觉刺激。它可以与重叠的扫描路径结合起来进行检查，其中扫视可以以多种形式进行视觉编码，包括直线、曲线和正交线，并可通过交互技术进行修改。该工具支持过滤函数、聚合、数据采样等交互技术。我们通过将我们的工具应用于在两次代码理解任务中收集的 216 名具有多个专业水平的程序员的眼球运动来说明该工具的有用性。我们的工具有助于根据程序员的人口背景、完成任务所需的时间、编程任务的选择和专业知识来分析他们的战略程序理解之间的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种开源的可视化分析工具，用于比较程序员在阅读代码时的眼动数据，以研究编程理解的差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对编程理解过程中眼动数据的交互式分析工具，难以全面比较不同程序员的策略和影响因素。
AI.method: 开发了包含多视图和交互功能的工具，支持眼动轨迹可视化（如直线、曲线等）、过滤、聚合分析，并应用于216名程序员的代码理解任务数据。
AI.result: 工具有效揭示了程序员在任务完成时间、编程选择、专业知识和人口统计背景下的战略理解差异。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为编程理解研究提供了可交互的分析框架，有助于深入探索影响代码理解的多维因素。

Our tool helped to analyze the difference between the strategic program comprehension of programmers based on their demographic background, time taken to complete the task, choice of programming task, and expertise. 本文提出了一种开源视觉分析工具，其中包含在编写计算机程序时的代码阅读任务期间收集的眼动数据的多种视图和观点。因此，这项工作的重点是代码和程序的理解。源代码显示为视觉刺激。它可以与重叠的扫描路径结合起来进行检查，其中扫视可以以多种形式进行视觉编码，包括直线、曲线和正交线，并可通过交互技术进行修改。该工具支持过滤函数、聚合、数据采样等交互技术。我们通过将我们的工具应用于在两次代码理解任务中收集的 216 名具有多个专业水平的程序员的眼球运动来说明该工具的有用性。我们的工具有助于根据程序员的人口背景、完成任务所需的时间、编程任务的选择和专业知识来分析他们的战略程序理解之间的差异。 本文提出了一种开源的可视化分析工具，用于比较程序员在阅读代码时的眼动数据，以研究编程理解的差异。 Ayush Kumar,Ashish Kumar,Aakanksha Prasad,Michael Burch,Shenghui Cheng,Klaus Mueller cs.HC,cs.IR

authors_text: Nazanin Moradinasab,Yash Sharma,Laura S. Shankman,Gary K. Owens,Donald E. Brown
title: Weakly Supervised Deep Instance Nuclei Detection using Points Annotation in 3D Cardiovascular Immunofluorescent Images
title_zh: 使用 3D 心血管免疫荧光图像中的点注释进行弱监督深层实例核检测
abstract: Two major causes of death in the United States and worldwide are stroke and myocardial infarction. The underlying cause of both is thrombi released from ruptured or eroded unstable atherosclerotic plaques that occlude vessels in the heart (myocardial infarction) or the brain (stroke). Clinical studies show that plaque composition plays a more important role than lesion size in plaque rupture or erosion events. To determine the plaque composition, various cell types in 3D cardiovascular immunofluorescent images of plaque lesions are counted. However, counting these cells manually is expensive, time-consuming, and prone to human error. These challenges of manual counting motivate the need for an automated approach to localize and count the cells in images. The purpose of this study is to develop an automatic approach to accurately detect and count cells in 3D immunofluorescent images with minimal annotation effort. In this study, we used a weakly supervised learning approach to train the HoVer-Net segmentation model using point annotations to detect nuclei in fluorescent images. The advantage of using point annotations is that they require less effort as opposed to pixel-wise annotation. To train the HoVer-Net model using point annotations, we adopted a popularly used cluster labeling approach to transform point annotations into accurate binary masks of cell nuclei. Traditionally, these approaches have generated binary masks from point annotations, leaving a region around the object unlabeled (which is typically ignored during model training). However, these areas may contain important information that helps determine the boundary between cells. Therefore, we used the entropy minimization loss function in these areas to encourage the model to output more confident predictions on the unlabeled areas. Our comparison studies indicate that the HoVer-Net model trained using our weakly ...

abstract_zh: 美国和全世界的两大死亡原因是中风和心肌梗塞。两者的根本原因是破裂或侵蚀的不稳定动脉粥样硬化斑块释放出血栓，这些斑块堵塞了心脏（心肌梗死）或大脑（中风）的血管。临床研究表明，在斑块破裂或侵蚀事件中，斑块成分比病变大小起着更重要的作用。为了确定斑块组成，对斑块病变的 3D 心血管免疫荧光图像中的各种细胞类型进行计数。然而，手动计数这些细胞既昂贵又耗时，而且容易出现人为错误。手动计数的这些挑战促使人们需要一种自动化方法来定位和计数图像中的细胞。本研究的目的是开发一种自动方法，以最少的注释工作准确检测和计数 3D 免疫荧光图像中的细胞。在本研究中，我们使用弱监督学习方法来训练 HoVer-Net 分割模型，使用点注释来检测荧光图像中的细胞核。使用点注释的优点是与像素注释相比，它们需要更少的精力。为了使用点注释训练 HoVer-Net 模型，我们采用了一种常用的聚类标记方法，将点注释转换为细胞核的精确二进制掩模。传统上，这些方法从点注释生成二进制掩码，留下对象周围的未标记区域（在模型训练过程中通常会被忽略）。然而，这些区域可能包含有助于确定单元之间边界的重要信息。因此，我们在这些区域中使用熵最小化损失函数来鼓励模型在未标记区域上输出更可信的预测。我们的比较研究表明，HoVer-Net 模型使用我们的弱训练......

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督深度学习方法，利用点标注训练HoVer-Net模型，在3D心血管免疫荧光图像中自动检测和计数细胞核。
AI.motivation: 手动计数3D心血管免疫荧光图像中的细胞核成本高、耗时且易出错，需开发自动化方法以减少标注工作量并提高准确性。
AI.method: 采用弱监督学习框架，将点标注转化为二值掩码，并通过熵最小化损失函数优化未标注区域的预测边界，改进HoVer-Net模型训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在细胞核检测任务上优于传统像素级标注方法，且显著降低标注成本。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督点标注方法可有效用于3D医学图像中的细胞实例检测，为自动化病理分析提供可行方案。

authors_text: B. G. Palm,F. M. Bayer,R. Machado,M. I. Pettersson,V. T. Vu,R. J. Cintra
title: Robust Rayleigh Regression Method for SAR Image Processing in Presence of Outliers
title_zh: 存在异常值的SAR图像处理的鲁棒瑞利回归方法
abstract: The presence of outliers (anomalous values) in synthetic aperture radar (SAR) data and the misspecification in statistical image models may result in inaccurate inferences. To avoid such issues, the Rayleigh regression model based on a robust estimation process is proposed as a more realistic approach to model this type of data. This paper aims at obtaining Rayleigh regression model parameter estimators robust to the presence of outliers. The proposed approach considered the weighted maximum likelihood method and was submitted to numerical experiments using simulated and measured SAR images. Monte Carlo simulations were employed for the numerical assessment of the proposed robust estimator performance in finite signal lengths, their sensitivity to outliers, and the breakdown point. For instance, the non-robust estimators show a relative bias value $65$-fold larger than the results provided by the robust approach in corrupted signals. In terms of sensitivity analysis and break down point, the robust scheme resulted in a reduction of about $96\%$ and $10\%$, respectively, in the mean absolute value of both measures, in compassion to the non-robust estimators. Moreover, two SAR data sets were used to compare the ground type and anomaly detection results of the proposed robust scheme with competing methods in the literature.
summary: The presence of outliers (anomalous values) in synthetic aperture radar (SAR) data and the misspecification in statistical image models may result in inaccurate inferences. To avoid such issues, the Rayleigh regression model based on a robust estimation process is proposed as a more realistic approach to model this type of data. This paper aims at obtaining Rayleigh regression model parameter estimators robust to the presence of outliers. The proposed approach considered the weighted maximum likelihood method and was submitted to numerical experiments using simulated and measured SAR images. Monte Carlo simulations were employed for the numerical assessment of the proposed robust estimator performance in finite signal lengths, their sensitivity to outliers, and the breakdown point. For instance, the non-robust estimators show a relative bias value $65$-fold larger than the results provided by the robust approach in corrupted signals. In terms of sensitivity analysis and break down point, the robust scheme resulted in a reduction of about $96\%$ and $10\%$, respectively, in the mean absolute value of both measures, in compassion to the non-robust estimators. Moreover, two SAR data sets were used to compare the ground type and anomaly detection results of the proposed robust scheme with competing methods in the literature.
abstract_zh: 合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 数据中存在异常值（异常值）以及统计图像模型中的错误指定可能会导致不准确的推断。为了避免此类问题，提出了基于鲁棒估计过程的瑞利回归模型作为对此类数据进行建模的更现实的方法。本文旨在获得对异常值的存在具有鲁棒性的瑞利回归模型参数估计器。所提出的方法考虑了加权最大似然法，并使用模拟和测量的 SAR 图像进行数值实验。采用蒙特卡罗模拟对有限信号长度下所提出的稳健估计器性能、对异常值的敏感性以及故障点进行数值评估。例如，非鲁棒估计器显示的相对偏差值比鲁棒方法在损坏信号中提供的结果大 65 倍。在敏感性分析和分解点方面，稳健方案导致两种措施的平均绝对值分别减少约 $96\%$ 和 $10\%$，以照顾非稳健估计者。此外，使用两个SAR数据集将所提出的鲁棒方案的地面类型和异常检测结果与文献中的竞争方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稳健估计的瑞利回归方法，用于处理合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中的异常值问题，以提高参数估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: SAR数据中的异常值和统计模型误设会导致推断不准确，传统方法对此敏感，需开发更稳健的模型以提升可靠性。
AI.method: 采用加权最大似然法构建稳健估计模型，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟和实际SAR数据集验证其性能，对比非稳健估计器的偏差、敏感性和崩溃点。
AI.result: 稳健方法使相对偏差降低65倍，敏感性下降96%，崩溃点下降10%，并在实际数据中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提稳健瑞利回归方法有效抑制异常值影响，显著提升SAR图像处理的准确性和鲁棒性。

Moreover, two SAR data sets were used to compare the ground type and anomaly detection results of the proposed robust scheme with competing methods in the literature. 合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 数据中存在异常值（异常值）以及统计图像模型中的错误指定可能会导致不准确的推断。为了避免此类问题，提出了基于鲁棒估计过程的瑞利回归模型作为对此类数据进行建模的更现实的方法。本文旨在获得对异常值的存在具有鲁棒性的瑞利回归模型参数估计器。所提出的方法考虑了加权最大似然法，并使用模拟和测量的 SAR 图像进行数值实验。采用蒙特卡罗模拟对有限信号长度下所提出的稳健估计器性能、对异常值的敏感性以及故障点进行数值评估。例如，非鲁棒估计器显示的相对偏差值比鲁棒方法在损坏信号中提供的结果大 65 倍。在敏感性分析和分解点方面，稳健方案导致两种措施的平均绝对值分别减少约 $96\%$ 和 $10\%$，以照顾非稳健估计者。此外，使用两个SAR数据集将所提出的鲁棒方案的地面类型和异常检测结果与文献中的竞争方法进行比较。 本文提出了一种基于稳健估计的瑞利回归方法，用于处理合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中的异常值问题，以提高参数估计的准确性。 B. G. Palm,F. M. Bayer,R. Machado,M. I. Pettersson,V. T. Vu,R. J. Cintra stat.AP,cs.LG,eess.IV,physics.data-an,stat.ME

authors_text: Majd Hawasly,Jonathan Sadeghi,Morris Antonello,Stefano V. Albrecht,John Redford,Subramanian Ramamoorthy
title: Perspectives on the System-level Design of a Safe Autonomous Driving Stack
title_zh: 安全自动驾驶堆栈系统级设计展望
comment: AI Communications special issue on Multi-agent Systems Research in the UK
comments: AI Communications special issue on Multi-agent Systems Research in the UK
abstract: Achieving safe and robust autonomy is the key bottleneck on the path towards broader adoption of autonomous vehicles technology. This motivates going beyond extrinsic metrics such as miles between disengagement, and calls for approaches that embody safety by design. In this paper, we address some aspects of this challenge, with emphasis on issues of motion planning and prediction. We do this through description of novel approaches taken to solving selected sub-problems within an autonomous driving stack, in the process introducing the design philosophy being adopted within Five. This includes safe-by-design planning, interpretable as well as verifiable prediction, and modelling of perception errors to enable effective sim-to-real and real-to-sim transfer within the testing pipeline of a realistic autonomous system.
summary: Achieving safe and robust autonomy is the key bottleneck on the path towards broader adoption of autonomous vehicles technology. This motivates going beyond extrinsic metrics such as miles between disengagement, and calls for approaches that embody safety by design. In this paper, we address some aspects of this challenge, with emphasis on issues of motion planning and prediction. We do this through description of novel approaches taken to solving selected sub-problems within an autonomous driving stack, in the process introducing the design philosophy being adopted within Five. This includes safe-by-design planning, interpretable as well as verifiable prediction, and modelling of perception errors to enable effective sim-to-real and real-to-sim transfer within the testing pipeline of a realistic autonomous system.
abstract_zh: 实现安全和强大的自动驾驶是更广泛采用自动驾驶汽车技术的关键瓶颈。这促使我们超越诸如脱离接触之间的里程等外在指标，并呼吁采取在设计上体现安全性的方法。在本文中，我们解决了这一挑战的某些方面，重点是运动规划和预测问题。我们通过描述解决自动驾驶堆栈中选定的子问题所采用的新方法来实现这一点，在此过程中介绍了 Five 所采用的设计理念。这包括安全设计规划、可解释和可验证的预测以及感知错误建模，以在现实自主系统的测试管道中实现有效的模拟到真实和真实到模拟的转换。

AI.tldr: 本文从系统级设计视角探讨安全自动驾驶堆栈的构建，重点解决运动规划与预测问题，提出安全设计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶安全评估依赖外部指标（如脱离里程），难以保证内在安全性，需通过设计层面的改进实现本质安全。
AI.method: 提出安全设计规划框架、可解释可验证的预测模型，并通过感知误差建模实现仿真与现实环境的双向迁移验证。
AI.result: 构建了包含安全规划、预测验证与误差建模的自动驾驶测试流程，验证了设计哲学在实际系统中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 安全自动驾驶需从系统设计源头保障，通过可解释性、验证性与仿真迁移能力的结合可有效提升整体安全性。

authors_text: Yulong Cao,Danfei Xu,Xinshuo Weng,Zhuoqing Mao,Anima Anandkumar,Chaowei Xiao,Marco Pavone
title: Robust Trajectory Prediction against Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 针对对抗性攻击的稳健轨迹预测
abstract: Trajectory prediction using deep neural networks (DNNs) is an essential component of autonomous driving (AD) systems. However, these methods are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, leading to serious consequences such as collisions. In this work, we identify two key ingredients to defend trajectory prediction models against adversarial attacks including (1) designing effective adversarial training methods and (2) adding domain-specific data augmentation to mitigate the performance degradation on clean data. We demonstrate that our method is able to improve the performance by 46% on adversarial data and at the cost of only 3% performance degradation on clean data, compared to the model trained with clean data. Additionally, compared to existing robust methods, our method can improve performance by 21% on adversarial examples and 9% on clean data. Our robust model is evaluated with a planner to study its downstream impacts. We demonstrate that our model can significantly reduce the severe accident rates (e.g., collisions and off-road driving).
summary: Trajectory prediction using deep neural networks (DNNs) is an essential component of autonomous driving (AD) systems. However, these methods are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, leading to serious consequences such as collisions. In this work, we identify two key ingredients to defend trajectory prediction models against adversarial attacks including (1) designing effective adversarial training methods and (2) adding domain-specific data augmentation to mitigate the performance degradation on clean data. We demonstrate that our method is able to improve the performance by 46% on adversarial data and at the cost of only 3% performance degradation on clean data, compared to the model trained with clean data. Additionally, compared to existing robust methods, our method can improve performance by 21% on adversarial examples and 9% on clean data. Our robust model is evaluated with a planner to study its downstream impacts. We demonstrate that our model can significantly reduce the severe accident rates (e.g., collisions and off-road driving).
abstract_zh: 使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 的轨迹预测是自动驾驶 (AD) 系统的重要组成部分。然而，这些方法很容易受到对抗性攻击，导致碰撞等严重后果。在这项工作中，我们确定了防御轨迹预测模型免受对抗性攻击的两个关键要素，包括（1）设计有效的对抗性训练方法和（2）添加特定于领域的数据增强以减轻干净数据的性能下降。我们证明，与使用干净数据训练的模型相比，我们的方法能够将对抗性数据的性能提高 46%，而在干净数据上的性能仅下降 3%。此外，与现有的稳健方法相比，我们的方法可以将对抗性示例的性能提高 21%，将干净数据的性能提高 9%。我们的稳健模型由规划者进行评估，以研究其下游影响。我们证明我们的模型可以显着降低严重事故率（例如碰撞和越野驾驶）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对对抗攻击的鲁棒轨迹预测方法，通过改进深度神经网络以提升自动驾驶系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型在对抗攻击下易导致严重事故（如碰撞），需提升模型鲁棒性以保障自动驾驶安全。
AI.method: 结合对抗训练与领域特定数据增强，平衡对抗样本防御与清洁数据性能。
AI.result: 在对抗数据上性能提升46%，清洁数据仅下降3%；相较现有方法，对抗样本提升21%，清洁数据提升9%；显著降低严重事故率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效增强轨迹预测模型的鲁棒性，在防御对抗攻击的同时保持较高预测精度，可降低自动驾驶场景中的碰撞与越界风险。

search_text: Robust Trajectory Prediction against Adversarial Attacks 针对对抗性攻击的稳健轨迹预测 Trajectory prediction using deep neural networks (DNNs) is an essential component of autonomous driving (AD) systems. However, these methods are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, leading to serious consequences such as collisions. In this work, we identify two key ingredients to defend trajectory prediction models against adversarial attacks including (1) designing effective adversarial training methods and (2) adding domain-specific data augmentation to mitigate the performance degradation on clean data. We demonstrate that our method is able to improve the performance by 46% on adversarial data and at the cost of only 3% performance degradation on clean data, compared to the model trained with clean data. Additionally, compared to existing robust methods, our method can improve performance by 21% on adversarial examples and 9% on clean data. Our robust model is evaluated with a planner to study its downstream impacts. We demonstrate that our model can significantly reduce the severe accident rates (e.g., collisions and off-road driving). 使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 的轨迹预测是自动驾驶 (AD) 系统的重要组成部分。然而，这些方法很容易受到对抗性攻击，导致碰撞等严重后果。在这项工作中，我们确定了防御轨迹预测模型免受对抗性攻击的两个关键要素，包括（1）设计有效的对抗性训练方法和（2）添加特定于领域的数据增强以减轻干净数据的性能下降。我们证明，与使用干净数据训练的模型相比，我们的方法能够将对抗性数据的性能提高 46%，而在干净数据上的性能仅下降 3%。此外，与现有的稳健方法相比，我们的方法可以将对抗性示例的性能提高 21%，将干净数据的性能提高 9%。我们的稳健模型由规划者进行评估，以研究其下游影响。我们证明我们的模型可以显着降低严重事故率（例如碰撞和越野驾驶）。 本文提出了一种针对对抗攻击的鲁棒轨迹预测方法，通过改进深度神经网络以提升自动驾驶系统的安全性。 Yulong Cao,Danfei Xu,Xinshuo Weng,Zhuoqing Mao,Anima Anandkumar,Chaowei Xiao,Marco Pavone cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Qihao Liu,Yi Zhang,Song Bai,Alan Yuille
title: Explicit Occlusion Reasoning for Multi-person 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 多人 3D 人体姿势估计的显式遮挡推理
abstract: Occlusion poses a great threat to monocular multi-person 3D human pose estimation due to large variability in terms of the shape, appearance, and position of occluders. While existing methods try to handle occlusion with pose priors/constraints, data augmentation, or implicit reasoning, they still fail to generalize to unseen poses or occlusion cases and may make large mistakes when multiple people are present. Inspired by the remarkable ability of humans to infer occluded joints from visible cues, we develop a method to explicitly model this process that significantly improves bottom-up multi-person human pose estimation with or without occlusions. First, we split the task into two subtasks: visible keypoints detection and occluded keypoints reasoning, and propose a Deeply Supervised Encoder Distillation (DSED) network to solve the second one. To train our model, we propose a Skeleton-guided human Shape Fitting (SSF) approach to generate pseudo occlusion labels on the existing datasets, enabling explicit occlusion reasoning. Experiments show that explicitly learning from occlusions improves human pose estimation. In addition, exploiting feature-level information of visible joints allows us to reason about occluded joints more accurately. Our method outperforms both the state-of-the-art top-down and bottom-up methods on several benchmarks.
summary: Occlusion poses a great threat to monocular multi-person 3D human pose estimation due to large variability in terms of the shape, appearance, and position of occluders. While existing methods try to handle occlusion with pose priors/constraints, data augmentation, or implicit reasoning, they still fail to generalize to unseen poses or occlusion cases and may make large mistakes when multiple people are present. Inspired by the remarkable ability of humans to infer occluded joints from visible cues, we develop a method to explicitly model this process that significantly improves bottom-up multi-person human pose estimation with or without occlusions. First, we split the task into two subtasks: visible keypoints detection and occluded keypoints reasoning, and propose a Deeply Supervised Encoder Distillation (DSED) network to solve the second one. To train our model, we propose a Skeleton-guided human Shape Fitting (SSF) approach to generate pseudo occlusion labels on the existing datasets, enabling explicit occlusion reasoning. Experiments show that explicitly learning from occlusions improves human pose estimation. In addition, exploiting feature-level information of visible joints allows us to reason about occluded joints more accurately. Our method outperforms both the state-of-the-art top-down and bottom-up methods on several benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 由于遮挡物的形状、外观和位置存在很大的可变性，遮挡对单眼多人 3D 人体姿态估计构成了巨大的威胁。虽然现有的方法尝试使用姿势先验/约束、数据增强或隐式推理来处理遮挡，但它们仍然无法泛化到未见过的姿势或遮挡情况，并且在多人存在时可能会犯很大的错误。受人类从可见线索推断遮挡关节的非凡能力的启发，我们开发了一种方法来显式建模该过程，该方法可显着改进有或没有遮挡的自下而上的多人人体姿势估计。首先，我们将任务分为两个子任务：可见关键点检测和遮挡关键点推理，并提出一种深度监督编码器蒸馏（DSED）网络来解决第二个子任务。为了训练我们的模型，我们提出了一种骨骼引导的人体形状拟合（SSF）方法来在现有数据集上生成伪遮挡标签，从而实现显式遮挡推理。实验表明，明确地从遮挡中学习可以改善人体姿势估计。此外，利用可见关节的特征级信息使我们能够更准确地推断被遮挡的关节。我们的方法在多个基准测试中都优于最先进的自上而下和自下而上的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种显式遮挡推理方法，用于改进多人3D人体姿态估计中的遮挡处理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理遮挡时依赖姿态先验或数据增强，但难以泛化到新场景或多人重叠情况，导致估计误差较大。
AI.method: 将任务拆分为可见关键点检测与遮挡关键点推理两部分，提出深度监督编码器蒸馏网络（DSED）及骨骼引导的人体形状拟合（SSF）方法生成伪遮挡标签。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在有无遮挡场景下均优于现有top-down和bottom-up方法，显著提升多人姿态估计精度。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模遮挡推理机制并结合可见关节特征，可有效提升复杂场景下的多人3D姿态估计性能。

search_text: Explicit Occlusion Reasoning for Multi-person 3D Human Pose Estimation 多人 3D 人体姿势估计的显式遮挡推理 Occlusion poses a great threat to monocular multi-person 3D human pose estimation due to large variability in terms of the shape, appearance, and position of occluders. While existing methods try to handle occlusion with pose priors/constraints, data augmentation, or implicit reasoning, they still fail to generalize to unseen poses or occlusion cases and may make large mistakes when multiple people are present. Inspired by the remarkable ability of humans to infer occluded joints from visible cues, we develop a method to explicitly model this process that significantly improves bottom-up multi-person human pose estimation with or without occlusions. First, we split the task into two subtasks: visible keypoints detection and occluded keypoints reasoning, and propose a Deeply Supervised Encoder Distillation (DSED) network to solve the second one. To train our model, we propose a Skeleton-guided human Shape Fitting (SSF) approach to generate pseudo occlusion labels on the existing datasets, enabling explicit occlusion reasoning. Experiments show that explicitly learning from occlusions improves human pose estimation. In addition, exploiting feature-level information of visible joints allows us to reason about occluded joints more accurately. Our method outperforms both the state-of-the-art top-down and bottom-up methods on several benchmarks. 由于遮挡物的形状、外观和位置存在很大的可变性，遮挡对单眼多人 3D 人体姿态估计构成了巨大的威胁。虽然现有的方法尝试使用姿势先验/约束、数据增强或隐式推理来处理遮挡，但它们仍然无法泛化到未见过的姿势或遮挡情况，并且在多人存在时可能会犯很大的错误。受人类从可见线索推断遮挡关节的非凡能力的启发，我们开发了一种方法来显式建模该过程，该方法可显着改进有或没有遮挡的自下而上的多人人体姿势估计。首先，我们将任务分为两个子任务：可见关键点检测和遮挡关键点推理，并提出一种深度监督编码器蒸馏（DSED）网络来解决第二个子任务。为了训练我们的模型，我们提出了一种骨骼引导的人体形状拟合（SSF）方法来在现有数据集上生成伪遮挡标签，从而实现显式遮挡推理。实验表明，明确地从遮挡中学习可以改善人体姿势估计。此外，利用可见关节的特征级信息使我们能够更准确地推断被遮挡的关节。我们的方法在多个基准测试中都优于最先进的自上而下和自下而上的方法。 本文提出一种显式遮挡推理方法，用于改进多人3D人体姿态估计中的遮挡处理问题。 Qihao Liu,Yi Zhang,Song Bai,Alan Yuille cs.CV

authors_text: R. J. Cintra,S. Duffner,C. Garcia,A. Leite
title: Low-complexity Approximate Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 低复杂度近似卷积神经网络
abstract: In this paper, we present an approach for minimizing the computational complexity of trained Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNet). The idea is to approximate all elements of a given ConvNet and replace the original convolutional filters and parameters (pooling and bias coefficients; and activation function) with efficient approximations capable of extreme reductions in computational complexity. Low-complexity convolution filters are obtained through a binary (zero-one) linear programming scheme based on the Frobenius norm over sets of dyadic rationals. The resulting matrices allow for multiplication-free computations requiring only addition and bit-shifting operations. Such low-complexity structures pave the way for low-power, efficient hardware designs. We applied our approach on three use cases of different complexity: (i) a "light" but efficient ConvNet for face detection (with around 1000 parameters); (ii) another one for hand-written digit classification (with more than 180000 parameters); and (iii) a significantly larger ConvNet: AlexNet with $\approx$1.2 million matrices. We evaluated the overall performance on the respective tasks for different levels of approximations. In all considered applications, very low-complexity approximations have been derived maintaining an almost equal classification performance.
summary: In this paper, we present an approach for minimizing the computational complexity of trained Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNet). The idea is to approximate all elements of a given ConvNet and replace the original convolutional filters and parameters (pooling and bias coefficients; and activation function) with efficient approximations capable of extreme reductions in computational complexity. Low-complexity convolution filters are obtained through a binary (zero-one) linear programming scheme based on the Frobenius norm over sets of dyadic rationals. The resulting matrices allow for multiplication-free computations requiring only addition and bit-shifting operations. Such low-complexity structures pave the way for low-power, efficient hardware designs. We applied our approach on three use cases of different complexity: (i) a "light" but efficient ConvNet for face detection (with around 1000 parameters); (ii) another one for hand-written digit classification (with more than 180000 parameters); and (iii) a significantly larger ConvNet: AlexNet with $\approx$1.2 million matrices. We evaluated the overall performance on the respective tasks for different levels of approximations. In all considered applications, very low-complexity approximations have been derived maintaining an almost equal classification performance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种最小化训练的卷积神经网络（ConvNet）的计算复杂性的方法。这个想法是近似给定 ConvNet 的所有元素，并用能够极大降低计算复杂性的有效近似替换原始卷积滤波器和参数（池化和偏置系数；以及激活函数）。低复杂度卷积滤波器是通过基于二进有理数集的 Frobenius 范数的二元（零一）线性规划方案获得的。所得矩阵允许进行无乘法计算，仅需要加法和位移操作。这种低复杂度的结构为低功耗、高效的硬件设计铺平了道路。我们将我们的方法应用于三个不同复杂度的用例：(i) 用于人脸检测的“轻量”但高效的 ConvNet（具有大约 1000 个参数）； (ii) 另一种用于手写数字分类（参数超过 180000 个）； (iii) 一个更大的 ConvNet：AlexNet，具有约 120 万美元的矩阵。我们评估了不同近似水平下各自任务的整体表现。在所有考虑的应用中，都得出了非常低复杂度的近似值，保持了几乎相同的分类性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种降低卷积神经网络计算复杂度的方法，同时保持分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN计算复杂度高，难以在资源受限设备上部署，需更高效方法。
AI.method: 通过二进制线性规划和Frobenius范数近似滤波器，用加法和位移操作替代乘法，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在三个不同规模的CNN应用中，近似模型保持了几乎相同的分类性能，显著降低计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低CNN复杂度，适用于多种规模网络，适合低功耗硬件部署。

authors_text: Simon Bilik,Tomas Zemcik,Lukas Kratochvila,Dominik Ricanek,Milos Richter,Sebastian Zambanini,Karel Horak
title: Machine Learning and Computer Vision Techniques in Continuous Beehive Monitoring Applications: A survey
title_zh: 连续蜂箱监控应用中的机器学习和计算机视觉技术：一项调查
abstract: Wide use and availability of the machine learning and computer vision techniques allows development of relatively complex monitoring systems in many domains. Besides the traditional industrial domain, new application appears also in biology and agriculture, where we could speak about the detection of infections, parasites and weeds, but also about automated monitoring and early warning systems. This is also connected with the introduction of the easily accessible hardware and development kits such as Arduino, or RaspberryPi family. In this paper, we survey 50 existing papers focusing on the methods of automated beehive monitoring methods using the computer vision techniques, particularly on the pollen and Varroa mite detection together with the bee traffic monitoring. Such systems could also be used for the monitoring of the honeybee colonies and for the inspection of their health state, which could identify potentially dangerous states before the situation is critical, or to better plan periodic bee colony inspections and therefore save significant costs. Later, we also include analysis of the research trends in this application field and we outline the possible direction of the new explorations. Our paper is aimed also at veterinary and apidology professionals and experts, who might not be familiar with machine learning to introduce them to its possibilities, therefore each family of applications is opened by a brief theoretical introduction and motivation related to its base method. We hope that this paper will inspire other scientists to use machine learning techniques for other applications in beehive monitoring.
summary: Wide use and availability of the machine learning and computer vision techniques allows development of relatively complex monitoring systems in many domains. Besides the traditional industrial domain, new application appears also in biology and agriculture, where we could speak about the detection of infections, parasites and weeds, but also about automated monitoring and early warning systems. This is also connected with the introduction of the easily accessible hardware and development kits such as Arduino, or RaspberryPi family. In this paper, we survey 50 existing papers focusing on the methods of automated beehive monitoring methods using the computer vision techniques, particularly on the pollen and Varroa mite detection together with the bee traffic monitoring. Later, we also include analysis of the research trends in this application field and we outline the possible direction of the new explorations. abstract_zh: 机器学习和计算机视觉技术的广泛使用和可用性允许在许多领域开发相对复杂的监控系统。除了传统的工业领域外，新的应用也出现在生物学和农业领域，我们可以谈论感染、寄生虫和杂草的检测，还可以谈论自动监测和预警系统。这也与易于访问的硬件和开发套件（例如 Arduino 或 RaspberryPi 系列）的引入有关。在本文中，我们调查了 50 篇现有论文，重点关注使用计算机视觉技术的自动蜂箱监测方法，特别是花粉和瓦螨检测以及蜜蜂流量监测。此类系统还可用于监测蜂群并检查其健康状态，这可以在情况危急之前识别潜在的危险状态，或者更好地计划定期蜂群检查，从而节省大量成本。随后，我们还对该应用领域的研究趋势进行了分析，并概述了新探索的可能方向。我们的论文还针对可能不熟悉机器学习的兽医和蜜蜂学专业人士和专家，向他们介绍其可能性，因此每个应用系列都通过与其基本方法相关的简短理论介绍和动机来打开。我们希望本文能够激励其他科学家将机器学习技术用于蜂箱监测的其他应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了机器学习与计算机视觉技术在蜂箱连续监测中的应用，重点分析了花粉、瓦螨检测及蜜蜂流量监控方法。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习和计算机视觉技术的普及以及开源硬件的发展，亟需探索其在农业生物领域的应用，如蜂群健康监测与早期预警系统。
AI.method: 通过调研50篇相关文献，系统梳理计算机视觉在蜂箱监测中的技术方法，并结合实际应用场景分析研究趋势。
AI.result: 总结了当前主流的花粉识别、瓦螨检测及蜜蜂流量分析技术，指出现有方法的局限性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非机器学习背景的养蜂专家提供了技术入门指南，旨在推动更多科学家将机器学习应用于蜂群健康监测领域。

tldr: 本文综述了机器学习与计算机视觉技术在蜂箱连续监测中的应用，重点分析了花粉、瓦螨检测及蜜蜂流量监控方法。
motivation: 随着机器学习和计算机视觉技术的普及以及开源硬件的发展，亟需探索其在农业生物领域的应用，如蜂群健康监测与早期预警系统。
method: 通过调研50篇相关文献，系统梳理计算机视觉在蜂箱监测中的技术方法，并结合实际应用场景分析研究趋势。
result: 总结了当前主流的花粉识别、瓦螨检测及蜜蜂流量分析技术，指出现有方法的局限性，并提出未来研究方向。
conclusion: 本文为非机器学习背景的养蜂专家提供了技术入门指南，旨在推动更多科学家将机器学习应用于蜂群健康监测领域。
search_text: Machine Learning and Computer Vision Techniques in Continuous Beehive Monitoring Applications: A survey 连续蜂箱监控应用中的机器学习和计算机视觉技术：一项调查 Wide use and availability of the machine learning and computer vision techniques allows development of relatively complex monitoring systems in many domains. Besides the traditional industrial domain, new application appears also in biology and agriculture, where we could speak about the detection of infections, parasites and weeds, but also about automated monitoring and early warning systems. This is also connected with the introduction of the easily accessible hardware and development kits such as Arduino, or RaspberryPi family. In this paper, we survey 50 existing papers focusing on the methods of automated beehive monitoring methods using the computer vision techniques, particularly on the pollen and Varroa mite detection together with the bee traffic monitoring. Such systems could also be used for the monitoring of the honeybee colonies and for the inspection of their health state, which could identify potentially dangerous states before the situation is critical, or to better plan periodic bee colony inspections and therefore save significant costs. Later, we also include analysis of the research trends in this application field and we outline the possible direction of the new explorations. Our paper is aimed also at veterinary and apidology professionals and experts, who might not be familiar with machine learning to introduce them to its possibilities, therefore each family of applications is opened by a brief theoretical introduction and motivation related to its base method. We hope that this paper will inspire other scientists to use machine learning techniques for other applications in beehive monitoring. 机器学习和计算机视觉技术的广泛使用和可用性允许在许多领域开发相对复杂的监控系统。除了传统的工业领域外，新的应用也出现在生物学和农业领域，我们可以谈论感染、寄生虫和杂草的检测，还可以谈论自动监测和预警系统。这也与易于访问的硬件和开发套件（例如 Arduino 或 RaspberryPi 系列）的引入有关。在本文中，我们调查了 50 篇现有论文，重点关注使用计算机视觉技术的自动蜂箱监测方法，特别是花粉和瓦螨检测以及蜜蜂流量监测。此类系统还可用于监测蜂群并检查其健康状态，这可以在情况危急之前识别潜在的危险状态，或者更好地计划定期蜂群检查，从而节省大量成本。随后，我们还对该应用领域的研究趋势进行了分析，并概述了新探索的可能方向。我们的论文还针对可能不熟悉机器学习的兽医和蜜蜂学专业人士和专家，向他们介绍其可能性，因此每个应用系列都通过与其基本方法相关的简短理论介绍和动机来打开。我们希望本文能够激励其他科学家将机器学习技术用于蜂箱监测的其他应用。 本文综述了机器学习与计算机视觉技术在蜂箱连续监测中的应用，重点分析了花粉、瓦螨检测及蜜蜂流量监控方法。 Simon Bilik,Tomas Zemcik,Lukas Kratochvila,Dominik Ricanek,Milos Richter,Sebastian Zambanini,Karel Horak cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Behnam Zeinali,Hadi Zandizari,J. Morris Chang
title: IMUNet: Efficient Regression Architecture for IMU Navigation and Positioning
title_zh: IMUNet：IMU 导航和定位的高效回归架构
abstract: Data-driven based method for navigation and positioning has absorbed attention in recent years and it outperforms all its competitor methods in terms of accuracy and efficiency. This paper introduces a new architecture called IMUNet which is accurate and efficient for position estimation on edge device implementation receiving a sequence of raw IMU measurements. The architecture has been compared with one dimension version of the state-of-the-art CNN networks that have been introduced recently for edge device implementation in terms of accuracy and efficiency. Moreover, a new method for collecting a dataset using IMU sensors on cell phones and Google ARCore API has been proposed and a publicly available dataset has been recorded. A comprehensive evaluation using four different datasets as well as the proposed dataset and real device implementation has been done to prove the performance of the architecture. All the code in both Pytorch and Tensorflow framework as well as the Android application code have been shared to improve further research.
summary: Data-driven based method for navigation and positioning has absorbed attention in recent years and it outperforms all its competitor methods in terms of accuracy and efficiency. This paper introduces a new architecture called IMUNet which is accurate and efficient for position estimation on edge device implementation receiving a sequence of raw IMU measurements. The architecture has been compared with one dimension version of the state-of-the-art CNN networks that have been introduced recently for edge device implementation in terms of accuracy and efficiency. Moreover, a new method for collecting a dataset using IMU sensors on cell phones and Google ARCore API has been proposed and a publicly available dataset has been recorded. A comprehensive evaluation using four different datasets as well as the proposed dataset and real device implementation has been done to prove the performance of the architecture. All the code in both Pytorch and Tensorflow framework as well as the Android application code have been shared to improve further research.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于数据驱动的导航和定位方法引起了人们的关注，它在准确性和效率方面优于所有竞争对手的方法。本文介绍了一种称为 IMUNet 的新架构，该架构对于接收一系列原始 IMU 测量值的边缘设备实现的位置估计准确且高效。该架构与最近为边缘设备实现引入的最先进 CNN 网络的一维版本在准确性和效率方面进行了比较。此外，还提出了一种使用手机上的 IMU 传感器和 Google ARCore API 收集数据集的新方法，并记录了公开可用的数据集。使用四个不同的数据集以及提出的数据集和实际设备实现进行了综合评估，以证明该架构的性能。 Pytorch 和 Tensorflow 框架中的所有代码以及 Android 应用程序代码都已共享，以促进进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IMUNet的高效回归架构，用于在边缘设备上基于原始IMU测量数据实现精准的导航与定位。
AI.motivation: 现有导航方法在边缘设备上存在精度与效率不足的问题，且缺乏公开的IMU数据集和开源实现阻碍了研究进展。
AI.method: 设计IMUNet架构并对比一维CNN网络；提出基于手机IMU传感器和Google ARCore API的数据集采集方法；通过四类数据集及实际设备验证性能，开源PyTorch/TensorFlow代码及Android应用。
AI.result: IMUNet在精度和效率上优于现有方法，新数据集已公开，代码开源显著提升了研究可复现性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: IMUNet为边缘设备IMU导航提供了高效解决方案，公开数据集与代码将推动该领域进一步研究与应用。

authors_text: Alexandra Antonova,Evelina Bakhturina,Boris Ginsburg
title: Thutmose Tagger: Single-pass neural model for Inverse Text Normalization
title_zh: 图特摩斯标记器：逆文本归一化的单通道神经模型
abstract: Inverse text normalization (ITN) is an essential post-processing step in automatic speech recognition (ASR). It converts numbers, dates, abbreviations, and other semiotic classes from the spoken form generated by ASR to their written forms. One can consider ITN as a Machine Translation task and use neural sequence-to-sequence models to solve it. Unfortunately, such neural models are prone to hallucinations that could lead to unacceptable errors. To mitigate this issue, we propose a single-pass token classifier model that regards ITN as a tagging task. The model assigns a replacement fragment to every input token or marks it for deletion or copying without changes. We present a dataset preparation method based on the granular alignment of ITN examples. The proposed model is less prone to hallucination errors. The model is trained on the Google Text Normalization dataset and achieves state-of-the-art sentence accuracy on both English and Russian test sets. One-to-one correspondence between tags and input words improves the interpretability of the model's predictions, simplifies debugging, and allows for post-processing corrections. The model is simpler than sequence-to-sequence models and easier to optimize in production settings. The model and the code to prepare the dataset is published as part of NeMo project.
summary: Inverse text normalization (ITN) is an essential post-processing step in automatic speech recognition (ASR). It converts numbers, dates, abbreviations, and other semiotic classes from the spoken form generated by ASR to their written forms. One can consider ITN as a Machine Translation task and use neural sequence-to-sequence models to solve it. Unfortunately, such neural models are prone to hallucinations that could lead to unacceptable errors. To mitigate this issue, we propose a single-pass token classifier model that regards ITN as a tagging task. The model assigns a replacement fragment to every input token or marks it for deletion or copying without changes. We present a dataset preparation method based on the granular alignment of ITN examples. The proposed model is less prone to hallucination errors. The model is trained on the Google Text Normalization dataset and achieves state-of-the-art sentence accuracy on both English and Russian test sets. One-to-one correspondence between tags and input words improves the interpretability of the model's predictions, simplifies debugging, and allows for post-processing corrections. The model is simpler than sequence-to-sequence models and easier to optimize in production settings. The model and the code to prepare the dataset is published as part of NeMo project.
abstract_zh: 逆文本归一化 (ITN) 是自动语音识别 (ASR) 中重要的后处理步骤。它将数字、日期、缩写和其他符号类别从 ASR 生成的口头形式转换为书面形式。人们可以将 ITN 视为一项机器翻译任务，并使用神经序列到序列模型来解决它。不幸的是，这样的神经模型很容易产生幻觉，从而导致不可接受的错误。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种单遍令牌分类器模型，将 ITN 视为标记任务。该模型为每个输入标记分配一个替换片段，或将其标记为删除或复制而不进行更改。我们提出了一种基于 ITN 示例粒度对齐的数据集准备方法。所提出的模型不太容易出现幻觉错误。该模型在 Google Text Normalization 数据集上进行训练，并在英语和俄语测试集上实现了最先进的句子准确性。标签和输入词之间的一一对应提高了模型预测的可解释性，简化了调试，并允许进行后处理更正。该模型比序列到序列模型更简单，并且更容易在生产设置中优化。模型和准备数据集的代码作为 NeMo 项目的一部分发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单次通过的神经标记模型Thutmose Tagger，用于逆文本归一化（ITN），将语音识别结果中的口语形式转换为书面形式。
AI.motivation: 现有基于序列到序列的ITN模型易产生幻觉错误，且复杂度高，需提出更简单且抗错误能力更强的解决方案。
AI.method: 将ITN视为标记任务，通过单次遍历的标记分类器为每个输入标记分配替换片段或标记为删除/复制，并基于细粒度对齐方法构建数据集。
AI.result: 模型在英文和俄文测试集上达到最先进水平，且具有更高的可解释性和生产优化便利性。
AI.conclusion: Thutmose Tagger通过标记方法有效减少幻觉错误，简化模型结构，提升ITN任务的准确性和实用性。

authors_text: Yuan Gong,Alexander H. Liu,Andrew Rouditchenko,James Glass
title: UAVM: Towards Unifying Audio and Visual Models
title_zh: UAVM：统一音频和视觉模型
comment: Published in Signal Processing Letters. Code at https://github.com/YuanGongND/uavm
comments: Published in Signal Processing Letters. Code at https://github.com/YuanGongND/uavm
abstract: Conventional audio-visual models have independent audio and video branches. In this work, we unify the audio and visual branches by designing a Unified Audio-Visual Model (UAVM). The UAVM achieves a new state-of-the-art audio-visual event classification accuracy of 65.8% on VGGSound. More interestingly, we also find a few intriguing properties of UAVM that the modality-independent counterparts do not have.
summary: Conventional audio-visual models have independent audio and video branches. In this work, we unify the audio and visual branches by designing a Unified Audio-Visual Model (UAVM). The UAVM achieves a new state-of-the-art audio-visual event classification accuracy of 65.8% on VGGSound. More interestingly, we also find a few intriguing properties of UAVM that the modality-independent counterparts do not have.
abstract_zh: 传统的视听模型具有独立的音频和视频分支。在这项工作中，我们通过设计统一视听模型（UAVM）来统一音频和视觉分支。 UAVM 在 VGGSound 上实现了新的最先进的视听事件分类准确率 65.8%。更有趣的是，我们还发现了 UAVM 的一些有趣的特性，而这些特性是与模态无关的对应物所不具备的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的音频-视觉模型（UAVM），用于提升音频-视觉事件分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统音频-视觉模型采用独立的音频和视频分支，无法有效捕捉跨模态交互信息，限制了整体性能。
AI.method: 设计统一的音频-视觉模型（UAVM），通过融合音频和视觉分支实现跨模态信息交互。
AI.result: 在VGGSound数据集上达到65.8%的分类准确率，刷新了当时的最先进水平，并发现UAVM具有模态无关模型不具备的特性。
AI.conclusion: 统一音频-视觉分支能够提升跨模态任务性能，并揭示了新型模型结构的潜在优势。
